Exodus28:20 ne mu lunyiriri olwokuna osseemu berulo, ne onuku, ne yasipero, ogateeke mu fuleemu ya zaabu." 
Exodus28:21 Wabeerewo amayinja kkumi n’abiri, n’amannya gaago ng’amannya g’abatabani ba Isirayiri. Gasalibwe bulungi ng’obubonero obuwoolebwa, nga ku buli limu kulambiddwako erinnya lyako okumalirayo ddala amannya g’ebika ekkumi n’ebibiri." 
Exodus28:22 “Ekyomukifuba kikolere enjegere ennange ng’emiguwa gya zaabu omuka. 
Exodus28:23 Era ekyomukifuba kikolere empeta za zaabu bbiri, oteeke empeta ezo zombi ku mikugiro ebiri egy’ekyomu kifuba." 
Exodus28:24 Oyise enjegere ebbiri eza zaabu mu mpeta ebbiri eziri ku mikugiro gy’eky’omu kifuba. 
Exodus28:25 Oddire enjuuyi ebbiri ezisigaddewo ez’enjegere ozikwasize ku fuleemu ebbiri, ozinywereze mu maaso g’eby’oku bibegabega byombi eby’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi." 
Exodus28:26 Era okole empeta bbiri eza zaabu, ozitunge ku mikugiro gy’eky’omu kifuba ku luuyi olw’omunda oluliraanye ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi." 
Exodus28:27 Era okole empeta bbiri eza zaabu oziteeke mu maaso, mu bitundu ebya wansi eby’eby’okubibegabega byombi eby’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, wagguluko okumpi n’oluzizi lw’omusipi olw’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi." 
Exodus28:28 Empeta ez’oku kyomukifuba zisibwe wamu n’empeta z’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi n’akaguwa aka bbululu, kagattibwe n’olukoba, olw’omu kifuba luleme kutaggulukuka ku kkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi." 
Exodus28:29 “Buli kiseera Alooni lw’anaayingiranga mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, anaabanga ayambadde amannya ga batabani ba Isirayiri ku kyomukifuba eky’okumala ensonga, nga kiri ku mutima gwe, kibeerenga ekijjukizo awali Mukama." 
Exodus28:30 Mu ky’omu kifuba eky’okumala ensonga, onooteekamu Ulimu ne Sumimu, era binaabeeranga ku mutima gwa Alooni buli lw’anaayingiranga awali Mukama. Bw’atyo Alooni anaasitulanga ekkubo omuyitwa okumala ensonga z’abaana ba Isirayiri okumpi n’omutima gwe buli lw’anaagendanga awali Mukama." 
Exodus28:31 “Onookola ekyambalo ekiri ng’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, nga kyonna kya bbululu." 
Exodus28:32 Waggulu mu makkati gaakyo munaabaamu ekituli omw’okuyisa omutwe; okwetooloola ekituli ekyo kunaabaako omuge omuyonde obulungi ng’omuleera ku kituli ky’omutwe eky’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona, kireme okuyulika." 
Exodus28:33 Okwetooloola ebirenge wansi onootungayo amajjolobera mu wuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu; nga mu makkati ga buli langi eziriraanye otobekamu obude obwa zaabu." 
Exodus28:34 Ng’otunga amajjolobera n’ozzaako akade, ate n’oddiriza amajjolobera n’ozzaako akade; bw’otyo okwetooloola ebirenge by’ekyambalo ekyo." 
Exodus28:35 Gunaabanga mulimu gwa Alooni okwambala ekyambalo ekyo ng’agenda okuweereza. Obude obwo bunaawulirwanga ng’ayingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu awali Mukama, ne bw’anaabanga afuluma, aleme okufa." 
Exodus28:36 “Onookola akapande aka zaabu omuka ennyo, okayoleko, nga bwe bayola akabonero, nti, Mutukuvu wa Mukama." 
Exodus28:37 Akapande okasibeko akaguwa aka bbululu, okanywereze ku kitambaala ky’oku mutwe ku ludda olw’omu maaso olw’ekitambaala." 
Exodus28:38 Akapande ako kanaabeeranga mu kyenyi kya Alooni, era Alooni y’anaabangako obuvunaanyizibwa nga wabaddewo ebitatuuse mu biweebwayo ebitukuvu abaana ba Isirayiri bye banaaleetanga nga bamaze okubyawula ng’ebirabo byabwe ebitukuvu; kanaabeeranga ku kyenyi kye bulijjo, Mukama alyoke akkirize ebirabo ebyo." 
Exodus28:39 “Luka ekkooti erimu obusaze obw’obusimba n’obw’obukiika mu wuzi eza linena omulebevu, era okole n’ekitambaala eky’oku mutwe mu linena omulebevu, era okole olukoba ng’olutunzeemu amajjolobera." 
Exodus28:40 Batabani ba Alooni bakolere amakooti, n’emisipi, n’enkuufiira; nga byonna bya kitiibwa era nga birabika bulungi nnyo." 
Exodus28:41 Alooni muganda wo mwambaze ebyambalo ebyo, ne batabani be nabo bw’otyo; olyoke obafukeko amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, obaawule, obatukuze, bampeerezenga nga be bakabona." 
Exodus28:42 “Bakolere empale ez’omunda eza linena, nga ziva mu kiwato okukoma mu bisambi, zibikke omubiri gwabwe." 
Exodus28:43 Alooni ne batabani be banaazambalanga nga bajja mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu oba bwe banaasembereranga Ekyoto okuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, baleme okwereetako omusango ne bafa. “Alooni ne batabani be ne bazzukulu be abalimuddirira banaakuumanga etteeka lino nga lya nkalakkalira.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Bino by’onookola okwawula Alooni ne batabani be okubafuula bakabona balyoke bampeereze. Ojja kulaba ente ya seddume emu ento, n’endiga ennume ento bbiri, zonna nga teziriiko kamogo." 
Exodus29:2 Era onookola mu buwunga bw’eŋŋaano ennungi emigaati egitaliimu kizimbulukusa, ne zikkeeke enkole n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ezitali nzimbulukuse, n’obusukuuti obw’oluwewere obutaliimu kizimbulukusa naye nga busiigiddwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Exodus29:3 Obiteeke mu kibbo kimu obireete awamu n’ente n’endiga ebbiri. 
Exodus29:4 Leeta Alooni ne batabani be ku mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, obanaaze n’amazzi." 
Exodus29:5 Ddira ebyambalo, oyambaze Alooni ekkooti, n’ekyambalo ekiri ng’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, n’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, n’ekyomukifuba, omusibeko omusipi gw’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi ogwalukibwa n’amagezi amangi;" 
Exodus29:6 omusibe n’ekitambaala ku mutwe olyoke otereeze bulungi engule entukuvu ku kitambaala eky’oku mutwe. 
Exodus29:7 Ddira amafuta ag’okwawula ogafuke ku mutwe gwe, omwawule." 
Exodus29:8 Leeta batabani be obambaze amakooti," 
Exodus29:9 obasibeko emisipi, obambaze n’enkuufiira; olwo nga bafuuka bakabona emirembe gyonna ng’ekiragiro bwe kigamba. Bw’otyo bw’onooyawula Alooni ne batabani be." 
Exodus29:10 “Onooleeta ente eyo ento mu maaso g’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Alooni ne batabani be banaagikwatako ku mutwe," 
Exodus29:11 n’olyoka ogittira awo awali Mukama ku mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Exodus29:12 Onoddira omusaayi ogw’ente eyo omutonotono, n’ogusiiga n’olugalo lwo ku mayembe ag’oku kyoto; omusaayi ogunaasigalawo oguyiwe wansi w’ekyoto." 
Exodus29:13 Onoddira amasavu gonna ag’oku byenda n’ogabikka ku kibumba n’ensigo zombi n’amasavu gaazo, obyokere ku kyoto." 
Exodus29:14 Naye ennyama y’ente eyo n’eddiba lyayo, n’obusa bwayo, byokere ebweru w’olusiisira. Ekyo ky’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi." 
Exodus29:15 “Kwata endiga zombi, Alooni ne batabani be banaakwatanga ku mutwe gw’endiga emu;" 
Exodus29:16 otte endiga eyo, n’oddira omusaayi gwayo n’ogumansa buli wantu ku kyoto." 
Exodus29:17 Onoosalaasala endiga eyo mu bifi, onaaze eby’omunda byayo n’amagulu gaayo; obisse wamu n’ebifi n’omutwe," 
Exodus29:18 endiga yonna ogyokere ku kyoto. Ekyo ky’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokye, eky’akawoowo akasanyusa, nga kiweebwayo ku muliro eri Mukama." 
Exodus29:19 “Onoddira endiga endala, Alooni ne batabani be ne bassa emikono ku mutwe gwayo;" 
Exodus29:20 onoogitta, n’oddira ku musaayi gwayo n’ogusiiga ku kasongezo k’okutu kwa Alooni okwa ddyo, ne ku busongezo bw’amatu ga batabani be aga ddyo, ne ku binkumu by’emikono gyabwe egya ddyo, ne ku bigere byabwe ebisajja ebya ddyo; omusaayi ogunaasigalawo ogumansire ku kyoto okukyetooloola." 
Exodus29:21 Onoddira ku musaayi oguli ku kyoto, oddire ne ku mafuta ag’okwawula, obimansire ku Alooni ne ku byambalo bye, era ne ku batabani be ne ku byambalo byabwe. Bw’atyo Alooni ne batabani be bajja kutukuzibwa awamu n’ebyambalo byabwe." 
Exodus29:22 “Onoggya ku ndiga eyo amasavu, n’omukira omusava, n’amasavu agabikka eby’omu lubuto ne ku kibumba, n’ensigo zombi awamu n’amasavu agaziriko, n’ekisambi ekya ddyo; kubanga eyo y’endiga ey’okukozesa mu kwawula bakabona." 
Exodus29:23 Era olabe mu kibbo ekirimu ebitali bizimbulukuse ebiri awali Mukama oggyemu omugaati gumu, ne keeke emu okuli amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, n’akasukuuti ak’oluwewere;" 
Exodus29:24 ebyo byonna obikwase Alooni ne batabani be, babiwuubire awali Mukama ng’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa." 
Exodus29:25 Onoobibaggyako, n’obyokera ku kyoto ng’obyongera ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, mulyoke muveemu akawoowo akalungi akasanyusa Mukama; kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokye mu muliro." 
Exodus29:26 Era onoddira ekifuba ky’endiga y’okwawulibwa kwa Alooni, okiwuube ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekiwuubibwa; ogwo gwe gunaaba omugabo gwo." 
Exodus29:27 Onootukuza ekifuba eky’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa, n’ekisambi eky’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa, n’ekisambi eky’omugabo gwa bakabona era nga nakyo kiwuubibwa ekiva ku ndiga y’okwawulibwa, nga bwe guli omugabo gwa Alooni ne batabani be." 
Exodus29:28 Gunaabanga mugabo gwa Alooni ne batabani be, nga guva mu baana ba Isirayiri emirembe gyonna; kubanga gwe mugabo gwa bakabona ogunaavanga ku kiweebwayo ky’abaana ba Isirayiri eky’emirembe, nga kye kiweebwayo kyabwe eri Mukama." 
Exodus29:29 “Ebyambalo bya Alooni ebitukuvu, batabani be, be banaabisikiranga, era mwe banaafukirwangako amafuta, era mwe banaayawulirwanga." 
Exodus29:30 Omwana anaabanga azze mu bigere bya Alooni nga kabona, anaabyambaliranga ennaku musanvu, bw’anajjanga mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu okuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu." 
Exodus29:31 “Ojja kuddira endiga y’okwawulibwa, ofumbe ennyama yaayo mu kifo ekitukuvu;" 
Exodus29:32 Alooni ne batabani be balye ku nnyama y’endiga eyo, ne ku mugaati oguli mu kibbo, nga bali ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Exodus29:33 Banaalya ku ebyo ebikozesebbwa ku mukolo ogw’okusonyiyibwa kwabwe lwe batukuzibwa era lwe bayawulirwako. Naye atali kabona tabiryangako, kubanga bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:34 Era singa ku nnyama y’okwawula ne ku migaati wasigalawo ebiremye okutuusa enkeera, byonna byokebwanga bwokebwa; tewabanga abirya, kubanga bitukuvu." 
Exodus29:35 “Bwe kutyo okwawulibwa kwa Alooni ne batabani be bw’onookukola nga bwe nkulagidde. Omukolo gwonna gujja kumala ennaku musanvu; 
Exodus29:36 era buli lunaku ojja kuwaayo seddume y’ente emu ng’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi, olw’okusonyiyibwa. Waayo ekiweebwayo olw’okulongoosa ekyoto, okifukeko amafuta, okitukuze." 
Exodus29:37 Ojja kumala ennaku musanvu ng’owaayo ekiweebwayo olw’okulongoosa ekyoto, okitukuze; era ekyoto kijja kubeera kitukuvu nnyo, buli ekinaakikomangako nga nakyo kifuuka kitukuvu." 
Exodus29:38 “Bino by’onoowangayo ku kyoto buli lunaku: onoowangayo endiga ento bbiri ez’omwaka ogumu. 
Exodus29:39 Endiga emu onoogiwangayo mu makya, ne ginnaayo n’ogiwaayo akawungeezi." 
Exodus29:40 Endiga esooka onoogiwaayo ne lita bbiri ez’obuwunga obulungi, nga butabuddwamu lita ng’emu ey’amafuta ge zeyituuni, n’oteekerako ne lita emu ey’envinnyo nga ky’ekiweebwayo ekyokunywa." 
Exodus29:41 Endiga eyookubiri onoogiwaayo akawungeezi awamu n’obuwunga n’ebyokunywa nga bw’onooba okoze mu makya, ne biryoka bivaamu akawoowo akalungi akasanyusa ak’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eri Mukama." 
Exodus29:42 “Mu mirembe gyonna egigenda okujja, ekiweebwayo kino ekyokebwa kinaaweebwangayo eri Mukama obutayosa, mu mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Awo we nnaakusanga ne njogera naawe." 
Exodus29:43 Era awo we nnaasisinkana abaana ba Isirayiri, ekifo ekyo ne kitukuzibwa nga kijjudde ekitiibwa kyange." 
Exodus29:44 “Bwe ntyo nnaatukuza Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu n’ekyoto, era Alooni ne batabani be nabo nnaabatukuza, bampeereze nga bakabona." 
Exodus29:45 Bwe ntyo ndyoke mbeere mu baana ba Isirayiri era mbeere Katonda waabwe. 
Exodus29:46 Awo banaamanya nga nze Mukama Katonda waabwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y’e Misiri ndyoke mbeerenga mu bo. Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Onookola ekyoto mu miti gya akasiya, okwoterezangako obubaane." 
Exodus30:2 Kya kwenkanankana, sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano buli ludda mu buwanvu ne mu bugazi; era kinaabeera n’obugulumivu bwa sentimita kyenda. Kubeeko amayembe amakole mu muti ogw’ekyoto nga si mayungeko buyunzi." 
Exodus30:3 Ekyoto okiteekeko zaabu kyonna, waggulu ne mu mbiriizi, ne ku mayembe. Era kikolereko omuge ogwa zaabu okukyetooloola." 
Exodus30:4 Wansi w’omuge, mu mbiriizi z’ekyoto zombi, kolerawo empeta bbiri eza zaabu, okuyisaamu emisituliro gyakyo nga waliwo gye kitwalibwa." 
Exodus30:5 Emisituliro ogikole mu muti gwa akasiya, era ogiteekeko zaabu." 
Exodus30:6 Ekyoto kitereeze mu maaso g’eggigi awali essanduuko ey’endagaano, awali ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira, ekiri ku Ndagaano; awo we nnaakusisinkana." 
Exodus30:7 “Alooni anaayotezanga obubaane buli nkya, bw’anajjanga okulongoosa ettaala." 
Exodus30:8 Era Alooni bw’anajjanga okukoleeza ettaala akawungeezi, anyookezenga obubaane mu maaso ga Mukama mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna." 
Exodus30:9 Ku kyoto kino tojja kwoterezaako bubaane bulala, wadde ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, newaakubadde eky’eŋŋaano era tojja kufukako ekiweebwayo eky’ekyokunywa." 
Exodus30:10 Alooni anaakolanga omukolo ogw’okulangiririra ku mayembe gaakyo omulundi gumu mu buli mwaka. Okulongoosa kuno okwa buli mwaka kunaakolebwanga n’omusaayi ogw’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egigenda okujja. Ekyoto kya Mukama kino kitukuvu nnyo.” 
Exodus30:11 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus30:12 “Bw’onoobalanga abaana ba Isirayiri, buli gw’onoobalanga anaasasulanga omuwendo eri Mukama olw’okununula obulamu bwe mu kiseera mw’abaliddwa, kawumpuli aleme okubagwamu." 
Exodus30:13 Buli abalibwa ne yeegatta ku bamaze okubalibwa, anaawaangayo gulaamu mukaaga eri Mukama, ng’okubala okw’Awatukuvu okutongole bwe kuli. Sekeri emu yenkanankana ne gera amakumi abiri. Gulaamu omukaaga zinaaweebwangayo ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama." 
Exodus30:14 Bonna abeegatta ku bamaze okubalibwa, okuva ku b’emyaka amakumi abiri egy’obukulu, n’okweyongerayo, anaawaayo ekiweebwayo ekyo eri Mukama." 
Exodus30:15 Abagagga tebaawengayo kusussa kitundu kya sekeri, n’omwavu taawengayo kitatuuka kitundu kya sekeri bwe munaawangayo ekiweebwayo eri Mukama olw’okwetangirira obulamu bwammwe." 
Exodus30:16 Ensimbi abaana ba Isirayiri ze banaakuwa onoozikozesanga ku mirimu gy’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Kinaabanga ekijjukizo mu maaso ga Mukama, olw’okwetangirira obulamu bwammwe.”" 
Exodus30:17 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus30:18 “Onookola ebbensani enaabirwamu nga ya kikomo ne ky’etuulako nga kya kikomo. Giteeke wakati w’ekyoto n’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu; osseemu amazzi. 
Exodus30:19 Alooni ne batabani be ge banaakozesanga okunaaba engalo zaabwe n’ebigere byabwe. 
Exodus30:20 Bwe banaabanga bagenda okuyingira mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, banaanaabanga amazzi, baleme okufa. Era ne bwe banajjanga ku kyoto okuweereza nga bawaayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyokye n’omuliro," 
Exodus30:21 banaanaabanga engalo zaabwe n’ebigere byabwe, baleme okufa. Kino kinaabanga kiragiro eky’olubeerera eri Alooni n’ezzadde lye emirembe gyonna.”" 
Exodus30:22 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus30:23 “Ddira ebyakawoowo bino eby’omuwendo: Kiro mukaaga ez’omugavu omuyenge omuka, ne kiro ssatu eza kinamoni, ne kiro ssatu eza kalamu omuwoomerevu;" 
Exodus30:24 ne kiro mukaaga eza kasiya, ne lita nnya ez’amafuta g’omuzeeyituuni; ng’ebipimo by’obuzito bw’omu Watukuvu bwe biri." 
Exodus30:25 Bino byonna obikolemu amafuta amatukuvu ag’okusiiga, nga bigattikibbwa bulungi ng’ebikoleddwa omutabuzi w’eby’akawoowo, ne galyoka gabeera amafuta amatukuvu ag’okufukibwangako." 
Exodus30:26 Olyoke osiige n’amafuta ago Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’Essanduuko ey’Endagaano," 
Exodus30:27 n’emmeeza n’ebibeerako byonna, n’ekikondo ky’ettaala n’ebyakyo byonna, n’ekyoto eky’obubaane," 
Exodus30:28 n’ekyoto eky’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’ebikozesebwako, n’ebbensani ne kw’etuula." 
Exodus30:29 Obyawule bifuuke bitukuvu nnyo, era buli ekinaabikomangako nga nakyo kifuuka kitukuvu." 
Exodus30:30 “Alooni ne batabani be onoobafukako amafuta, obaawule, balyoke bampeerezenga nga bakabona." 
Exodus30:31 Era abaana ba Isirayiri obagambe nti, ‘Gano ge ganaabanga amafuta gange amatukuvu ag’okufukibwangako, mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna." 
Exodus30:32 Tegajjanga kufukibwa ku bantu ba bulijjo; era tewabangawo amafuta amalala agatabulwa mu ngeri eno. Gano matukuvu, era mujjukirenga nti matukuvu." 
Exodus30:33 Omuntu yenna anaakolanga amafuta ga kalifuuwa okufaanana ne gano, oba anaafukanga gano ku muntu yenna atali kabona, anaawaŋŋangusibwanga, n’ava mu bantu b’ewaabwe.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Ddira ebyakaloosa bino eby’omuwendo ennyo: sitakite, n’onuka, ne galabano, n’obubaane obuka, nga byenkanankana obuzito," 
Exodus30:35 Okolemu ebyakaloosa eby’omuwendo, bibe ng’ebikoleddwa omukugu w’ebyakaloosa. Obiteekemu omunnyo bibeere birongoofu era nga bitukuvu." 
Exodus30:36 Onoggyako ekitundu n’okisa ne kifuuka lufufugge, n’okiteeka okwolekera Essanduuko ey’Endagaano mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, awo we nnaakusisinkananga. Ekyo kinaabeeranga kitukuvu nnyo, gy’oli." 
Exodus30:37 Temwekoleranga ebyakaloosa ebyammwe ku bwammwe mu ntabula eno; bino binaabanga bitukuvu era nga bya Mukama. 
Exodus30:38 Omuntu yenna alikola ebibifaanana yeesanyuse olw’akaloosa kaabyo, anaawaŋŋangusibwanga, n’ava mu bantu b’ewaabwe.”" 
Exodus31:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus31:2 “Laba, nnonze Bezaaleeri mutabani wa Uli, muzzukulu wa Kuuli, ow’omu kika kya Yuda;" 
Exodus31:3 era mmujjuzza Omwoyo wa Katonda, n’okumanya, n’obusobozi n’amagezi mu kukola ebitali bimu ebyemikono" 
Exodus31:4 okutetenkanya ebintu ebinaakolebwa mu zaabu ne ffeeza n’ekikomo, nga bwe binaafaanana," 
Exodus31:5 okwola amayinja n’okugategeka, n’okwola emiti, era n’okukola byonna ebyemikono ebya buli ngeri." 
Exodus31:6 Ate mmulondeddeko Okoliyaabu mutabani wa Akisamaki, ow’omu kika kya Ddaani, okumuyamba. “Era abakugu abakola ebintu byonna ebya buli ngeri, mbawadde amagezi okukola bino byonna bye nkulagidde:" 
Exodus31:7 “Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’Essanduuko ey’Endagaano n’ekibikkako eky’entebe ey’okusaasira, awamu n’ebikozesebwa byonna mu Weema ya Mukama," 
Exodus31:8 emmeeza n’ebigenderako, ekikondo ekya zaabu omuka eky’ettaala n’ebigenderako, n’ekyoto eky’obubaane," 
Exodus31:9 n’ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa n’ebigenderako, n’ebbensani ne kw’etuula;" 
Exodus31:10 n’ebyambalo ebyalukibwa obulungi, ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Alooni, kabona, n’ebyambalo bya batabani be bye baweererezaamu mu bwakabona;" 
Exodus31:11 n’amafuta ag’okufukibwa, n’ebyakaloosa akalungi ak’omu Kifo Ekitukuvu. “Byonna babikole nga bwe nakulagira.”" 
Exodus31:12 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus31:13 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, Munaateekwanga okukuuma Ssabbiiti zange, kubanga ako ke kabonero akanaabeeranga wakati wammwe nange mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna, mulyoke mumanye nga Nze Mukama, Nze mbatukuza." 
Exodus31:14 “ ‘Munaakuumanga Ssabbiiti, kubanga lunaku lutukuvu. Buli anaaluweebuulanga waakufa; ne buli anaakolanga omulimu gwonna ku lunaku olwo waakuggibwa mu bantu be, attibwe." 
Exodus31:15 Emirimu ginaakolwanga mu nnaku mukaaga, naye olunaku olw’omusanvu ye Ssabbiiti ey’okuwummula, lunaku lwa Mukama lutukuvu. Buli anaakolanga omulimu ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti wa kuttibwa." 
Exodus31:16 Noolwekyo abaana ba Isirayiri banaakumanga olunaku lwa Ssabbiiti, nga balujjukira mu mirembe gyabwe gyonna, ng’endagaano etaggwaawo." 
Exodus31:17 Kanaabeeranga kabonero wakati wange n’abaana ba Isirayiri emirembe gyonna, akalaga nti Mukama yakola eggulu n’ensi mu nnaku mukaaga, ne ku lunaku olw’omusanvu n’alekeraawo okukola, n’awummula.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Awo Mukama bwe yamaliriza okwogera ne Musa ku lusozi Sinaayi, n’awa Musa ebipande bibiri eby’amayinja, eby’Endagaano Katonda gye yawandiika n’engalo ye, ye kennyini." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu bwe baalaba nga Musa aluddeyo nnyo ku lusozi, ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Alooni, ne bamugamba nti, “Jjangu, otukolere bakatonda abanaatukulembera; kubanga Musa ono eyatuggya mu nsi y’e Misiri, tetumanyi kimutuuseeko.”" 
Exodus32:2 Alooni n’abaddamu nti, “Mwambule empeta eza zaabu, bakyala bammwe, ne batabani bammwe, ne bawala bammwe ze bambadde ku matu gaabwe, muzindeetere.”" 
Exodus32:3 Awo abantu bonna ne beenaanulako empeta zaabwe eza zaabu ez’oku matu, ne bazireetera Alooni." 
Exodus32:4 Alooni n’azisaanuusa; zaabu eyavaamu n’agibumbamu ennyana, ng’agirongoosa n’ekyuma. Ne balyoka boogera nti, “Bano be bakatonda bo ggwe Isirayiri abaakuggya mu nsi y’e Misiri!”" 
Exodus32:5 Alooni bwe yalaba ebyo, n’azimba ekyoto mu maaso g’ennyana, n’alyoka alangirira nti, “Enkya tujja kukolera Mukama embaga.”" 
Exodus32:6 Awo enkeera, abantu ne bazuukuka mu makya, ne bawaayo ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, ne baleeta n’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe; ne batuula ne balya era ne banywa, ne basituka ne bakola effujjo." 
Exodus32:7 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Serengeta, kubanga abantu bo be waggya mu nsi ey’e Misiri boonoonye;" 
Exodus32:8 bavudde mangu mu kkubo lye nabalagira; beekoledde ennyana ensaanuuse ne bagisinza, ne bagireetera ebiweebwayo, ne boogera nti, ‘Bano be bakatonda bo, ggwe Isirayiri, abaakuggya mu nsi y’e Misiri!’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Abantu bano mbalabye, era ndabye nga bakakanyavu." 
Exodus32:10 Kale, kaakano ndeka obusungu bwange bubabuubuukireko, mbazikirize; kyokka ggwe ndikufuula eggwanga ekkulu.”" 
Exodus32:11 Naye Musa ne yeegayirira Mukama Katonda we, n’agamba nti, “Lwaki obusungu bwo bubuubuukira abantu bo be waggya mu nsi y’e Misiri n’obuyinza, awamu n’omukono gwo ogw’amaanyi?" 
Exodus32:12 Lwaki okwogeza Abamisiri nti, ‘Yabatwala ng’agenderedde kubakola kabi, abattire mu nsozi, abazikirize, bave ku nsi?’ Nyiigulukuka, obusungu obubuubuuka bukuveeko, oleme kuleeta bulabe ku bantu bo." 
Exodus32:13 Jjukira abaweereza bo Ibulayimu, ne Isaaka, ne Isirayiri, be walayirira ggwe kennyini, n’obagamba nti, ‘Ndyaza bazzukulu bammwe ng’emmunyeenye ez’oku ggulu, era n’ensi eno gye mbasuubizza ndigiwa bazzukulu bammwe, era eribeera omugabo gwammwe ennaku zonna.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Mukama akabi ke yali ategese okukola abantu be n’atakaleeta. 
Exodus32:15 Awo Musa n’aserengeta okuva ku lusozi ng’akutte mu mikono gye ebipande ebibiri eby’Endagaano, nga biwandiikiddwako ku njuyi zombi." 
Exodus32:16 Ebipande byakolebwa Katonda, n’ebiwandiike ebyaliko byali bya Katonda, nga ye yabisala ku bipande ebyo." 
Exodus32:17 Yoswa bwe yawulira oluyoogaano lw’abantu nga baleekaana, n’agamba Musa nti, “Mu lusiisira eriyo okuyoogaana ng’okw’olutalo.”" 
Exodus32:18 Naye n’amuddamu nti, “Siwulira maloboozi galeekaana olw’obuwanguzi, oba amaloboozi g’okwaziirana olw’okuwangulwa, naye maloboozi ga kuyimba ge mpulira.”" 
Exodus32:19 Naye Musa bwe yasemberera olusiisira, n’alengera ennyana, n’alaba n’amazina; obusungu bwe ne bubuubuuka, n’asuula eri ebipande ebyali mu mikono gye, ne bimenyekera awo wansi w’olusozi." 
Exodus32:20 N’addira ennyana gye baali bakoze n’agyokya mu muliro n’agisekulasekula, n’agimerungulira ddala ng’olufuufu; olufuufu n’alumansa ku mazzi n’agawa abaana ba Isirayiri ne baganywa." 
Exodus32:21 Awo Musa n’agamba Alooni nti, “Abantu bano baakukoze ki, n’obaleetera okwonoona ennyo bwe batyo?”" 
Exodus32:22 Alooni n’amuddamu nti, “Tonnyiigira nnyo, mukama wange, naawe abantu bano obamanyi, ng’emitima gyabwe bwe gyamanyiira okwonoona." 
Exodus32:23 Baŋŋambye nti, ‘Tukolere bakatonda abanaatukulembera kubanga Musa ono eyatuggya mu nsi y’e Misiri, tetumanyi kimutuuseeko.’" 
Exodus32:24 Nange kwe kubagamba nti, ‘Buli alina ebya zaabu abyeyambuleko,’ ne babimpa ne mbiteeka mu muliro, ne bivaamu ennyana eno.”" 
Exodus32:25 Awo Musa bwe yalaba ng’abantu basasamadde, nga Alooni yali abalese ne basasamala, era ng’abalabe baabwe babasekerera," 
Exodus32:26 n’ayimirira mu mulyango gw’olusiisira, n’agamba nti, “Ani ali ku ludda lwa Mukama? Ajje wano we ndi.” Awo batabani ba Leevi bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira w’ali." 
Exodus32:27 N’abagamba nti, “Bw’ati Mukama Katonda wa Isirayiri bw’ayogera nti, ‘Buli musajja yeesibe ekitala kye mu kiwato kye, muyiteeyite mu nsiisira okuva ku ludda olumu okutuuka ku ludda olulala, nga buli musajja atta muganda we ne mukwano gwe, ne muliraanwa we.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Abaleevi ne bakola nga Musa bwe yabalagira; era ku lunaku olwo abantu ng’enkumi ssatu ne battibwa. 
Exodus32:29 Awo Musa n’agamba nti, “Mwawuddwa leero eri Mukama, bwe musse buli omu mutabani we, era ne muganda we; Mukama abawadde omukisa ku lunaku lwa leero.”" 
Exodus32:30 Enkeera Musa n’agamba abantu nti, “Mwonoonye nnyo. Naye nze ka ŋŋende eri Mukama ndabe obanga nnaatangiririra ekibi kyammwe.”" 
Exodus32:31 Bw’atyo Musa n’addayo eri Mukama, n’agamba nti, “Kitalo! Abantu bano nga boonoonye nnyo; bwe beekoledde bakatonda aba zaabu!" 
Exodus32:32 Bw’oba osiima basonyiwe ekibi kyabwe; naye bwe kitaba kityo, nkwegayirira onsangule mu kitabo kyo ky’owandiise.”" 
Exodus32:33 Naye Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Oyo yekka ankozeeko ekibi gwe ndisangula mu kitabo kyange." 
Exodus32:34 Kaakano genda otwale abantu mu kifo ekyo kye nakutegeeza; era, laba, malayika wange ajja kukukulembera. Naye ekiseera nga kituuse okubabonereza ndibabonerereza ddala olw’ekibi kyabwe.”" 
Exodus32:35 Awo Mukama n’aleetera abantu kawumpuli, kubanga beekolera ennyana, Alooni gye yababumbira." 
Exodus33:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Vva mu kifo kino ogende, ggwe n’abantu be waggya mu nsi y’e Misiri, olage mu nsi gye nalayirira Ibulayimu ne Isaaka, ne Yakobo, nga njogera nti, ‘Ndigiwa bazzukulu bammwe.’" 
Exodus33:2 Ndiweereza malayika abakulemberenga; era ndigobamu Abakanani, n’Abamoli, n’Abakiiti, n’Abaperezi, n’Abakiivi n’Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Yambuka mu nsi ekulukutiramu amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki. Naye sijja kugenda nammwe; sirwa kubazikiririza mu kkubo, kubanga muli bantu ab’ensingo enkakanyavu.”" 
Exodus33:4 Abantu bwe baawulira amawulire ago ag’ennaku, ne bakungubaga ne watabaawo ayambala eby’omu matu wadde eby’oku mikono ebyokwewoomya." 
Exodus33:5 Kubanga Mukama yali alagidde Musa nti, “Gamba abaana ba Isirayiri nti, ‘Mulina omutima omukakanyavu, era singa ntambula nammwe okumala akaseera wadde katono katya, nzija kubazikiriza. Kale kaakano mweyambulemu ebyokwewoomya byammwe, ndyoke ndabe kye nnaakola.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Bwe batyo abaana ba Isirayiri ne beeyambulamu eby’obugagga byabwe nga bali ku lusozi Kolebu. 
Exodus33:7 Kale, Musa yaddiranga eweema n’agisimba ebweru w’olusiisira, ewala ddala n’olusiisira; n’agiyita Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Ne buli eyeetaaganga Mukama, ng’agenda awali Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, eyali ebweru w’olusiisira." 
Exodus33:8 Era buli Musa lwe yafulumanga n’alaga eri Eweema, abantu bonna nga bayimirira mu miryango gy’eweema zaabwe ne batunuulira Musa okutuusa lwe yayingiranga mu Weema." 
Exodus33:9 Musa bwe yayingiranga mu Weema, empagi ey’ekire n’ekka n’eyimirira mu mulyango gw’Eweema; Mukama n’alyoka ayogera ne Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu bwe baalabanga ng’empagi ey’ekire eyimiridde mu mulyango gw’Eweema, bonna ne basituka ne basinza, buli omu mu mulyango gw’eweema ye." 
Exodus33:11 Bw’atyo Mukama bwe yayogeranga ne Musa nga batunulaganye, ng’omuntu bw’ayogera ne mukwano gwe. Musa bwe yaddangayo mu lusiisira, omuweereza we, omuvubuka Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, ye n’asigalayo mu Weema." 
Exodus33:12 Musa n’agamba Mukama nti, “Obadde ontegeeza nti, ‘Kulembera abantu bano,’ naye omuntu gw’onontuma naye tomuntegeezezza. Ogambye nti, ‘Nkumanyi awamu n’erinnya lyo, era onsanyusizza.’" 
Exodus33:13 Obanga nkusanyusizza, njigiriza amakubo go ndyoke nkumanye era nneeyongeranga okukusanyusa. Jjukira nti eggwanga lino be bantu bo.”" 
Exodus33:14 Mukama n’addamu nti, “Nnaagendanga naawe, era nnaakuwummuzanga.”" 
Exodus33:15 Musa n’amugamba nti, “Obanga toogende naffe, totuggya wano." 
Exodus33:16 Kale abantu balitegeerera ku ki nga Nkusanyusizza, nze n’abantu bo? Si lwa kubanga onooba ogenze naffe, ne tuba ba njawulo, nze n’abantu bo, nga twawukana ku bantu bonna ab’oku nsi?”" 
Exodus33:17 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Nzija kukola ekyo kyennyini ky’osabye; onsanyusizza, era nkumanyi awamu n’erinnya lyo.”" 
Exodus33:18 Musa n’agamba nti, “Nkwegayiridde, ndaga ekitiibwa kyo.”" 
Exodus33:19 Mukama n’agamba nti, “Nzija kuggyayo obulungi bwange bwonna nga mbuyisa mu maaso go. Era nzija kukutegeeza erinnya lyange, Mukama. Buli gwe nnaayagalanga okukwatirwa ekisa, nnaamukwatirwanga ekisa, ne buli gwe nnaayagalanga okusaasira nnaamusaasiranga.”" 
Exodus33:20 Era n’agamba nti, “Naye toyinza kulaba maaso gange, kubanga tewali muntu antunulako n’aba mulamu.”" 
Exodus33:21 Mukama n’agamba nti, “Waliwo wano okumpi nange ekifo ku lwazi kw’onooyimirira." 
Exodus33:22 Ekitiibwa kyange bwe kinaaba kiyitawo, nnaakuteeka mu mpataanya mu lwazi, ne nkubikkako omukono gwange okutuusa lwe nnaamala okuyitawo." 
Exodus33:23 Oluvannyuma omukono gwange nnaaguggyawo, n’olaba amabega gange; naye tojja kulaba ku maaso gange.”" 
Exodus34:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Teekateeka ebipande bibiri eby’amayinja nga biri ebyasooka, nange nnaabiwandiikako ebigambo ebyali ku bipande ebyasooka bye wamenya." 
Exodus34:2 Weetegeke mu makya, ojje mu makya ago olinnye waggulu ku lusozi Sinaayi, olyoke onneeyanjulire eyo ku ntikko y’olusozi." 
Exodus34:3 Tewasaana kubaawo muntu ajja naawe, era ku lusozi wonna wonna tewasaana kulabikawo muntu n’omu; era n’amagana n’ebisibo by’endiga tebisaana kuliira mu maaso ga lusozi.”" 
Exodus34:4 Bw’atyo Musa n’atema mu mayinja ebipande bibiri nga bifaanana nga biri ebyasooka; n’akeera mu makya n’alinnya ku lusozi Sinaayi, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira, ng’asitudde n’ebipande eby’amayinja byombi mu mikono gye." 
Exodus34:5 Awo Mukama n’akkira mu kire, n’ayimirira awo ne Musa, n’alangirira erinnya lye, MUKAMA." 
Exodus34:6 Mukama n’ayita mu maaso ga Musa n’agamba nti, “Nze Mukama, Mukama Katonda alina ekisa n’okusaasira okungi, atasunguwala mangu, ajjudde obwesigwa n’okwagala okutaggwaawo." 
Exodus34:7 Akuuma okwagala eri enkumi n’enkumi asonyiwa ebisobyo byabwe, n’obujeemu bwabwe, n’ebibi byabwe. Talema kubonereza oyo asingiddwa omusango. Abonereza abaana n’abazzukulu olw’ebisobyo bya bakadde baabwe n’ebya bajjajjaabwe, okutuukira ddala ku mulembe ogwokusatu n’ogwokuna.”" 
Exodus34:8 Amangwago Musa n’avuunama wansi, n’asinza." 
Exodus34:9 N’agamba nti, “Obanga kaakano nkusanyusizza, Ayi Mukama, jjangu, Mukama, ogende naffe. Newaakubadde ng’abantu bano balina ensingo nkakanyavu, naye tusonyiwe ebyonoono byaffe n’ebibi byaffe, otukkirize tubeere abantu bo ab’obusika bwo.”" 
Exodus34:10 Awo Mukama n’addamu nti, “Laba, nkola naawe endagaano. Nzija kukolera mu bantu bo ebyamagero ebitakolwangako mu nsi yonna, wadde mu ggwanga lyonna. Abantu bonna b’oli nabo banaalaba eby’ekitalo Mukama by’anaakolera mu ggwe." 
Exodus34:11 “Gondera bye nkulagira leero. Nange, gye mulaga, nzija kugobayo Abamoli, n’Abakanani, n’Abakiiti, n’Abaperezi, n’Abakiivi, n’Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Kirungi weekuume oleme kukola ndagaano n’abatuuze ab’omu nsi gy’olagamu, kubanga bayinza okubafuukira omutego." 
Exodus34:13 Olimenyaamenya ebyoto byabwe, obetente empagi zaabwe, n’otemaatema ebifaananyi byabwe ebibajje bye basinza." 
Exodus34:14 Tosinzanga katonda mulala yenna, kubanga Nze Mukama, ayitibwa Waabuggya, ndi Katonda wa buggya." 
Exodus34:15 “Temukolanga ndagaano ey’okukolagana n’abatuuze b’omu nsi omwo. Kubanga bwe baliba bagoberera bakatonda baabwe, nga bawaayo ssaddaaka, gamba omu ku bo n’abayita, mulirya ku biweebwayo byabwe ebyo." 
Exodus34:16 Era bwe muliwasiza batabani bammwe abamu ku bawala baabwe, abawala abo ne bagoberera bakatonda baabwe, balireetera batabani bammwe nabo okukola bwe batyo." 
Exodus34:17 “Temwekoleranga bakatonda mu byuma ebisaanuuse. 
Exodus34:18 “Embaga ey’Emigaati Egitali Mizimbulukuse ogikwatanga. Munaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga mulya emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse, mu kiseera ekyategekebwa mu mwezi gwa Abibu nga bwe nabalagira; kubanga mu mwezi gwa Abibu mwe mwaviira mu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 “Ebiggulanda byonna byange, n’ennume zonna mu magana go embereberye, oba nte oba ndiga." 
Exodus34:20 Endogoyi embereberye onoozinunulanga n’endiga, naye nga toginunudde ogimenyanga ensingo n’ogitta. Abaana bo abaggulanda bonna obanunulanga. Era tewabanga ajja gye ndi engalo ensa." 
Exodus34:21 “Onookolanga okumala ennaku mukaaga, naye ku lunaku olw’omusanvu n’owummula; ne mu biseera eby’okukabala n’ebyokukungula onoowummulanga." 
Exodus34:22 “Onookwatanga Embaga eya Wiiki, n’Embaga ey’Amakungula g’Ebibala Ebibereberye eby’Eŋŋaano, n’Embaga ey’Okuyingiza Amakungula ku nkomerero y’omwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Abasajja bonna mu mmwe banaalabikanga awali Mukama Katonda, Katonda wa Isirayiri, emirundi esatu mu buli mwaka." 
Exodus34:24 Amawanga ŋŋenda kugagobawo wonna we muli, era ndigaziya n’ensalo zammwe. So tewalibaawo ayagala kutwala nsi yammwe nga mwambuse okulabika awali Mukama Katonda wammwe emirundi egyo esatu mu mwaka." 
Exodus34:25 “Temuwangayo kintu kyonna gye ndi ekirimu ekizimbulukusa nga mundeetedde ssaddaaka erimu omusaayi; era ennyama ya ssaddaaka ey’Embaga y’Okuyitako tesigalangawo kutuusa nkeera. 
Exodus34:26 “Ebibala ebisinga obulungi mu ebyo ebisoose okuva mu ttaka lyo obitwalanga mu nnyumba ya Mukama Katonda wo. “Omwana gw’embuzi togufumbiranga mu mata ga nnyina waagwo.” 
Exodus34:27 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Wandiika ebigambo ebyo; kubanga nkoze endagaano naawe era ne Isirayiri ng’ebigambo ebyo bwe bigamba.”" 
Exodus34:28 Musa n’abeera eyo ne Mukama, n’amalayo emisana amakumi ana n’ebiro amakumi ana, nga talya mmere wadde okunywa amazzi. N’awandiika ku bipande ebigambo eby’Endagaano, ge Mateeka Ekkumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa bwe yaserengeta okuva ku lusozi Sinaayi ng’akutte mu ngalo ze ebipande byombi eby’Endagaano, teyakimanya ng’obwenyi bwe bwali bumasamasa kubanga yali ayogedde ne Mukama." 
Exodus34:30 Era Alooni n’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna bwe baatunula ku Musa, ne balaba ng’obwenyi bwe bumasamasa; ne batya okumusemberera." 
Exodus34:31 Naye Musa n’abayita; bw’atyo Alooni n’abakulembeze b’abantu ne bajja gy’ali, Musa n’ayogera nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Oluvannyuma abaana ba Isirayiri bonna ne basembera, n’abategeeza amateeka gonna Mukama ge yamulagira ku lusozi Sinaayi." 
Exodus34:33 Awo Musa bwe yamala okwogera nabo, n’abikka obwenyi bwe olugoye." 
Exodus34:34 Naye Musa bwe yabanga agenda awali Mukama okwogera naye, ng’olugoye olubikka obwenyi bwe alwebikkula okutuusa lwe yavangayo. Bwe yakomangawo okutegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri Mukama by’amulagidde," 
Exodus34:35 baalabanga obwenyi bwe nga bumasamasa. Bw’atyo Musa ne yezzaako olugoye olubikka obwenyi bwe, okutuusa lwe yaddangayo eri Mukama okwogera naye." 
Exodus35:1 Awo Musa n’akuŋŋaanya ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri, n’abagamba nti, “Bino bye bintu Mukama by’abalagidde okukola." 
Exodus35:2 Munaakolanga emirimu mu nnaku omukaaga; naye olunaku olw’omusanvu lunaabanga Lwassabbiiti, lutukuvu, munaaluwummulanga awali Mukama. Buli anaakoleranga omulimu ku lunaku olwo anattibwanga." 
Exodus35:3 Temukumanga muliro mu nnyumba zammwe ku lunaku Lwassabbiiti.” 
Exodus35:4 Musa n’agamba ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri nti, “Kino Mukama ky’alagidde." 
Exodus35:5 Mutoole ku bye mulina muweeyo eri Mukama. Buli omu aweeyo, nga bw’ayagala mu mutima gwe ebiweebwayo eri Mukama: “zaabu, ne ffeeza, n’ekikomo;" 
Exodus35:6 n’olugoye olwa bbululu, n’olwa kakobe, n’olumyufu, n’olugoye olwa linena erangiddwa mu wuzi ennungi; n’obwoya bw’embuzi," 
Exodus35:7 n’amaliba g’endiga ennume amakunye amannyike mu langi emyufu, n’ekika ky’eddiba ekirala ekiwangaazi; n’embaawo z’omuti gwa akasiya," 
Exodus35:8 n’amafuta g’ettaala, n’ebyakaloosa eby’okukozesa mu mafuta ag’okwawula, ne mu bubaane obw’okunyookeza," 
Exodus35:9 n’amayinja aga onuku n’amayinja amalala ag’omuwendo, ag’okutona ku kkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi era ne ku kyomukifuba." 
Exodus35:10 “Abo bonna mu mmwe abakugu mu kukola, muveeyo mujje mukole ebyo byonna Mukama by’atulagidde:" 
Exodus35:11 “Eweema ya Mukama Omukuŋŋaanirwa n’olugoye lwayo n’ekibikkako, n’ebisiba, n’embaawo, n’emikiikiro, n’empagi zaayo, n’ebituurwamu;" 
Exodus35:12 essanduuko ey’Endagaano n’emisituliro gyayo, n’ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira, n’eggigi erigisiikiriza;" 
Exodus35:13 emmeeza n’emisituliro gyayo ne byonna ebigibeerako, n’emigaati gya Mukama egy’okulaga;" 
Exodus35:14 ekikondo ky’ettaala n’ebigenderako, ettaala n’amafuta gaazo;" 
Exodus35:15 ekyoto eky’okwoterezaamu obubaane n’emisituliro gyakyo; amafuta ag’okwawula, n’obubaane obw’akawoowo; olutimbe olw’omu mulyango oguyingira mu Weema ya Mukama;" 
Exodus35:16 ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa n’ekitindiro kyakyo eky’ekikomo; emisituliro gyakyo ne byonna ebikozeserwako; ebbensani ey’ekikomo ne ky’etuulako; 
Exodus35:17 entimbe ez’oku bisenge eby’omu luggya n’empagi zaazo ne mwe zituula; n’olutimbe olw’omu mulyango ogulaga mu luggya; 
Exodus35:18 enkondo z’eweema n’ez’omu luggya n’emiguwa gyazo; 
Exodus35:19 ebyambalo ebiruke ebyambalwa mu kuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, bye byambalo ebitukuvu ebya Alooni kabona, n’ebyambalo bya batabani be bye bakozesa mu bwakabona nga baweereza.”" 
Exodus35:20 Awo abantu bonna ab’ekibiina ky’abaana ba Isirayiri ne bava awali Musa ne bagenda. 
Exodus35:21 Buli eyayagala, era ng’omwoyo gwe bwe gwamukubiriza, n’awaayo eri Mukama eby’okukozesa Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu n’ebikozesebwamu byonna, n’eby’okukozesa ebyambalo ebitukuvu." 
Exodus35:22 Abasajja n’abakazi bonna abaayagala mu mitima gyabwe ne bajja; ne baleeta ebikwaso eby’omuwendo, empeta ez’omu matu, n’empeta ez’oku ngalo, n’ebikomo, n’ebirala ebya zaabu ebitali bimu; buli muntu n’awaayo ekirabo ekya zaabu eri Mukama." 
Exodus35:23 Era buli muntu eyalina olugoye olwa bbululu, oba olwa kakobe, oba olumyufu, oba olwa linena ennungi, oba olw’obwoya bw’embuzi; oba amaliba amakunye ag’endiga ensajja oba ag’embuzi, byonna ne babireeta." 
Exodus35:24 Buli omu eyalina eky’okuwaayo ekya ffeeza oba eky’ekikomo, yakireeta n’akiwaayo eri Mukama; era na buli musajja eyalina olubaawo olwa akasiya nga luyinza okugasa mu mulimu ogwali gukolebwa, yaluleeta n’aluwaayo." 
Exodus35:25 Abakazi bonna abaali bamanyi ennyo okulanga ewuzi, ne balanga n’engalo zaabwe ewuzi eza bbululu, n’eza kakobe, n’emyufu n’eza linena omuyonde obulungi, ne bazireeta ne baziwaayo." 
Exodus35:26 Era n’abakazi bonna abaali abakugu era nga beeyagalidde, ne balanga ewuzi mu bwoya bw’embuzi." 
Exodus35:27 Awo abakulembeze ne baleeta amayinja aga onuku, n’amayinja amalala ag’omuwendo, gasalibwe galyoke gatonebwe ku kkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi ne ku ky’omu kifuba." 
Exodus35:28 Era ne baleeta n’ebyakaloosa, n’amafuta g’ettaala, n’amafuta ag’okwawula n’okukozesa ku bubaane." 
Exodus35:29 Abaana ba Isirayiri bonna, abasajja n’abakazi, abaalina omutima ogwagala okuleeta ekintu kyonna olw’omulimu Mukama gwe yali alagidde Musa okukolebwa, ne bakireeta ng’ekiweebwayo kyabwe kye baawaayo eri Mukama nga beesiimidde." 
Exodus35:30 Awo Musa n’agamba abaana ba Isirayiri nti, “Muwulire. Mukama alonze Bezaaleeri mutabani wa Uli, muzzukulu wa Kuuli, ow’omu kika kya Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Mukama amujjuzza Omwoyo we, n’obusobozi, n’amagezi, n’okuteteenkanya, n’okutegeera, awamu n’obukozi obwa buli ngeri;" 
Exodus35:32 ayiiye amajjolobera ag’okukolebwa mu zaabu ne ffeeza ne mu kikomo; 
Exodus35:33 era n’ag’okusalwa mu mayinja ag’okutona, era n’ag’okwolebwa mu miti, n’okukola buli ngeri yonna ey’amagezi." 
Exodus35:34 Era ye ne Okoliyaabu mutabani wa Akisamaki ow’omu kika kya Ddaani, Mukama abawadde obusobozi okuyigiriza abalala." 
Exodus35:35 Abajjuzza amagezi ag’obukugu mu mitima gyabwe okukola eby’emikono ebya buli ngeri ng’ebikolebwa abayiiya amajjolobera, oba abasala amayinja, oba abatunzi b’emidalizo n’ebimuli mu wuzi eza bbululu, n’eza kakobe n’emyufu mu bitambaala ebya linena omulungi, oba abalusi, oba abakugu abakola ebintu byonna ebya buli ngeri n’abatetenkanya amajjolobera.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Bezaaleeri ne Okoliyaabu ne buli musajja mukugu yenna, Mukama gw’awadde obusobozi n’amagezi okumanya okukola omulimu gwonna ku kuzimba eweema ya Mukama, bajja kukola nga Mukama bw’alagidde.”" 
Exodus36:2 Awo Musa n’ayita Bezaaleeri ne Okoliyaabu, ne buli mukugu yenna Mukama gwe yali awadde amagezi n’obusobozi, era nga yeeyagalidde yekka okukola." 
Exodus36:3 Musa n’abakwasa ebirabo byonna abaana ba Isirayiri bye baali batonedde Mukama nga bwe baali beeyagalidde eby’okukozesa eweema ya Mukama. Abantu ne bongera okuleeta ku byabwe ebya kyeyagalire buli nkya. 
Exodus36:4 Awo abakozi bali abakugu abaali bakola eweema ya Mukama ne bava ku mirimu gyabwe," 
Exodus36:5 ne bajja eri Musa ne bamugamba nti, “Ebirabo abantu bye baleese bisukkiridde obungi ku ebyo ebyetaagibwa okumala omulimu Mukama gwe yalagira okukolebwa.”" 
Exodus36:6 Awo Musa n’awa ekiragiro ne kibunyisibwa mu lusiisira lwonna nti, “Tewabaawo musajja oba mukazi ayongera okuleeta ekiweebwayo olw’omulimu gw’Eweema ya Mukama.” Bwe batyo abantu ne bagaanibwa okwongera okuwaayo;" 
Exodus36:7 kubanga ebyo abakozi bye baalina byali bimala omulimu ogwo era n’okufikkawo. 
Exodus36:8 Awo bannakinku bonna mu basajja abakozi ne bakola eweema ya Mukama n’emitanda kkumi egya linena omunyoole omulungi ennyo, nga mulimu n’ebya bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu, ne bakerubi nga batungiddwamu n’amagezi mangi." 
Exodus36:9 Emitanda gyonna gyali gyenkanankana; ng’omutanda ogumu guweza obuwanvu mita kkumi na bbiri n’ekitundu, ate obugazi mita emu ne desimoolo munaana." 
Exodus36:10 Baagatta emitanda etaano nga bagisengese, gumu ku gunnaagwo, n’emitanda emirala etaano nagyo ne bagigatta bwe batyo." 
Exodus36:11 Ne batunga eŋŋango eza bbululu ku mukugiro gw’omutanda gw’entimbe ogukomererayo mu kitundu ekimu eky’entimbe etaano, era ne batunga n’eŋŋango endala mu ngeri y’emu ku ludda olulala." 
Exodus36:12 Baatunga eŋŋango amakumi ataano ku mutanda ogumu, era ne batunga eŋŋango endala amakumi ataano ku mukugiro gw’omutanda ku ludda olulala, eŋŋango nga zoolekaganye." 
Exodus36:13 Ne bakola ebikwaso ebya zaabu amakumi ataano, ne bakwasa wamu enjuuyi zombi ez’emitanda n’ebikwaso; eweema ya Mukama n’ebeera wamu nga nnamba." 
Exodus36:14 Ne bakola entimbe kkumi na lumu nga zirukiddwa mu bwoya bw’embuzi ne bazibikka ku Weema. 
Exodus36:15 Entimbe zonna ekkumi n’olumu zaali zenkanankana: ng’obuwanvu mita kkumi na ssatu n’ekitundu, obugazi zaali mita emu n’obutundu munaana." 
Exodus36:16 Ne bagatta entimbe ttaano wamu ku bwazo, n’entimbe omukaaga nazo ne bazigatta ku bwazo." 
Exodus36:17 Ne batunga eŋŋango amakumi ataano ku mukugiro gw’entimbe ekomererayo ku bwazo, n’eŋŋango amakumi ataano endala ku mukugiro gw’entimbe omulala ku bwazo." 
Exodus36:18 Ne bakola ebikwaso eby’ekikomo amakumi ataano, ne babiyisa mu ŋŋango okunyweza enjuuyi zombi ez’entimbe ezo ng’ekintu ekimu." 
Exodus36:19 Ne bakola ekibikka ku Weema mu maliba g’endiga ennume nga gannyikiddwa mu langi emyufu; okwo ne babikkako amaliba g’ente ey’omu nnyanja. 
Exodus36:20 Awo ne babajja embaawo mu muti gwa akasiya ne baziyimiriza ne zikola entobo ya Weema. 
Exodus36:21 Buli lubaawo lwali mita nnya n’ekitundu obuwanvu, ate ng’obugazi zaali sentimita nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Exodus36:22 Buli lubaawo baaluteekako obubaawo obuyiseemu bubiri, obw’okukozesa mu kugatta, nga bulekawo amabanga agenkanankana. Embaawo zonna ez’entobo ya Weema ya Mukama bwe baazikola bwe batyo." 
Exodus36:23 Baakola embaawo amakumi abiri ne bazissa ku ludda olw’obukiikaddyo obw’Eweema," 
Exodus36:24 era ne bakola obubya obutono obwa ffeeza amakumi ana, ne babussa wansi w’obubaawo obuyiseemu obubiri ku buli lubaawo." 
Exodus36:25 Ate ku ludda olw’obukiikakkono olw’Eweema ya Mukama ne bakolerayo embaawo amakumi abiri," 
Exodus36:26 n’entobo eza ffeeza amakumi ana, bbiri nga ziri wansi wa buli lubaawo." 
Exodus36:27 Ne bakola embaawo mukaaga, ne baziteeka ku ludda olw’emabega wa Weema, lwe lw’ebugwanjuba;" 
Exodus36:28 era ne bakola embaawo endala bbiri ne bazissa ku nsonda ez’oku ludda olwo olw’ebugwanjuba. 
Exodus36:29 Ku nsonda zino ebbiri, embaawo zombi baazisiba wamu nabansasaana okuviira ddala wansi okutuuka waggulu, ne bazinyweza n’empeta." 
Exodus36:30 Noolwekyo waaliwo embaawo munaana, n’entobo eza ffeeza kkumi na mukaaga, nga buli lubaawo wansi waalwo eriyo bbiri bbiri." 
Exodus36:31 Ne bakola emikiikiro mu muti gwa akasiya. Emikiikiro etaano ne bagikozesa ku mbaawo eziri ku lusebenju lwa Weema olumu," 
Exodus36:32 n’emikiikiro etaano ku mbaawo eziri ku lusebenju lwa Weema olulala, n’emikiikiro etaano ne bagikozesa ku mbaawo eziri ku ludda olw’emabega wa Weema olw’ebugwanjuba." 
Exodus36:33 Ne bassaayo omulabba nga guyita wakati w’embaawo nga guva ku ludda olumu okutuuka ku ludda olulala. 
Exodus36:34 Embaawo ne bazibikkako zaabu, era ne bakola empeta eza zaabu ne bazisibisa emikiikiro; n’emikiikiro nagyo ne bagibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus36:35 Baakola eggigi mu wuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu ne linena omulebevu omulungi alangiddwa; era omukozi omukugu n’atungiramu bakerubi." 
Exodus36:36 Ne baliwanika n’amalobo aga zaabu ku mpagi nnya ezaabajjibwa mu muti gwa akasiya, nga zibikkiddwako zaabu, era nga zisimbiddwa mu ntobo eza ffeeza." 
Exodus36:37 Ne bakola olutimbe olw’omu mulyango gwa Weema mu wuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu ne linena omulebevu alangiddwa obulungi." 
Exodus36:38 Ne balukolera empagi ttaano nga bazibazze mu muti gwa akasiya, ne baziteekako n’amalobo gaazo. Ne babikka zaabu kungulu ku mpagi ne ku bisiba byazo. Entobo zaazo ettaano ne bazikola mu kikomo." 
Exodus37:1 Awo Bezaaleeri n’akola Essanduuko mu muti gwa akasiya; ng’obuwanvu bwayo mita emu ne desimoolo emu, n’obugazi sentimita nkaaga mu musanvu, n’obugulumivu nabwo sentimita nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Exodus37:2 N’agibikkako zaabu omuka ennyo kungulu ne munda, era n’agyetoolooza omuge ogwa zaabu." 
Exodus37:3 N’agiweeseza empeta nnya eza zaabu, n’azisiba ku magulu gaayo ana, ng’empeta ebbiri ziri ku ludda lwayo olumu n’endala ebbiri ku ludda lwayo olulala." 
Exodus37:4 N’abajja emisituliro mu muti ogwa akasiya, n’agibikkako zaabu," 
Exodus37:5 n’agisonseka mu mpeta ziri okusituzanga essanduuko. 
Exodus37:6 N’akolerako ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira nga kya zaabu omuka ennyo; obuwanvu bwakyo bwali mita emu ne desimoolo emu, n’obugazi sentimita nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Exodus37:7 N’akolerako ne bakerubi babiri mu zaabu omuweese ku njuyi ebbiri ez’ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira." 
Exodus37:8 Kerubi omu yamuteeka ku ludda lumu olw’ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira, ne kerubi omulala ku ludda olwokubiri, nga bakerubi bombi beekutte wamu n’ekisaanikirako, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira." 
Exodus37:9 Ebiwaawaatiro bya bakerubi yabikola nga bibikkule nga bisonze waggulu, era nga bisiikirizza ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira. Bakerubi ne batunulagana nga boolekedde ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira." 
Exodus37:10 N’akola n’emmeeza mu muti gwa akasiya, obuwanvu bwayo sentimita kyenda, n’obugazi sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano, n’obugulumivu sentimita nkaaga mu musanvu." 
Exodus37:11 N’agibikkako zaabu omuka ennyo, era n’agyetoolooza omuge ogwa zaabu." 
Exodus37:12 N’agikolerako olukugiro oluweza sentimita musanvu ne desimoolo ttaano obugazi, n’omuge ogwa zaabu okwebungulula olukugiro olwo." 
Exodus37:13 N’aweesa empeta nnya eza zaabu, n’azisiba mu nsonda ennya awali amagulu gaayo ana." 
Exodus37:14 Empeta ezo yazissa kumpi n’olukugiro ziyisibwemu emisituliro gy’emmeeza. 
Exodus37:15 N’akola emisituliro gy’emmeeza mu muti gwa akasiya, n’agibikkako zaabu." 
Exodus37:16 N’akola mu zaabu omuka, ebikozesebwa eby’okubeeranga ku mmeeza: essowaani zaako, n’ebijiiko byako, n’ebibya eby’okufukanga ebiweebwayo eby’okunywa." 
Exodus37:17 Yakola ekikondo ky’ettaala nga kya zaabu omuka. Yakiweesezaako entobo yaakyo n’enduli, n’ebikopo ebifaanana ng’ebimuli, amatabi n’emitunsi n’ebimuli byako; byonna yabiweesa mu kyuma kya zaabu kimu bulambalamba." 
Exodus37:18 Kwaliko amatabi mukaaga agafaanana ng’omutuula emisubbaawa; amatabi asatu nga gali ku ludda lumu n’amalala asatu nga gali ku ludda olulala. 
Exodus37:19 Ku ttabi erimu kwaliko ebikopo bisatu nga bikoleddwa ng’ebimuli by’alumondi n’emitunsi n’ebimuli, ate bisatu ne bibeera ku ttabi eddala, n’ebirala bisatu ne bibeera ku buli limu ku matabi amalala okutuusa amatabi omukaaga gonna agava ku kikondo ky’ettaala lwe gaabuna." 
Exodus37:20 Ku kikondo ky’ettaala kwennyini kwaliko ebikopo bina ebyakolebwa ng’ebimuli by’alumondi n’emitunsi gyabyo n’ebimuli byako. 
Exodus37:21 Omutunsi ogumu gwali wansi w’amatabi abiri agava ku kikondo ky’ettaala, n’omuntunsi ogwokubiri ne gubeera wansi w’amatabi abiri agaddirira, n’omutunsi ogwokusatu ne gubeera wansi w’amatabi abiri agaddako, amatabi gonna omukaaga ne gabuna." 
Exodus37:22 Emitunsi n’amatabi gaako yabikola bumu n’ekikondo ky’ettaala mu zaabu omuweese omuka nga biri wamu. 
Exodus37:23 Ekikondo ky’ettaala n’akikolera ettaala musanvu, ne makansi ezikomola entambi, n’essowaani ez’okussaako ebisirinza, nga byonna abikoze mu zaabu omuka." 
Exodus37:24 Ekikondo ky’ettaala ne byonna ebigenderako yabikola mu zaabu omuka eyaweza obuzito bwa kilo amakumi asatu mu nnya. 
Exodus37:25 Yakola ekyoto, mu miti gy’akasiya, okwoterezangako obubaane, nga kyenkanankana sentimita amakumi ana mu ttaano buli ludda mu buwanvu ne mu bugazi; n’obugulumivu bwa sentimita kyenda; n’amayembe gaakyo nga gali mu muti gumu nakyo." 
Exodus37:26 Ekyoto yakisiigako zaabu omuka kyonna, waggulu ne mu mbiriizi ne ku mayembe, n’akolerako omuge ogwa zaabu okukyebungulula." 
Exodus37:27 Wansi w’omuge mu mbiriizi z’ekyoto zombi, yakolerako empeta bbiri eza zaabu, okuyisangamu emisituliro gyakyo nga wabaddewo gye kitwalibwa." 
Exodus37:28 Emisituliro yagikola mu muti gwa akasiya, n’agisiigako zaabu." 
Exodus37:29 N’atabula amafuta amatukuvu ag’okwawula, n’ateekateeka obubaane obulongosebbwa ennyo, ng’abutabudde bulungi ng’omukugu mu byakaloosa bwe yandikoze." 
Exodus38:1 Yazimba ekyoto eky’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa mu miti gy’akasiya, mita emu ne desimoolo ssatu obugulumivu, ne mita bbiri ne desimoolo ssatu obuwanvu, ate obugazi mita bbiri ne desimoolo ssatu." 
Exodus38:2 Ku nsonda zaakyo ennya yakolerako amayembe; ng’ekyoto n’amayembe yabibajja bumu mu nduli y’omuti emu. Ekyoto kyonna n’alyoka akibikkako ekikomo. 
Exodus38:3 Ate n’akola eby’okukozesa ku kyoto: ensaka, n’ebisena evvu, n’ebbensani, n’ewuuma z’ennyama, ne fulampeni. Ebyo byonna yabikola mu kikomo." 
Exodus38:4 Ekyoto yakikolera ekitindiro eky’obutimba obw’ekikomo, n’akireebeeseza ku mukiikiro gw’ekyoto, n’akissa mu kyoto okutuuka mu makkati gaakyo." 
Exodus38:5 N’akola empeta nnya ku nsonda ennya ez’ekitindiro ky’ekikomo nga ze z’okuwanirira emisituliro. 
Exodus38:6 Emisituliro gino yagibajja mu muti gwa akasiya, n’agibikkako ekikomo." 
Exodus38:7 N’asonseka emisituliro egyo ng’agiyisa mu mpeta mu mbiriizi z’ekyoto, gikozesebwenga ng’ekyoto kisitulwa. Yakikola n’embaawo nga wakati kya muwulukwa." 
Exodus38:8 N’akola ebbensani ey’ekikomo n’akameeza kaayo, bye yaweesa okuva mu ndabirwamu ez’ekikomo ezaagabwa abakazi abaaweerezanga ku mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Exodus38:9 Ekyaddirira, yakola oluggya. Ku luuyi olw’obukiikaddyo, oluggya lwali obuwanvu mita amakumi ana mu mukaaga, nga lulina amagigi aga linena omulungi omulebevu alangiddwa," 
Exodus38:10 n’ebikondo amakumi abiri, n’entobo mwe bituula ez’ekikomo amakumi abiri, nga kuliko amalobo aga ffeeza n’emikiikiro egya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:11 Ne ku luuyi olw’obukiikakkono oluggya lwali obuwanvu mita ana mu mukaaga, n’ebikondo amakumi abiri, n’ebikolo byabyo mwe bituula eby’ekikomo amakumi abiri, nga ku bikondo kuliko amalobo aga ffeeza n’emikiikiro gyako gyali gya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:12 Ku luuyi olw’ebugwanjuba oluggya lwali lwa mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri, ne desimoolo ttaano nga luliko entimbe, n’ebikondo kkumi, n’entobo kkumi; n’amalobo n’emikiikiro nga bya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:13 Ne ku luuyi olw’ebuvanjuba oluggya lwali obugazi mita amakumi abiri mu bbiri n’obutundu butaano. 
Exodus38:14 Ku ludda olumu olw’omulyango kwaliko amagigi obuwanvu mita mukaaga n’obutundu munaana, n’ebikondo bisatu n’entobo zaabyo ssatu." 
Exodus38:15 Ne ku ludda olulala olw’omulyango nakwo kwaliko entimbe obuwanvu mita mukaaga n’obutundu munaana, era n’ebikondo bisatu n’entobo zaabyo ssatu." 
Exodus38:16 Entimbe zonna okwebungulula oluggya zaali za linena omulungi omulebevu alangiddwa. 
Exodus38:17 Entobo z’ebikondo zaali za kikomo, naye amalobo n’emikiikiro gyako nga bya ffeeza, ne ku mitwe gyabyo nga kubikkiddwako ffeeza; bwe bityo ebikondo byonna eby’omu luggya byaliko emikiikiro gya ffeeza." 
Exodus38:18 Olutimbe olw’omu mulyango gw’oluggya lwakolebwa mu linena omulungi omulebevu alangiddwa obulungi, nga lutungiddwamu amajjolobera mu wuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe ne myufu. Lwali luweza obuwanvu mita mwenda n’obugulumivu mita bbiri n’obutundu busatu, ng’entimbe ez’oluggya bwe zaali." 
Exodus38:19 Lwalina empagi nnya, n’entobo zaazo nnya nga za kikomo, n’amalobo gaazo n’emikiikiro nga bya ffeeza, ne kungulu kwonna ne kubikkibwako ffeeza." 
Exodus38:20 Enkondo zonna ez’Eweema ya Mukama n’okwebungulula oluggya zaali za kikomo. 
Exodus38:21 Bino bye bintu byonna ebyakozesebwa ku Weema, Eweema ya Mukama ey’Obujulizi, nga Musa bwe yalagira okubibala bikozesebwe Abaleevi nga balabirirwa Isamaali mutabani wa Alooni kabona." 
Exodus38:22 Bezaaleeri, mutabani wa Uli muzzukulu wa Kuuli, ow’omu kika kya Yuda, n’akola ebyo byonna Mukama bye yalagira Musa;" 
Exodus38:23 baakolera wamu ne Okoliyaabu, mutabani wa Akisamaki ow’omu kika kya Ddaani, eyali omukugu ennyo mu kwola ne mu kutetenkanya, n’okutunga amajjolobera mu linena ennungi endebevu ennange n’ewuzi eza bbululu ne kakobe ne myufu." 
Exodus38:24 Zaabu yenna eyali aweereddwayo eri Mukama, eyakozesebwa mu kuzimba ekifo ekitukuvu, yali nga ttani emu, ng’okupima kw’Awatukuvu okutongole bwe kuli." 
Exodus38:25 Ne ffeeza eyaweebwayo abaabalibwa nga bava mu kibiina mu kubala abantu, yali wa kilo enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina, ng’okupima kw’Awatukuvu okutongole bwe kuli." 
Exodus38:26 Noolwekyo, buli muntu yawangayo gulaamu ttaano ne desimoolo ttaano ng’okupima kw’Awatukuvu okutongole bwe kuli ng’aweebwayo abo abaabalibwa nga bava ku myaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okweyongerayo, bonna baawera abasajja obusiriivu mukaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu bitaano mu ataano." 
Exodus38:27 Ffeeza ow’obuzito bwa kilo enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina ye yasaanuusibwa okukolamu entobo ekikumi ez’Awatukuvu n’eggigi: noolwekyo, nga buli kilo amakumi asatu mu nnya zikola entobo emu." 
Exodus38:28 Kilo amakumi asatu ezaasigalawo zaakolwamu amalobo ag’oku bikondo n’emikiikiro gyabyo, n’okubikka ku mitwe gy’ebikondo." 
Exodus38:29 Ekikomo ekyaweebwayo eri Mukama kyali kilo enkumi bbiri mu ebikumi bina. 
Exodus38:30 Omwo Bezaaleeri mwe yakola ekituurwamu eky’omulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’ekyoto eky’ekikomo, n’ekitindiro eky’obutimba eky’ekikomo, n’ebikozesebwa ebirala byonna eby’ekyoto," 
Exodus38:31 n’ekituurwamu okwebungulula oluggya, n’ekituurwamu eky’omulyango omunene ogw’oluggya, n’enkondo zonna ez’Eweema ya Mukama, n’enkondo zonna okwebungulula oluggya." 
Exodus39:1 Awo ne bakola, mu wuzi eza bbululu; ne kakobe ne myufu, ebyambalo ebirukiddwa obulungi eby’okuweererezangamu mu Kifo Ekitukuvu. Ne bakolera ne Alooni ebyambalo ebitukuvu, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Awo ne bakola ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi mu wuzi eza zaabu, ne bbululu, ne kakobe ne myufu, ne linena omulebevu omulange." 
Exodus39:3 Ne baweesa zaabu ey’oluwewere, ne bagisala obulere ne babukozesa awamu n’ewuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu ne linena omulebevu omulungi omulange, nga bikoleddwa mu majjolobera agakoleddwa n’obukugu." 
Exodus39:4 Ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi ne bagikolera eby’okubibegabega bibiri nga bitungiddwa w’ekoma, n’egattibwa bulungi." 
Exodus39:5 Ne bakola omusipi gwayo n’amagezi mangi ng’agaakola ekkanzu ey’obwakabona, n’ebyakozesebwa nga bye bimu. Ewuzi nga za zaabu, ne bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu, ne linena omulebevu alangiddwa; nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Ne baddira amayinja ga onuku ne bagakwasiza mu mapeesa aga zaabu, ng’amayinja gawandiikiddwako, ng’empeta bw’ewandiikwako, amannya g’abaana ba Isirayiri." 
Exodus39:7 Ne bagakwasiza ku byokubibegabega eby’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, okubeeranga amayinja g’ekijjukizo ky’abaana ba Isirayiri; nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Ne bakola ekyomukifuba, nga mulimu gwa kikugu ng’ogw’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eyitibwa efodi, mu wuzi za zaabu, ne bbululu, ne kakobe ne myufu ne linena omulebevu omulange." 
Exodus39:9 Kyali kyenkanankana, buli ludda sentimita amakumi abiri mu bbiri ne desimoolo ttaano nga kimaze okuwetebwamu wakati." 
Exodus39:10 Ne batungirako ennyiriri nnya ez’amayinja ag’omuwendo omungi. Mu lunyiriri olusooka bassaamu amayinja: sadiyo, ne topazi, ne kaabankulo;" 
Exodus39:11 ne mu lunyiriri olwokubiri bassaamu amayinja: nnawandagala, ne safiro ne alimaasi;" 
Exodus39:12 ne mu lunyiriri olwokusatu bassaamu amayinja: jasinta, ne ageti, ne amesusito;" 
Exodus39:13 ne mu lunyiriri olwokuna bassaamu amayinja: berulo, ne onuku, ne yasipero; ne gategekebwa mu fuleemu eya zaabu." 
Exodus39:14 Waaliwo amayinja ag’omuwendo kkumi n’abiri, nga ku buli limu kusaliddwako erimu ku mannya g’abaana ba Isirayiri. Gaasalibwa bulungi ng’obubonero obuwoolebwa nga ku buli limu kuliko erinnya lyako okumalirayo ddala amannya g’ebika ekkumi n’ebibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Ku kyomukifuba baakolerako enjegere ennange ng’emiguwa, nga za zaabu omuka;" 
Exodus39:16 ne bakola fuleemu bbiri eza zaabu n’empeta bbiri eza zaabu; ne bassa empeta ezo zombi ku mikugiro ebiri egy’ekyomu kifuba. 
Exodus39:17 Ne bayisa enjegere ebbiri mu mpeta ebbiri ezaali ku mikugiro gy’eky’omu kifuba. 
Exodus39:18 Ne baddira enjuuyi ebbiri ezaasigalawo ez’enjegere ne bazikwasiza ku fuleemu ebbiri, ne bazinywereza mu maaso g’eby’okubibegabega byombi eby’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi." 
Exodus39:19 Era baakola empeta bbiri eza zaabu ne bazitunga ku mikugiro ebiri egy’ekyomu kifuba ku luuyi olw’omunda olwali luliraanye ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi. 
Exodus39:20 Ne bakolayo empeta endala bbiri eza zaabu ne baziteeka mu maaso mu bitundu byombi ebya wansi eby’eby’okubibegabega eby’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi, wagguluko okumpi n’oluzizi lw’omusipi lw’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi." 
Exodus39:21 Baasiba empeta ez’oku kyomukifuba wamu n’empeta z’ekkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi n’akaguwa aka bbululu, ne bakagatta n’omusipi ekyomukifuba kireme kutaggulukuka ku kkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi. Byakolebwa nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Baakola ekyambalo eky’omunda mu kkanzu ey’obwakabona eya efodi, nga kiruke era nga kya bbululu kyonna." 
Exodus39:23 Ne bassa ekituli wakati mu kyambalo omw’okuyisa omutwe. Ku kituli ekyo ne beetooloozaako omuge omuyonde ng’omuleera kireme okuyulika. 
Exodus39:24 Okwetooloola ebirenge by’ekyambalo ekyo wansi ne batungayo amajjolobera mu wuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe, ne myufu, ne linena omulebevu omulange obulungi." 
Exodus39:25 Era ne bakola n’obude obwa zaabu omuka, ne bagenda nga babutobeka mu majjolobera;" 
Exodus39:26 baatunga amajjolobera ne baddirizaako akade, ate ne batunga amajjolobera ne baddirizaako akade, okwetooloola ebirenge by’ekyambalo ekyo eky’okuweererezangamu; nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Era ne bakolera Alooni n’abaana be amakooti agaalukibwa mu wuzi eza linena omulebevu omulungi. 
Exodus39:28 Ne bakola n’ekitambaala eky’oku mutwe mu linena omulebevu omulungi, era n’enkuufiira ne bazikola mu linena omulebevu omulungi; ne bakola n’empale mu linena omulebevu omulungi omulange," 
Exodus39:29 n’omusipi mu linena omulebevu omulungi omulange ow’ewuzi eza bbululu, ne kakobe ne myufu nga zitungiddwa ng’omudalizo n’amagezi mangi; nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Era ne bakola akapande ak’engule entukuvu mu zaabu omuka, ne bayolako ebigambo, nga bw’owandiika ku kabonero, nti: Mutukuvu wa Mukama." 
Exodus39:31 Ne bakasibako akakoba akatunge obulungi aka bbululu, kakanywerezenga waggulu ku kitambaala ky’oku mutwe; nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Bwe gutyo omulimu gwonna ogw’okukola Eweema ya Mukama, eweema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu ne guggwa; ng’abaana ba Isirayiri bakoze ebyo byonna nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus39:33 Awo Weema ya Mukama ne bagireetera Musa; Eweema ya Mukama yonna ne byonna ebyali bigirimu: ebisiba byayo, n’embaawo, n’emikiikiro, n’empagi zaayo, n’ebituurwamu;" 
Exodus39:34 ekibikkako eky’amaliba g’endiga amakunye amannyike mu langi emyufu, n’amaliba g’embuzi amakunye, n’eggigi ery’okutimba;" 
Exodus39:35 essanduuko ey’Endagaano n’emisituliro gyayo n’ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira;" 
Exodus39:36 emmeeza ne byonna ebigibeerako, n’emigaati gya Mukama egy’olubeerera;" 
Exodus39:37 ekikondo ky’ettaala ekya zaabu omuka, n’ettaala zaako n’ebigenderako ebikozesebwa, n’amafuta gaazo;" 
Exodus39:38 ekyoto ekya zaabu, amafuta ag’okwawula n’obubaane obw’akawoowo, n’olutimbe olw’omulyango oguyingira mu Weema ya Mukama;" 
Exodus39:39 ekyoto eky’ekikomo n’ekitindiro kyakyo eky’ekikomo, emisituliro gyakyo ne byonna ebikozesebwako; ebbensani ne ky’etuulamu;" 
Exodus39:40 entimbe ez’oku bisenge, eby’omu luggya n’empagi zaazo ne mwe zituula, n’olutimbe olw’omu mulyango ogulaga mu luggya, emiguwa gyalwo n’enkondo zaalwo; ne byonna ebikozesebwa olw’emirimu gy’omu Weema ya Mukama, eweema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu;" 
Exodus39:41 ebyambalo ebiruke obulungi ebyambalwa mu kuweereza mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, ebyambalo ebitukuvu ebya Alooni kabona, n’ebyambalo bya batabani be bye bakozesa mu bwakabona nga baweereza." 
Exodus39:42 Nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa mu byonna, bwe batyo abaana ba Isirayiri omulimu gwonna bwe baagukola." 
Exodus39:43 Awo Musa n’akebera omulimu gwonna, era n’alaba nga bagumalirizza. Nga Mukama bwe yalagira, nabo bwe batyo bwe baagukola. Awo Musa n’abasabira omukisa." 
Exodus40:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Exodus40:2 “Ku lunaku olw’olubereberye olw’omwezi ogw’olubereberye kw’olisimbira Eweema ya Mukama, eweema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Exodus40:3 Essanduuko ey’Endagaano oligiyingiza mu Weema; Essanduuko n’olyoka ogisiikiriza n’eggigi. 
Exodus40:4 Oliyingiza emmeeza, n’otegeka bulungi byonna ebigikolerwako. Oliyingiza ekikondo ky’ettaala era n’otegekako ettaala zaakwo n’ozikoleeza." 
Exodus40:5 Era oliteeka ekyoto ekya zaabu eky’okwoterezangako obubaane mu maaso g’Essanduuko ey’Endagaano, n’ossaawo olutimbe mu mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama." 
Exodus40:6 “Ekyoto eky’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa olikissa mu maaso g’omulyango ogwa Weema ya Mukama, weema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Exodus40:7 olyoke oteeke ebbensani wakati wa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu n’ekyoto, mu bbensani oteekemu amazzi." 
Exodus40:8 Olikola oluggya okwebungulula Weema ya Mukama, n’ossaawo olutimbe mu mulyango oguyingira mu luggya." 
Exodus40:9 “Oliddira amafuta ag’okwawula n’ogamansa ku Weema ya Mukama ne byonna ebigirimu, olyoke oyawule Eweema ya Mukama n’ebigirimu byonna, ebeere ntukuvu." 
Exodus40:10 Olimansira amafuta ku kyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa n’ebikozesebwako byonna, n’oyawula ekyoto, bwe kityo ekyoto kiribeera kitukuvu nnyo." 
Exodus40:11 Era n’ebbensani oligimansirako amafuta, ne kw’etuula, n’ogyawula, n’ogitukuza." 
Exodus40:12 “Olireeta Alooni ne batabani be ku mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’obanaaza n’amazzi," 
Exodus40:13 n’oyambaza Alooni ebyambalo ebitukuvu n’omusiigako amafuta n’omwawula, alyoke ampeereze nga kabona." 
Exodus40:14 Olireeta ne batabani be n’obambaza ekkanzu ey’obwakabona," 
Exodus40:15 n’obasiigako amafuta, nga bwe wasiize ku kitaabwe, balyoke bampeereze nga bakabona: era okusiigibwako amafuta okwo kulibafuula bakabona ebbanga lyonna mu mirembe gyabwe.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa bw’atyo n’akola ebyo byonna nga Mukama bwe yamulagira. 
Exodus40:17 Awo ku lunaku olusooka mu mwezi ogw’olubereberye, mu mwaka ogwokubiri, Eweema ya Mukama n’esimbibwa." 
Exodus40:18 Musa n’asimba Eweema ya Mukama; n’ateekateeka ebya wansi mw’etuula, n’ategeka olukangaga lwayo, n’asimba empagi zaayo;" 
Exodus40:19 n’assaako ekibikka ku Weema ya Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yamulagira." 
Exodus40:20 N’addira Endagaano, ey’ebipande eby’amayinja okwasalibwa Amateeka Ekkumi, n’agiteeka munda mu Ssanduuko ey’Endagaano, n’assa emisituliro ku Ssanduuko ey’Endagaano, n’assaako kungulu ekisaanikira, ye ntebe ey’okusaasira;" 
Exodus40:21 n’ayingiza Essanduuko ey’Endagaano munda mu Weema ya Mukama, n’atimbawo eggigi, n’asiikiriza Essanduuko ey’Endagaano, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:22 N’ayingiza emmeeza mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’agiteeka ku ludda olw’Obukiikakkono olwa Weema ya Mukama, wabweru w’eggigi," 
Exodus40:23 n’assaako emigaati ng’agitegese bulungi awali Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:24 N’assa ekikondo ky’ettaala mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu ku ludda olw’Obukiikaddyo obw’Eweema ya Mukama, okwolekera emmeeza," 
Exodus40:25 n’ategeka ettaala awali Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:26 N’ayingiza ekyoto ekya zaabu mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu mu maaso g’eggigi," 
Exodus40:27 n’ayokerako obubaane obwa kawoowo, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:28 N’ateeka olutimbe olw’omu mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama mu kifo kyalwo. 
Exodus40:29 N’ateeka ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa ku mulyango gw’Eweema ya Mukama, weema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’aweerayo okwo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eky’obuwunga, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:30 N’atereeza ebbensani wakati wa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu n’ekyoto, n’assaamu amazzi ag’okunaaba;" 
Exodus40:31 Musa ne Alooni ne batabani ba Alooni mwe baanaabiranga engalo zaabwe n’ebigere byabwe. 
Exodus40:32 Buli lwe baayingiranga mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, ne buli lwe baasembereranga ekyoto nga banaaba, nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Exodus40:33 N’akola oluggya okwebungulula Weema ya Mukama n’ekyoto, n’assaawo olutimbe mu mulyango oguyingira mu luggya. Bw’atyo Musa omulimu n’agumaliriza." 
Exodus40:34 Awo ekire ne kibuutikira Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, yonna n’ejjula ekitiibwa kya Mukama." 
Exodus40:35 Musa n’atasobola kuyingira mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, kubanga ekire kyagibuutikira, n’ekitiibwa kya Mukama ne kijijjula." 
Exodus40:36 Mu lugendo lwabwe lwonna, ekire bwe kyaggyibwanga ku Weema ya Mukama, olwo abaana ba Isirayiri nga basitula nga batambula;" 
Exodus40:37 naye ekire bwe kitaggyibwangako ku Weema ya Mukama, olwo nga tebasitula kutambula okutuusa ku lunaku lwe kyaggyibwangako." 
Exodus40:38 Ekire kya Mukama kyabeeranga ku Weema ya Mukama emisana, ate ekiro nga mu kire ekyo mubaamu muliro, ng’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna ebyo babiraba mu lugendo lwabwe lwonna." 
Leviticus1:1 Awo Mukama n’ayita Musa, n’ayogera naye ng’asinziira mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. N’amulagira nti," 
Leviticus1:2 “Yogera n’abaana ba Isirayiri obagambe nti, ‘Omuntu yenna mu mmwe bw’aneeteesanga okuleeta ekiweebwayo eri Mukama, anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo kya nte ng’agiggya mu kiraalo kye, oba endiga oba embuzi ng’agiggya mu kisibo kye.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Ekiweebwayo bwe kinaabanga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa nga kiva mu kiraalo ky’ente, anaawangayo seddume etaliiko kamogo. Anaagyereeteranga n’agiweerayo ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, kiryoke kikkirizibwe eri Mukama." 
Leviticus1:4 Omuntu aleese ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa anaakwatanga omutwe gwakyo, era kinakkirizibwanga ku lulwe kiryoke kimutangiririre olw’ebibi bye." 
Leviticus1:5 Seddume eyo anaagittiranga mu maaso ga Mukama; era batabani ba Alooni, bakabona, banaddiranga omusaayi gwayo ne baguwaayo eri Mukama nga bagumansira ku kyoto okwebungulula enjuuyi zonna ez’ekyoto ekiri awo okumpi n’omulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Leviticus1:6 Awo ekiweebwayo ekyo ekyokebwa anaakibaagangako eddiba, n’akitemaatemamu ebifi." 
Leviticus1:7 Batabani ba Alooni, kabona, banaakumanga omuliro mu kyoto, ne batindikira bulungi enku ku muliro ogwo." 
Leviticus1:8 Awo batabani ba Alooni, bakabona, banaategekanga bulungi ebifi ebyo, nga n’omutwe n’amasavu babitaddeko; banaabissanga ku nku ezikoledde omuliro ku kyoto." 
Leviticus1:9 Eyaleese ekiweebwayo ekyo anaanaazanga n’amazzi eby’omu lubuto n’amagulu; ebyo byonna kabona anaabyokyanga ku kyoto ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, ekyokeddwa mu muliro ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ekinaaleetebwanga okuba ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa bwe kinaavanga mu kisibo, oba ndiga oba mbuzi, omuntu oyo anaawangayo ennume etaliiko kamogo." 
Leviticus1:11 Anaagittiranga ku luuyi olwakkono olw’ekyoto mu maaso ga Mukama, era batabani ba Alooni, bakabona, banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku njuyi zonna ez’ekyoto okukyebungulula." 
Leviticus1:12 Anaagitemaatemangamu ebifi; era kabona anaategekanga bulungi ebifi ebyo, nga n’omutwe n’amasavu abitaddeko, n’abissa ku nku ezikoledde omuliro ku kyoto." 
Leviticus1:13 Eyaleese ekiweebwayo ekyo anaanaazanga n’amazzi eby’omu lubuto n’amagulu; ebyo byonna kabona anaabiwangayo, n’abyokya ku kyoto, nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekyokeddwa mu muliro, ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eri Mukama bwe kinaabanga eky’ennyonyi, omuntu anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo eky’amayiba oba eky’enjiibwa ento." 
Leviticus1:15 Kabona anaaleetanga ennyonyi eyo ku kyoto n’aginyoola omutwe n’agukutulako, n’agwokya ku kyoto; omusaayi gwayo anaagukenenuliranga mu mbiriizi z’ekyoto." 
Leviticus1:16 Anaagiggyangamu ekisakiro kyayo n’ebikirimu, n’akisuula ku ludda olw’ebuvanjuba olw’ekyoto mu kifo awayiyibwa evvu." 
Leviticus1:17 Anaagikwatanga ebiwaawaatiro n’agiyuza; kyokka taagiryebulirengamu ddala. Anaagyokeranga ku nku ezikoledde omuliro mu kyoto; nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekyokeddwa mu muliro ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama. 
Leviticus2:1 “ ‘Omuntu yenna bw’anaaleetanga eri Mukama ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke; empeke anaamalanga kuzisa, n’aleeta obuwunga obulungi. Anaabufukangako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, n’ateekako n’obubaane," 
Leviticus2:2 n’alyoka abuleetera batabani ba Alooni, bakabona. Kabona anaayoolanga olubatu lw’obuwunga obulimu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni n’obubaane, n’abwokya mu kyoto ng’ekijjukizo, nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokeddwa mu muliro ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:3 Obuwunga obunaasigalangawo ku kiweebwayo, bunaatwalibwanga Alooni ne batabani be, nga kye kitundu ekitukuvu ennyo eky’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokeddwa mu muliro." 
Leviticus2:4 “ ‘Bw’onooleetanga emigaati egifumbiddwa mu oveni nga kye kiweebwayo, ginaabanga emigaati egikoleddwa mu buwunga obulungi nga mutabuddwamu n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni nga tegiriimu kizimbulukusa, oba bunaabanga obusukuuti obw’oluwewere obutaliimu kizimbulukusa nga busiigiddwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Leviticus2:5 Ekiweebwayo kyo bwe kinaabanga eky’emmere ey’empeke nga kitegekeddwa ku lukalango, kinaakolebwanga mu buwunga obulungi obutaliimu kizimbulukusa nga butabuddwamu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Leviticus2:6 Onookimenyaamenyanga mu butundutundu, n’okifukako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni. Ekyo kye kiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke." 
Leviticus2:7 Ekiweebwayo kyo bwe kinaabanga eky’emmere ey’empeke nga kyakufumbirwa mu fulampeni, kinaateekebwateekebwanga mu buwunga obulungi n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Leviticus2:8 Onooleeteranga Mukama ekiweebwayo ekyo eky’emmere ey’empeke ekitabuddwa mu bintu ebyo; bwe kinaakwasibwanga kabona, ye anaakireetanga ku kyoto." 
Leviticus2:9 Awo kabona anaggyanga ku kiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke, ekitundu eky’ekijjukizo kyakyo, n’akyokya ku kyoto, nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokeddwa mu muliro ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:10 Era ekinaafikkanga ku kiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke, Alooni ne batabani be, be banaakitwalanga; nga kye kitundu ekitukuvu ennyo ekibalirwa ku biweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokeddwa mu muliro." 
Leviticus2:11 “ ‘Temuleeteranga Mukama ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke nga kiteekeddwamu n’ekizimbulukusa; kubanga temuuyokyenga kizimbulukusa wadde omubisi gw’enjuki ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokeddwa mu muliro. 
Leviticus2:12 Munaabireetanga eri Mukama ng’ebiweebwayo eby’ebibala ebibereberye, naye tebiiweerwengayo ku kyoto okubeera evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus2:13 Ebiweebwayo byo byonna eby’emmere ey’empeke onoobirungangamu omunnyo: tokkirizanga munnyo ogw’endagaano ne Katonda wo okubula mu biweebwayo byo eby’emmere ey’empeke; mu biweebwayo byo byonna ossangamu omunnyo. 
Leviticus2:14 “ ‘Bw’onooleetanga eri Mukama ebiweebwayo eby’ebibala ebibereberye eby’emmere ey’empeke, binaabanga ebirimba ebibisi ebibereberye eby’emmere ey’empeke nga bibetenteddwa era nga byokeddwako mu muliro." 
Leviticus2:15 Onoobifukangako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, n’obiteekangako n’obubaane; ekyo nga kye kiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke." 
Leviticus2:16 Awo kabona anaggyanga ku kiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke, ekimaze okubetentebwa nga mulimu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni n’obubaane, ekitundu eky’ekijjukizo kyakyo, n’akyokya; ekyo nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokeddwa mu muliro." 
Leviticus3:1 “ ‘Omuntu bw’anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe eri Mukama, ekiweebwayo ekyo nga kya nte nnume oba nkazi gy’aggye mu kiraalo kye, ente eyo tebeerengako kamogo." 
Leviticus3:2 Omuntu aleese ekiweebwayo ekyo anaakwatanga omutwe gwakyo n’akittira ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu; batabani ba Alooni, bakabona, ne balyoka bamansira omusaayi ku kyoto okukyebungulula." 
Leviticus3:3 Omu ku bakabona anaggyanga ebintu bino mu kiweebwayo olw’emirembe ekireeteddwa nga kyokeddwa mu muliro, nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama; anaawangayo amasavu agabikka ku byenda, n’amasavu gonna agali okumpi n’ebyenda," 
Leviticus3:4 n’ensigo zombi awamu n’amasavu agaziriko okuliraana ekiwato, n’ekibikka ku kibumba nga biggyibwako wamu n’ensigo." 
Leviticus3:5 Kale batabani ba Alooni banaabyokeranga kungulu ku kiweebwayo ekyokebwa ekiri ku nku eziri ku muliro ne kivaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama. 
Leviticus3:6 “ ‘Omuntu anaggyanga mu kisibo kye ekisolo ekisajja oba ekikazi nga tekiriiko kamogo, n’akiwaayo eri Mukama." 
Leviticus3:7 Bw’anaaleetanga endiga ento nga kye kiweebwayo kye eri Mukama," 
Leviticus3:8 anaagikwatanga omutwe gwayo, n’agittira mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Kale batabani ba Alooni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku kyoto n’okukyebunguluza." 
Leviticus3:9 Mu kiweebwayo olw’emirembe ky’anaaleetanga okuwaayo ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama nga kyokebwa mu muliro, anaggyangamu bino n’abiwaayo eri Mukama: anaawangayo amasavu n’omukira gwonna n’amasavu gaagwo, nga gusaliddwako okumpi n’omugongo, n’amasavu agabikka ku byenda, n’amasavu gonna agali okumpi n’ebyenda," 
Leviticus3:10 n’ensigo zombi awamu n’amasavu agaziriko okuliraana ekiwato, n’ekibikka ku kibumba, nga biggyibwako wamu n’ensigo." 
Leviticus3:11 Awo kabona anaabyokeranga ku kyoto okubeera ekyokulya ekiweebwayo eri Mukama nga kyokeddwa mu muliro. 
Leviticus3:12 “ ‘Ekiweebwayo kye bwe kinaabanga embuzi, anaagiwangayo ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama;" 
Leviticus3:13 anaagikwatanga omutwe gwayo, n’agittira mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Kale batabani ba Alooni banaamansiranga omusaayi gwayo ku kyoto n’okukyebunguluza." 
Leviticus3:14 Awo anaawangayo ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekyokeddwa mu muliro ng’akiggya okwo: amasavu agabikka ebyenda, n’amasavu gonna agaliraanye ebyenda," 
Leviticus3:15 n’ensigo zombi n’amasavu agaziriko okuliraana ekiwato, n’ekibikka ku kibumba nga biggyibwako wamu n’ensigo." 
Leviticus3:16 Awo kabona anaabyokeranga ku kyoto okubeera ekyokulya ekiweebwayo nga kyokebwa mu muliro okuvaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama. Amasavu gonna ganaabanga ga Mukama. 
Leviticus3:17 “ ‘Ekintu kino kinaabeeranga etteeka ery’ebiro byonna okuyita mu mirembe eginaagendanga giddiriragana mu bifo byonna gye munaabeeranga. Temulyanga masavu wadde omusaayi.’ ” 
Leviticus4:1 Awo Mukama n’ayogera ne Musa n’amugamba nti," 
Leviticus4:2 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti: ‘Bino bye biragiro eri buli muntu anaasobyanga ku mateeka ga Mukama nga tagenderedde, n’akola ekintu kyonna Mukama kye yalagira obutakikolanga." 
Leviticus4:3 “ ‘Singa Kabona eyafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ayonoona, bw’atyo abantu n’abaleetako omusango olw’ekibi ky’anaabanga akoze, anaaleeteranga Mukama ente ennume entoototo etaliiko kamogo, nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama olw’ekibi." 
Leviticus4:4 Sseddume eyo anaagireetanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, mu maaso ga Mukama; anaagikwatanga omutwe gwayo n’agittira awo mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus4:5 Awo kabona eyafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni anaatoolangako ku musaayi gwa sseddume eyo n’aguleeta mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Leviticus4:6 Anannyikanga olugalo lwe mu musaayi ogwo n’agumansirako emirundi musanvu awo eggigi ery’awatukuvu we litunudde mu maaso ga Mukama. 
Leviticus4:7 Awo kabona anaddiranga ku musaayi, n’agusiiga ku mayembe ag’oku kyoto okwoterezebwa obubaane obw’akawoowo, ekiri mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu mu maaso ga Mukama. Omusaayi gwa sseddume ogunaasigalangawo gwonna, anaaguyiwanga ku ntobo y’ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa ekiri ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Leviticus4:8 Amasavu gonna aganaabanga mu sseddume ey’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi, anaagaggyangako: amasavu agabikka ebyenda, n’amasavu gonna agaliraanye ebyenda," 
Leviticus4:9 n’ensigo zombi n’amasavu agazirimu okuliraana ekiwato, n’ekibikka ku kibumba ng’abiggyirako wamu n’ensigo," 
Leviticus4:10 (nga bwe biggyibwa ku nte ey’ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe), bw’atyo kabona anaabyokeranga ku kyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa." 
Leviticus4:11 Naye eddiba lya sseddume eyo n’ennyama yaayo yonna, n’omutwe gwayo, n’amagulu gaayo, n’eby’omu nda byayo nga n’ebyenda kwebiri, awamu n’obusa bwayo," 
Leviticus4:12 ye sseddume yonna, anaagitwalanga wabweru w’olusiisira mu kifo ekiyonjo awayiyibwa evvu ly’ekyoto, anaatindiranga enku n’akuma omuliro n’agyokeranga okwo." 
Leviticus4:13 “ ‘Ekibiina kyonna eky’Abayisirayiri bwe kinaayonoonanga nga tekigenderedde, ne kikola ekimu ku ebyo Mukama bye yalagira mu mateeka ge obutabikolanga, ekibiina ne bwe kinaabanga tekitegedde nti kisobezza, banaabanga bazzizza omusango." 
Leviticus4:14 Ekibi ekikoleddwa bwe kinaategeerekekanga, ekibiina kinaaleetanga sseddume y’ente entoototo mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga ky’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakulembeze b’ekibiina banassanga emikono gyabwe ku mutwe gwa sseddume eyo mu maaso ga Mukama, sseddume eyo n’ettirwa mu maaso ga Mukama." 
Leviticus4:16 Awo kabona eyafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni anaatwalangako ku musaayi gwa sseddume eyo n’aguleeta mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Leviticus4:17 Anannyikanga olugalo lwe mu musaayi ogwo n’agumansira emirundi musanvu awo eggigi ly’awatukuvu we litunudde mu maaso ga Mukama. 
Leviticus4:18 Anaddiranga ku musaayi n’agusiiga ku mayembe ag’oku kyoto ekiri mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu mu maaso ga Mukama. Omusaayi ogunaasigalangawo gwonna anaagufukanga ku ntobo y’ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa ekiri ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Leviticus4:19 Anaggyangamu amasavu gaayo gonna n’agookera ku kyoto," 
Leviticus4:20 n’akola ku sseddume eno nga bwe yakola ku sseddume ey’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi. Bw’atyo kabona anaatangiririranga abantu bonna mu kibiina, era ne basonyiyibwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Anaafulumyanga sseddume eno ebweru w’olusiisira n’agyokya nga bwe yayokya sseddume eri eyasooka. Kino kye kiweebwayo olw’ekibi ku lw’ekibiina ky’abantu bonna. 
Leviticus4:22 “ ‘Omufuzi bw’anaayonoonanga nga tagenderedde n’akola ekimu ku ebyo Mukama bye yalagira mu mateeka ge obutabikolanga, anaabanga azzizza omusango." 
Leviticus4:23 Ekibi ekyo ky’akoze bwe kinaamalanga okumutegeezebwa, anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo kye eky’embuzi ensajja etaliiko kamogo." 
Leviticus4:24 Anagikwatanga ku mutwe gwayo, n’agittira awo mu maaso ga Mukama we battira ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa. Ekyo nga kye kiweebwayo olw’ekibi." 
Leviticus4:25 Awo kabona anaddiranga ku musaayi ogw’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi, n’olugalo lwe, n’agusiiga ku mayembe ag’oku kyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa. Omusaayi ogunaabanga gusigaddewo gwonna anaaguyiwanga ku ntobo ey’ekyoto eky’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa."
