Leviticus18:12 “ ‘Teweebakanga na mwannyina wa kitaawo n’okola naye ebyensonyi; oyo ne kitaawo ba musaayi gwe gumu. 
Leviticus18:13 “ ‘Teweebakanga na muwala bwe bazaalibwa ne nnyoko n’okola naye ebyensonyi; kubanga oyo ne nnyoko ba musaayi gwe gumu. 
Leviticus18:14 “ ‘Toweebuulanga muganda wa kitaawo, ng’olaga eri mukazi we weebake naye mukole ebyensonyi; oyo maama wo omuto." 
Leviticus18:15 “ ‘Teweebakanga na muka mutabani wo ne mukola ebyensonyi; kubanga oyo ye mukyala wa mutabani wo; tomuleeteranga bya buswavu. 
Leviticus18:16 “ ‘Teweebakanga na muka muganda wo ne mukola ebyensonyi, kubanga ekyo kinaaleeteranga muganda wo obuswavu." 
Leviticus18:17 “ ‘Teweebakanga na mukazi ate ne muwala we n’okola nabo ebyensonyi. Era teweebakanga na mwana muwala owa mutabani wa mukazi oyo oba na mwana muwala owa muwala we; kubanga abo ba musaayi gwe gumu n’ogw’omukazi oyo. Ekyo kibi kinene. 
Leviticus18:18 “ ‘Toleetanga mukazi nga muganda wa mukyala wo ne badda mu kuvuganya, era ne weebaka naye ne mukola ebyensonyi nga mukyala wo akyali mulamu." 
Leviticus18:19 “ ‘Tosembereranga mukazi ng’oyagala weebake naye omukoleko ebyensonyi ng’ali mu kiseera kye ekya buli mwezi eky’okuvaamu omusaayi mw’abeerera atali mulongoofu. 
Leviticus18:20 “ ‘Teweebakanga na mukyala wa munnansi yammwe okumukolako ebyensonyi, n’akuleetera obutali bulongoofu." 
Leviticus18:21 “ ‘Mu baana bo towangayo n’omu ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokeddwa mu muliro eri Moleki, kubanga erinnya lya Katonda wo tosaanira kuliweebuulanga. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus18:22 “ ‘Teweebakanga na musajja nga bwe wandyebase n’omukazi, ekyo kibi ekikyayibwa ennyo." 
Leviticus18:23 “ ‘Tokolanga bya nsonyi ku nsolo kubanga ekyo kinaakufuulanga atali mulongoofu. Omukazi teyeewangayo eri ensolo emukoleko ebyensonyi, okwo kwe kuwabira ddala." 
Leviticus18:24 “ ‘Temwereetangako obutali bulongoofu nga mugoberera amayisa ago amabi; kubanga n’amawanga ge ŋŋenda okugoba mu nsi mwe mujja okuyingira bwe geefuula bwe gatyo agatali malongoofu; 
Leviticus18:25 n’ensi n’efuuka etali nnongoofu, ne ngibonereza olw’ebyonoono byayo, n’abantu baamu abagibeeramu n’ebasesema." 
Leviticus18:26 Naye mmwe mukuumenga ebiragiro byange n’amateeka gange. Abazaaliranwa ne bannamawanga abali mu mmwe tewabanga n’omu anaakolanga ku bintu ebyo n’akatono ebikyayibwa ennyo bwe bityo. 
Leviticus18:27 Kubanga ebintu ebyo byonna byakolebwanga abantu abaabasooka mmwe okubeera mu nsi omwo, ensi n’efuuka etali nnongoofu." 
Leviticus18:28 Ensi eyo bwe muligifuula etali nnongoofu, egenda kubasesema nga bwe yasesema amawanga agaabasooka okugibeeramu." 
Leviticus18:29 “ ‘Abantu bonna abanaakolanga ebintu ebyo ebibi ebikyayibwa ennyo, abantu ng’abo banaagobwanga ne bagaanibwa okukolagana ne bannaabwe." 
Leviticus18:30 Mukwatenga amateeka gange, nga mwewalanga okukola ebyonoono ebyo ebikyayibwa eby’amayisa amabi, abo abaabasooka ge beeyisanga si kulwa nga gabafuula abatali balongoofu. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus19:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa 
Leviticus19:2 ategeeze ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri abagambe nti, “Mubeerenga batukuvu, kubanga nze Mukama Katonda wammwe ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus19:3 “Buli omu mu mmwe assengamu nnyina ne kitaawe ekitiibwa; era mukuumenga Ssabbiiti zange. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus19:4 “Temulaganga mu bitali Katonda, era temwekoleranga bakatonda abaweese mu kyuma ekisaanuuse. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:5 “Bwe munaawangayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe, mukiwengayo mu butuufu kiryoke kikkirizibwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Kinaalibwanga ku lunaku olwo lwe kinaaweebwangayo oba enkeera; ekinaabanga kisigaddewo okutuusa ku lunaku olwokusatu kinaazikiribwanga mu muliro. 
Leviticus19:7 Singa kiriibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu tekiibenga kirongoofu, era tekikkirizibwenga," 
Leviticus19:8 ne buli anaakiryangako anaabanga azzizza omusango; kubanga anaabeeranga aweebudde ekintu kya Mukama ekitukuvu; omuntu oyo anaagobwanga n’agaanibwa okukolagananga ne banne. 
Leviticus19:9 “Bw’okungulanga ekyengera eky’omu ttaka lyo, tokunguliranga ddala ebibala byonna eby’omu nnimiro yo okutuuka ku nkomerero zaayo, oba okukuŋŋaanya obubala obutonotono obunaabanga bugudde wansi ng’okungula." 
Leviticus19:10 Ennimiro yo ey’emizabbibu togimalirangamu ddala bibala byonna, n’ebyo ebibanga bigudde wansi tobikuŋŋaanyanga. Obirekeranga abaavu ne bannamawanga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:11 “Tobbanga. “Tokumpanyanga. “Temulimbagananga. 
Leviticus19:12 “Tokozesanga linnya lyange ng’olayira ebitaliimu nsa, n’ovumisa erinnya lya Katonda wo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:13 “Muliraanwa wo tomujooganga so tomunyagangako bibye. “Tosulanga na mpeera ya mupakasi wo n’omala nayo ekiro kyonna okutuusa enkya nga tonnagimusasula. 
Leviticus19:14 “Omuggavu w’amatu tomukolimiranga, so n’omuzibe w’amaaso tomuteganga nkonge w’anaayita, naye otyanga Katonda wo. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:15 “Tosalirizanga ng’olamula; tobanga na kyekubiira ku ludda lw’omwavu wadde okwekubiira ku ludda lw’ow’ekitiibwa, banno obasalirangawo mu bwenkanya." 
Leviticus19:16 “Togendanga ng’osaasaanya eŋŋambo mu banno. “Tokolanga kintu kyonna ku munno ekiyinza okumuleetera okufiirwa obulamu bwe. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:17 “Muganda wo tomukyawanga mu mutima gwo. Naye munno ng’asobezza, omunenyanga, si kulwa nga naawe ogwa mu kibi nga ye." 
Leviticus19:18 “Towalananga ggwanga oba okusiba ekiruyi ku mwoyo eri munno yenna ow’omu nsi yo, naye yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:19 “Okwatanga amateeka gange. “Tokkirizanga nsolo za ngeri ndala kuzaazisa mu nsolo zo. “Mu nnimiro yo tosimbangamu nsigo za ngeri bbiri. “Toyambalanga kyambalo eky’olugoye olw’ebiwero eby’engeri ebbiri. 
Leviticus19:20 “Omusajja bw’aneebakanga n’omuddu omukazi n’amusobyako, naye ng’omukazi oyo tannaweebwa ddembe lye, kyokka ng’aliko omusajja amwogereza, wanaabangawo okuwozesebwa n’ebibonerezo, naye tebattibwenga, kubanga omukazi anaabanga tannaweebwa ddembe lye." 
Leviticus19:21 Naye omusajja anaaleetanga endiga ennume ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga ky’ekiweebwayo kye eri Mukama eky’omusango." 
Leviticus19:22 Kabona anaakozesanga endiga ennume ey’ekiweebwayo olw’omusango okutangiririra omusajja oyo eri Mukama; era ekibi kye ky’anaabanga akoze kinaamusonyiyibwanga. 
Leviticus19:23 “Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi ne musimba emiti egya buli ngeri egy’ebibala ebyokulya, mukitegeere nti ebibala byagyo biriba ng’ebiwereddwa. Biriwerebwa okumala emyaka esatu; tebijjanga kuliibwanga." 
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka ogwokuna ebibala byako byonna binaabanga bitukuvu, nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama eky’okumutendereza." 
Leviticus19:25 Naye mu mwaka ogwokutaano munaayinzanga okulya ku bibala byako. Mu ngeri eno ebibala byako bigenda kweyongeranga nnyo. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus19:26 “Tolyanga nnyama yonna nga teweddeemu musaayi; “so tokolanga bya ddogo wadde eby’okulagula. 
Leviticus19:27 “Enviiri ez’oku mabbali g’omutwe gwo tozisalangako; n’ekirevu kyo tokikomolanga. 
Leviticus19:28 “Toweesalanga misale ku mubiri gwo olw’okujjukira abaafa oba okwesalako enjola. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:29 “Tofuulanga mwana wo omuwala ekivume ng’omufudde omwenzi, kubanga kirireetera abantu mu nsi yo okufuuka abenzi, n’ensi n’ejjula okwonoona." 
Leviticus19:30 “Mukuumanga Ssabbiiti zange era mussangamu ekitiibwa ekifo kyange ekitukuvu. Nze Mukama. 
Leviticus19:31 “Temwebuuzanga ku basamize oba okukyukiranga abalogo, kubanga bagenda kubaleetera okwonooneka. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:32 “Ositukiranga ow’envi, n’omukadde omussangamu ekitiibwa, era ne Katonda wo omutyanga. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus19:33 “Omugwira bw’abeeranga omutuuze mu nsi yammwe, temumuyisanga bubi." 
Leviticus19:34 Omugwira atuula mu mmwe mumuyisenga ng’omuzaaliranwa ow’omu nsi yammwe. Mumwagalenga nga bwe mweyagala, kubanga nammwe mwali bagwira mu nsi y’e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus19:35 “Temubangamu kyekubiira nga mupima obuwanvu, oba obuzito, oba obungi bw’ebintu." 
Leviticus19:36 Mubanga ne minzaani entuufu, n’amayinja agapima obuzito amatuufu, n’ekipima ebikalu (efa) ekituufu, n’ekipima ebiyiikayiika ng’amazzi (ini) ekituufu. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y’e Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 “Munaakwatanga amateeka gange gonna, n’ebiragiro byange byonna, okubitambulirangako. Nze Mukama.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus20:2 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri bw’oti nti, Omuyisirayiri yenna, oba omunnaggwanga atuula mu Isirayiri, bw’anaawangayo omwana we ng’ekiweebwayo eri Moleki, kitaawe w’omwana oyo ajjanga kuttibwa. Abantu ab’omu kitundu ekyo mw’abeera banaamukubanga amayinja." 
Leviticus20:3 Nange kennyini, omuntu oyo nnaamunyiigiranga, era nnaamugobanga ne mmugaana okukolagananga ne banne, kubanga awaddeyo omu ku baana be ng’ekiweebwayo eri Moleki, n’ayonoona Awatukuvu wange era n’avumisa erinnya lyange ettukuvu." 
Leviticus20:4 Era abantu ab’omu kitundu ekyo mw’abeera, bwe banaamuzibiranga ku liiso, omuntu oyo awaddeyo omwana we eri Moleki, ne batamutta," 
Leviticus20:5 omuntu oyo nnaamunyiigiranga, ne ku b’omu nnyumba ye, ne mbagoba ne mbagaana okukolagananga ne bannaabwe, ye ne banne abakolaganye naye mu kukuba obwamalaaya ne Moleki." 
Leviticus20:6 “ ‘Omuntu bw’anaakolagananga n’abasamize, n’abalogo, n’akuba nabo obwamalaaya, nnaamunyiigiranga, era nnaamugobanga ne mugaana okukolagana ne banne." 
Leviticus20:7 “ ‘Noolwekyo mwetukuze mubeerenga batukuvu, kubanga Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus20:8 Mukwatenga amateeka gange, mugagobererenga. Nze Mukama abatukuza." 
Leviticus20:9 “ ‘Omuntu yenna anaakolimiranga kitaawe oba nnyina wa kuttibwanga. Noolwekyo akolimidde kitaawe oba nnyina, omusaayi gwe gunaabanga ku mutwe gwe." 
Leviticus20:10 “ ‘Omusajja bwanaayendanga ku muka omusajja, bombi, omusajja ayenze n’omukazi gw’ayenzeeko banattibwanga." 
Leviticus20:11 “ ‘Omusajja bw’aneebakanga ne muka kitaawe, anaabanga aweebudde kitaawe. Bombi omusajja n’omukazi banattibwanga; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabanga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:12 “ ‘Omusajja bw’aneebakanga ne muka mutabani we, bombi banattibwanga. Kubanga bombi banaabanga bakoze ebyambyone; omusaayi gwabwe gunaabanga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:13 “ ‘Omusajja bw’aneebakanga ne musajja munne nga bwe yandyebase n’omukazi, bombi banaabanga bakoze eky’ekivve; era banattibwanga, n’omusaayi gwabwe gunaabanga ku mitwe gyabwe." 
Leviticus20:14 “ ‘Omusajja bw’anaawasanga omukazi ate n’atwalirako ne nnyina, ekyo kya kivve. Ye n’abakazi bombi banaayokebwanga mu muliro, bwe mutyo ekyonoono ekyo ne mukyegobako." 
Leviticus20:15 “ ‘Omusajja bw’anaakolanga eby’ensonyi ku nsolo, anattibwanga, era n’ensolo munaagittanga." 
Leviticus20:16 “ ‘Omukazi bw’anaasembereranga ensolo alyoke akole nayo eby’ensonyi, mumuttanga n’ensolo ne mugitta. Omukazi anattibwanga n’ensolo nettibwa; omusaayi gw’omukazi gunaabanga ku mutwe gwe, n’ogw’ensolo gunaabanga ku mutwe gwayo." 
Leviticus20:17 “ ‘Omusajja bw’anaawasanga mwannyina, oba nga mwanamuwala wa kitaawe, oba nga mwanamuwala wa nnyina, ne beebaka bombi, kinaabanga kya buwemu. Bombi banaagobwanga mu bannaabwe ne babagaana okukolagananga nabo. Kubanga omusajja oyo anaabanga aweebudde mwannyina, era y’aneetikkanga obuvunaanyizibwa bwonna olw’ekibi ekyo." 
Leviticus20:18 “ ‘Omusajja bw’aneebakanga n’omukazi mu biseera by’omukazi, ebya buli mwezi ng’empisa y’abakazi bw’eba, anaabanga abikudde ensulo y’omusaayi gw’omukazi oyo, era n’omukazi anaabanga yeebikudde. Bombi banaagobwanga mu bannaabwe ne babagaana okukolagananga nabo." 
Leviticus20:19 “ ‘Teweebakanga na mukazi muganda wa nnyoko oba ne mwannyina wa kitaawo n’okola naye eby’ensonyi, kubanga ekyo kiweebuula owooluganda ow’okumpi. Mwembi munaavunaanyizibwanga olw’ekyonoono kyammwe ekyo." 
Leviticus20:20 “ ‘Omusajja bw’aneebakanga ne muka kitaawe omuto oba ne muka kojjaawe, anaabanga aweebudde bakadde be abo. Omusajja oyo n’omukazi oyo be baneetikkanga obuvunaanyizibwa obw’ekibi ekyo, era balifa nga tebalina baana." 
Leviticus20:21 “ ‘Omusajja bw’anaawasanga muka muganda we, kinaabanga ekikolwa ekitali kirongoofu, kubanga aweebudde muganda we. Tebalizaala baana." 
Leviticus20:22 “ ‘Kale nno, mukwatenga amateeka gange gonna n’ebiragiro byange byonna, era mubikolerengako, ensi mwe mbatwala okutuulanga eryoke ereme kubasesema." 
Leviticus20:23 Era temugobereranga mpisa ez’amawanga ge ŋŋenda ngoba mu nsi eyo; kubanga baakola ebintu ebyo byonna, noolwekyo mbakyawa nnyo." 
Leviticus20:24 Naye nabategeeza nti, “Mulisikira ensi yaabwe, era ndigibawa ne mugirya, ye nsi omukulukuta amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki.” Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaawula ku mawanga amalala." 
Leviticus20:25 “ ‘Noolwekyo mujjanga kwawulamu ensolo ennongoofu n’etali nnongoofu, n’ennyonyi ennongoofu n’etali nnongoofu. Temufuukanga abatali balongoofu olw’ensolo oba ennyonyi, oba ebiramu byonna ebitambula ku ttaka, bye mmaze okwawulako ne mbibategeeza nti si birongoofu." 
Leviticus20:26 Kibasaanira okubeeranga abatukuvu gye ndi, kubanga Nze, Mukama, ndi mutukuvu, era mbaawudde ku mawanga amalala mubeerenga ggwanga lyange." 
Leviticus20:27 “ ‘Omusajja oba omukazi mu mmwe anaabeeranga omusamize oba omulogo, wa kuttibwanga. Mubakubanga amayinja; era omusaayi gwabwe gunaabanga ku mitwe gyabwe.’ ”" 
Leviticus21:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Yogera ne bakabona, batabani ba Alooni, obagambe nti tewabanga omuntu eyeeretako obutali bulongoofu olw’okukwata ku mufu mu bantu be," 
Leviticus21:2 wabula ng’amulinako oluganda olw’okumpi. Gamba nga nnyina, oba kitaawe, oba mutabani we, oba muwala we, oba muganda we," 
Leviticus21:3 oba mwannyina embeerera atamanyi musajja, gw’alinako obuvunaanyizibwa kubanga tabeerangako na bba, kubanga ayinza okwereetako obutali bulongoofu." 
Leviticus21:4 Kabona nga bw’ali omukulembeze, tekimusaanira kwereetako obutali bulongoofu wakati mu bantu be." 
Leviticus21:5 Bakabona tebamwangako nviiri ku mitwe gyabwe, wadde okumwako ebirevu byabwe, oba okusala emisale ku mibiri gyabwe." 
Leviticus21:6 Kibasaanira okubeeranga abatukuvu eri Katonda waabwe balemenga okuleetera erinnya lya Katonda waabwe obutali bulongoofu. Kubanga be batuusa ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa mu muliro eri Mukama, ye mmere ya Katonda waabwe, noolwekyo kibasaanira okubeeranga abatukuvu." 
Leviticus21:7 Tebawasanga mukazi malaaya oba atali mulongoofu, oba oyo agobeddwa ewa bba; kubanga bakabona batukuvu eri Katonda waabwe." 
Leviticus21:8 Mubayisenga ng’abatukuvu, kubanga be bawaayo emmere eya Katonda wammwe. Mubayisenga ng’abatukuvu; kubanga Nze Mukama atukuza mmwe, ndi mutukuvu." 
Leviticus21:9 Era omwana omuwala owa kabona bw’anaakubanga obwamalaaya, bw’atyo ne yeereetako obutali bulongoofu, anaabeeranga aleetedde kitaawe obutali bulongoofu; anaayokebwanga mu muliro." 
Leviticus21:10 “Kabona Asinga Obukulu, nga ye mukulembeze mu baganda be, era nga ye yafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ku mutwe gwe, era nga yayawulibwa ayambalenga ebyambalo by’Obwakabona, tasaanira kusumululanga nviiri ze ku mutwe gwe n’azita, wadde okuyuzanga ebyambalo bye." 
Leviticus21:11 Tayingiranga mu kifo omuli omulambo, aleme kwereetako obutali bulongoofu. Omulambo ne bwe gunaabanga ogwa kitaawe oba ogwa nnyina." 
Leviticus21:12 Era n’ekifo kya Mukama ekitukuvu taakivengamu oba okukireetako obutali bulongoofu, kubanga yayawulibwa bwe yafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ga Katonda we. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus21:13 Anaawasanga omukazi mbeerera atamanyanga musajja. 
Leviticus21:14 Tawasanga nnamwandu, oba omukazi bba gwe yagoba, oba omukazi eyeereeseeko obutali bulongoofu olw’okukuba obwamalaaya; naye anaawasanga omukazi embeerera ng’amuggya mu bantu be;" 
Leviticus21:15 aleme okuleetera ezzadde lye obutali bulongoofu wakati mu bantu be. Kubanga Nze Mukama Katonda amutukuza.” 
Leviticus21:16 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus21:17 “Tegeeza Alooni nti mu zadde lye, okuyita mu mirembe gyonna, bwe munaabangamu omuntu aliko akamogo ku mubiri gwe taasemberenga kuwaayo emmere ya Katonda we." 
Leviticus21:18 Kubanga tewaabengawo muntu yenna aliko akamogo ku mubiri gwe anaasemberanga. Gamba: omuzibe w’amaaso, oba omulema, oba eyakyama ennyindo, oba eyakulako ekintu ekyasukkirira obuwanvu;" 
Leviticus21:19 oba omuntu alina ekigere ekyagongobala, oba omukono ogwalemala," 
Leviticus21:20 oba ow’ebbango, oba nakalanga, oba atalaba bulungi, oba ng’omubiri gwe gumusiiwa yeetakulatakula, oba ng’alina amabwa agakulukuta, oba nga yayabika enjagi." 
Leviticus21:21 Tewaabengawo wa mu zadde lya Alooni kabona ng’aliko akamogo anakkirizibwanga okusembera okuleeta ebiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda, ebyokebwa mu muliro. Kubanga aliko akamogo; tekiimusaanirenga kusembera n’okuwaayo ekiweebwayo eri Katonda we." 
Leviticus21:22 Anaayinzanga okulya ku mmere entukuvu ennyo eya Katonda we; 
Leviticus21:23 naye olwokubanga aliko akamogo ku mubiri gwe, taasaanirenga kusemberera ggigi, oba okulaga okumpi n’ekyoto, n’aleetera ebifo byange ebitukuvu obutali bulongoofu. Kubanga Nze Mukama Katonda abitukuza.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Bw’atyo Musa n’ategeeza Alooni ne batabani be, awamu n’abaana bonna aba Isirayiri ebigambo ebyo byonna." 
Leviticus22:1 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus22:2 “Tegeeza Alooni ne batabani be bassengamu ekitiibwa ebiweebwayo abaana ba Isirayiri bye bandeetera, ebyawuliddwa, bwe batyo balemenga okuvumisa erinnya lyange. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus22:3 Era bagambe nti, Omuntu yenna ow’omu zadde lyabwe mu mirembe gyonna eginajjanga giddiriragana bw’ataabenga mulongoofu, naye n’asemberera ebiweebwayo ebyawuliddwa ebitukuvu, abaana ba Isirayiri bye banaabanga baleese eri Mukama Katonda, omuntu oyo anaagoberwanga ddala n’ava mu maaso gange. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus22:4 Omuntu yenna ow’omu zadde lya Alooni alina obulwadde obukwata oba alwadde ekikulukuto taalyenga ku biweebwayo ebitukuvu okutuusa ng’afuuse omulongoofu. Omuntu yenna taabenga mulongoofu bw’anaakwatanga ku kintu kyonna ekitali kirongoofu ekivudde ku kukolagana n’omusajja eyavuddemu amazzi g’obusajja, oba olw’okukomako ku mulambo," 
Leviticus22:5 oba okukwata ku kyekulula ekiyinza okumufuula atali mulongoofu, oba okukoma ku muntu ayinza okumusiiga obutali bulongoofu, oba engeri yonna ey’obutali bulongoofu bw’efa yenkana." 
Leviticus22:6 Omuntu ng’oyo taabenga mulongoofu okutuusa akawungeezi. Taalyenga ku biweebwayo ebitukuvu wabula ng’amaze okunaaba yenna mu mazzi. 
Leviticus22:7 Enjuba bw’eneebanga egudde anaabeeranga mulongoofu; n’oluvannyuma anaalyanga ku biweebwayo ebitukuvu ebyo, kubanga ye mmere ye." 
Leviticus22:8 Taalyenga ku kintu kyonna ekinaabanga kifudde obufi, oba ekinaabanga kitaaguddwataaguddwa ebisolo, kubanga kinaamufuulanga atali mulongoofu. Nze Mukama." 
Leviticus22:9 Bwe batyo bakabona kibagwanira okukuumanga ebiragiro byange, balemenga okwereetako omusango ne bafa olw’okubigayaaliriranga. Nze Mukama Katonda abatukuza." 
Leviticus22:10 “Omuntu yenna atali wa mu lulyo lwa kabona, ne bw’anaabanga omugenyi we, oba omupakasi we, taalyenga ku biweebwayo ebyo ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus22:11 Naye kabona bw’aneeguliranga omuddu n’ensimbi, oba omuddu bw’anaazaalirwanga mu nnyumba ya kabona, omuddu oyo anaalyanga ku mmere eyo." 
Leviticus22:12 Omwana owoobuwala owa kabona bw’anaafumbirwanga omusajja atali kabona, talyenga ku biweebwayo ebyo ebitukuvu." 
Leviticus22:13 Naye singa muwala wa kabona afuuka nnamwandu, oba singa ayawukanira ddala ne bba, kyokka nga talina mwana, n’akomawo okubeeranga mu nnyumba ya kitaawe nga bwe yakolanga ng’akyali muvubuka, anaalyanga ku mmere ya kitaawe. Omuntu yenna atakwatibwako mizizo egyo taalyenga ku mmere eyo." 
Leviticus22:14 Era omuntu bw’anaalyanga ku kiweebwayo ekitukuvu nga tagenderedde, anaaleetanga ekitundu kimu kyakutaano eky’ekiweebwayo ekyo, n’akigatta ku kiweebwayo ekyo, kyonna n’akikwasa kabona." 
Leviticus22:15 Bakabona tebavumisanga bintu bitukuvu abaana ba Isirayiri bye banaawangayo eri Mukama," 
Leviticus22:16 nga babakkiriza okulyanga ku biweebwayo byabwe ebitukuvu, bwe batyo ne babateekesaako omusango ogunaabaweesanga ekibonerezo. Nze Mukama Katonda abatukuza.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus22:18 “Tegeeza Alooni ne batabani be n’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna, obagambe nti, Omuntu yenna ow’omu nnyumba ya Isirayiri omu ku mmwe, oba omunnaggwanga abeera mu Isirayiri, bw’anaaleeteranga Mukama Katonda ekirabo eky’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa okutuukiriza obweyamo bwe, oba ekiweebwayo olw’okweyagalira," 
Leviticus22:19 kinaateekwanga okubeera sseddume ey’ente oba ey’endiga, oba ey’embuzi etaliiko kamogo, ekirabo ekyo kiryokenga kikkirizibwe." 
Leviticus22:20 Temuwangayo kintu kyonna ekiriko akamogo kubanga tekikkirizibwenga. 
Leviticus22:21 Omuntu yenna bw’anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda olw’emirembe, oba okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ekiweebwayo olw’okweyagalira, ng’akiggya mu kiraalo oba mu kisibo, okukkirizibwa kinaabeeranga ekituukiridde nga tekiriiko kamogo." 
Leviticus22:22 Temuwangayo eri Mukama Katonda ensolo enzibe y’amaaso, oba eriko obuvune, oba ennema oba egongobadde, oba ezimbyezimbye ku mubiri, oba eriko amabwa agakulukuta. Ezo temuziwangayo ku kyoto eri Mukama Katonda ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa." 
Leviticus22:23 Naye ente oba endiga ng’eriko ekitundu kyayo ekisukkiridde obuwanvu oba ekisukkiridde obumpi eneeyinzanga okuleetebwa ng’ekiweebwayo eky’okweyagalira, naye tekkirizibwenga ng’ekiweebwayo olw’okutuukiriza obweyamo." 
Leviticus22:24 Mukama Katonda temumuleeteranga ekiweebwayo eky’ensolo erina enjagi ezaanuubulwa, oba ezaabetentebwa, oba ezaayuzibwa, oba ezaasalibwa. Ekyo temukikolanga mu ggwanga lyammwe," 
Leviticus22:25 wadde okukkirizanga ng’ensolo ezo bannamawanga bazibatonedde ne muziwaayo ng’ekiweebwayo eri Katonda wammwe. Kubanga nnyonoonefu mu mubiri era ziriko obukyamu.” 
Leviticus22:26 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ente, oba endiga, oba embuzi bw’eneezaalibwanga eneesigalanga ne nnyina waayo okumala ennaku musanvu. Okuva ku lunaku olw’omunaana n’okweyongerayo ennekkirizibwanga bw’eneeweebwangayo eri Mukama Katonda ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa mu muliro." 
Leviticus22:28 Ente oba endiga temugittanga na mwana gwayo ku lunaku lwe lumu. 
Leviticus22:29 Bwe muwangayo eri Mukama Katonda ekiweebwayo olw’okwebaza, mukiwengayo mu ngeri ennungi eneekisobozesanga okukkirizibwa." 
Leviticus22:30 Kinaalibwanga ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, temukifissangawo n’akatono okutuusa enkeera. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus22:31 “Bwe mutyo mukwatenga amateeka gange era mugagonderenga. Nze Mukama Katonda. 
Leviticus22:32 Temuvumisanga linnya lyange. Abaana ba Isirayiri kibagwanira okunzisangamu ekitiibwa nga Nze mutukuvu. Nze Mukama Katonda abatukuza mmwe," 
Leviticus22:33 era Nze nabaggya mu nsi y’e Misiri mbeerenga Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama Katonda.” 
Leviticus23:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus23:2 “Yogera n’abaana ba Isirayiri obagambe nti, Zino ze mbaga zange ze nnonze, nga ze mbaga za Mukama Katonda ezirondeddwa ze munaakubirangako enkuŋŋaana entukuvu." 
Leviticus23:3 “Mu nnaku omukaaga munaakolerangamu emirimu gyammwe, naye olunaku olw’omusanvu ye Ssabbiiti ey’okuwummula; lunaabeeranga olunaku olw’okukuŋŋaana okutukuvu. Temulukolerangako mulimu n’akatono yonna gye munaabeeranga, kubanga ye Ssabbiiti ya Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus23:4 “Zino ze mbaga Mukama Katonda ze yeerondera okunaakubirwanga enkuŋŋaana entukuvu ze munaalangiriranga mu ntuuko zaazo: 
Leviticus23:5 Embaga ya Mukama Katonda ey’Okuyitako eneetandikanga ng’obudde buwungeera ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ennya olw’omwezi ogw’olubereberye. 
Leviticus23:6 Ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ettaano olw’omwezi ogwo, Embaga ya Mukama Katonda ey’Emigaati Egitali Mizimbulukuse kw’eneetandikiranga; munaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga mulya emigaati egifumbiddwa nga temuli kizimbulukusa." 
Leviticus23:7 Ku lunaku olusooka olw’embaga eyo ey’Okuyitako munaakubanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, era temuukolerengako mirimu gyammwe egya bulijjo." 
Leviticus23:8 Munaamalanga ennaku musanvu nga buli lunaku muleeta ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’omuliro eri Mukama. Ku lunaku olw’omusanvu munaakubanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, era temuukolerengako mirimu gyammwe egya bulijjo.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus23:10 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, Bwe mutuukanga mu nsi gye nzija okubawa ne mukungula ebibala byamu, muleetanga eri kabona ekinywa eky’ebibala byammwe eby’olubereberye;" 
Leviticus23:11 naye anaawuubawuubanga ekinywa ekyo awali Mukama Katonda kiryoke kikkirizibwe ku lwammwe. Kabona anaakiwuubawuubanga ku lunaku oluddirira Ssabbiiti. 
Leviticus23:12 Ku lunaku olwo lwe munaawuubirawuubirangako ekinywa, munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eri Mukama Katonda eky’omwana gw’endiga omulume, ogwakamala omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu era nga teguliiko kamogo." 
Leviticus23:13 N’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke ekigenderako kinaabanga kigero kya desimoolo bbiri eza efa, eky’obuwunga obulungi nga mutabuddwamu n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’omuliro eri Mukama Katonda, ne muvaamu evvumbe eddungi erisanyusa Mukama Katonda; n’ekiweebwayo ekyokunywa ekigenderako kinaabanga ekitundu kimu kya kuna ekya lita emu ey’envinnyo." 
Leviticus23:14 Era temuulyenga ku mugaati n’akatono oba ku mmere ey’empeke ensiike oba eyaakakungulwa, okutuusa ku lunaku olwo lwennyini lwe munaaleeterangako ekiweebwayo kino eri Katonda wammwe. Lino linaabanga tteeka ery’enkalakkalira ery’emirembe gyonna egigenda okujja, mu bifo byonna gye munaabeeranga." 
Leviticus23:15 “Okuva ku lunaku oluddirira Ssabbiiti, nga lwe lunaku kwe mwaleetera ekiweebwayo eky’ekinywa ekiwuubibwawuubibwa mubalanga ewiiki enzijuvu musanvu." 
Leviticus23:16 Munaabalanga ennaku amakumi ataano okutuuka ku Ssabbiiti ey’omusanvu, ne mulyoka muwaayo eri Mukama ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke empya eyaakakungulwa." 
Leviticus23:17 Nga muva mu buli kitundu gye mubeera, munaaleetanga emigaati, ebiri ebiri nga gikoleddwa mu kigero ekya desimoolo bbiri eza efa ez’obuwunga obulungi, nga bufumbiddwa n’ekizimbulukusa; nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda ekiwuubibwawuubibwa eky’ebibala ebibereberye." 
Leviticus23:18 Era awamu n’emigaati egyo munaaleeterangako abaana b’endiga musanvu ab’omwaka gumu abataliiko kamogo; munaaleetanga n’ente eya seddume ento emu, n’endiga ennume ento bbiri. Binaabeeranga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eri Mukama, awamu n’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke n’ekiweebwayo eky’ebyokunywa; nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’omuliro, ne muvaamu evvumbe erisanyusa Mukama." 
Leviticus23:19 Era munaawangayo embuzi emu ennume nga kye kiweebwayo olw’ekibi, era n’endiga ento ennume ez’omwaka ogumu bbiri nga kye kiweebwayo olw’emirembe." 
Leviticus23:20 Kabona anaawubawuubanga ebiweebwayo ebyo awamu n’emigaati egikoleddwa mu bibala ebibereberye n’endiga zombi ento, nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda ekiwuubibwawuubibwa. Kinaabanga kiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda ekitukuvu, era kabona y’anaakitwalanga." 
Leviticus23:21 Ku lunaku olwo onoolangiriranga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; era temujjanga kukolerako mirimu gyammwe egya bulijjo. Eryo linaabeeranga etteeka ery’emirembe gyonna mu mmwe buli yonna gye munaabeeranga. 
Leviticus23:22 “Bwe munaakungulanga emmere mu ttaka lyammwe temugimalirangamu ddala okutuuka ku mbibiro z’ennimiro yammwe, wadde okukuŋŋaanyanga eneebanga ekunkumuse wansi nga mumaze okukungula. Eyo mugirekeranga abaavu ne bannamawanga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus23:24 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti olunaku olw’olubereberye mu mwezi ogw’omusanvu lunaabanga lwa kuwummula, munaakwatirangako olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu olunaalangirirwanga n’okufuuwa amakondeere ag’omwanguka." 
Leviticus23:25 Temukolerangako mirimu gyonna egya bulijjo, naye munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’omuliro eri Mukama Katonda.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus23:27 “Olunaku olw’ekkumi olw’omwezi guno ogw’omusanvu lwe lunaabanga Olunaku olw’Okutangiririrwa. Munaakubanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu, muneefiirizanga ne mwerumya, era munaawangayo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa n’omuliro eri Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus23:28 Olunaku olwo temulukolerangako mulimu na gumu, kubanga lwe Lunaku olw’Okutangiririrwa, lwe munaatangiririrwanga awali Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus23:29 Omuntu yenna anaagaananga okwefiiriza ku lunaku olwo kinaamugwaniranga okuwaŋŋangusibwa n’aggyibwa mu banne. 
Leviticus23:30 Era buli muntu anaakolanga omulimu ku lunaku olwo ndimuggya mu banne ne mmuzikiriza. 
Leviticus23:31 Temulukolerangako mulimu n’akatono. Eryo linaabeeranga etteeka ery’enkalakkalira, ery’emirembe gyonna egigenda okujja mu bifo byonna gye munaabeeranga." 
Leviticus23:32 Lunaabeeranga lwa Ssabbiiti na kuwummulirako gye muli, era muneefiirizanga. Munaakuumanga Ssabbiiti yammwe okuva ku lunaku olw’omwenda olw’omwezi akawungeezi okutuusa ku kawungeezi akaddirira.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus23:34 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ettaano Embaga ya Mukama ey’Ensiisira kw’eneetandikiranga, era eneemalanga ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus23:35 Ku lunaku olw’olubereberye munaakubirangako olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu; temuulukolerengako mirimu egya bulijjo. 
Leviticus23:36 Munaaleetanga ebiweebwayo eri Mukama ebyokye mu muliro okumalira ddala ennaku musanvu, ne ku lunaku olw’omunaana munaakubanga olukuŋŋaana olutukuvu ne muwaayo eri Mukama Katonda ekiweebwayo ekyokye n’omuliro. Olwo lwe lukuŋŋaana olukulu oluggalawo, temulukolerangako mirimu egya bulijjo." 
Leviticus23:37 “Ezo ze mbaga Mukama ze yalagira, ze munaalangiriranga nti mbaga ntukuvu okunaaleeterwanga ebiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda ebyokeddwa mu muliro, ebiweebwayo ebyokye, ebiweebwayo eby’empeke, ssaddaaka n’ebiweebwayo ebinywebwa ebineetaagibwanga buli lunaku." 
Leviticus23:38 Ebiweebwayo bino byeyongera ku biri eby’oku Ssabbiiti za Mukama Katonda, era ne byeyongera ku birabo byammwe ne ku ebyo byonna bye munaabanga mweyamye, ne ku biweebwayo ebirala byonna bye munaabanga muleetedde Mukama Katonda nga mweyagalidde." 
Leviticus23:39 “Kale nno okutandikira ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ettaano olw’omwezi ogw’omusanvu, nga mumaze okukungula n’okuyingiza ebibala ebivudde mu ttaka lyammwe, munaakoleranga Mukama Katonda ekijaguzo okumala ennaku musanvu; olunaku olw’olubereberye lunaabanga lwa kuwummula era n’olunaku olw’omunaana nalwo nga lwa kuwummula." 
Leviticus23:40 Ku lunaku olw’olubereberye munaanoganga ku miti ebibala ebisingira ddala obulungi ne muddira n’amatabi g’enkindu, n’amatabi ag’emiti agaziyidde n’ebikoola ebigimu, n’emiti egy’oku migga, ne mulyoka musanyukira awali Mukama Katonda wammwe okumala ennaku musanvu." 
Leviticus23:41 Mukolanga bwe mutyo ng’ekyo kye kijaguzo eri Mukama Katonda, okumala ennaku musanvu buli mwaka. Lino ly’etteeka ery’enkalakkalira erinaakwatibwanga n’ab’omu mirembe egigenda okujja; mujaguzenga mu mwezi ogw’omusanvu." 
Leviticus23:42 Munaasulanga mu busiisira okumala ennaku musanvu. Abo bonna abazaaliranwa ab’omu Isirayiri banaasulanga mu busiisira," 
Leviticus23:43 bwe batyo ab’omu zzadde lyammwe balyoke bamanye nga bwe nasuzanga abaana ba Isirayiri mu busiisira bwe nnali nga mbaggya mu nsi y’e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.” 
Leviticus23:44 Bw’atyo Musa n’alangirira mu baana ba Isirayiri embaga za Mukama ennonde. 
Leviticus24:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus24:2 “Lagira abaana ba Isirayiri bakuleetere amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni aga zeyituuni amalungi amaka ag’okukozesa mu ttaala ziryoke zaakenga buli kiseera awatali kusalako. 
Leviticus24:3 Wabweru w’Eggigi ery’Endagaano mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, Alooni w’anaalabiririranga ettabaaza ezo nga zaakira awali Mukama Katonda okuva akawungeezi okutuusa mu makya awatali kusalako. Eryo linaabanga tteeka ery’enkalakkalira ne mu mirembe egigenda okujja." 
Leviticus24:4 Alooni anaalabiriranga ettaala ez’oku kikondo ekya zaabu omuka awali Mukama Katonda nga zaaka awatali kusalako. 
Leviticus24:5 “Ojja kuddiranga obuwunga bw’eŋŋaano obulungi ofumbe emigaati kkumi n’ebiri ng’okozesa desimoolo bbiri eza efa. 
Leviticus24:6 Onoogitegekanga mu nnyiriri bbiri nga mu buli lunyiriri mulimu emigaati mukaaga. Onoogiteekanga ku mmeeza eya zaabu omuka awali Mukama. 
Leviticus24:7 Era ku buli lunyiriri onooteekangako obubaane obuka nga bugendera wamu n’emigaati nga kye kijjukizo eky’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda nga kyokeddwa mu muliro. 
Leviticus24:8 Emigaati egyo ginaategekebwanga awali Mukama buli Ssabbiiti awatali kwosa, ng’ekyo kikolebwa ku lw’abaana ba Isirayiri nga ye ndagaano ey’emirembe n’emirembe." 
Leviticus24:9 Emigaati egyo ginaabanga gya Alooni ne batabani be, era banaagiriiranga mu kifo ekitukuvu, kubanga giva ku kiweebwayo ekitukuvu ennyo eri Mukama Katonda nga kyokeddwa mu muliro nga kye kiragiro eky’enkalakkalira.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Awo mutabani w’omukazi Omuyisirayiri naye nga kitaawe Mumisiri n’afuluma n’abeera mu baana ba Isirayiri, naye ne wasitukawo olutalo wakati w’omusajja oyo n’Omuyisirayiri, nga bali mu lusiisira." 
Leviticus24:11 Mutabani w’omukazi Omuyisirayiri n’avvoola Erinnya lya Mukama, era n’akolima. Ne bamuleeta eri Musa. Nnyina ye yali Seromisi, muwala wa Dibuli ow’omu kika kya Ddaani." 
Leviticus24:12 Ne bamuggalira mu kkomera okutuusa Mukama Katonda lw’anaabategeeza ekinaakolebwa. 
Leviticus24:13 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus24:14 “Eyavvodde mumufulumye ebweru w’olusiisira. Abo bonna abaamuwulidde ng’avvoola bateeke emikono gyabwe ku mutwe gwe; oluvannyuma ekibiina kyonna kiryoke kimukube amayinja. 
Leviticus24:15 Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti omuntu yenna anaakolimiranga Katonda we anaabanga n’obuvunaanyizibwa olw’ekibi ekyo. 
Leviticus24:16 Oyo yenna anavvoolanga erinnya lya Mukama Katonda anattibwanga. Ekibiina kyonna kinaamukubanga amayinja. Ne bw’anaabanga omugwira oba Omuyisirayiri, bw’anavvoolanga erinnya lya Mukama Katonda anattibwanga." 
Leviticus24:17 “Anattanga omuntu naye anattibwanga. 
Leviticus24:18 Omuntu yenna anattanga ensolo ya munne anaagimuliyiranga, ensolo ku nsolo." 
Leviticus24:19 Omuntu bw’anaaleetanga akamogo ku munne n’amulumya, ekyo ky’akoze ku munne naye kye kinaamukolwangako:" 
Leviticus24:20 obuvune olw’obuvune, eriiso olw’eriiso, erinnyo olw’erinnyo; nga bw’anaabanga alumizza munne, naye bw’atyo bw’anaalumizibwanga." 
Leviticus24:21 Omuntu anattanga ensolo ya munne anaagimuliyiranga, n’oyo anattanga omuntu naye waakuttibwanga." 
Leviticus24:22 Etteeka lye limu lye linaafuganga omugwira era n’Omuyisirayiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.” 
Leviticus24:23 Bw’atyo Musa n’ategeeza abaana ba Isirayiri, ne bafulumya eyavvoola ebweru w’olusiisira ne bamukuba amayinja n’afa. Abaana ba Isirayiri baakola nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Mukama Katonda yagamba Musa ku lusozi Sinaayi nti," 
Leviticus25:2 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti bwe mutuukanga mu nsi gye mbawa, ensi yennyini eneekuumiranga Mukama Katonda ssabbiiti." 
Leviticus25:3 Okumala emyaka mukaaga ennimiro zammwe munaazisigangamu emmere, era mu myaka egyo omukaaga munaasaliranga emizabbibu gyammwe n’ebibala ne mubikungula." 
Leviticus25:4 Naye mu mwaka ogw’omusanvu ettaka ly’ensi eyo linaabanga ne ssabbiiti ey’okuwummula eri Mukama Katonda. Temusiganga mmere mu nnimiro zammwe wadde okusalira emizabbibu gyammwe. 
Leviticus25:5 Ebimera ebyekuzizza byokka, ebimererezi, temubikungulanga wadde okunoga ebibala ku mizabbibu gyammwe egitaasalirwa. Omwaka ogwo ettaka ly’ensi linaaguwummulanga." 
Leviticus25:6 Ebyo byonna ebyokulya ebinaavanga mu ttaka mu mwaka ogwa ssabbiiti yaalyo binaabanga mmere yammwe, mmwe bennyini, n’eri abaddu bammwe abasajja, n’abakazi, era n’abaweereza bammwe ab’empeera, n’abagenyi abanaabanga basula mu maka gammwe;" 
Leviticus25:7 era n’ente zammwe n’ensolo ez’omu nsiko ezinaabanga ku ttaka lyammwe. Buli ekyokulya ekinaakuliranga ku ttaka eryo kinaabanga mmere. 
Leviticus25:8 “Munaabaliriranga essabbiiti musanvu ez’omu myaka, kwe kugamba nti musanvu emirundi emyaka musanvu. Bwe kityo ekiseera kyonna ekya ssabbiiti ezo ne kiba emyaka amakumi ana mu mwenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Ekkondeere ery’okujaguza munaalifuuyiranga wonna wonna ku lunaku olw’ekkumi mu mwezi ogw’omusanvu ku Lunaku olw’Okutangiririrwa, ekkondeere munaalifuuyiranga mu nsi yammwe yonna." 
Leviticus25:10 Munaatukuzanga omwaka ogw’amakumi ataano, era munaalangiriranga ebiseera eby’eddembe eri abatuuze bonna mu ggwanga lyammwe. Omwaka ogwo gunaabanga gwa kujaguza gwa Jjubiri gye muli; buli omu anaddangayo mu kifo kye eky’obwannannyini, era buli omu anaddangayo mu kika kye." 
Leviticus25:11 Omwaka ogw’amakumi ataano gunaabanga gwa kujaguza gwa Jjubiri gye muli; mu mwaka ogwo temuusigenga era temuukungulenga bikuze ku bimererezi newaakubadde okukuŋŋaanya ebibala eby’oku mizabbibu egitali misalire. 
Leviticus25:12 Kubanga ekiseera ekyo kya kujaguza kya Jjubiri era kinaabanga kitukuvu gye muli; mulyenga ebyo byokka bye munaggyanga mu nnimiro. 
Leviticus25:13 “Mu mwaka ogwo ogw’okujaguza ogwa Jjubiri buli omu anaddangayo mu kifo kye eky’obwannannyini. 
Leviticus25:14 Era bwe munaatunzanga bannammwe ekintu kyonna oba bwe munaagulanga ku bannammwe ekintu kyonna, temuseeragananga." 
Leviticus25:15 Munnansi munno onoomugulangako ng’osinziira ku myaka egyakayitawo okuva ku kujaguza ku Jjubiri. Era naye anaakutunzanga ng’asinziira ku myaka egibulayo okutuuka ku makungula g’ebibala. 
Leviticus25:16 Emyaka bwe ginaabanga emingi, omuwendo ogulamulwa munaagwongezanga, naye emyaka bwe ginaabanga emitono munaagukendeezanga, kubanga obungi bw’ebikungulwa, bw’ogula ku mutunzi." 
Leviticus25:17 Temuseeragananga; mutyanga Katonda wammwe, kubanga Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:18 “Mugonderenga ebiragiro byange, era mukwatenga amateeka gange, bwe mutyo munaatuulanga n’emirembe mu nsi yammwe." 
Leviticus25:19 Ensi eneebaleeteranga ebibala byayo, ne mulya ne mukkuta ne mutuulamu n’emirembe." 
Leviticus25:20 Muyinza okubuuza nti, ‘Bwe tutaasigenga era ne tutakungulanga, kale mu mwaka ogw’omusanvu tunaalyanga ki?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Mu mwaka ogw’omukaaga ndibayiwako omukisa gwange ogulireetera ensi yammwe ebibala ebirimala emyaka esatu. 
Leviticus25:22 Bwe munaabanga musiga mu mwaka ogw’omunaana, munaabanga mulya ku bibala ebikadde bye mwatereka, okutuusa nga mukungudde ebibala eby’omwaka ogw’omwenda." 
Leviticus25:23 Ettaka teriitundibwenga kagenderere, kubanga ensi yange; mwe muli bayise era abasuze obusuze." 
Leviticus25:24 Buli kitundu kya nsi kye munaalyanga, bwe mutundanga ettaka mwerekerangawo omwagaanya ogw’okulinunulayo gye mulitunze." 
Leviticus25:25 “Munnansi munnammwe bw’anaayavuwalanga, n’atunda ebimu ku bintu bye, muganda we ow’okumpi mu luganda anajjanga n’anunula ebyo munnansi munne by’atunze." 
Leviticus25:26 Omuntu bw’anaabanga talina anaabimununulira, naye ye ku bubwe ng’agaggawadde, era ng’afunye obusobozi obw’okubinunula," 
Leviticus25:27 anaabaliriranga omuwendo gw’ensimbi oguli mu myaka kasookedde abitunda, n’abala n’omuwendo ogugya mu myaka egisigaddeyo okutuuka ku Jjubiri, n’agusasula omuntu gwe yaguza ebintu ebyo, olwo eyatunda aneddirangayo mu bintu bye." 
Leviticus25:28 Naye singa alemwa okufuna obusobozi okumusasula, kale ebyo bye yatunda binaasigalanga mu mukono gw’eyabigula nga ye nannyini byo okutuusa mu Mwaka gwa Jjubiri. Binamuddizibwanga mu Jjubiri, era anaayinzanga okweddirayo mu bintu bye." 
Leviticus25:29 “Omuntu bw’anaatundanga ennyumba esulwamu eri mu kibuga ekyetooloddwa bbugwe, anaayinzanga okuginunula mu mwaka nga tegunaggwaako. Mu bbanga eryo ery’omwaka omulamba mw’anaabeereranga n’obuyinza obw’okuginunula." 
Leviticus25:30 Ennyumba eyo eri mu kibuga ekyetooloddwa bbugwe bw’eteenunulibwenga mu bbanga ery’omwaka ogumu, kale eneebeereranga ddala y’oyo eyagigula n’ezzadde lye. Eyagitunda teemuddizibwenga mu Jjubiri." 
Leviticus25:31 Naye amayumba ag’omu bubuga obutono obw’omu byalo obuteetooloddwako bisenge, ganaabalirwanga mu ttuluba lye limu n’ery’ennimiro eziri mu byalo. Ganaanunulibwanga era ne gaddira bannyinigo mu Jjubiri." 
Leviticus25:32 “Bulijjo Abaleevi banaabanga ba ddembe okununula amayumba gaabwe agali mu bibuga byabwe eby’Abaleevi bye balinako obwannannyini. 
Leviticus25:33 Era Omuleevi bw’anaabanga takozesezza ddembe lye ery’okununula, kale ennyumba eyatundirwa mu kibuga Abaleevi kye balinako obwannannyini, eneemuddiranga mu Jjubiri; kubanga mu bantu ba Isirayiri ennyumba eziri mu bibuga by’Abaleevi za Baleevi." 
Leviticus25:34 Naye ennimiro eziri ku ttaka lya wamu ery’ebibuga byabwe teziitundibwenga; kubanga ezo zaabwe za bwannannyini obw’olubeerera. 
Leviticus25:35 “Munnansi munnammwe bw’anaayavuwalanga ng’ali wamu nammwe, nga takyasobola kwefunira buyambi, mubeerenga naye nga mumulabirira nga bwe mwandirabiridde omunnaggwanga oba omusuze obusuze ali mu mmwe." 
Leviticus25:36 Mutyenga Katonda wammwe. Munnammwe temumuggyangako magoba ku kintu kyonna kye munaabanga mumuwoze, bw’atyo munnammwe oyo alyoke abeerenga mu mmwe." 
Leviticus25:37 Bw’omuwolanga ensimbi azzengawo omuwendo gwennyini gw’omuwoze so tasukkirizangamu. Era bw’omuguzanga emmere tossangamu magoba. 
Leviticus25:38 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi ey’e Misiri okubawa ensi ya Kanani n’okubeera Katonda wammwe. 
Leviticus25:39 “Era munnansi munnammwe bw’anaayavuwalanga ng’ali nammwe, ne yeetunda gye muli, temumukozesanga nga muddu." 
Leviticus25:40 Munaamukozesanga ng’omupakasi ow’empeera oba ng’omusuze obusuze, ng’ali nammwe. Anaabaweerezanga okutuusa mu Mwaka gwa Jjubiri." 
Leviticus25:41 Kale nno, olwo anaalekebwanga n’addayo ewaabwe, ye n’abaana be, mu kika kye ku butaka bwa bakadde be." 
Leviticus25:42 Kubanga baweereza bange be naggya mu nsi y’e Misiri; tebaatundibwenga ng’abaddu. 
Leviticus25:43 Temubafugisanga bukambwe, naye mutyenga Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus25:44 Abaddu bammwe abasajja n’abaddu bammwe abakazi munaabaggyanga mu mawanga agabeetoolodde, mu mawanga ago mwe muneeguliranga abaddu abasajja n’abaddu abakazi." 
Leviticus25:45 Era munaayinzanga okwegulira ku bannamawanga abali nammwe abasuze obusuze, ne ku baana baabwe abanaazaalirwanga mu nsi yammwe; abo banaabanga nvuma zammwe." 
Leviticus25:46 Munaayinzanga okulaamira batabani bammwe abalibagoberera envuma ezo ng’obusika bwabwe obw’emirembe gyonna. Naye Bayisirayiri bannammwe temubafugisanga bukambwe. 
Leviticus25:47 “Omunnaggwanga oba omusuze obusuze ali nammwe bw’anaagaggawalanga, naye munnansi munnammwe bwe babeera n’ayavuwala, ne yeetunda eri munnaggwanga oba eri omusuze obusuze ali nammwe, oba eri omu ku b’omu luggya lwa munnaggwanga," 
Leviticus25:48 anaayinzanga okununulibwa, ng’amaze okwetunda. Omu ku baganda be anayinzanga okumununula:" 
Leviticus25:49 Taata we oba mutabani wa taata we, oba owooluganda omulala ow’okumpi mu buzaale ow’omu kika kye anaayinzanga okumununula. Oba ye bw’anaagaggawalanga anaayinzanga okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:50 Ye n’oli eyamugula bajjanga kubalirira ebbanga okuva mu mwaka gwe yeetundiramu okutuuka ku Mwaka gwa Jjubiri. Omuwendo ogw’okununulibwa guneesigamizibwanga ku muwendo gw’emyaka egibaliriddwa; ebbanga lye yamala n’eyamugula linaageraageranyizibwanga n’ebbanga ery’omupakasi asasulwa empeera. 
Leviticus25:51 Mu kubalirira kwabwe bwe kinaazuukanga ng’ekyasigaddeyo emyaka mingi okutuuka ku Jjubiri, ku muwendo gwe yeetunda anaasasulangako omuwendo munene olw’okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:52 Naye bw’eneebanga esigaddeyo emyaka mitono, egyo gy’anaabalirirangamu ensimbi zaamu n’asasula ezo nga bwe kyetaagisa olw’okwenunula." 
Leviticus25:53 Oyo eyagula munne anaamuyisanga ng’omupakasi amukolera mu kupatana okwa buli mwaka. Temulekanga oyo eyagula munne okumutuntuzanga nga nammwe mulaba. 
Leviticus25:54 “Bw’anaabanga tanunulibbwa mu zimu ku ngeri ezo, ye n’abaana be banaanunulibwanga mu Mwaka gwa Jjubiri." 
Leviticus25:55 Kubanga abaana ba Isirayiri bantu bange, abaweereza bange be naggya mu nsi ey’e Misiri. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus26:1 “Temwekoleranga bifaananyi oba okwesimbira ebifaananyi ebyole, oba amayinja ge muyise amatukuvu, era temuteekanga mayinja mawoole mu nsi yammwe okugavuunamiranga. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe." 
Leviticus26:2 Mukwatenga Ssabbiiti zange, era n’ebifo byange ebitukuvu mubissengamu ekitiibwa. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus26:3 “Bwe munaakwatanga amateeka gange, ne mugondera ebiragiro byange n’obwegendereza," 
Leviticus26:4 nnaabatonnyesezanga enkuba mu ntuuko zaayo, n’ettaka linaavangamu ebibala byalyo, n’emiti egy’omu nnimiro ginaabalanga ebibala byagyo." 
Leviticus26:5 Munaawuulanga okutuusa ku makungula g’emizabbibu, n’okukungula emizabbibu kunaabatuusanga mu biseera eby’okusiga; era munaalyanga emmere yonna nga bwe mwetaaga, ne mubeera mu nsi yammwe nga mulina emirembe." 
Leviticus26:6 “Ndibawa emirembe mu nsi ne mwebaka bulungi, so tewaabengawo anaabatiisatiisanga. Ebisolo ebikambwe ndibimalamu mu nsi yammwe, era temuubeerengamu ntalo." 
Leviticus26:7 Munaawonderanga abalabe bammwe ne mubatta n’ekitala ne mubawangula. 
Leviticus26:8 Abataano mu mmwe banaagobanga ekikumi, era ekikumi mu mmwe banaagobanga omutwalo ogumu, era munaawangulanga abalabe bammwe n’ekitala." 
Leviticus26:9 “Nnaabassangako omwoyo ne mbawa okuzaala ne mweyongera obungi, era endagaano yange nammwe nnaagituukirizanga." 
Leviticus26:10 Munaabanga mukyalya ku makungula ag’omwaka oguyise ne mugafulumya olw’amakungula amaggya. 
Leviticus26:11 Ekifo kyange eky’okubeeramu nnaakiteekanga mu mmwe, era omutima gwange teguubatamwenga." 
Leviticus26:12 Nnaatambuliranga mu mmwe, era nnaabanga Katonda wammwe, nammwe munaabanga bantu bange." 
Leviticus26:13 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe eyabaggya mu nsi ey’e Misiri, mulyoke mukome okuba abaddu b’Abamisiri; namenya ebikoligo byammwe ne mbasobozesa okutambula nga mwesimbye." 
Leviticus26:14 “Naye bwe mutampulirenga, ne mutagondera biragiro ebyo byonna," 
Leviticus26:15 era bwe munaanyoomoolanga ebiragiro byange ne mukyawa amateeka gange, ne mulemwa okutuukiriza ebiragiro byange ebyo byonna, bwe mutyo ne mutakuumanga ndagaano yange," 
Leviticus26:16 kale, kino kye ndibakola: Ndibaleetera entiisa eza mangu ez’embagirawo, n’obulwadde obw’olukonvuba obubalumya akasiiso n’omusujja, ebiribaziba amaaso ne bibakamulamu obulamu. Era muliteganira bwereere okusimba ebibala byammwe, kubanga abalabe bammwe be balibirya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndibeefuukira, abalabe bammwe n’okubawangula ne babawangula; abo ababakyawa banaabafuganga, ne mudduka n’okudduka so nga tewali abagoba." 
Leviticus26:18 Oluvannyuma lw’ebyo byonna okubatuukako, era bwe mutaŋŋonderenga, kale ndyongera okubabonereza okusingawo emirundi musanvu, olw’ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:19 Amalala gammwe n’emputtu ndibibaggyamu, eggulu ne likakanyala ng’ekyuma, n’ettaka ne likaluba ng’ekikomo." 
Leviticus26:20 Amaanyi gammwe ganaabafanga busa, kubanga ettaka lyammwe teriivengamu mmere yaalyo, wadde emiti egy’omu nsi yammwe okubala ebibala byagyo." 
Leviticus26:21 “Era bwe muneeyongeranga okutambulira mu makubo ge sikkiriza, ne mugaana okumpulira, ndyongera okubaleetako endwadde nnyingi nga za mirundi musanvu ng’ebibi byammwe bwe byenkana." 
Leviticus26:22 Era ndibasindikira ensolo ez’omu nsiko, ezinaalyanga abaana bammwe, ne zizikiriza ente zammwe n’omuwendo gwammwe ne gukendeera, nga n’enguudo zammwe tewakyali azitambuliramu." 
Leviticus26:23 “Era okukangavvula okwo bwe kutaabakyusenga kudda gye ndi, naye ne mweyongera okujeema," 
Leviticus26:24 kale, nange ndibalaga obukambwe, era nze kennyini ndibeebonerereza emirundi musanvu olw’ebyonoono byammwe." 
Leviticus26:25 Era nnaabaleeteranga entalo okwesasuza olw’okumenya endagaano. Bwe muneekuŋŋaanyizanga mu bibuga byammwe, nnaabaleeteranga endwadde enkambwe, era n’abalabe bammwe banaabawangulanga." 
Leviticus26:26 Bwe ndikendeeza ku bungi bw’emmere yammwe, olwo abakazi ekkumi banaabafumbiranga emmere yammwe mu ntamu emu, era buli omu banaamupimirangako akatole katono. Munaalyanga, naye temukkutenga." 
Leviticus26:27 “N’ebyo byonna bwe binaalemanga okukyusa emitima gyammwe okumpulira, naye ne mweyongera okunjeemeranga;" 
Leviticus26:28 nange nnaabasunguwaliranga, nze kennyini ne mbeebonerereza emirundi musanvu olw’ebibi byammwe." 
Leviticus26:29 Mulirya batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndizikiriza ebyoto bya bakatonda bammwe, ne ntemaatema bakatonda abalala, ne ntuuma emirambo gyammwe ku mirambo gya bakatonda abalala; era ndibakyawa." 
Leviticus26:31 Ebibuga byammwe binaasigaliranga awo tayo, n’ebifo byammwe ebitukuvu nga tebiriiko abifaako, era n’akaloosa akava mu biweebwayo byammwe tekansanyusenga." 
Leviticus26:32 Ensi yammwe ndigifuula ddungu n’abalabe bammwe abanaagibeerangamu ne bagyewuunya. 
Leviticus26:33 Ndibasaasaanyiza mu mawanga ne mbagobereza ekitala kyange. Ensi yammwe erifuuka amalungu n’ebibuga byammwe nga bimenyeddwa. 
Leviticus26:34 Awo ettaka ne liryoka lifuna emyaka egya ssabbiiti zaalyo mu bbanga eryo lye lirimala nga tewali alifaako, nga mmwe muli mu nsi z’abalabe bammwe; ettaka ne liwummulako ne lyeyagalira mu ssabbiiti zaalyo ezo." 
Leviticus26:35 Ebbanga eryo lyonna ettaka lye lirimala nga tewali kikolerwako, liriba n’okuwummula kwe litaafuna mu ssabbiiti ezaayita bwe mwali nga mmwe mulibeerako." 
Leviticus26:36 “Mu mmwe, abaliba basigaddewo nga bakyali balamu, nditeeka okutya mu mitima gyabwe nga bali eyo mu nsi z’abalabe baabwe, nga n’eddoboozi ly’akakoola k’omuti akafuumuulibwa n’empewo kabatiisa. Banaddukanga ng’abaliko abalabe ab’ebitala ababagoba, banaagwanga newaakubadde nga tewaabeerengawo babawondera." 
Leviticus26:37 Banaagwaŋŋanangako ng’abadduka okwewonya omulabe ow’ekitala newaakubadde nga tewaabengawo babawondera. Bwe mutyo temuusobolenga kwolekera balabe bammwe. 
Leviticus26:38 Mulisaanawo mu mawanga; ensi z’abalabe bammwe ziribamira. 
Leviticus26:39 N’abo ku mmwe abanaabanga basigaddewo banaakoozimbiranga mu nsi z’abalabe bammwe olw’ebibi byabwe, era balikoozimba n’olw’ebibi bya bakitaabwe." 
Leviticus26:40 “Naye bwe baneenenyanga ebibi byabwe n’ebyonoono bya bakitaabwe n’obunnanfuusi bwabwe gye ndi n’obujeemu bwabwe," 
Leviticus26:41 ebyandeetera okubalaga obukambwe ne mbasindika ne mu nsi z’abalabe baabwe, era amalala g’emitima gyabwe egitali mikomole bwe galikkakkana ne bakkiriza okukola ebibonerezo olw’ebyonoono byabwe," 
Leviticus26:42 kale ndijjukira endagaano yange ne Yakobo, ne nzijukira endagaano yange ne Isaaka n’endagaano yange ne Ibulayimu, era ndijjukira n’ensi yaabwe." 
Leviticus26:43 Naye ensi banaabanga bagivuddemu n’efuna ssabbiiti zaayo kubanga abaagibeerangamu tebakyagirimu. Banaabonerezebwanga olw’ebibi byabwe kubanga baanyoomoolanga amateeka gange ne batagondera biragiro byange. 
Leviticus26:44 Newaakubadde ng’ebyo biriba bwe bityo, bwe banaabanga mu nsi z’abalabe baabwe, siibeggyengako wadde okubakyawanga n’okumenyawo ne mmenyerawo ddala endagaano yange gye nalagaana nabo; kubanga Nze Mukama Katonda waabwe." 
Leviticus26:45 Naye ku lwabwe, najjukiranga endagaano gye nalagaana ne bajjajjaabwe, be naggya mu nsi ey’e Misiri nga n’amawanga gonna galaba ndyoke mbeere Katonda waabwe. Nze Mukama.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Ago ge mateeka n’ebiragiro n’amateeka amakulu Mukama ge yakolera abaana ba Isirayiri, nga bwe yalagira Musa, ku lusozi Sinaayi." 
Leviticus27:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Leviticus27:2 “Yogera eri abaana ba Isirayiri obagambe nti: Omuntu bw’anaakolanga obweyamo obw’enjawulo obw’okuwaayo abantu eri Mukama naye ng’asasulayo miwendo egibagyamu, onoobasaliranga bw’oti:" 
Leviticus27:3 omusajja aweza emyaka egy’obukulu egiri wakati w’amakumi abiri n’enkaaga anaaleetanga sekeri za ffeeza amakumi ataano, nga sekeri z’omu watukuvu bwe ziba," 
Leviticus27:4 naye bw’anaabanga omukazi onoomusaliranga sekeri amakumi asatu. 
Leviticus27:5 Omuntu aweza emyaka egy’obukulu egiri wakati w’ettaano n’amakumi abiri, bw’anaabanga omusajja onoomusaliranga sekeri amakumi abiri naye omukazi sekeri kkumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Bw’anaabanga omwana ng’ali wakati w’omwezi gumu n’emyaka etaano, onoomusaliranga sekeri ttaano eza ffeeza nga mulenzi, naye omuwala sekeri za ffeeza ssatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Omuntu bw’anaabanga ow’emyaka egy’obukulu nkaaga n’okusingawo, omusajja onoomusaliranga sekeri kkumi na ttaano n’omukazi sekeri kkumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Omuntu eyakola obweyamo bw’anaabanga omwavu ennyo atasobola kuleeta miwendo egyo gye wamusalira, anaayanjulwanga eri kabona; kale kabona anaamusaliranga omuwendo ogumugyamu ng’ageraageranya obusobozi bw’oyo eyeeyama nga bwe bunaabanga." 
Leviticus27:9 “Obweyamo bw’omuntu bwe bunaabeeranga obw’ekisolo ekikkirizibwa ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda, ekisolo ng’ekyo ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda kinaabanga kitukuvu." 
Leviticus27:10 Tasaaniranga kukikyusaamu oba kukiwaanyisaamu ekibi mu kirungi wadde ekirungi mu kibi; bw’anaabanga awaanyisizza ekisolo ekimu mu kirala, byombi kino na kiri ky’awanyisizzaamu binaafuukanga bitukuvu." 
Leviticus27:11 Ensolo omuntu gy’anaabanga yeeyamye bw’eneebanga etali nnongoofu, etakkirizibwa ng’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda, ensolo eyo esaanira okuleetebwanga eri kabona," 
Leviticus27:12 ye alyokenga asalewo nga bw’eri, oba nnungi oba mbi. Omuwendo kabona gw’anaabaliriranga ku nsolo eyo, gwe gunaawebwangayo." 
Leviticus27:13 Nannyini nsolo bw’anaabanga ayagala okuginunulayo, anaasaniranga okugattako ekitundu ekimu ekyokutaano ku muwendo gwayo." 
Leviticus27:14 “Omusajja bw’anaawangayo ennyumba ye okubeera entukuvu eri Mukama Katonda kabona anaagirabiranga omuwendo ogugigyamu, oba nnungi oba mbi. Omuwendo ogwo kabona gw’anaasalanga gwe gunaakolanga." 
Leviticus27:15 Oyo anaawangayo ennyumba ye eri Mukama bw’anaabanga ayagala okuginunula, anaayongerangako ekitundu kimu kyakutaano ku muwendo gwayo, olwo ng’ennyumba emuddira." 
Leviticus27:16 “Omusajja bw’anaawangayo ekitundu ky’ettaka lye, lye yasikira, eri Mukama Katonda, omuwendo oguligyamu gunaabalirirwanga nga gwesigamizibwa ku bungi bw’ensigo ezeetaagibwa okusiga ku ttaka eryo ne ziggweerako; ensigo za sayiri ezipimibwamu oma zinaabalirirwangamu sekeri za ffeeza amakumi ataano." 
Leviticus27:17 Singa ennimiro ye, agiwaayo mu biseera by’Omwaka gwa Jjubiri, omuwendo ogubaliriddwa gunaasigalanga nga bwe guli." 
Leviticus27:18 Naye bw’anaawangayo ennimiro ye nga Jjubiri eweddeko, kabona anagibalirirangamu omuwendo ng’agwesigamya ku myaka eginaabanga gibulayo Omwaka gwa Jjubiri eddirira gulyoke gutandike, n’omuwendo ogwali gubaliriddwa gunaakendeezebwangako." 
Leviticus27:19 Era oyo anaabanga awaddeyo ennimiro ye bw’anaayagalanga okuginunula, kale anaagattangako ekitundu kimu kyakutaano ku muwendo gwayo, olwo ennimiro n’emuddira." 
Leviticus27:20 Naye bw’anaabanga tayagala kununula nnimiro eyo, oba bw’anaabanga agiguzizza omuntu omulala, kale ng’olwo tekyanunulibwa n’akamu." 
Leviticus27:21 Naye mu Mwaka gwa Jjubiri ennimiro eyo bw’eneeteebwanga, eneebanga ntukuvu eri Mukama, ng’ennimiro eyawongebwa ewa Mukama; eneebanga ya kabona." 
Leviticus27:22 “Omusajja bw’anaawangayo eri Mukama Katonda ennimiro gye yagula, etali ku ttaka lye ery’obwannannyini," 
Leviticus27:23 kabona anaabaliriranga omuwendo ogugigyamu okutuuka ku mwaka gwa Jjubiri, omusajja anaasasulanga omuwendo ogwo ku lunaku olwo ng’ekintu ekitukuvu eri Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus27:24 Mu mwaka gwa Jjubiri, ennimiro eneddizibwanga oyo gwe yagigulako, nga y’oyo eyali nannyini ttaka." 
Leviticus27:25 Buli muwendo ogubalirirwa guneesigamizibwanga ku sekeri z’Awatukuvu, nga gera amakumi abiri zivaamu sekeri emu." 
Leviticus27:26 “Tewabanga awaayo omwana gw’ensolo omubereberye eri Mukama, kubanga abaana b’ensolo ababereberye bonna ba Mukama, oba nte oba ndiga zonna za Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus27:27 Bw’anaabanga awaddeyo emu ku nsolo ezitali nnongoofu, anagisasuliranga omuwendo gwayo ogwagibalirirwamu, ng’agattako ekitundu kimu kyakutaano eky’omuwendo gwayo. Bw’ataaginunulengayo eneetundwanga omuwendo ogwagibalirirwamu." 
Leviticus27:28 “Naye omuntu yenna bw’anaamalanga okuwongera Mukama Katonda ku bintu bye by’anaabanga nabyo, gamba oba muntu oba kisolo oba ennimiro ye gye yasikira, tewaabengawo ku bintu ebyo bitundibwa oba okununulibwa; buli kintu ekiwongere ddala mu ngeri eyo kinaabanga kitukuvu nnyo eri Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus27:29 Omuntu eyawongebwa nga wa kuttibwa, taanunulibwenga kinaamusaaniranga kuttibwa." 
Leviticus27:30 “Buli kitundu eky’ekkumi ekiva mu nsi, gamba ku mmere ey’empeke eva mu ttaka, oba ku bibala ebiva ku miti, kya Mukama Katonda, era kitukuvu eri Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus27:31 Omuntu anaayagalanga okununula ku bitundu bye eby’ekkumi, anaagatangako ekitundu kimu kyakutaano ku muwendo gwakyo." 
Leviticus27:32 Ebitundu eby’ekkumi byonna ebyamagana g’ente n’eby’ebisibo by’endiga, kwe kugamba nti buli nsolo omusumba gy’anaabalanga nga ya kkumi, eneebanga ntukuvu eri Mukama Katonda." 
Leviticus27:33 Tasaaniranga kulondamu nnungi ng’alekawo embi, oba okuwaanyisa. Bw’anaawaanyisanga ng’olwo ensolo zombi, eri n’eno ewanyisizibbwa zinaafuukanga ntukuvu teziinunulibwenga.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Ago ge mateeka Mukama Katonda ge yawa Musa ku lusozi Sinaayi agategeeze abaana ba Isirayiri. 
Numbers1:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’ayogera ne Musa mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, mu Ddungu lya Sinaayi ku lunaku olw’olubereberye olw’omu mwezi ogwokubiri ogw’omwaka ogwokubiri kasookedde abaana ba Isirayiri bava mu nsi y’e Misiri. N’amugamba nti:" 
Numbers1:2 “Bala ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri ng’obategeka mu bika byabwe, ne mu mpya zaabwe, ng’owandiika erinnya lya buli musajja kinnoomu ku lukalala." 
Numbers1:3 Ggwe ne Alooni mujja kutegeka abasajja bonna ab’omu Isirayiri abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri egy’obukulu n’okusingawo, abatuuse okuyingira mu magye, mubabalire mu bibinja byabwe." 
Numbers1:4 Munaayambibwako omusajja omu omu okuva mu buli kika, nga ye mukulu w’oluggya lwa bajjajjaabe." 
Numbers1:5 “Gano ge mannya g’abasajja abajja okubayambako: “Aliva mu kika kya Lewubeeni ye Erizuuli mutabani wa Sedewuli; 
Numbers1:6 mu kya Simyoni ye Serumiyeeri mutabani wa Zulisadaayi; 
Numbers1:7 mu kya Yuda ye Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadaabu; 
Numbers1:8 mu kya Isakaali ye Nesaneri mutabani wa Zuwaali; 
Numbers1:9 mu kya Zebbulooni ye Eriyaabu mutabani wa Keroni. 
Numbers1:10 Okuva mu baana ba Yusufu: mu kya Efulayimu ye Erisaama mutabani wa Ammikudi; mu kya Manase ye Gamalyeri mutabani wa Pedazuuli. 
Numbers1:11 Aliva mu kika kya Benyamini ye Abidaani mutabani wa Gidyoni; 
Numbers1:12 mu kya Ddaani ye Akiyezeeri mutabani wa Amisadaayi; 
Numbers1:13 mu kya Aseri ye Pagiyeeri mutabani wa Okulaani; 
Numbers1:14 mu kya Gaadi ye Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Deweri; 
Numbers1:15 mu kya Nafutaali ye Akira mutabani wa Enani.” 
Numbers1:16 Abo be basajja abaalondebwa okuva mu kibiina, nga be bakulembeze ab’ebika bya bajjajjaabwe. Abo nga be bakulu b’ebika bya Isirayiri." 
Numbers1:17 Awo Musa ne Alooni ne batwala abasajja abo abaatuddwa amannya gaabwe," 
Numbers1:18 ne bakuŋŋaanya ekibiina ky’abantu bonna ku lunaku olw’olubereberye olw’omu mwezi ogwokubiri. Awo abantu bonna ne beewandiisa mu bujjajja bwabwe ne mu bika byabwe awamu ne mu mpya zaabwe. Abasajja abo abaali bawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri egy’obukulu n’okusingawo, amannya gaabwe ne gawandiikibwa kinnoomu ku lukalala," 
Numbers1:19 nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. Bw’atyo Musa n’ababalira mu Ddungu lya Sinaayi: 
Numbers1:20 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Lewubeeni, mutabani wa Isirayiri omubereberye: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:21 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Lewubeeni baali emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu bitaano (46,500)." 
Numbers1:22 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Simyoni: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:23 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Simyoni baali emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu ebikumi bisatu (59,300)." 
Numbers1:24 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Gaadi: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe, n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:25 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Gaadi baali emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu amakumi ataano (45,650)." 
Numbers1:26 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Yuda: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:27 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Yuda baali emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga (74,600)." 
Numbers1:28 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Isakaali: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe, kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:29 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Isakaali baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bina (54,400)." 
Numbers1:30 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Zebbulooni: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:31 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Zebbulooni baali emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bina (57,400)." 
Numbers1:32 Okuva mu batabani ba Yusufu: Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Efulayimu Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:33 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Efulayimu baali emitwalo ena mu ebikumi bitaano (40,500)." 
Numbers1:34 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Manase: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:35 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Manase baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu ebikumi bibiri (32,200)." 
Numbers1:36 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Benyamini: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:37 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Benyamini baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu ebikumi bina (35,400)." 
Numbers1:38 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Ddaani: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:39 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Ddaani baali emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu (62,700)." 
Numbers1:40 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Aseri: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:41 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Aseri baali emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu ebikumi bitaano (41,500)." 
Numbers1:42 Ab’omu bazzukulu ba Nafutaali: Abasajja bonna ab’emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye, baawandiikibwa amannya gaabwe kinnoomu, ng’ebiwandiiko by’ebika byabwe n’eby’empya zaabwe bwe byali." 
Numbers1:43 Abaabalibwa okuva mu kika kya Nafutaali baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina (53,400)." 
Numbers1:44 Abo be basajja Musa ne Alooni be baabala, nga bayambibwako abakulembeze ab’omu Isirayiri ekkumi n’ababiri, nga buli omu akiikiridde ekika kye." 
Numbers1:45 Abasajja bonna abaana ba Isirayiri abaali bawezezza emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi abiri n’okusingawo, nga batuuse n’okuyingira mu magye ga Isirayiri bwe batyo ne babalirwa mu bika byabwe." 
Numbers1:46 Obungi bwabwe bonna abaabalibwa okugatta awamu baali bawera emitwalo nkaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bitaano mu amakumi ataano (603,550)." 
Numbers1:47 Abazzukulu ab’omu mpya ez’omu bika ebirala bwe baali babalibwa, bo ab’omu kika kya Leevi tebaabalibwa." 
Numbers1:48 Kubanga Mukama Katonda yali agambye Musa nti," 
Numbers1:49 “Ab’omu kika kya Leevi tababalanga wadde okubagatta awamu n’emiwendo gy’abaana ba Isirayiri abalala.” 
Numbers1:50 Era n’amugamba nti, “Naye Abaleevi obawanga omulimu ogw’okulabirira Eweema ey’Obujulirwa n’ebintu byamu byonna awamu ne byonna ebigigenderako. Banaasitulanga Eweema n’ebyamu byonna, banaagirabiriranga era banaasiisiranga okugyetooloola." 
Numbers1:51 Eweema bw’eneebanga etwalibwa mu kifo ekirala, Abaleevi be banaagisimbulanga, era bwe kineetaagisanga okugissa mu kifo awalala, Abaleevi be banaagisimbangawo. Omuntu omulala yenna bw’anaagisembereranga anaafanga." 
Numbers1:52 Abaana ba Isirayiri banaasiisiranga mu bibinja, nga buli musajja ali mu lusiisira lwe n’ebendera ye ku bubwe." 
Numbers1:53 Naye Abaleevi bo banaasimbanga eweema zaabwe okwebungulula Eweema ey’Obujulirwa, abaana ba Isirayiri baleme kutuukibwako busungu bwa Mukama. Abaleevi be banaabanga n’obuvunaanyizibwa obw’okulabirira Eweema ey’Obujulirwa.”" 
Numbers1:54 Abaana ba Isirayiri ne bakola ebyo byonna nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa ne Alooni nti," 
Numbers2:2 “Abaana ba Isirayiri banaasiisiranga okwebungulula Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga bagyesuddeko akabanga naye nga bagyolekedde. Buli musajja anaawanikanga ebendera ye n’ebendera z’empya za bajjajjaabwe.”" 
Numbers2:3 Ebibinja by’olusiisira lwa Yuda binaasiisiranga ku ludda olw’enjuba gy’eva ne basimba awo ebendera yaabwe. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Yuda ye Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadaabu. 
Numbers2:4 Mu kibinja kye nga mulimu abaabalibwa emitwalo musanvu mu enkumi nnya mu lukaaga (74,600)." 
Numbers2:5 Ab’ekika kya Isakaali be banaasiisiranga okuliraana Yuda. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Isakaali ye Nesaneri mutabani wa Zuwaali. 
Numbers2:6 Abaabalibwa mu kibinja kye baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi nnya mu ebikumi bina (54,400)." 
Numbers2:7 Ekika kya Zebbulooni kye kinaddangako. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Zebbulooni ye Eriyaabu mutabani wa Keroni. 
Numbers2:8 Abaabalibwa mu kibinja kye baali emitwalo etaano mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bina (57,400)." 
Numbers2:9 Abasajja bonna abaali mu lusiisira lwa Yuda abaabalibwa ng’ebibinja by’amaggye gaabwe bwe byali baali emitwalo kkumi na munaana mu kakaaga mu ebikumi bina (186,400). Be banaakulemberanga." 
Numbers2:10 Ku ludda olw’obukiikaddyo ebibinja eby’amaggye g’omu kika kya Lewubeeni gye banaasiisiranga, nga basimbye eyo n’ebendera yaabwe. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Lewubeeni ye Erizuuli mutabani wa Sedewuli." 
Numbers2:11 Abaabalibwa mu kibinja kye baali emitwalo ena mu kakaaga mu ebikumi bitaano (46,500)." 
Numbers2:12 Ab’ekika kya Simyoni be banaabaddiriranga. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Simyoni ye Serumiyeeri mutabani wa Zulisadaayi. 
Numbers2:13 Abaabalibwa mu kibinja kye baali emitwalo etaano mu kenda mu ebikumi bisatu (59,300)." 
Numbers2:14 Ab’ekika kya Gaadi be banaddangako. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Gaadi ye Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Deweri. 
Numbers2:15 Abaabalibwa mu kibinja kye baali emitwalo ena mu enkumi ttaano mu lukaaga mu amakumi ataano (45,650)." 
Numbers2:16 Abasajja bonna okugatta awamu abaali mu lusiisira lwa Lewubeeni abaabalibwa, ng’ebibinja by’amaggye gaabwe bwe byali, baali emitwalo kkumi n’ettaano mu lukumi mu ebikumi bina mu amakumi ataano (151,450). Be banaabanga abookubiri okusitula ng’olugendo lutuuse." 
Numbers2:17 Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu eneesitulwanga ng’olugendo lutuuse nga yeebunguluddwa olusiisira lw’Abaleevi, ng’eri mu makkati g’ensiisira endala zonna. Banaasitulanga okutambula nga baddiriragana ng’enteekateeka y’ensiisira zaabwe bw’eri, buli musajja ng’agenda n’ebendera ye." 
Numbers2:18 Ku ludda olw’ebugwanjuba y’eneebeeranga olusiisira lw’ebibinja bya Efulayimu nga bakutte n’ebendera zaabwe. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Efulayimu ye Erisaama mutabani wa Ammikudi. 
Numbers2:19 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo ena mu ebikumi bitaano (40,500)." 
Numbers2:20 Ekika kya Manase kye kinaddangako. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Manase ye Gamalyeri mutabani wa Pedazuuli. 
Numbers2:21 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi bbiri mu ebikumi bibiri (32,200)." 
Numbers2:22 Ekika kya Benyamini ne kiddako. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Benyamini ye Abidaani mutabani wa Gidyoni. 
Numbers2:23 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo esatu mu enkumi ttaano mu ebikumi bina (35,400)." 
Numbers2:24 Okugatta awamu abasajja bonna abaali mu lusiisira lwa Efulayimu abaabalibwa ng’ebibinja byabwe bwe byali baali emitwalo kkumi mu kanaana mu kikumi (108,100). Bano be banaabanga abookusatu okusitula ng’olugendo lutuuse." 
Numbers2:25 Ku ludda olw’obukiikakkono y’eneebeeranga olusiisira lw’ebibinja bya Ddaani n’ebendera yaabwe. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Ddaani ye Akiyezeeri mutabani wa Amisadaayi. 
Numbers2:26 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo mukaaga mu enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu (62,700)." 
Numbers2:27 Ab’ekika kya Aseri be banaasiisiranga okubaddirira. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Aseri ye Pagiyeeri mutabani wa Okulaani. 
Numbers2:28 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo ena mu lukumi mu ebikumi bitaano (41,500)." 
Numbers2:29 Ab’ekika kya Nafutaali be banaddangako. Omukulembeze w’abantu ba Nafutaali ye Akira mutabani wa Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Ab’omu kibinja kye abaabalibwa baali emitwalo etaano mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bina (53,400)." 
Numbers2:31 Okugatta awamu abasajja bonna abaali mu lusiisira lwa Ddaani baali emitwalo kkumi n’ettaano mu kasanvu mu lukaaga (157,600). Abo be banaasembangayo okusitula ng’olugendo lutuuse, ng’ebendera zaabwe bwe ziri." 
Numbers2:32 Abo be baana ba Isirayiri abaabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali. Okugatta abaali mu nsiisira bonna ng’ebibinja byabwe bwe byali, baawera emitwalo nkaaga mu enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bitaano mu amakumi ataano (603,550)." 
Numbers2:33 Naye abaana ba Isirayiri bwe baali babalibwa, Abaleevi bo tebaabalibwa, kubanga bw’atyo Mukama bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Abaana ba Isirayiri bwe batyo ne bakola ebyo byonna Mukama Katonda bye yalagira Musa. Bwe batyo bwe baasiisiranga ensiisira zaabwe ng’ebendera zaabwe bwe zaali, era bwe batyo bwe baasitulanga okutambula buli bantu mu bika byabwe ne mu mpya za bajjajjaabwe." 
Numbers3:1 Luno lwe lulyo lwa Alooni n’olwa Musa mu biseera Mukama mwe yayogerera ne Musa ku Lusozi Sinaayi. 
Numbers3:2 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Alooni: Nadabu, omubereberye, ne Abiku, ne Eriyazaali, ne Isamaali." 
Numbers3:3 Ago ge mannya ga batabani ba Alooni, abaafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni okuba bakabona, era abaayawulibwa okuweereza mu mulimu gw’obwakabona." 
Numbers3:4 Naye nno Nadabu ne Abiku baatondokera mu maaso ga Mukama ne bafa, kubanga baayokya ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda n’omuliro ogutakkirizibwa nga bali mu ddungu ly’e Sinaayi. Tebaalina baana; bwe batyo, Eriyazaali ne Isamaali ne basigala nga be bokka abaaweerezanga nga bakabona ebbanga lyonna kitaabwe Alooni lye yamala nga mulamu." 
Numbers3:5 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers3:6 “Leeta ab’omu kika kya Leevi obakwase Alooni kabona bamuweerezenga. 
Numbers3:7 Banaamukoleranga emirimu era ne baweereza n’ekibiina kyonna awali Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga bakola emirimu awali Eweema ya Mukama." 
Numbers3:8 Banaalabiriranga ebintu byonna eby’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, ne bakola emirimu gy’omu Weema ya Mukama nga batuukiriza ebyo byonna ebivunaanyizibwa abaana ba Isirayiri." 
Numbers3:9 Abaleevi onoobawanga eri Alooni ne batabani be; baweereddwa ddala Alooni nga baggyibwa mu baana ba Isirayiri. 
Numbers3:10 Onoolonda Alooni ne batabani be okubeera bakabona; naye bwe wanaabangawo omuntu omulala yenna n’asembera awatukuvu, anaafanga.”" 
Numbers3:11 Mukama Katonda n’ayongera okugamba Musa nti," 
Numbers3:12 “Laba, neetwalidde Abaleevi nga mbaggya mu baana ba Isirayiri mu kifo ky’abaana ababereberye abazaalibwa abakazi mu baana ba Isirayiri. Abaleevi banaabanga bange," 
Numbers3:13 kubanga byonna ebizaalibwa ebibereberye byange. Bwe natta ebibereberye byonna mu nsi y’e Misiri neeyawulira ebibereberye byonna mu Isirayiri okubeeranga ebyange, abantu n’ebisolo. Nze Mukama Katonda.”" 
Numbers3:14 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa mu ddungu ly’e Sinaayi nti," 
Numbers3:15 “Bala Abaleevi bonna mu mpya zaabwe ne mu bika byabwe. Bala buli mwana mulenzi ow’omwezi ogumu n’okusingawo.” 
Numbers3:16 Bw’atyo Musa n’ababala nga Mukama Katonda bwe yamulagira, ng’ekigambo kya Mukama bwe kyali." 
Numbers3:17 Gano ge mannya ga batabani ba Leevi: Gerusoni, ne Kokasi, ne Merali." 
Numbers3:18 Gano ge mannya g’abatabani ba Gerusoni ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali: Libuni ne Simeeyi. 
Numbers3:19 Bano be batabani ba Kokasi ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali: Amulaamu, ne Izukali ne Kebbulooni, ne Wuziyeeri." 
Numbers3:20 Bano be batabani ba Merali ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali: Makuli ne Musi. Ebyo bye bika by’Abaleevi ng’empya za bakitaabwe bwe zaali. 
Numbers3:21 Mu Gerusoni mwe mwava oluggya lwa Abalibuni n’oluggya lwa Abasimeeyi; ezo nga z’empya za Abagerusoni. 
Numbers3:22 Abaana aboobulenzi okuva ku w’omwezi ogumu ogw’obukulu n’okusingawo abaabalibwa baali kasanvu mu ebikumi bitaano (7,500)." 
Numbers3:23 Ab’omu Gerusoni nga baakusiisiranga ku ludda olw’ebugwanjuba emmanju wa Weema ya Mukama. 
Numbers3:24 Omukulembeze w’empya za Abagerusoni yali Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Laeri. 
Numbers3:25 Abagerusoni be banaabanga n’obuvunaanyizibwa obw’okulabirira Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga balabirira ebigibikkako n’eggigi ery’omu mulyango oguyingira mu Weema," 
Numbers3:26 n’entimbe ez’omu luggya, n’entimbe ez’omu mizigo egiggulira ku luggya okwebungulula Weema n’ekyoto. Era banaalabiriranga n’emiguwa awamu n’ebintu byonna ebinaakozesebwanga ku mirimu egyo." 
Numbers3:27 Mu Kokasi mwe mwava oluggya lwa Abamulaamu, n’oluggya lwa Abayizukaali, n’oluggya lwa Abakebbulooni, n’oluggya lwa Abawuziyeeri; ezo z’empya za Abakokasi." 
Numbers3:28 Abaana aboobulenzi okuva ku w’omwezi ogumu ogw’obukulu n’okusingawo abaabalibwa baali kanaana mu lukaaga (8,600). Abakokasi be baweebwa obuvunaanyizibwa okulabiriranga awatukuvu." 
Numbers3:29 Ab’omu Kokasi nga baakusiisiranga ku ludda olw’obukiikaddyo obwa Weema ya Mukama. 
Numbers3:30 Omukulembeze w’empya za Abakokasi yali Erizafani mutabani wa Wuziyeeri. 
Numbers3:31 Abakokasi be baabanga n’obuvunaanyizibwa okulabirira Essanduuko ey’Endagaano, n’emmeeza, n’ekikondo ky’ettaala, n’ebyoto, n’ebintu eby’omu watukuvu ebikozesebwa mu kuweereza, n’eggigi; n’emirimu gyonna egyekuusa ku buweereza obwo." 
Numbers3:32 Eriyazaali mutabani wa Alooni kabona ye yalondebwa okuba omukulu w’abakulembeze ba Abaleevi, era n’okulabirira abo abaaweerezanga mu watukuvu." 
Numbers3:33 Mu Merali mwe mwava oluggya lwa Abamakuli n’oluggya lwa Abamusi; ezo nga ze mpya za Abamerali. 
Numbers3:34 Abaana aboobulenzi okuva ku w’omwezi ogumu n’okusingawo abaabalibwa baali kakaaga mu ebikumi bibiri (6,200)." 
Numbers3:35 Omukulembeze w’empya za Abamerali yali Zuliyeeri mutabani wa Abikayiri; Abamerali nga baakusiisiranga ku bukiikaddyo obwa Weema ya Mukama. 
Numbers3:36 Be baavunaanyizibwanga emikiikiro, n’empagi, n’ebikondo, n’ebikwata ku Weema ya Mukama byonna n’ebyekuusa ku mirimu gyayo." 
Numbers3:37 Okwo baagattangako empagi zonna ezeebunguludde oluggya n’entobo zaazo, n’enkondo za Weema n’emiguwa." 
Numbers3:38 Musa ne Alooni ne batabani baabwe baasiisiranga ku ludda olw’ebuvanjuba olwa Weema ya Mukama, okwolekera enjuba gy’eva mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Baavunaanyizibwanga okulabirira awatukuvu ku lw’abaana ba Isirayiri. Omuntu omulala yenna eyasembereranga awatukuvu, ng’ateekwa kufa." 
Numbers3:39 Omuwendo gwonna ogw’Abaleevi abaabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali, nga mwe muli abaana aboobulenzi okuva ku w’omwezi ogumu n’okusingawo, nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa ne Alooni, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri (22,000)." 
Numbers3:40 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti, “Bala abaana ba Isirayiri bonna aboobulenzi ababereberye okuva ku mwana ow’omwezi ogumu n’okusingawo okole olukalala lw’amannya gaabwe gonna." 
Numbers3:41 Era ojja kunfunira Abaleevi mu kifo ky’ababereberye ab’abaana ba Isirayiri, era onfunire n’ente ez’Abaleevi mu kifo ky’ente ez’abaana ba Isirayiri embereberye. Nze Mukama Katonda.”" 
Numbers3:42 Awo Musa n’abala abaana ba Isirayiri ababereberye nga Mukama Katonda bwe yamulagira. 
Numbers3:43 Okugatta awamu abaana aboobulenzi ababereberye bonna okuva ku w’omwezi ogumu n’okusingawo abaabalibwa, nga n’amannya gaabwe gawandiikiddwa ku lukalala, baali emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu ebikumi bibiri mu nsanvu mu basatu." 
Numbers3:44 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers3:45 “Nfunira Abaleevi badde mu kifo ky’abaana ba Isirayiri ababereberye, n’ente z’Abaleevi zidde mu kifo ky’ente z’abaana ba Isirayiri, era Abaleevi banaabanga bange. Nze Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers3:46 Okununula ababereberye ab’abaana ba Isirayiri ebikumi ebibiri mu ensanvu mu abasatu abasukkirira ku muwendo gw’Abaleevi abasajja," 
Numbers3:47 onoddiranga gulaamu amakumi ataano mu ttaano ku buli omu, ng’ogeraageranyiza ku gulaamu kkumi n’emu ey’awatukuvu nga bw’eri, ye sekeri ey’obuzito ze gulaamu kkumi n’emu n’ekitundu." 
Numbers3:48 Ensimbi ez’okununula abaana ba Isirayiri abasukkiriramu oziwanga Alooni ne batabani be.” 
Numbers3:49 Bw’atyo Musa n’asolooza ensimbi ez’okwenunula ku abo abaasukkirira ku muwendo gw’abo abaanunulibwa Abaleevi. 
Numbers3:50 Yasolooza ku babereberye ab’abaana ba Isirayiri effeeza ey’obuzito obwa kilo kkumi na ttaano n’ekitundu, ng’engeraageranya ya sekeri y’awatukuvu bw’eri." 
Numbers3:51 Musa n’addira ensimbi ez’okwenunula n’aziwa Alooni ne batabani be, ng’ekigambo kya Mukama bwe kyali, nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers4:1 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa ne Alooni nti," 
Numbers4:2 “Mubale batabani ba Kokasi abava mu kika ky’Abaleevi, ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe ziri." 
Numbers4:3 Mubabale nga muva ku basajja ab’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano, abayinza okuyingira mu buweereza obw’okukola emirimu mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers4:4 “Gino gye mirimu eginaakolwanga batabani ba Kokasi: nga gya kulabirira ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo. 
Numbers4:5 Olusiisira bwe lunaabanga lusitula, Alooni ne batabani be banaayingiranga mu Weema ya Mukama, ne batimbulula eggigi ery’olutimbe ne balibikka ku Ssanduuko ey’Endagaano." 
Numbers4:6 Okwo banaabikkangako amaliba ga lukwata, kuno ne babikkako olugoye olwa bbululu omuka, ne balyoka basonsekamu emisituliro gyayo." 
Numbers4:7 “Ku mmeeza ey’Emigaati egy’Okulaga banaayaliirangako ekitambala ekya bbululu, ne bassaako amasowaane, n’ebijiiko ebinene, n’amabakuli, n’ejaagi omunaabeeranga ebiweebwayo ebyokunywa; n’emigaati egy’okulaga nagyo ginaabeeranga okwo." 
Numbers4:8 Banaayaliirangako ekitambaala ekimyufu ennyo, ne bakibikkako amaliba ga lukwata; ne basonsekamu emisituliro gyayo." 
Numbers4:9 “Banaddiranga ekitambaala ekya bbululu ne bakibikka ku kikondo ky’ettaala kwe zinaayakiranga, n’ettabaaza zaako, n’ebikomola entambi n’ensuniya ez’ebisirinza, n’ejaagi ez’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni aganaakozesebwanga mu ttaala ezo." 
Numbers4:10 Ekikondo n’ebigenderako byonna binaasibibwanga mu maliba ga lukwata ne biteekebwa ku musituliro. 
Numbers4:11 “Banaayaliiranga olugoye olwa bbululu ku kyoto ekya zaabu, okwo ne babikkako amaliba ga lukwata, ne basonsekamu emisituliro gyakyo." 
Numbers4:12 “Banaddiranga ebintu byonna ebinaakozesebwanga ku mirimu gy’obuweereza mu watukuvu ne babiteeka mu lugoye olwa bbululu ne babibikkako amaliba ga lukwata, ne babiteeka ku misituliro gyabyo." 
Numbers4:13 Ekyoto banaakiggyangamu evvu ne bakibikkako olugoye olwa ffulungu;
