Numbers4:14 ne balyoka bakissaako ebintu byonna ebikozesebwa mu mirimu gy’oku kyoto, nga mwe muli ensiniya ez’omuliro, n’ewuuma, n’ebijiiko n’ebibya. Okwo banaabikkangako amaliba ga lukwata, ne balyoka basonsekamu emisituliro gyakyo." 
Numbers4:15 “Alooni ne batabani be bwe banaamalanga okusibako awatukuvu ne byonna ebibeeramu, nga n’ekiseera ky’olusiisira okusitula mu lugendo kituuse; awo batabani ba Kokasi banajjanga ne babisitula, naye ekintu kyonna ekitukuvu tebakikwatangako, baleme okufa. Ebyo bye bintu eby’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu batabani ba Kokasi bye baneetikkanga." 
Numbers4:16 “Eriyazaali, mutabani wa Alooni kabona, y’anaabeeranga n’obuvunaanyizibwa obw’amafuta g’ettaala ag’omuzeeyituuni, n’obubaane obwakaloosa, n’ekiweebwayo eky’okulaga eky’emmere ey’empeke, n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ag’okwawula. Era y’anaalabiriranga Eweema ya Mukama ne byonna ebigirimu, n’awatukuvu ne byonna ebikozesezebwamu.”" 
Numbers4:17 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa ne Alooni nti," 
Numbers4:18 “Mwegendereze ab’omu mpya z’ennyumba z’Abakokasi baleme okukutulwa ku kika ky’Abaleevi. 
Numbers4:19 Ekyo munaakibakoleranga, bwe batyo bwe banaasembereranga ebintu ebitukuvu ennyo balemenga okufa, naye basigalenga nga balamu. Alooni ne batabani be banaayingiranga mu watukuvu ne bagabira buli Mukokasi omulimu gwe n’ebyo by’aneetikkanga." 
Numbers4:20 Naye Abakokasi tebaayingirenga munda kutunula ku bintu ebitukuvu, wadde n’eddakiika emu, balemenga okufa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers4:22 “Bala ne batabani ba Gerusoni ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe ziri. 
Numbers4:23 Babale ng’otandikira ku basajja ab’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano, abayinza okuyingira mu buweereza obw’okukola emirimu egya Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers4:24 “Gino gye mirimu eginaakolebwanga ab’omu mpya z’Abagerusoni mu kuweereza era ne mu kwetikka emigugu: 
Numbers4:25 Baneetikkanga entimbe ez’omu Weema ya Mukama, y’Eweema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu n’ebigibikkako, n’amaliba aga lukwata agabikkibwa kungulu kwayo, n’entimbe ez’omu mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Numbers4:26 n’entimbe ez’omu luggya olwebungulula Weema ya Mukama n’ekyoto, n’olutimbe lw’omulyango gw’oluggya, n’emiguwa, ne byonna ebinaakozesebwanga mu kuweereza okwo. Abagerusoni banaakolanga byonna ebineetaagibwanga okukola ku bintu ebyo." 
Numbers4:27 Mu kuweereza kwonna okw’Abagerusoni, oba mu kwetikka oba mu kukola emirimu egy’engeri endala, Alooni ne batabani be, be banaabalagiranga. Abagerusoni ojjanga kubakwasa obuvunaanyizibwa bwonna ku ebyo bye baneetikkanga." 
Numbers4:28 Obwo bwe buweereza bwa batabani ba Gerusoni nga bukwata ku Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Bye banaakolanga binaalabirirwanga Isamaali mutabani wa Alooni kabona. 
Numbers4:29 “Batabani ba Merali nabo babale ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe ziri. 
Numbers4:30 Babale ng’otandikira ku basajja ab’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano, abayinza okuyingira mu buweereza obw’okukola emirimu egya Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers4:31 Gino gye ginaabanga emirimu gyabwe egikwata ku Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu: Okusitula omudaala gwa Weema ya Mukama, n’embaawo zaayo, n’empagi n’ebibya mwe zituula," 
Numbers4:32 awamu n’empagi ezeebungulula oluggya n’ebibya byazo mwe zituula, n’enkondo z’eweema, n’emiguwa, ne byonna ebyetaagibwa okukozesebwa ku mirimu egyo. Buli musajja onoomutegeezanga amannya g’ebintu byennyini by’ajjanga okwetikka." 
Numbers4:33 Egyo gye ginaabanga emirimu gy’omu mpya z’abaana ba Merali nga bali mu buweereza bwabwe obwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga bakulemberwa Isamaali mutabani wa Alooni kabona.”" 
Numbers4:34 Awo Musa ne Alooni n’abakulembeze b’abantu ne babala batabani b’Abakokasi ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe zaali. 
Numbers4:35 Ne bababala nga batandikira ku basajja ab’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku myaka amakumi ataano, abajja okuweereza mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Numbers4:36 nga bababala ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali; baawera enkumi bbiri mu lusanvu mu amakumi ataano (2,750)." 
Numbers4:37 Ogwo gwe gwali omuwendo gwonna ogw’abo abaali mu mpya z’Abakokasi abaaweerezanga mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Musa ne Alooni baababala nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers4:38 Batabani ba Gerusoni nabo baabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe zaali. 
Numbers4:39 Abasajja bonna okuva ku b’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano abaaweerezanga mu mirimu egy’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Numbers4:40 baabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe zaali, ne bawera enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga mu amakumi asatu (2,630)." 
Numbers4:41 Ogwo gwe gwali omuwendo gwonna ogwa batabani ba Gerusoni abaali mu mpya za Abagerusoni abaaweerezanga mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Musa ne Alooni baababala nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers4:42 Batabani ba Merali baabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe n’ennyumba z’abakadde baabwe bwe zaali. 
Numbers4:43 Abasajja bonna okuva ku b’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano abajja okuweereza mu mirimu gy’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Numbers4:44 abaabalibwa ng’empya zaabwe bwe zaali baali bawera enkumi ssatu mu ebikumi bibiri (3,200)." 
Numbers4:45 Ogwo gwe gwali omuwendo gwonna ogwabalibwa ogw’omu mpya za batabani ba Merali. Musa ne Alooni baababala nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers4:46 Bwe batyo Musa ne Alooni n’abakulembeze ba Isirayiri ne babala Abaleevi bonna mu mpya zaabwe ne mu nnyumba z’abakadde baabwe. 
Numbers4:47 Abasajja bonna okuva ku b’emyaka amakumi asatu egy’obukulu okutuuka ku b’emyaka amakumi ataano abajja okuweereza mu mirimu egy’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu," 
Numbers4:48 abaabalibwa baawera kanaana mu ebikumi bitaano mu kinaana (8,580)." 
Numbers4:49 Buli musajja yaweebwa omulimu ogw’okukola n’ategeezebwa ky’aneetikka, nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. Bwe batyo bonna ne babalibwa nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers5:2 “Lagira abaana ba Isirayiri buli mugenge bamufulumye ebweru w’olusiisira, na buli alina ekikulukuto ky’omusaayi, n’oyo anaabanga akutte ku mufu." 
Numbers5:3 Abasajja n’abakazi bonna babafulumyenga ebweru w’olusiisira baleme okulufuula olutali lulongoofu, kubanga omwo mwe mbeera.”" 
Numbers5:4 Awo abaana ba Isirayiri ne bakolanga bwe batyo ne babafulumyanga ebweru w’olusiisira. Ne bakola nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers5:5 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers5:6 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, ‘Omuntu yenna omusajja oba omukazi bw’anaasobyanga eri munne mu ngeri yonna, bw’atyo anaabanga asobezza eri Mukama Katonda, omuntu oyo anaabangako omusango," 
Numbers5:7 era asaana ayatule ekibi ekyo ky’anaabanga akoze. Anaaliwanga mu bujjuvu olw’ekibi ekyo ky’anaabanga akoze, n’agattako n’ekitundu ekimu ekyokutaano eky’ebyo by’anaabanga aliye, byonna anaabiwanga oyo gw’anaabanga azizzaako omusango." 
Numbers5:8 Naye singa omuntu oyo azzibbwako omusango taabengawo na waaluganda lwa kumpi, eby’okuliwa ebyo binaabanga bya Mukama Katonda era n’endiga ennume ey’okutangiririra oyo eyazza omusango, binaaweebwanga kabona." 
Numbers5:9 Era ebirabo byonna ebitukuvu abaana ba Isirayiri bye banaaleetanga eri kabona binaabanga bya kabona oyo. 
Numbers5:10 Ekirabo kya buli muntu ekitukuvu kinaabanga kikye, naye ekyo ky’anaaleeteranga kabona kinaabanga kya kabona.’ ”" 
Numbers5:11 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers5:12 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, Muka omusajja yenna bw’anaakyamanga n’akola ebitali bya bwesigwa eri bba" 
Numbers5:13 ne yeebaka n’omusajja omulala nga bba tategedde, omusajja oyo n’amusobyako, ekikolwa ekyo ne kitamanyibwa, kubanga tewali mujulizi akirabye era nga tebabakutte nga bakikola;" 
Numbers5:14 singa omusajja akwatibwa ebbuba n’ateebereza nti osanga mukazi we baamusobezzaako, oba ebbuba ne limukwata newaakubadde nga mukazi we tebaamusobezzaako," 
Numbers5:15 kale anaaleetanga mukazi we eri kabona. Anaaleetanga n’ekyokuwaayo ku lwa mukazi we ekitundu kimu eky’ekkumi ekya efa eky’obuwunga bw’emmere eyitibwa sayiri. Obuwunga obwo taabufukengako mafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni wadde okubussaamu ebyakawoowo, kubanga bwe buwunga obuweereddwayo ku nsonga y’ebbuba, nga kye kiweebwayo eky’okujjukiza nti waliwo omusango ogwazzibwa." 
Numbers5:16 “Kabona anaasembezanga omukazi oyo n’amuleeta n’amuyimiriza mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda. 
Numbers5:17 Anaddiranga amazzi amatukuvu nga gali mu kijaagi eky’ebbumba n’ateeka mu mazzi ago enfuufu gy’anaggyanga wansi mu Weema. 
Numbers5:18 Kabona bw’anaamalanga okuyimiriza omukazi oyo mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda, anaamusumululanga enviiri ze n’azita ne zikka, n’amukwasa ekiweebwayo eky’okujjukiza eky’emmere y’empeke ekiweereddwayo olw’obuggya, ye kabona ng’akutte amazzi agakaawa agaleeta ekikolimo." 
Numbers5:19 Kabona anaalayizanga omukazi oyo n’amugamba bw’ati nti, ‘Obanga tewali musajja yenna eyeebase naawe mu kyama n’ofuuka atali mulongoofu songa oli mu bufumbo ewa balo, amazzi agakaawa gano agaleeta ekikolimo tegaakukole kabi.’" 
Numbers5:20 Naye bw’onoowabanga ne weebaka n’omusajja atali balo, bw’otyo ne weeyonoonyesa," 
Numbers5:21 wano kabona anaalayizanga omukazi ekirayiro eky’ekikolimo n’amugamba nti, ‘ Mukama Katonda aleetere abantu bo okukukolimira n’okukuboola bw’anaakoozimbyanga ekisambi kyo n’olubuto lwo n’aluleetera entumbi ne luzimba." 
Numbers5:22 Amazzi gano agaleeta ekikolimo gayingirenga mu mubiri gwo gazimbye olubuto lwo era n’ekisambi kyo kikoozimbe.’  “Omukazi anaddangamu nti, ‘Amiina, Amiina.’" 
Numbers5:23 “ ‘Kabona anaawandiikanga ebikolimo ebyo ku muzingo n’abyozaako mu mazzi agakaawa. 
Numbers5:24 Anaanywesanga omukazi amazzi agakaawa agaleeta ekikolimo, era amazzi ago ganaayingiranga mu mukazi oyo ne gamuleetera obulumi n’okubonaabona mu mubiri." 
Numbers5:25 Awo kabona anaggyangako omukazi oyo ekiweebwayo eky’empeke olw’obuggya, anaawuubanga ekiweebwayo ekyo eky’empeke mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda, n’akireeta ku kyoto." 
Numbers5:26 Kabona anaddiranga olubatu lw’obuwunga obw’ekiweebwayo ng’ekiweebwayo olw’okujjukira n’akyokya ku kyoto; ebyo nga biwedde anaanywesanga omukazi amazzi gali. 
Numbers5:27 Bw’anaamalanga okumunywesa amazzi ago, kale bw’anaabanga yeeyonoonyesezza nga tabadde mwesigwa eri bba, amazzi ago agaleeta ekikolimo ganaayingiranga mu mubiri gw’omukazi oyo ne gamuleetera obulumi obubalagala; olubuto lwe lunaazimbulukukanga n’ekisambi kye ne kikoozimba, era anaafuukanga omukolimire mu bantu b’ewaabwe." 
Numbers5:28 Naye omukazi oyo bw’anaabanga teyeeyonoonyesa nga mulongoofu, kale taabeerengako musango, era anaabanga wa ddembe okuzaala abaana.’" 
Numbers5:29 “ ‘Eryo lye tteeka ery’obuggya, omukazi bw’anaakyamanga ne yeeyonoona songa mufumbo aliko bba," 
Numbers5:30 oba omusajja bw’anaayingirangamu omwoyo ogw’ebbuba, n’akwatirwa mukazi we obuggya; kale anaaleetanga mukazi we oyo eri Mukama Katonda, kabona n’alyoka assa etteeka eryo mu nkola ku mukazi oyo." 
Numbers5:31 Balo taabengako kyonoono ku nsonga ezo wabula mukazi we y’anaabangako omusango olw’okwonoona kwe.’ ” 
Numbers6:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers6:2 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, Omusajja oba omukazi bw’anaabanga ayagala okukola obweyamo obw’enjawulo obutali bwa bulijjo ne yeetukuza ne yeeyawula eri Mukama ng’Omunazaalayiti," 
Numbers6:3 anaateekwanga obutanywa nvinnyo n’ekyokunywa ekirala kyonna ekitamiiza, era taanywenga nvinnyo wadde ekitamiiza ekirala kyonna ekikaatuuse. Era taalyenga ku bibala bya mizabbibu wadde ensigo zaabyo." 
Numbers6:4 Ebbanga lyonna ly’anaamalanga nga Munnazaalayiti taalyenga ku kintu kyonna ekiva mu mizabbibu newaakubadde ensigo wadde ebikuta. 
Numbers6:5 “Ebbanga lyonna ly’anaamalanga ng’ali mu bweyamo bwe obwo, kkirita teyitenga ku mutwe gwe. Anaabanga mutukuvu eri Mukama Katonda okutuusa ekiseera kye eky’okweyawula nga kiweddeko; era enviiri ez’oku mutwe gwe anaazirekanga ne zikula ne ziwanvuwa." 
Numbers6:6 Ebbanga lyonna ly’anaamalanga mu bweyamo bwe obwo eri Mukama Katonda, taasembererenga muntu afudde." 
Numbers6:7 Newaakubadde kitaawe, oba nnyina, oba muganda we oba mwannyina nga kwe kuli afudde, taabasembererenga alemenga okufuuka atali mulongoofu, kubanga akabonero ak’obweyamo obw’okweyawula eri Mukama kanaabanga kali ku mutwe gwe." 
Numbers6:8 Okumala ebbanga lyonna ery’obweyamo bwe obw’okweyawula, anaabanga mutukuvu eri Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers6:9 “Omuntu bw’anaafanga ekikutuko ng’aliraanye omuwonge oyo, bw’atyo n’afuula enviiri ze okuba ezitali nnongoofu, kale, anaamwanga omutwe gwe ku lunaku olw’okwerongoosa, lwe lunaku olw’omusanvu." 
Numbers6:10 Ku lunaku olw’omunaana anaaleetanga amayiba abiri oba enjiibwa ento bbiri eri kabona ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Numbers6:11 Kabona anaawangayo ekimu ku ebyo ng’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi, n’ekyokubiri ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa olw’okumutangiririra kubanga yali ayonoonye bwe yaliraana omuntu afudde. Ku lunaku olwo lwe lumu, kw’anaatukulizangako omutwe gwe." 
Numbers6:12 Aneewangayo eri Mukama Katonda okumala ebbanga lyonna ery’obweyamo bwe obw’okweyawula, era anaaleetanga omwana gw’endiga omulume n’aguwaayo ng’ekiweebwayo olw’okusingibwa omusango. Ennaku ezaasooka teziibalibwenga kubanga yafuuka atali mulongoofu mu bbanga ery’obweyamo bwe obw’okweyawula." 
Numbers6:13 “Lino ly’etteeka erinaakwatanga ku Munnazaalayiti ebbanga lye ery’obweyamo obw’okweyawula bwe linaggwangako. Anaaleetebwanga ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Numbers6:14 Anaawangayo ebirabo bye eby’ebiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda, bye bino: omwana gw’endiga omulume ogw’omwaka ogumu ogw’obukulu ogutaliiko kamogo nga gwe gw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa; n’omwana gw’endiga omuluusi ogutaliiko kamogo nga gwe gw’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi; n’endiga ennume etaliiko kamogo nga ye y’ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe;" 
Numbers6:15 n’ekibbo ky’emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse; ne kkeeke ezikoleddwa mu buwunga obulungi obutabuddwamu n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni agafumba; n’obusukuuti obw’oluwewere obutali buzimbulukuse obusiigiddwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni, n’ebiweebwayo eby’emmere y’empeke n’ebiweebwayo eby’ebyokunywa." 
Numbers6:16 “Kabona anaabireetanga awali Mukama Katonda, n’awaayo ekiweebwayo kye olw’ekibi n’ekiweebwayo kye ekyokebwa." 
Numbers6:17 Anaawangayo endiga ennume nga ssaddaaka ey’ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe eri Mukama Katonda awamu n’ekibbo ky’emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse; era kabona anaawangayo ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke n’ekiweebwayo eky’ebyokunywa. 
Numbers6:18 “Omunnazaalayiti anaamweranga omutwe gwe ogw’obuwonge bwe ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu; anaddiranga enviiri ezivudde ku mutwe ogw’obuwonge bwe n’azissa ku muliro oguli wansi wa ssaddaaka ey’ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe. 
Numbers6:19 “Omunnazaalayiti bw’anaamalanga okumwa omutwe gwe ogw’obuwonge bwe, kabona anaddiranga omukono gw’endiga omufumbe, n’aggya ne kkeeke etali nzimbulukuse emu mu kibbo, n’akasukuuti ak’oluwewere akatali kazimbulukuse kamu, n’abimukwasa mu ngalo ze." 
Numbers6:20 Kabona anaabiwuubanga nga kye kiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda. Binaabanga bitukuvu era nga bya kabona awamu n’ekifuba ekiwuubibwa n’ekisambi ekinaaweebwangayo. Ebyo bwe binaggwanga, Omunnazaalayiti anaayinzanga okunywa envinnyo." 
Numbers6:21 “Eryo lye tteeka ery’Omunnazaalayiti aneeyamanga okwewaayo eri Mukama Katonda ng’obweyamo bwe obw’okweyawula bwe bunaabanga, ng’agasseeko n’ebirala nga bw’anaasobolanga. Anaateekwanga okutuukiriza obweyamo bwe bwanaabanga akoze, ng’etteeka ly’Omunnazaalayiti bwe liragira.”" 
Numbers6:22 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers6:23 “Tegeeza Alooni ne batabani be nti, Bwe muti bwe munaasabiranga abaana ba Isirayiri omukisa: munaabagambanga nti:" 
Numbers6:24 “ ‘ Mukama Katonda akuwe omukisa, akukuume;" 
Numbers6:25 Mukama Katonda akwakize amaaso ge akukwatirwe ekisa; 
Numbers6:26 Mukama Katonda akwolekeze amaaso ge akuwe emirembe.’ 
Numbers6:27 “Bwe batyo banaateekanga erinnya lyange ku baana ba Isirayiri, nange naabawanga omukisa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Awo olwatuuka ku lunaku olwo, Musa bwe yamala okusimba Weema ya Mukama, n’agifukako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni n’agitukuza ne byonna ebikozesebwa mu yo, era n’afuka amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ku kyoto n’akitukuza n’ebintu byakyo byonna." 
Numbers7:2 Abakulembeze ba Isirayiri, abakulu b’empya za bakitaabwe era nga be bakulembeze b’ebika abaalina obuvunaanyizibwa eri abaabalibwa, ne baleeta ebiweebwayo byabwe." 
Numbers7:3 Baaleeta ebirabo byabwe eby’ebiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda, amagaali agabikkiddwako mukaaga n’ente kkumi na bbiri, nga buli mukulembeze aleeta ente emu, na buli bakulembeze babiri nga baleeta eggaali emu. Ebyo byonna ne babiweerayo mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama." 
Numbers7:4 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers7:5 “Bye baleese bibaggyeeko, binaakozesebwanga ku mirimu gy’omu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. Bikwase Abaleevi, nga buli mulimu gwa buli omu bwe gwetaagisa.”" 
Numbers7:6 Bw’atyo Musa n’addira amagaali n’ente n’abiwa Abaleevi. 
Numbers7:7 Amagaali abiri n’ente nnya yaziwa batabani ba Gerusoni, ng’emirimu gyabwe bwe gyali," 
Numbers7:8 n’addira amagaali ana n’ente munaana n’abiwa batabani ba Merali, ng’emirimu gyabwe bwe gyali; bonna nga bakulemberwa Isamaali mutabani wa Alooni, kabona." 
Numbers7:9 Naye abaana ba Kokasi, Musa teyabawaako, kubanga ebintu ebitukuvu bye baalinako obuvunaanyizibwa baabitwaliranga ku bibegabega byabwe." 
Numbers7:10 Bwe batyo abakulembeze ne bawaayo ebiweebwayo mu maaso g’ekyoto olw’okukitukuza, ku lunaku lwe kyafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Numbers7:11 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Buli lunaku omukulembeze omu anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo kye olw’okutukuza ekyoto.”" 
Numbers7:12 Eyaleeta ekiweebwayo kye ku lunaku olusooka yali Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadaabu ow’omu kika kya Yuda. 
Numbers7:13 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza, ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza eky’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, byombi, essowaani n’ekibya, nga bipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabuddwamu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:14 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:15 ente ya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu oguwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:16 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:17 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadaabu." 
Numbers7:18 Ku lunaku olwokubiri Nesaneri mutabani wa Zuwaali, omukulembeze wa Isakaali, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:19 Ekirabo kye yaleeta yali sowaani eya ffeeza ng’epima obuzito bwa kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabuddwamu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:20 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:21 ente ya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu oguwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:22 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:23 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Nesaneri mutabani wa Zuwaali." 
Numbers7:24 Ku lunaku olwokusatu Eriyaabu mutabani wa Keroni, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Zebbulooni, yaleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:25 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:26 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:27 ente eya sseddume emu nga nvubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:28 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:29 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Eriyaabu mutabani wa Keroni." 
Numbers7:30 Ku lunaku olwokuna Erizuuli mutabani wa Sedewuli, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Lewubeeni, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:31 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri, byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:32 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu, ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:33 ente eya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:34 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:35 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Erizuuli mutabani wa Sedewuli." 
Numbers7:36 Ku lunaku olwokutaano Serumiyeeri mutabani wa Zulisadaayi, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Simyoni, yaleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:37 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri, byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:38 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu, ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:39 ente eya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:40 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:41 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Serumiyeeri mutabani wa Zulisadaayi." 
Numbers7:42 Ku lunaku olw’omukaaga Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Deweri, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Gaadi, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:43 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri, byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:44 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:45 ente eya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:46 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:47 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Deweri." 
Numbers7:48 Ku lunaku olw’omusanvu Erisaama mutabani wa Ammikudi, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Efulayimu, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:49 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya kya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri, byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:50 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu, ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:51 ente eya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:52 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:53 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Erisaama mutabani wa Ammikudi." 
Numbers7:54 Ku lunaku olw’omunaana Gamalyeri mutabani wa Pedazuuli, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Manase, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:55 Ekiweebwayo kye yali esowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri, byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:56 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu, ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:57 ente eya sseddume emu envubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:58 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:59 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Gamalyeri mutabani wa Pedazuuli." 
Numbers7:60 Ku lunaku olw’omwenda Abidani mutabani wa Gidyoni, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Benyamini, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:61 Ekiweebwayo kye yali sowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:62 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:63 ente eya sseddume emu nga nvubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:64 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:65 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Abidaani mutabani wa Gidyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ku lunaku olw’ekkumi Akiyezeeri mutabani wa Amisadaayi, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Ddaani, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:67 Ekiweebwayo kye yali essowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:68 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:69 ente eya sseddume emu nga nvubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:70 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:71 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Akiyezeeri mutabani wa Amisadaayi." 
Numbers7:72 Ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’olumu Pagiyeeri mutabani wa Okulaani, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Aseri, n’aleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:73 Ekiweebwayo kye yali essowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:74 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi, nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa;" 
Numbers7:75 ente eya sseddume emu nga nvubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:76 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:77 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Pagiyeeri mutabani wa Ekulaani." 
Numbers7:78 Ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ebbiri Akira mutabani wa Enani, omukulembeze w’abantu ba Nafutaali, yaleeta ekiweebwayo kye." 
Numbers7:79 Ekiweebwayo kye yali essowaani emu eya ffeeza ng’obuzito epima kilo emu n’ekitundu, n’ekibya ekya ffeeza omubeera eby’okumansira ng’obuzito bwakyo bwali obutundu bwa kilo, munaana, nga buli kimu kipimibwa ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri; byombi nga bijjuziddwa obuwunga obulungi obutabulemu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni obw’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke;" 
Numbers7:80 n’ekijiiko ekinene ekya zaabu kimu ng’obuzito kipima gulaamu kikumi mu kkumi nga kijjudde ebyakaloosa; 
Numbers7:81 ente eya sseddume emu nga nvubuka, endiga ennume emu, n’omwana gw’endiga omulume gumu nga guwezezza omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu, olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa;" 
Numbers7:82 embuzi ennume emu nga ya kiweebwayo olw’ekibi; 
Numbers7:83 era olwa ssaddaaka ey’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe: ente bbiri, endiga ennume ttaano, embuzi ennume ttaano, n’abaana b’endiga abalume bataano abawezezza omwaka gumu gumu ogw’obukulu. Ekyo kye kyali ekiweebwayo eri Mukama ekya Akira mutabani wa Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Bino bye biweebwayo abakulembeze ba Isirayiri bye baaleeta olw’okutukuza ekyoto ku lunaku lwe kyafukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni: essowaani eza ffeeza kkumi na bbiri, ebibya omubeera eby’okumansira kkumi na bibiri, n’ebijiiko ebinene ebya zaabu kkumi na bibiri." 
Numbers7:85 Buli sowaani eya ffeeza ng’epima obuzito bwa kilo emu n’ekitundu, na buli kibya omubeera eby’okumansira nga kipima obuzito bwa butundu bwa kilo, munaana. Okugatta awamu obuzito bw’essowaani ezo zonna n’obw’ebibya ebyo byonna bwali bupima kilo amakumi abiri mu munaana ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe byali." 
Numbers7:86 Ebijiiko ebya zaabu ebinene ekkumi n’ebibiri ebyali bijjudde ebyakaloosa buli kimu, byali bipima obuzito kilo kikumi mu kkumi na musanvu, ng’ebipimo by’awatukuvu bwe biri. Okugatta awamu ebijiiko byonna byapima obuzito bwa kilo emu ne desimoolo nnya." 
Numbers7:87 Omuwendo gwonna ogw’ebisolo ebyaweebwayo olw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa gwali bwe guti: ente ento ennume kkumi na bbiri, endiga ennume kkumi na bbiri, abaana b’endiga abato abalume ab’omwaka ogw’obukulu gumu baali kkumi na babiri, awamu n’ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke n’ebigenderako. Embuzi ennume kkumi na bbiri ze zaakozesebwa olw’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi." 
Numbers7:88 Omuwendo gwonna ogw’ebisolo ebyaweebwayo olwa ssaddaaka y’ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe gwali bwe guti: ente ennume amakumi abiri mu nnya, endiga ennume nkaaga, embuzi ennume nkaaga n’abaana b’endiga abato abalume ab’omwaka ogw’obukulu ogumu ogumu nabo nkaaga. Ebyo bye byali ebiweebwayo olw’okutukuza ekyoto nga kimaze okufukibwako amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Numbers7:89 Awo Musa bwe yayingira mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu okwogera ne Mukama, n’awulira eddoboozi nga lyogera gy’ali nga liva wakati wa bakerubbi ababiri abali waggulu w’entebe ey’okusaasira eri ku Ssanduuko ey’Endagaano. Ne lyogera naye." 
Numbers8:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers8:2 “Yogera ne Alooni omugambe nti, ‘Bw’oba oteekateeka ettaala omusanvu, zisaana zaake nga zimulisa ebbanga eryo eriri mu maaso g’ekikondo ky’ettaala.’ ”" 
Numbers8:3 Alooni n’akola bw’atyo; n’akoleeza ettaala ne zaaka nga zimulisa ebbanga eryali mu maaso g’ekikondo ky’ettaala, nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Ekikondo ky’ettaala kyakolebwa mu ngeri eno: kyaweesebwa mu zaabu okuva ku ntobo yaakyo okutuuka ku bimuli byakyo. Ekikondo ky’ettaala kyakolebwa ng’ekifaananyi ekyokulabirako Mukama Katonda kye yalaga Musa bwe kyali. 
Numbers8:5 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers8:6 “Ggyamu Abaleevi mu baana ba Isirayiri, obafuule balongoofu." 
Numbers8:7 Okubafuula abalongoofu ojja kukola bw’oti: bamansireko amazzi ag’obulongoofu, obalagire bamwe omubiri gwabwe gwonna, era booze n’engoye zaabwe, bwe batyo bafuuke abalongoofu." 
Numbers8:8 Balagire baweeyo ente ya sseddume ento n’ekiweebwayo ekigenderako eky’obuwunga obulungi obutabuddwamu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni; n’oluvannyuma naawe oddire ente ya sseddume ento ogiweeyo olw’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi. 
Numbers8:9 Abaleevi obaleete mu maaso ga Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, era okuŋŋaanyize awo ekibiina ky’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna." 
Numbers8:10 Onooleeta Abaleevi mu maaso ga Mukama, era abaana ba Isirayiri bajja kussa emikono gyabwe ku Baleevi abo." 
Numbers8:11 Alooni ajja kuwaayo Abaleevi eri Mukama Katonda ng’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa ekivudde mu baana ba Isirayiri, bwe batyo babe nga beetegese okukola omulimu gwa Mukama." 
Numbers8:12 “Abaleevi banassa emikono gyabwe ku mitwe gy’ente zisseddume zombi; emu onoogiwaayo ng’ekiweebwayo olw’ekibi, n’endala ng’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa eri Mukama Katonda, okutangiririra Abaleevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ojja kuyimiriza Abaleevi mu maaso ga Alooni ne batabani be, olyoke obaweeyo eri Mukama Katonda ng’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa." 
Numbers8:14 “Bw’otyo bw’onooyawula Abaleevi okuva mu baana ba Isirayiri, era Abaleevi banaabanga bange." 
Numbers8:15 “Ebyo nga biwedde Abaleevi banaayingiranga mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu ne baweereza, ng’omaze okubafuula abalongoofu era ng’obawaddeyo ng’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa." 
Numbers8:16 Kubanga bampeereddwa ddala nga bava mu baana ba Isirayiri. Mbeetwalidde nga be bange ddala mu kifo ky’ababereberye, eky’abaana aboobulenzi ababereberye abazaalibwa buli mukazi Omuyisirayiri." 
Numbers8:17 Buli ekizaalibwa kyonna mu Isirayiri ekisajja nga kibereberye, oba muntu oba nsolo, kyange. Bwe nazikiriza ebibereberye byonna eby’omu nsi y’e Misiri, ebya Isirayiri nabyeyawulirako ne biba byange." 
Numbers8:18 Kaakano ntutte Abaleevi mu kifo ky’ababereberye mu baana ba Isirayiri. 
Numbers8:19 Nzigye Abaleevi mu baana ba Isirayiri ne mbagabira Alooni ne batabani be ng’ekirabo, bakolererenga abaana ba Isirayiri nga baweereza mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu nga batangiririra abaana ba Isirayiri balemenga kulumbibwa kawumpuli nga babadde basemberedde awatukuvu.”" 
Numbers8:20 Bwe batyo Musa ne Alooni n’ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri ne bakola ku Baleevi ebyo byonna nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers8:21 Abaleevi ne bayoza engoye zaabwe, ne Alooni n’abawaayo ng’ekiweebwayo ekiwuubibwa eri Mukama Katonda, n’abatangiririra okubafuula abalongoofu." 
Numbers8:22 Ebyo bwe byaggwa Abaleevi ne bajja okukola omulimu gwabwe nga baweereza mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, nga balabirirwa Alooni ne batabani be. Baakola byonna ku Baleevi nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers8:23 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers8:24 “Bino bye bikwata ku Baleevi: Abasajja ab’emyaka amakumi abiri mu etaano egy’obukulu n’okusingawo, banajjanga ne batandika emirimu gyabwe mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu;" 
Numbers8:25 naye bwe banaawezanga emyaka egy’obukulu amakumi ataano banaawummuliranga ddala ne bava ku mirimu emitongole egya bulijjo ne bateeyongera kuweereza. 
Numbers8:26 Naye banaayinzanga okudduukirirako ku booluganda abanaabanga bakola emirimu egyo mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, naye bo ku lwabwe tebaakolenga mirimu egyo mu butongole. Bw’otyo bw’onootegekanga emirimu gy’Abaleevi.”" 
Numbers9:1 Awo Mukama n’ayogera ne Musa mu Ddungu lya Sinaayi mu mwezi ogw’olubereberye ogw’omwaka ogwokubiri kasookedde bava mu nsi y’e Misiri. N’amugamba nti," 
Numbers9:2 “Lagira abaana ba Isirayiri bakwatenga Embaga ey’Okuyitako mu ntuuko zaayo nga bwe kyalagirwa. 
Numbers9:3 Mugikwatanga mu ntuuko zaayo ezaalagirwa ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ennya olw’omwezi guno nga buwungeera, ng’amateeka n’ebiragiro byako bwe bigamba.”" 
Numbers9:4 Bw’atyo Musa n’agamba abaana ba Isirayiri okukwata Embaga ey’Okuyitako; 
Numbers9:5 era ne bakola bwe batyo mu Ddungu lya Sinaayi ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ennya olw’omwezi ogw’olubereberye nga buwungeera. Abaana ba Isirayiri baakola ebyo byonna nga Mukama bwe yalagira Musa. 
Numbers9:6 Naye waaliwo abantu abamu abataasobola kukwata Mbaga ey’Okuyitako ku lunaku olwo, kubanga tebaali balongoofu olwokubanga baali bakutte ku mufu. Bwe batyo ne bajja eri Musa ne Alooni ku lunaku olwo lwennyini," 
Numbers9:7 ne bagamba Musa nti, “Tetuli balongoofu kubanga twakutte ku mufu; lwaki tugaanibwa okuleetera Mukama ekiweebwayo kye, awamu n’abaana ba Isirayiri, mu ntuuko zaakyo ezaalagirwa?”" 
Numbers9:8 Musa n’abaddamu nti, “Mulinde mmale okumanya Mukama Katonda ky’anandagira ku nsonga yammwe.”" 
Numbers9:9 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers9:10 “Yogera eri abaana ba Isirayiri obagambe nti, ‘Omu ku mmwe, oba omu ku bazzukulu bammwe ab’omu mirembe egiriddawo, singa afuuka atali mulongoofu olw’okukwata ku mufu, oba nga taliiwo yagenda olugendo olw’ewala, anaakwatanga Embaga ey’Okuyitako eya Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers9:11 Banaakwatanga embaga eyo ku lunaku olw’ekkumi n’ennya mu mwezi ogwokubiri akawungeezi. Omwana gw’endiga banaagulyanga n’omugaati ogutali muzimbulukuse n’enva ez’ebikoola ebikaawa. 
Numbers9:12 Tebagulekangawo okutuusa enkeera, wadde okumenya ku magumba gaagwo. Bwe banaakwatanga Embaga ey’Okuyitako kinaabasaaniranga okukola ng’amateeka g’embaga eyo bwe galagira." 
Numbers9:13 Naye omuntu omulongoofu ate nga teyagenda lugendo, kyokka n’atakwata Mbaga ey’Okuyitako, anaawaŋŋangusibwanga n’ava mu banne, kubanga teyaleeta kiweebwayo kya Mukama Katonda mu ntuuko zaakyo. Ekibi ky’omuntu oyo kinaabeeranga ku mutwe gwe." 
Numbers9:14 “ ‘Omunnaggwanga anaabeeranga mu mmwe bw’anaabanga ayagala okukwata Embaga ey’Okuyitako kwa Mukama Katonda anaagikwatanga ng’agoberera amateeka n’ebiragiro byayo. Munaabanga n’ebiragiro byebimu ebinaagobererwanga bannaggwanga era ne bannansi.’ ” 
Numbers9:15 Ku lunaku Weema ya Mukama ey’Endagaano lwe yasimbibwa, ekire ne kigibikka. Okuva akawungeezi okutuusa ku makya ekire ekyali waggulu wa Weema ne kifaanana ng’omuliro." 
Numbers9:16 Bwe kityo bwe kyabeeranga; ekire kyagibikkanga emisana naye ekiro ne kifaanana ng’omuliro. 
Numbers9:17 Era ekire buli lwe kyaggyibwanga ku Weema, olwo abaana ba Isirayiri ne basitula mu lugendo lwabwe; era awo ekire ekyo we kyayimiriranga, nga n’abaana ba Isirayiri we basiisira." 
Numbers9:18 Mukama bwe yalagiranga abaana ba Isirayiri okusitula mu lugendo lwabwe, nga basitula; Mukama bwe yabalagiranga okukuba olusiisira nga bakola bwe batyo. Ebbanga lyonna ekire lye kyamalanga waggulu wa Weema nga nabo lye bamala mu lusiisira lwabwe." 
Numbers9:19 Ekire ne bwe kyamalanga ennaku ennyingi waggulu wa Weema, abaana ba Isirayiri baagonderanga ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda ne batasitula kutambula." 
Numbers9:20 Oluusi ekire kyamalanga ennaku ntono waggulu wa Weema; naye ng’ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda bwe kyali, nga basigala mu lusiisira lwabwe; kyokka oluvannyuma nga basitula okutambula ng’ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda bwe kyabanga." 
Numbers9:21 Oluusi ekire kyabeerangawo okuva akawungeezi okutuusa mu makya; naye ekire bwe kyaggyibwangawo mu makya, ng’olwo basitula okutambula; oba bwe kyasigalangawo olunaku n’ekiro kyonna oluvannyuma ne kiggyibwawo, ng’olwo basitula okutambula." 
Numbers9:22 Ekire ne bwe kyabeeranga waggulu wa Weema okumala ennaku ebbiri oba omwezi, abaana ba Isirayiri nga babeera awo mu lusiisira lwabwe nga tebasitula kutambula; naye bwe kyaggyibwangawo ng’olwo basitula okutambula." 
Numbers9:23 Mukama bwe yabalagiranga okusigala, nga basigala mu lusiisira lwabwe nga bawummudde, ate Mukama bwe yabalagiranga okutambula, nga basitula okutambula. Baagonderanga ekiragiro kya Mukama nga bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers10:2 “Weesa mu ffeeza amakondeere abiri ogakozesenga okuyitanga abantu bonna okukuŋŋaana, era n’okubalagira okuggyawo ensiisira zaabwe." 
Numbers10:3 Amakondeere gombi bwe ganaafuuyibwanga, ekibiina ky’abantu bonna banaakuŋŋaaniranga w’oli ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers10:4 Naye bwe banaafuuwangako erimu, olwo abakulembeze, be bakulu b’ebika bya Isirayiri, be banaakuŋŋaaniranga w’oli." 
Numbers10:5 Amakondeere ag’omwanguka bwe ganaafuuyibwanga, ebika ebinaabanga bisiisidde ku luuyi olw’ebuvanjuba binaasitulanga okutambula." 
Numbers10:6 Ate bwe banaafuuwanga ag’omwanguka omulundi ogwokubiri, ensiisira ezinaabanga mu bukiikaddyo, zinaasitulanga okutambula. Amakondeere ag’omwanguka ke kanaabanga akabonero akanaabategeezanga nti basitule batambule." 
Numbers10:7 Naye bwe kineetaagisanga okukuba olukuŋŋaana, onoofuuwanga amakondeere naye tegaabenga ga mwanguka." 
Numbers10:8 “Abaana ba Alooni, bakabona, be banaafuuwanga amakondeere. Lino linaabanga tteeka ery’enkalakkalira mu mmwe ne mu mirembe egigenda okujja." 
Numbers10:9 Bwe munaagendanga okutabaala omulabe abajoogerereza mu nsi yammwe, mufuuwanga amakondeere ag’omwanguka. Bwe mutyo munajjukirwanga Mukama Katonda, era anaabawonyanga abalabe bammwe." 
Numbers10:10 Mu biseera eby’essanyu, ne ku mbaga zammwe entongole ne ku mbaga z’omwezi ogwakaboneka, munaafuuwanga amakondeere nga bwe muwaayo ebiweebwayo byammwe ebyokebwa n’ebiweebwayo byammwe olw’emirembe, era binaabanga bijjukizo byammwe awali Mukama Katonda wammwe. Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Numbers10:11 Awo olwatuuka ku lunaku olw’amakumi abiri mu mwezi ogwokubiri mu mwaka ogwokubiri, ekire ne kisitulibwa okuva waggulu wa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers10:12 Abaana ba Isirayiri ne basitula ne batambula okuva mu Ddungu lya Sinaayi, oluvannyuma ekire ne kiyimirira mu Ddungu lya Palani." 
Numbers10:13 Ogwo gwe gwali omulundi omubereberye okusitula okutambula nga bagendera ku kiragiro kya Mukama Katonda kye yayisa mu Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Olusiisira lw’abaana ba Yuda lwe lwasooka okusitula okutambula, nga bakulemberwa ebendera yaabwe; Nakusoni mutabani wa Amminadaabu nga ye muduumizi waabwe." 
Numbers10:15 Nesaneri mutabani wa Zuwaali ye yaduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Isakaali," 
Numbers10:16 ne Eriyaabu mutabani wa Keroni n’aduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Zebbulooni. 
Numbers10:17 Eweema ya Mukama n’esimbulwa, batabani ba Gerusoni ne batabani ba Merali abaagyetikkanga ne basitula ne batambula." 
Numbers10:18 Ebibinja by’omu lusiisira lwa Lewubeeni bye byaddako okusitula okutambula awamu n’ebendera yaabyo, nga biduumirwa Erizuuli mutabani wa Sedewuli." 
Numbers10:19 Serumiyeeri mutabani wa Zulisadaayi ye yaduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Simyoni," 
Numbers10:20 ne Eriyasaafu mutabani wa Deweri n’aduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Gaadi. 
Numbers10:21 Abakokasi ne basitula okutambula nga beetisse ebintu ebitukuvu. Eweema ya Mukama ng’emala kusimbibwa, nabo ne balyoka batuuka." 
Numbers10:22 Ebibinja by’omu lusiisira lwa Efulayimu bye byaddirira okusitula okutambula awamu n’ebendera yaabyo; Erisaama mutabani wa Ammikudi nga ye muduumizi waabyo. 
Numbers10:23 Gamalyeri mutabani wa Pidazuuli ye yaduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Manase; 
Numbers10:24 ne Abidaani mutabani wa Gidyoni n’aduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Benyamini. 
Numbers10:25 Ku nkomerero ya byonna, ebibinja by’omu lusiisira lwa Ddaani, nga bye bikuuma emabega, ne bisitula okutambula n’ebendera yaabyo nga bikoobedde ensiisira zonna; Akiyezeeri mutabani wa Amisadaayi nga ye muduumizi waabyo." 
Numbers10:26 Pagiyeeri mutabani wa Okulaani ye yaduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Aseri; 
Numbers10:27 ne Akira mutabani wa Enani n’aduumira ekibinja ky’ekika kya Nafutaali. 
Numbers10:28 Eyo ye yali entegeka ey’abaana ba Isirayiri ng’ebibinja byabwe bwe byali nga basitula okutambula. 
Numbers10:29 Awo Musa n’agamba mukoddomi we Kobabu mutabani wa Leweri Omumidiyaani nti, “Tusitula okutambula okugenda mu kifo Mukama kye yatugamba nti, ‘Ndikibawa.’ Kale nno, jjangu tugende ffenna tulikuyisa bulungi, kubanga Mukama yasuubiza Isirayiri ebintu ebirungi.”" 
Numbers10:30 Naye n’addamu nti, “Nedda, sijja kugenda nammwe, nzirayo mu nsi ye waffe era mu bantu bange.”" 
Numbers10:31 Naye Musa n’amugamba nti, “Nkwegayiridde totuleka. Ggwe omanyi obulungi eddungu gye tusaanye okukuba olusiisira lwaffe, ggwe ojja okubeera amaaso gaffe." 
Numbers10:32 Singa ojja ne tugenda ffenna, tunaagabaniranga wamu buli kirungi kyonna Mukama ky’anaatuwanga.”" 
Numbers10:33 Awo ne basitula okuva ku lusozi lwa Mukama Katonda ne batambulira ennaku ssatu. Essanduuko ya Mukama ey’Endagaano n’ebakulemberanga okumala ennaku ezo essatu ng’ebanoonyeza ekifo eky’okuwummuliramu. 
Numbers10:34 Buli lwe baasitulanga okutambula nga bava mu lusiisira, ekire kya Mukama Katonda kyabeeranga waggulu waabwe buli budde bwa misana." 
Numbers10:35 Buli abeetissi b’Essanduuko ya Mukama Katonda lwe baasitulanga okutambula, Musa n’agamba nti, “Golokoka, Ayi Mukama! Abalabe bo basaasaane; amaggye agakulwanyisa gakudduke.”" 
Numbers10:36 Buli Ssanduuko ya Mukama Katonda lwe yawummuzibwanga, Musa n’agamba nti, “Komawo, Ayi Mukama, eri enkumi n’enkumi eza Isirayiri.”" 
Numbers11:1 Awo abantu ne beemulugunya olw’ebizibu byabwe nga ne Mukama awulira; bwe yabawulira obusungu bwe ne bubuubuuka. Omuliro ne guva eri Mukama ne gwakira mu bo, ne gwokya ebitundu ebimu ebyali bikomererayo eby’olusiisira lwabwe." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu ne bakaabirira Musa; Musa n’asaba Mukama, omuliro ne guzikira." 
Numbers11:3 Ekifo ekyo ne kituumibwa erinnya Tabera, kubanga omuliro ogwava eri Mukama gwabaakiramu." 
Numbers11:4 Abagwira abaali beetabudde mu baana ba Isirayiri ne baluluunkanira ebyokulya; n’abaana ba Isirayiri nabo ne bongera okukaaba nga bwe bagamba nti, “Singa nno tufuna ku nnyama ne tulyako!" 
Numbers11:5 Tukyajjukira ebyennyanja bye twalyanga mu Misiri nga tewali na kye tubisasulidde, ne wujju n’ensujju, n’enderema n’obutungulu ne katungulukyumu n’ebyokuliira." 
Numbers11:6 Naye kaakano n’okwoya emmere kutuweddemu, buli we tukuba eriiso tulaba mmaanu eno!”" 
Numbers11:7 Emmaanu yafaanananga ng’ensigo za koliyanda, nga n’ekifaananyi kyayo kiri ng’ekya bideriamu." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu baagendanga ne bagikuŋŋaanya ne bagiseera ku lubengo oba ne bagisekulira mu binu, ne bagifumba mu ntamu oba ne bakolamu bukeeke. Nga mu kamwa ebanga ekoleddwa n’amafuta ga zeyituuni." 
Numbers11:9 Omusulo bwe gwagwanga mu lusiisira ekiro n’emmaanu nayo n’egwa nagwo. 
Numbers11:10 Musa n’awulira abantu aba buli luggya nga bakaaba, buli omu ng’akaabira mu muzigo gw’eweema ye; obusungu bwa Mukama Katonda ne bubuubuuka nnyo, ne Musa n’asoberwa n’anyiikaala." 
Numbers11:11 Musa n’agamba Mukama Katonda nti, “Lwaki oleetedde omuddu wo obuzibu buno? Nkoze ki ekitakusanyusizza ne kikuleetera okwetikka omugugu gw’abantu bano bonna?" 
Numbers11:12 Nze nali olubuto omwali abantu bano bonna? Nze nabazaala? Lwaki oŋŋamba okubasitula mu mikono gyange ng’omulezi w’abaana bw’asitula omwana omuwere mbatwale mu nsi gye wabasuubiza ng’ogirayirira bajjajjaabwe? 
Numbers11:13 Ennyama abantu bano bonna gye banaalya nnaagiggya wa? Kubanga baneetayirira nga bankaabirira nti, ‘Tuwe ennyama tulye!’" 
Numbers11:14 Sisobola kusitula bantu bano bonna bw’omu kubanga obuzito bwabwe buyinza okummenya nga ndi nzekka. 
Numbers11:15 Obanga bw’otyo bw’ojja okumpisa, ate nga bulijjo ondaga ekisa kyo, kale nno nzitiraawo kaakano oleme kundeka ne neereetera okwezikiriza.”" 
Numbers11:16 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Nfunira abasajja nsanvu mu bakulu ba Isirayiri b’omanyi nga be bakulu b’abantu era nga be bakulembeze baabwe obaleete ku Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, bayimirire awo naawe." 
Numbers11:17 Nzija kukka awo njogere naawe; era nzija kutoola ku mwoyo oguli mu ggwe ngubateekemu, balyokenga bakusitulireko omugugu gw’abantu oleme kugwetikkanga wekka." 
Numbers11:18 “Abantu bagambe nti, ‘Mwetukuze nga mwetegekera olunaku lw’enkya, lwe mujja okulya ennyama. Kubanga Mukama Katonda yabawulira nga mumukaabirira bwe muti nti, “Singa tufunye ku nnyama ne tulyako! Bwe twali mu Misiri twali bulungi!” Noolwekyo Mukama ajja kubawa ennyama mugirye." 
Numbers11:19 Temugenda kugirya mu lunaku lumu, oba mu nnaku bbiri, oba mu nnaku ttaano, oba mu nnaku kkumi, oba nnaku abiri;" 
Numbers11:20 naye kumala mwezi mulambirira, okutuusa lw’erifulumira mu nnyindo zammwe n’ebanyiwa, kubanga mwesamudde Mukama Katonda abeera mu mmwe, ne mumukaabirira nga mugamba nti, “Mu Misiri twaviirayo ki?” ’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Musa n’agamba nti, “Abantu bano mwe ndi bawera omuwendo gwa mitwalo nkaaga abatambuza ebigere, naawe ogamba nti, ‘Nzija kubawa ennyama gye banaalya okumala omwezi mulamba!’" 
Numbers11:22 Ebisolo ebiri mu biraalo ne mu bisibo bwe binattibwa binaabamala? Nantiki ebyennyanja byonna eby’omu nnyanja bwe binaavubibwa ne bibaweebwa, binaabamala?”" 
Numbers11:23 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Omukono gwa Mukama Katonda guyimpawadde? Kaakano ojja kulaba obanga ekigambo kyange kye nkugambye kinaatuukirira oba tekiituukirire.”" 
Numbers11:24 Awo Musa n’afuluma n’ategeeza abantu ebigambo bya Mukama Katonda; n’akuŋŋaanya abasajja nsanvu mu bakulembeze b’abantu n’abayimiriza okumpi ne Weema ya Mukama. 
Numbers11:25 Awo Mukama Katonda n’akkira mu kire n’ayogera ne Musa, n’addira ku mwoyo ogwali mu Musa n’agussa mu bakulembeze ensanvu. Omwoyo bwe baagufuna ne batandika okutegeeza obunnabbi, kyokka tebaddayo nate kukikola." 
Numbers11:26 Waaliwo abasajja babiri nga bayitibwa Eridaadi ne Medadi, baali babaliddwa ku bakulembeze ensanvu, naye bo ne basigala mu lusiisira, ne batagenda ku Weema ya Mukama; nabo baafuna omwoyo, era ne bategeeza obunnabbi mu lusiisira." 
Numbers11:27 Omuvubuka n’adduka n’agenda ategeeza Musa nti, “Eridaadi ne Medadi bategeeza obunnabbi mu lusiisira.”" 
Numbers11:28 Awo Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni, omuweereza wa Musa gwe yali yeerondedde ng’akyali muvubuka n’agamba nti, “Mukama wange Musa, baziyize.”" 
Numbers11:29 Naye Musa n’amugamba nti, “Okwatiddwa obuggya ku lwange? Kyandibadde kirungi singa abantu ba Mukama bonna bannabbi, ne Mukama Katonda n’abawa omwoyo gwe!”" 
Numbers11:30 Musa n’abakulembeze ba Isirayiri ne baddayo mu lusiisira. 
Numbers11:31 Awo empewo n’eva eri Mukama Katonda n’ereeta obugubi nga buva mu nnyanja ne bugwa okwebungulula olusiisira nga bukoze entuumo nga ya mita emu okuva ku ttaka, nga bujjuza ebbanga lya lugendo lwa lunaku lumu ku ludda olumu olw’olusiisira n’olugendo lwa lunaku lumu ku ludda olulala." 
Numbers11:32 Ku lunaku olwo ne ku lunaku olwaddirira abantu ne bakuŋŋaanya obugubi emisana n’ekiro. Tewali yakuŋŋaanya buzito bwakka wansi wa kilo lukumi; ne babwanika buli wantu mu lusiisira. 
Numbers11:33 Naye ennyama yali ekyali mu mannyo gaabwe nga tebannaba kugirya, obusungu bwa Mukama Katonda ne bubuubuukira abantu n’abaleetera kawumpuli ow’amaanyi ennyo." 
Numbers11:34 Noolwekyo ekifo ekyo kyekyava kituumibwa Kiberosu Katava, kubanga awo we baaziika abantu abaalina omulugube." 
Numbers11:35 Abantu bwe baava e Kiberosu Katava ne batambula okutuuka e Kazerosi ne babeera awo. 
Numbers12:1 Awo Miryamu ne Alooni ne boogera nga bawakanya Musa olw’omukazi Omukuusi gwe yali awasizza, kubanga yali awasizza Mukuusi." 
Numbers12:2 Ne bagamba nti, “Naye ddala Mukama bwe yayogeranga yayitanga mu Musa yekka? Mu ffe namwo teyayogereramu?” Mukama Katonda n’abiwulira." 
Numbers12:3 Naye nno, Musa yali musajja muwombeefu nnyo, nga muteefu okusinga abantu bonna abaali ku nsi." 
Numbers12:4 Amangwago Mukama n’ayogera ne Musa, ne Alooni ne Miryamu n’abagamba nti, “Mujje, mwensatule, mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu.” Bonsatule ne bagenda." 
Numbers12:5 Mukama Katonda n’akkira mu mpagi ey’ekire, n’ayimirira ku mulyango gwa Weema n’ayita Alooni ne Miryamu. Bombi bwe baasembera" 
Numbers12:6 n’abagamba nti, “Muwulirize ebigambo byange: “Mu mmwe bwe mubaamu nnabbi wa Mukama Katonda, nneeraga gy’ali mu kulabikirwa, oba njogera naye mu birooto." 
Numbers12:7 Naye ekyo si bwe kiri ku muddu wange Musa; mu nju yange yonna, muntu mwesigwa." 
Numbers12:8 Bwe mba njogera naye tutunulagana maaso na maaso, njogera butereevu so si mu ngero; alaba ekifaananyi kya Mukama Katonda. Kale, lwaki temwatidde okuwakanya omuddu wange Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Obusungu bwa Mukama Katonda ne bubabuubuukira, n’abaviira." 
Numbers12:10 Ekire bwe kyasituka okuva ku Weema, era laba, Miryamu n’agengewala, n’atukula ng’omuzira. Alooni n’amukyukira n’alaba ng’agengewadde;" 
Numbers12:11 n’agamba Musa nti, “Nkwegayirira, mukama wange, oleme kututeekako kibi kino kye tukoze mu busirusiru bwaffe." 
Numbers12:12 Tomuleka omubiri gwe okufaanana ng’ogw’omwana omuwere azaalibwa ng’ali ng’afudde, ng’omubiri gwe guweddemu ensa.”" 
Numbers12:13 Musa n’akaabirira Mukama ng’agamba nti, “Ayi Katonda, nkwegayirira omuwonye.”" 
Numbers12:14 Mukama Katonda n’addamu Musa nti, “Singa kitaawe amuwandidde amalusu mu maaso, teyandibadde muswavu okumala ennaku musanvu? Kale mumusibire ebweru w’olusiisira okumala ennaku musanvu; bwe zinaggwaako ayinza okukomezebwawo.”" 
Numbers12:15 Bw’atyo Miryamu n’asibirwa ebweru w’olusiisira okumala ennaku musanvu; abantu ne batasitula kutambula okutuusa Miryamu lwe yakomezebwawo. 
Numbers12:16 Ebyo bwe byaggwa abantu ne basitula okuva e Kazerosi ne batambula okutuusa lwe baasiisira mu ddungu lya Palani. 
Numbers13:1 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers13:2 “Tuma abasajja bagende bakette beetegereze ensi ya Kanani gye ŋŋenda okuwa abaana ba Isirayiri. Mu buli kika kya bajjajja ojja kulondamu omusajja omu ku bakulembeze baakyo.” 
Numbers13:3 Bw’atyo Musa n’abatuma okuva mu ddungu lya Palani, ng’ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda bwe kyali. Bonna baali bakulembeze b’abaana ba Isirayiri." 
Numbers13:4 Amannya gaabwe ge gano: Eyava mu kika kya Lewubeeni yali Sammuwa mutabani wa Zakula. 
Numbers13:5 Eyava mu kika kya Simyoni yali Safati mutabani wa Kooli. 
Numbers13:6 Eyava mu kika kya Yuda yali Kalebu mutabani wa Yefune. 
Numbers13:7 Eyava mu kika kya Isakaali yali Igali mutabani wa Yusufu. 
Numbers13:8 Eyava mu kika kya Efulayimu yali Koseya mutabani wa Nuuni. 
Numbers13:9 Eyava mu kika kya Benyamini yali Paluti mutabani wa Lafu. 
Numbers13:10 Eyava mu kika kya Zebbulooni yali Gadyeri mutabani wa Sodi. 
Numbers13:11 Eyava mu kika kya Manase, ky’ekika kya Yusufu, yali Gaadi mutabani wa Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Eyava mu kika kya Ddaani yali Ammiyeri mutabani wa Gemali. 
Numbers13:13 Eyava mu kika kya Aseri yali Sesula mutabani wa Mikaeri. 
Numbers13:14 Eyava mu kika kya Nafutaali yali Nakabi mutabani wa Vofesi. 
Numbers13:15 Eyava mu kika kya Gaadi yali Geweri mutabani wa Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Ago ge mannya ag’abasajja Musa be yatuma okugenda okuketta n’okwetegereza ensi eyo. Musa yali atuumye Koseya mutabani wa Nuuni erinnya Yoswa. 
Numbers13:17 Musa n’abatuma okuketta n’okwetegereza ensi ya Kanani, n’abagamba nti, “Mwambuke nga muyita mu Negebu muggukire mu nsi ey’ensozi." 
Numbers13:18 Mwetegerezenga ensi nga bw’efaanana, n’abantu baamu nga bwe bali, obanga ba maanyi oba banafu, obanga bangi oba batono." 
Numbers13:19 Mulyetegereza obanga ensi mwe babeera nnungi oba mbi. Era muliraba ebibuga byabwe obanga tebiriiko bisenge bya bbugwe oba byetooloddwa bigo. 
Numbers13:20 Mulikebera okulaba obanga ensi yaabwe ngimu oba nkalu, era obanga erimu emiti mingi oba temuli. Mwenywezanga ne muleetayo ku bibala eby’omu nsi eyo.” Ekyo kye kyali ekiseera ezabbibu nga zaakatandika okwengera." 
Numbers13:21 Awo ne bambuka ne beetegereza ensi okuva mu ddungu lya Zini okutuuka e Lekobu okumpi n’awayingirirwa mu Kamasi. 
Numbers13:22 Ne bambuka mu Negebu ne batuuka e Kebbulooni, era wano Akimaani ne Sesayi ne Talumaayi abazzukulu ba Anaki nga we babeera. Kebbulooni bwe kyamala okuzimbibwa waayitawo emyaka musanvu ne Zowani eky’omu Misiri nakyo ne kiryoka kizimbibwa." 
Numbers13:23 Ne batuuka mu kiwonvu ekiyitibwa Esukoli ne batemamu ettabi limu eryaliko ekirimba kimu ekya zabbibu, abantu babiri ne bakireetera ku musituliro. Era ne baleeta ne ku makomamawanga ne ku ttiini." 
Numbers13:24 Ekifo ekyo ne kiyitibwa Ekiwonvu kya Esukoli, olw’ekirimba ekyo abaana ba Isirayiri kye baatemamu." 
Numbers13:25 Awo nga wayiseewo ennaku amakumi ana ne bakomawo nga bamaze okuketta ensi. 
Numbers13:26 Ne bajja eri Musa ne Alooni e Kadesi mu ddungu lya Palani. Ne babakomezaawo obubaka n’eri ekibiina kyonna, era ne babanjulira ebibala bye baggya mu nsi eyo." 
Numbers13:27 Ne bategeeza Musa nti, “Twatuuka mu nsi gye watutumamu: ekulukuta amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki, ejjudde ebirungi ebyereere, era bino bye bibala byamu." 
Numbers13:28 Naye nno abantu ababeera mu nsi omwo ba maanyi, n’ebibuga byabwe binene nnyo era byetooloddwako ebigo. Ate n’ekirala twalabaayo n’abazzukulu ba Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abamaleki babeera mu Negebu mu bukiikaddyo; Abakiiti n’Abayebusi, n’Abamoli babeera mu nsi ey’ensozi; n’Abakanani ne babeera okumpi n’ennyanja ne ku lubalama lw’omugga Yoludaani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Awo Kalebu n’asirisa abantu awali Musa n’agamba nti, “Twambukirewo kaakano tutwale ensi eyo, kubanga ndaba nga tusobola okugiwangula.”" 
Numbers13:31 Kyokka abaagenda ne Kalebu okuketta ne baddamu nti, “Abantu bali tetubasobola, batusinga amaanyi.”" 
Numbers13:32 Bwe batyo ne babunya mu baana ba Isirayiri alipoota etaali nnungi ng’efa ku nsi gye baali bagenze okuketta; nga bagamba nti, “Ensi gye twayitaayitamu nga tugiketta tesobola na kuliisa bantu baayo abagituulamu; ate n’abantu bonna be twalabamu baali ba kiwago." 
Numbers13:33 Twalabayo n’Abanefisi, abazzukulu ba Anaki abava mu Banefiri. Bwe twetunulako nga tuli ng’obwacaaka, era nabo nga bwe batulaba bwe batyo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Ekiro ekyo abantu bonna mu kibiina ne bayimusa amaloboozi gaabwe ne bakaaba n’eddoboozi ery’omwanguka. 
Numbers14:2 Abaana ba Isirayiri bonna ne beemulugunyiza Musa ne Alooni; abantu bonna awamu mu kibiina ne babagamba nti, “Singa twafiira mu nsi y’e Misiri! Oba singa twafiira mu ddungu muno!" 
Numbers14:3 Lwaki Mukama atutwala mu nsi eyo, tutuuke eyo tulyoke tuttibwe n’ekitala? Abakazi baffe n’abaana baffe bagenda kunyagibwa. Okuddayo mu Misiri si kye kinaasingako?”" 
Numbers14:4 Ne boogeraganya nti, “Ka twerondere omukulembeze tuddeyo mu Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Awo Musa ne Alooni ne bavuunama wansi mu maaso g’ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri abaali bakuŋŋaanidde awo. 
Numbers14:6 Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefune, abaali mu abo abaagenda okuketta ensi, ne bayuzaayuza engoye zaabwe," 
Numbers14:7 ne bagamba ekibiina kyonna eky’abaana ba Isirayiri nti, “Ensi gye twayitaayitamu okugiketta, nsi nnungi nnyo." 
Numbers14:8 Mukama Katonda bw’aliba atusanyukidde, alitukulembera n’atutuusa mu nsi eyo, ensi ekulukuta amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki, era agenda kugituwa." 
Numbers14:9 Kyokka temujeemera Mukama Katonda, era n’abantu b’omu nsi omwo temubatya, kubanga kuliba kumenya mu jjenje kkalu; tebakyalina abakuuma, ate nga Mukama Katonda ali wamu naffe. Temubatya.”" 
Numbers14:10 Naye abantu bonna mu kibiina ne bateesa okubakuba mayinja. Awo ekitiibwa kya Mukama Katonda ne kirabikira eri abaana ba Isirayiri bonna mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
Numbers14:11 Mukama n’agamba Musa nti, “Abantu bano balinnyooma kutuusa ddi? Balikomya ddi obutanzikiririzaamu, newaakubadde nga nakola ebyamagero mu bubonero bwe nakolera mu bo?" 
Numbers14:12 Nzija kubaboola mbazikirize ne kawumpuli, mbasaanyeewo; naye nzija kukuggyamu ggwe eggwanga eriribasinga abo obukulu n’amaanyi.”" 
Numbers14:13 Naye Musa n’agamba Mukama Katonda nti, “Ebyo Abamisiri bagenda kubiwulira! Kubanga abantu bano wabaggya mu nsi y’Abamisiri n’obuyinza obw’amaanyi amangi." 
Numbers14:14 Bajja kubuulirako ku bantu ab’omu nsi muno. Baamala dda okukiwulira nga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, obeera wakati mu bantu bano, era nga, Ayi Mukama Katonda, mulabagana nabo amaaso n’amaaso, era ng’ekire kyo kibeera nabo buli kiseera, era ng’obakulemberera mu mpagi ey’ekire emisana ne mu mpagi ey’omuliro ekiro." 
Numbers14:15 Singa abantu bano obatta bonna omulundi gumu, amawanga agawulidde obututumufu bwo gagenda kugamba nti," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Kubanga Mukama Katonda yali tasobola kuyingiza bantu bano mu nsi gye yabasuubiza ng’agibalayirira; kyeyava abattira mu ddungu.’ 
Numbers14:17 “Ne kaakano nkwegayirira oyoleke obuyinza bwo, Ayi Mukama nga bwe buli obusukkirivu nga bwe wasuubiza nti," 
Numbers14:18 ‘ Mukama Katonda alwawo okusunguwala, era ajjudde okwagala okutaggwaawo, era asonyiwa ekibi n’obujeemu. Naye era asingiddwa omusango tamuleka nga tabonerezebbwa; abonereza abaana olw’ebibi bya bakadde baabwe okutuuka ku mulembe ogwokusatu n’ogwokuna.’" 
Numbers14:19 Ng’okwagala kwe okungi okutaggwaawo bwe kuli, nsaba osonyiwe abantu bano ekibi ky’abwe, nga bw’ozze obasonyiwa kasookedde bava mu Misiri n’okutuusa leero.”" 
Numbers14:20 Awo Mukama Katonda n’addamu nti, “Mbasonyiye nga bw’onsabye." 
Numbers14:21 Naye nno mu mazima ddala nga bwe ndi omulamu, era ng’ekitiibwa kya Mukama Katonda bwe kijjuza ensi yonna," 
Numbers14:22 tewalibaawo n’omu ku bantu abaalaba ekitiibwa kyange n’obubonero obw’ebyamagero bwe nakolera e Misiri ne mu ddungu, naye ne batagondera ddoboozi lyange wabula ne bangezesa nga bankema emirundi kkumi," 
Numbers14:23 tewalibaawo n’omu ku bo aliraba ku nsi eyo gye nalayirira bajjajjaabwe ne mbasuubiza okugibawa. Tewalibaawo n’omu ku bo abannyoomye aligirabako. 
Numbers14:24 Naye olwokubanga omuweereza wange Kalebu alina omwoyo ogw’enjawulo era ng’angoberera n’omutima gwe gwonna, ndimuleeta mu nsi gye yatumibwamu, n’ezzadde lye lirigirya." 
Numbers14:25 Kale nno olwokubanga Abamaleki n’Abakanani babeera mu biwonvu; enkya muddeeko emabega, musitule mutambule nga mwolekera eddungu nga mukutte ekkubo eriraga ku Nnyanja Emyufu.”" 
Numbers14:26 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa ne Alooni nti," 
Numbers14:27 “Ekibiina kino ekibi kirituusa ddi nga kinneemulugunyiza? Mpulidde okutolotooma kw’abaana ba Isirayiri nga banneemulugunyiza. 
Numbers14:28 Bategeeze nti, ‘ Mukama agambye nti, Nga bwe ndi omulamu, bw’ayogera Mukama Katonda, ebyo bye mpulidde nga mwogera, nange bye ndibakola." 
Numbers14:29 Mulifiira mu ddungu muno n’emirambo gyammwe mwe girisigala; mwenna abawezezza emyaka amakumi abiri n’okusingawo egy’obukulu nga bwe mwamala okubalibwa, abanneemulugunyiza." 
Numbers14:30 Tewaliba n’omu ku bo aliyingira mu nsi gye neelayirira nti ge galibeera amaka gammwe, okuggyako Kalebu mutabani wa Yefune ne Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni." 
Numbers14:31 Naye abaana bammwe abato, be mwogeddeko nti balifuulibwa omunyago, ndibayingiza mu nsi eyo gye mugaanye ne beeyagalira omwo." 
Numbers14:32 Naye mmwe, emirambo gyammwe girisigala mu ddungu muno mwe girigwa." 
Numbers14:33 Mmwe olw’obutabeera beesigwa, abaana bammwe balimala emyaka amakumi ana mu ddungu nga bwe balunda ebisibo byabwe okutuusa omulambo gw’oyo alisembayo okufa lwe guliziikibwa mu ddungu muno." 
Numbers14:34 Nga bwe mwamala ennaku amakumi ana nga muketta ensi eri, bwe mutyo bwe mujja okumala emyaka amakumi ana mu ddungu, nga buli lumu ku nnaku ezo muvaamu mwaka gumu gumu; muboneebone olw’ebibi byammwe, mulyoke mutegeere obuzibu obw’okunneesimbamu." 
Numbers14:35 Nze, Mukama Katonda, nkyogedde; ddala ddala ekyo ndikikola ku kibiina kyonna eky’abantu bano aboonoonyi abeegasse awamu okunjolekera. Tebagenda kuva mu ddungu lino, bonna mwe balifiira.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Abasajja abo Musa be yatuma okuketta ensi ne bakomawo ne beemulugunyiza ekibiina ky’abantu bonna nga babaleetedde obubaka obutaali bulungi ku nsi eri, era ne babubunyisa mu bantu," 
Numbers14:37 abasajja abo abaaleeta obubaka obutaali bulungi ne babubunyisa mu bantu kawumpuli n’abattira awo mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda. 
Numbers14:38 Mu basajja bonna abaatumibwa okuketta ensi, Yoswa mutabani wa Nuuni ne Kalebu mutabani wa Yefune be bokka abaasigalawo nga balamu." 
Numbers14:39 Musa n’ategeeza abaana ba Isirayiri bonna ebigambo ebyo, ne bakungubaga nnyo." 
Numbers14:40 Enkeera mu makya ne bambuka mu nsi ey’ensozi. Ne boogera nti, “Twayonoona, naye nga bwe tuli wano tujja kwambuka tuyingire mu nsi Mukama Katonda gye yatusuubiza.”" 
Numbers14:41 Naye Musa n’abagamba nti, “Lwaki munyooma ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda? Ebyo bye mutegeka tebiyinza kutuukiririra." 
Numbers14:42 Temwambuka kubanga Mukama Katonda tali nammwe. Abalabe bammwe bajja kubawangula. 
Numbers14:43 Kubanga Abamaleki n’Abakanani bajja kuboolekera. Olwokubanga mwekyusizza ne muva ku Mukama Katonda, tajja kubeera nammwe, ekitala kijja kubatta.”" 
Numbers14:44 Naye era bo ne beesigula ne bambuka mu nsi ey’ensozi, newaakubadde nga Musa teyagenda nabo era nga n’essanduuko ey’endagaano yasigala mu lusiisira." 
Numbers14:45 Awo Abamaleki n’Abakanani abaabeeranga mu nsi eyo ey’ensozi ne bakkirira ne babalumba ne babakubira ddala okubatuusa e Koluma. 
Numbers15:1 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa 
Numbers15:2 ayogere n’abaana ba Isirayiri abagambe nti, “Bwe mutuukanga mu nsi gye mbawadde, mwe munaabeeranga, nga ge maka gammwe," 
Numbers15:3 ne muleetera Mukama Katonda ebiweebwayo ebyokye nga mubiggya mu biraalo byammwe oba mu bisibo byammwe, ekiweebwayo ku muliro oba ssaddaaka enjokye, okutuukiriza obweyamo bwammwe oba ebiweebwayo olw’okweyagalira oba ku mbaga zammwe entongole, ne muvaamu akawoowo akasanyusa Mukama;" 
Numbers15:4 kale nno oyo anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda anaawangayo ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke eweza nga kilo emu n’ekitundu ez’obuwunga obulungi, nga mutabuddwamu n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni agaweza nga obutundu mwenda obwa Ini ey’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni." 
Numbers15:5 Ku buli mwana gwa ndiga ogw’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa oba ogwa ssaddaaka, munaateekerateekerangako obutundu mwenda obwa Ini ey’envinnyo nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokunywa." 
Numbers15:6 “Bwe munaabanga muwaayo endiga ennume munaateekateekanga ekiweebwayo eky’emmere y’empeke eweza nga kilo ssatu n’obutundu bubiri n’ekitundu obwa Ini ez’obuwunga obulungi nga mutabuddwamu n’amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni ag’obutundu mwenda n’obutundu bubiri obwa Ini," 
Numbers15:7 era n’obutundu mwenda n’obutundu bubiri obwa Ini obw’envinnyo nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokunywa, eky’akawoowo akasanyusa Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers15:8 “Bwe munaabanga muteekateeka ente ennume ento ey’ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa oba ssaddaaka, okutuukiriza obweyamo, oba ekiweebwayo olw’emirembe eri Mukama Katonda," 
Numbers15:9 ku nte eyo ennume munaaleeterangako ekiweebwayo eky’emmere ey’empeke eweza gulaamu mukaaga n’ekitundu ez’obuwunga obulungi nga mutabuddwamu amafuta ag’omuzeeyituuni agaweza kilo emu n’ekitundu. 
Numbers15:10 Era munaaleetanga envinnyo eweza lita bbiri nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokunywa. Kinaabanga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa mu muliro ne kivaamu akawoowo akasanyusa Mukama Katonda. 
Numbers15:11 Buli nte ennume oba endiga ennume, na buli mwana gwa ndiga oba embuzi ento, zonna zinaateekebwateekebwanga mu ngeri eyo." 
Numbers15:12 Munaakolanga bwe mutyo ku buli gye munaateekateekanga nga bwe zinenkananga obungi. 
Numbers15:13 “Buli nzaalwa yenna kimusaanira okugobereranga enkola eyo buli lw’anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa ku muliro, ne kivaamu akawoowo akasanyusa Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers15:14 Mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egirijja, omugwira oba omugenyi yenna anaabeeranga mu mmwe bw’anaaleetanga ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa ku muliro ekivaamu akawoowo akasanyusa Mukama Katonda, anaakoleranga ddala nga bwe mukola." 
Numbers15:15 Ekibiina kyammwe kyonna kinaabeeranga n’amateeka geegamu, mmwe ge munaakwatanga era n’abagwira abali mu mmwe ge banaakwatanga; eryo linaabanga etteeka ery’enkalakkalira mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egirijja. Mmwe nga bwe muli n’omugwira bw’atyo bw’anaabanga mu maaso ga Mukama Katonda." 
Numbers15:16 Amateeka n’ebiragiro bye munaakwatanga n’omugwira anaabeeranga mu mmwe by’anaakwatanga.” 
Numbers15:17 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers15:18 “Tegeeza abaana ba Isirayiri nti, ‘Bwe muyingiranga mu nsi mwe mbatwala," 
Numbers15:19 ne mulya ku mmere y’omu nsi omwo, munaaleetangako ekitundu nga kye kiweebwayo eri Mukama." 
Numbers15:20 Munaggyanga ekitole ku mmere gye munaasookanga okusa mu gguuliro ne mukireeta nga kye kiweebwayo ekivudde mu gguuliro. 
Numbers15:21 Ku mmere eyo gye munaasookerangako okusa munaaleetangako ekiweebwayo ekyo eri Mukama Katonda okuyita mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna.’ 
Numbers15:22 “Naye nno bwe munaalemwanga okukwata amateeka ago gonna Mukama Katonda g’awadde Musa, nga mukikoze mu butagenderera," 
Numbers15:23 amateeka ago gonna Mukama Katonda ge yalagira Musa okugabatuusaako okuva ku lunaku Mukama lwe yagamuweerako n’okweyongerayo okuyita mu mirembe gyammwe gyonna egigenda okujja," 
Numbers15:24 ne mugasobya mu butagenderera n’ekibiina kyonna mu butamanya, kale nno ekibiina kyonna kinaaleetanga ekiweebwayo eky’ente ya sseddume ento emu nga kye kiweebwayo ekyokebwa, omuva akawoowo akalungi eri Mukama Katonda, nga kuliko n’ekiweebwayo ky’emmere y’empeke n’ekyokunywa ng’etteeka bwe liragira, n’ekiweebwayo eky’embuzi ennume emu olw’ekibi." 
Numbers15:25 Kabona anaatangiririranga ekibiina ky’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna, era bwe batyo banaasonyiyibwanga; kubanga baasobya mu butagenderera, ate banaabanga baleese ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda ekyokebwa ku muliro, era n’ekiweebwayo eri Mukama Katonda olw’ekibi olw’ekisobyo kyabwe ekitaali kigenderere." 
Numbers15:26 Ekibiina ky’abaana ba Isirayiri bonna, bwe batyo banaasonyiyibwanga, n’abagwira abanaabeeranga mu bo nabo banaasonyiyibwanga, kubanga abantu bonna banaabanga basoberezza wamu nga tebagenderedde." 
Numbers15:27 “Naye omuntu bw’anaasobyanga ng’ali bw’omu mu butagenderera, anaaleetanga embuzi enduusi ey’omwaka gumu ogw’obukulu nga kye kiweebwayo olw’ekibi." 
Numbers15:28 Kabona anaatangiririranga, eri Mukama, omuntu oyo asobezza mu butagenderera; bw’anaamalanga okutangiririrwa, anaasonyiyibwanga." 
Numbers15:29 Munaabeeranga n’etteeka lye limu erinaakozesebwanga ku muntu yenna anaasobyanga nga tagenderedde, bw’anaabanga enzaalwa oba ne bw’anaabanga omugwira bulijjo abeera mu mmwe." 
Numbers15:30 “Naye buli muntu anaakolanga ekibi mu bugenderevu, bw’anaabanga enzaalwa ne bw’anaabeeranga omugwira abeera mu mmwe, omuntu oyo anaabanga avvodde Mukama Katonda, noolwekyo anaagobwanga mu bantu be, ne bamwesalirako ddala." 
Numbers15:31 Olwokubanga anaabanga anyoomye ekigambo kya Mukama Katonda, n’amenya etteeka lye, omuntu oyo anaagoberwanga ddala okuva mu bantu be, ne bamwesalirako ddala, era ekibi kye ekyo kinaasigalanga ku mutwe gwe.”" 
Numbers15:32 Abaana ba Isirayiri bwe baali nga bakyali mu ddungu, ne basisinkana omusajja omu ku b’omu kibiina ky’Abayisirayiri eyali atyaba enku ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti." 
Numbers15:33 Abo abaamusanga ng’atyaba enku ne bamuleeta eri Musa ne Alooni n’ekibiina kyonna," 
Numbers15:34 ne bamuggalira mu kkomera, kubanga baali tebamanyi bulungi kya kumukolera." 
Numbers15:35 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti, “Omusajja oyo ateekwa kuttibwa. Ekibiina kyonna kimukubire amayinja ebweru w’olusiisira.”" 
Numbers15:36 Ekibiina kyonna ne kimufulumya wabweru w’olusiisira ne kimukuba amayinja n’afa, nga Mukama Katonda bwe yalagira Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers15:38 “Yogera eri abaana ba Isirayiri obalagire beekolere amatanvuuwa bagatungenga ku nkugiro z’ebyambalo byabwe mu mirembe gyabwe gyonna, era ku buli ttanvuuwa batungengako akaguwa aka bbululu." 
Numbers15:39 Amatanvuuwa ago munaagatunulangako, ekyo ne kibajjukiza amateeka ga Mukama Katonda gonna ge musaanira okugonderanga, mulyoke mugagobererenga mulemenga okweyonoonyesa nga mukola ebyo ebitaliimu nsa byokka nga bye bisanyusa amaaso gammwe n’emitima gyammwe." 
Numbers15:40 Bwe mutyo munajjukiranga amateeka gange ne mubeera batukuvu eri Katonda wammwe. 
Numbers15:41 Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe, eyabaggya mu nsi y’e Misiri, okubeeranga Katonda wammwe; Nze Mukama Katonda wammwe.”" 
Numbers16:1 Lwali lumu, Koola mutabani wa Izukali, mutabani wa Kokasi, mutabani wa Leevi, ne bano abava mu Lewubeeni, Dasani ne Abiraamu batabani ba Eriyaabu, awamu ne Oni mutabani wa Peresi, bonna ne beewaggula" 
Numbers16:2 ne basituka ne boolekera Musa. Baali ne bannaabwe abasajja Abayisirayiri ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, abaali abamanyifu ennyo mu baana ba Isirayiri era nga bakiise mu Lukiiko Olukulu." 
Numbers16:3 Ne bajjira wamu nga beekobaanye okwolekera Musa ne Alooni ne babagamba nti, “Mwekulumbaza nnyo! Ekibiina kyonna, buli omu mu kyo mutukuvu, ne Mukama Katonda ali nabo. Kale, lwaki mwekulumbaliza ku kibiina ky’abantu ba Mukama?”" 
Numbers16:4 Musa bwe yakiwulira n’avuunama wansi. 
Numbers16:5 N’alyoka agamba Koola ne bonna abaali naye nti, “Enkya Mukama Katonda anaalondamu ababe, n’oyo omutukuvu, era anaasembeza omuntu oyo gy’ali. Oyo gw’anaalonda gw’anaasembeza gy’ali." 
Numbers16:6 Gwe Koola n’abagoberezi bo bonna mukole bwe muti: Muddire ebyoterezo," 
Numbers16:7 enkya mubiteekemu omuliro n’obubaane awali Mukama, oyo Mukama Katonda gw’anaalondamu, nga ye mutukuvu. Mmwe batabani ba Leevi mwekulumbazizza nnyo!”" 
Numbers16:8 Musa n’agamba Koola nti, “Muwulirize, mmwe batabani ba Leevi!" 
Numbers16:9 Mukiraba nga kitono nnyo tekibamala, Katonda wa Isirayiri okubaawulako n’abaggya ku kibiina ekinene eky’abaana ba Isirayiri n’abasembeza w’abeera okukolanga omulimu gwa Mukama mu Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, n’okuyimiriranga mu maaso g’ekibiina n’okubaweereza?" 
Numbers16:10 Mmwe ne Baleevi bannammwe Mukama Katonda yabasembeza gy’ali, kaakano mwagala n’obwakabona nabwo mubulye?" 
Numbers16:11 Noolwekyo mmwe n’abagoberezi bammwe, mwesimbye ku Mukama Katonda, era gwe mwolekedde. Kale Alooni naye ye ani, mmwe okumwemulugunyiza?”" 
Numbers16:12 Awo Musa n’atumya Dasani ne Abiraamu batabani ba Eriyaabu bayitibwe bajje. Naye ne bagamba nti, “Tetujja kujja!" 
Numbers16:13 Eky’okutuggya mu nsi ekulukuta amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki okututtira mu ddungu, kyali kitono nga tekimala? Ne kaakano oyagala okutwefuulirako omulangira otufuge?" 
Numbers16:14 Ng’ebyo bikyali awo, totuleese mu nsi ekulukuta amata n’omubisi gw’enjuki, wadde okutusikiza amasamba n’ennimiro z’emizabbibu. Abasajja bano oyagala obasibe kantuntunu ku maaso obalimberimbe? Nedda, tetujja kujja.”" 
Numbers16:15 Awo Musa n’asunguwala nnyo n’agamba Mukama Katonda nti, “Ekiweebwayo kyabwe tokikkiriza. Tewaliiwo gwe nnali ntutteko wadde akalogoyi akamu, so tewali n’omu ku bo gwe nnali mpisizza obubi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Musa n’agamba Koola nti, “Ggwe n’abo bonna abakugoberera, enkya mujje awali Mukama Katonda, ggwe nabo ne Alooni." 
Numbers16:17 Buli musajja ajje n’ekyoterezo kye akiteekemu obubaane, ebyoterezo bijja kuwera ebikumi bibiri mu ataano, mubireete awali Mukama. Ggwe ne Alooni nammwe mujja kuleeta ebyoterezo byammwe.”" 
Numbers16:18 Awo buli musajja n’addira ekyoterezo kye n’akissaamu obubaane n’omuliro, bonna ne bayimirira ne Musa ne Alooni ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu." 
Numbers16:19 Koola bwe yamala okukuŋŋaanya abagoberezi be abavuganya, ku mulyango gwa Weema ya Mukama ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu, ekitiibwa kya Mukama Katonda ne kyeraga eri ekibiina kyonna ekyali kikuŋŋaanye." 
Numbers16:20 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa ne Alooni nti," 
Numbers16:21 “Mweyawuleko muve mu kibiina kino ndyoke nkizikirize embagirawo.” 
Numbers16:22 Naye Musa ne Alooni ne bavuunama amaaso gaabwe wansi ne bagamba nti, “Ayi Katonda, Katonda ow’emyoyo egy’abantu bonna, omuntu omu bw’ayonoona, osunguwalira ekibiina kyonna?”" 
Numbers16:23 Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers16:24 “Muve okumpi n’eweema eza Koola ne Dasani ne Abiraamu.” 
Numbers16:25 Awo Musa n’asituka n’agenda eri Dasani ne Abiraamu, n’abakulembeze ba Isirayiri ne bagenda naye nga bamugoberera." 
Numbers16:26 N’agamba ekibiina kyonna nti, “Musembereeyo muve okumpi n’eweema z’abasajja bano abakozi b’ebibi! Temukwata ku kintu kyabwe n’ekimu, sikulwa nga mwenna muzikirizibwa olw’ebibi byabwe.”" 
Numbers16:27 Bwe batyo ne basemberayo ne bava okumpi n’eweema za Koola, ne Dasani, ne Abiraamu. Dasani ne Abiraamu baali nga bafulumye mu weema zaabwe nga bayimiridde mu miryango gyazo, nga bali ne bakazi baabwe, ne batabani baabwe, n’obwana bwabwe obuto." 
Numbers16:28 Awo Musa n’agamba nti, “Ku kino kwe munaategeerera nga Mukama Katonda y’antumye okukola ebintu bino byonna so tekubadde kutetenkanya kwange." 
Numbers16:29 Singa abasajja bano bafa olumbe olwa bulijjo, oba kugwibwako ebyo ebya bulijjo ebigwa ku bantu bonna, kinaaba kitegeeza nti Mukama si y’antumye." 
Numbers16:30 Naye singa Mukama Katonda aleetawo ekintu ekiggya ddala ekitali kya bulijjo, ensi n’eyasamya akamwa kaayo n’ebamira nga balamu n’ebintu byabwe byonna, ne bagwa wansi mu gunnya oguwanvu, kale nno munaategeera ng’abasajja abo banyoomodde Mukama Katonda.”" 
Numbers16:31 Awo bwe yali nga yakamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo, ettaka bali kwe baali bayimiridde ne lyabikamu wabiri," 
Numbers16:32 ensi n’eyasamya akamwa kaayo n’ebamira n’ebintu byabwe byonna eby’omu maka gaabwe, ne basajja ba Koola bonna n’ebintu byabwe byonna." 
Numbers16:33 Baagwayo wansi mu gunnya nga balamu, n’ebintu byabwe byonna bye baalina; ensi n’ebabuutikira, ne basaanirawo ddala okuva mu bannaabwe." 
Numbers16:34 Abayisirayiri bonna abaaliwo bwe baabawulira nga bakaaba ne badduka nga bwe bagamba nti, “Si kulwa nga naffe ensi etumira!”" 
Numbers16:35 Olwo omuliro ne gujja nga guva eri Mukama ne gwokera ddala abasajja ebikumi ebibiri mu ataano abaali bawaayo ekiweebwayo eky’obubaane. 
Numbers16:36 Awo Mukama Katonda n’agamba Musa nti," 
Numbers16:37 “Gamba Eriyazaali mutabani wa Alooni kabona aggye ebyoterezo mu muliro, kubanga bitukuvu, amanda ag’omuliro agasaasaanyize wala." 
Numbers16:38 Ebyoterezo ebyo bya basajja abaayonoona era n’okufa ne bafa; noolwekyo biweesebwemu amasowaane gakozesebwenga ng’ebibikka ku kyoto kubanga baabiwaayo eri Mukama Katonda; noolwekyo bitukuvu. Kale binaabanga kabonero ka kijjukizo eri abaana ba Isirayiri.” 
Numbers16:39 Bw’atyo Eriyazaali kabona n’addira ebyoterezo eby’ekikomo, ebyali biweereddwayo bali abaayokebwa, ne biweesebwamu ebibikka ku kyoto," 
Numbers16:40 kiyambe abaana ba Isirayiri okujjukiranga nti omuntu atali kabona, atava mu lulyo lwa Alooni, taasemberenga kumpi na kyoto okunyookeza obubaane eri Mukama, si kulwa ng’afuuka nga Koola n’ekibiina kye. Eriyazaali bw’atyo bwe yabikola byonna ng’ekiragiro kya Mukama Katonda bwe kyali kye yayisa mu Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Naye enkeera ekibiina kyonna eby’abaana ba Isirayiri ne beemulugunyiza Musa ne Alooni, nga bagamba nti, “Musse abantu ba Mukama Katonda.”"
