2Kings20:3 “Jjukira, Ayi Mukama Katonda, nga bwe ntambulidde mu maaso go mu bwesigwa n’omutima ogutuukiridde, era ne nkola ebirungi mu maaso go.” Keezeekiya n’akaaba nnyo." 
2Kings20:4 Awo Isaaya bwe yali nga tannava mu luggya olwa wakati, ekigambo kya Mukama ne kimujjira nti," 
2Kings20:5 “Ddayo ogambe Keezeekiya omukulembeze w’abantu bange nti, ‘Bw’ati bw’ayogera Mukama, Katonda wa jjajjaawo Dawudi nti: Mpulidde okusaba kwo, era n’amaziga go ngalabye. Nzija kukuwonya. Oluvannyuma lw’ennaku ssatu onooyambuka n’olaga mu yeekaalu ya Mukama." 
2Kings20:6 Ndikwongerako emyaka emirala kkumi n’ettaano, era laba ndikulokola ggwe n’ekibuga kino mu mukono gwa kabaka w’e Bwasuli, nga nnwanirira ekibuga kino ku lwange nze ne ku lw’omuddu wange Dawudi.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Awo Isaaya n’alagira baleete ekitole ky’ettiini, ne bakisiiga ku jjute, Keezeekiya n’awona." 
2Kings20:8 Keezeekiya yali abuuzizza Isaaya nti, “Kabonero ki akalindaga nti Mukama amponyezza, era nti ndyambuka mu yeekaalu ya Mukama nga wayiseewo ennaku ssatu?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaaya n’addamu nti, “Kano ke kaliba akabonero gy’oli okuva eri Mukama nti ajja kutuukiriza kye yasuubiza: ekisiikirize kinaatambula mu maaso amadaala kkumi, oba kinaaddayo emabega amadaala kkumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Keezeekiya n’addamu nti, “Kintu kyangu nnyo ekisiikirize okugenda mu maaso amadaala kkumi, Noolwekyo kiddeyo emabega amadaala kkumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Awo Isaaya n’akoowoola erinnya lya Mukama, era Mukama n’azzaayo ekisiikirize emabega amadaala kkumi okuva ne we kyali ku madaala ga Akazi." 
2Kings20:12 Mu biro ebyo Berodakubaladani mutabani wa Baladani kabaka w’e Babulooni n’aweereza Keezeekiya ebbaluwa n’ekirabo, kubanga yawulira nti Keezeekiya yali alwadde." 
2Kings20:13 Keezeekiya n’ayaniriza ababaka abaleeta ebbaluwa, n’abalambuza amawanika ge gonna omwali eby’omuwendo ebingi ng’effeeza, ne zaabu, n’ebyakaloosa n’amafuta ag’omuwendo omungi. Yabalambuza ennyumba omwali ebyokulwanyisa, n’eby’omuwendo ebirala ebyali mu mawanika ge. Tewali kintu mu lubiri wadde mu bwakabaka bwe bwonna Keezeekiya ky’ataabalaga." 
2Kings20:14 Awo nnabbi Isaaya n’agenda eri Kabaka Keezeekiya n’amubuuza nti, “Abasajja abo bagambye ki era bavudde wa?” Keezeekiya n’addamu nti, “Bavudde mu nsi ey’ewala mu Babulooni.”" 
2Kings20:15 Nnabbi n’amubuuza nti, “Balabye ki mu lubiri lwo?” N’addamu nti, “Balabye buli kintu mu lubiri lwange, tewali na kimu ku by’omu mawanika gange kye nabakwese.”" 
2Kings20:16 Isaaya n’agamba Keezeekiya nti, “Wuliriza Mukama Katonda ky’agamba:" 
2Kings20:17 Laba, ekiseera kijja byonna ebiri mu lubiri lwo, ne byonna bajjajjaabo bye baatereka, lwe biritwalibwa e Babulooni. Tewaliba kintu ekirisigalawo,” bw’ayogera Mukama." 
2Kings20:18 “Era abamu ku bazzukulu bo, ab’omubiri gwo n’omusaayi gwo, abaliba bakuzaaliddwa balitwalibwa mu busibe, era baliba balaawe mu lubiri lwa kabaka w’e Babulooni.”" 
2Kings20:19 Keezeekiya n’addamu nti, “Ekigambo kya Mukama ekyo ky’oyogedde kirungi.” Yalowooza mu mutima gwe nti, “Kasita, emirembe n’obutebenkevu binaabeerangawo mu mirembe gyange.”" 
2Kings20:20 Ebirala byonna ebyabaawo mu mirembe gya Keezeekiya n’ebyobuzira bye byonna, ne bwe yakola ekidiba n’omudumu omunene ebyaleetanga amazzi mu kibuga, tebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky’ebyafaayo eky’ebyomumirembe bya bassekabaka ba Yuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Keezeekiya n’afa, mutabani we Manase n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
2Kings21:1 Manase yatandika okufuga ng’alina emyaka kkumi n’ebiri, era n’afugira emyaka amakumi ataano mu etaano mu Yerusaalemi. Nnyina ye yali Kefuziba." 
2Kings21:2 N’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, ng’atambulira mu makubo amabi ag’amawanga Mukama ge yali agobye mu maaso g’Abayisirayiri." 
2Kings21:3 Yaddamu n’azimba ebifo ebigulumivu eby’okusamira, Keezeekiya kitaawe bye yali amenye: era yazimba n’ebyoto ebya Baali, n’asimba n’empagi kya Asera, nga Akabu kabaka wa Isirayiri bwe yakola, n’okusinza n’asinza eggye ery’omu ggulu." 
2Kings21:4 Yazimba n’ebyoto mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, Mukama gye yali ayogeddeko nti, “Mu Yerusaalemi mwe mulibeera Erinnya lyange.”" 
2Kings21:5 Era yazimbira eggye lyonna ery’omu ggulu ebyoto mu mpya zombi eza yeekaalu ya Mukama. 
2Kings21:6 N’awaayo mutabani we okuba ekyokebwa, ng’akola eby’obufumu n’eby’obulogo, ate ng’alagulwa n’abaliko emizimu, n’abalogo. N’akola ebibi bingi mu maaso ga Mukama, era n’amusunguwaza." 
2Kings21:7 Yaddira ekifaananyi ekyole ekya Asera n’akiteeka mu yeekaalu, Mukama gye yali ayogeddeko ng’agamba Dawudi ne mutabani we Sulemaani nti, “Mu Yeekaalu eno ne mu Yerusaalemi, bye nneeroboza mu bika byonna ebya Isirayiri, mwe munaabeeranga erinnya lyange emirembe gyonna." 
2Kings21:8 Siriddayo nate kujja bigere eby’Abayisirayiri mu nsi gye nawa bajjajjaabwe, bwe baneekuumanga okukola bye nabalagira byonna wamu n’amateeka omuddu wange Musa ge yabawa.”" 
2Kings21:9 Naye abantu tebaawuliriza, era Manase n’abasendasenda okukola ebibi okusinga n’ebyo amawanga Mukama ge yazikiririza mu maaso g’Abayisirayiri bye gaakola." 
2Kings21:10 Awo Mukama n’ayogerera mu baddu be bannabbi 
2Kings21:11 nti, “Olw’emizizo gino Manase kabaka wa Yuda gy’akoze, ng’ayonoona okusinga Abamoli abaamusooka bye baakola, n’ayonoonyesa Yuda n’ebifaananyi bye," 
2Kings21:12 bw’ati bw’ayogera Mukama, Katonda wa Isirayiri nti, ‘Ndireeta ku Yerusaalemi ne ku Yuda obubi obusingirayo ddala, era na buli muntu alikiwulira, alisasamala." 
2Kings21:13 Ndigolola omuguwa ogwakozesebwa ku Samaliya n’ejjinja erigera eryakozesebwa ku nnyumba ya Akabu eri Yerusaalemi, era ne mmalirawo ddala Yerusaalemi ng’omuntu bw’akomba esowaani okumalirako ddala emmere, n’okugifuula n’agifuula." 
2Kings21:14 Era ndyabulira ekitundu ekyafikkawo eky’obusika bwange, ne nkigabula mu mukono gw’abalabe baabwe, ne bababbako buli kantu," 
2Kings21:15 kubanga baakola ebibi mu maaso gange, ne bansunguwaza nnyo okuviira ddala ku lunaku bajjajjaabwe kwe baaviirako mu Misiri n’okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Ate, era Manase yayiwa omusaayi mungi gw’abo abataaliko musango, n’agujjuza Yerusaalemi, obutasaako ebibi ebirala bye yayonoonyesa Yuda, ne bakola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama." 
2Kings21:17 Ebyafaayo ebirala ebyabaawo mu mirembe gya Manase, ne byonna bye yakola, okwo nga kwe kuli n’ebibi bye yakola, tebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo eky’ebyomumirembe gya bassekabaka ba Yuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Awo Manase n’afa, n’aziikibwa mu nnimiro ey’olubiri lwe, ye nnimiro ya Uzza, ne mutabani we Amoni n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni lwe yatandika okufuga, yali awezezza emyaka amakumi abiri mu ebiri, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi okumala emyaka ebiri. Nnyina ye yali Mesullemesi muwala wa Kaluzi ow’e Yotuba." 
2Kings21:20 N’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, nga kitaawe bwe yakola." 
2Kings21:21 N’atambulira mu ngeri za kitaawe, n’asinzanga ebifaananyi kitaawe bye yasinzanga." 
2Kings21:22 Yava ku Mukama, Katonda wa bajjajjaabe, n’atatambulira mu kkubo lya Mukama." 
2Kings21:23 Awo abakungu ba Amoni ne bamusalira olukwe, ne bamuttira mu lubiri lwe." 
2Kings21:24 Awo olwatuuka, abantu mu nsi ne beekobaana, ne batta abo bonna abaali mu lukwe olw’okumutta, era ne bafuula Yosiya mutabani we kabaka." 
2Kings21:25 Ebyafaayo ebirala ebyabaawo mu mirembe gya Amoni, tebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo eky’ebyomumirembe gya bassekabaka ba Yuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Kabaka n’aziikibwa mu ntaana ye mu nnimiro ya Uzza, mutabani we Yosiya n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya n’atandika okufuga nga wa myaka munaana, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi emyaka amakumi asatu mu gumu, ng’erinnya lya nnyina ye Yedida, muwala wa Adaya ow’e Bozukasi." 
2Kings22:2 N’akola ebirungi mu maaso ga Mukama, ng’atambulira mu ngeri za jjajjaawe Dawudi, awatali kutaaganaaga." 
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka ogw’ekkumi n’omunaana ogw’obufuzi bwa kabaka Yosiya, kabaka n’atuma omuwandiisi Safani mutabani wa Azaliya ate muzzukulu wa Mesullamu okulaga mu yeekaalu ya Mukama. N’amugamba nti," 
2Kings22:4 “Yambuka eri Kirukiya kabona Asinga obukulu, akutegeeze omuwendo gw’ensimbi ezireeteddwa mu yeekaalu ya Mukama abaggazi ze basoloozezza ku bantu." 
2Kings22:5 Ensimbi ezo zikwasibwe abasajja abaalondebwa okulabirira omulimu ogwa yeekaalu basasule abakozi abaddaabiriza yeekaalu ya Mukama," 
2Kings22:6 ababazzi, n’abazimbi, n’abaasa b’amayinja. Ate era baguleko n’embaawo n’amayinja amateme nga byonna bya kuddaabiriza yeekaalu." 
2Kings22:7 Naye tebabuuzibwa engeri gye bakozesezaamu ensimbi ezo, kubanga basajja abakola n’obwesigwa.”" 
2Kings22:8 Awo Kirukiya kabona asinga obukulu n’ategeeza Safani omuwandiisi nti, “Ekitabo eky’Amateeka nkizudde we kibadde mu yeekaalu.” N’akiwa Safani n’akisoma." 
2Kings22:9 Safani omuwandiisi n’addayo eri kabaka n’amugamba nti, “Abakungu bawaddeyo ensimbi ezibadde mu yeekaalu ya Mukama era bazikwasizza abakozi n’abalabirizi ab’omulimu okuzikozesa n’okulabirira enkozesa yaazo.”" 
2Kings22:10 Ate era Safani omuwandiisi n’ategeeza kabaka nti, “Kirukiya kabona, ampadde ekitabo.” Awo Safani n’akisomera kabaka." 
2Kings22:11 Kabaka bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyasomebwa okuva mu Kitabo eky’Amateeka n’ayuza ebyambalo bye. 
2Kings22:12 N’alagira Kirukiya kabona, Akikamu mutabani wa Safani, ne Akubooli mutabani wa Mikaaya, ne Safani omuwandiisi, ne Asaya omuweereza wa kabaka nti," 
2Kings22:13 “Mugende mumbuulize eri Mukama, nze, n’abantu bange ne Yuda yonna ku bigambo ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino ekizuuliddwa. Obusungu bwa Mukama bungi nnyo gye tuli olwa bajjajjaffe obutawuliriza bigambo eby’omu kitabo kino, era tebaakola ng’ebyawandiikibwa bino bwe bitugamba.”" 
2Kings22:14 Awo Kirukiya kabona, ne Akikamu, ne Akubooli, ne Safani, ne Asaya ne bagenda eri Kuluda nnabbi omukyala muka Sallumu mutabani wa Tikuva muzzukulu wa Kalukasi omuwanika w’ebyambalo, okumwebuuzaako. Yabeeranga mu kitundu ekyokubiri mu Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings22:15 N’abagamba nti, “Bw’ati bw’ayogera Mukama, Katonda wa Isirayiri nti," 
2Kings22:16 ‘Mutegeeze oyo abatumye nti ŋŋenda kuleeta ku kifo kino n’abantu bano akabi, ng’ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo bwe bigamba, kabaka wa Yuda by’asomye." 
2Kings22:17 Olw’okunvaako n’olw’okwotereza obubaane eri bakatonda, nga baleetera obusungu bwange okubuubuuka olwa bakatonda be bakoze, ndibaleetako obusungu bwange era tewaliba n’omu alibukkakkanya.’" 
2Kings22:18 Naye mugambe kabaka wa Yuda eyabatumye okwebuuza ku Mukama nti, ‘Bw’ati bw’ayogera Mukama, Katonda wa Isirayiri nti, ebikwata ku bigambo bye wawulidde:" 
2Kings22:19 kubanga obadde mumenyefu mu mutima ne weetoowaza mu maaso ga Mukama bwe wawulidde ebigambo ebyo bye nayogedde ku kifo kino ne ku bantu bano, nti baakuzikirira era baggweewo, ate n’oyuza n’ebyambalo byo nga wennyamidde mu maaso gange, mpulidde okukaaba kwo, bw’ayogera Mukama." 
2Kings22:20 Kyendiva nkutwala eri bajjajjaabo, n’oziikibwa mu mirembe, era amaaso go tegaliraba kabi kendireeta ku kifo kino.’ ” Awo ne bazaayo obubaka obwo eri kabaka." 
2Kings23:1 Awo kabaka n’ayita abakadde bonna aba Yuda n’ab’omu Yerusaalemi. 
2Kings23:2 N’ayambuka mu yeekaalu ya Mukama ne bakabona, ne bannabbi, n’abantu bonna okuva ku wa wansi okutuukira ddala ku wa waggulu mu bitiibwa byabwe. N’asoma ebigambo eby’omu Kitabo eky’Endagaano ekyali kizuuliddwa mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, nga bonna bawulira." 
2Kings23:3 Awo kabaka n’ayimirira okuliraana empagi n’azza obuggya endagaano ne Mukama, okutambuliranga mu kkubo lya Mukama, n’okukwatanga amateeka ge, n’okutambuliranga mu mpya ze, n’okugonderanga ebiragiro bye, n’omutima gwe gwonna, n’emmeeme ye yonna, ng’akakasa ebyawandiikibwa ebyali mu kitabo ekyo. Awo abantu bonna ne beewaayo okuzza endagaano obuggya." 
2Kings23:4 Awo kabaka n’alagira Kirukiya kabona asinga obukulu ne bakabona abaamuddiriranga, wamu n’abaggazi okuggya mu yeekaalu ya Mukama ebintu byonna ebya Baali n’ebya Asera, n’eby’eggye lyonna ery’omu ggulu, n’abyokera ebweru wa Yerusaalemi mu ttale eriri mu kiwonvu kya Kiduloni, evvu n’alitwala e Beseri." 
2Kings23:5 N’agoba bakabona abaasinzanga ebifaananyi abaali balondeddwa bassekabaka ba Yuda okwoterezanga obubaane mu bifo ebigulumivu mu bibuga ebya Yuda n’okwetooloola Yerusaalemi, n’abo abayoterezanga obubaane eri Baali n’enjuba n’omwezi, n’eri emunyeenye n’eri eggye lyonna ery’omu ggulu." 
2Kings23:6 N’aggya empagi ya Asera mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, n’agitwala ebweru wa Yerusaalemi mu kiwonvu ekya Kiduloni, n’agyokera eyo. N’agisekulasekula n’asaasaanya evvu lyayo ku malaalo ag’abantu abaabulijjo." 
2Kings23:7 Ate era yamenyaamenya n’ennyumba ez’abaalyanga ebisiyaga ezaali mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, era eyo abakazi gye baalukiriranga Asera ebitimbibwa." 
2Kings23:8 Awo Yosiya n’aleeta bakabona bonna okuva mu bibuga bya Yuda, n’ayonoona ebifo ebigulumivu okuva e Geba okutuuka e Beeruseba, bakabona gye baayoterezanga obubaane, era n’amenyaamenya amasabo agaali okumpi ne wankaaki ow’oku Mulyango gwa Yoswa, omukulembeze ow’ekibuga, agaali ku luuyi olwa kkono olwa wankaaki ow’ekibuga." 
2Kings23:9 Newaakubadde nga bakabona bali ab’oku bifo ebigulumivu tebaweerezanga ku kyoto kya Mukama mu Yerusaalemi, balyanga emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse wamu ne bakabona bannaabwe." 
2Kings23:10 Yavvoola era n’amenyaamenya ekyoto kya Tofesi ekyali mu Kiwonvu ky’abaana ba Kinomu, obutaganya muntu yenna kuwaayo mwana we owoobulenzi newaakubadde owoobuwala ng’ekiweebwayo eri Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Era yaggyawo n’embalaasi ezaali mu mulyango gwa yeekaalu, bassekabaka ba Yuda ze baali bawonze eri enjuba, era n’ayokya amagaali ze gaasikanga. Zaabeeranga mu luggya okuliraana n’ekisenge ekyali eky’omukungu Nasanumereki." 
2Kings23:12 Yamenyaamenya n’ebyoto bassekabaka ba Yuda bye baali bazimbye ku kasolya okumpi n’ekisenge ekya waggulu ekya Akazi, era n’ebyoto Manase bye yali azimbye mu mpya zombi eza yeekaalu ya Mukama. Byonna yabiggyayo, n’abimenyaamenya, enfuufu yaabyo n’agiyiwa mu kiwonvu ekya Kiduloni." 
2Kings23:13 Era kabaka n’ayonoona n’ebifo ebigulumivu ebyali ebuvanjuba w’e Yerusaalemi ku luuyi olwa bukiikaddyo ku lusozi olw’okuzikirira, ebyo Sulemaani kabaka wa Isirayiri bye yazimbira bakatonda ab’omuzizo: Asutoleesi katonda omukazi ow’Abasidoni, ne Kemosi ow’Abamowaabu, ne Mirukomu ow’Abamoni." 
2Kings23:14 N’amenyaamenya empagi, n’atemaatema empagi za Asera era ebifo ebyo n’abijjuza amagumba g’abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Era n’ekyoto ekyali e Beseri, n’ekifo ekigulumivu ekyaleetera Isirayiri okwonoona, Yerobowaamu mutabani wa Nebati bye yali azimbye, byonna Yosiya n’abimenyaamenya. N’ayokya era n’asekulasekula ekifo ekigulumivu okutuusa lwe kyafuuka enfuufu era n’ayokya n’empagi eya Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Awo Yosiya bwe yatunulatunula, n’alaba amalaalo agaali ku lusozi, n’agenda n’aggyamu amagumba g’abafu n’agokera ku kyoto n’akyonoona, ng’ekigambo kya Mukama bwe kyali omusajja wa Katonda kye yalangirira." 
2Kings23:17 Awo kabaka n’abuuza nti, “Kijjukizo ki ekyo kye ndaba?” Abasajja ab’ekibuga ne bamuddamu nti, “Ago ge malaalo ag’omusajja wa Katonda eyava mu Yuda n’alangirira ebigambo ebikwata ku kyoto eky’e Beseri, by’okikoze.”" 
2Kings23:18 N’abagamba nti, “Mugaleke, era temuganya muntu yenna kukwata ku magumba ge.” Awo ne batakwata ku magumba ge, wadde aga nnabbi ow’e Samaliya." 
2Kings23:19 N’amasabo gonna agaali mu bifo ebigulumivu bassekabaka ba Yuda bye baali bazimbye mu bibuga bya Samaliya ne baleetera obusungu bwa Mukama okubuubuuka, Yosiya n’agavvoola era n’agaggyawo nga bwe yakola e Beseri." 
2Kings23:20 Yosiya n’atta bakabona bonna abaaweerezanga mu bifo ebigulumivu ku byoto byayo, era amagumba gaabwe n’agokera okwo, n’oluvannyuma n’addayo e Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings23:21 Awo kabaka n’alagira abantu bonna ng’agamba nti, “Mukwate Okuyitako kwa Mukama Katonda wammwe ng’ekyawandiikibwa bwe kiri mu Kitabo eky’endagaano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Okuviira ddala ku mirembe gy’abalamuzi, ne ku mirembe gya bassekabaka ba Isirayiri n’aba Yuda, tewaaliwo kukwata Mbaga ey’Okuyitako." 
2Kings23:23 Naye mu mwaka ogw’ekkumi n’omunaana ogw’obufuzi bwa kabaka Yosiya, Embaga eyo n’ebaawo mu Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings23:24 Ate era n’abafumu, n’aboogeza emizimu, n’ebifaananyi, n’eby’emizizo byonna ebyali mu Yuda ne mu Yerusaalemi, Yosiya, n’abiwera. Ekyo yakikola okutuukiriza ebigambo eby’etteeka eryali mu kitabo Kirukiya kabona kye yazuula mu Yeekaalu ya Mukama." 
2Kings23:25 Era tewali kabaka eyasooka Yosiya wadde eyamuddirira eyamufaanana era eyakyukira Mukama n’omutima gwe gwonna, n’emmeeme ye yonna era n’amaanyi ge gonna, ng’agoberera Amateeka ga Musa." 
2Kings23:26 Kyokka Mukama n’atakendeeza ku busungu bwe obungi obwabuubuukira ku Yuda, olw’ebikolwa byonna ebya Manase ebyaleetera Mukama okusunguwala." 
2Kings23:27 Awo Mukama n’ayogera nti, “Ndiggyawo Yuda mu maaso gange nga bwe nnaggyawo Isirayiri, era n’ekibuga Yerusaalemi kye nneeroboza, wamu ne yeekaalu eno gye nayogerako nti, ‘Erinnya lyange linaabanga omwo,’ siribisaako nate mwoyo.”" 
2Kings23:28 Ebyafaayo ebirala byonna eby’omu mirembe gya Yosiya, ne bye yakola byonna, tebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo eky’ebyomumirembe gya bassekabaka ba Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Awo mu biro ebyo, Falaawo Neko nga ye kabaka wa Misiri n’ayambuka okutabaala kabaka w’e Bwasuli ku Mugga Fulaati; kabaka Yosiya n’agenda okumubeera, naye Falaawo Neko olwamulengera ng’ajja, n’amuttira e Megiddo." 
2Kings23:30 Abaddu ba Yosiya ne bateeka omulambo gwe mu gaali ne baguggya e Megiddo ne bagutwala e Yerusaalemi, ne bamuziika mu ntaana ye. Awo abantu ab’omu nsi ne batwala Yekoyakaazi mutabani wa Yosiya ne bamufukako amafuta ne bamufuula kabaka n’asikira kitaawe okuba kabaka." 
2Kings23:31 Yekoyakaazi we yaliira obwakabaka yalina emyaka amakumi abiri mu esatu, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi okumala emyezi esatu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Kamutali muwala wa Yeremiya ow’e Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 N’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama nga bajjajjaabe bwe baakola. 
2Kings23:33 Falaawo Neko n’amuggya ku bwakabaka n’amusibira mu masamba e Libula mu nsi y’e Kamasi obutaddayo kufuga mu Yerusaalemi, era n’asalira Yuda omusolo ogw’effeeza ttani ssatu ne bisatu byakuna ne zaabu kilo amakumi asatu mu nnya." 
2Kings23:34 Awo Falaawo Neko n’afuula Eriyakimu mutabani wa Yosiya kabaka, n’akyusa n’erinnya lye, n’amutuuma Yekoyakimu. N’aggyayo Yekoyakaazi, n’amutwala e Misiri, era eyo gye yafiira." 
2Kings23:35 Awo Yekoyakimu n’awangayo effeeza ne zaabu nga Falaawo Neko bwe yalagira. Era okusobola okutuukirizanga ekyo, Yekoyakimu yawoozanga abantu, n’abaggyangako effeeza ne zaabu nga buli muntu bwe yagerekebwa." 
2Kings23:36 Yekoyakimu we yafuukira kabaka yali awezezza emyaka amakumi abiri mu etaano, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi okumala emyaka kkumi na gumu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Zebida muwala wa Pedaya ow’e Luuma." 
2Kings23:37 Naye n’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, nga bajjajjaabe be bwe baakola." 
2Kings24:1 Mu biro ebyo, Nebukadduneeza kabaka w’e Babulooni n’alumba, era n’afuula Yekoyakimu omuddu we okumala emyaka esatu. Naye Yekoyakimu oluvannyuma n’ajeema, n’akola olutalo ku Nebukadduneeza." 
2Kings24:2 Awo Mukama n’asindikira Yekoyakimu ebibinja by’Abakaludaaya, n’Abasuuli, n’Abamowaabu, n’Abamoni, n’abatuma okulumba Yuda, ng’ekigambo kya Mukama kye yayogerera mu baweereza be bannabbi bwe kyali." 
2Kings24:3 Era ddala ebyo by’atuukirira ku Yuda ng’ekiragiro kya Mukama bwe kyali, okubaggya mu maaso ge olw’ebibi bya Manase n’ebirala byonna bye yakola," 
2Kings24:4 ng’okwo kwe kuli okuyiwa omusaayi ogutaliiko musango. Yajjuza Yerusaalemi n’omusaayi ogutaliiko musango, Mukama kye yali tagenda kusonyiwa." 
2Kings24:5 Ebyafaayo ebirala ebyaliwo ku mulembe gwa Yekoyakimu ne byonna bye yakola, tebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo eky’ebyomumirembe gya bassekabaka ba Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Awo Yekoyakimu n’afa, mutabani we Yekoyakini n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
2Kings24:7 Kabaka w’e Misiri teyava nate mu nsi ye, kubanga kabaka w’e Babulooni yali awambye ebibye byonna okuviira ddala ku mukutu gw’Omugga ogw’e Misiri oguyiwa ku Nnyanja Ennene okutuuka ku Mugga Fulaati." 
2Kings24:8 Yekoyakini we yafuukira kabaka yalina emyaka kkumi na munaana, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi okumala emyezi esatu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Nekusita muwala wa Erunasani ow’e Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings24:9 N’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, nga kitaawe bwe yakola." 
2Kings24:10 Mu biro ebyo eggye lya Nebukadduneeza kabaka w’e Babulooni ne lirumba ekibuga ky’e Yerusaalemi, ne kizingizibwa." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadduneeza yennyini n’ajja mu kibuga, ng’eggye lye likyakizingizza." 
2Kings24:12 Awo Yekoyakini kabaka wa Yuda, ne nnyina, n’abaddu ba kabaka, n’abakungu be, n’abaami be bonna ne beewaayo eri kabaka w’e Babulooni mu mwaka gwe ogw’omunaana bukya alya bwakabaka, era Yekoyakini n’atwalibwa nga musibe." 
2Kings24:13 Era mu kiseera kye kimu, Nebukadduneeza n’atwala eby’obugagga byonna okuva mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, n’okuva mu lubiri lwa kabaka, era n’atemaatema ebibya byonna ebya zaabu, Sulemaani kabaka wa Isirayiri bye yali akoze ng’abitadde mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, nga Mukama bwe yalagira." 
2Kings24:14 N’atwala Yerusaalemi kyonna, n’abakungu bonna, n’abasajja abalwanyi bonna, ne baffundi bonna n’abaweesi bonna mu buwaŋŋanguse, awamu ne bawera abantu ng’omutwalo gumu. Abasemberayo ddala obwavu be yalekamu bokka." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadduneeza n’atwala Yekoyakini e Babulooni nga musibe okuva mu Yerusaalemi, era n’atwala ne nnyina, ne bakyala ba kabaka, n’abakungu be, n’abaami abaali ab’ekitiibwa mu nsi." 
2Kings24:16 Ate era yawamba abasajja ab’amaanyi kasanvu, ne baffundi n’abaweesi lukumi, bonna n’abatwala e Babulooni nga basibe." 
2Kings24:17 Nebukadduneeza n’addira Mataniya kitaawe wa Yekoyakini omuto, n’amufuula kabaka, era n’amukyusa n’erinnya n’amutuuma Zeddekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zeddekiya we yafuukira kabaka yalina emyaka amakumi abiri mu gumu, era n’afugira mu Yerusaalemi emyaka kkumi na gumu. Nnyina erinnya lye yali Kamutali muwala wa Yeremiya ow’e Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 N’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, nga Yekoyakini bwe yakola." 
2Kings24:20 Ebyo byonna ebyatuuka ku Yerusaalemi ne ku Yuda, byabaawo olw’obusungu bwa Mukama obwababubuukirako, era n’oluvannyuma n’abagoba mu maaso ge. Naye oluvannyuma Zeddekiya y’ajeemera kabaka w’e Babulooni." 
2Kings25:1 Awo Zeddekiya nga yakafugira emyaka mwenda, Nebukadduneeza kabaka w’e Babulooni n’eggye lye lyonna ne balumba Yerusaalemi ku lunaku olw’ekkumi mu mwezi ogw’ekkumi; ne basiisira ebweru waakyo, ne bakizimbako ebigo okukyetooloola." 
2Kings25:2 Awo ekibuga ne kizingizibwa okumala emyaka ebiri nga Zeddekiya y’akyali kabaka. 
2Kings25:3 Ku lunaku olw’omwenda mu mwezi ogwokuna enjala n’eba nnyingi nnyo mu kibuga, abantu ab’omu nsi ne babulwako n’emmere ey’okulya." 
2Kings25:4 Awo kabaka n’eggye lye lyonna abaali mu kibuga ne bawagula mu bbugwe ekituli, ekiro, ne badduka nga bayita mu mulyango ogwaliraananga ennimiro ya kabaka ne bayita ne ku Bakaludaaya abaali bazingizza ekibuga enjuuyi zonna." 
2Kings25:5 Naye eggye ly’Abakaludaaya ne bagoberera kabaka, okutuusa lwe bamukwatira mu nsenyi ez’e Yeriko n’eggye lye lyonna ne lisaasaana okumwabulira." 
2Kings25:6 Ne bawamba kabaka, ne bamuleeta eri kabaka w’e Babulooni e Libula gye yasalirwa omusango." 
2Kings25:7 Ne battira batabani ba Zeddekiya mu maaso ge, ne bamuggyamu amaaso, ne bamuteeka mu masamba, n’atwalibwa e Babulooni." 
2Kings25:8 Awo ku lunaku olw’omusanvu mu mwezi ogwokutaano mu mwaka ogw’ekkumi n’omwenda ogw’obwakabaka bwa Nebukadduneeza, kabaka w’e Babulooni, Nebuzaladaani omuduumizi ow’eggye lya kabaka ery’oku ntikko, ate nga mwami wa kabaka w’e Babulooni n’ajja mu Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings25:9 N’ayokya yeekaalu ya Mukama, n’olubiri lwa kabaka, n’ennyumba zonna na buli kizimbe ekikulu era nga kya muwendo mu Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings25:10 Awo eggye lyonna ery’Abakaludaaya nga bakulemberwa omuduumizi ow’eggye ery’oku ntikko, ne bamenya bbugwe wa Yerusaalemi." 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaladaani omuduumizi ow’eggye ery’oku ntikko n’atwala abantu bonna abaali basigaddewo mu kibuga, mu buwaŋŋanguse nga basibe, n’abaali baasenga kabaka w’e Babulooni, n’abalala bonna abaali mu kibuga." 
2Kings25:12 Wabula yalekamu abaali basemberayo ddala obwavu mu nsi eyo, okulabiriranga emizabbibu n’okulimanga." 
2Kings25:13 Abakaludaaya ne bamenyaamenya empagi ez’ebikomo n’ebyuma ebyawaniriranga ennyanja ey’ekikomo, n’ennyanja ey’ekikomo, ebyali mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, n’ebikomo byamu ne babitwala e Babulooni." 
2Kings25:14 Era baatwala n’entamu, n’ebisena, n’ebisalako ebisirinza, n’ebijiiko n’ebintu byonna eby’ekikomo ebyakozesebwanga mu yeekaalu." 
2Kings25:15 Omuduumizi ow’eggye ery’oku ntikko n’atwala n’ebyoterezo wamu n’ebibya ebyali ebya zaabu n’ebyali ebya ffeeza. 
2Kings25:16 Ekikomo ekyava mu mpagi ebbiri, ne mu nnyanja, ne mu byuma ebyawaniriranga ennyanja ey’ekikomo, Sulemaani bye yakolera yeekaalu ya Mukama, obuzito bwakyo nga tebumanyiddwa." 
2Kings25:17 Buli mpagi obugulumivu yali mita munaana ne desimoolo emu ne ku mutwe gwayo nga kuliko ekikomo ng’obugulumivu bwakyo mita emu ne desimoolo ssatu, nga kitoneddwatoneddwa n’ebifaananyi n’amakomamawanga ag’ekikomo okukyetooloola. N’empagi eyookubiri yali ekoleddwa mu ngeri y’emu." 
2Kings25:18 Omuduumizi ow’eggye ery’oku ntikko n’atwala nga basibe: Seraya kabona Asinga obukulu, n’omumyuka we Zeffaniya, n’abaggazi abasatu." 
2Kings25:19 Era yatwala n’omukungu eyaduumiranga abasajja abalwanyi, n’abakungu abalala bataano abatuulanga ku lukiiko lwa kabaka; era n’atwala n’omuwandiisi omukulu eyavunaanyizibwanga okuyingizanga abantu mu magye mu nsi ya Yuda, n’abasajja abannansi nkaaga abaasangibwa mu kibuga." 
2Kings25:20 Abo bonna Nebuzaladaani omuduumizi ow’eggye ery’oku ntikko n’abatwalira kabaka w’e Babulooni e Libula. 
2Kings25:21 Kabaka w’e Babulooni n’abattira eyo e Libula, mu nsi y’e Kamasi. Bw’atyo Yuda n’atwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse nga musibe, okuva mu nsi ye." 
2Kings25:22 Awo Nebukadduneeza kabaka w’e Babulooni n’alonda Gedaliya mutabani wa Akikamu, muzzukulu wa Safani okuba omukulembeze w’abo abaali basigaddewo mu Yuda." 
2Kings25:23 Awo abakungu ab’eggye n’abasajja abalala bwe baawulira nga kabaka w’e Babulooni alonze Gedaliya okuba omukulembeze, ne bagenda eri Gedaliya e Mizupa. Abasajja abakungu abo baali Isimayiri mutabani wa Nesaniya, ne Yokanaani mutabani wa Kaleya, ne Seraya mutabani wa Tanukumesi Omunetofa, ne Yaazaniya mutabani w’Omumaakasi." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya n’abalayirira bo n’abasajja baabwe n’abagamba nti, “Temutya bakungu Bakaludaaya, naye mutereere mu nsi muweereze kabaka w’e Babulooni kale ebintu byonna binaabagendera bulungi.”" 
2Kings25:25 Naye mu mwezi ogw’omusanvu, Isimayiri mutabani wa Nesaniya, muzzukulu wa Erisaama ow’olulyo olulangira n’ajja n’abasajja kkumi, n’alumba Gedaliya era n’amutta, awamu n’Abayudaaya; n’Abakaludaaya abaali awamu naye e Mizupa nabo n’abatta." 
2Kings25:26 Awo abantu bonna okuviira ddala ku wawansi okutuukira ddala ku w’eddaala erya waggulu, n’abamaggye abakulu bonna, ne baddukira e Misiri, nga batidde Abakaludaaya." 
2Kings25:27 Awo Yekoyakini kabaka wa Yuda nga yakamala emyaka amakumi asatu mu musanvu mu buwaŋŋanguse mu busibe, nga Evirumerodaki kyajje afuuke kabaka w’e Babulooni, Evirumerodaki n’ata Yekoyakini kabaka wa Yuda okuva mu kkomera ku lunaku olw’amakumi abiri mu omusanvu mu mwezi ogw’ekkumi n’ebiri." 
2Kings25:28 N’ayogera naye ebigambo ebyekisa, n’amuwa n’ekitiibwa ekya waggulu okusinga ne bakabaka abalala abaali awamu naye mu buwaŋŋanguse mu busibe e Babulooni." 
2Kings25:29 Awo Yekoyakini n’aggyamu ebyambalo bye eby’ekkomera n’aliiranga wamu ne kabaka w’e Babulooni ku mmeeza ya kabaka ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwe. 
2Kings25:30 Kabaka n’awanga Yekoyakini omugabo ogwa buli lunaku ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwe. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu yazaala Seezi, Seezi n’azaala Enosi;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Enosi n’azaala Kenani, Kenani n’azaala Makalaleri, Makalaleri n’azaala Yaledi;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Yaledi n’azaala Enoka, Enoka n’azaala Mesuseera, Mesuseera n’azaala Lameka, Lameka n’azaala Nuuwa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Nuuwa n’azaala Seemu, ne Kaamu ne Yafeesi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Batabani ba Yafeesi baali: Gomeri, ne Magogi, ne Madayi, ne Yavani, ne Tubali, ne Meseki, ne Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Batabani ba Gomeri baali: Asukenaazi, ne Difasi ne Togaluma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Batabani ba Yavani baali: Erisa, ne Talusiisi, ne Kittimu, ne Lodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Batabani ba Kaamu baali: Kuusi, ne Mizulayimu, ne Puuti, ne Kanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Batabani ba Kuusi baali: Seeba, ne Kavira, ne Sabuta, ne Laama, ne Sabuteka. Ne batabani ba Laama baali: Seeba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuusi n’azaala Nimuloodi, Nimuloodi n’akula n’afuuka omusajja omuzira ow’amaanyi mu nsi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizulayimu n’azaala Ludimu, ne Anamimu, ne Lekabimu, ne Nafutukimu;" 
1Chronicles1:12 ne Pasulusimu, ne Kasulukimu (Abafirisuuti mwe basibuka), ne Kafutolimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanani n’azaala Sidoni, ye mutabani we omukulu, ne Keesi;" 
1Chronicles1:14 n’Abayebusi, n’Abamoli, n’Abagirugaasi;" 
1Chronicles1:15 n’Abakiivi, n’Abaluki, n’Abasiini;" 
1Chronicles1:16 n’Aballuvadi, n’Abazemali n’Abakamasi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Batabani ba Seemu baali: Eramu, ne Asuli, ne Alupakusaadi, ne Ludi ne Alamu. Ate batabani ba Alamu baali: Uzi, ne Kuuli, ne Geseri, ne Meseki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Alupakusaadi n’azaala Seera, Seera n’azaala Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yazaala abaana babiri aboobulenzi, erinnya ly’omu nga ye Peregi, amakulu nti ensi yali egabiddwamu, n’erinnya ly’omulala nga ye Yokutaani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokutaani n’azaala Alumodaadi, ne Serefu, ne Kazalumaveesi, ne Yera;" 
1Chronicles1:21 ne Kadolaamu, ne Uzali, ne Dikula;" 
1Chronicles1:22 ne Ebali, ne Abimayeeri, ne Seeba;" 
1Chronicles1:23 ne Ofiri, ne Kavira ne Yobabu. Era abo bonna be baali batabani ba Yokutaani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Enda ya Seemu okutuuka ku Ibulaamu ye yali eno; Seemu n’azaala Alupakusaadi, Alupakusaadi n’azaala Seera," 
1Chronicles1:25 Seera n’azaala Eberi, Eberi n’azaala Peregi, ne Peregi n’azaala Lewu." 
1Chronicles1:26 Lewu n’azaala Serugi, Serugi n’azaala Nakoli, ne Nakoli n’azaala Teera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Teera n’azaala wa Ibulaamu, oyo ye Ibulayimu." 
1Chronicles1:28 Batabani ba Ibulayimu baali Isaaka ne Isimayiri. 
1Chronicles1:29 Luno lwe lulyo lwabwe: Nebayoosi ye yali mutabani wa Isimayiri omukulu, ne kulyoka kuddako Kedali, ne Adubeeri, ne Mibusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 ne Misuma, ne Duma, ne Massa, ne Kadadi, ne Teema," 
1Chronicles1:31 ne Yetuli, ne Nafisi ne Kedema. Eyo y’enda ya Isimayiri." 
1Chronicles1:32 Batabani ba Ketula, omuweereza omukazi owa Ibulayimu be baali Zimulaani, ne Yokusaani, ne Medani, ne Midiyaani, ne Isubaki ne Suwa. Ate batabani ba Yokusaani baali Seeba ne Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Batabani ba Midiyaani baali Efa, ne Eferi, ne Kanoki, ne Abida ne Eruda. Abo bonna be baali bazzukulu ba Ketula." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ibulayimu n’azaala Isaaka; batabani ba Isaaka baali Esawu ne Isirayiri. 
1Chronicles1:35 Batabani ba Esawu baali Erifaazi, ne Leweri, ne Yewusi, ne Yalamu ne Koola." 
1Chronicles1:36 Batabani ba Erifaazi baali Temani, ne Omali, ne Zeefi, ne Gatamu, ne Kenozi, ne Timuna ne Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Batabani ba Leweri baali Nakasi, ne Zeera, ne Samma ne Mizza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Batabani ba Seyiri baali Lotani, ne Sobali, ne Zibyoni, ne Ana, ne Disoni, ne Ezeri ne Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Batabani ba Lotani baali Kooli, ne Komamu; Timuna yali mwannyina Lotani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Batabani ba Sobali baali Aliyani, ne Manakasi, ne Ebali, ne Seefi ne Onamu. Ne batabani ba Zibyoni baali Aya ne Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mutabani wa Ana yali Disoni, batabani ba Disoni nga be ba Kamulani, ne Esubani, ne Isulani ne Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Batabani ba Ezeri baali Birukani, ne Zaavani ne Yaakani; batabani ba Disani baali Uzi ne Alani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Bano be bakabaka abaafuga mu Edomu nga tewannabaawo kabaka mu Isirayiri abafuga: Bera mutabani wa Byoli n’erinnya ly’ekibuga kye lyali Dinukaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bera bwe yafa, Yokabu mutabani wa Zeera ow’e Bozula n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yokabu bwe yafa, Kusamu eyava mu nsi y’Abatemani, n’amusikira okuba kabaka." 
1Chronicles1:46 Kusamu bwe yafa, Kadadi mutabani wa Bedadi, eyali awangudde Midiyaani mu nsi Mowaabu, n’afuga mu kifo kye n’erinnya ly’ekibuga kye lyali Avisi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Kadadi bwe yafa, Samula ow’e Masuleka n’afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula bwe yafa, Sawuli ow’e Lekobosi ekiri okumpi n’omugga Fulaati, n’afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:49 Sawuli bwe yafa, Baalukanani mutabani wa Akubooli n’afuga mu kifo kye." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baalukanani bwe yafa, Kadadi n’afuga mu kifo kye, n’erinnya ly’ekibuga kye lyali Payi, ate nga mukyala we ye Meketaberi muwala wa Matuledi, ate era nga ye muzzukulu wa Mezakabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Kadadi naye n’afa. Abakungu ba Edomu baali Timuna, ne Aliya, Yesesi," 
1Chronicles1:52 ne Okolibama, ne Era, ne Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 ne Kenozi, ne Temani, ne Mibuzali," 
1Chronicles1:54 ne Magudyeri, ne Iramu. Abo be baali abakungu ba Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Bano be baali batabani ba Isirayiri: Lewubeeni, ne Simyoni, ne Leevi, ne Yuda, ne Isakaali, ne Zebbulooni," 
1Chronicles2:2 ne Ddaani, ne Yusufu, ne Benyamini, ne Nafutaali, ne Gaadi ne Aseri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Batabani ba Yuda baali Eri, ne Onani ne Seera, era nnyabwe ye yali Basusuwa Omukanani. Eri, eyali mutabani wa Yuda omukulu n’akola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, era Mukama n’amutta." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamali muka mwana wa Yuda, n’azaalira Yuda Pereezi, ne Zeera. Batabani ba Yuda bonna awamu baali bataano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Batabani ba Perezi baali Kezulooni ne Kamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Batabani ba Zeera baali Zimuli, ne Esani, ne Kemani, ne Kalukoli, ne Dala, bonna awamu bataano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mutabani wa Kalumi ye yali Akali, eyaleetera Isirayiri emitawaana kubanga yayonoona mu ebyo ebyawongebwa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mutabani wa Esani ye yali Azaliya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Batabani ba Kezulooni baali Yerameeri, ne Laamu ne Kerubayi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Laamu n’azaala Amminadaabu, Amminadaabu n’aba kitaawe n’azaala Nakusoni, eyali omukulu w’ekika kya Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nakusoni n’azaala Saluma, ne Saluma n’azaala Bowaazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowaazi ye n’azaala Obedi ate Obedi n’azaala Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese n’azaala Eriyaabu, eyali mutabani we omukulu; Abinadaabu nga ye wookubiri, Simeeyi nga ye wookusatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nesaneeri nga ye wookuna, Laddayi nga ye wookutaano," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu n’aba ow’omukaaga, Dawudi nga ye wa musanvu." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bannyinaabwe be baali Zeruyiya ne Abbigayiri. Batabani ba Zeruyiya baali basatu nga be ba Abisaayi, Yowaabu ne Asakeri." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abbigayiri yali nnyina wa Amasa, ne Amasa n’azaala Yeseri Omuyisimayiri." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mutabani wa Kezulooni n’azaala abaana mu Azuba mukyala we ate era ne mu Yeriyoosi. Yeseri, ne Sobabu, ne Aludoni be baali abaana ba Azuba." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba bwe yafa, Kalebu n’awasa Efulaasi, eyamuzaalira Kuuli." 
1Chronicles2:20 Kuuli n’azaala Uli, Uli n’azaala Bezaleeri." 
1Chronicles2:21 Oluvannyuma Kezulooni, ne yeebaka ne muwala wa Makiri kitaawe wa Gireyaadi, gwe yali afumbiddwa nga wa myaka nkaaga, n’amuzaalira Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu n’azaala Yayiri, eyafuganga ebibuga amakumi abiri mu bisatu mu nsi ye Gireyaadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Naye Gesuli ne Alamu ne bawamba ebibuga bya Yayiri, Kenasi n’ebyalo byayo, byonna awamu byali ebibuga nkaaga. Abo bonna be baali abazzukulu ba Makiri, kitaawe wa Gireyaadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Kezulooni ng’amaze okufa, Kalebu ne yeebaka ne maama we omuto Efulaasi eyali mukyala wa kitaawe, n’amuzaalira Asukuli, n’azaala Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerumeeri mutabani wa Kezulooni omukulu yalina batabani be bataano nga be ba Laamu, mutabani we omukulu, ne Buna, ne Oleni, ne Ozemu ne Akiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Wabula Yerumeeri yalina omukyala omulala ng’erinnya lye ye Atala, era oyo yali nnyina Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Batabani ba Laamu mutabani omukulu owa Yerameeri baali Maazi, ne Yamuni ne Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Batabani ba Onamu be baali Sammayi ne Yada, ate batabani ba Sammayi nga be ba Nadabu ne Abisuli." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisuli yalina omukyala erinnya lye Abikayiri, era n’amuzaalira Abani ne Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Batabani ba Nadabu be baali Seredi ne Appayimu, naye Seredi n’afa nga tazadde mwana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Mutabani wa Appayimu yali Isi, ate nga Isi ye kitaawe wa Akulayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Batabani ba Yada muganda we Sammayi be baali Yeseri ne Yonasaani, naye Yeseri n’afa nga tazadde mwana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Batabani ba Yonasaani be baali Peresi ne Zaza. Abo bonna be baali bazzukulu ba Yerameeri. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesani ye yalina baana ba buwala bokka, ng’alina n’omuddu Omumisiri, erinnya lye Yala." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani n’awaayo omu ku bawala be okufuumbirwa omuddu we Yala, era omuwala n’azaala Attayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attayi n’azaala Nasani, ne Nasani n’azaala Zabadi." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi n’azaala Efulali, ne Efulali n’azaala Obedi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi n’azaala Yeeku, ne Yeeku n’azaala Azaliya." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaliya n’azaala Kerezi, ne Kerezi n’azaala Ereyaasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Ereyaasa n’azaala Sisumaayi, ne Sisumaayi n’azaala Sallumu." 
1Chronicles2:41 Sallumu n’azaala Yekamiya, ne Yekamiya n’azaala Erisaama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Omwana omukulu owa Kalebu muganda wa Yerameeri, ye yali Mesa, ate Mesa n’azaala Zifu. Zifu n’azaala Malesa, Malesa n’azaala Kebbulooni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Batabani ba Kebbulooni baali Koola, ne Tappua, ne Lekemu, ne Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema n’azaala Lakamu, ne Lakamu n’azaala Yolukeyaamu. Lekemu n’azaala Sammayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mutabani wa Sammayi n’azaala Manoni, ne Mawoni n’azaala Besuzuli." 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa omukazi omulala owa Kalebu yamuzaalira Kalani, ne Moza ne Gazezi. Ate Kalani n’azaala omulenzi gwe yatuuma Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Batabani ba Yadayi baali Legemu, ne Yosamu, ne Gesani, ne Pereti, ne Efa ne Saafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ate era Kalebu yalina omukazi omulala, Maaka eyamuzaalira Seberi ne Tirukaana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Mukazi we oyo yazaalayo n’omwana omulala erinnya lye Saafu, eyazaala Madumanna. Seva n’azaala Makubena ne Gibea. Muwala wa Kalebu ye yali Akusa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo be baali bazzukulu ba Kalebu. Batabani ba Kuuli baali Efulaasa omuggulanda, Sobali n’azaala Kiriyasuyalimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Saluma n’azaala Besirekemu, ne Kalefu n’azaala Besugaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Sabali eyazaala Kiriyasuyalimu, yalina abaana abalala nga be ba Kalowe, ne kimu kyakubiri eky’Abamenukosi," 
1Chronicles2:53 n’ebika ebya Kiriyasuyalimu nga be ba Abayisuli, n’Abapusi, n’Abasumasi, n’Abamisulayi. Muno mwe mwasibuka Abazolasi n’Abayesutawooli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Batabani ba Saluma baali Besirekemu, n’Abanetufa, Atulosubesuyowabu, ne kimu kyakubiri eky’Abamanakasi, Abazooli," 
1Chronicles2:55 n’ebika by’abawandiisi b’amateeka abaabeeranga e Yabezi, nga be b’Abatirasi, Abasimeyasi, n’Abasukasi. Bano be Bakeeni abasibuka mu Kammasi, era be baavaamu oluggya lwa Lekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bano be baana Dawudi be yazaalira mu Kebbulooni: Omuggulanda ye yali Amunoni gwe yazaala mu Akinoamu Omuyezuleeri; owookubiri ye yali Danyeri gwe yazaala mu Abbigayiri Omukalumeeri; 
1Chronicles3:2 owookusatu ye yali Abusaalomu gwe yazaala mu Maaka muwala wa Talumaayi kabaka w’e Gesuli; n’owookuna ye yali Adoniya gwe yazaala mu Kaggisi. 
1Chronicles3:3 Owookutaano ye yali Sefatiya, gwe yazaala mu Abitali n’ow’omukaaga nga ye Isuleyamu gwe yazaala mu Egula." 
1Chronicles3:4 Bano omukaaga Dawudi be yazaalira mu Kebbulooni, gye yafugira emyaka musanvu n’emyezi mukaaga. Dawudi yafugira mu Yerusaalemi emyaka amakumi asatu mu esatu," 
1Chronicles3:5 era bano be baana be yazaalira eyo: Simeeyi, ne Sobabu, ne Nasani, ne Sulemaani be yazaala mu Besusebba muwala wa Amiyeeri." 
1Chronicles3:6 N’abalala baali Ibukali, ne Erisaama, ne Erifereti," 
1Chronicles3:7 ne Noga, ne Nefegi, ne Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 ne Erisaama, ne Eriyada, ne Erifereti, bonna awamu mwenda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bano bonna be baali batabani ba Dawudi, obutabala batabani be abalala aba bazaana be. Tamali ye yali mwannyinaabwe." 
1Chronicles3:10 Mutabani wa Sulemaani yali Lekobowaamu, ne Abiya nga ye mutabani wa Lekobowaamu, ne Asa nga ye mutabani wa Abiya, ne Yekosafaati nga ye mutabani wa Asa," 
1Chronicles3:11 ne Yolaamu nga ye mutabani wa Yekosafaati, ne Akaziya nga ye mutabani wa Yolaamu, ne Yowaasi nga ye mutabani wa Akaziya," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amaziya nga ye mutabani wa Yowaasi, ne Azaliya nga ye mutabani wa Amaziya, ne Yosamu nga ye mutabani wa Azaliya." 
1Chronicles3:13 Akazi yali mutabani wa Yosamu, ne Keezeekiya nga ye mutabani wa Akazi, ne Manase nga ye mutabani wa Keezeekiya." 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni yali mutabani wa Manase, ne Yosiya nga ye mutabani wa Amoni." 
1Chronicles3:15 Batabani ba Yosiya baali Yokanaani omuggulanda, ne Yekoyakimu ye yali owookubiri, ne Zeddekiya nga wa wakusatu, ne Sallumu nga wakuna." 
1Chronicles3:16 Batabani ba Yekoyakimu baali Yekoniya ne Zeddekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Abaddirira mu lulyo lwa Yekoniya omuwambe be ba: Seyalutyeri mutabani we," 
1Chronicles3:18 ne Malukiramu, ne Pedaya, ne Senazzali, ne Yekamiya, ne Kosama ne Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Batabani ba Pedaya baali Zerubbaberi ne Simeeyi. Batabani ba Zerubbaberi baali Mesullamu ne Kananiya, ne Seronisi nga ye mwannyinaabwe." 
1Chronicles3:20 N’abalala abataano be yazaala baali Kasuba, ne Okeri, ne Berekiya, ne Kasadiya ne Yusubukesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Batabani ba Kananiya baali Peratiya ne Yesukaya, ne mutabani wa Yesukaya nga ye Lefaya, ne mutabani wa Lefaya nga ye Alunani, ne mutabani wa Alumani nga ye Obadiya, ne mutabani wa Obadiya nga ye Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ab’olulyo lwa Sekaniya baali Semaaya mutabani we, ng’abazzukulu be ba Kattusi, ne Igali, ne Baliya, ne Neyaliya, ne Safati. Abazzukulu bonna awamu baali mukaaga." 
1Chronicles3:23 Batabani ba Neyaliya baali Eriwenayi, ne Kizukiya, ne Azulikamu, be baana basatu bonna awamu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Batabani ba Eriwenayi baali Kodaviya, ne Eriyasibu, ne Peraya, ne Akkubu, ne Yokanaani, ne Deraya ne Anami, be baana musanvu." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bazzukulu ba Yuda abalala baali Pereezi, ne Kezulooni, ne Kalumi, ne Kuuli ne Sobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Leyaya mutabani wa Sobali n’azaala Yakasi, ne Yakasi n’azaala Akumayi ne Lakadi. Bano baali ba mu nnyumba ya Abazolasi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ne bano, be baali baganda ba Etamu, ne Yezuleeri, ne Isuma, ne Idubasi, ne mwannyinaabwe nga ye Kazzereruponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueri n’azaala Gedoli, ne Ezeri n’azaala Kusa. Bano be baali abazzukulu ba Kuuli, ng’omuzzukulu omukulu mu luggya ye Efulaasa, omukulembeze wa Besirekemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Asukuli n’azaala Tekowa eyalina abakyala babiri omu nga ye Keera omulala nga ye Naala. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naala n’amuzaalira Akuzzamu, ne Keferi, ne Temeni ne Kaakusutali; era abo be baali abaana ba Naala." 
1Chronicles4:7 Keera n’amuzaalira Zeresi, ne Izukali, ne Esumani" 
1Chronicles4:8 ne Kakkozi eyali kitaawe wa Anubu, ne Zobeba, ate n’aba jjajja w’ennyumba ya Akalukeri mutabani wa Kalumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabezi yali wa kitiibwa okusinga baganda be, ne nnyina n’amutuuma erinnya Yabezi amakulu nti, “Namuzaalira mu bulumi.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi n’akoowoola Katonda wa Isirayiri ng’agamba nti, “Ompeere ddala omukisa, ogaziye ensalo yange! Omukono gwo gubeere wamu nange, gunkuume obutagwa mu kabi konna, nneme okulumwa mu mutima.” Katonda n’addamu okusaba kwe." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kerubu muganda wa Suwa, n’azaala Mekiri, ate nga kitaawe wa Esutoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Esutoni n’azaala Besulafa, ne Paseya, ne Tekina eyali omukulembeze wa Irunakasi. Bano be basajja ab’e Leka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Batabani ba Kenazi baali Osuniyeri ne Seraya. Batabani ba Osuniyeri baali Kasasi ne Myonosaayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Myonosaayi n’azaala Ofula. Ate Seraya n’azaala Yowaabu, ne Yowaabu ye yali jjajja wa Gekalasimu abaalinga abaweesi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Batabani ba Kolebu mutabani wa Yefune baali Iru, ne Era ne Naamu. Ne Era n’azaala Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Batabani ba Yekalereri baali Zifu, ne Zifa, ne Tiriya ne Asaleri." 
1Chronicles4:17 Batabani ba Ezula baali Yeseri, ne Meredi, ne Eferi, ne Yaloni. Omu ku bakyala ba Meredi ye yali Bisiya muwala wa Falaawo, era n’amuzaalira Miryamu, ne Sammayi, ne Isuba eyazaala Esutemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Abo be baana ba muwala wa Falaawo Bisiya, Meredi gwe yali awasizza. Omukyala we Omuyudaaya yamuzaalira Yeredi kitaawe wa Gedoli, ne Keberi kitaawe wa Soko, ne Yekusyeri kitaawe wa Zanona." 
1Chronicles4:19 Kodiya n’azaala abaana mu mwannyina wa Nakamu era be baali ekika kya Keyira Omugalumi ne Esutemoa Omumaakasi. 
1Chronicles4:20 Batabani ba Simoni baali Amunoni, ne Linna, ne Benikanani, ne Tironi. N’ab’ennyumba ya Isi baali Zokesi ne Benizokesi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Batabani ba Seera mutabani wa Yuda baali Eri eyazaala Leka, kitaawe wa Malesa, ate era jjajja w’ebika by’abo abaalukanga linena e Besiyasubeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu ye yali jjajja w’abasajja ab’e Kozeba, ne Yowaasi ne Salafu abaafuganga Mowaabu ne Yasubirekemu. (Ebigambo bino bya mu biseera bya dda)." 
1Chronicles4:23 Abo be baali ababumbi b’ensuwa abaabeeranga e Netayimu n’e Gedera, era baabeeranga mu lubiri lwa kabaka nga bamukolera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Batabani ba Simyoni baali Nemweri, ne Yanini, ne Yalibu, ne Zeera ne Sawuli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Mutabani wa Sawuli yali Sallumu, ne bazzukulu be nga be Mibusamu ne Misuma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mutabani wa Misuma yali Kammweri, eyazaala Zakkuli, nga ate jjajja wa Simeeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simeeyi yalina abaana aboobulenzi kumi na mukaaga n’aboobuwala mukaaga, naye baganda be tebalina baana bangi, ekika kyabwe kyekyava tekyala nnyo ng’ekya Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Babeeranga mu Beeruseba, ne Molada, ne Kazalusuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 ne Biruka, ne Ezemu, ne Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 ne Besweri, ne Koluma, ne Zikulagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 ne Besumalukabosi, ne Kozalususimu, ne Besubiri ne Saalayimu. Bino byali bibuga byabwe okutuusa Dawudi lwe yalya obwakabaka." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ebyalo byabwe ebirala byali Etamu, ne Ayini, ne Limmoni, ne Tokeni ne Asani, byonna awamu by’ebitaano," 
1Chronicles4:33 n’ebyalo ebirala byonna ebyali byetoolodde ebibuga ebyo okutuukira ddala e Baali. Eyo gye baasenga era ne bakuuma ebyafaayo by’obujjajjabwe. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobabu, ne Yamulaki, ne Yosa mutabani wa Amonya;" 
1Chronicles4:35 ne Yoweeri, ne Yeeku mutabani wa Yosibiya, muzzukulu wa Seraya, muzzukulu wa Asyeri." 
1Chronicles4:36 Eriwenayi, ne Yaakoba, ne Yesokaya, ne Asaya, ne Adyeri, ne Yesimyeri, ne Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 ne Ziza mutabani wa Sifi muzzukulu wa Alooni, muzzukulu wa Yedaya, muzzukulu wa Simuli, muzzukulu wa Semaaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Abo aboogeddwako baali bakulu ba bika byabwe. Ennyumba zaabwe ne zeeyongera nnyo. 
1Chronicles4:39 Be basenguka okwolekera omulyango gwa Gedoli ekiri ku luuyi olw’ebuvanjuba lw’ekiwonvu, nga banoonya aw’okulundira ebisibo byabwe." 
1Chronicles4:40 Baalaba omuddo omugimu omulungi, n’ensi yali ngazi, ng’erimu emirembe era nga nteefu. Bazzukulu ba Kaamu be baaberangamu edda." 
1Chronicles4:41 Abasajja abo aboogeddwako baaliwo mu mirembe gya Keezeekiya kabaka wa Yuda, era baalumba eweema za bazzukulu ba Kaamu n’Abamewuni abaabeeranga omwo ne babazikiririza ddala, obutalekaawo muntu n’omu wadde ekintu kyonna. Ne babeeranga omwo kubanga waaliyo omuddo ogw’okuwa ebisibo byabwe." 
1Chronicles4:42 Awo abamu ku batabani ba Simyoni, abasajja enkumi ttaano nga bakulembeddwamu Peratiya, ne Neyaliya, ne Lefaya ne Wuziyeeri batabani ba Isi ne balumba Seyiri ensi ey’ensozi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Era baazikiriza n’ekitundu ky’Abamaleki ekyali kisigaddewo, oluvannyuma ne basenga eyo, okutuusa olunaku lwa leero." 
1Chronicles5:1 Batabani ba Lewubeeni, mutabani omukulu owa Isirayiri, ye yali omubereberye, naye nayonoona obufumbo bwa kitaawe, obusika bwe ng’omuggulanda ne buweebwa batabani ba Yusufu mutabani wa Isirayiri, kyeyava tabalirwa mu byafaayo ng’omubereberye." 
1Chronicles5:2 Yuda yali w’amaanyi okusinga baganda be, era mu ye mwe mwava kabaka ow’eggwanga lya Isirayiri, wabula ebyobusika eby’obuggulanda byali bya mutabani wa Yusufu omukulu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Batabani ba Lewubeeni, mutabani omukulu owa Isirayiri baali: Kanoki, ne Palu, ne Kezulooni ne Kalumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ab’enda ya Yoweeri baali Semaaya mutabani we, ne Gogi muzzukulu we, ne Simeeyi muzzukulu we." 
1Chronicles5:5 Mikka yali mutabani wa Simeeyi, ne Leyaya n’aba muzzukulu we, ne Baali n’aba muzzukulu we." 
1Chronicles5:6 Mutabani wa Baali yali Beera, omukulu w’ekika ky’Abalewubeeni, Tirugazupiruneseri kabaka w’e Busuuli gwe yatwala mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
1Chronicles5:7 Baganda be ng’enda zaabwe bwe zaali be bano: Yeyeri omukulu w’ekika, Zekkaliya," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bera mutabani wa Azozi, muzzukulu wa Sema, muzzukulu wa Yoweeri. Be baasenga mu Aloweri okutuuka e Nebo ne Baalu Myoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ate baasenga n’ebuvanjuba w’eddungu okutuukira ddala ku mugga Fulaati, kubanga amagana gaabwe gaali gaaze nnyo." 
1Chronicles5:10 Awo ku mirembe gya Sawulo ne balumba Abakaguli, era Abakaguli ne bagwa mu mikono gyabwe, era bali ne beegazaanyiza mu nsi y’Abakaguli okutuukira ddala ku luuyi olw’ebuvanjuba olw’e Gireyaadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bazzukulu ba Gaadi baabeeranga okuliraana Basani okwolekera Saleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoweeri ye yali omukulembeze, ne Safamu nga ye mumyuka we, ate ne wabaawo ne Yanayi ne Safati mu Basani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Baganda baabwe mu nda z’abajjajjaabwe bwe baali Mikayiri, ne Mesullamu, ne Seeba, ne Yolayi, ne Yakani, ne Ziya, ne Eberi, bonna awamu musanvu." 
1Chronicles5:14 Bano be baali ab’omu nnyumba ya Abikayiri mutabani wa Kuuli, muzzukulu wa Yalowa, muzzukulu wa Gireyaadi, muzzukulu wa Mikayiri, muzzukulu wa Yesisayi, muzzukulu wa Yakudo, ne muzzukulu wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki mutabani wa Abudyeri, muzzukulu wa Guni, omukulu w’ennyumba yaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:16 Baabeeranga mu Gireyaadi, mu Basani, ne mu bibuga byayo ebirala ne mu malundiro g’e Saloni okutuuka ku nsalo yaayo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bino byonna byawandiikibwa mu bitabo ebyafaayo mu mirembe gya Yosamu kabaka wa Yuda, ne Yerobowaamu kabaka wa Isirayiri." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abalewubeeni, n’Abagaadi, n’ekitundu ky’ekika kya Manase baalina abasajja emitwalo ena mu enkumi nnya mu lusanvu mu nkaaga, ab’amaanyi era nga bazira mu kukwata engabo, ekitala, ne mu kukozesa obusaale, era nga batendeke mu kulwana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ne balumba Abakaguli, ne Yetuli, ne Nafisi ne Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Olw’okwesiga n’okusaba Katonda okubabeera, baawangula Abakaguli mu lutalo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Baanyaga amagana g’ente, n’eŋŋamira emitwalo etaano, n’endiga emitwalo abiri mu etaano n’endogoyi enkumi bbiri ate ne bawamba n’abasajja emitwalo kkumi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Era bangi ku bo battibwa kubanga olutalo lwali lwa Katonda. Ne basenga eyo okutuusa lwe baawaŋŋangusibwa. 
1Chronicles5:23 Abantu ab’ekitundu ky’ekika kya Manase baali bangi nnyo, era baasenga mu nsi eya Basani okutuuka ku Baalukerumooni, ne Seniri, ne ku lusozi Kerumooni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Bano be baali abakulu b’ennyumba zaabwe: Eferi, ne Isi, ne Eryeri, ne Azulyeri, ne Yeremiya, ne Kodaviya, ne Yakudyeri, abasajja abazira era ab’amaanyi, abettutumu, nga gy’emitwe gy’ennyumba zaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:25 Naye ne bakola ebibi ebimenya ebiragiro bya Katonda wa bajjajjaabwe, ne bagoberera bakatonda baamawanga ag’omu nsi eyo, Katonda be yazikiririza mu maaso gaabwe." 
1Chronicles5:26 Katonda wa Isirayiri kyeyava akubiriza omwoyo gwa Puli kabaka w’e Bwasuli, eyayitibwanga Tirugazupiruneseri, n’alumba Abalewubeeni, n’Abagaadi n’ekitundu ekyali kisigaddewo ku Manase, n’abawamba era n’abatwala mu buwaŋŋanguse e Kala, n’e Kaboli, n’e Kaala ne ku mugga Gozani, gye bali n’okutuusa leero." 
1Chronicles6:1 Batabani ba Leevi baali Gerusoni, ne Kokasi ne Merali." 
1Chronicles6:2 Batabani ba Kokasi ne baba Amulaamu, ne Izukali, ne Kebbulooni, ne Wuziyeeri." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ate abaana ba Amulaamu baali Alooni, ne Musa ne Miryamu. Batabani ba Alooni baali Nadabu, ne Abiku, ne Eriyazaali ne Isamaali." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eriyazaali n’azaala Finekaasi, ate Finekaasi n’azaala Abisuwa;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisuwa n’azaala Bukki, ate Bukki n’azaala Uzzi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzzi n’azaala Zerakiya, ne Zerakiya n’azaala Merayoosi;" 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoosi n’azaala Amaliya, ne Amaliya n’azaala Akitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:8 Akitubu n’azaala Zadooki, ate Zadooki n’azaala Akimaazi;" 
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaazi n’azaala Azaliya, ne Azaliya n’azaala Yokanaani;" 
1Chronicles6:10 Yokanaani n’azaala Azaliya (oyo ye yaweerezanga nga kabona mu yeekaalu sulemaani gye yazimba mu Yerusaalemi); 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaliya n’azaala Amaliya, ne Amaliya n’azaala Akitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:12 Akitubu n’azaala Zadooki, ne Zadooki n’azaala Sallumu;" 
1Chronicles6:13 Sallumu n’azaala Kirukiya, ne Kirukiya n’azaala Azaliya;" 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaliya n’azaala Seraya, ne Seraya n’azaala Yekozadaki;" 
1Chronicles6:15 Yekozadaki yatwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse Mukama bwe yawaayo Yuda ne Yerusaalemi mu mukono gwa Nebukadduneeza. 
1Chronicles6:16 Batabani ba Leevi baali Gerusomu, ne Kokasi ne Merali." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gano ge mannya g’abatabani ba Gerusomu, ne Libuni ne Simeeyi." 
1Chronicles6:18 Batabani ba Kokasi baali Amulaamu, ne Izukali, ne Kebbulooni ne Wuziyeeri." 
1Chronicles6:19 Batabani ba Merali baali Makuli ne Musi. Gino gy’emituba egy’Abaleevi okutandika ne bajjajja baabwe: 
1Chronicles6:20 Abaava mu Gerusomu baali Libuni mutabani we, ne Yakasi, ne Zimura," 
1Chronicles6:21 ne Yowa, ne Iddo, ne Zeera, ne Yeyaserayi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bazzukulu ba Kokasi baali Amminadaabu mutabani we, Koola muzzukulu we, Assiri muzzukulu we;" 
1Chronicles6:23 Erukaana muzzukulu we, Ebiyasaafu muzzukulu we, Assiri muzzukulu we;" 
1Chronicles6:24 Takasi muzzukulu we, Uliyeri muzzukulu we, Uzziya muzzukulu we, ne Sawuli muzzukulu we." 
1Chronicles6:25 Batabani ba Erukaana baali Amasayi ne Akimosi," 
1Chronicles6:26 ne bazzukulu be nga be ba Erukaana, ne Zofayi, ne Nakasi," 
1Chronicles6:27 ne Eriyaabu, ne Yerokamu, ne Erukaana ne Samwiri." 
1Chronicles6:28 Batabani ba Samwiri baali Yoweeri omuggulanda we, n’owokubiri nga ye Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Bazzukulu ba Merali baali Makuli, ne Libuni, ne Simeeyi, ne Uzza," 
1Chronicles6:30 ne Simeeyi, ne Kaggiya ne Asaya, ng’omu ye kitaawe w’omulala nga bwe baddiriŋŋana." 
1Chronicles6:31 Bano be basajja Dawudi be yalonda okukulira eby’ennyimba mu nnyumba ya Mukama, essanduuko ng’eteekeddwamu." 
1Chronicles6:32 Baaweererezanga mu nnyimba mu maaso g’ekuŋŋaaniro ey’Eweema ey’Okusisikanirangamu, okutuusa Sulemaani lwe yazimba yeekaalu ya Mukama mu Yerusaalemi. Era bakolanga emirimu gyabwe, nga bagoberera ebiragiro ebyabaweebwa." 
1Chronicles6:33 Bano be basajja abaaweerezanga, wamu ne batabani baabwe: Okuva mu Abakokasi; Kemani, omuyimbi, mutabani wa Yoweeri, muzzukulu wa Samwiri," 
1Chronicles6:34 muzzukulu wa Erukaana, muzzukulu wa Yerokamu, muzzukulu wa Eryeri, muzzukulu wa Toowa," 
1Chronicles6:35 muzzukulu wa Zufu, muzzukulu wa Erukaana, muzzukulu wa Makasi, muzzukulu wa Amasayi;" 
1Chronicles6:36 muzzukulu wa Erukaana, muzzukulu wa Yoweeri, muzzukulu wa Azaliya, muzzukulu wa Zeffaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 muzzukulu wa Takasi, muzzukulu wa Assiri, muzzukulu wa Ebiyasaafu, muzzukulu wa Koola," 
1Chronicles6:38 muzzukulu wa Izukali, muzzukulu wa Kokasi, muzzukulu wa Leevi, mutabani wa Isirayiri." 
1Chronicles6:39 Kemani yalina muganda we Asafu eyamuyambangako mu mulimu ogwo, era n’ab’enju ye baali bwe bati: Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya, muzzukulu wa Simeeyi," 
1Chronicles6:40 muzzukulu wa Mikayiri, muzzukulu wa Baaseya, muzzukulu wa Malukiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 muzzukulu wa Esuni, muzzukulu wa Zeera, muzzukulu wa Adaaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 muzzukulu wa Esani, muzzukulu wa Zimma, muzzukulu wa Simeeyi," 
1Chronicles6:43 muzzukulu wa Yakasi, muzzukulu wa Gerusoni, mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ne baganda be abalala abaamuyambangako baali abazzukulu ba Merali, mutabani wa Leevi, Esani mutabani wa Kiisi, muzzukulu wa Abudi, muzzukulu wa Malluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 muzzukulu wa Kasukabiya, muzzukulu wa Amaziya, muzzukulu wa Kirukiya, muzzukulu wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles6:46 muzzukulu wa Amuzi, muzzukulu wa Bani, muzzukulu wa Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 muzzukulu wa Makuli, muzzukulu wa Musi, muzzukulu wa Merali, mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Baganda baabwe Abaleevi baavunaanyizibwanga okukola emirimu gyonna egy’omu Weema, ye Nnyumba ya Katonda." 
1Chronicles6:49 Naye Alooni ne batabani be ne bazzukulu be, be baawangayo ku kyoto ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa ne ku kyoto eky’okwoterezangako obubaane olw’ebyo byonna ebyakolebwanga mu Kifo ekisinga Obutukuvu, olw’okutangirira Isirayiri, nga Musa, omuddu wa Katonda bwe yalagira." 
1Chronicles6:50 Bano be baava mu nda ya Alooni: mutabani we Eriyazaali, muzzukulu we Finekaasi, muzzukulu we Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:51 muzzukulu we Bukki, muzzukulu we Uzzi, muzzukulu we Zerakiya," 
1Chronicles6:52 muzzukulu we Merayoosi, muzzukulu we Amaliya, muzzukulu we Akitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 muzzukulu we Zadooki, ne muzzukulu we Akimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Bino by’ebifo ebyabaweebwa okutuulamu ng’ensi yaabwe era bino bye byali biweereddwa bazzukulu ba Alooni Abakokasi, kubanga be baasooka okufuna omugabo." 
1Chronicles6:55 Baaweebwa Kebbulooni mu nsi ya Yuda, n’amalundiro agakyetoolodde," 
1Chronicles6:56 naye ennimiro n’ebyalo ebyetoolodde ekibuga ekyo, byaweebwa Kalebu mutabani wa Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Bazzukulu ba Alooni baaweebwa Kebbulooni, ekibuga eky’okwekwekamu, Libuna n’amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Kireni n’amalundiro gaakyo, Debiri n’amalundiro gaakyo," 
1Chronicles6:59 Asani n’amalundiro gaakyo, ne Besusemesi n’amalundiro gaakyo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Ate n’okuva eri ekika kya Benyamini baaweebwa Gibyoni ne Geba, ne Allemesi, ne Anasosi wamu n’amalundiro gaabyo. Ebibuga byonna awamu ebyaweebwa Abakokasi byali kkumi na bisatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Bazzukulu ba Kokasi abalala baweebwa ebibuga kkumi okuva ku nda ez’ekitundu ky’ekika kya Manase nga bakuba akalulu. 
1Chronicles6:62 Bazzukulu ba Gerusoni, ng’enda zaabwe bwe zaali, baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bisatu okuva ku bika bya Isakaali, Aseri, Nafutaali, n’okuva ku kika kya Manase mu Basani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Bazzukulu ba Merali ng’enda zaabwe bwe zaali, baaweebwa ebibuga kkumi na bibiri okuva ku bika bya Lewubeeni, Gaadi ne Zebbulooni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Awo Abayisirayiri ne bawa Abaleevi ebibuga ebyo ne babaweerako n’amalundiro byabyo. 
1Chronicles6:65 N’ebibuga okuva mu bika bya Yuda, ne Simyoni ne Benyamini ebyogeddwako byabaweebwa nga bakuba akalulu." 
1Chronicles6:66 Enda ezimu eza Kokasi zaaweebwa ebibuga okuva eri ensi y’ekika kya Efulayimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Okuva eri ensi ya Efulayimu baaweebwa Sekemu, ekibuga ky’obuddukiro, Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 ne Yokumyamu, ne Besukolooni," 
1Chronicles6:69 ne Ayalooni ne Gasulimmoni, n’amalundiro gaabyo." 
1Chronicles6:70 N’okuva eri ekitundu ky’ekika kya Manase, Abayisirayiri ne babagabira Aneri ne Biryamu, wamu n’amalundiro byako eri enda ezaali zisigaddewo eza Kokasi." 
1Chronicles6:71 Abagerusomu baaweebwa ebifo bino wansi: okuva eri ekitundu ky’ekika kya Manase baafuna Golani mu Basani ne Asutoleesi, wamu n’amalundiro byako." 
1Chronicles6:72 Okuva eri ekika kya Isakaali baafuna Kedesi, Daberasi" 
1Chronicles6:73 Lamosi ne Anemu wamu n’amalundiro gaabyo (byako); 
1Chronicles6:74 okuva eri ekika kya Aseri, baafuna Masali, Abudoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 Kukkoki ne Lekobu wamu n’amalundiro gaabyo; 
1Chronicles6:76 n’okuva eri ekika kya Nafutaali baafuna Kedesi eky’omu Ggaliraaya, ne Kammoni ne Kiriyasayimu wamu n’amalundiro byako." 
1Chronicles6:77 Abaleevi abaali basigaddewo, be bazzukulu ba Merali, baaweebwa ebifo bino wansi: okuva eri ekika kya Zebbulooni baafuna Limunono ne Taboli wamu n’amalundiro byabyo;" 
1Chronicles6:78 okuva eri ekika kya Lewubeeni, emitala wa Yoludaani ku luuyi olw’ebuvanjuba lw’e Yeriko, baafuna Bezeri ekiri mu ddungu, Yaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemosi ne Mefaasi wamu n’amalundiro byabyo; 
1Chronicles6:80 n’okuva eri ekika kya Gaadi baafuna Lamosi ekiri mu Gireyaadi, Makanayimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 Kesuboni ne Yazeri wamu n’amalundiro byabyo. 
1Chronicles7:1 Abaana ba Isakaali baali bana: Tola, ne Puwa, ne Yasubu, ne Simuloni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Batabani ba Tola baali Uzzi, Lefaya, Yeryeri, Yamayi, Ibusamu ne Semweri, era be baali abakulu b’enda zaabwe. Ku mulembe gwa Dawudi, bazzukulu ba Tola baali abasajja abalwanyi nga bawera emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu lukaaga." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi n’azaala Izulakiya. Izulakiya n’azaala Mikayiri, ne Obadiya, ne Yoweeri ne Issiya, era bonna baali bakulu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Okusinziira ku nda yaabwe, baali basajja b’amaanyi era nga balwanyi ba ntalo, nga balina abakyala n’abaana bangi, nga bawera abasajja emitwalo esatu mu kakaaga." 
1Chronicles7:5 Baganda baabwe bonna awamu abaali ab’ekika kya Isakaali baali abasajja abalwanyi emitwalo munaana mu kasanvu bonna awamu. 
1Chronicles7:6 Benyamini yalina abatabani basatu, Bera, ne Bekeri ne Yediyayeri." 
1Chronicles7:7 Batabani ba Bera baali Ezuboni, ne Uzzi, ne Wuziyeeri, ne Yerimosi ne Iri, be baana bataano, ate nga bonna bakulu b’enda zaabwe. Mu kubalibwa baali abasajja abalwanyi emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi bbiri mu amakumi asatu mu bana." 
1Chronicles7:8 Batabani ba Bekeri baali Zemira, ne Yowaasi, ne Eryeza, ne Eriwenayi, ne Omuli, ne Yeremosi, ne Abiya, ne Anasosi ne Alemesi. Bano be baali abaana ba Bekeri ate nga bonna bakulu b’enda zaabwe." 
1Chronicles7:9 Mu kubalibwa baali abasajja abalwanyi emitwalo ebiri mu ebikumi bibiri mu bibiri. 
1Chronicles7:10 Mutabani wa Yediyayeri, yali Birukani, ate batabani ba Birukani nga be ba Yewusi, ne Benyamini, ne Ekudi, ne Kenaana, ne Zesani, ne Talusiisi ne Akisakali." 
1Chronicles7:11 Bano bonna baali bazzukulu ba Yediyayeri ate nga be bakulu b’enda zaabwe. Era baali abasajja abalwanyi omutwalo gumu mu kasanvu mu ebikumi bibiri. 
1Chronicles7:12 Abasuppimu n’Abakupimu baali bazzukulu ba Iri, ate ng’Abakusimu bazzukulu ba Akeri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Batabani ba Nafutaali baali Yaziyeri, ne Guni, ne Yezeri ne Sallumu, era bano be bazzukulu ba Biruka." 
1Chronicles7:14 Bano be baali bazzukulu ba Manase: Asuliyeri ne Makiri mukyala we Omwalamu. Be yamuzaalira. Makiri n’azaala Gireyaadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri n’awasa okuva mu Bakupimu n’Abasuppimu, n’erinnya lya mwannyina nga ye Maaka. Omuzzukulu omulala yali Zerofekadi, era ng’alina baana ba buwala bokka." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mukyala wa Makiri n’azaala omwana wabulenzi n’amutuuma Peresi. Muganda we ye yali Seresi, nga ne batabani ba Seresi be ba Ulamu ne Lekemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mutabani wa Ulamu yali Bedani, era bano nga be batabani ba Gireyaadi, mutabani wa Makiri, mutabani wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Mwannyina Kammolekisi n’azaala Isukondi, ne Abiyezeeri ne Makula." 
1Chronicles7:19 Batabani ba Semida baali Akyani, ne Sekemu, ne Liki ne Aniyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Mutabani wa Efulayimu yali Susera, mutabani wa Susera nga ye Beredi, mutabani wa Beredi nga ye Takasi, mutabani wa Takasi nga ye Ereyadda, mutabani wa Ereyadda nga ye Takasi," 
1Chronicles7:21 mutabani wa Takasi nga ye Zabadi, ate mutabani wa Zabadi nga ye Susera. Efulayimu yalina batabani be abalala babiri, nga be ba Ezeri ne Ereyaddi abattibwa mu nsi ya Gusi nga bagenze okubba (okunyaga) ente." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efulayimu n’abakungubagira okumala ennaku nnyingi, era baganda be ne bajja okumukungubagirako." 
1Chronicles7:23 Awo Efulayimu n’amanya mukyala we, mukyala we n’azaala omwana owoobulenzi omulala, n’amutuuma Beriya kubanga ennyumba ye yatuukibwako emitawaana." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ne muwala we yali Sera, era oyo yazimba Besukoloni ekya eky’emmanga n’eky’engulu, ne Uzzemmuseera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efulayimu yalinayo n’omutabani omulala erinnya lye Leefa, nga ye kitaawe wa Lesefu, Lesefu n’azaala Teera, Teera n’azaala Takani," 
1Chronicles7:26 Takani n’azaala Ladani, Ladani n’azaala Ammikudi, Ladani n’azaala Erisaama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Erisaama n’azaala Nuuni, Nuuni n’azaala Yoswa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ettaka lyabwe n’ebifo we baasenga byali Beseri n’obubuga obutono obukyetoolodde, ebuvanjuba w’e Naalani, ebugwanjuba w’e Gezeri, n’obubuga bwakyo, n’e Sekemu n’obubuga bwakyo, okutuukira ddala ku Azza n’obubuga obukyetoolodde." 
1Chronicles7:29 Bazzukulu ba Yusufu, Abamanase, mutabani wa Isirayiri babeeranga Besuseyani, n’e Taanaki, n’e Megiddo, n’e Doli n’obubuga obwali bubiriranye." 
1Chronicles7:30 Abaana ba Aseri baali Imuna, ne Isuva, ne Isuvi, ne Beriya, ne Seera mwannyinaabwe." 
1Chronicles7:31 Batabani ba Beriya baali Keberi ne Malukiyeeri, ne Malukiyeeri nga ye kitaawe wa Biruzayisi." 
1Chronicles7:32 Keberi n’azaala Yafuleti, ne Somera, ne Kosamu ne mwannyinaabwe Suwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Batabani ba Yafuleti baali Pasaki, ne Bimukali, ne Asuvasi." 
1Chronicles7:34 Batabani ba Semeri baali Aki, ne Loga, ne Yekubba ne Alamu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Batabani ba muganda we Keremu baali Zofa, ne Imuna, ne Seresi ne Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Batabani ba Zofa baali Suwa, ne Kaluneferi, ne Suwali, ne Beri, ne Imula," 
1Chronicles7:37 ne Bezeri, ne Kodi, ne Samma, ne Sirusa, ne Isulani ne Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Batabani ba Yeseri baali Yefune, ne Pisupa ne Ala." 
1Chronicles7:39 Batabani ba Ulla baali Ala, ne Kanieri ne Liziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bano bonna baali bazzukulu ba Aseri, abamu nga bakulu ba nda zaabwe abalala nga basajja baakitiibwa, n’abalala nga balwanyi abazira, n’abalala nga baami bakulu ddala mu bitiibwa byabwe. Abasajja abalwanyi bonna awamu bawera emitwalo ebiri mu kakaaga." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini n’azaala Bera, era oyo ye yali omubereberye, Asuberi nga ye wookubiri, Akala nga ye wookusatu;" 
1Chronicles8:2 Noka nga wakuna, ne Lafa nga ye wookutaano." 
1Chronicles8:3 Batabani ba Bera baali Addali, ne Gera, ne Abikudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 ne Abisuwa, ne Naamani, ne Akowa" 
1Chronicles8:5 ne Gera, ne Sefufani ne Kulamu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bazzukulu ba Ekudi mutabani wa Gera baali bakulu b’enda z’abo abaabeeranga mu Geba nga baabatwala e Manakasi nga basibe era be bano: 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, ne Akiya, ne Gera eyabakulembera nga bagenda mu buwaŋŋanguse, ate nga ye kitaawe wa Uzza ne Akikudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Sakalayimu n’azaala abaana abalala mu nsi y’e Mowaabu, ng’amaze okugoba abakyala be ababiri, Kusimu ne Baala." 
1Chronicles8:9 Kodesi yamuzaalira Yokabu, ne Zibiya, ne Mesa, ne Malukamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 ne Yewuzi, ne Sakiya, ne Miruma, era bano be baali abakulu b’enda za bajjajjaabwe." 
1Chronicles8:11 Kusimu yamuzaalira Abitubu ne Erupaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Batabani ba Erupaali baali Eberi, ne Misamu, ne Semedi, eyazimba Ono ne Loodi n’ebibuga ebibyetoolodde," 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya, ne Sema abakulu b’enda z’abo abaabeeranga e Ayalooni, era be baagoba abaabeeranga mu Gaasi." 
1Chronicles8:14 Abaana abalala baali Akiyo, ne Sasaki, ne Yeremosi," 
1Chronicles8:15 ne Zebadiya, ne Aladi, ne Ederi" 
1Chronicles8:16 ne Mikayiri, ne Isupa, ne Yoka," 
1Chronicles8:17 ne Zebadiya, ne Mesullamu, ne Kizuki, ne Keberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 ne Isumerayi, ne Izuliya, ne Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Batabani ba Simeeyi baali Yakimu, ne Zikuli, ne Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 ne Eryenayi, ne Ziresayi, ne Eryeri," 
1Chronicles8:21 ne Adaaya, ne Beraya, ne Simulasi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Batabani ba Sasaki baali Isupani, ne Eberi, ne Eryeri," 
1Chronicles8:23 ne Abudoni, ne Zikuli, ne Kanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 ne Kananiya, ne Eramu, ne Anusosiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Sasaki ne Ifudeya ne Penueri. 
1Chronicles8:26 Batabani ba Yerokamu baali Samuserayi, ne Sekaliya, ne Asaliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 ne Yaalesiya, ne Eriya, ne Zikuli." 
1Chronicles8:28 Bano wammanga be baali abakulu b’enda, abaami, nga bwe bayogerwako mu nnyiriri zaabwe, era baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemi." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeyeri omukulembeze we Gibyoni yabeeranga Gibyoni, ne mukyala we ye yali Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Mutabani we omuggulanda yali Abudoni, ne Zuuli n’amuddirira, ne Kiisi n’amuddako, ne Baali, ne Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 ne Gedoli, ne Akiyo, ne Zekeeri" 
1Chronicles8:32 ne Mikuloosi n’azaala Simeeyi. Nabo baabeeranga kumpi ne baganda baabwe mu Yerusaalemi. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri n’azaala Kiisi, ne Kiisi n’azaala Sawulo, ne Sawulo n’azaala Yonasaani, ne Malukisuwa, ne Abinadaabu ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mutabani wa Yonasaani yali Meribubaali, ye Mefibosesi, eyazaala Mikka." 
1Chronicles8:35 Batabani ba Mikka baali Pisoni, ne Mereki, ne Taleya ne Akazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akazi n’azaala Yekoyaada, Yekoyaada n’azaala Alemesi, ne Azumavesi, ne Zimuli, ne Zimuli n’azaala Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza n’azaala Bineya, Bineya n’azaala Lafa, ne Ereyaasa ne Azeri." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeri yazaala abaana aboobulenzi mukaaga, nga be ba Azulikamu, ne Bokeru, ne Isimayiri, ne Seyaliya, ne Obadiya ne Kanani." 
1Chronicles8:39 Batabani ba muganda we Eseki baali Ulamu omubereberye, ne Yewusi nga ye owookubiri ne Erifereti nga ye wookusatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Batabani ba Ulamu baali basajja bazira era nga b’amaanyi, nga balasi ba busaale, nga n’abaana n’abazzukulu bangi ddala. Bonna awamu baali kikumi mu ataano. Abo bonna baali bazzukulu ba Benyamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Eggwanga lyonna erya Isirayiri lyabalibwa ng’okuzaalibwa kwabwe bwe kwali era ne bawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky’ebyafaayo bya bassekabaka ba Isirayiri. Olw’okukola ebibi mu maaso ga Mukama, abantu ba Yuda nabo baatwalibwa mu buwaŋŋanguse." 
1Chronicles9:2 Abaasooka okubeera ewaabwe mu bibuga byabwe be baali Abayisirayiri abamu, ne bakabona, n’Abaleevi, n’abalala abaaweerezanga mu yeekaalu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abamu ku abo abaabeeranga mu Yerusaalemi nga bava mu Yuda, ne Benyamini, ne Efulayimu ne Manase baali:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Usayi mutabani wa Ammikudi, muzzukulu wa Omuli, muzzukulu wa Imuli, muzzukulu wa Bani, muzzukulu wa Pereezi, mutabani wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ku Basiiro, Asaya omuggulanda mu nnyumba ye, wamu ne batabani be." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ku bazzukulu ba Zeera, Yeweri n’ab’omu kika kye okuva mu Yuda abantu lukaaga mu kyenda." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ku bazzukulu ba Benyamini, Sallu mutabani wa Mesullamu, muzzukulu wa Kodaviya, muzzukulu wa Kassenuwa," 
1Chronicles9:8 ne Ibuneya mutabani wa Yerokamu, ne Era mutabani wa Uzzi, muzzukulu wa Mikuli, ne Mesullamu mutabani wa Sefatiya, muzzukulu wa Leweri, muzzukulu wa Ibuniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Abantu b’omu kika kya Benyamini, baali bawera lwenda mu ataano mu mukaaga, ate nga bonna bakulu ba nda zaabwe." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ku bakabona abaakomawo kwaliko Yedaya, ne Yekoyalibu, ne Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 ne Azaliya mutabani wa Kirukiya, muzzukulu wa Mesullamu, muzzukulu wa Zadooki, muzzukulu wa Merayoosi, muzzukulu wa Akituubu, omukulu eyavunaanyizibwanga ennyumba ya Katonda;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ne Adaaya mutabani wa Yerokamu, muzzukulu wa Pasukuli, muzzukulu wa Malukiya, ne Maasayi mutabani wa Adyeri, muzzukulu wa Yazera, muzzukulu wa Mesullamu, muzzukulu wa Mesiremisi, muzzukulu wa Immeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Bakabona abaali abakulu b’enda zaabwe baali lukumi mu lusanvu mu nkaaga. Baali basajja babuvunaanyizibwa mu buweereza bwabwe mu nnyumba ya Katonda. 
1Chronicles9:14 Ku baleevi kwaliko: Semaaya mutabani wa Kassubu, muzzukulu wa Azulikamu, muzzukulu wa Kasabiya, omu ku b’enda ya Merali," 
1Chronicles9:15 ne Bakubakkali, ne Keresi, ne Galali ne Mattaniya mutabani wa Mikka, muzzukulu wa Zikuli, muzzukulu wa Asafu," 
1Chronicles9:16 ne Obadiya mutabani wa Semaaya, muzzukulu wa Galali, muzzukulu wa Yedusuni; ne Berekiya mutabani wa Asa, muzzukulu wa Erukaana, eyabeeranga mu byalo eby’Abanetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abaggazi ba wankaaki baali, Sallumu, ne Akabu, ne Talumoni, ne Akimaani ne baganda baabwe abalala, era mukulu waabwe ye yali Sallumu;" 
1Chronicles9:18 be baayimiriranga ku ludda olw’ebuvanjuba olwa wankaaki ya Kabaka, era gwe mulimu gwabwe n’okutuusa leero. Abo be baali abaggazi ab’omu kika ky’Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Sallumu yali mutabani wa Koole, muzzukulu wa Ebiyasaafu, muzzukulu wa Koola, ne ab’omu nnyumba ya kitaawe be baavunaanyizibwanga okukuuma enzigi za yeekaalu nga bajjajjaabwe nabo bwe baavunaanyizibwanga omulyango gw’ekifo Mukama gy’abeera." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finekaasi mutabani wa Eriyazaali ye yakuliranga abaggazi mu biro eby’edda, era Mukama n’abeeranga wamu naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekkaliya mutabani wa Meseremiya ye yali omuggazi ku mulyango gw’Eweema ey’Okukuŋŋaanirangamu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bonna awamu, abaalondebwa okuba abaggazi b’emiryango baali bibiri mu kkumi na babiri, era baali baawandiikibwa mu byalo byabwe ng’okuzaalibwa kwabwe bwe kwali. Dawudi ne nnabbi Samwiri be bayawula emirimu gy’abaggazi nga bwe gyali." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bo ne bazzukulu baabwe, be baavunaanyizibwanga okukuuma enzigi z’ennyumba ya Mukama, ennyumba eyayitibwanga Eweema." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abaggazi baabeeranga ku njuyi ennya, olw’ebuvanjuba, olw’ebugwanjuba, olw’obukiikakkono, n’olwobukiikaddyo," 
1Chronicles9:25 era baganda baabwe okuva mu byalo byabwe, bajjanga mu mpalo ne bakumanga okumala ebbanga kya nnaku musanvu." 
1Chronicles9:26 Abaggazi abana, abaali Abaleevi, be baaweebwa obuvunaanyizibwa okulabiriranga ebisenge eby’omunda n’amawanika ag’omu nnyumba ya Katonda." 
1Chronicles9:27 Baasulanga okuliraana ne nnyumba ya Katonda kubanga be baagikuumanga, era nga buli nkya be bavunaanyizibwa okugiggalawo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abamu ku bo baavunaanyizibwanga okukuuma ebintu ebyakozesebwanga mu kuweereza mu yeekaalu, era nga be babala ennyingiza yaabyo ne nfulumya yaabyo." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abalala baavunaanyizibwanga okulabirira ebikozesebwa mu mirimu n’ebintu byonna eby’omu watukuvu, era nga be bavunaanyizibwa okulabirira obutta obulungi, n’omwenge, n’amafuta, n’omugavu, n’ebyakaloosa." 
1Chronicles9:30 Wabula abamu ku bakabona baategekanga byakaloosa. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mattisiya mutabani wa Sallumu Omukoola, ate nga y’omu ku Baleevi, ye yavunaanyizibwanga okufumba emigaati gy’ebiweebwayo," 
1Chronicles9:32 era abamu ku baganda b’Abakokasi baavunaanyizibwanga okussanga emigaati egya buli ssabbiiti ku mmeeza. 
1Chronicles9:33 Abayimbi, abakulu b’ekika ky’Abaleevi baasulanga mu bisenge eby’omunda wa Yeekaalu, era nga tebakola mulimu mulala gwonna emisana n’ekiro okuggyako ogwo ogwabwe omutongole." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo bonna baali bakulu b’enda ez’Abaleevi, nga bwe baawandiikibwa mu kuzaalibwa kwabwe, era baabeeranga mu Yerusaalemi." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeri kitaawe wa Gibyoni era yatulanga mu Gibyoni, n’erinnya lya mukyala we nga ye Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ne mutabani waabwe omuggulanda yali Abudoni, Zuuli n’amuddirira, Kiisi n’addako, Baali n’addako, Neeri n’addako, Nadabu n’addako," 
1Chronicles9:37 ne Gedoli n’addako, Akiyo n’addako, Zekkaliya n’addako, Mikuloosi n’asembayo." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikuloosi yazaala Simyamu, era nabo baabeeranga kumpi ne baganda baabwe mu Yerusaalemi." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri n’azaala Kiisi, Kiisi n’azaala Sawulo. Sawulo n’azaala Yonasaani, ne Malukisuwa, ne Abinadaabu ne Esubaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mutabani wa Yonasaani ye yali Meribubaali, ne Meribubaali n’azaala Mikka." 
1Chronicles9:41 Batabani ba Mikka baali Pisoni, ne Mereki, ne Taleya ne Akazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akazi n’azaala Yala, Yala n’azaala Alemesi, ne Azumavesi ne Zimuli, ate Zimuli n’azaala Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza n’azaala Bineya, Bineya n’azaala Lefaya, Lefaya n’azaala Ereyaasa, Ereyaasa n’azaala Azeri." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeri yalina batabani be mukaaga, era gano ge gaali amannya gaabwe: Azulikamu, ne Bokeru, ne Isimayiri, ne Seyaliya, ne Obadiya, ne Kanani." 
1Chronicles10:1 Awo Abafirisuuti ne balumba Isirayiri, abasajja Abayisirayiri ne babadduka era bangi ku bo ne battibwa ku Lusozi Girubowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafirisuuti ne bagobera ddala Sawulo ne batabani be, era batabani be Yonasaani, ne Abinadaabu ne Malukisiwa ne battibwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olutalo ne lweyongerera ddala ne Sawulo ne yeeraliikirira nnyo, anti n’abalasi nga bamutuseeko era baamulasa n’alumizibwa." 
1Chronicles10:4 Awo Sawulo n’agamba eyamusituliranga ebyokulwanyisa bye nti, “Sowola ekitala kyo, onfumite, ng’abasajja abo abatali bakomole tebannajja ku nswaza.” Naye eyamusituliranga ebyokulwanyisa bye n’atya nnyo, era n’agaana. Sawulo kyeyava asowolayo ekitala kye n’akigwako." 
1Chronicles10:5 Awo eyamusituliranga ebyokulwanyisa bwe yalaba nga Sawulo afudde, naye n’asowolayo ekikye ne yetta." 
1Chronicles10:6 Sawulo n’afa bw’atyo ne batabani be bonsatule, era n’abo mu nnyumba ye bonna ne bafa." 
1Chronicles10:7 Awo Abayisirayiri bonna abaali mu kiwonvu, bwe baalaba ng’eggye lyabwe lidduse, nga ne Sawulo ne batabani be bafudde, ne baleka ebibuga byabwe ne badduka, Abafirisuuti ne bajja ne babibeeramu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Enkeera, Abafirisuuti bwe bajja okwambula abafudde, ne basanga Sawulo ne batabani be nga bafiiridde ku Lusozi Girubowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ne bamwambula, ne bamuggyako ebyokulwanyisa bye, ne bamutemako omutwe, era ne batuma n’ababaka okuddayo mu nsi y’Abafirisuuti okubategeeza amawulire ago." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ne bateeka ebyokulwanyisa bya Sawulo mu ssabo lya bakatonda baabwe, ate n’omutwe gwe ne guwanikibwa mu ssabo lya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Awo ab’e Yabesugireyaadi bonna bwe baawulira byonna Abafirisuuti bye baakola Sawulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abasajja abazira mu bo ne bagenda ne baggyayo omulambo gwa Sawulo n’eggya batabani be, ne bagireeta e Yabesi. Ne baziika amagumba gaabwe wansi w’omwera e Yabesi, era ne basiibira ennaku musanvu." 
1Chronicles10:13 Bw’atyo Sawulo n’afa olw’obutaba mwesigwa eri Mukama, n’obutakwata kigambo kya Mukama, ate n’okulagulwa omusamize n’amwebuuzaako," 
1Chronicles10:14 mu kifo ky’okwebuuza ku Mukama. Mukama kyeyava atta Sawulo n’obwakabaka n’abuwa Dawudi mutabani wa Yese. 
1Chronicles11:1 Isirayiri yenna ne bakuŋŋaanira eri Dawudi e Kebbulooni, ne boogera nti, “Laba tuli ba mubiri gwo, na musaayi gwo." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mu biro eby’edda, Sawulo bwe yali kabaka ggwe wakulembera Isirayiri mu ntalo. Era Mukama Katonda wo n’akugamba nti, ‘Ggwe olirabirira abantu bange Isirayiri, era oliba mukulembeze waabwe.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Awo abakadde ba Isirayiri bonna ne bakuŋŋaanira eri Kabaka Dawudi e Kebbulooni, n’akola endagaano nabo e Kebbulooni mu maaso ga Mukama, era ne bafuka amafuta ku Dawudi okuba kabaka wa Isirayiri, nga Mukama bwe yasuubiza mu kigambo kye ng’ayita mu Samwiri." 
1Chronicles11:4 Awo Dawudi ng’ali wamu n’Abayisirayiri bonna ne boolekera Yerusaalemi, ye Yebusi. Ne basangayo Abayebusi abaabeerangamu." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abayebusi ne bagamba Dawudi nti, “Tojja kuyingira muno.” Naye Dawudi n’awamba ekigo kya Sayuuni, ky’ekibuga kya Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dawudi yali asuubizza nti, “Oyo anaakulembera okulumba Abayebusi, ye aliba Omuduumizi w’eggye omukulu.” Awo Yowaabu mutabani wa Zeruyiya n’abakulembera era n’aweebwa obukulu obwo." 
1Chronicles11:7 Awo Dawudi n’abeeranga mu kigo, era ne kituumibwa Ekibuga kya Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 N’azimba ekibuga okukyetooloola, okuva ku Miiro okutuukira ddala ku bbugwe w’ekibuga, ate Yowaabu ye n’addaabiriza ebitundu ebirala eby’ekibuga." 
1Chronicles11:9 Awo Dawudi ne yeeyongeranga okuba ow’amaanyi, kubanga Mukama ow’Eggye yali wamu naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bano be baali abasajja abalwanyi abazira aba Dawudi, abaamuwagiranga ennyo mu bwakabaka bwe, wamu ne Isirayiri yenna okumufuulira ddala kabaka ow’enkalakkalira ng’ekigambo kya Mukama kye yasuubiza Isirayiri bwe kyali;" 
1Chronicles11:11 Bano be basajja ba Dawudi abalwanyi ab’amaanyi be yalina: Yasobeyamu Omukakumoni, eyali omukulu w’abaduumizi abasatu; era yayimusiza abasajja abalwanyi bisatu effumu lye bonna n’abatta mu lulumbagana lumu." 
1Chronicles11:12 Eyamuddiriranga mu buyinza ye yali Eriyazaali mutabani wa Dodo Omwakowa, era nga y’omu ku baduumizi abasatu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yali wamu ne Dawudi e Pasudawinimu, bwe baali bakuŋŋaanidde eyo okulwana, mu nnimiro eyalimu sayiri omungi, era abaserikale badduka Abafirisuuti." 
1Chronicles11:14 Naye baayimirira wakati mu nnimiro ne bagirwanirira, era ne batta Abafirisuuti, nga Mukama y’abawadde obuwanguzi." 
1Chronicles11:15 Awo abasajja basatu ne balaga mu mpuku ya Adulamu omwali Dawudi, nga n’eggye ly’Abafirisuuti lisiisidde mu kiwonvu Lefayimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Mu kiseera ekyo Dawudi yali mu kigo, nga n’eggye ly’Abafirisuuti liri e Besirekemu."
