Job14:12 bw’atyo omuntu bw’agalamira, era n’atasituka okutuusa eggulu bwe linaggwaawo, abantu tebajja kuzuukuka oba kuggyibwa mu tulo twabwe." 
Job14:13 “Singa kale onkweka emagombe era n’onziika okutuusa obusungu bwo lwe buliggwaawo! Singa ongerera ekiseera n’onzijukira! 
Job14:14 Omuntu bw’afa, addamu n’abeera omulamu? Ennaku zange zonna ez’okuweereza nnaalindanga okuwona kwange kujje." 
Job14:15 Olimpita nange ndikuyitaba; olyegomba ekitonde emikono gyo kye gyatonda. 
Job14:16 Ddala ku olwo bw’olibala ebigere byange, naye tolyekaliriza bibi byange." 
Job14:17 Ebisobyo byange biriba bisibiddwa mu kisawo; olibikka ku kibi kyange. 
Job14:18 “Naye ng’olusozi bwe luseebengerera ne luggwaawo, era ng’ejjinja bwe liva mu kifo kyalyo," 
Job14:19 ng’amazzi bwe gaggwereeza amayinja era ng’okwanjaala kwago bwe kutwala ettaka ly’oku nsi; bw’atyo bw’azikiriza essuubi ly’omuntu. 
Job14:20 Omumalamu amaanyi omuwangula lumu n’aggweerawo ddala; okyusa enfaanana ye n’omugoba. 
Job14:21 Abaana be bwe bafuna ekitiibwa, takimanya, bwe bagwa, takiraba." 
Job14:22 Obulamu bw’omubiri gwe bwokka bw’awulira ne yeekungubagira yekka.” 
Job15:1 Awo Erifaazi Omutemani n’addamu n’ayogera nti," 
Job15:2 “Omuntu ow’amagezi yandizzeemu n’amagezi agataliimu, oba n’ajjuza olubuto lwe embuyaga ez’ebuvanjuba?" 
Job15:3 Yandiwakanye n’ebigambo ebitaliiko kye bigasa, oba okwogera ebigambo ebitalina kye bikola?" 
Job15:4 Naye onyooma Katonda n’oziyiza okwewaayo eri Katonda. 
Job15:5 Kubanga obutali butuukirivu bwo bwe buyigiriza akamwa ko, era olonzeewo okukozesa olulimi lw’abalimba." 
Job15:6 Akamwa ko kennyini ke kakusalira omusango si nze, emimwa gyo gyennyini gye gikulumiriza." 
Job15:7 “Gwe wasooka abantu bonna okuzaalibwa? Oba ggwe wazaalibwa ensozi nga tezinnabaawo? 
Job15:8 Ofaayo okuwuliriza okuteesa kwa Katonda? Olowooza gwe mugezi wekka? 
Job15:9 Kiki ky’omanyi kye tutamanyi? Kubikkulirwa ki kw’olina ffe kwe tutalina? 
Job15:10 Ab’envi abakaddiye bali ku ludda lwaffe, abasajja abakulu n’okusinga kitaawo." 
Job15:11 Katonda by’akugambye ebikuzzaamu amaanyi bitono nnyo tebikumala, ebigambo ebikubuuliddwa mu bukkakkamu?" 
Job15:12 Lwaki omutima gwo gukubuzizza, amaaso go ne gatemereza" 
Job15:13 n’olyoka ofuka obusungu bwo eri Katonda, n’ofukumula ebigambo bwe bityo okuva mu kamwa ko?" 
Job15:14 “Omuntu ye ani, alyoke abeere omutukuvu, oba oyo azaalibwa omukazi nti ayinza okuba omutuukirivu?" 
Job15:15 Katonda bw’aba tassa bwesige mu batukuvu be, n’eggulu ne liba nga si ttukuvu mu maaso ge," 
Job15:16 oba oleeta otya omuntu obuntu, omugwagwa era omuvundu, anywa obutali butuukirivu nga amazzi!" 
Job15:17 “Mpuliriza nnaakunnyonnyola, leka nkubuulire kye ndabye:" 
Job15:18 abasajja ab’amagezi kye bagambye nga tebalina kye bakwese ku kye baafuna okuva eri bakadde baabwe 
Job15:19 abo bokka abaweebwa ensi nga tewali mugwira agiyitamu. 
Job15:20 Omuntu omukozi w’ebibi, aba mu kubonaabona ennaku ze zonna, n’anyigirizibwa emyaka gyonna egyamutegekerwa." 
Job15:21 Amaloboozi agatiisa gajjuza amatu ge; byonna bwe biba ng’ebiteredde, abanyazi ne bamulumba." 
Job15:22 Atya okuva mu kizikiza adde, ekitala kiba kimulinze okumusala." 
Job15:23 Adda eno n’eri ng’anoonya ky’anaalya, amanyi ng’olunaku olw’ekizikiza lumutuukiridde." 
Job15:24 Okweraliikirira n’obubalagaze bimubuutikira, bimujjula nga kabaka eyetegekedde olutalo." 
Job15:25 Kubanga anyeenyerezza Katonda ekikonde, ne yeegereegeranya ku oyo Ayinzabyonna," 
Job15:26 n’agenda n’ekyejo amulumbe, n’engabo ennene enzito." 
Job15:27 “Wadde nga yenna yagejja amaaso ng’ajjudde amasavu mu mbiriizi," 
Job15:28 wakubeera mu bibuga eby’amatongo, ne mu bifulukwa, ennyumba ezigwa okufuuka ebifunfugu." 
Job15:29 Taddeyo kugaggawala, n’obugagga bwe tebulirwawo, n’ebintu by’alina tebirifuna mirandira mu ttaka." 
Job15:30 Taliwona kizikiza, olulimi lw’omuliro lunaakazanga amatabi ge, era omukka gw’omu kamwa gulimugobera wala." 
Job15:31 Alemenga okwerimba nga yeesiga ebitaliimu, kubanga talina ky’ajja kuganyulwa." 
Job15:32 Wa kusasulwa byonna ng’obudde tebunnatuuka, n’amatabi ge tegalikula." 
Job15:33 Aliba ng’omuzabbibu ogugiddwako emizabbibu egitannaba kwengera, ng’omuzeyituuni ogukunkumula ebikoola byagwo." 
Job15:34 Kubanga ekibiina ky’abatatya Katonda kinaabeeranga kigumba, era omuliro gunaayokyanga weema ezinaabangamu enguzi." 
Job15:35 Baba embuto ez’ekibi ne bazaala obutali butuukirivu, embuto zaabwe zizaala obulimba.”" 
Job16:1 Yobu n’addamu nti," 
Job16:2 “Mpulidde ebintu bingi ebiri nga bino; mwenna muli mikwano gyange egitagasa. 
Job16:3 Ebigambo byammwe bingi, tebiikome? Kiki ekibaluma ne mutalekeraawo kuwakana?" 
Job16:4 Nange nandyogedde nga mmwe, singa mmwe mubadde mu kifo kyange; nandyogedde ebigambo ebisengeke obulungi ebibanyiga, ne mbanyeenyeza n’omutwe gwange." 
Job16:5 Naye akamwa kange kandibazizzaamu amaanyi; ebigambo eby’essuubi okuva mu kamwa kange byandibaleetedde eddembe. 
Job16:6 “Ate bwe njogera, obulumi bwange tebuwona, bwe nsirika era busigalawo." 
Job16:7 Mazima ddala, Ayi Katonda, ommazeemu amaanyi; osaanyiririzzaawo ddala ennyumba yange yonna." 
Job16:8 Onsibye n’onyweza ekinnumiririza ddala, obukovvu bwange bwe bukulaga bwe ndi, kirabika ne ku maaso." 
Job16:9 Katonda annumba n’obusungu bwe n’anjuzaayuza, annumira emba; omulabe wange antunuulira nkaliriza n’amaaso ge agafumita." 
Job16:10 Abantu bayasamya emimwa gyabwe ne bansekerera; bankuŋŋaanirako ne bankuba empi ku matama. 
Job16:11 Katonda ampaddeyo eri omukozi w’ebibi, era n’ansuula mu mikono gy’ababi." 
Job16:12 Nnali bulungi, n’anjuzaamu wakati; yankwata ku nsingo n’ammenyamu. Anfudde ssabbaawa," 
Job16:13 abakubi b’obusaale banneetoolodde. Awatali kusaasira, afumita ensigo zange, omususa gwange ne guyiika ku ttaka." 
Job16:14 Annumba, emirundi n’emirundi, n’anfubutukirako ng’omulwanyi omuzira." 
Job16:15 “Neetungidde ebikutiya eby’okukungubagiramu, ne nkweka obwenyi bwange mu nfuufu." 
Job16:16 Nzenna mmyuse amaaso olw’okukaaba, ekisiikirize ekikwafu ennyo kyetoolodde amaaso gange," 
Job16:17 newaakubadde ng’emikono gyange tegirina bibi bye gikoze, n’okusaba kwange nga kutukuvu." 
Job16:18 “Ggwe ensi, tobikka ku musaayi gwange; nneme okusirisibwa!" 
Job16:19 Era kaakano omujulirwa wange ali mu ggulu; omuwolereza wange ali waggulu nnyo ddala. 
Job16:20 Mikwano gyange bansekerera, amaaso gange nga gakulukusa amaziga eri Katonda." 
Job16:21 Ku lw’omuntu, yeegayirira eri Katonda ng’omuntu bwe yeegayiririra mukwano gwe." 
Job16:22 “Emyaka mitono eginaayitawo nga sinnakwata lugendo olw’obutadda.” 
Job17:1 Omutima gwange gwennyise, ennaku zange zisalibbwaako, entaana enninze." 
Job17:2 Ddala abansekerera bannetoolodde; amaaso gange gabeekengera. 
Job17:3 “Ompe, Ayi Katonda akakalu k’onsaba. Ani omulala ayinza okunneeyimirira?" 
Job17:4 Ozibye emitima gyabwe obutategeera; noolwekyo toobakkirize kuwangula. 
Job17:5 Omusajja avumirira mikwano gye olw’empeera alireetera amaaso g’abaana be okuziba. 
Job17:6 “Katonda anfudde ekisekererwa eri buli omu, anfudde buli omu gw’afujjira amalusu mu maaso." 
Job17:7 Amaaso gange gayimbadde olw’okunakuwala; omubiri gwange gwonna kaakano guli nga kisiikirize. 
Job17:8 Abantu ab’amazima beesisiwala olwa kino; atalina musango agolokokedde ku oyo atatya Katonda. 
Job17:9 Naye era abatuukirivu banaakwatanga amakubo gaabwe, n’abo ab’emikono emirongoofu baneeyongeranga amaanyi." 
Job17:10 “Naye mukomeewo mwenna kaakano, mujje, naye siraba muntu mugezi mu mmwe!" 
Job17:11 Ennaku zange ziyise entegeka zange zoonoonese, era bwe kityo n’okwegomba kw’omutima gwange." 
Job17:12 Abantu bano ekiro bakifuula emisana; mu kizikiza mwennyini mwe bagambira nti, Ekitangaala kinaatera okujja." 
Job17:13 Amagombe bwe gaba nga ge maka mwe nnina essuubi, bwe njala obuliri bwange mu kizikiza," 
Job17:14 ne ŋŋamba amagombe nti, ‘Ggwe kitange,’ era n’eri envunyu nti, ‘Ggwe mmange,’ oba nti, ‘Ggwe mwannyinaze,’" 
Job17:15 kale essuubi lyange liba ludda wa? Ani ayinza okuliraba? 
Job17:16 Nalyo lirigenda eri enzigi z’emagombe Oba tuligenda ffenna mu nfuufu?” 
Job18:1 Awo Birudaadi Omusukusi n’ayanukula n’agamba nti," 
Job18:2 “Mulikomya ddi okufuulafuula ebigambo? Muddeemu amagezi, tulyoke twogere." 
Job18:3 Lwaki tutwalibwa ng’ente era ne tulowoozebwa okuba abasirusiru mu maaso gammwe? 
Job18:4 Ggwe eyeyuzayuza olw’obusungu, abantu ensi bagiveeko ku lulwo, oba enjazi zive mu bifo byazo?" 
Job18:5 “Ddala etabaaza y’omukozi w’ebibi ezikidde, era n’omuliro gw’ekyoto kye tegukyayaka." 
Job18:6 Ekitangaala kivudde mu weema ye; n’ettaala eri ku mabbali ge nayo ezikidde. 
Job18:7 Amaanyi gamuwedde, ebigere bye tebikyali bya maanyi, era enkwe ze, ze zimusuula." 
Job18:8 Eky’amazima ebigere bye byamusuula mu kitimba era n’atangatanga mu butimba. 
Job18:9 Omutego gumukwata ekisinziiro; akamasu ne kamunyweeza. 
Job18:10 Omuguwa gumukwekerwa mu ttaka; akatego kamulindirira mu kkubo lye. 
Job18:11 Entiisa emukanga enjuuyi zonna era n’emugoba kigere ku kigere. 
Job18:12 Emitawaana gimwesunga; ekikangabwa kirindiridde okugwa kwe. 
Job18:13 Kirya ebitundu by’olususu lwe; omubereberye wa walumbe amulyako emikono n’ebigere. 
Job18:14 Aggyibwa mu bukuumi bwa weema ye era n’atwalibwa eri kabaka w’ebikangabwa. 
Job18:15 Omuliro gumalirawo ddala byonna eby’omu weema ye; ekibiriiti kyakira mu kifo mw’abeera. 
Job18:16 Emirandira gye gikala wansi, n’amatabi ge gakala waggulu." 
Job18:17 Ekijjukizo kye kibula ku nsi; talina linnya mu nsi. 
Job18:18 Agobebwa okuva mu kitangaala, agenda mu kizikiza n’aggyibwa mu nsi." 
Job18:19 Talina mwana wadde omuzzukulu mu bantu be, newaakubadde ekifo mwabeera." 
Job18:20 Abantu ab’ebugwanjuba beewuunya ebyamutuukako; n’ab’ebuvanjuba ne bakwatibwa ekikangabwa. 
Job18:21 Ddala bw’etyo bw’ebeera ennyumba y’omukozi w’ebibi; bwe gaba bwe gatyo amaka g’oyo atamanyi Katonda.” 
Job19:1 Awo Yobu n’addamu nti: 
Job19:2 “Mulikomya ddi okunnyigiriza ne mummenya n’ebigambo? 
Job19:3 Emirundi kkumi nga munvuma; temukwatiddwa nsonyi kunnumba. 
Job19:4 Bwe kiba nga kituufu nti nawaba, obukyamu bwange, bwange nzekka." 
Job19:5 Bwe muba munneegulumiririzaako ne mukozesa obulumi bwange okunfeebya," 
Job19:6 mumanye nga Katonda ankoze bubi era anzingizza mu kitimba kye. 
Job19:7 “Wadde nga nkaaba nti, ‘Mpisiddwa bubi,’ siddibwamu; ne bwe nkuba enduulu, tewali antaasa." 
Job19:8 Azibye ekkubo lyange sisobola kuyita; amakubo gange agalese mu kizikiza. 
Job19:9 Anziggyeeko ekitiibwa kyange n’anziggyako n’engule ku mutwe gwange. 
Job19:10 Anjuzaayuza ku buli ludda okutuusa lwe watasigalawo kantu, asigula essuubi lyange ng’omuti." 
Job19:11 Obusungu bwe bumbubuukirako; ambala ng’omu ku balabe be. 
Job19:12 Amaggye ge galumba n’amaanyi; ganzimbako enkomera ne gagumba okwetooloola weema yange. 
Job19:13 “Anziggyeeko baganda bange; abo bwe twali tumanyiganye banviiriddeko ddala. 
Job19:14 Ab’ekika kyange banviiriddeko ddala, mikwano gyange ginneerabidde." 
Job19:15 Abagenyi bange n’abaweereza bange abawala, bampisa nga gwe batamanyi, ne bandaba nga munnagwanga." 
Job19:16 Mpita omuddu wange naye tawulira, wadde nga mwegayirira n’akamwa kange." 
Job19:17 Omukka gwange gwe nzisa, guwunyira bubi mukyala wange; nakyayibwa baganda bange bennyini." 
Job19:18 N’obulenzi obuto bunsekerera; buli lwe bundaba bunvuma. 
Job19:19 Mikwano gyange gyonna enfirabulago gya nkyawa; abo be nnayagalanga banneefuukira. 
Job19:20 Siriiko bwe ndi wabula ndi ddiba na magumba: nsigazzaawo bibuno byokka. 
Job19:21 “Munkwatirwe ekisa mikwano gyange, munkwatirwe ekisa, kubanga omukono gwa Katonda gunkubye." 
Job19:22 Lwaki munjigga nga Katonda bw’anjigga? Omubiri gwe mufunye tegumala? 
Job19:23 “Singa nno ebigambo byange byawandiikibwa, Singa byawandiikibwa ku muzingo, bandiguwadde ani?" 
Job19:24 Singa byawandiikibwa n’ekyuma ku lubaati, oba okuwandiikibwa ku lwazi ne bibeerawo emirembe n’emirembe!" 
Job19:25 Mmanyi nga Omununuzi wange mulamu, era nga ku nkomerero aliyimirira ku nsi." 
Job19:26 Era ng’olususu lwange bwe luweddewo, kyokka mu mubiri gwange ndiraba Katonda;" 
Job19:27 nze mwene ndimulaba, n’amaaso gange, Nze, so si mulala. Emmeeme yange ng’eyaayaana munda mu nze!" 
Job19:28 “Bwe mugamba nti, ‘Tujja kumuyigganya, kubanga ensibuko y’emitawaana eri mu ye;’" 
Job19:29 nammwe bennyini musaana mutye ekitala. Kubanga obusungu buleeta okubonereza okw’ekitala, olwo mulyoke mumanye ng’eriyo okusalirwa omusango.”" 
Job20:1 Awo Zofali Omunaamasi n’amuddamu nti," 
Job20:2 “Ebirowoozo byange ebiteganyiziddwa binkubiriza okukuddamu kubanga nteganyizibbwa nnyo. 
Job20:3 Mpulidde nga nswadde olw’okunenya, okutegeera kwange kunkubiriza okuddamu." 
Job20:4 “Ddala omanyi nga bwe byali okuva edda, okuva omuntu lwe yateekebwa ku nsi," 
Job20:5 nti Enseko z’omwonoonyi ziba z’akaseera katono, era n’essanyu ly’abatamanyi Katonda terirwawo." 
Job20:6 Newaakubadde ng’amalala ge gatuuka ku ggulu n’omutwe gwe ne gutuuka ku bire," 
Job20:7 alizikirira emirembe n’emirembe nga empitambi ye: abo abamulaba babuuze nti, ‘Ali ludda wa?’" 
Job20:8 Abulawo ng’ekirooto, n’ataddayo kulabika; abuzeewo ng’okwolesebwa kw’ekiro." 
Job20:9 Eriiso eryamulaba teririddayo kumulaba, taliddayo kulaba kifo kye nate." 
Job20:10 Abaana be basaana bakolagane n’abaavu, emikono gye gyennyini gye gisaana okuwaayo obugagga bwe." 
Job20:11 Amaanyi ag’ekivubuka agajjudde amagumba ge, ge ganaagalamiranga naye mu nfuufu." 
Job20:12 “Okukola ebibi kuwoomerera mu kamwa ke era akukweka wansi w’olulimi lwe," 
Job20:13 tayagala kukuleka, wadde okukuta era akukuumira mu kamwa ke." 
Job20:14 Naye emmere ye erimwonoonekera mu byenda, era erifuuka butwa bwa nsweera munda ye." 
Job20:15 Aliwandula eby’obugagga bye yamira; Katonda alireetera olubuto lwe okubisesema. 
Job20:16 Alinywa obutwa bw’ensweera; amannyo g’essalambwa galimutta. 
Job20:17 Alisubwa obugga, n’emigga egikulukuta n’omubisi gw’enjuki n’amata." 
Job20:18 Bye yateganira alina okubiwaayo nga tabiridde; talinyumirwa magoba ga kusuubula kwe," 
Job20:19 kubanga yanyigiriza abaavu n’abaleka nga bakaaba, yawamba amayumba g’ataazimba." 
Job20:20 “Ddala ddala talifuna kikkusa mululu gwe, wadde okuwonya n’ebyo bye yeeterekera." 
Job20:21 Tewali kimulekeddwawo ky’anaalya; obugagga bwe tebujja kusigalawo. 
Job20:22 Wakati mu kufuna ebingi okulaba ennaku kumujjira; alibonaabonera ddala nnyo. 
Job20:23 Ng’amaze okujjuza olubuto lwe, Katonda alyoke amusumulurire obusungu bwe amukube ebikonde ebitagambika." 
Job20:24 Bw’alidduka ekyokulwanyisa eky’ekyuma, akasaale ak’ekikomo kalimufumita." 
Job20:25 Akasaale kaliviirayo mu mugongo gwe, omumwa gwako ogumasamasa gusikibwe mu kibumba. Entiisa erimujjira." 
Job20:26 Ekizikiza ekikutte kye kirindiridde obugagga bwe. Omuliro ogutazikira gwe gulimumalawo, gwokye ebisigadde mu weema ye." 
Job20:27 Eggulu liryolesa obutali butuukirivu bwe; ensi erimusitukirako n’emujeemera. 
Job20:28 Ebintu by’ennyumba biritwalibwa, biribulira ku lunaku lw’obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Job20:29 Eyo y’engeri Katonda gy’asasulamu abakozi b’ebibi, nga gwe mugabo Katonda gwe yabategekera.”" 
Job21:1 Awo Yobu n’addamu n’ayogera nti," 
Job21:2 “Muwulirize n’obwegendereza ebigambo byange, era kino kibazzeemu amaanyi." 
Job21:3 Mungumiikirizeeko nga njogera, oluvannyuma museke." 
Job21:4 “Okwemulugunya kwange nkw’olekezza muntu? Lwaki okugumiikiriza tekunzigwako? 
Job21:5 Muntunuulire mwewuunye, mujja kukwata ne ku mumwa." 
Job21:6 Bwe ndowooza ku kino, nfuna entiisa; omubiri gwange ne gukankana." 
Job21:7 Lwaki abakozi b’ebibi bawangaala, ne bakaddiwa ne beeyongera n’amaanyi?" 
Job21:8 Balaba abaana baabwe bwe banywezebbwa, ezzadde lyabwe nga balaba." 
Job21:9 Amaka gaabwe gaba n’emirembe nga temuli kutya; omuggo gwa Katonda tegubabeerako. 
Job21:10 Ennume zaabwe teziremererwa, ente zaabwe enkazi zizaala awatali kusowola mwana gwazo." 
Job21:11 Abaana baabwe bagendera wamu nga kisibo; obuto ne bubeera mu kuzina. 
Job21:12 Bayimbira ku bitaasa n’ennanga, ne basanyukira eddoboozi ly’omulere." 
Job21:13 Emyaka gyabwe gyonna babeera bulungi, mangwago ne bakka mu ntaana." 
Job21:14 Kyokka bagamba Katonda nti, ‘Tulekere emirembe gyaffe! Tetwegomba kumanya makubo go." 
Job21:15 Ayinzabyonna ye ani tulyoke tumuweereze? Kiki kye tuganyulwa bwe tumusaba?’ 
Job21:16 Naye obugagga bwabwe tebuli mu mikono gyabwe, noolwekyo amagezi g’abakozi b’ebibi ganneewunyisa." 
Job21:17 “Ettaala y’abakozi b’ebibi yo, ezikira emirundi emeka? Ennaku ebajjira emirundi emeka? Katonda abatuusaako obulumi, ng’abasunguwalidde." 
Job21:18 Bali ng’ebisasiro ebitwaalibwa empewo; ng’ebisusunku embuyaga bye zitwala. 
Job21:19 Katonda abonereza abaana olw’ekibi kya bakitaabwe. Asasule omuntu yennyini oyo alyoke ategeere! 
Job21:20 Leka amaaso ge ye yennyini galabe okuzikirira; leka anywe ku kiruyi kya Ayinzabyonna. 
Job21:21 Kubanga aba afaayo ki ku maka g’aba alese, nga emyezi gye egyamutegekerwa giweddeko?" 
Job21:22 “Eriyo ayinza okuyigiriza Katonda amagezi, kubanga asalira omusango n’abo abasinga okuba aba waggulu?" 
Job21:23 Omusajja omu afiira w’abeerera ow’amaanyi, nga munywevu ddala ali mu mirembe gye," 
Job21:24 omubiri gwe nga guliisiddwa bulungi, amagumba ge nga gajjudde obusomyo." 
Job21:25 Omusajja omulala n’afa ng’alina obulumi ku mutima, nga teyafuna kintu kyonna kirungi." 
Job21:26 Ne beebaka kye kimu mu ttaka, envunyu ne zibabikka bombi." 
Job21:27 “Mmanyi bulungi ddala kye mulowooza, enkwe ze mwagala okunsalira." 
Job21:28 Mugamba nti, ‘Kaakano eruwa ennyumba y’omusajja ow’amaanyi, eweema abasajja abakozi b’ebibi mwe baabeeranga?’" 
Job21:29 Temwebuuzanga ku abo abatambula eŋŋendo? Temukkiriza bye babagamba," 
Job21:30 nti omusajja omukozi w’ebibi awona ku lunaku olw’emitawaana, era awona ku lunaku olw’ekiruyi?" 
Job21:31 Ani avumirira ebikolwa bye maaso ku maaso, ani amusasula ebyo by’akoze?" 
Job21:32 Atwalibwa ku ntaana, era amalaalo ge gakuumibwa." 
Job21:33 Ettaka eriri mu lusenyi limuwoomera, abantu bonna bamugoberera, n’abalala abatamanyiddwa muwendo ne bamukulembera." 
Job21:34 “Kaakano musobola mutya okuŋŋumya n’ebitaliimu? Tewali kisigaddeyo ku bye mwanzizeemu wabula obulimba!” 
Job22:1 Awo Erifaazi Omutemani n’addamu n’ayogera nti," 
Job22:2 “Omuntu ayinza okugasa Katonda? Wadde oyo ow’amagezi ayinza okumuyamba? 
Job22:3 Ayinzabyonna yandifunye kwesiima ki singa wali mutuukirivu? Yandiganyuddwa ki singa amakubo go gaali magolokofu? 
Job22:4 “Akukangavvula lwa kumutya era kyava akuvunaana? 
Job22:5 Okwonoona kwo si kunene nnyo? Ebibi byo si bingi nnyo? 
Job22:6 Kubanga waggya ku muganda wo emisingo awatali nsonga; waggya engoye ku bantu, n’obaleka bwereere." 
Job22:7 Tewawa bakoowu mazzi, abaagala wabamma emmere," 
Job22:8 wadde nga wali musajja wa maanyi, eyalina ettaka, omusajja ow’ekitiibwa, era nga byonna ggwe nnyini byo." 
Job22:9 Weegobako bannamwandu bagende nga toliiko ky’obawadde; abatalina bakitaabwe n’obamalamu amaanyi. 
Job22:10 Emitego kyegivudde gikwetooloola. Lwaki entiisa ey’amangu ekujjira? 
Job22:11 Lwaki enzikiza ekutte nnyo tosobola kulaba, era lwaki amataba gakubikkako?" 
Job22:12 “Katonda tali waggulu mu ggulu? Era laba, emmunyeenye ezisingayo okuba waggulu, nga bwe ziri ewala!" 
Job22:13 Ate n’ogamba nti, ‘Katonda amanyi ki? Ayinza okulamulira mu kizikiza?" 
Job22:14 Ebire ebikutte bimubikkako, n’aba ng’atatulaba bw’aba atambula mu bifo by’omu ggulu.’" 
Job22:15 Onoosigala mu kkubo ery’edda abasajja abakozi b’ebibi lye baakwata? 
Job22:16 Baatwalibwa ng’ekiseera kyabwe tekinnatuuka, emisingi gyabwe gyatwalibwa amataba." 
Job22:17 Be bagamba Katonda nti, ‘Tulekere emirembe! Ayinzabyonna ayinza kutukola ki?’" 
Job22:18 Ate nga ye, ye yajjuza ennyumba zaabwe ebintu ebirungi, noolwekyo neewuunya nnyo amagezi g’abakozi b’ebibi." 
Job22:19 Abatuukirivu balaba okuzikirira kwabwe ne bajaguza; abataliiko musango babasekerera nga bagamba nti," 
Job22:20 ‘Ddala abalabe baffe bazikiridde, era omuliro gulidde obugagga bwabwe.’ " 
Job22:21 “Gonderanga Katonda ofunenga emirembe; mu ngeri eno ebirungi lwe binajjanga gy’oli. 
Job22:22 Kkiriza ebiragiro ebiva mu kamwa ke era oteeke ebigambo bye mu mutima gwo. 
Job22:23 Bw’onodda eri oyo Ayinzabyonna, onodda buggya, bwonooteeka ebibi ewala ne weema yo," 
Job22:24 n’oteeka n’amayinja go ag’omuwendo mu ttaka, zaabu yo eya Ofiri ku njazi z’omu mugga," 
Job22:25 awo Ayinzabyonna anaabeeranga zaabu yo, era ffeeza esingayo obulungi." 
Job22:26 Ddala ddala olisanyukira mu oyo Ayinzabyonna era oyimuse amaaso go eri Katonda. 
Job22:27 Olimusaba, alikuwulira, era olituukiriza obweyamo bwo." 
Job22:28 Ky’olisalawo kirikolebwa, era ekitangaala kirimulisa amakubo go." 
Job22:29 Abantu abalala bwe balisuulibwa n’ogamba nti, ‘Bayimuse!’ Olwo alirokola abagudde." 
Job22:30 Alinunula n’oyo aliko omusango, alinunulwa olw’obulongoofu bw’emikono gyo.”" 
Job23:1 Awo Yobu n’addamu nti," 
Job23:2 “N’okutuusa leero okwemulugunya kwange kubalagala, omukono gwe gunzitoowerera wadde mbadde mu kusinda." 
Job23:3 Singa nnali mmanyi aw’okumusanga nandisobodde okulaga gy’abeera! 
Job23:4 Nanditutte empoza yange gy’ali, akamwa kange nga nkajjuzizza ensonga zange." 
Job23:5 Nanditegedde kye yandinzizeemu, ne neetegereza kye yandiŋŋambye." 
Job23:6 Yandimpakanyizza n’amaanyi mangi? Nedda, teyandinteeseko musango." 
Job23:7 Eyo omuntu omutuukirivu asobola okutwalayo ensonga ye, era nandisumuluddwa omulamuzi wange emirembe n’emirembe." 
Job23:8 “Bwe ŋŋenda ebuvanjuba, nga taliiyo; ne bwe ŋŋenda ebugwanjuba, simusangayo." 
Job23:9 Bw’aba akola mu bukiikakkono simulaba, bw’adda mu bukiikaddyo, simulabako." 
Job23:10 Naye amanyi amakubo mwe mpita, bw’anaamala okungezesa, nzija kuvaamu nga zaabu." 
Job23:11 Ebigere byange bimugoberedde; ntambulidde mu makubo ge nga sikyamakyama. 
Job23:12 Saava ku biragiro by’akamwa ke. Nayagala ebigambo by’akamwa ke okusinga emmere yange gyendya bulijjo. 
Job23:13 “Naye yeemalirira, ani ayinza okumuwakanya? Akola kyonna ekimusanyusa." 
Job23:14 Weewaawo ajja kutuukiriza by’asazzeewo okunjolekeza, era bingi byategese by’akyaleeta." 
Job23:15 Kyenva mba n’entiisa nga ndi mu maaso ge; bwe ndowooza ku bino byonna, ne mmutya." 
Job23:16 Katonda anafuyizza nnyo omutima gwange, Ayinzabyonna antiisizza nnyo." 
Job23:17 Naye ekizikiza tekinsirisizza, ekizikiza ekikutte ennyo ekibisse amaaso gange.”" 
Job24:1 “Lwaki Ayinzabyonna tagera biseera? Lwaki abo abamumanyi tebalaba nnaku zaageze? 
Job24:2 Abantu bajjulula amayinja agalamba ensalo, ne balunda ebisolo bye babbye." 
Job24:3 Batwala endogoyi ya mulekwa ne batwala ennume ya nnamwandu ng’omusingo. 
Job24:4 Basindiikiriza omunaku ne bamuggya mu kkubo, ne bawaliriza abaavu bonna mu ggwanga okwekweka." 
Job24:5 Endogoyi ez’omu ddungu nga bwe zeeyisa, n’abaavu bagenda bategana nnyo nga balondalonda obumere; mu ddungu mwe balonderera emmere y’abaana baabwe." 
Job24:6 Essubi eririibwa ensolo zaabwe baliggya ku ttale lye, ne banoga n’emizabbibu gy’aboonoonyi." 
Job24:7 Olw’okubulwa engoye, basula bwereere; tebalina kye beebikka mu mpewo." 
Job24:8 Enkuba y’oku nsozi ebatobya, ne banywegera enjazi olw’okubulwa we beggama." 
Job24:9 Omwana atalina kitaawe bamusika ku mabeere; omwana omuwere ow’omwavu bamuwamba olw’ebbanja. 
Job24:10 Olw’okubulwa engoye bayita bwereere; betikka ebinywa by’emmere naye basigala tebalidde. 
Job24:11 Basogolera emizabbibu ku mayinja, ne basambira mu ssogolero, naye ne basigala nga balumwa ennyonta." 
Job24:12 Okusinda kw’abantu kuwulirwa mu kibuga, n’emmeeme z’abafunye ebisago zikaabira obuyambi. Naye Katonda talina gw’asinzisa musango." 
Job24:13 “Waliwo abo abajeemera omusana, abatamanyi makubo ge, abatasigala mu kwaka kwagwo." 
Job24:14 Omutemu agolokoka nga obudde buzibye n’atta omwavu n’ali mu kwetaaga; ekiro abbira ddala. 
Job24:15 Eriiso ly’omwenzi lirinda buzibe, ng’agamba nti, ‘Tewali liiso linandaba,’ n’abikka ne ku maaso ge." 
Job24:16 Mu kizikiza mwe basimira amayumba, kyokka emisana baba beggalidde. Tebaagala kitangaala." 
Job24:17 Eri abo bonna ekizikiza ekikutte bwe budde bwabwe obw’oku makya. Kubanga bakola omukwano n’ebitiisa eby’omu nzikiza. 
Job24:18 Bali ng’ebyovu ebiri kungulu ku mazzi, era omugabo gwabwe mukolimire mu nsi. Tewali musogozi n’omu alaga mu nnimiro zaabwe ez’emizabbibu." 
Job24:19 Nga ekyeeya n’ebbugumu bwe bimalawo amazzi agava mu muzira, aboonoonyi bwe batyo bwe bamalibwawo emagombe." 
Job24:20 Olubuto lunaamwerabiranga; envunyu eneemulyanga n’ewoomerwa. Tajjukirwenga nate, omukozi w’ebibi amenyeka ng’omuti." 
Job24:21 Bayiikiriza ne banyaga omugumba atazaala. Tebakolera nnamwandu bya kisa. 
Job24:22 Naye Katonda awalula ab’amaanyi olw’obuyinza bwe. Newaakubadde nga bakulaakulana, kyokka tebalina bukakafu ku bulamu bwabwe." 
Job24:23 Ayinza okubaleka ne babeera mu mirembe n’amaaso ge gabeera ku makubo gaabwe. 
Job24:24 Bayimusibwa akaseera katono, oluvannyuma nga tebakyaliwo. Bakkakkanyizibwa ne bakala ne baggyibwawo nga abalala bonna. Basalibwa ng’emitwe gy’ebirimba by’eŋŋaano." 
Job24:25 “Bwe kiba nga si bwe kiri, ani anannumiriza obulimba, n’afuula okwogera kwange okutaliimu?”" 
Job25:1 Awo Birudaadi Omusuki n’addamu n’ayogera nti," 
Job25:2 “Okufuga kwa Katonda n’entiisa ya Katonda; ateekawo enkola entuufu mu bifo ebya waggulu mu ggulu. 
Job25:3 Amaggye ge gasobola okubalibwa? Ani atayakirwa musana gwe? 
Job25:4 Olwo omuntu ayinza atya okwelowooza nti mutuukirivu awali Katonda? Omuntu eyazaalibwa omukazi ayinza atya okuba omulongoofu? 
Job25:5 Laba n’omwezi tegulina bye gwaka, n’emmunyeenye si nnongoofu mu maaso ge." 
Job25:6 Ate omuntu obuntu oyo envunyu obuvunyu, omwana w’omuntu, oyo olusiriŋŋanyi, ayinza atya okwelowooza nti mulongoofu!”" 
Job26:1 Awo Yobu n’addamu nti," 
Job26:2 “Ng’oyambye oyo atalina maanyi! Ng’oyambye omukono ogwo ogutalina maanyi! 
Job26:3 Ng’amagezi ga kitalo ago g’owadde oyo atalina magezi! Ng’owadde okuluŋŋamizibwa okuyitirivu! 
Job26:4 Ani akuyambye okwogera ebigambo ebyo? Era mwoyo ki ogwogeredde mu kamwa ko? 
Job26:5 “Abafu kye balimu tekigumiikirizika, n’abo abali wansi w’amazzi ne bonna abagabeeramu." 
Job26:6 Amagombe gali bwereere mu maaso ga Katonda; n’okuzikiriza tekulina kikubisse. 
Job26:7 Ayanjuluza eggulu ery’obukiikakkono mu bbanga ejjereere, awanika ensi awatali kigiwanirira." 
Job26:8 Asiba amazzi mu bire bye; ate ebire tebyabika olw’okuzitoowererwa. 
Job26:9 Abikka obwenyi bw’omwezi, agwanjululizaako ebire bye." 
Job26:10 Ateekawo ekipimo ekiraga waggulu amazzi g’ennyanja we gayita, ng’ensalo eyawula ekitangaala n’ekizikiza." 
Job26:11 Empagi z’eggulu zikankana, zeewuunya olw’okunenya kwe." 
Job26:12 Afuukuula ennyanja n’obuyinza bwe, n’asalaasala Lakabu mu bitundutundu n’amagezi ge." 
Job26:13 Yafuuwa omukka ogwatereeza eggulu, omukono gwe gwafumita omusota oguwulukuka." 
Job26:14 Naye nga bino katundu butundu ku bye yakola. Nga kye tumuwulirako katundu butundu ku ekyo ky’ali! Ani ayinza okutegeera okubwatuka kw’obuyinza bwe?” 
Job27:1 Yobu n’ayongera okwogera kwe bw’ati nti," 
Job27:2 “Nga Katonda bw’ali omulamu, agaanye okusala ensonga yange mu mazima, oyo Ayinzabyonna, aleetedde emmeeme yange okulumwa," 
Job27:3 gye nkomye okuba nga nkyalina obulamu mu nze, omukka gwa Katonda nga gukyali mu nnyindo zange," 
Job27:4 emimwa gyange tegijja kwogera butali butuukirivu, era olulimi lwange terujja kwogera bulimba." 
Job27:5 Sirikkiriza nti muli batuufu; okutuusa lwe ndifa, siryeggyako bugolokofu bwange." 
Job27:6 Nzija kwongera okunywerera ku butuukirivu bwange obutabuleka; omutima gwange tegunsalira musango nga nkyali mulamu. 
Job27:7 “Abalabe bange babeere ng’abakozi b’ebibi, n’abo abangolokokerako babeere ng’abatali batuukirivu!" 
Job27:8 Kubanga ssuubi ki oyo atalina Katonda ly’aba nalyo ng’asaliddwako, nga Katonda amuggyeko obulamu?" 
Job27:9 Katonda awulira okukaaba kwe ng’ennaku emujjidde? 
Job27:10 Alifuna essanyu mu oyo Ayinzabyonna? Aliyita Katonda ebbanga lyonna? 
Job27:11 Nzija kubayigiriza ebikwata ku maanyi ga Katonda; ebikwata ku oyo Ayinzabyonna sijja kubikweka. 
Job27:12 Weekalirize bino byonna bye mwerabiddeko, lwaki kaakano okwogera ebyo ebitalina makulu?" 
Job27:13 “Eno y’empeera Katonda gy’awa abakozi b’ebibi, omugabo omuntu omujoozi gw’afuna okuva eri oyo Ayinzabyonna:" 
Job27:14 Abaana be ne bwe baba bangi batya, enkomerero yaabwe kitala; ezzadde lye teririfuna byakulya bibamala." 
Job27:15 Abo abaliwona kawumpuli, balifa ne baziikibwa, ne bannamwandu baabwe tebalibakaabira." 
Job27:16 Wadde ng’atereka effeeza ng’enfuufu, n’engoye ng’entuumo y’ebbumba," 
Job27:17 ebyo bye yeeterekera omutuukirivu y’alibyambala, era abo abatalina musango be baligabana effeeza ye." 
Job27:18 Ennyumba gy’azimba eribeera ng’ey’ekiwojjolo; ng’akasiisira akazimbiddwa omukuumi. 
Job27:19 Agenda okwebaka nga mugagga, naye ekyo tekiddemu kubaawo, kubanga alizuukuka nga byonna biweddewo." 
Job27:20 Entiisa erimuzingako ng’amataba; kibuyaga amutwala ekiro mu kyama. 
Job27:21 Embuyaga ey’ebuvanjuba emutwalira ddala n’agenda; emuggya mu kifo kye n’amaanyi. 
Job27:22 Emukuba awatali kusaasira, ng’adduka ave mu maanyi gaayo." 
Job27:23 Erimukubira engalo zaayo, n’emusiiya okuva mu kifo kye.”" 
Job28:1 “Ddala ddala waliwo ebirombe mwe basima effeeza, n’ekifo gye balongooseza effeeza." 
Job28:2 Ekyuma kisimibwa mu ttaka, n’ekikomo ne bakisaanuusa okukiggya mu mayinja." 
Job28:3 Omuntu agoberera enzikiza n’anoonya eyo mu ttaka wansi, asime ekyuma mu kizikiza ekiri wansi ennyo." 
Job28:4 Asima ekinnya ekiri ewala n’abantu gye babeera, mu bifo eteyita bantu, ewala okuva abantu gye bayita." 
Job28:5 Ensi evaamu emmere, naye wansi waayo yafuusibwa nga muliro." 
Job28:6 Safira eva mu mayinja gaayo, era enfuufu yaayo erimu zaabu." 
Job28:7 Tewali kinyonyi kiyizzi kimanyi kkubo lino, wadde n’amaaso ga kamunye tegarirabanga." 
Job28:8 Ekibinja ky’empologoma ento tekituukangayo, tewali mpologoma yali eyiseeyo." 
Job28:9 Omuntu ayasa n’omukono gwe ejjinja ery’embaalebaale, n’avuunika ensozi okuviira ddala we zisibuka." 
Job28:10 Asima ensalosalo ku njazi; n’amaaso ge galaba eby’omuwendo byonna. 
Job28:11 Anoonya wansi mu migga, n’aggyayo ebintu ebyakwekebwa." 
Job28:12 “Naye amagezi gasangibwa wa? Okutegeera kuva wa? 
Job28:13 Omuntu tayinza kutegeera mugaso gwago; tegasangibwa mu nsi y’abalamu. 
Job28:14 Obuziba bwogera nti, ‘Tegali mu nze,’ ennyanja eyogera nti, ‘Tegali mu nze.’" 
Job28:15 Tegayinza kugulibwa na zaabu asingayo obulungi, wadde omuwendo gwago okupimibwa mu ffeeza." 
Job28:16 Tegayinza kugulibwa na zaabu wa Ofiri, mu mayinja ag’omuwendo aga onuku oba safiro." 
Job28:17 Zaabu n’endabirwamu tebiyinza kugenkana: so tegayinza kugeraageranyizibwa n’amayinja ag’omuwendo. 
Job28:18 Kolali n’amayinja ag’endabirwamu tebyogerwa nako; omuwendo ogugula amagezi gusinga amayinja amatwakaavu. 
Job28:19 Topazi eva mu Esiyopya teyinza kugenkana, tegayinza wadde okugulibwa mu zaabu etetabikiddwamu kantu konna." 
Job28:20 “Kale amagezi gava ludda wa? N’okutegeera kubeera ludda wa? 
Job28:21 Gakwekebwa okuva mu maaso g’ebintu byonna ebiramu, era gakwekeddwa ebinyonyi by’omu bbanga." 
Job28:22 Okuzikiriza n’Okufa kwogera nti, ‘Nawulirako buwulizi ku lugambo lwakwo mu matu gange.’" 
Job28:23 Katonda ategeera ekkubo erigatuukako era ye yekka y’amanyi gye gabeera," 
Job28:24 kubanga alaba enkomerero y’ensi era alaba ebintu byonna wansi w’eggulu. 
Job28:25 Bwe yateekawo amaanyi g’empewo, n’apima n’amazzi," 
Job28:26 bwe yateekera enkuba etteeka era n’ekkubo eggulu we linaayitanga nga limyansa," 
Job28:27 olwo n’atunuulira amagezi n’agalangirira; n’agateekawo, n’agagezesa." 
Job28:28 N’agamba omuntu nti, ‘Laba, okutya Mukama, ge magezi, n’okuleka ekibi, kwe kutegeera.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Yobu n’ayongera okwogera nti," 
Job29:2 “Nga nneegomba emyezi egyayita, ennaku Katonda mwe yali nga y’andabirira," 
Job29:3 ettaala ye bwe yayakiranga omutwe gwange, n’ekitangaala kye bwe kyanjakiranga nga ntambulira mu kizikiza." 
Job29:4 Mu biro we nabeerera ow’amaanyi, omukwano gwa Katonda omuyitirivu nga gukuuma amaka gange," 
Job29:5 Ayinzabyonna bwe yali ng’akyali nange n’abaana bange nga bakyanneetoolodde," 
Job29:6 n’ekkubo lyange nga lisiigiddwa omuzigo n’olwazi nga lunfukirira omugga ogw’amafuta. 
Job29:7 “Bwe nalaganga ku mulyango gw’ekibuga ne ntuula ku ntebe mu kifo we baakubiranga enkiiko," 
Job29:8 abavubuka abato bandabanga ne badda ebbali, abakadde ne basituka ne bayimirira;" 
Job29:9 abakungu ab’oku ntikko ne balekeraawo okwogera, ne bakwata ne ku mimwa;" 
Job29:10 ab’ebitiibwa ne balekeraawo okwogera, ennimi zaabwe ne zeesibira waggulu mu kamwa." 
Job29:11 Buli kutu okwampuliranga nga kwesiima, era n’abo abandabanga nga basiima" 
Job29:12 kubanga nawonyanga abaavu abaakaabiranga obuyambi, n’abatalina bakitaabwe abatalina abayamba." 
Job29:13 Omusajja ng’afa, y’ansabira omukisa, ne ndeetera omutima gwa nnamwandu okuyimba." 
Job29:14 Ne nnyambala obutuukirivu ng’engoye zange, obwenkanya bwe bwali omunagiro gwange era ekitambala kye neesiba ku mutwe." 
Job29:15 Nnali maaso g’abamuzibe era ebigere by’abalema. 
Job29:16 Nnali kitaawe w’abanaku, ne nneyama okuwolereza besimanyiiko." 
Job29:17 Namenyanga amannyo g’abakozi b’ebibi, ne nziggya mu kamwa kaabwe, be baali bakutte." 
Job29:18 “Nalowooza nti, ‘Ndifiira mu nnyumba yange nga mpezezza ennaku zange nga nnyingi ng’omusenyu ogw’oku nnyanja." 
Job29:19 Omulandira gwange gulituuka mu mazzi, era n’omusulo gulibeera ku ttabi lyange okukeesa obudde." 
Job29:20 Ekitiibwa kyange tekirikaddiwa mu nze, n’omutego gwange ogw’akasaale gusigale nga tegukaddiye mu mukono gwange.’ " 
Job29:21 “Abantu beesunganga okumpuliriza, nga balindirira mu kasirise amagezi gange." 
Job29:22 Bwe namalanga okwogera, nga tewaba addayo kwogera, ebigambo byange byagwanga mpola mpola mu matu gaabwe." 
Job29:23 Bannindiriranga ng’enkuba ne banywa ebigambo byange ng’enkuba eya ttoggo. 
Job29:24 Bwe nabamwenyeranga nga tebakikkiriza; ekitangaala ky’oku maaso gange kyali kya muwendo gye bali. 
Job29:25 Nabasalirangawo eky’okukola, ne ntuula nga kabaka n’amaggye ge; nnali ng’abo ababeesabeesa abakungubazi.”" 
Job30:1 “Naye kaakano bansekerera; abantu abansinga obuto, bakitaabwe be nnandibadde nteeka wamu n’embwa ezikuuma endiga zange." 
Job30:2 Amaanyi g’emikono gyabwe gaali gangasa ki? Abantu abaali baweddemu amaanyi ag’obuvubuka bwabwe," 
Job30:3 abakoozimbye abaali mu bwetaavu era abayala, bameketa ettaka ekkalu mu nsi enjereere mu budde obw’ekiro." 
Job30:4 Banoga ebiragala ebiwoomerera ng’omunnyo mu bisaka, enkolokolo ez’omwoloola y’emmere yaabwe." 
Job30:5 Baagobebwa bave mu bantu bannaabwe, ne babaleekaanira gy’obeera nti, baali babbi." 
Job30:6 Baawalirizibwa okubeera mu migga egyakalira, mu njazi ne mu binnya wansi mu ttaka." 
Job30:7 Baakaabira mu bisaka ng’ensolo ne beekweka mu bikoola by’emiti. 
Job30:8 Ezzadde ly’abasirusiru abatalina bwe bayitibwa, baagobebwa mu nsi." 
Job30:9 Naye kaakano abaana baabwe bansekerera nga bannyimba; nfuuse ekyenyinyalwa gye bali," 
Job30:10 abatanjagala abanneesalako, banguwa okunfujjira amalusu mu maaso." 
Job30:11 Kaakano Katonda nga bw’atagguludde akasaale kange, ammazeemu amaanyi; beeyisizza nga bwe balaba mu maaso gange." 
Job30:12 Abantu bano bannumba ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo; bategera ebigere byange emitego, ne baziba amakubo banzikirize." 
Job30:13 Banzingiza ne banzikiriza, nga tewali n’omu abayambye." 
Job30:14 Banzingiza ng’abayita mu kituli ekigazi, bayingira nga bayita mu muwaatwa." 
Job30:15 Nnumbiddwa ebitiisa eby’amaanyi; ekitiibwa kyange kifuumuuse ng’ekifuuyiddwa empewo, era n’obukuumi bwange ne bubulawo ng’ekire.”" 
Job30:16 “Era kaakano obulamu bwange buseebengerera buggwaawo, ennaku ez’okubonaabona zinzijjidde." 
Job30:17 Ekiro kifumita amagumba gange era obulumi bwe nnina tebukoma. 
Job30:18 Mu maanyi ge amangi Katonda abeera ng’olugoye lwe nneebikka, n’ensibibwa ng’ekitogi ky’ekyambalo kyange." 
Job30:19 Ansuula mu bitosi, ne nfuuka ng’enfuufu n’evvu." 
Job30:20 “Nkukaabirira nti, Ayi Katonda, naye toddamu; nnyimirira, naye ontunuulira butunuulizi." 
Job30:21 Onkyukira n’obusungu; onnumba n’omukono gwo ogw’amaanyi. 
Job30:22 Onsitula mu bbanga n’ongobesa empewo, n’onziza eno n’eri mu muyaga." 
Job30:23 Mmanyi nga olintuusa mu kufa, mu kifo kye wateekerawo abalamu bonna." 
Job30:24 “Ddala tewali ayamba muntu anyigirizibwa ng’akaaba mu kunyigirizibwa kwe. 
Job30:25 Saakaabira abo abaali mu buzibu? Emmeeme yange teyalumirirwa abaavu? 
Job30:26 Naye bwe nanoonya obulungi, ekibi kye kyajja; bwe nanoonya ekitangaala, ekizikiza kye kyajja." 
Job30:27 Olubuto lwange lutokota, terusirika; ennaku ez’okubonaabona kwange zinjolekedde." 
Job30:28 Nzenna ŋŋenda nzirugala naye si lwa kwokebwa musana; nnyimirira mu lukuŋŋaana, ne nsaba obuyambi." 
Job30:29 Nfuuse muganda w’ebibe, munne w’ebiwuugulu." 
Job30:30 Olususu lwange luddugadde, era lususumbuka; n’omubiri gwange gwokerera." 
Job30:31 Ettendo lyange lifuuseemu kukaaba n’akalere kange ne kavaamu eddoboozi ery’ebiwoobe.” 
Job31:1 “Nakola endagaano n’amaaso gange; obutatunuulira muwala n’amaaso ag’obukaba. 
Job31:2 Kiki Katonda kye yandinsasudde okuva waggulu, omugabo ogwandivudde eri oyo Ayinzabyonna ali waggulu?" 
Job31:3 Emitawaana tegijjira abo abatali batukuvu, n’okulaba ennaku ne kujjira abakola eby’obujeemu?" 
Job31:4 Amakubo gange gonna tagalaba, era tamanyi ntambula yange?" 
Job31:5 Obanga natambulira mu bulimba era nga n’ekigere kyange kyayanguyiriza okukola obukuusa; 
Job31:6 leka mpimibwe ku minzaani ya Katonda amanye obutuukirivu bwange. 
Job31:7 Obanga ekigere kyange kyali kikyamye okuva mu kkubo, n’omutima gwange ne gugoberera amaaso gange, engalo zange ne zibaako ebbala lyonna;" 
Job31:8 kale nsige, omulala abirye, weewaawo ebirime byange bikuulibwe." 
Job31:9 Obanga omutima gwange gwali gusendeddwasendeddwa omukazi, oba ne mmuteegera ku mulyango gwa muliraanwa," 
Job31:10 kale omukazi wange ase eŋŋaano y’omusajja omulala, n’abasajja abalala beebake naye." 
Job31:11 Kubanga ekyo kyandibadde kya kivve, ekibi ekiŋŋwanira okubonerezebwa." 
Job31:12 Ogwo gwandibadde muliro ogwokya okutuusa mu kuzikirira, ogwandyokezza ebyange byonna bye nasimba.”" 
Job31:13 “Obanga nnali nnyoomye ensonga y’omuddu wange oba omuddu wange omukazi, bwe banninaako ensonga," 
Job31:14 kale ndikola ntya Katonda bw’alinnyimukiramu? Era bw’alimbuuza, ndimuddamu ki?" 
Job31:15 Eyantonda mu lubuto nabo si ye yabatonda? Ffenna si ye yatukola mu mbuto za bannyaffe? 
Job31:16 “Obanga nnamma omwavu ekintu kyonna, era obanga nakaabya nnamwandu;" 
Job31:17 obanga nnali ndidde akamere kange nzekka atalina kitaawe n’atalyako," 
Job31:18 kubanga okuva mu buto bwange namulera nga kitaawe, era okuva mu lubuto lwa mmange nayamba nnamwandu." 
Job31:19 Obanga nnali ndabye omuntu yenna ng’afa olw’okubulwa ebyambalo, oba ali mu kwetaaga atalina kye yeebikka;" 
Job31:20 mpozzi omutima gwe, gwe gutansiima, olw’okumubugumya n’ebyoya by’endiga zange;" 
Job31:21 obanga nayimusa omukono gwange eri abatalina bakitaabwe, kubanga mmanyi nti, mmanyiganye n’ab’obuyinza," 
Job31:22 kale omukono gwange gukutuke ku kibegabega kyange, leka gukutukireyo mu kinywa we guyungira." 
Job31:23 Olw’okutya okuzikirizibwa Katonda n’olw’obukulu bwe, nnali sisobola kukola bintu ng’ebyo." 
Job31:24 “Obanga nateeka obweyamo bwange mu zaabu oba ne ŋŋamba zaabu ennongoose nti, ‘Ggwe bwesige bwange;’" 
Job31:25 obanga neeyagala olw’okuba n’obugagga obungi, oba olw’okuba emikono gyange gy’ali ginfunyisizza bingi;" 
Job31:26 obanga nnali ntunuulidde enjuba, oba omwezi nga byaka mu kitiibwa," 
Job31:27 omutima gwange ne gusendebwasendebwa mu kyama, ne mbinywegera nga mbisaamu ekitiibwa," 
Job31:28 era n’ekyo kyandibadde kibi ekiŋŋwanyiza okusalirwa omusango olw’obutaba mwesigwa eri Katonda ali waggulu.” 
Job31:29 “Obanga nasanyuka ng’omulabe wange afunye emitawaana oba ne njaguza olw’ebizibu ebyamutuukako," 
Job31:30 sakkiriza kamwa kange kwonoona nga nkolimira obulamu bwe. 
Job31:31 Abantu b’omu nnyumba yange bwe baba tebabuuzanga nti, ‘Ani atakkuse nnyama?’" 
Job31:32 Tewali mutambuze yasula ku kkubo, kubanga oluggi lwange lwali luggule eri buli muyise." 
Job31:33 Obanga nakweka ekibi kyange ng’abantu bwe bakola, nga nkweka obutali butuukirivu bwange mu mutima gwange," 
Job31:34 olw’okutya ekibiina, nga ntya okuswala mu kika, ne nsirika ne ntya n’okufuluma ebweru," 
Job31:35 so nga waliwo ayinza okumpulira, leka nteekeko omukono ku mpoza yange, leka Ayinzabyonna anziremu; n’oyo ampawaabira abiteeke mu buwandiike." 
Job31:36 “Ddala ddala nandibyambadde ku kibegabega kyange, nandibyambadde ku mutwe ng’engule." 
Job31:37 Nandimunnyonnyodde buli kifo we nalinnya ekigere, nandimusemberedde ng’omulangira." 
Job31:38 “Singa ettaka lyange linkaabirira, n’ebinnya byalyo bye nsimye ne bitotobala n’amaziga;" 
Job31:39 obanga ndiddemu ebibala awatali kusasula, era ne ndeetera bannannyini lyo okufa," 
Job31:40 leka omwennyango gumere mu kifo ky’eŋŋaano, n’omuddo oguwunya gumere mu kifo kya sayiri.” Ebigambo bya Yobu byakoma wano." 
Job32:1 Awo abasajja abo abasatu ne balekeraawo okwogera ne Yobu, kubanga yali yeeraba nga mutuukirivu." 
Job32:2 Naye Eriku, mutabani wa Balakeri Omubuzi, ow’omu kika kya Laamu, n’anyiigira nnyo Yobu olw’okweraba ng’atalina musango, naye n’anenya Katonda." 
Job32:3 Yanyiigira ne mikwano gye abasatu, kubanga baalemwa okulumiriza Yobu kyokka nga baali bamusingisizza omusango." 
Job32:4 Eriku yali alinzeeko okwogera ne Yobu kubanga banne baali bakulu okumusinga. 
Job32:5 Naye bwe yalaba ng’abasajja bano abasatu tebakyalina kirala kya kwogera, n’anyiiga." 
Job32:6 Awo Eriku mutabani wa Balakeri Omubuzi n’addamu n’ayogera nti, “Nze ndi muto mu myaka, mmwe muli bakulu, kyenavudde ntya okubabuulira kye ndowooza." 
Job32:7 Nalowoozezza nti, Emyaka gye gisaanye okwogera, n’emyaka emingi gye gisaanye okuyigiriza amagezi." 
Job32:8 Kyokka omwoyo oguli mu muntu, nga gwe mukka gw’oyo Ayinzabyonna, gwe guwa omuntu okutegeera." 
Job32:9 Abakadde si be bokka abalina amagezi, wadde abakulu bokka okuba nga be bategeera ekituufu." 
Job32:10 “Kyenva ŋŋamba nti, Mumpulirize, nange mbabuulire kye mmanyi." 
Job32:11 Nassizzaayo omwoyo nga mwogera, nawulirizza ensonga ze mwawadde nga munoonya eby’okwogera." 
Job32:12 Nabawulirizza bulungi. Kyokka tewali n’omu ku mmwe yalaze Yobu bw’ali omukyamu; tewali n’omu ku mmwe eyayanukudde ebigambo bye. 
Job32:13 Mwegendereze temugamba nti, ‘Tusanze omuntu ow’amagezi; muleke Katonda amuwangule so si bantu.’" 
Job32:14 Kyokka Yobu ebigambo bye tabyolekezza nze, era sijja kumuddamu na bigambo byammwe." 
Job32:15 “Basobeddwa, tebalina kya kwogera, ebigambo bibaweddeko." 
Job32:16 Kaakano nsirike busirisi, nga bayimiridde buyimirizi, nga tebalina kye boogera?" 
Job32:17 Nange nnina eky’okwogera, era nnaayogera kye mmanyi," 
Job32:18 kubanga nzijjudde ebigambo, era omwoyo ogwange gumpaliriza okwogera." 
Job32:19 Munda mu nze omutima guli nga wayini, asaanikiddwa mu ccupa, ng’amaliba amaggya agalindiridde okwabika." 
Job32:20 Nteekwa okwogera, nsobole okufuna eddembe, nteekwa okwasamya akamwa kange mbeeko kye njogera." 
Job32:21 Sijja kubaako gwe nkwatirwa nsonyi, era sijja na kuwaana muntu yenna." 
Job32:22 Kubanga singa mpaaniriza, Omutonzi wange yandyanguye okunziggyawo.”" 
Job33:1 “Kaakano ggwe Yobu, wuliriza ebigambo byange: ssaayo omwoyo ku byonna bye njogera." 
Job33:2 Laba nnaatera okwasamya akamwa kange, ebigambo byange bindi ku lulimi." 
Job33:3 Ebigambo byange biva mu mutima omulongoofu; olulimi lwange, mu bwesimbu, lwogera bye mmanyi." 
Job33:4 Omwoyo wa Katonda ye yankola, era omukka gw’oyo Ayinzabyonna gumpa obulamu." 
Job33:5 Onnyanukule nno bw’oba osobola, teekateeka ebigambo byo onjolekere." 
Job33:6 Laba, nange ndi ggwe mu maaso ga Katonda. Nange nava mu bbumba." 
Job33:7 Tobaako ky’otya, sijja kukunyigiriza." 
Job33:8 Ddala ddala oyogedde mpulira, ebigambo byennyini mbiwulidde ng’ogamba nti," 
Job33:9 Ndi mulongoofu sirina kibi, siriiko musango so mu nze temuli butali butuukirivu." 
Job33:10 Kyokka Katonda anteekako omusango, anfudde omulabe we." 
Job33:11 Asiba ebigere byange mu nvuba, antwala okuba omulabe we." 
Job33:12 “Naye leka nkubuulire, mu kino toli mutuufu. Katonda asinga omuntu." 
Job33:13 Lwaki omwemulugunyiza nti, taddamu bigambo bya muntu yenna?" 
Job33:14 Kubanga Katonda ayogerera mu ngeri emu, n’awalala n’ayogerera mu ngeri endala, wadde ng’omuntu tassaayo mwoyo." 
Job33:15 Mu kirooto mu kwolesebwa ekiro ng’otulo tungi tukutte abantu nga beebase ku bitanda byabwe," 
Job33:16 aggula amatu g’abantu, n’abalabula n’ebyekango," 
Job33:17 alyoke akyuse omuntu okumuggya mu bikolwa ebibi n’amalala," 
Job33:18 aziyize emmeeme ye okukka mu bunnya, n’obulamu bwe buleme okuzikirira n’ekitala." 
Job33:19 “Omuntu ayinza okubonerezebwa, olumbe ne lumulumira ku kitanda kye, n’alumwa olutatadde mu magumba ge," 
Job33:20 obulamu bwe ne bwetamira ddala emmere, emmeeme ye n’ekyayira ddala ebyassava." 
Job33:21 Omubiri gwe gugwako ku magumba, n’amagumba ge ne gafubutukayo gye gaali geekwese," 
Job33:22 emmeeme ye n’esembera kumpi n’obunnya; obulamu bwe ne bulaga eri abo abaleeta okufa. 
Job33:23 Singa wabaawo malayika ku ludda lwe, amuwolereza, omu ku lukumi, okubuulira omuntu ekigwanidde;" 
Job33:24 yandimukwatiddwa ekisa n’amugamba nti, ‘Muwonye aleme kusuulibwa magombe, mmusasulidde omutango,’" 
Job33:25 omubiri gwe guzzibwa buggya ng’ogw’omwana omuwere, era guddayo ne gubeera nga bwe gwali mu nnaku ze ez’obuvubuka." 
Job33:26 Omuntu asaba Katonda, Katonda n’amukwatirwa ekisa. Alaba amaaso ga Katonda n’ajaguza n’essanyu, Katonda n’amuddiza nate ekifo kye eky’obutuukirivu." 
Job33:27 Awo omuntu n’akomawo eri abantu n’abagamba nti, Nayonoona, ne nkola ekyo ekitaali kirungi, naye ne sibonerezebwa nga bwe kyali kiŋŋwanidde." 
Job33:28 Yanunula emmeeme yange n’amponya okukka mu bunnya; kyenaava mbeera omulamu ne nsigala nga mpoomerwa ekitangaala. 
Job33:29 “Bw’atyo Katonda bw’akola omuntu emirundi ebiri oba esatu," 
Job33:30 okuzza emmeeme ye ng’agiggya emagombe, ekitangaala eky’obulamu kimwakire." 
Job33:31 “Yobu, weetegereze nnyo, ompulirize; siriikirira nkubuulire." 
Job33:32 Bw’oba ng’olina eky’okwogera kyonna, nziraamu; yogera kubanga njagala wejjeerere." 
Job33:33 Bwe kitaba kityo, mpuliriza; sirika nange nnaakuyigiriza amagezi.”" 
Job34:1 Awo Eriku ne yeeyongera okwogera nti," 
Job34:2 “Muwulire ebigambo byange, mmwe abasajja ab’amagezi; mumpulirize mmwe abayivu." 
Job34:3 Kubanga okutu kugezesa ebigambo ng’olulimi bwe lugezesa emmere. 
Job34:4 Leka twesalirewo ekituufu; muleke tulondewo ekisaanidde. 
Job34:5 “Yobu agamba nti, ‘Siriiko musango, naye Katonda agaanye okusala omusango gwange mu mazima." 
Job34:6 Wadde nga ndi mutuufu, ntwalibwa okuba omulimba, wadde nga siriiko musango, akasaale ke kanteseeko ekiwundu ekitawonyezeka.’" 
Job34:7 Musajja ki ali nga Yobu, anywa okunyoomebwa ng’anywa amazzi?" 
Job34:8 Atambula n’abakozi b’ebibi, mukwano gw’abo abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu." 
Job34:9 Kubanga agambye nti, ‘Omuntu talina kyaganyulwa bw’agezaako okusanyusa Katonda.’" 
Job34:10 Noolwekyo mumpulirize mmwe abasajja abalina okutegeera. Kikafuuwe Katonda okukola ebibi, wadde Ayinzabyonna okukola ebikyamu." 
Job34:11 Asasula omuntu olw’ekyo ky’aba akoze; n’amutuusaako ebyo ebimusaanidde olw’empisa ze. 
Job34:12 Weewaawo amazima gali nti, Katonda tasobya. Ayinzabyonna tasaliriza musango." 
Job34:13 Obuyinza yabuggya eri ani okukulembera ensi? Ani eyamuwa olukusa okufuga ensi yonna? 
Job34:14 Singa asalawo n’atwala omwoyo gw’omuntu awamu n’omukka gwe," 
Job34:15 abantu bonna bandizikiriridde wamu, era omuntu yandizzeeyo mu nfuufu." 
Job34:16 “Bw’oba olina okutegeera, wuliriza kino; wuliriza kye ŋŋamba." 
Job34:17 Oyo atayagala bwenkanya asobola okufuga? Onoosalira abatuukirivu n’oyo ow’amaanyi omusango? 
Job34:18 Oyo si ye agamba bakabaka nti, ‘Tolina mugaso,’ n’abakungu nti, ‘Oli mukozi wa bibi,’" 
Job34:19 atattira balangira ku liiso era nga tafa ku bagagga kusinga bw’afa ku baavu, kubanga egyo gye mirimu gy’emikono gye?" 
Job34:20 Mu kaseera buseera baba bafiiridde wakati mu ttumbi. Abantu banyeenyezebwa ne baggyibwawo. Abo ab’amaanyi batwalibwa n’omukono ogutali gw’abantu. 
Job34:21 “Amaaso ge gatunuulira amakubo g’abantu; atunuulira buli kigere kye batambula. 
Job34:22 Teri kifo kikwafu wadde ekisiikirize eky’amaanyi, ababi gye bayinza okwekweka." 
Job34:23 Katonda teyeetaaga kwongera kwekebejja bantu okulabika mu maaso ge okusalirwa omusango. 
Job34:24 Awatali kwebuuza ku muntu yenna, amenyaamenya ab’amaanyi n’ateekawo abalala mu kifo kyabwe." 
Job34:25 Olw’okubanga amanyi ebikolwa byabwe, abamalamu amaanyi ekiro ne babetentebwa." 
Job34:26 Ababonereza olw’ebikolwa byabwe ebibi abantu bonna nga balaba," 
Job34:27 kubanga baamuvaako ne balekeraawo okumugoberera ne bataddayo kufaayo n’akatono ku makubo ge gonna. 
Job34:28 Baleetera abaavu okukaaba, ne kumutuukako era n’awulira okukaaba kw’abanyigirizibwa." 
Job34:29 Naye bw’asalawo obutabaako ky’ayogera, ani ayinza okumunenya? Bwakweka amaaso ge ani ayinza okumulaba? Eggwanga n’omuntu abalinako obuyinza bwe bumu;" 
Job34:30 aziyiza omuntu atatya Katonda okufuga, aleme okutega abantu emitego." 
Job34:31 “Singa omuntu agamba Katonda nti, gunsinze, sikyaddayo kwonoona," 
Job34:32 kye sitegeera kinjigirize, bwe mba nga nsobezza sikyaddayo kukikola," 
Job34:33 olwo Katonda akuddemu nga bw’oyagala, akuleke ng’ogaanye okwenenya? Kaakano ggwe olina okusalawo, so sinze; noolwekyo mbuulira ggwe ky’omanyi." 
Job34:34 “Abantu abalina okutegeera mumbuulire, abasajja abagezi abawulira muntegeeze," 
Job34:35 ‘Yobu ayogeza butamanya ebigambo bye tebiriimu kwolesebwa.’ 
Job34:36 Singa Yobu agezesebbwa okutuusa ku nkomerero, olw’okwogera ng’abasajja abakozi b’ebibi!" 
Job34:37 Kubanga ku kibi kye ayongeddeko obujeemu, n’akuba mu ngalo wakati mu ffe, n’ayongera okwogera ng’awakanya Katonda.”" 
Job35:1 Eriku n’ayongera okwogera nti," 
Job35:2 “Olowooza kiba kituufu ggwe okugamba nti, Katonda ananziggyako omusango. Oyogera nti, obutuukirivu bwange businga obwa Katonda." 
Job35:3 Ate obuuza nti, ‘Nganyulwa ntya?’ Kirungi ki kye nfuna mu kwonoona kwange?" 
Job35:4 “Nandyagadde okukuddamu ne mikwano gyo egyo gy’oli nagyo. 
Job35:5 Tunula eri eggulu olabe; tunuulira ebire, ebiri waggulu ennyo okukusinga." 
Job35:6 Singa oyonoona ekyo kimukwatako kitya? Ebyonoono byo bwe byeyongera, ekyo kimukolako ki?" 
Job35:7 Bw’oba omutuukirivu, kiki ky’oba omuwadde, oba kiki ky’aba afunye okuva mu ngalo zo?" 
Job35:8 Okwonoona kwo kukosa muntu nga ggwe, era n’obutuukirivu bwo bukwata ku baana b’abantu." 
Job35:9 Abantu bakaaba olw’okunyigirizibwa okw’amaanyi, balaajaanira ab’omukono ogw’amaanyi." 
Job35:10 Naye tewali n’omu agamba nti, Aluwa Mukama Omutonzi wange atuwa ennyimba ekiro," 
Job35:11 atuyigiriza ebingi okusinga ensolo ez’omu nsiko, era n’atufuula bagezi okusinga ebinyonyi eby’omu nsiko?" 
Job35:12 Newaakubadde nga bakaaba, tayinza kuwulira n’addamu kukaaba kw’abasajja ab’amalala abakozi b’ebibi." 
Job35:13 Ddala ddala Katonda tawuliriza kukoowoola kwabwe okwo okutaliimu; Ayinzabyonna takufaako. 
Job35:14 Kale kiba kitya bw’ogamba nti tomulaba, era nti, Omusango gwo guli mu maaso ge era oteekwa okumulindirira;" 
Job35:15 oba nti, ne bw’asunguwala tabonereza era tafaayo nnyo ku butali butuukirivu." 
Job35:16 Kale nno Yobu ayasamya akamwa ke okwogera ebitaliimu; obutamanya bumwogeza ebigambo olukunkumuli.” 
Job36:1 Eriku ne yeeyongera okwogera nti," 
Job36:2 “Yongera okuŋŋumiikirizaako katono nkulage, nkyalina bye nnina okwogera ebifa ku Katonda." 
Job36:3 Amagezi ge nnina gava wala, era mmanyi nga Omutonzi wange alamula mu bwenkanya." 
Job36:4 Eky’amazima ebigambo byange si bikyamu, oyo akakasa by’amanyi y’ayogera naawe." 
Job36:5 “Laba, Katonda wa buyinza, tanyooma bantu; w’amaanyi, anywerera ku bigendererwa bye." 
Job36:6 Talamya bakozi ba bibi, era awa ababonyaabonyezebwa ebibasaanira." 
Job36:7 Taggya maaso ge ku batuukirivu, abatuuza ku ntebe ey’obwakabaka n’abagulumiza emirembe n’emirembe." 
Job36:8 Naye abantu bwe baba basibiddwa enjegere nga banywezeddwa n’emiguwa egy’okulumwa 
Job36:9 n’abategeeza ensobi zaabwe, n’okwonoona kwabwe, nti, beewaggudde," 
Job36:10 aggula amatu gaabwe bawulirize okunenyezebwa n’abalagira beenenye ekibi kyabwe. 
Job36:11 Bwe bamugondera ne bamuweereza, ennaku zaabwe zonna balizimala mu kwesiima, era n’emyaka gyabwe mu kusanyuka." 
Job36:12 Naye bwe batamugondera, baalizikirizibwa n’ekitala, bafe nga tebalina magezi." 
Job36:13 “Ab’emitima egitatya Katonda baba n’obukyayi. Ne bw’abasiba, tebamukaabirira abasumulule." 
Job36:14 Bafiira mu buvubuka bwabwe era obulamu bwabwe buzikiririra mu basajja abenzi. 
Job36:15 Anunula anyigirizibwa mu kubonaabona kwe, n’aggula okutu kwe mu kujoogebwa kwe." 
Job36:16 “Akusendasenda okukuggya mu kamwa k’okubonaabona, akuteeke mu kifo ekigazi ekitaliimu kuziyizibwa, omanye emirembe gy’emeeza yo ejjudde emmere ennungi." 
Job36:17 Naye kaakano weetisse omugugu ogw’okusalirwa omusango abakozi b’ebibi gwe basaanira; okusalirwa omusango n’obwenkanya byakunyweza. 
Job36:18 Weegendereze oleme kukkiriza kusendebwasendebwa; obunene bw’enguzi buleme okukukyamya. 
Job36:19 Obugagga bwo oba okufuba kwo kwonna binaakuyamba okukuggya mu buyinike? 
Job36:20 Teweegomba budde bwa kiro olyoke owalule abantu okuva mu bifo byabwe. 
Job36:21 Weegendereze oleme kukola bitali bya butuukirivu, by’osinga okwagala okukira okubonyaabonyezebwa." 
Job36:22 “Laba Katonda yagulumira mu maanyi ge; ani ayigiriza nga ye? 
Job36:23 Ani eyali amukubidde amakubo, oba okumugamba nti, ‘Ky’okoze si kituufu?’" 
Job36:24 Jjukira ng’oteekwa okugulumizanga emirimu gye, abantu gye bayimba mu nnyimba." 
Job36:25 Abantu bonna baagiraba, omuntu agirengerera wala." 
Job36:26 Laba, Katonda agulumizibwe! Assukiridde okutegeera kwaffe; obungi bw’emyaka gye tebunoonyezeka." 
Job36:27 “Kubanga akuŋŋaanya amatondo g’amazzi, agafuuka enkuba etonnya mu bugga;" 
Job36:28 ebire bivaamu amazzi gaabyo, enkuba n’ekuba abantu." 
Job36:29 Ani ayinza okutegeera engeri gy’asaasaanyamu ebire, okubwatuka okuva ku kituuti kye?" 
Job36:30 Laba, asaasaanya okumyansa kw’eggulu, era n’abikka obuziba bw’ennyanja." 
Job36:31 Eyo y’engeri gy’afugamu amawanga, n’agawa emmere mu bungi." 
Job36:32 Emikono gye agijjuza eraddu, n’agiragira ekube ebifo bye yeerondeddemu." 
Job36:33 Okubwatuka kwayo kulangirira kibuyaga ajja, n’ente ne zirangirira okujja kwayo.”" 
Job37:1 “Kino kikankanya omutima gwange, ne gubuuka okuva mu kifo kyagwo." 
Job37:2 Wuliriza okubwatuka kw’eddoboozi lye, n’okuwuluguma okuva mu kamwa ke." 
Job37:3 Asumulula eggulu ne limyansa wansi w’eggulu wonna, n’aliragira ligende ku nkomerero y’ensi." 
Job37:4 Kino oluggwa, okuwuluguma kw’eddoboozi lye kwe kuddako, abwatuka n’eddoboozi lye ery’omwanguka, era eddoboozi lye bwe liwulirwa, tewabaawo kisigala nga bwe kibadde." 
Job37:5 Eddoboozi lya Katonda libwatuka mu ngeri ey’ekitalo; akola ebintu ebikulu ebisukka okutegeera kwaffe. 
Job37:6 Agamba omuzira nti, ‘Ggwa ku nsi,’ ate eri enkuba etonnya nti, ‘Ttonnya nnyo.’" 
Job37:7 Emirimu gya buli muntu giyimirira, buli omu n’alyoka amanya amaanyi ga Katonda." 
Job37:8 Ensolo ne ziryoka zessogga empuku zaazo, ne zigenda zeekukuma." 
Job37:9 Omuyaga ne gulyoka guva mu nnyumba yaagwo, n’obunnyogovu ne buva mu mpewo ekuŋŋunta." 
Job37:10 Omuzira ne guva mu mukka gwa Katonda n’amazzi amangi ne gekwata kitole. 
Job37:11 Ebire abijjuza amatondo g’amazzi, n’asaasaanya okumyansa kw’eggulu." 
Job37:12 Byetooloolatooloola nga y’abiragira, ne bituukiriza byonna by’abiragira, ku nsi yonna okubeera abantu." 
Job37:13 Bwe kuba kubonereza, oba okufukirira ensi oba okulaga okwagala kwe, atonnyesa enkuba." 
Job37:14 “Wuliriza kino Yobu; sooka oyimirire olowooze ku bikolwa bya Katonda eby’ettendo. 
Job37:15 Omanyi Katonda engeri gy’alagiramu ebire, n’aleetera eggulu okumyansa?" 
Job37:16 Omanyi engeri ebire gye bituulamu mu bbanga, amakula g’emirimu gy’oyo eyatuukirira mu kumanya?" 
Job37:17 Ggwe alina ebyambalo ebibuguma, ensi bw’eba ng’ekkakkanyizibbwa embuyaga ez’obukiikaddyo," 
Job37:18 oyinza okumwegattako ne mubamba eggulu, eryaguma ne libeera ng’endabirwamu ensanuuse?" 
Job37:19 “Tubuulire kye tunaamugamba; tetusobola kuwoza nsonga zaffe gy’ali olw’ekizikiza kye tulimu. 
Job37:20 Asaanidde okubuulirwa kye njagala okwogera? Eriyo omuntu yenna ayinza okusaba okumalibwawo? 
Job37:21 Kaakano tewali n’omu ayinza kutunula mu njuba, olw’engeri gy’eyakamu ku ggulu, ng’empewo emaze okuyita, n’eyelula ebire." 
Job37:22 Mu bukiikakkono evaayo zaabu; Katonda ajja mu kitiibwa eky’amaanyi. 
Job37:23 Ayinzabyonna tatuukikako era agulumidde mu maanyi, mu bwenkanya bwe era ne butuukirivu bwe, tawaliriza muntu yenna." 
Job37:24 Noolwekyo abantu bamutya, takitwala ng’ekikulu olw’abo abeerowooza okuba abagezi mu mitima gyabwe.”" 
Job38:1 Mukama n’addamu Yobu ng’ayita mu muyaga, n’ayogera nti," 
Job38:2 “Ani ono aleeta ekizikiza ku kuteesa kwange, n’ebigambo ebitaliimu magezi?" 
Job38:3 Yambala ebyambalo byo ng’omusajja, mbeeko bye nkubuuza naawe onziremu." 
Job38:4 “Wali ludda wa nga nteekawo emisingi gy’ensi? Mbuulira bw’oba otegeera. 
Job38:5 Ani eyasalawo ebipimo byayo? Ddala oteekwa okuba ng’omanyi! Oba ani eyagipima n’olukoba? 
Job38:6 Entobo zaayo zaateekebwa ku ki? 
Job38:7 Emunyeenye ez’oku makya bwe zaali ziyimba, era n’abaana ba Katonda bonna nga baleekaana olw’essanyu," 
Job38:8 ani eyasiba enzigi n’aggalira ennyanja, bwe yava mu lubuto lwayo?" 
Job38:9 “Bwe nakolera ebire ekyambalo kyabyo, ne mbisibira mu kizikiza ekikwafu," 
Job38:10 bwe n’abiteekerawo we bikoma ne mbiteerako emitayimbwa n’enzigi," 
Job38:11 bwe nagamba nti, Wano we mutuuse we munaakoma temujja kweyongerayo, era wano amayengo gammwe ag’amalala we ganaakoma?" 
Job38:12 “Oba wali olagidde ku budde okukya kasookedde obaawo ku nsi, oba emmambya okugiraga ekifo kyayo," 
Job38:13 eryoke ekwate ensi w’ekoma eginyeenye esuule eri ababi bagiveeko bagwe eri? 
Job38:14 Ensi eggyayo ebyafaayo byayo n’eba ng’ebbumba wansi w’akabonero, ebyafaayo ebyo ne byefaananyiriza olugoye." 
Job38:15 Abakozi b’ebibi bammibwa ekitangaala kyabwe, n’omukono gwabwe gwe bayimusa gumenyebwa." 
Job38:16 “Wali otuuseeko ku nsulo ennyanja w’esibuka, oba n’olaga mu buziba bw’ennyanja?" 
Job38:17 Wali obikuliddwa enzigi z’emagombe? Oba wali olabye enzigi z’ekisiikirize ky’okufa? 
Job38:18 Wali otegedde obugazi bw’ensi? Byogere, oba bino byonna obimanyi." 
Job38:19 “Ekkubo eridda mu nnyumba omusana gye gusula liri ludda wa? N’ekifo ekizikiza gye kisula kye kiruwa? 
Job38:20 Ddala, osobola okubitwala gye bibeera? Omanyi ekkubo erigenda gye bisula?" 
Job38:21 Ddala oteekwa okuba ng’obimanyi, kubanga wali wazaalibwa dda!" 
Job38:22 “Wali oyingidde amazzi agakwata mu butiti, gye gaterekebwa, oba wali olabye omuzira gye guterekebwa?" 
Job38:23 Bye nterekera ebiseera eby’emitawaana, bikozesebwe mu nnaku ez’entalo n’okulwana?" 
Job38:24 Kkubo ki erituusa ekitangaala ky’omusana gye kisaasaanira, oba empewo ey’ebuvanjuba gy’esaasaanira ku nsi?" 
Job38:25 Ani akubira amataba emikutu mwe ganaayita, oba ekkubo eggulu eribwatuka mwe liyita?" 
Job38:26 Ani atonnyesa enkuba mu nsi abantu mwe batabeera, eddungu omutali muntu yenna," 
Job38:27 n’okufukirira ettaka eryalekebwa awo, eryazika, n’okulimezaako omuddo?" 
Job38:28 Enkuba erina kitaawe waayo? Ani azaala amatondo ag’omusulo? 
Job38:29 Omuzira guva mu lubuto lw’ani? Ani azaala obutiti obukwafu obw’omu ggulu," 
Job38:30 amazzi mwe gakwatira ne gakaluba ng’amayinja, ne kungulu kw’obuziba ne kukwata?" 
Job38:31 “Oyinza okuziyiza okwakaayakana kwa Kakaaga, oba okutaggulula enkoba za Ntungalugoye?" 
Job38:32 Oyinza okufulumya emunyeenye ziveeyo zaake ng’ekiseera kyazo kituuse, oba okuluŋŋamya eddubu n’abaana balyo?" 
Job38:33 Omanyi amateeka n’obufuzi bw’eggulu? Oyinza okuteekawo obufuzi bw’alyo oba obwa Katonda ku nsi? 
Job38:34 “Oyinza okuyimusa eddoboozi lyo oleekaanire ebire, olyoke obiggyemu amataba gakubikke?" 
Job38:35 Ggwe otuma eggulu limyanse era libwatuke? Lisobola okukweyanjulira nti, ‘Tuutuno tuli wano’?" 
Job38:36 Ani eyateeka amagezi mu mutima gw’omuntu, oba eyateeka okutegeera mu mmeeme?" 
Job38:37 Ani alina amagezi agabala ebire? Ani ayinza okuwunzika ebibya by’amazzi eby’omu ggulu," 
Job38:38 enfuufu ng’efuuse ettaka ekkalu, era amafunfugu ne geegattira ddala?" 
Job38:39 “Empologoma enkazi, oyinza okugiyiggira ky’eneerya, oba okuliisa empologoma n’ozimalako enjala," 
Job38:40 bwe zeezinga mu mpuku zaazo, oba bwe zigalamira nga ziteeze mu bisaka?" 
Job38:41 Ani awa namuŋŋoona emmere, abaana baayo bwe bakaabirira Katonda, nga batambulatambula nga babuliddwa emmere?”" 
Job39:1 “Omanyi ebiro embuzi z’oku nsozi mwe zizaalira? Oba oyinza okumanya empeewo we ziwakira? 
Job39:2 Oyinza okubala emyezi gye zimala zizaale? Omanyi obudde mwe zizaalira? 
Job39:3 Zikutama ne zizaala abaana baazo, ne ziwona obulumi bw’okuzaala." 
Job39:4 Abaana baazo bakula ne bagejjera ku ttale, batambula ne bagenda obutadda." 
Job39:5 “Ani eyaleka entulege okwetambulira mu ddembe lyayo? Ani eyasumulula emiguwa gyayo," 
Job39:6 gye nawa ensi ey’omuddo okuba amaka gaayo, n’ensi ey’omunnyo okubeerangamu?" 
Job39:7 Esekerera oluyoogaano lw’ekibuga, tewuliriza kulekaana kw’abavuzi ba bidduka." 
Job39:8 Ebuna ensozi, ly’eddundiro lyayo, ng’enoonya ekintu kyonna ekibisi." 
Job39:9 “Embogo eyinza okukkiriza okuba omuweereza wo, n’esula ekiro mu kisibo kyo?" 
Job39:10 Oyinza okugisiba ku muguwa n’ogirimisa olubimbi? Eyinza okukuvaako emabega ng’erima mu kiwonvu. 
Job39:11 Oyinza okugyesiga olw’amaanyi gaayo amangi? Oyinza okugirekera emirimu gyo egy’amaanyi? 
Job39:12 Oyinza okugyesiga okukuleetera emmere yo ey’empeke, oba okukuleetera eŋŋaano mu gguuliro lyo?" 
Job39:13 “Ebiwaawaatiro bya maaya bisanyusa nga byewujja, naye ebiwaawaatiro n’ebyoya bya kalooli tebiraga kisa." 
Job39:14 Kubanga emaaya ebiika amagi gaayo ku ttaka, n’egaleka ne gabugumira mu musenyu," 
Job39:15 ne yeerabira nti, ekigere kisobola okugaasa, era nga ensolo ey’omu nsiko eyinza okugalinnya." 
Job39:16 Obwana bwayo ebuyisa bubi ng’obutali bwayo gy’obeera nti, yazaalira bwereere." 
Job39:17 Kubanga Katonda teyagiwa magezi wadde okutegeera. 
Job39:18 Ate bw’eyanjuluza ebiwaawaatiro byayo edduke esoomooza embalaasi n’omugoba waayo. 
Job39:19 “Embalaasi ggwe ogiwa amaanyi, oba ggwe oyambaza ensingo yaayo obwoya obwewumba?" 
Job39:20 Ggwe ogisobozesa okubuuka ng’enzige n’ekanga n’okukaaba kwayo okw’entiisa? 
Job39:21 Etakula ettaka mu kiwonvu, nga yeeyagala olw’amaanyi gaayo, n’eryoka efuluma okusisinkana abalwanyi abakutte ebyokulwanyisa." 
Job39:22 Esekerera okutya, n’eteba na kigitiisa. Ekitala tekigitiisa kugizza mabega." 
Job39:23 Omufuko ogujjudde obusaale gwesuukundira ku lubuto lwayo, awamu n’effumu erimasamasa, n’akasaale." 
Job39:24 Mu busungu obungi emira ettaka, tesobola kusigala mu kifo kimu ng’ekkondeere livuze." 
Job39:25 Ekkondeere bwe livuga n’egamba nti, ‘Awo!’ N’ewunyiriza olutalo olukyali ewala, n’ewulira n’okuleekaana kwa baduumizi b’amaggye." 
Job39:26 “Amagezi go ge gabuusa kamunye, n’ayanjuluza ebiwaawaatiro bye e bukiikaddyo?" 
Job39:27 Ggwe olagira empungu okubuukira ewala mu bbanga, era n’ezimba n’ekisu kyayo waggulu ennyo?" 
Job39:28 Ku lwazi kw’ezimba amaka gaayo ekiro n’esula okwo, ku lwazi olunywevu olutabetentebwa." 
Job39:29 Eyo gy’ekettera omuyiggo gw’eneerya, eriiso lyayo ligulengerera wala." 
Job39:30 Obwana bwayo bunywa omusaayi, era awali emirambo w’ebeera.”" 
Job40:1 Awo Mukama n’agamba Yobu nti," 
Job40:2 “Oyo anoonya okuyombera ebitaliimu anaayombesa Ayinzabyonna? Oyo aleeta empaka ku Katonda, amuddemu.”" 
Job40:3 Awo Yobu n’addamu Mukama nti," 
Job40:4 “Laba, sisaanidde, kiki kye nnaakuddamu? Emimwa kangibikkeko n’engalo." 
Job40:5 Njogedde omulundi gumu, so siddemu; weewaawo emirundi ebiri sseeyongere mulundi mulala.”" 
Job40:6 Awo Mukama ng’ali mu muyaga ogw’amaanyi n’addamu Yobu nti," 
Job40:7 “Weesibe engoye zo onywere ng’omusajja. Ka nkubuuze, naawe onziremu." 
Job40:8 “Onojjulula ensala yange ey’emisango; ononsingisa omusango ggwe atuukiridde? 
Job40:9 Olina omukono ng’ogwa Katonda, eddoboozi lyo lisobola okubwatuka ng’erirye?" 
Job40:10 Kale nno yambala ekitiibwa n’obukulu weesibe ekitiibwa n’okusukkuluma osukkulume. 
Job40:11 Yolesa obusungu bw’ekiruyi kyo otunuulire buli wa malala omusse wansi. 
Job40:12 Tunuulira buli musajja ow’amalala omukkakkanye era olinnyirire abakozi b’ebibi obabetentere we bali. 
Job40:13 Bonna baziikire wamu mu nfuufu, emitwe gyabwe ogibikkire mu ntaana." 
Job40:14 Nange kennyini ndyoke nzikirize, ng’omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, gusobola okukuwa amaanyi.”" 
Job40:15 “Laba ekisolo ekyefaananyiriza ng’envubu kye natonda nga ggwe, erya omuddo ng’ente," 
Job40:16 nga kirina amaanyi mayitirivu mu kiwato kyakyo amaanyi mangi mu binywa by’olubuto lwakyo. 
Job40:17 Kiwuuba omukira gwakyo ne guba ng’omukira gw’omuvule Ebinywa by’ebisambi byakyo byakwatagana nnyo. 
Job40:18 Amagumba gaakyo gali ng’enseke ez’ebikomo; amagulu n’emikono ng’emitayimbwa. 
Job40:19 Kibalibwa mu bitonde bya Katonda ebisooka, ate nga Katonda eyakitonda asobola okukisemberera n’ekitala kye." 
Job40:20 Weewaawo ensozi zikireetera emmere, eyo ku nsozi, ensolo ez’omu nsiko zonna gye zizannyira." 
Job40:21 Wansi w’ebisiikirize by’emiti egy’amaggwa, we kyebaka, ne kyekweka mu bitoogo ne mu bitosi." 
Job40:22 Ebisiikirize by’emiti bikibikkako, emiti egiri ku mabbali g’omugga ne gikibikkako." 
Job40:23 Laba omugga ne bwe gusiikuuka tekyekanga; kiba kinywevu, Yoludaani ne bwajjula n’abooga." 
Job40:24 Eriyo omuntu yenna ayinza okukikwata, oba okuyuza ennyindo yaakyo n’akasaale?”" 
Job41:1 “Oyinza okusikayo lukwata n’eddobo, oba okusiba olulimi lwayo n’omuguwa?" 
Job41:2 Oyinza okuyingiza omuguwa mu nnyindo zaayo, oba okuwummula oluba lwayo n’eddobo?" 
Job41:3 Eneekwegayirira ng’ekusaba nti, ogikwatirwe ekisa? Eneeyogera naawe mu bigambo ebigonvu?" 
Job41:4 Eneekola naawe endagaano ogitwale ekuweereze obulamu bwayo bwonna? 
Job41:5 Onoozannya nayo nga bw’ozannya n’akanyonyi, oba okugisiba n’olukoba ng’agisibira bawala bo?" 
Job41:6 Abasuubuzi banaagiramuza, oba banaagibala ng’ekyamaguzi?" 
Job41:7 Oyinza okuvuba eddiba lyayo n’olijjuza amalobo, oba omutwe okugufumita n’amafumu agafumita ebyennyanja?" 
Job41:8 Bw’oligissaako engalo zo ekirivaamu tolikyerabira, toliddayo kukikola!" 
Job41:9 Essuubi lyonna ery’okugiwangula ffu, okugirabako obulabi kimalamu amaanyi." 
Job41:10 Teri n’omu mukambwe nnyo asobola kugyaŋŋanga. Kale, ani oyo asobola okuyimirira mu maaso gange?" 
Job41:11 Ani alina kye yali ampoze musasule? Byonna ebiri wansi w’eggulu byange. 
Job41:12 “Ku bikwata ku mikono n’ebigere byayo siisirike, amaanyi gaayo n’ekikula kyayo bya ssimbo." 
Job41:13 Ani ayinza okugiggyako eddiba lyayo ery’oku ngulu? Ani ayinza okuyuza ekizibaawo kyayo eky’amaliba abiri? 
Job41:14 Ani ayinza okuggula enzigi z’akamwa kaayo? Amannyo gaayo geetooloddwa entiisa. 
Job41:15 Omugongo gwe gujjudde enkalala z’engabo ezisibiddwa okumukumu. 
Job41:16 Zonna zisibaganye nga tewali mpewo weeyita. 
Job41:17 Zakwatagana, ziri ku zinnaazo era tezisobola kwawulibwa." 
Job41:18 Bw’eyasimula, ebimyanso bijja, n’amaaso gaayo gali nga enjuba ng’egwa." 
Job41:19 Mu kamwa kaayo muvaamu ebiriro ebyaka. Kavaamu ensasi ez’omuliro. 
Job41:20 Mu nnyindo zaayo muvaamu omukka ng’ogwentamu eyeesera eri ku muliro ogw’emmuli ezaaka. 
Job41:21 Omukka oguva mu nnyindo zaayo gukoleeza Amanda. 
Job41:22 Mu nsingo yaayo mulimu amaanyi, n’entiisa eri mu maaso gaayo." 
Job41:23 Emiwula gy’ennyama yaayo gyegasse; gikutte nnyo era tegisobola kwenyeenya. 
Job41:24 Ekifuba kyayo kigumu ng’olwazi, kigumu ng’olubengo." 
Job41:25 Bwesituka ab’amaanyi batya. Badduka olw’okubwatuka kwayo. 
Job41:26 Ekitala bwe kigituukako tekirina kye kiyinza kumukolako, oba ffumu, oba omuwunda wadde akasaale akasongovu." 
Job41:27 Emenya ebyuma gy’obeera nti ekutulakutula bisasiro, ebyo ebikomo ebimenyaamenya ng’emiti emivundu." 
Job41:28 Akasaale tekayinza kugiddusa, amayinja ag’envumuulo gaba nga biti gy’eri." 
Job41:29 Embukuuli nayo eri ng’ebisusunku gy’eri. Esekerera amafumu agakasukibwa. 
Job41:30 Amagalagamba g’oku lubuto lwayo gali ng’engyo z’ensuwa. Bwe yeekulula mu bitosi ebeera ng’ekyuma ekiwuula. 
Job41:31 Ereetera obuziba bw’ennyanja okuba ng’entamu eyeesera. Ennyanja n’eba ng’entamu y’omuzigo ogufumbibwa. 
Job41:32 Mu mazzi mw’eyise, erekamu ekkubo ery’amayengo ameeru; ne kireeta n’ekirowoozo nti obuziba bulina envi." 
Job41:33 Tewali kigyenkana ku nsi; ekitonde ekitatya. 
Job41:34 Enyooma buli kisolo. Ye kabaka w’abo bonna ab’amalala.” 
Job42:1 Awo Yobu n’addamu Mukama nti," 
Job42:2 “Mmanyi ng’oyinza okukola ebintu byonna, era tewali kyotegeka kyonna kiyinza kuziyizibwa." 
Job42:3 Wabuuza nti, ‘Ani ono aziyiza okuteesa kwange atalina magezi?’ Mazima ddala nayogera ebintu bye sitegeera, ebintu ebyassukirira okutegeera kwange." 
Job42:4 “Wulira nkwegayiridde, nange mbeeko kye nkubuuza, onziremu." 
Job42:5 Amatu gange gaali gaakuwulirako dda, naye kaakano amaaso gange gakulabye." 
Job42:6 Kyenvudde neenyooma era neenenyezza mu nfuufu ne mu vvu.” 
Job42:7 Nga Mukama amaze okwogera ebigambo bino eri Yobu, n’agamba Erifaazi Omutemani nti, “Nkunyiigidde ggwe ne mikwano gyo ababiri; kubanga temwanjogerako bituufu, ng’omuddu wange Yobu bw’akoze." 
Job42:8 Noolwekyo kaakano mutwale ente ennume musanvu, n’endiga ennume musanvu, mugende eri omuddu wange Yobu, mweweereyo eyo ekiweebwayo ekyokebwa, n’omuddu wange Yobu ajja kubasabira, kubanga nzija kukkiriza okusaba kwe nneme okubakolako ng’obusirusiru bwammwe bwe buli. Kubanga temwanjogerako bituufu ng’omuddu wange bw’akoze.”" 
Job42:9 Awo Erifaazi Omutemani, ne Birudaadi Omusuki, ne Zofali Omunaamasi ne bagenda ne bakola nga Mukama bwe yabalagira. Awo Mukama n’akkiriza okusaba kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Awo Mukama n’aggyawo ennaku ya Yobu bwe yamala okusabira mikwano gye. Mukama n’awa Yobu ebintu emirundi ebiri okusinga bye yalina okusooka. 
Job42:11 Awo baganda be bonna ne bannyina bonna ne bajja n’abo abaali bamumanyi okusooka, ne balya naye emmere mu nnyumba ye; ne bamusaasira ne bamukulisa okubonaabona kwonna Mukama kwe yakkiriza okumutuukako. Buli omu ku bo n’amuwaayo ffeeza nga bwe yasobola, n’empeta ya zaabu." 
Job42:12 Awo Mukama n’awa Yobu omukisa mu nnaku ze ezaasembayo n’okusinga entandikwa ye bwe yali: yafuna endiga omutwalo gumu mu enkumi nnya, n’eŋŋamira kakaaga, ne ziseddume z’ente lukumi, n’endogoyi enkazi lukumi." 
Job42:13 Era Mukama n’amuwa n’abaana aboobulenzi musanvu, n’aboobuwala basatu." 
Job42:14 Omuwala ow’olubereberye n’amutuuma Yemima, n’owokubiri n’amutuuma Keeziya, n’owookusatu n’amutuuma Keremukappuki, n’aboobulezi musanvu." 
Job42:15 Awo mu nsi yonna ne wataba bakazi balungi kwenkana bawala ba Yobu. Kitaabwe n’abawa omugabo ogw’ebintu ogwenkanankana ne gwe yawa bannyinaabwe abalenzi. 
Job42:16 Oluvannyuma lw’ebyo, Yobu n’awangaala emyaka kikumi mu ana; n’alaba ku baana be ne ku bazzukulu be okutuuka ku bannakasatwe." 
Job42:17 N’oluvannyuma n’afa ng’akaddiyidde ddala ng’awezezza emyaka mingi. 
Psalms1:1 Alina omukisa omuntu atatambulira mu kuteesa kw’ababi, era atayimirira mu kibiina ky’ababi, newaakubadde okutuula n’abo abanyooma ebya Katonda." 
Psalms1:2 Naye asanyukira okugondera amateeka ga Mukama, era mu mateeka ago mw’alowooleza emisana n’ekiro." 
Psalms1:3 Afaanana ng’omuti ogwasimbibwa ku mabbali g’omugga, ogubala ebibala byagwo mu ntuuko zaabyo, n’ebikoola byagwo tebiwotoka. Na buli ky’akola kivaamu birungi byereere." 
Psalms1:4 Naye abakola ebibi tebakola bwe batyo. Bali ng’ebisusunku ebifuumuuliddwa. 
Psalms1:5 Noolwekyo abakola ebibi tebaligumira lunaku lwa kusalirako musango; newaakubadde aboonoonyi okuyimirira mu kibiina ky’abatuukirivu. 
Psalms1:6 Kubanga Mukama alabirira ekkubo ly’abatuukirivu, naye ekkubo ly’abakola ebibi liribula." 
Psalms2:1 Lwaki amawanga geegugunga n’abantu ne bateganira obwereere okusala enkwe? 
Psalms2:2 Bakabaka ab’ensi bakuŋŋaanye, n’abafuzi ne bateeseza wamu ku Mukama ne ku Kristo we, nga bagamba nti," 
Psalms2:3 “Ka tukutule enjegere zaabwe, era tweyambulemu ekikoligo kyabwe.”" 
Psalms2:4 Naye Katonda oyo atuula mu ggulu, abasekerera busekerezi, n’enkwe zaabwe ezitaliimu zimusesa." 
Psalms2:5 N’alyoka abanenya ng’ajjudde obusungu, n’abatiisa nnyo ng’aswakidde." 
Psalms2:6 N’abagamba nti, “Ddala ddala nateekawo kabaka owange ku lusozi lwange Sayuuni olutukuvu.”" 
Psalms2:7 Nzija kulangirira ekiragiro kya Mukama: kubanga yaŋŋamba nti, “Ggwe oli Mwana wange, olwa leero nfuuse kitaawo." 
Psalms2:8 Nsaba, nange ndikuwa amawanga gonna okuba obusika bwo, era n’ensi yonna gy’ekoma okuba amatwale go." 
Psalms2:9 Olibafugisa omuggo ogw’ekyuma, era olibabetenta ng’entamu y’omubumbi.”" 
Psalms2:10 Kale nno mubeere n’amagezi mmwe bakabaka; muyige okulabulwa mmwe abafuzi b’ensi. 
Psalms2:11 Muweereze Mukama nga mumutya, era musanyuke n’okukankana." 
Psalms2:12 Mwanirize Omwana, mumusembeze Mukama aleme okubasunguwalira n’okubazikiriza nga muli mu kkubo lyammwe; kubanga obusungu bwe bubuubuuka mangu. Kyokka bonna abaddukira gy’ali balina omukisa." 
Psalms3:1 Ayi Mukama, abalabe bange nga beeyongedde obungi! Abanfubutukiddeko okunnumba nga bangi!" 
Psalms3:2 Bangi abanjogerako nti, “Katonda tagenda kumununula.”" 
Psalms3:3 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama, ggwe ngabo yange enkuuma; ggwe kitiibwa kyange, era gw’onzizaamu amaanyi." 
Psalms3:4 Nkoowoola Mukama n’eddoboozi ery’omwanguka, n’annyanukula ng’asinziira ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu." 
Psalms3:5 Ngalamira ne neebaka, era ne nzuukuka bulungi, kubanga Mukama ye ampanirira." 
Psalms3:6 Siityenga enkumi n’enkumi z’abalabe bange abanneetoolodde, okunnumba." 
Psalms3:7 Golokoka, Ayi Mukama, ondokole Ayi Katonda wange okube abalabe bange bonna omenye oluba lw’abakola ebibi." 
Psalms3:8 Obulokozi buva gy’oli, Ayi Mukama. Emikisa gyo gibeerenga ku bantu bo." 
Psalms4:1 Bwe nkukoowoola onnyanukule, Ayi Katonda wange omutuukirivu. Bwe mba mu nnaku, onnyambe. Onkwatirwe ekisa owulire okusaba kwange." 
Psalms4:2 Mmwe abaana b’abantu, mulituusa wa okuswazanga ekitiibwa kyange? Mulituusa ddi okugoberera okwagala ebitaliimu, n’okunoonya eby’obulimba?" 
Psalms4:3 Naye mutegeere nga Mukama yeerondeddemu abo abamugondera. Bwe nnaamukoowoolanga anampuliranga era anannyanukulanga. 
Psalms4:4 Ne bwe munyiiga ennyo, temusaana kwonoona; musiriikirire, mwekebere era mufumiitirize mu mitima gyammwe nga mugalamidde ku bitanda byammwe." 
Psalms4:5 Muweeyo ebiweebwayo ebisaanidde; era mwesigenga Mukama. 
Psalms4:6 Waliwo bangi abasaba nti, “Oyongere okutulaga ebirungi, Ayi Mukama, otumulisize omusana gw’amaaso go.”" 
Psalms4:7 Ondeetedde essanyu lingi mu mutima gwange erisinga ne lye bafuna mu makungula nga batunuulira ku bibala byabwe ebingi. 
Psalms4:8 Nnaagalamira ne nneebaka mirembe; kubanga ggwe wekka, Ayi Mukama, ggwe ondabirira akabi ne katantuukako." 
Psalms5:1 Otege okutu eri ebigambo byange, Ayi Mukama; olowooze ku kunyolwa kwange." 
Psalms5:2 Wuliriza eddoboozi ly’omulanga gwange, Ayi Kabaka wange era Katonda wange: kubanga ggwe gwe nsaba." 
Psalms5:3 Ayi Mukama, buli nkya owulira eddoboozi lyange; buli nkya ndeeta gy’oli okusaba kwange, ne nnindirira onziremu." 
Psalms5:4 Kubanga ggwe Ayi Katonda, tosanyukira bibi: n’ebitasaana tobigumiikiriza." 
Psalms5:5 Ab’amalala era abakola ebibi tobeetaaga mu maaso go: kubanga okyawa abakola ebibi bonna. 
Psalms5:6 Abalimba bonna obazikiriza; Mukama akyawa abatemu era n’abalimba. 
Psalms5:7 Naye olw’ekisa kyo ekingi, nze nnaayingiranga mu nnyumba yo: ne nkusinziza mu Yeekaalu yo Entukuvu n’okutya okungi." 
Psalms5:8 Onkulembere, Ayi Mukama, mu butuukirivu bwo, olw’abalabe bange, ondage ekkubo eggolokofu ery’okutambulirangamu." 
Psalms5:9 Abalabe bange bye boogera tebyesigibwa; emitima gyabwe gijjudde bussi bwereere. Emimiro gyabwe ntaana eyasaamiridde: akamwa kaabwe koogera bya bulimba. 
Psalms5:10 Basalire omusango gubasinge, Ayi Katonda; baleke bagwe mu mitego gyabwe. Bagobe kubanga baakujeemera." 
Psalms5:11 Naye leka abo bonna abakwesiga basanyukenga; ennaku zonna bayimbenga n’essanyu, obakuumenga, abo abaagala erinnya lyo basanyukirenga mu ggwe." 
Psalms5:12 Kubanga, Ayi Mukama, omutuukirivu omuwa omukisa; era omukuuma, n’omwetoolooza okwagala ng’engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Ayi Mukama, tonnenya ng’ojjudde obusungu; so tombonereza mu kiruyi kyo." 
Psalms6:2 Onsaasire, Ayi Mukama, kubanga ndi munafu. Omponye, Ayi Mukama, kubanga amagumba gange gali mu bulumi." 
Psalms6:3 Emmeeme yange ejjudde ennaku. Olirindirira kutuusa ddi olyoke onnyambe? 
Psalms6:4 Onkyukire, Ayi Mukama, olokole omwoyo gwange; omponye okufa olw’okwagala kwo okungi." 
Psalms6:5 Kubanga tewali ayinza kukujjukira ng’amaze okufa. Ani alikutendereza ng’asinziira emagombe? 
Psalms6:6 Mpweddemu amaanyi olw’okusinda. Buli kiro obuliri bwange bujjula amaziga gange n’omutto ne gutoba. 
Psalms6:7 Amaaso gange ganafuye olw’okunyolwa, tegakyalaba bulungi olw’abalabe bange." 
Psalms6:8 Muve we ndi mmwe mwenna abakola ebibi; kubanga Mukama awulidde okukaaba kwange. 
Psalms6:9 Mukama awulidde okwegayirira kwange, n’okusaba kwange akukkirizza." 
Psalms6:10 Abalabe bange bonna baliswazibwa era balitya nnyo; bazzibwe emabega nga bajjudde obuswavu mangu ago. 
Psalms7:1 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, neesiga ggwe: ngobaako bonna abangigganya era omponye," 
Psalms7:2 si kulwa nga bantagulataagula ng’empologoma ne bankutulakutula obufiififi ne watabaawo amponya. 
Psalms7:3 Ayi Mukama, Katonda wange, obanga nkoze kino, era ng’engalo zange ziriko omusango," 
Psalms7:4 obanga waliwo andaze ebirungi nze ne si muyisa bulungi, oba nzibye omulabe wange awatali nsonga:" 
Psalms7:5 Kale, abalabe bange baleke bangoberere bankwate, bankube wansi banninnyirire, banzitire mu nfuufu." 
Psalms7:6 Golokoka, Ayi Mukama, mu busungu bwo oziyize abalabe bange abajjudde obukambwe. Golokoka, Ayi Katonda wange, onnyambe ggwe asala omusango mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms7:7 Kuŋŋaanya bannaggwanga bonna okukwetooloola; obafuge ng’oli waggulu ennyo. 
Psalms7:8 Ggwe, Ayi Mukama, Ali Waggulu Ennyo, asalira amawanga gonna emisango, osale omusango gwange Ayi Mukama Ali Waggulu Ennyo ng’obutuukirivu bwange bwe buli, era n’amazima agali mu nze bwe gali." 
Psalms7:9 Ayi Katonda omutukuvu, akebera emitima n’emmeeme; okomye ebikolwa by’abakola ebibi: era onyweze abatuukirivu." 
Psalms7:10 Katonda Ali Waggulu Ennyo ye ngabo yange; alokola abo abalina omutima omulongoofu. 
Psalms7:11 Katonda mulamuzi wa mazima; era alaga ekiruyi kye buli lunaku. 
Psalms7:12 Mukama awagala ekitala kye n’aleega omutego gwe ogw’obusaale. 
Psalms7:13 Era ategese ebyokulwanyisa ebissi; era akozesa obusaale obw’omuliro. 
Psalms7:14 Omuntu ajjudde ebibi afuna emitawaana, n’azaala obulimba." 
Psalms7:15 Asima ekinnya, n’akiwanvuya nnyo; ate n’akigwamu ye kye yasimye." 
Psalms7:16 Emitawaana gye gimwebunguludde; n’obukambwe bwe bumuddire. 
Psalms7:17 Nneebazanga Mukama olw’obutuukirivu bwe; nnaayimbanga nga ntendereza erinnya lya Mukama Ali Waggulu Ennyo. 
Psalms8:1 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga ddungi era kkulu nnyo mu nsi yonna! Ekitiibwa kyo kitenderezebwa okutuuka waggulu mu ggulu." 
Psalms8:2 Abaana abato n’abawere wabawa amaanyi okukutendereza; ne basirisa omulabe wo n’oyo ayagala okwesasuza. 
Psalms8:3 Bwe ntunuulira eggulu lyo, omulimu gw’engalo zo, omwezi n’emmunyeenye bye watonda;" 
Psalms8:4 omuntu kye ki ggwe okumujjukira, omuntu obuntu ggwe okumussaako omwoyo?" 
Psalms8:5 Kubanga wamukola n’abulako katono okuba nga Katonda; n’omussaako engule ey’obukulu n’ekitiibwa. 
Psalms8:6 Wamukwasa okufuga ebintu byonna bye wakola n’emikono gyo: byonna wabissa wansi w’ebigere bye," 
Psalms8:7 ebisibo n’amagana ag’ebisolo byonna eby’omu nsiko," 
Psalms8:8 n’ennyonyi ez’omu bbanga, n’ebyennyanja eby’omu nnyanja; era na buli kiramu kyonna ekiyita mu nnyanja." 
Psalms8:9 Ayi Mukama, Mukama waffe, erinnya lyo nga ddungi era kkulu nnyo mu nsi yonna!" 
Psalms9:1 Nnaakutenderezanga, Ayi Mukama n’omutima gwange gwonna; nnaayolesanga ebikolwa byo eby’ekitalo byonna." 
Psalms9:2 Nnaasanyukanga era nnaajagulizanga mu ggwe. Nnaayimbanga nga ntendereza erinnya lyo, Ayi Mukama Ali Waggulu Ennyo." 
Psalms9:3 Abalabe bange bazzeeyo emabega, beesittadde ne bazikiririra mu maaso go." 
Psalms9:4 Kubanga owagidde ebiŋŋwanira, n’ensonga zange; era otudde ku ntebe yo ey’obwakabaka n’osala omusango mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms9:5 Waboggolera amawanga, n’ozikiriza ababi; erinnya lyabwe n’olisangulirawo ddala emirembe n’emirembe."
