Psalms57:4 Mbeera wakati mu mpologoma, nsula mu bisolo ebirya abaana b’abantu. Amannyo g’abalabe bange gali ng’amafumu n’obusaale. Ennimi zaabwe ziri ng’ebitala ebyogi." 
Psalms57:5 Ayi Katonda, ogulumizibwenga okusinga eggulu; n’ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi yonna." 
Psalms57:6 Baatega ekitimba mu kkubo lyange, ne ntya nnyo; ne basimamu obunnya, ate bo bennyini ne babugwamu." 
Psalms57:7 Omutima gwange munywevu, Ayi Katonda, omutima gwange munywevu. Nnaakutenderezanga n’ennyimba." 
Psalms57:8 Zuukuka, ggwe omwoyo gwange! Zuukuka ggwe ennanga ey’enkoba, naawe entongooli, ndyoke nnyimbe okukeesa obudde." 
Psalms57:9 Ayi Mukama, ndikwebaza mu mawanga; ndiyimba nga nkutendereza mu bantu." 
Psalms57:10 Kubanga okwagala kwo kungi nnyo, kutuuka ne ku ggulu; n’obwesigwa bwo butuuka ku bire." 
Psalms57:11 Ogulumizibwenga, Ayi Katonda, okusinga eggulu; n’ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi yonna." 
Psalms58:1 Ddala mwogera eby’amazima oba musirika busirisi? Abaana b’abantu mubasalira emisango mu bwenkanya? 
Psalms58:2 Nedda, mutegeka ebitali bya bwenkanya mu mitima gyammwe; era bye mukola bireeta obwegugungo mu nsi." 
Psalms58:3 Abakola ebibi bakyama nga baakazaalibwa, bava mu lubuto nga balina ekibi, era bakula boogera bya bulimba." 
Psalms58:4 Balina obusagwa ng’obw’omusota; bali ng’enswera etawulira ezibikira amatu gaayo; 
Psalms58:5 n’etawulira na luyimba lwa mukugu agisendasenda okugikwata. 
Psalms58:6 Ayi Katonda, menya amannyo gaabwe; owangulemu amannyo g’empologoma zino, Ayi Mukama." 
Psalms58:7 Leka babule ng’amazzi agakulukuta ne gagenda. Bwe banaanuula omutego, leka obusaale bwabwe bwe balasa bufufuggale." 
Psalms58:8 Babe ng’ekkovu erisaanuukira mu lugendo lwalyo. Babe ng’omwana azaaliddwa ng’afudde, ataliraba ku njuba!" 
Psalms58:9 Nga n’entamu tennabuguma, alibayerawo n’obusungu obungi nga kibuyaga ow’amaanyi ennyo." 
Psalms58:10 Omutuukirivu alisanyuka ng’alabye bamuwalanidde eggwanga, olwo n’ebigere bye ne bisaabaana omusaayi ogw’abakola ebibi." 
Psalms58:11 Awo abantu bonna balyogera nti, “Ddala, abatuukirivu balwanirirwa. Ddala waliwo Katonda alamula mu bwenkanya ku nsi.”" 
Psalms59:1 Ayi Katonda wange, mponya abalabe bange; onnwanirire, abantu bwe bangolokokerako." 
Psalms59:2 Omponye abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu, era ondokole mu batemu." 
Psalms59:3 Laba banneekwekeredde nga banteega okunzita. Abasajja ab’amaanyi abakambwe banneekobera, Ayi Mukama, so nga soonoonye wadde okubaako ne kye nsobezza." 
Psalms59:4 Sirina kye nsobezza, naye bateekateeka okunnumba. Tunuulira obuzibu bwange, osituke, onnyambe." 
Psalms59:5 Ayi Mukama Katonda ow’Eggye, Katonda wa Isirayiri, golokoka obonereze amawanga gonna; abo bonna abasala enkwe tobasaasira." 
Psalms59:6 Bakomawo buli kiro, nga babolooga ng’embwa, ne batambulatambula mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:7 Laba, bwe bavuma! Ebigambo biwamatuka mu kamwa kaabwe ng’ebitala, nga boogera nti, “Ani atuwulira?”" 
Psalms59:8 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama, obasekerera, era amawanga ago gonna oganyooma." 
Psalms59:9 Ayi Katonda, Amaanyi gange, nnaakwesiganga era nnaakutenderezanga, kubanga ggwe kigo kyange ekinywevu." 
Psalms59:10 Katonda wange anjagala anankulemberanga, ne ndyoka neeyagalira ku balabe bange." 
Psalms59:11 Tobatta, Ayi Mukama, engabo yaffe, abantu bange baleme kwerabira; mu buyinza bwo obungi, baleke batangetange; n’oluvannyuma obakkakkanyize ddala." 
Psalms59:12 Amalala gaabwe n’ebyonoono ebiva mu kamwa kaabwe, n’ebigambo by’oku mimwa gyabwe leka byonna bibatege ng’omutego. Kubanga bakolima era ne boogera eby’obulimba." 
Psalms59:13 Bamaleewo n’ekiruyi kyo, bamalirewo ddala; amawanga gonna galyoke gategeere nga Katonda wa Yakobo y’afuga ensi yonna." 
Psalms59:14 Bakomawo nga buwungedde nga babolooga ng’embwa, ne batambulatambula mu kibuga." 
Psalms59:15 Banoonya emmere buli wantu mu kibuga, ne bawowoggana bwe batakkuta." 
Psalms59:16 Naye nze nnaayimbanga nga ntendereza amaanyi go; mu makya nnaayimbanga ku kwagala kwo; kubanga ggwe kigo kyange, era ggwe kiddukiro kyange mu buzibu bwange." 
Psalms59:17 Ggwe, Ayi Katonda, Amaanyi gange, nnaakuyimbiranga nga nkutendereza; kubanga ggwe kigo kyange, era ggwe Katonda wange, anjagala." 
Psalms60:1 Otusudde, Ayi Katonda, otumazeemu amaanyi, otunyiigidde. Tukwegayiridde otuzze gy’oli." 
Psalms60:2 Ensi ogiyuuguumizza n’ogyasaayasa; tukwegayirira enjatika ozizibe, kubanga ekankana." 
Psalms60:3 Obadde mukambwe nnyo eri abantu bo; tuli nga b’owadde omwenge omungi ne gututagaza. 
Psalms60:4 Naye abo abakutya obawanikidde ebbendera okuba akabonero akabakuŋŋaanya awamu, era akatiisa abalabe baabwe." 
Psalms60:5 Otulokole era otuyambe n’omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, abakwagala baleme kutuukibwako kabi konna." 
Psalms60:6 Katonda ayogedde ng’asinziira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu, n’agamba nti, “Mu buwanguzi, ndisala mu Sekemu, era n’ekiwonvu kya Sukkosi ndikigabanyagabanyaamu." 
Psalms60:7 Ensi ya Gireyaadi yange, n’eya Manase nayo yange. Efulayimu ye nkufiira ey’oku mutwe gwange; ate Yuda gwe muggo gwange ogw’okufuga." 
Psalms60:8 Mowaabu kye kinaabirwamu kyange, ate Edomu gye nkasuka engatto yange: ne ku Bafirisuuti ndeekaana mu buwanguzi.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ani anantuusa ku kibuga ekigumu ekinywevu? Ani anankulembera okunnyingiza mu Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Si ggwe Ayi Katonda, atusudde, atakyatabaala na magye gaffe?" 
Psalms60:11 Tudduukirire, nga tulwanyisa abalabe baffe, kubanga obuyambi bw’abantu temuli nsa." 
Psalms60:12 Bwe tunaabeeranga ne Katonda, tunaabanga bawanguzi, kubanga ye y’anaalinnyiriranga abalabe baffe wansi w’ebigere bye." 
Psalms61:1 Wulira okukaaba kwange, Ayi Katonda; wulira okusaba kwange." 
Psalms61:2 Nkukoowoola okuva ku nkomerero y’ensi, omutima gwange nga gugenda gunafuwa. Onkulembere ontuuse ku lwazi olunsinga obuwanvu mwe nnyinza okwekweka." 
Psalms61:3 Kubanga gw’oli kiddukiro kyange. Oli kigo eky’amaanyi mwe neekweka omulabe. 
Psalms61:4 Nnaabeeranga mu weema yo ennaku zonna; ndyoke nkuumirwenga mu biwaawaatiro byo. 
Psalms61:5 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Katonda, owulidde obweyamo bwange: ompadde omugabo awamu n’abo abatya erinnya lyo." 
Psalms61:6 Oyongere ku nnaku z’obulamu bwa kabaka; emyaka gye gimutuuse mu mirembe mingi," 
Psalms61:7 alyoke abeerenga mu maaso ga Katonda ennaku zonna. Okwagala kwo n’obwesigwa bwo bimukuumenga. 
Psalms61:8 Ndyoke nnyimbenga nga ntendereza erinnya lyo ennaku zonna, nga ntuukiriza obweyamo bwange buli lunaku." 
Psalms62:1 Emmeeme yange ewummulira mu Katonda yekka; oyo obulokozi bwange mwe buva. 
Psalms62:2 Ye yekka, lwe lwazi lwange era bwe bulokozi bwange; ye kye kigo kyange siinyeenyezebwenga n’akatono." 
Psalms62:3 Mulituusa ddi nga mulumba omuntu, mmwe mwenna okwagala okumusuula wansi ng’ekisenge ekyewunzise era ng’olukomera oluyuuguuma?" 
Psalms62:4 Bateesa okumuggya mu kifo kye ekinywevu, basanyukira eby’obulimba. Basaba omukisa n’emimwa gyabwe so nga munda bakolima." 
Psalms62:5 Emmeeme yange ewummulire mu Katonda yekka; kubanga mu ye mwe muli essuubi lyange. 
Psalms62:6 Ye yekka lwe lwazi lwange era bwe bulokozi bwange, ye kye kigo kyange, siinyeenyezebwenga." 
Psalms62:7 Okulokolebwa kwange n’ekitiibwa kyange biri mu Katonda yekka; ye lwe lwazi lwange olw’amaanyi era kye kiddukiro kyange. 
Psalms62:8 Mumwesigenga bulijjo mmwe abantu, mumutegeezenga byonna ebiri mu mitima gyammwe, kubanga Katonda kye kiddukiro kyaffe." 
Psalms62:9 Abaana b’abantu mukka bukka, abazaalibwa mu bugagga bulimba bwereere; ne bwe bageraageranyizibwa ku minzaani, n’omukka gubasinga okuzitowa." 
Psalms62:10 Temwesigamanga ku bujoozi wadde ku bintu ebibbe. Temuyitirira okwewaanirawaanira mu bugagga bwammwe ne bwe bweyongeranga, era temubumalirangako mwoyo gwammwe." 
Psalms62:11 Katonda ayogedde ekintu kimu, kyokka nze nziggyemu ebintu bibiri nti: Katonda, oli w’amaanyi," 
Psalms62:12 era ggwe, Ayi Mukama, ojjudde okwagala. Ddala olisasula buli muntu ng’ebikolwa bye bwe biri." 
Psalms63:1 Ayi Katonda, oli Katonda wange, nkunoonya n’omutima gwange gwonna; emmeeme yange ekwetaaga, omubiri gwange gwonna gukuyaayaanira, nga nnina ennyonta ng’ali mu nsi enkalu omutali mazzi." 
Psalms63:2 Nkulabye ng’oli mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu, ne ndaba amaanyi go n’ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms63:3 Kubanga okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo kusinga obulamu; akamwa kange kanaakutenderezanga. 
Psalms63:4 Bwe ntyo nnaakutenderezanga obulamu bwange bwonna; nnaayimusanga emikono gyange mu linnya lyo. 
Psalms63:5 Emmeeme yange enekkutanga ebyassava n’obugagga; nnaayimbanga nga nkutendereza n’emimwa egy’essanyu. 
Psalms63:6 Nkujjukira nga ndi ku kitanda kyange, era nkufumiitirizaako mu ssaawa ez’ekiro." 
Psalms63:7 Olw’okuba ng’oli mubeezi wange, nnyimba nga ndi mu kisiikirize ky’ebiwaawaatiro byo." 
Psalms63:8 Emmeeme yange yeekwata ku ggwe; omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gumpanirira. 
Psalms63:9 Naye abo abannoonya okunzita balizikirizibwa, baliserengeta emagombe." 
Psalms63:10 Balisaanawo n’ekitala; ne bafuuka emmere y’ebibe. 
Psalms63:11 Naye ye kabaka anaajagulizanga mu Katonda; bonna abalayira mu linnya lya Katonda banaatenderezanga Katonda, naye akamwa k’abalimba kalisirisibwa." 
Psalms64:1 Ayi Katonda, owulire eddoboozi lyange, ery’okwemulugunya kwange; okuume obulamu bwange eri okutiisibwatiisibwa omulabe." 
Psalms64:2 Onkweke mpone enkwe z’abakola ebibi, onzigye mu kibinja ky’aboonoonyi, abaleekaana" 
Psalms64:3 abawagala ennimi zaabwe ng’ebitala, ne balasa ebigambo byabwe ng’obusaale obutta." 
Psalms64:4 Beekweka ne bateega oyo atalina musango bamulase; amangwago ne bamulasa nga tebatya. 
Psalms64:5 Bawagiragana mu kigendererwa kyabwe ekibi ne bateesa okutega emitego mu kyama; ne boogera nti, “Ani asobola okutulaba?”" 
Psalms64:6 Beekobaana okukola ebitali bya bwenkanya, ne boogera nti, “Tukoze enteekateeka empitirivu.” Ddala ddala ebirowoozo by’omuntu n’omutima gwe byekusifu." 
Psalms64:7 Naye Katonda alibalasa n’obusaale bwe; alibafumita, mangwago ne bagwa ku ttaka." 
Psalms64:8 Ebyo bye boogera biribaddira, ne bibazikiriza, ababalaba ne babanyeenyeza emitwe." 
Psalms64:9 Olwo abantu bonna ne batya, ne bategeeza abalala omulimu gwa Katonda, ne bafumiitiriza ku ebyo by’akoze." 
Psalms64:10 Omutuukirivu ajagulizenga mu Mukama, era yeekwekenga mu ye. Abo bonna abalina omutima omulongoofu bamutenderezenga!" 
Psalms65:1 Osaanira okutenderezebwanga, Ayi Katonda, ali mu Sayuuni; tunaatuukiririzanga obweyamo bwaffe gy’oli." 
Psalms65:2 Ayi ggwe awulira okusaba kw’abantu bo, abantu bonna banajjanga gy’oli olw’ebibi byabwe." 
Psalms65:3 Ebibi byaffe bwe byatusukkirira, n’otutangiririra." 
Psalms65:4 Alina omukisa oyo gw’olonda n’omusembeza okumpi naawe, abeerenga mu mpya zo. Tunaamalibwanga ebirungi eby’omu nnyumba yo; eby’omu Yeekaalu yo entukuvu." 
Psalms65:5 Otwanukula n’ebikolwa byo eby’obutuukirivu eby’entiisa n’otulokola, Ayi Katonda ow’obulokozi bwaffe; ggwe ssuubi ly’abo abali mu nsi yonna n’abo bonna abali ewala mu nnyanja zonna," 
Psalms65:6 ggwe, eyakola ensozi n’obuyinza bwo, n’ozinyweza n’amaanyi go," 
Psalms65:7 ggwe, asirisa okusiikuuka kw’ennyanja, n’okkakkanya okwetabula kw’amayengo gaayo, era ggw’okkakkanya okwegugunga kw’amawanga." 
Psalms65:8 Abo bonna ababeera ewala balaba ne batya ebyewuunyo byo; ne bakuyimbira ennyimba ez’essanyu okuva ku makya okutuusa akawungeezi. 
Psalms65:9 Ensi ogirabirira n’ogifukirira n’egimuka nnyo. Emigga gya Katonda gijjudde amazzi, okuwa abantu emmere ey’empeke, kubanga bw’otyo bwe wakiteekateeka." 
Psalms65:10 Otonnyesa enkuba mu nnimiro, n’ojjuza ebitaba byamu; n’ogonza ettaka, ebibala by’omu nsi n’obiwa omukisa." 
Psalms65:11 Ofundikira omwaka n’amakungula amangi, ebigaali ne bigenda nga byetisse ebibala nga bikubyeko." 
Psalms65:12 Ebifo awali omuddo mu ddungu bijjula amazzi, n’obusozi ne bulabika bulungi nga bweyagala." 
Psalms65:13 Amalundiro gajjula ebisibo, n’ebiwonvu ne bijjula emmere ey’empeke. Ensi yonna eyimba mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka ng’ejjudde essanyu." 
Psalms66:1 Yimbira Mukama n’eddoboozi ery’omwanguka, ggwe ensi yonna." 
Psalms66:2 Muyimbe ekitiibwa ky’erinnya lye. Mumuyimbire ennyimba ezimusuuta. 
Psalms66:3 Gamba Katonda nti, “Ebikolwa byo nga bya ntiisa! Olw’amaanyi go amangi abalabe bo bakujeemulukukira." 
Psalms66:4 Ab’omu nsi yonna bakuvuunamira, bakutendereza, bayimba nga bagulumiza erinnya lyo.”" 
Psalms66:5 Mujje mulabe Katonda ky’akoze; mulabe eby’entiisa by’akoledde abaana b’abantu! 
Psalms66:6 Ennyanja yagifuula olukalu. Abantu baasomoka omugga n’ebigere nga temuli mazzi, kyetuva tujaguza." 
Psalms66:7 Afuga n’amaanyi ge emirembe gyonna; amaaso ge agasimba ku mawanga, ab’omutima omujeemu baleme okumujeemera." 
Psalms66:8 Mutendereze Katonda waffe, mmwe amawanga; eddoboozi ery’okumutendereza liwulirwe wonna." 
Psalms66:9 Oyo y’atukuumye ne tuba balamu, n’ataganya bigere byaffe kuseerera." 
Psalms66:10 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Katonda, otugezesezza, n’otulongoosa nga bwe bakola ffeeza mu muliro." 
Psalms66:11 Watuteeka mu kkomera, n’otutikka emigugu." 
Psalms66:12 Waleka abantu ne batulinnyirira; ne tuyita mu muliro ne mu mazzi, n’otutuusa mu kifo eky’okwesiima." 
Psalms66:13 Nnaayambukanga mu yeekaalu yo n’ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa, ntuukirize obweyamo bwange gy’oli," 
Psalms66:14 nga ndeeta ekyo emimwa gyange kye gyasuubiza; akamwa kange kye kaayogera bwe nnali mu kabi. 
Psalms66:15 Nnaawaayo gy’oli ssaddaaka ez’ensolo ensava, mpeeyo ne ssaddaaka ey’endiga ennume; mpeeyo ente ennume n’embuzi." 
Psalms66:16 Mujje muwulire, mmwe mwenna abatya Katonda, mbategeeze ebyo by’ankoledde." 
Psalms66:17 Namukaabirira n’akamwa kange, ne mutendereza n’olulimi lwange." 
Psalms66:18 Singa nnali nsirikidde ekibi mu mutima gwange, Mukama teyandimpulirizza;" 
Psalms66:19 ddala ddala Katonda yampuliriza era n’awulira eddoboozi lyange nga nsaba. 
Psalms66:20 Katonda atenderezebwenga, atagobye kusaba kwange, wadde okunziggyako okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo!" 
Psalms67:1 Ayi Katonda tukwatirwe ekisa, otuwe omukisa, era otwakize amaaso go." 
Psalms67:2 Ekkubo lyo limanyibwe mu nsi, n’obulokozi bwo mu mawanga gonna." 
Psalms67:3 Abantu bakutenderezenga, Ayi Katonda, abantu bonna bakutenderezenga." 
Psalms67:4 Amawanga gonna gasanyuke, gayimbe nga gajjudde essanyu. Kubanga ofuga abantu bonna mu bwenkanya, n’oluŋŋamya amawanga ag’ensi." 
Psalms67:5 Abantu bakutenderezenga, Ayi Katonda, abantu bonna bakutenderezenga." 
Psalms67:6 Ensi erireeta amakungula gaayo; era Katonda, Katonda waffe, anaatuwanga omukisa." 
Psalms67:7 Katonda anaatuwanga omukisa; n’enkomerero z’ensi zinaamutyanga. 
Psalms68:1 Katonda agolokoke, abalabe be basaasaane, n’abo abamukyawa bamudduke." 
Psalms68:2 Ng’empewo bw’efuumuula omukka, naawe bafuumuule bw’otyo; envumbo nga bw’esaanuuka mu muliro, n’abakola ebibi bazikirire bwe batyo mu maaso ga Katonda!" 
Psalms68:3 Naye abatuukirivu basanyuke bajagulize mu maaso ga Katonda, nga bajjudde essanyu." 
Psalms68:4 Muyimbire Katonda, muyimbe nga mutendereza erinnya lye; mumuyimusize amaloboozi gammwe oyo atambulira mu bire. Erinnya lye ye Mukama, mujagulize mu maaso ge." 
Psalms68:5 Ye Kitaawe w’abataliiko bakitaabwe, ye mukuumi wa bannamwandu; ye Katonda abeera mu kifo kye ekitukuvu." 
Psalms68:6 Katonda afunira abatalina we babeera ekifo eky’okubeeramu, aggya abasibe mu kkomera n’abagaggawaza; naye abajeemu babeera mu bifo bikalu ddala." 
Psalms68:7 Ayi Katonda, bwe wakulembera abantu bo, n’obayisa mu ddungu," 
Psalms68:8 ensi yakankana, eggulu ne lifukumula enkuba mu maaso ga Katonda; n’olusozi Sinaayi ne lukankana awali Katonda, Katonda wa Isirayiri!" 
Psalms68:9 Watonnyesa enkuba nnyingi ku nsi, Ayi Katonda; ensi y’obusika bwo n’ogizzaamu obugimu bwe bwali nga buggweerera;" 
Psalms68:10 abantu bo ne babeera omwo; era olw’ekisa kyo ekingi, Ayi Katonda, abaavu ne bafuna bye beetaaga okuva ku bugagga bwo." 
Psalms68:11 Mukama yalangirira; ne babunyisa ekigambo kye; baali bangi ne boogera nti: 
Psalms68:12 “Bakabaka badduse n’amaggye gaabwe; abantu ne bagabana omunyago. 
Psalms68:13 Balabe bwe banyirira n’obugagga bwa ffeeza ne zaabu! Babikkiddwa ng’ejjuba bwe libikkibwa ebiwaawaatiro byalyo.” 
Psalms68:14 Ayinzabyonna yasaasaanya bakabaka, ne baba ng’omuzira bwe gugwa ku Zalumoni." 
Psalms68:15 Ggwe olusozi olw’ekitiibwa, olusozi lwa Basani; ggwe olusozi olw’emitwe emingi, olusozi lwa Basani!" 
Psalms68:16 Lwaki otunuza obuggya ggwe olusozi olw’emitwe emingi? Lwaki okwatirwa obuggya olusozi Katonda lwe yalonda okufugirako? Ddala okwo Mukama kw’anaabeeranga ennaku zonna. 
Psalms68:17 Mukama ava ku lusozi Sinaayi nga yeetooloddwa amagaali enkumi n’enkumi n’ajja mu kifo kye ekitukuvu. 
Psalms68:18 Bwe walinnyalinnya olusozi, ng’abanyage bakugoberera; abantu ne bakuwa ebirabo nga ne bakyewaggula mwebali; bw’atyo Mukama Katonda n’abeeranga wamu nabo." 
Psalms68:19 Atenderezebwe Mukama, Katonda omulokozi waffe, eyeetikka emigugu gyaffe egya buli lunaku." 
Psalms68:20 Katonda waffe ye Katonda alokola; era tuddukira eri Mukama Katonda okuwona okufa. 
Psalms68:21 Ddala, Katonda alibetenta emitwe gy’abalabe be, kubanga ne mu bukadde bwabwe balemera mu bibi byabwe." 
Psalms68:22 Mukama agamba nti, “Ndibakomyawo nga mbaggya mu Basani, ndibazza nga mbaggya mu buziba bw’ennyanja," 
Psalms68:23 mulyoke munaabe ebigere byammwe mu musaayi gw’abalabe bammwe, n’embwa zammwe zeefunire ebyokulya.”" 
Psalms68:24 Ekibiina kyo ky’okulembedde bakirabye, Ayi Katonda, balabye abali ne Katonda wange, era Kabaka wange, ng’otambula okugenda mu watukuvu;" 
Psalms68:25 abayimbi nga bakulembedde, ab’ebivuga nga bavaako emabega ne wakati waabwe nga waliwo abawala abakuba ebitaasa." 
Psalms68:26 Mutendereze Katonda mu kibiina ekinene; mumutendereze Mukama, mmwe abakuŋŋaanye abangi Abayisirayiri." 
Psalms68:27 Waliwo ekika kya Benyamini asinga obuto kye kikulembedde, ne kuddako ekibinja ekinene eky’abalangira ba Yuda, n’abalangira ba Zebbulooni n’abalangira ba Nafutaali." 
Psalms68:28 Laga obuyinza bwo, Ayi Katonda, otulage amaanyi go, Ayi Katonda onyweze ebyo by’otukoledde." 
Psalms68:29 Bakabaka balikuleetera ebirabo olwa Yeekaalu yo eri mu Yerusaalemi. 
Psalms68:30 Nenya ensolo enkambwe ey’omu bisaalu, eggana lya ziseddume eriri mu nnyana z’amawanga. Gikkakkanye ereete omusolo ogwa ffeeza. Osaasaanye amawanga agasanyukira entalo." 
Psalms68:31 Ababaka baliva e Misiri, ne Kuusi aligondera Katonda." 
Psalms68:32 Muyimbire Katonda mmwe obwakabaka obw’ensi zonna. Mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms68:33 Oyo eyeebagala eggulu erya waggulu ery’edda, eddoboozi lye ery’amaanyi liwuluguma okuva mu ggulu." 
Psalms68:34 Mulangirire obuyinza bwa Katonda, ekitiibwa kye kibuutikidde Isirayiri; obuyinza bwe buli mu bire." 
Psalms68:35 Oli wa ntiisa, Ayi Katonda, mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu. Katonda wa Isirayiri, yawa abantu obuyinza n’amaanyi. Katonda atenderezebwe." 
Psalms69:1 Ondokole, Ayi Katonda, kubanga amazzi gandi mu bulago." 
Psalms69:2 Ntubira mu bitosi nga sirina we nnywereza kigere. Ntuuse ebuziba n’amataba gansaanikira. 
Psalms69:3 Ndajanye ne nkoowa, n’emimiro ginkaze. Amaaso ganzizeeko ekifu gakooye olw’okutunula enkaliriza nga nnindirira Katonda wange." 
Psalms69:4 Abo abankyayira obwereere bangi okusinga enviiri ez’oku mutwe gwange; abalabe bange bangi abannoonya okunzita awatali nsonga; ne mpalirizibwa mbaddizeewo ekyo kye sibbanga. 
Psalms69:5 Ayi Katonda, omanyi obusirusiru bwange, n’okusobya kwange tekukukwekeddwa." 
Psalms69:6 Sisaana kuswaza abo abakwesiga, Ayi Mukama, Mukama ow’Eggye. Abo abakunoonya baleme kuswazibwa ku lwange, Ayi Katonda wa Isirayiri." 
Psalms69:7 Ngumiikirizza okuvumwa ku lulwo, n’amaaso gange ne gajjula ensonyi." 
Psalms69:8 Nfuuse nga omugwira eri baganda bange, munnaggwanga eri abaana ba mmange." 
Psalms69:9 Nzijudde obuggya olw’ennyumba yo, n’abo abakuvuma bavuma nze." 
Psalms69:10 Bwe nkaaba ne nsiiba, ekyo nakyo ne kinvumisa." 
Psalms69:11 Bwe nnyambala ebibukutu ne nfuuka eky’okuzanyisa kyabwe. 
Psalms69:12 Abo abatuula ku mulyango gw’ekibuga banduulira, era nfuuse luyimba lw’abatamiivu." 
Psalms69:13 Naye nze, Ayi Mukama, nsaba ggwe, mu kiseera eky’ekisa kyo. Olw’okwagala kwo okungi, onnyanukule, Ayi Katonda, ondokole nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms69:14 Onnyinyulule mu ttosi nneme okutubira; omponye abankyawa, onzigye mu mazzi amangi;" 
Psalms69:15 amataba galeme okumbuutikira n’obuziba okunsanyaawo, n’ennyanja ereme okummira." 
Psalms69:16 Onnyanukule, Ayi Mukama olw’obulungi bw’okwagala kwo; onkyukire olw’okusaasira kwo okungi." 
Psalms69:17 Tokisa muddu wo maaso go; yanguwa okunziramu, kubanga ndi mu kabi." 
Psalms69:18 Onsemberere onziruukirire, onnunule mu balabe bange." 
Psalms69:19 Omanyi bwe nsekererwa, ne bwe nswazibwa ne bwe siteekebwamu kitiibwa, era n’abalabe bange bonna obamanyi." 
Psalms69:20 Okusekererwa kunkutudde omutima era kummazeemu amaanyi. Nanoonya okusaasirwa ne kumbula, n’ow’okumpooyawooya naye nga simulaba." 
Psalms69:21 Mu kifo ky’emmere bampa mususa, era bwe nalumwa ennyonta bampa nkaatu." 
Psalms69:22 Emmere yaabwe gye bategese okulya ebafuukire ekyambika, n’embaga zaabwe ez’ebiweebwayo zibafuukire omutego." 
Psalms69:23 Amaaso gaabwe gazibe baleme okulaba, n’emigongo gyabwe gyewetenga ennaku zonna." 
Psalms69:24 Bayiweeko ekiruyi kyo, obamalewo n’obusungu obw’amaanyi go obungi." 
Psalms69:25 Ebifo byabwe bifuuke bifulukwa, waleme kubaawo n’omu abeera mu weema zaabwe." 
Psalms69:26 Kubanga bayigganya oyo gw’ofumise, ne boogera ku bulumi bw’oyo gw’olumizza." 
Psalms69:27 Bavunaane omusango kina gumu, era tobaganya kugabana ku bulokozi bwo." 
Psalms69:28 Bawanduukululwe mu kitabo ky’obulamu; baleme kulabika ku lukalala lw’abatuukirivu. 
Psalms69:29 Ndi mu bulumi era mu nnaku; obulokozi bwo, Ayi Katonda, bunkuume." 
Psalms69:30 Nnaatenderezanga erinnya lya Katonda nga nnyimba; nnaamugulumizanga n’okwebaza. 
Psalms69:31 Kino kinaasanyusanga Mukama okusinga okumuwa ente ennume, oba okumuwa seddume n’amayembe gaayo, n’ebigere byayo." 
Psalms69:32 Abaavu banaakirabanga ne basanyuka; mmwe abanoonya Katonda omutima gwammwe ne gubeera omulamu. 
Psalms69:33 Kubanga Mukama awulira abo abali mu kwetaaga, era ababe ne bwe baba mu busibe, tabanyooma." 
Psalms69:34 Kale eggulu n’ensi bimutenderezenga awamu n’ennyanja zonna n’ebyo ebizirimu. 
Psalms69:35 Kubanga Katonda alirokola Sayuuni, n’ebibuga bya Yuda n’abizimba buggya, abantu ne babibeerangamu nga byabwe." 
Psalms69:36 Abaana b’abaweereza be balikisikira; n’abo abaagala erinnya lya Mukama omwo mmwe banaabeeranga. 
Psalms70:1 Ayi Katonda oyanguwa okundokole. Ayi Mukama oyanguwe okumbeera. 
Psalms70:2 Abo abannoonya okunzita batabulwetabulwe; abo abannoonya okunzikiriza, bagobebwe nga baswadde." 
Psalms70:3 Abagamba nti, “Kasonso,” badduke nga bajjudde ensonyi." 
Psalms70:4 Naye bonna abakunoonya basanyukenga bajagulizenga mu ggwe. Abo abaagala obulokozi bwo boogerenga bulijjo nti, “Katonda agulumizibwenga!”" 
Psalms70:5 Naye nze ndi mwavu era ndi mu kwetaaga; oyanguwe okujja gye ndi, Ayi Katonda. Ggwe onnyamba era ggwe ondokola, Ayi Mukama, tolwa!" 
Psalms71:1 Mu ggwe, Ayi Mukama, mwe neekweka, tondeka kuswazibwa." 
Psalms71:2 Mu butuukirivu bwo ondokole, omponye; ontegere okutu ondokole." 
Psalms71:3 Onfuukire olwazi obuddukiro bwange, ekifo eky’amaanyi; ondokole kubanga oli lwazi lwange era ekiddukiro kyange." 
Psalms71:4 Ayi Katonda wange omponye mu mukono gw’ababi, omponye abantu abatali batuukirivu era abakambwe." 
Psalms71:5 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, ggwe ssuubi lyange; ggwe, ggwe neesiga, okuviira ddala mu buvubuka bwange." 
Psalms71:6 Neesiga ggwe kasookedde nzalibwa; ggwe wanziggya mu lubuto lwa mmange. Nnaakutenderezanga ennaku zonna. 
Psalms71:7 Eri abangi nafuuka; naye ggwe kiddukiro kyange eky’amaanyi. 
Psalms71:8 Akamwa kange kajjudde ettendo lyo, nga ntenda ekitiibwa kyo obudde okuziba." 
Psalms71:9 Tonsuula mu kiseera kyange eky’obukadde. Tondekerera ng’amaanyi gampweddemu. 
Psalms71:10 Kubanga abalabe bange banjogerako; abo abaagala okunzita bansalira olukwe. 
Psalms71:11 Bagamba nti, “Katonda amulese, ka tumugobe tumukwate, kubanga taliiko anaamuwonya.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ayi Katonda, tombera wala, Ayi Katonda wange, yanguwa ojje ombeere." 
Psalms71:13 Abo abampawaabira bazikirizibwe nga bajjudde ensonyi, abanoonya okunnumya baswale era banyoomebwe." 
Psalms71:14 Naye nze nnaabanga n’essuubi ennaku zonna. Era nneeyongeranga okukutenderezanga. 
Psalms71:15 Akamwa kange kanaayogeranga ku bikolwa byo eby’obutuukirivu obudde okuziba; nnaayogeranga ku bulokozi bwo, wadde siyinza kubupima." 
Psalms71:16 Nnaatambuliranga mu maanyi go, Ayi Mukama Katonda, era ne ntegeezanga nti ggwe wekka ggwe mutuukirivu." 
Psalms71:17 Ayi Katonda, ggwe wanjigiriza okuva mu buvubuka bwange; n’okutuusa leero nkyatenda ebikolwa byo eby’ekitalo." 
Psalms71:18 Ne bwe ndiba nga nkaddiye nga mmeze n’envi, tonjabuliranga, Ayi Katonda, okutuusiza ddala nga mmaze okutendera abo abaliddawo amaanyi go amangi, n’okumanyisa emirembe egigenda okujja obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms71:19 N’obutuukirivu bwo, Ayi Katonda, butuuka mu ggulu. Ggw’okoze ebikulu, Ayi Katonda, ani akwenkana?" 
Psalms71:20 Newaakubadde wandeka ne mbonaabona nnyo bwe ntyo, ggw’olinzizaamu obulamu, n’ompa amaanyi amaggya, n’onnyimusa okuva mu kinnya ekiwanvu ennyo wansi w’ensi." 
Psalms71:21 Olinnyongerako ekitiibwa n’oddamu okunsanyusa. 
Psalms71:22 Nnaakutenderezanga ne nnanga ey’enkoba olw’obwesigwa bwo, Ayi Katonda wange; nnaakutenderezanga n’entongooli, Ayi ggwe Omutukuvu wa Isirayiri." 
Psalms71:23 Nnaayimusanga eddoboozi lyange olw’essanyu nga nkutendereza, nze gw’onunudde!" 
Psalms71:24 Olulimi lwange nalwo lunaayogeranga ku bikolwa byo eby’obutuukirivu obudde okuziba, kubanga abo ababadde baagala okunkola akabi otabuddetabudde enkwe zaabwe ne baswazibwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ayi Katonda, kabaka omuwe okuba omwenkanya, ne mutabani we omuwe obutuukirivu," 
Psalms72:2 alyoke alamulenga abantu bo mu butuukirivu, n’abaavu abalamulenga mu mazima." 
Psalms72:3 Ensozi zireeterenga abantu bo okukulaakulana n’obusozi bubaleetere obutuukirivu. 
Psalms72:4 Anaalwaniriranga abaavu, n’atereeza abaana b’abo abeetaaga, n’omujoozi n’amusaanyaawo." 
Psalms72:5 Abantu bakutyenga ng’enjuba n’omwezi gye bikoma okwaka mu mirembe gyonna. 
Psalms72:6 Abeere ng’enkuba bw’etonnya ku muddo ogusaliddwa, afaanane ng’oluwandaggirize olufukirira ensi." 
Psalms72:7 Obutuukirivu bweyongere nnyo mu mulembe gwe, n’okufuga kwe kujjule emirembe okutuusa omwezi lwe gulikoma okwaka!" 
Psalms72:8 Afugenga okuva ku nnyanja okutuuka ku nnyanja, n’okuva ku mugga Fulaati okutuuka ku nkomerero z’ensi!" 
Psalms72:9 Ebika eby’omu malungu bimugonderenga, n’abalabe be bamujeemulukukire beekulukuunye ne mu nfuufu." 
Psalms72:10 Bakabaka b’e Talusiisi n’ab’oku bizinga eby’ewala bamuwenga omusolo; bakabaka b’e Syeba n’ab’e Seeba bamutonerenga ebirabo. 
Psalms72:11 Bakabaka bonna banaavuunamanga mu maaso ge; amawanga gonna ganaamuweerezanga. 
Psalms72:12 Kubanga anaawonyanga eyeetaaga bw’anaamukoowoolanga, n’omwavu ne kateeyamba ataliiko mwasirizi." 
Psalms72:13 Anaasaasiranga omunafu n’omwavu; n’awonya obulamu bwa kateeyamba. 
Psalms72:14 Anaabanunulanga mu mikono gy’omujoozi n’abawonya obukambwe bwe; kubanga obulamu bwabwe bwa muwendo mungi gy’ali. 
Psalms72:15 Awangaale! Aleeterwe zaabu okuva e Syeba. Abantu bamwegayiririrenga era bamusabirenga emikisa buli lunaku. 
Psalms72:16 Eŋŋaano ebale nnyingi nnyo mu nsi, ebikke n’entikko z’ensozi. Ebibala byayo byale ng’eby’e Lebanooni; n’abantu baale mu bibuga ng’omuddo ogw’oku ttale." 
Psalms72:17 Erinnya lye libeerengawo ennaku zonna, n’okwatiikirira kwe kube kwa nkalakkalira ng’enjuba. Amawanga gonna ganaaweebwanga omukisa ku lu lw’erinnya lye, era abantu bonna bamuyitenga aweereddwa omukisa." 
Psalms72:18 Mukama Katonda agulumizibwe, Katonda wa Isirayiri, oyo yekka akola ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms72:19 Erinnya lye ekkulu ligulumizibwenga emirembe n’emirembe! Ensi yonna ejjule ekitiibwa kye. Amiina era Amiina! 
Psalms72:20 Okusaba kwa Dawudi mutabani wa Yese kukomye awo. 
Psalms73:1 Ddala Katonda mulungi eri Isirayiri n’eri abo abalina omutima omulongoofu. 
Psalms73:2 Naye nze amagulu gange gaali kumpi okutagala era n’ebigere byange okuseerera. 
Psalms73:3 Kubanga nakwatirwa ab’amalala obuggya; bwe nalaba ababi nga bagaggawala nnyo. 
Psalms73:4 Kubanga tebalina kibaluma; emibiri gyabwe miramu era minyirivu. 
Psalms73:5 Tebeeraliikirira kabi konna ng’abalala. So tebalina kibabonyaabonya. 
Psalms73:6 Amalala kyegavudde gabafuukira ng’omukuufu ogw’omu bulago, n’obukambwe ne bubafuukira ekyambalo." 
Psalms73:7 Bagezze n’amaaso gaabwe ne gazimbagatana; balina bingi okusinga bye beetaaga. 
Psalms73:8 Baduula era emboozi zaabwe zijjudde eby’okujooga. Batiisatiisa abalala n’okubeeragirako. 
Psalms73:9 Emimwa gyabwe gyolekedde eggulu; n’ennimi zaabwe zoogera eby’okwewaanawaana buli wantu. 
Psalms73:10 Abantu ba Katonda kyebava babakyukira ne banywa amazzi mangi. 
Psalms73:11 Era ne beebuuza nti, “Katonda bino abimanyi atya? Ali Waggulu Ennyo abitegeera?”" 
Psalms73:12 Aboonoonyi bwe bafaanana bwe batyo; bulijjo babeera mu ddembe, nga beeyongera kugaggawala." 
Psalms73:13 Ddala omutima gwange ngukuumidde bwereere obutayonoona, n’engalo zange ne nzinaaba obutaba na musango." 
Psalms73:14 Naye mbonaabona obudde okuziba, era buli nkya mbonerezebwa." 
Psalms73:15 Singa ŋŋamba nti njogere bwe nti, nandibadde mukuusa eri omulembe guno ogw’abaana bo." 
Psalms73:16 Bwe nafumiitiriza ntegeere ensonga eyo; nakisanga nga kizibu nnyo," 
Psalms73:17 okutuusa lwe nalaga mu watukuvu wa Katonda, ne ntegeera enkomerero y’ababi." 
Psalms73:18 Ddala obatadde mu bifo ebiseerera; obasudde n’obafaafaaganya. 
Psalms73:19 Nga bazikirizibwa mangu nga kutemya kikowe! Entiisa n’ebamalirawo ddala! 
Psalms73:20 Bali ng’omuntu azuukuse n’ategeera nti yaloose buloosi; era naawe bw’otyo, Ayi Mukama, bw’oligolokoka olinyooma embeera yaabwe omutali nsa." 
Psalms73:21 Omutima gwange bwe gwanyiikaala, n’omwoyo gwange ne gujjula obubalagaze," 
Psalms73:22 n’aggwaamu okutegeera ne nfuuka ataliiko kye mmanyi, ne mba ng’ensolo obusolo mu maaso go." 
Psalms73:23 Newaakubadde ebyo biri bwe bityo naye ndi naawe bulijjo; gw’onkwata ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo. 
Psalms73:24 Mu kuteesa kwo onkulembera, era olintuusa mu kitiibwa." 
Psalms73:25 Ani gwe nnina mu ggulu, wabula ggwe? Era tewali na kimu ku nsi kye neetaaga bwe mba naawe." 
Psalms73:26 Omubiri gwange n’omutima gwange biyinza okulemwa; naye Katonda ge maanyi g’omutima gwange, era ye wange ennaku zonna." 
Psalms73:27 Kale laba, abo bonna abatakussaako mwoyo balizikirira; kubanga bonna abatakwesiga obamalirawo ddala." 
Psalms73:28 Naye nze kye nsinga okwetaaga kwe kubeera okumpi ne Katonda wange. Ayi Mukama Katonda, nkufudde ekiddukiro kyange; ndyoke ntegeezenga abantu bonna ebikolwa byo eby’ekyewuunyo." 
Psalms74:1 Ayi Katonda, lwaki otusuulidde ddala ennaku zonna? Obusungu bwo lwaki bunyookera ku ndiga z’omu ddundiro lyo?" 
Psalms74:2 Ojjukire abantu bo be wagula edda; ekika kye wanunula okuba ababo. Ojjukire olusozi Sayuuni gye wabeeranga. 
Psalms74:3 Tambulatambulako mu bifo by’ekibuga olabe bwe byonooneddwa! Olabe omulabe nga bw’azikirizza ennyumba yo. 
Psalms74:4 Abalabe bo baleekaanira mu kifo kyo gye twakuŋŋaaniranga; ne bagenda nga bakiramba n’ebendera zaabwe. 
Psalms74:5 Beeyisa ng’abantu ababagalidde embazzi abatema emiti mu kibira. 
Psalms74:6 Batemyetemye n’embazzi ebintu ebyole, era ne babissessebbula n’obubazzi." 
Psalms74:7 Bookezza awatukuvu wo; ne bafaafaaganya ekifo kyo eky’Erinnya lyo. 
Psalms74:8 Baateesa nga bagamba nti, “Tujja kubazikiririza ddala!” Baayokya dda amasinzizo ga Katonda gonna agali mu nsi eno." 
Psalms74:9 Tetukyalaba ku bubonero bwo; ne bannabbi tewakyali n’omu. So tewali n’omu mu ffe ategeera ebyo lwe birikoma. 
Psalms74:10 Ayi Katonda, omulabe alituusa ddi ng’akuduulira? Omulabe anavvoolanga erinnya lyo ennaku zonna? Bazikirize." 
Psalms74:11 Lwaki totuyambye n’omukono gwo ogwa ddyo? Kiki ekikukuumisa omukono gwo ogwa ddyo mu kifuba kyo? 
Psalms74:12 Naye ggwe, Ayi Katonda, oli Kabaka wange wa dda; gw’oleeta obulokozi mu nsi." 
Psalms74:13 Ggwe wayawula mu mazzi g’ennyanja; omulabe n’omuzikiririza mu mazzi. 
Psalms74:14 Wamenyaamenya emitwe gya lukwata ogunene; n’oguwaayo okuba ekyokulya eri ebitonde eby’omu ddungu. 
Psalms74:15 Ggwe wazibukula ensulo n’emyala; ate n’okaza n’emigga egyakulukutanga bulijjo. 
Psalms74:16 Obudde bw’emisana bubwo, n’ekiro kikyo; ggwe wakola omwezi n’enjuba." 
Psalms74:17 Ggwe wateekawo ensalo z’ensi; ggwe wakola ebiro eby’ekyeya n’eby’obutiti. 
Psalms74:18 Jjukira ebyo, Ayi Katonda, olabe okuduula kw’omulabe, n’abantu abasirusiru nga bwe banyoomodde erinnya lyo." 
Psalms74:19 Ayi Katonda, towaayo mwoyo gwa jjiba lyo eri ensolo enkambwe; so teweerabiriranga ddala bulamu bw’abantu bo ababonyaabonyezebwa." 
Psalms74:20 Ojjukire endagaano yo; kubanga ensi ejjudde ekizikiza n’abantu abakambwe. 
Psalms74:21 Tokkiriza abo abajoogebwa okuwangulwa; era leka abaavu n’abeetaaga batenderezenga erinnya lyo ennaku zonna. 
Psalms74:22 Yimuka, Ayi Katonda, osalire abalabe baffe omusango. Jjukira abo abatakussaamu kitiibwa, nga bwe bakuduulira obudde okuziba." 
Psalms74:23 Tonyooma luyoogaano lw’abalabe bo, n’okuleekaana okwa buli kiseera." 
Psalms75:1 Tukwebaza, Ayi Katonda. Tukwebaza, kubanga Erinnya lyo liri kumpi. Abantu boogera ku bikolwa byo eby’ekyewuunyo." 
Psalms75:2 Mukama Katonda oyogera nti, “Neerondera ekiseera kye neetegekera era nsala omusango gwa bwenkanya." 
Psalms75:3 Kyokka newaakubadde ng’ensi eyuuguuma abantu ne beeraliikirira, naye nze nywezezza empagi zaayo.”" 
Psalms75:4 Nalabula ab’amalala bagaleke, n’ababi bakomye okuyimusa ejjembe lyabwe ng’ery’embogo." 
Psalms75:5 Mukomye okuyimusa ejjembe lyammwe eri eggulu n’okwogera nga muduula. 
Psalms75:6 Kubanga okugulumizibwa tekuva mu ddungu era n’obuyinza tebuva buvanjuba wadde obugwanjuba bw’ensi," 
Psalms75:7 wabula biva eri Katonda; era ye y’agulumiza omu ate n’atoowaza omulala. 
Psalms75:8 Mukama akutte mu mukono gwe ekikompe eky’obusungu bwe ekijjudde omwenge ogutabuddwamu ebirungo era kijjudde ejjovu; akifuka, aboonoonyi bonna ku nsi ne bakinywa ne bakimaliramu ddala." 
Psalms75:9 Naye nze nnaatendanga obulungi bwa Mukama; nnaatenderezanga Katonda wa Yakobo ennaku zonna. 
Psalms75:10 Mukama ayogera nti, Ababi ndibamalamu amaanyi, naye abatuukirivu nnaabongeranga amaanyi." 
Psalms76:1 Katonda amanyiddwa mu Yuda; erinnya lye kkulu mu Isirayiri. 
Psalms76:2 Eweema ye eri mu Yerusaalemi; era abeera mu Sayuuni. 
Psalms76:3 Eyo gy’asinziira n’amenyaamenya obusaale bw’omulabe obujja bwesooza; n’engabo n’ebitala n’ebyokulwanyisa byonna eby’olutalo. 
Psalms76:4 Owa ekitangaala, oli wa kitiibwa okusinga ensozi ennene eziriko ensolo eziyiggibwa." 
Psalms76:5 Ab’amaanyi bagalamira nga banyaguluddwa, beebaka ne batasobola kugolokoka, ne watabaawo n’omu asobola okuyimusa omukono gwe." 
Psalms76:6 Bw’obaboggolera, Ayi Katonda wa Yakobo, abeebagala embalaasi ezisika ebigaali bagwiira wamu n’ebigaali ne batagolokoka." 
Psalms76:7 Ggwe ayi Katonda, osaanira okutiibwanga. Ani ayinza okuyimirira mu maaso go ng’osunguwadde?" 
Psalms76:8 Osalira abantu emisango ng’osinziira mu ggulu, ensi n’etya n’ekankana n’esirika olw’obusungu bwo," 
Psalms76:9 bw’ogolokoka okusala omusango, okuwonya ababonyaabonyezebwa mu nsi." 
Psalms76:10 Bw’osunguwalira omuntu kikuleetera okutenderezebwa, n’abo b’otasunguwalidde ne beegendereza." 
Psalms76:11 Mweyame obweyamo bwammwe eri Mukama Katonda wammwe, era mubutuukirizenga; bonna abamuli okumpi bamuleetere ebirabo, kubanga asaanidde okutiibwa." 
Psalms76:12 Mukama akkakkanya abalangira, ne bakabaka b’ensi bamutya." 
Psalms77:1 Nnaakaabirira Katonda ambeere, ddala nnaakaabirira Katonda nga musaba ampulire." 
Psalms77:2 Bwe nnali mu nnaku, nanoonya Mukama, ekiro kyonna ne ngolola emikono gyange obutakoowa; emmeeme yange neegaana okusanyusibwa." 
Psalms77:3 Nakujjukiranga, Ayi Katonda ne nsinda, ne nfumiitiriza emmeeme yange n’ezirika." 
Psalms77:4 Tewaŋŋanya kwebaka; natawaanyizibwa nnyo ne sisobola kwogera. 
Psalms77:5 Ne ndowooza ku biseera eby’edda, ne nzijukira emyaka egyayita." 
Psalms77:6 Najjukiranga ennyimba zange ekiro, ne nfumiitiriza nga bwe neebuuza mu mutima gwange nti:" 
Psalms77:7 “Mukama anaatusuuliranga ddala ennaku zonna naataddayo kutulaga kisa kye? 
Psalms77:8 Okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo kukomedde ddala? Kye yasuubiza kibulidde ddala emirembe n’emirembe? 
Psalms77:9 Katonda yeerabidde ekisa kye? Asunguwalidde ddala ne yeggyako n’okusaasira kwe?” 
Psalms77:10 Awo ne ndowooza nti, “Ebyo bye mmanyi eby’emyaka emingi eby’omukono ogwa ddyo ogw’oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo.”" 
Psalms77:11 Nnajjukiranga ebikolwa bya Mukama, weewaawo, nnajjukiranga ebyamagero byo eby’edda." 
Psalms77:12 Nnaafumiitirizanga ku bikolwa byo byonna eby’amaanyi; nnaalowoozanga ku byamagero byo byonna. 
Psalms77:13 Ekkubo lyo, Ayi Katonda, liri mu watukuvu. Tewali katonda yenkana Katonda waffe." 
Psalms77:14 Ggwe Katonda akola eby’amagero; era amaanyi go ogalaga mu mawanga. 
Psalms77:15 Wanunula abantu bo n’omukono gwo, abazzukulu ba Yakobo ne Yusufu." 
Psalms77:16 Amazzi gaakulaba, Ayi Katonda; amazzi bwe gaakulaba ne gatya, n’obuziba ne bukankanira ddala." 
Psalms77:17 Ebire byayiwa amazzi ne bivaamu n’okubwatuka, era n’obusaale bwo ne bubuna." 
Psalms77:18 Eddoboozi lyo ery’okubwatuka lyawulirwa mu kikuŋŋunta okumyansa kwo ne kumulisa ensi. Ensi n’ekankana n’enyeenyezebwa. 
Psalms77:19 Ekkubo lyo lyali mu nnyanja; wayita mu mazzi amangi, naye ebigere mwe walinnya tebyalabika." 
Psalms77:20 Wakulembera abantu bo ng’ekisibo, nga bali mu mikono gya Musa ne Alooni." 
Psalms78:1 Muwulire okuyigiriza kwange mmwe abantu bange, musseeyo omwoyo ku bye njogera." 
Psalms78:2 Ndyogerera mu ngero, njogere ebintu eby’ekyama ebyaliwo edda," 
Psalms78:3 ebintu bye twawulira ne tumanya; ebintu bajjajjaffe bye baatutegeeza. 
Psalms78:4 Tetuubikisenga baana baabwe, naye tunaabuuliranga buli mulembe ogunnaddangawo ebikolwa bya Mukama eby’ekitalo, n’amaanyi ge n’ebyamagero bye yakola." 
Psalms78:5 Yawa Yakobo ebiragiro, n’ateeka amateeka mu Isirayiri; n’alagira bajjajjaffe babiyigirizenga abaana baabwe," 
Psalms78:6 ab’omu mulembe oguliddirira nabo babimanye, n’abaana abalizaalibwa, nabo babiyigirize abaana baabwe," 
Psalms78:7 balyoke beesigenga Katonda, era balemenga okwerabira ebyo byonna Katonda bye yakola; naye bagonderenga ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms78:8 Baleme okuba nga bajjajjaabwe, omulembe ogw’abakakanyavu era abajeemu abatali bawulize, ab’emyoyo egitali myesigwa eri Katonda." 
Psalms78:9 Abaana ba Efulayimu abaalina obusaale obw’okulwanyisa, naye ne badduka mu lutalo," 
Psalms78:10 tebaatuukiriza ndagaano ya Katonda; ne bagaana okugondera amateeka ga Mukama. 
Psalms78:11 Beerabira ebyo bye yakola, n’ebyamagero bye yabalaga." 
Psalms78:12 Yakola ebyamagero mu maaso ga bajjajjaabwe nga bali mu nsi y’e Misiri, mu kitundu kya Zowani." 
Psalms78:13 Ennyanja yajaawulamu, amazzi ne geetuuma ebbali n’ebbali ng’ebisenge." 
Psalms78:14 Emisana yabakulemberanga n’ekire, n’ekiro n’abakulemberanga n’empagi ey’omuliro." 
Psalms78:15 Yayasa enjazi mu ddungu, n’abawa amazzi amangi agaali ng’agava mu buziba bw’ennyanja." 
Psalms78:16 Yaggya ensulo mu lwazi, n’akulukusa amazzi ng’emigga." 
Psalms78:17 Naye bo ne beeyongera bweyongezi okwonoona, ne bajeemera Oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo nga bali mu ddungu." 
Psalms78:18 Ne bagezesa Katonda mu bugenderevu, nga bamusaba emmere gye baalulunkanira." 
Psalms78:19 Era ne boogera ku Katonda; nga bagamba nti, “Katonda asobola okutuliisiza mu ddungu?" 
Psalms78:20 Weewaawo yakuba olwazi, amazzi ne gakulukuta ng’emigga; naye anaatuwa emmere? Anaawa abantu be ennyama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Awo Mukama bwe yawulira ebyo n’asunguwala nnyo; omuliro gwe ne gwaka ku Yakobo, n’obusungu bwe ne bubuubuukira ku Isirayiri." 
Psalms78:22 Kubanga tebakkiriza Katonda, era tebeesiga maanyi ge agalokola." 
Psalms78:23 Naye era n’alagira eggulu; n’aggulawo enzigi z’omu ggulu. 
Psalms78:24 N’abaweereza maanu okuva mu ggulu balye. Yabawa emmere eyava mu ggulu. 
Psalms78:25 Abantu ne balya emmere ya bamalayika; Mukama n’abawanga emmere nnyingi eyabamaliranga ddala. 
Psalms78:26 N’akunsa empewo ey’Ebuvanjuba okuva mu ggulu, era n’aweereza empewo okuva obukiika obwaddyo n’amaanyi ge." 
Psalms78:27 Yatonnyesa ennyama okuva mu ggulu ennyingi ennyo ng’enfuufu; n’abaweereza n’obunyonyi enkumu ennyo ng’omusenyu gw’okulubalama lw’ennyanja. 
Psalms78:28 Ebyokulya ebyo n’abisuula wakati mu lusiisira lwabwe; okwetooloola eweema zaabwe. 
Psalms78:29 Awo ne balya ne bakkuta nnyo; kubanga yabawa kye baali bayaayaanira. 
Psalms78:30 Naye bwe baali nga bakyalulunkana, nga n’emmere ekyali mu kamwa kaabwe," 
Psalms78:31 obusungu bwa Mukama ne bubabuubuukirako, n’abattamu abasajja abasinga amaanyi; abavubuka ba Isirayiri ne bazikirizibwa." 
Psalms78:32 Naye newaakubadde ebyo byonna byabatuukako, kyokka beeyongera okwonoona; newaakubadde nga yabakolera ebyamagero, naye tebakkiriza." 
Psalms78:33 Mukama kyeyava asala ku myaka gyabwe, n’abaleetako okuzikirizibwa okw’amangu era okw’entiisa." 
Psalms78:34 Bwe yattanga abamu ku bo, ne balyoka bamunoonya, ne beenenya ne badda gy’ali." 
Psalms78:35 Ne bajjukira nti Katonda lwe Lwazi lwabwe; era nti Katonda Ali Waggulu Ennyo ye Mununuzi waabwe. 
Psalms78:36 Kyokka baamuwaananga n’emimwa gyabwe, nga bwe bamulimba n’ennimi zaabwe," 
Psalms78:37 so tebaali beesigwa mu mitima gyabwe, era nga tebatuukiriza ndagaano ye." 
Psalms78:38 Naye ye n’abakwatirwanga ekisa n’abasonyiwanga, n’atabazikiriza; emirundi n’emirundi ng’akoma ku busungu bwe, n’atabamalirako kiruyi kye okubazikiririza ddala." 
Psalms78:39 Yajjukira nga baali mubiri bubiri; ng’empewo egenda n’etedda! 
Psalms78:40 Baamujeemeranga nnyo bwe baali mu ddungu; ne banakuwaza nnyo omutima gwe. 
Psalms78:41 Ne baddamu ne bakema Katonda, ne banyiiza Omutukuvu wa Isirayiri." 
Psalms78:42 Tebajjukira buyinza bwe; wadde olunaku lwe yabanunulirako mu mikono gy’omulabe; 
Psalms78:43 bwe yalaga obubonero bwe mu Misiri, n’ebyamagero bye mu kitundu kya Zowani," 
Psalms78:44 yafuula amazzi g’emigga gyabwe omusaayi, ne batanywa mazzi gaagyo." 
Psalms78:45 Yabaweereza agabinja g’ensowera ne zibaluma, n’abaweereza n’ebikere ne bibadaaza." 
Psalms78:46 Ebirime n’ebibala byabwe yabiwa enzige ne bulusejjera. 
Psalms78:47 Yazikiriza emizabbibu gyabwe n’omuzira, era ne gukuba n’emisukomooli gyabwe." 
Psalms78:48 Yatta ente zaabwe n’amayinja g’omuzira; n’ebisibo byabwe ne bittibwa eraddu. 
Psalms78:49 Obusungu bwe obungi bwababuubuukirako, n’ekiruyi kye n’obukambwe ne bibamalamu ensa. N’alyoka abasindikira ekibinja kya bamalayika okubazikiriza." 
Psalms78:50 Yabalaga obusungu bwe, n’atabasonyiwa kufa, n’abasindikira kawumpuli." 
Psalms78:51 Yatta ababereberye bonna ab’omu Misiri, nga be bavubuka ab’ebibala ebibereberye eby’omu nnyumba ya Kaamu." 
Psalms78:52 N’alyoka afulumya abantu be ng’endiga, n’abatambuza mu ddungu ng’ekisibo." 
Psalms78:53 N’abaluŋŋamya mu mirembe nga tebatya, ennyanja n’esaanyaawo abalabe baabwe." 
Psalms78:54 N’abatuusa ku nsalo y’ensi entukuvu; ku lusozi lwe yeewangulira, n’omukono gwe ogwa ddyo." 
Psalms78:55 Yagobamu amawanga nga balaba, n’abagabanyiza ebitundu by’ensi eyo; n’atuuza bulungi ebika bya Isirayiri mu maka gaabyo." 
Psalms78:56 Naye era ne bakema Katonda; ne bamujeemera oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo, ne bagaana okugondera ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms78:57 Ne bamuvaako ne baba bakuusa nga bajjajjaabwe bwe baali, ne baggwaamu obwesigwa ng’omutego gw’obusaale omukyamu." 
Psalms78:58 Kubanga baasunguwaza Katonda olw’ebifo ebigulumivu bo bye beegunjira okusinzizangamu, ne bamukwasa obuggya olwa bakatonda baabwe abalala." 
Psalms78:59 Katonda bwe yabiraba n’asunguwala nnyo, n’aviira ddala ku Isirayiri." 
Psalms78:60 N’ava mu weema ey’omu Siiro, eweema mwe yabeeranga ng’ali mu bantu be." 
Psalms78:61 N’awaayo amaanyi ge mu busibe, n’ekitiibwa kye n’akiwaayo eri omulabe." 
Psalms78:62 Abantu be yabaleka ne battibwa n’ekitala, n’asunguwalira omugabo gwe." 
Psalms78:63 Omuliro ne gusaanyaawo abavubuka baabwe abalenzi, ne bawala baabwe ne babulwa ow’okubawasa." 
Psalms78:64 Bakabona baabwe battibwa n’ekitala, ne bannamwandu baabwe tebaasobola kubakungubagira." 
Psalms78:65 Awo Mukama n’alyoka agolokoka ng’ali nga ava mu tulo, ng’omusajja omuzira azuukuka mu tulo ng’atamidde." 
Psalms78:66 N’akuba abalabe be ne badduka; n’abaswaza emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms78:67 Mukama yaleka ennyumba ya Yusufu, n’ekika kya Efulayimu n’atakironda;" 
Psalms78:68 naye n’alonda ekika kya Yuda, lwe lusozi Sayuuni lwe yayagala." 
Psalms78:69 N’azimba awatukuvu we ne wagulumira ng’ensozi empanvu; ne waba ng’ensi gye yanyweza emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms78:70 Yalonda Dawudi omuweereza we; n’amuggya mu kulunda endiga. 
Psalms78:71 Ave mu kuliisa endiga, naye alundenga Yakobo, be bantu be, era alabirirenga Isirayiri omugabo gwe, gwe yeerondera." 
Psalms78:72 N’abalabirira n’omutima ogutaliimu bukuusa, n’abakulembera n’amagezi g’emikono gye." 
Psalms79:1 Ayi Katonda omugabo gwo gulumbiddwa amawanga; boonoonye yeekaalu yo entukuvu ne Yerusaalemi kizikiriziddwa, ne kifuuka entuumo." 
Psalms79:2 Emirambo gy’abaweereza bo bagifudde mmere ya nnyonyi ez’omu bbanga, n’emibiri gy’abatukuvu bo giweereddwa ensolo ez’omu nsiko." 
Psalms79:3 Omusaayi gwabwe ne guyiibwa ng’amazzi okwetooloola Yerusaalemi, so nga abafudde tewali muntu abaziika." 
Psalms79:4 Baliraanwa baffe batuyisaamu amaaso, era tufuuse ekisekererwa eri abo abatwetoolodde." 
Psalms79:5 Ayi Mukama olitusunguwalira kutuusa ddi, nnaku zonna? Obuggya bwo bunaabuubuukanga ng’omuliro?" 
Psalms79:6 Obusungu bwo bubuubuukire ku mawanga agatakumanyi, ne ku bwakabaka obutakoowoola linnya lyo." 
Psalms79:7 Kubanga bazikirizza Yakobo, ne basaanyaawo ensi ye." 
Psalms79:8 Totubalira kibi kya bajjajjaffe; tukusaba oyanguwe okutusaasira kubanga tuli mu bwetaavu bungi nnyo. 
Psalms79:9 Tuyambe olw’ekitiibwa ky’erinnya lyo, Ayi Katonda ow’obulokozi bwaffe; otuwonye era otutangiririre olw’ebibi byaffe olw’erinnya lyo." 
Psalms79:10 Lwaki abamawanga babuuza nti, “Katonda waabwe ali ludda wa?” Kkiriza okuwalana eggwanga olw’omusaayi gw’abaweereza bo ogwayiyibwa, kumanyibwe mu mawanga gonna nga naffe tulaba." 
Psalms79:11 Wuliriza okusinda kw’omusibe; okozese omukono gwo ogw’amaanyi owonye abo abasaliddwa ogw’okufa. 
Psalms79:12 Ayi Mukama, baliraanwa baffe abakuduulira, bawalane emirundi musanvu." 
Psalms79:13 Kale nno, ffe abantu bo era endiga ez’omu ddundiro lyo, tulyoke tukutenderezenga emirembe gyonna; buli mulembe gulyoke gukutenderezenga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms80:1 Wulira, Ayi Omusumba wa Isirayiri; ggwe akulembera Yusufu ng’alunda ekisibo kyo; ggwe atudde ku ntebe ey’obwakabaka mu bakerubi, twakire." 
Psalms80:2 Amaanyi go galabike mu Efulayimu, ne mu Benyamini ne mu Manase, ojje otulokole." 
Psalms80:3 Tukomyewo gy’oli, Ayi Katonda, otutunuulize amaaso ag’ekisa, otulokole." 
Psalms80:4 Ayi Katonda, Mukama ow’Eggye, olituusa ddi okusunguwalira okusaba kw’abantu bo?" 
Psalms80:5 Wabaliisa emmere ejjudde amaziga; n’obanywesa ebikopo by’amaziga musera. 
Psalms80:6 Otufudde eky’okusekererwa mu baliraanwa baffe, n’abalabe baffe ne batuduulira." 
Psalms80:7 Tukomyewo gy’oli, Ayi Mukama ow’Eggye, otutunuulize amaaso go ag’ekisa, tulokolebwe." 
Psalms80:8 Waleeta omuzabbibu ng’oguggya mu Misiri; n’ogobamu amawanga agaali mu nsi muno n’ogusimba. 
Psalms80:9 Wagulongooseza ettaka, ne gumera, emirandira ne ginywera bulungi, ne gwagaagala mu nsi." 
Psalms80:10 Ekisiikirize kyagwo ne kibikka ensozi, n’amatabi gaagwo ne gaba ng’emivule egy’amaanyi." 
Psalms80:11 Amatabi gaagwo ne gatuuka ku Nnyanja eya Wakati n’amatabi g’ennyanja gaayo ne gatuuka ku Mugga Fulaati. 
Psalms80:12 Kale wamenyera ki ebisenge byagwo, abayitawo bonna ne beenogera ebibala byagwo?" 
Psalms80:13 Embizzi ez’omu kibira zigwonoona, na buli nsolo ey’omu nsiko egulya." 
Psalms80:14 Tukyukire, Ayi Katonda ow’Eggye, otunuulire ensi ng’osinziira mu ggulu; olabirire omuzabbibu guno." 
Psalms80:15 Gwe wagwesimbira n’omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, era ggwe weerondera omwana wo." 
Psalms80:16 Bagutemye, ne bagwokya omuliro; abakoze ekyo banenye mu bukambwe, obazikirize." 
Psalms80:17 Naye muwe amaanyi omusajja oyo gw’oyagala era omwana oyo gwe weerondera. 
Psalms80:18 Bwe tutyo tuleme okukuvaako, n’okukukuba amabega. Otuzzeemu amaanyi, naffe tunaakoowoolanga erinnya lyo." 
Psalms80:19 Otukomyewo gy’oli, Ayi Mukama Katonda ow’Eggye, otutunuulize amaaso go ag’ekisa, tulyoke tulokolebwe." 
Psalms81:1 Mumuyimbire nnyo n’essanyu Katonda amaanyi gaffe; muyimuse waggulu amaloboozi gammwe eri Katonda wa Yakobo! 
Psalms81:2 Mutandike okuyimba, mukube ebitaasa n’ennanga evuga obulungi ey’enkoba awamu n’entongooli." 
Psalms81:3 Mufuuwe eŋŋombe ng’omwezi gwakaboneka, era mugifuuwe nga gwa ggabogabo, ku lunaku olw’embaga yaffe." 
Psalms81:4 Ekyo kye kiragiro eri Isirayiri, lye tteeka lya Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Yaliteekera Yusufu, Katonda bwe yalumba ensi ya Misiri; gye nawulirira olulimi olwannema okutegeera." 
Psalms81:6 “Nnamutikkula omugugu okuva ku kibegabega kye; n’emikono gye ne ngiwummuza okusitula ebisero. 
Psalms81:7 Mwankoowoola nga muli mu nnaku ne mbadduukirira ne mbawonya, nabaanukulira mu kubwatuka mu kire; ne mbagezesa ku mazzi ag’e Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Muwulire, mmwe abantu bange, nga mbalabula. Singa onompuliriza, ggwe Isirayiri!" 
Psalms81:9 Temubeeranga na katonda mulala, wadde okuvuunamira katonda omulala yenna." 
Psalms81:10 Nze Mukama Katonda wo, eyakuggya mu nsi y’e Misiri. Yasamya akamwa ko, nange nnaakajjuza." 
Psalms81:11 “Naye abantu bange tebampuliriza; Isirayiri teyaŋŋondera. 
Psalms81:12 Nange ne mbawaayo eri obujeemu bw’omutima gwabwe, okugoberera ebyo bye baagala." 
Psalms81:13 “Singa abantu bange bampuliriza; singa Isirayiri agondera ebiragiro byange," 
Psalms81:14 mangwago nandirwanyisizza abalabe baabwe, ne mbawangula." 
Psalms81:15 Abo abakyawa Mukama ne beegonza gy’ali; ekibonerezo kyabwe kya mirembe gyonna. 
Psalms81:16 Naye ggwe, Isirayiri, nandikuliisizza eŋŋaano esingira ddala obulungi, ne nkukkusa omubisi gw’enjuki nga guva mu lwazi.”" 
Psalms82:1 Katonda akubiriza olukiiko lwe olukulu olw’omu ggulu, ng’alamula bakatonda." 
Psalms82:2 Mulituusa ddi okusala emisango n’obukuusa, nga musalira abanafu?" 
Psalms82:3 Abanafu n’abatalina bakitaabwe mubalamulenga mu bwenkanya; abaavu n’abanyigirizibwa mubayambenga mu bwenkanya. 
Psalms82:4 Mulwanirire abatalina maanyi n’abali mu kwetaaga, mubawonye; mubanunule nga mubaggya mu mikono gy’ababi." 
Psalms82:5 Tebalina kye bamanyi, era tebategeera. Batambulira mu kizikiza; emisingi gy’ensi gyonna ginyeenyezebwa." 
Psalms82:6 Njogedde nti, Muli bakatonda, era mwenna muli baana b’oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo." 
Psalms82:7 “Naye mugenda kufa ng’abantu obuntu; muliggwaawo ng’abafuzi abalala bonna bwe baggwaawo.” 
Psalms82:8 Ogolokoke, Ayi Katonda, olamule ensi; kubanga amawanga gonna gago." 
Psalms83:1 Ayi Katonda, tosirika busirisi n’etebaayo kanyego. Tosirika, Ayi Katonda, n’otobaako ky’okola." 
Psalms83:2 Wuliriza oluyoogaano oluva mu balabe bo; abo abaagala okukulwanyisa bali mu keetalo. 
Psalms83:3 Bateesa n’obujagujagu okulumba abantu bo; basalira enkwe abo b’oyagala ennyo. 
Psalms83:4 Bagamba nti, “Mujje eggwanga lyabwe tulizikirize, n’erinnya lya Isirayiri lireme okujjukirwanga emirembe gyonna!”" 
Psalms83:5 Basala olukwe n’omwoyo gumu; beegasse wamu bakulwanyise. 
Psalms83:6 Abantu b’omu weema za Edomu, n’ez’Abayisimayiri, n’eza Mowaabu, n’Abakagale;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebali ne Amoni, ne Amaleki, n’Abafirisuuti n’abantu b’omu Ttuulo." 
Psalms83:8 Era ne Asiriya yeegasse nabo, okuyamba bazzukulu ba Lutti." 
Psalms83:9 Bakoleko nga bwe wakola Midiyaani, era nga bwe wakola Sisera ne Yabini ku mugga Kisoni," 
Psalms83:10 abaazikiririra mu Endoli ne bafuuka ng’obusa ku ttaka. 
Psalms83:11 Abakungu baabwe bafuule nga Olebu ne Zeebu, n’abalangira baabwe bonna bafuuke nga Zeba ne Zalumunna," 
Psalms83:12 abaagamba nti, “Ka tutwale amalundiro ga Katonda, tugeefunire.”" 
Psalms83:13 Ayi Katonda wange, bafuumuule ng’enfuufu, obasaasaanye ng’ebisusunku mu mbuyaga." 
Psalms83:14 Ng’omuliro bwe gwokya ekibira; n’ennimi z’omuliro ne zikoleeza ensozi," 
Psalms83:15 naawe bw’otyo bw’oba obawondera n’omuyaga gwo, obatiise ne kibuyaga wo ow’amaanyi." 
Psalms83:16 Baswaze nnyo, balyoke banoonyenga erinnya lyo, Ayi Mukama." 
Psalms83:17 Bajjule ensonyi n’okutya, bazikirire nga baswadde nnyo." 
Psalms83:18 Balyoke bategeere nti, Ggwe wekka, Ayi Mukama, ggw’oyitibwa YAKUWA, gw’obeera waggulu ennyo ng’ofuga ensi yonna." 
Psalms84:1 Eweema zo nga nnungi, Ayi Mukama ow’Eggye!" 
Psalms84:2 Omwoyo gwange guyaayaana, gwagala na kuzirika, olw’empya za Mukama, omutima gwange n’omubiri gwange bikoowoola Katonda omulamu." 
Psalms84:3 Weewaawo, ne nkazaluggya yeekoledde ekisu, n’akataayi ennyumba mwe binaakulizanga abaana baabyo awo okumpi n’Ebyoto byo, Ayi Mukama Ayinzabyonna, Kabaka wange, era Katonda wange." 
Psalms84:4 Balina omukisa ababeera mu nnyumba yo, banaakutenderezanga." 
Psalms84:5 Alina omukisa omuntu eyeesiga amaanyi go, era assaayo omwoyo okutambulira mu makubo go." 
Psalms84:6 Bayita mu kiwonvu Baka, ne bakifuula ekifo ky’ensulo; n’enkuba ya ddumbi n’ejjuza ebidiba byakyo." 
Psalms84:7 Bagenda beeyongera amaanyi, okutuusa lwe batuuka mu maaso ga Katonda mu Sayuuni." 
Psalms84:8 Wulira okusaba kwange, Ayi Mukama Katonda ow’Eggye; mpuliriza, Ayi Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Ayi Katonda, Engabo yaffe, tunuulira kabaka wo n’okusaasira oyo gwe wafukako amafuta." 
Psalms84:10 Okumala olunaku olumu mu mpya zo, kisinga okubeera emyaka olukumi mu bifo ebirala. Njagala okuba omuggazi mu nnyumba ya Katonda wange, okusinga okubeeranga mu weema z’abakola ebibi." 
Psalms84:11 Kubanga Mukama Katonda ye njuba yaffe era ye ngabo yaffe; atuwa emikisa gye awamu n’ekitiibwa; tewaliiwo kirungi na kimu ky’ataawa abo abatambulira mu makubo ge nga tebaliiko kyakunenyezebwa. 
Psalms84:12 Ayi Mukama ow’Eggye alina omukisa omuntu akwesiga. 
Psalms85:1 Ensi yo ogikoledde ebyekisa Ayi Mukama; Yakobo omuddizza ebibye. 
Psalms85:2 Abantu bo obasonyiye ebyonoono byabwe, n’ebibi byabwe byonna n’obibikkako." 
Psalms85:3 Ekiruyi kyo kyonna okirese, n’oleka n’obusungu bwo obubuubuuka." 
Psalms85:4 Tukomyewo gy’oli, Ayi Katonda w’obulokozi bwaffe, oleke okutusunguwalira." 
Psalms85:5 Onootusunguwaliranga emirembe gyonna? Onootunyiigiranga emirembe n’emirembe? 
Psalms85:6 Tolituzaamu ndasi, abantu bo basanyukirenga mu ggwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Tulage okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo Ayi Katonda, era otuwe obulokozi bwo." 
Psalms85:8 Nnaawulirizanga Mukama Katonda by’agamba; asuubiza abantu be, be batukuvu be, okubawa emirembe; naye tebaddayo mu byonoono byabwe." 
Psalms85:9 Ddala ddala obulokozi bwe busemberera abo abamutya, ensi yaffe n’eryoka ejjula ekitiibwa kye." 
Psalms85:10 Okwagala n’obwesigwa bisisinkanye; obutuukirivu n’emirembe binywegeraganye. 
Psalms85:11 Obwesigwa bulose mu nsi, n’obutukuvu ne butunuulira ensi nga businzira mu ggulu." 
Psalms85:12 Ddala ddala Katonda anaatuwanga ebirungi, n’ensi yaffe eneebalanga ebibala bingi." 
Psalms85:13 Obutuukirivu bunaamukulemberanga, era bunaateekateekanga ekkubo mw’anaayitanga." 
Psalms86:1 Otege okutu kwo, Ayi Mukama, owulire okusaba kwange, onnyanukule, kubanga ndi mwavu atalina kintu." 
Psalms86:2 Okuume obulamu bwange, kubanga nkuweereza n’obwesigwa. Katonda wange, ondokole nze omuddu wo akwesiga." 
Psalms86:3 Onsaasire, Ayi Mukama, kubanga olunaku lwonna nsiiba nkukoowoola." 
Psalms86:4 Osanyuse omuweereza wo Ayi Mukama; kubanga omwoyo gwange nguyimusa eyo gy’oli. 
Psalms86:5 Ddala ddala olina ekisa era osonyiwa, Ayi Mukama; n’abo bonna abakukoowoola obaagala nnyo." 
Psalms86:6 Owulire okusaba kwange, Ayi Mukama; owulirize eddoboozi erikaabirira ekisa kyo." 
Psalms86:7 Bwe nnaabanga mu buzibu nnaakukoowoolanga; kubanga ononnyanukulanga. 
Psalms86:8 Mu bakatonda bonna tewali ali nga ggwe, Ayi Mukama; era teriiyo akola bikolwa ng’ebibyo." 
Psalms86:9 Ayi Mukama amawanga gonna ge watonda ganajjanga mu maaso go ne gakusinza; era ne bagulumiza erinnya lyo ery’ekitiibwa. 
Psalms86:10 Kubanga oli mukulu, era okola ebyewunyisa; ggwe wekka ggwe Katonda." 
Psalms86:11 Onjigirize ekkubo lyo, Ayi Mukama, ntambulirenga mu mazima go; ompe omutima omunywevu ogutasagaasagana, ntyenga erinnya lyo." 
Psalms86:12 Nnaakutenderezanga, Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, n’omutima gwange gwonna; erinnya lyo nnaaligulumizanga emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms86:13 Okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo kungi nnyo gye ndi; wawonya omwoyo gwange amagombe. 
Psalms86:14 Ayi Katonda, ab’amalala bannumba, ekibinja ky’abantu abataliimu kusaasira bannoonya okunzita, be bantu abatakufiirako ddala." 
Psalms86:15 Naye ggwe, Mukama Katonda oli musaasizi era ow’ekisa, olwawo okusunguwala, ojjudde okwagala n’obwesigwa." 
Psalms86:16 Onkyukire, onsaasire, ompe amaanyi go nze omuweereza wo; nze omwana w’omuweereza wo omukazi ondokole." 
Psalms86:17 Nkolera akabonero akalaga ebirungi byo, abalabe bange bakalabe baswale; kubanga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, onnyambye era onzizizzaamu amaanyi." 
Psalms87:1 Atadde emisingi gye ku lusozi olutukuvu. 
Psalms87:2 Mukama ayagala emiryango gya Sayuuni okusinga ennyumba zonna eza Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Ebintu eby’ekitiibwa bikwogerwako, ggwe ekibuga kya Katonda." 
Psalms87:4 “Mu mawanga ge mmanyi mwe muli Lakabu, ne Babulooni; era ndyogera ku Bufirisuuti, ne ku Ttuulo ne ku Esiyopya nti, ‘Ono yazaalirwa mu Sayuuni.’ ”" 
Psalms87:5 Bwe baliba boogera ku Sayuuni baligamba nti, “Ono n’oli baazaalirwa omwo,” n’oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo alikinyweza." 
Psalms87:6 Mukama aliwandiika mu kitabo bw’ati, omuli amannya g’abantu nti, “Ono yazaalibwa omwo.”" 
Psalms87:7 Banaakubanga ebivuga nga bwe bayimba nti, “Ensulo zange zonna ziri mu ggwe.”" 
Psalms88:1 Ayi Mukama Katonda, Omulokozi wange, nkaaba emisana n’ekiro mu maaso go." 
Psalms88:2 Kkiriza okusaba kwange kutuuke gy’oli; otege okutu kwo nga nkukoowoola. 
Psalms88:3 Kubanga emmeeme yange ejjudde ebizibu, era nsemberedde okufa." 
Psalms88:4 Mbalirwa mu abo abaserengeta emagombe; nfaanana ng’omuntu atalina maanyi. 
Psalms88:5 Bandese wano ng’afudde, nga ndi ng’abo be basse abalinda obulinzi entaana, nga tokyaddayo kubajjukira, era nga tewakyali kya kubakolera." 
Psalms88:6 Ontadde mu kinnya ekisinga obuwanvu, era eky’ekizikiza ekikutte ennyo." 
Psalms88:7 Obusungu bwo bumbuubuukiddeko nnyo, ng’ennyanja esiikuuse n’amayengo gaayo ne gankuba okusukkirira." 
Psalms88:8 Ab’emikwano abasingira ddala okunjagala obammazeeko, n’onfuula ekyenyinyalwa gye bali. Nsibiddwa, so sisobola kwesumattula." 
Psalms88:9 Amaaso gange gayimbadde olw’ennaku. Nkukoowoola buli lunaku, Ayi Mukama, ne ngolola emikono gyange gy’oli nga nkwegayirira." 
Psalms88:10 Ebyamagero byo onoobikoleranga bafu? Abafudde banaagolokokanga ne bakutendereza? 
Psalms88:11 Okwagala kwo onookulaganga abali emagombe n’obwesigwa bwo abo abali mu kifo eky’okuzikirira? 
Psalms88:12 Ebyamagero byo binaamanyibwanga mu kifo ekyo eky’ekizikiza? Oba ebikolwa byo eby’obutuukirivu bwo bye binaamanyibwanga mu nsi eyamala edda okwerabirwa? 
Psalms88:13 Naye nze, Ayi Mukama, naakabiriranga ggwe okunnyamba; buli nkya okusaba kwange kunaatuukanga gy’oli." 
Psalms88:14 Ayi Mukama, onsuulidde ki? Onkwekedde ki amaaso go?" 
Psalms88:15 Ombonyaabonyezza okuviira ddala mu buvubuka bwange, era nga mbeera kumpi n’okufa; ngumiikirizza nnyo entiisa yo, era kaakano mpweddemu essuubi." 
Psalms88:16 Obusungu bwo obubuubuuka bunzigwereddeko era bunzikkiriza. Entiisa yo tendeseemu ka buntu. 
Psalms88:17 Binzingiza nga mukoka olunaku lwonna; binsaanikiridde ddala. 
Psalms88:18 Ommazeeko ab’emikwano n’abo abanjagala ennyo; nsigazza nzikiza yokka. 
Psalms89:1 Nnaayimbanga ku kwagala kwo okungi, Ayi Mukama, emirembe gyonna. Nnaatenderezanga obwesigwa bwo n’akamwa kange, bumanyibwe ab’emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms89:2 Ddala ddala nnaategeezanga nti okwagala kwo tekuggwaawo ennaku zonna; n’obwesigwa bwo bunywevu ng’eggulu. 
Psalms89:3 Nakola endagaano n’omulonde wange; nalayirira omuweereza wange Dawudi nti," 
Psalms89:4 “Ezadde lyo nnaalinywezanga ennaku zonna, era entebe yo ey’obwakabaka nnaaginywezanga emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms89:5 Eggulu linaatenderezanga ebyamagero byo n’obwesigwa bwo, Ayi Mukama, mu kibiina ky’abatukuvu bo." 
Psalms89:6 Kale, mu ggulu waggulu, ani ageraageranyizika ne Mukama? Ani afaanana nga Mukama, mu abo ababeera mu ggulu?" 
Psalms89:7 Katonda atiibwa nnyo mu lukiiko olw’abatukuvu; era wa ntiisa okusinga bonna abamwetooloola. 
Psalms89:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda ow’Eggye, ani akufaanana? Oli wa buyinza, Ayi Mukama, ojjudde obwesigwa." 
Psalms89:9 Ggwe ofuga amalala g’ennyanja; amayengo gaayo bwe geekuluumulula ogakkakkanya. 
Psalms89:10 Lakabu wamubetentera ddala; abalabe bo n’obasaasaanya n’omukono gwo ogw’amaanyi. 
Psalms89:11 Eggulu liryo, n’ensi yiyo; ensi yonna gwe wagitonda ne byonna ebigirimu." 
Psalms89:12 Watonda obukiikakkono n’obukiikaddyo; ensozi Taboli ne Kerumooni zitendereza erinnya lyo. 
Psalms89:13 Oli wa buyinza bungi nnyo; omukono gwo gwa maanyi, omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gunaagulumizibwanga." 
Psalms89:14 Obutuukirivu n’obwenkanya gwe musingi gw’obwakabaka bwo. Okwagala n’obwesigwa bye binaakukulemberanga. 
Psalms89:15 Balina omukisa abantu abamanyi okukutendereza Mukama n’amaloboozi ag’essanyu; Ayi Mukama, banaatambuliranga mu ssanyu lyo." 
Psalms89:16 Banaasanyukiranga mu linnya lyo okuzibya obudde, n’obutuukirivu bwo banaabugulumizanga." 
Psalms89:17 Kubanga gw’obawa amaanyi ne bafuna ekitiibwa. Olw’okwagala kwo otutuusa ku buwanguzi olw’ekisa kyo. 
Psalms89:18 Ddala ddala, Mukama ye ngabo yaffe, Omutukuvu wa Isirayiri kabaka waffe." 
Psalms89:19 Mu biro biri eby’edda wayogera n’omuweereza wo omwesigwa mu kwolesebwa nti, Ngulumizizza omuzira ow’amaanyi; ngulumizizza omuvubuka okuva mu bantu abaabulijjo." 
Psalms89:20 Nalaba Dawudi, omuweereza wange; ne mufukako amafuta gange amatukuvu okuba kabaka." 
Psalms89:21 Nnaamukulemberanga, n’omukono gwange gunaamunywezanga." 
Psalms89:22 Tewaliba mulabe we alimuwangula, so n’aboonoonyi tebaamunyigirizenga." 
Psalms89:23 Abalabe be n’abamukyawa ndibamerengula, n’amaggye agamulwanyisa ndigabetenta." 
Psalms89:24 Obwesigwa bwange n’okwagala kwange kunaabanga naye, ne mu linnya lyange aneeyongeranga okuba ow’amaanyi." 
Psalms89:25 Alifuga okuva ku migga okutuuka ku nnyanja ennene. 
Psalms89:26 Anankowoolanga ng’agamba nti, Ggwe Kitange era Katonda wange, ggwe Lwazi olw’Obulokozi bwange." 
Psalms89:27 Ndimufuula omwana wange omubereberye, era kabaka asinga okugulumizibwa mu bakabaka bonna ab’ensi." 
Psalms89:28 Okwagala kwange kunaabeeranga naye ennaku zonna; n’endagaano gye nkoze naye teeremenga kutuukirira. 
Psalms89:29 Ezzadde lye teririggwaawo emirembe gyonna, n’obwakabaka bunaavanga mu kika kye ennaku zonna." 
Psalms89:30 Abaana be bwe banaanyoomanga amateeka gange, ne batagoberera biragiro byange;" 
Psalms89:31 bwe banaamenyanga ebiragiro byange, ne batagondera mateeka gange," 
Psalms89:32 ndibabonereza n’omuggo olw’ebibi byabwe, ne mbakuba emiggo olw’ebyonoono byabwe." 
Psalms89:33 Naye ssirirekayo kumwagala, wadde okumenyawo obwesigwa bwange gy’ali." 
Psalms89:34 Sigenda kulemwa kutuukiriza ndagaano yange, wadde okukyusa ku ebyo akamwa kange bye koogedde." 
Psalms89:35 Nalayira omulundi gumu, ng’obutuukirivu bwange bwe buli, nti, “Dawudi sigenda kumulimba.”" 
Psalms89:36 Ezzadde lye teririggwaawo emirembe gyonna; n’entebe ye ey’obwakabaka enaabeerangawo emirembe gyonna okufaanana ng’enjuba. 
Psalms89:37 Entebe ye ey’obwakabaka erinywezebwa emirembe n’emirembe, ng’omwezi ku ggulu era nga ye mujulirwa wange omwesigwa." 
Psalms89:38 Naye kaakano, gwe wafukako amafuta omusudde, omukyaye era omunyiigidde." 
Psalms89:39 Endagaano gye wakola n’omuweereza wo wagimenyawo, n’engule ye n’ogisuula eri mu nfuufu." 
Psalms89:40 Wamenyaamenya bbugwe we yenna, n’oggyawo n’ebigo bye." 
Psalms89:41 Abatambuze baanyaga ebintu bye; n’afuuka ekisekererwa mu baliraanwa be. 
Psalms89:42 Wayimusa omukono gw’abalabe be ogwa ddyo, n’osanyusa abalabe be bonna." 
Psalms89:43 Wakyusa ekitala kye n’otomuyamba mu lutalo. 
Psalms89:44 Ekitiibwa kye wakikomya; entebe ye ey’obwakabaka n’ogisuula wansi. 
Psalms89:45 Ennaku z’obuvuka bwe wazisalako, n’omuswaza." 
Psalms89:46 Ayi Mukama, olyekweka ennaku zonna? Obusungu bwo obubuubuuka ng’omuliro bulikoma ddi?" 
Psalms89:47 Jjukira ekiseera ky’obulamu bwange nga bwe kiri ekimpi. Wateganira bwereere okutonda abantu bonna! 
Psalms89:48 Muntu ki omulamu atalifa, omuntu asobola okwewonya okufa n’awangula amaanyi g’emagombe?" 
Psalms89:49 Ayi Mukama, okwagala kwo okw’edda okutaggwaawo, kwe walayirira Dawudi mu bwesigwa bwo, kuli luuyi wa?" 
Psalms89:50 Ayi Mukama, jjukira abaweereza bo nga basekererwa, engeri abantu ab’omu mawanga amangi, bwe banzitoowerera mu mutima nga banvuma;" 
Psalms89:51 abalabe bo banvuma, Ayi Mukama; ne bajerega oyo gwe wafukako amafuta, nga bamukijjanya buli gy’alaga." 
Psalms89:52 Mukama atenderezebwenga emirembe gyonna! Amiina era Amiina! 
Psalms90:1 Ayi Mukama, obadde kifo kyaffe eky’okubeeramu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms90:2 Ensozi nga tezinnabaawo, n’ensi yonna nga tonnagitonda; okuva ku ntandikwa okutuusa ku nkomerero y’emirembe gyonna, ggwe Katonda." 
Psalms90:3 Omuntu omuzzaayo mu nfuufu, n’oyogera nti, “Mudde mu nfuufu, mmwe abaana b’abantu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Kubanga emyaka olukumi, gy’oli giri ng’olunaku olumu olwayita, oba ng’ekisisimuka mu kiro." 
Psalms90:5 Obeera n’obamalirawo ddala nga bali mu tulo otw’okufa. Ku makya baba ng’omuddo omuto. 
Psalms90:6 Ku makya guba munyirivu, naye olw’eggulo ne guwotoka ne gukala." 
Psalms90:7 Ddala ddala obusungu bwo butumalawo, n’obukambwe bwo bututiisa nnyo." 
Psalms90:8 Ebyonoono byaffe obyanjadde mu maaso go, n’ebyo bye tukoze mu kyama obyanise awo w’oli." 
Psalms90:9 Ddala ddala tumala ennaku z’obulamu bwaffe zonna ng’otunyiigidde; tukomekkereza emyaka gyaffe n’okusinda. 
Psalms90:10 Obungi bw’ennaku zaffe gy’emyaka nsanvu, oba kinaana bwe tubaamu amaanyi. Naye emyaka egyo gijjula ennaku n’okutegana, era giyita mangu, olwo nga tuggwaawo." 
Psalms90:11 Ani amanyi amaanyi g’obusungu bwo? Kubanga ekiruyi kyo kingi ng’ekitiibwa kye tusaana okukuwa bwe kyenkana. 
Psalms90:12 Otuyigirize okutegeeranga obulungi ennaku zaffe, tulyoke tubeere n’omutima ogw’amagezi." 
Psalms90:13 Ayi Mukama, komawo gye tuli. Olitusuula kutuusa ddi? Abaweereza bo bakwatirwe ekisa." 
Psalms90:14 Tujjuze okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo ku makya, tulyoke tuyimbenga nga tujaguza n’essanyu era tusanyukenga obulamu bwaffe bwonna." 
Psalms90:15 Tusanyuse, Ayi Mukama, okumala ennaku nga ze tumaze ng’otubonyaabonya, era n’okumala emyaka nga gye tumaze nga tulaba ennaku." 
Psalms90:16 Ebikolwa byo biragibwe abaweereza bo, n’abaana baabwe balabe ekitiibwa kyo." 
Psalms90:17 Okusaasira kwo, Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, kubeerenga ku ffe, otusobozesenga okutuukiriza obulungi emirimu gyaffe; weewaawo, otusobozesenga okutuukiriza obulungi emirimu gyaffe." 
Psalms91:1 Oyo abeera mu kifo eky’ekyama eky’oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo; aliwumulira mu kisiikirize kya Katonda Ayinzabyonna. 
Psalms91:2 Nnaayogeranga ku Mukama nti, Oli kiddukiro kyange era ekigo kyange; ggwe Katonda wange gwe nneesiga." 
Psalms91:3 Ddala ddala y’anaakuwonyanga omutego gw’omuyizzi, ne kawumpuli azikiriza." 
Psalms91:4 Alikubikka n’ebyoya bye, era mu biwaawaatiro bye mw’onoddukiranga; obwesigwa bwe bunaabanga ngabo yo okukukuumanga." 
Psalms91:5 Tootyenga ntiisa ya kiro, wadde akasaale akalasibwa emisana;" 
Psalms91:6 newaakubadde olumbe olusoobasooba mu kizikiza, wadde kawumpuli azikiriza mu ttuntu." 
Psalms91:7 Abantu olukumi balifiira ku lusegere lwo, n’omutwalo ne bafiira ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo, naye olumbe terulikutuukako." 
Psalms91:8 Olitunuulira butunuulizi n’amaaso go; n’olaba ekibonerezo ky’omukozi w’ebibi. 
Psalms91:9 Kubanga bw’olifuula Mukama ekiddukiro kyo; Ali Waggulu Ennyo n’omufuula ekifo kyo mw’obeera," 
Psalms91:10 tewali kabi kalikutuukako, so tewali kibonoobono kirisemberera nnyumba yo." 
Psalms91:11 Kubanga Mukama aliragira bamalayika be bakukuume mu makubo go gonna. 
Psalms91:12 Balikuwanirira mu mikono gyabwe; oleme okwekoona ekigere kyo ku jjinja. 
Psalms91:13 Olirinnya ku mpologoma ne ku nswera; olirinnyirira empologoma ey’amaanyi, n’omusota." 
Psalms91:14 “Olw’okuba nga njagala kyendiva muwonya; nnaamukuumanga, kubanga amanyi erinnya lyange." 
Psalms91:15 Anankowoolanga ne muyitabanga; nnaabeeranga naye mu biseera eby’akabi. Ndimuwonya era ndimuwa ekitiibwa. 
Psalms91:16 Ndimuwangaaza n’asanyuka era ndimulaga obulokozi bwange.” 
Psalms92:1 Kirungi okwebazanga Mukama, n’okuyimba ennyimba n’okutenderezanga erinnya lyo, Ayi Ggwe, Ali Waggulu Ennyo;" 
Psalms92:2 okutendanga okwagala kwo okutakoma buli nkya, n’okutendanga obwesigwa bwo buli kiro." 
Psalms92:3 Okukutenderezanga n’amaloboozi g’enkoba z’ennanga n’endere awamu n’entongooli. 
Psalms92:4 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, onkoledde ebinsanyusizza; kyenva nkuyimbira n’essanyu olw’emirimu gy’emikono gyo." 
Psalms92:5 Emirimu gyo nga mikulu, Ayi Mukama; ebirowoozo byo nga tebitegeerekeka!" 
Psalms92:6 Omuntu atalina magezi tamanyi; n’omusirusiru kino tasobola kukitegeera; 
Psalms92:7 newaakubadde ng’abakola ebibi baloka ng’omuddo, n’aboonoonyi bonna ne bafuna ebirungi, boolekedde okuzikirira okw’emirembe n’emirembe!" 
Psalms92:8 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama, ogulumizibwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms92:9 Kubanga abalabe bo, Ayi Mukama, abalabe bo balizikirira, abakola ebibi bonna balisaasaanyizibwa." 
Psalms92:10 Naye nze wanfuula wa maanyi okwenkana embogo, n’onfukako amafuta amalungi." 
Psalms92:11 Amaaso gaalaba bbugwe ng’agwa ku balabe bange; n’amatu gange gawulidde akabi akatuuse ku abo abanjigganya. 
Psalms92:12 Abatuukirivu balyegolola ng’enkindu, ne bakula ne bawanvuwa ng’emivule gy’e Lebanooni." 
Psalms92:13 Egisimbibwa mu nnyumba ya Mukama. Baligimukira mu mpya za Katonda waffe. 
Psalms92:14 Ne mu bukadde bwabwe balibala ebibala; baliba balamu era abagimu," 
Psalms92:15 kiryoke kitegeeze nti, Mukama w’amazima, lwe Lwazi lwange era mu ye temuli butali butuukirivu." 
Psalms93:1 Mukama afuga; ayambadde ekitiibwa. Mukama ayambadde ekitiibwa era yeesibye amaanyi. Ensi yanywezebwa; teyinza kunyeenyezebwa. 
Psalms93:2 Entebe yo ey’obwakabaka yanywezebwa okuva edda n’edda. Ggwe, Ayi Katonda, oli wa mirembe na mirembe." 
Psalms93:3 Amayengo gatumbidde, Ayi Mukama; ennyanja ziyimusizza amaloboozi gaazo, n’amazzi g’ennyanja gayira." 
Psalms93:4 Mukama, Ali Waggulu Ennyo, oli wa maanyi okusinga okuyira kw’amazzi amangi; oli wa maanyi okusinga amayengo g’ennyanja." 
Psalms93:5 Ayi Mukama ebiragiro byo binywevu, n’obutukuvu bujjudde ennyumba yo, ennaku zonna." 
Psalms94:1 Ayi Mukama, ggwe Katonda awalana eggwanga, ggwe Katonda awalana eggwanga, labika omasemase." 
Psalms94:2 Golokoka, Ayi ggwe Omulamuzi w’ensi, osasule ab’amalala nga bwe kibagwanidde." 
Psalms94:3 Ayi Mukama, omukozi w’ebibi alikomya ddi? Omukozi w’ebibi alituusa ddi ng’asanyuka?" 
Psalms94:4 Bafukumula ebigambo eby’okwewaanawaana; abakola ebibi bonna beepankapanka. 
Psalms94:5 Babetenta abantu bo, Ayi Mukama, babonyaabonya ezzadde lyo." 
Psalms94:6 Batta nnamwandu n’omutambuze; ne batemula ataliiko kitaawe. 
Psalms94:7 Ne boogera nti, “Katonda talaba; Katonda wa Yakobo tafaayo.”" 
Psalms94:8 Mwerinde mmwe abantu abatategeera. Mmwe abasirusiru muligeziwala ddi? 
Psalms94:9 Oyo eyatonda okutu tawulira? Oyo eyakola eriiso talaba? 
Psalms94:10 Oyo akangavvula amawanga, taakubonereze? Oyo ayigiriza abantu talina ky’amanyi?" 
Psalms94:11 Mukama amanyi ebirowoozo by’abantu; amanyi nga mukka bukka. 
Psalms94:12 Ayi Mukama, alina omukisa oyo gw’ogunjula, gw’oyigiriza eby’omu mateeka go;" 
Psalms94:13 omuwummuzaako mu kabi kaalimu, okutuusa abakola ebibi lwe balisimirwa ekinnya." 
Psalms94:14 Kubanga Mukama talireka bantu be; talyabulira zzadde lye. 
Psalms94:15 Aliramula mu butuukirivu, n’abo abalina emitima emigolokofu bwe banaakolanga." 
Psalms94:16 Ani alinnwanyisizaako abakola ebibi? Ani alinnwanirira eri abakola ebibi? 
Psalms94:17 Singa Mukama teyali mubeezi wange, omwoyo gwange gwandiserengese emagombe." 
Psalms94:18 Bwe naleekaana nti, “Nseerera!” Okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo, Ayi Mukama, ne kumpanirira." 
Psalms94:19 Ebyeraliikiriza omutima gwange bwe byayitirira obungi, okusaasira kwo ne kuzzaamu omwoyo gwange amaanyi." 
Psalms94:20 Oyinza okukolagana n’obufuzi obukyamu, obukaabya abantu n’amateeka gaabwe?" 
Psalms94:21 Abakola ebibi beegatta ne balumbagana abatuukirivu; atasobezza ne bamusalira ogw’okufa. 
Psalms94:22 Naye Mukama afuuse ekiddukiro kyange eky’amaanyi; ye Katonda wange, era Olwazi lwange mwe neekweka." 
Psalms94:23 Mukama alibabonereza olw’ebibi byabwe, n’abazikiriza olw’ebyonoono byabwe; Mukama Katonda waffe alibamalirawo ddala." 
Psalms95:1 Mujje tuyimbire Mukama; tuyimbire waggulu n’essanyu nga tutendereza Mukama Olwazi olw’obulokozi bwaffe. 
Psalms95:2 Tujje mu maaso ge n’okwebaza; tumuyimbire ennyimba ez’okumutendereza. 
Psalms95:3 Kubanga Mukama ye Katonda Omukulu; era Kabaka Omukulu asinga bakatonda bonna. 
Psalms95:4 Enkonko ez’ensi ziri mu mukono gwe; n’entikko z’ensozi nazo zize. 
Psalms95:5 Ennyanja yiye, kubanga ye yagikola; n’emikono gye, gye gyabumba olukalu." 
Psalms95:6 Mujje tusinze tuvuuname mu maaso ge; tufukamire mu maaso ga Mukama, Omutonzi waffe." 
Psalms95:7 Kubanga ye Katonda waffe, naffe tuli bantu ab’omu ddundiro lye, era tuli ndiga ze z’alabirira. Olwa leero bwe muwulira eddoboozi lye," 
Psalms95:8 “Temukakanyaza mitima gyammwe nga bwe kyali e Meriba, ne ku lunaku luli e Maasa mu ddungu;" 
Psalms95:9 bajjajjammwe gye bangezesa; newaakubadde baali baalaba dda ebyamagero bye nakola. 
Psalms95:10 Abantu b’omulembe ogwo ne mbasunguwalira okumala emyaka amakumi ana; ne ŋŋamba nti, ‘Be bantu abakyama mu mutima gwabwe, era tebamanyi makubo gange.’" 
Psalms95:11 Kyennava ndayira nga nsunguwadde nti, ‘Tebaliyingira mu kiwummulo kyange.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Muyimbire Mukama oluyimba oluggya; muyimbire Mukama mmwe ensi yonna. 
Psalms96:2 Muyimbire Mukama; mutendereze erinnya lye, mulangirire obulokozi bwe buli lukya." 
Psalms96:3 Mutende ekitiibwa kye mu mawanga gonna, eby’amagero bye mubimanyise abantu bonna." 
Psalms96:4 Kubanga Mukama mukulu era asaanira nnyo okutenderezebwa; asaana okutiibwa okusinga bakatonda bonna. 
Psalms96:5 Kubanga bakatonda bonna abakolebwa abantu bifaananyi bufaananyi; naye Mukama ye yakola eggulu. 
Psalms96:6 Ekitiibwa n’obukulu bimwetooloola; amaanyi n’obulungi biri mu nnyumba ye entukuvu. 
Psalms96:7 Mugulumize Mukama mmwe ebika eby’amawanga byonna; mutende ekitiibwa kya Mukama awamu n’amaanyi ge. 
Psalms96:8 Mugulumize Mukama mu ngeri esaanira erinnya lye; muleete ekiweebwayo mujje mu mbuga ze. 
Psalms96:9 Musinze Mukama mu kitiibwa eky’obutuukirivu bwe. Ensi yonna esinze Mukama n’okukankana. 
Psalms96:10 Mutegeeze amawanga gonna nti Mukama y’afuga. Ensi nnywevu, tewali asobola kuginyeenyaako; Mukama aliramula abantu mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms96:11 Kale eggulu lisanyuke n’ensi ejaguze; ennyanja eyire ne byonna ebigirimu. 
Psalms96:12 Ennimiro n’ebirime ebizirimu bijaguze; n’emiti gyonna egy’omu kibira nagyo gimutendereze n’ennyimba ez’essanyu. 
Psalms96:13 Kubanga Mukama ajja; ajja okusalira ensi omusango. Mukama aliramula ensi mu butuukirivu, n’abantu bonna abalamule mu mazima." 
Psalms97:1 Mukama afuga; ensi esanyuke, n’embalama eziri ewala zijaguze." 
Psalms97:2 Ebire n’ekizikiza bimwetooloola; obutuukirivu n’obwenkanya gwe musingi gw’entebe y’obwakabaka bwe. 
Psalms97:3 Omuliro gumukulembera ne gwokya abalabe be ku njuyi zonna. 
Psalms97:4 Okumyansa kwe kumulisa ensi; ensi n’ekulaba n’ekankana. 
Psalms97:5 Ensozi zisaanuuka ng’envumbo awali Mukama, mu maaso ga Mukama ow’ensi yonna." 
Psalms97:6 Eggulu lirangirira obutuukirivu bwe; n’abantu bonna ne balaba ekitiibwa kye. 
Psalms97:7 Abasinza ebifaananyi ebikole n’emikono bonna baswadde, abo abeenyumiririza mu bifaananyi ebyole. Mumusinze mwe mwenna bakatonda." 
Psalms97:8 Sayuuni akiwulira n’asanyuka, n’ebyalo bya Yuda bijaguza; kubanga ogoberera eby’ensonga, Ayi Katonda." 
Psalms97:9 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, oli waggulu nnyo okusinga ensi; ogulumizibwa okusinga bakatonda bonna." 
Psalms97:10 Abo abaagala Mukama bakyawa ekibi, akuuma obulamu bw’abamwesiga, n’abawonya okuva mu mukono gw’omukozi w’ebibi." 
Psalms97:11 Omusana gwe gwakira abatuukirivu, n’abalina omutima ogw’amazima bajjula essanyu." 
Psalms97:12 Musanyukirenga mu Mukama mmwe abatuukirivu, era mwebazenga erinnya lye ettukuvu." 
Psalms98:1 Muyimbire Mukama oluyimba oluggya, kubanga akoze eby’ekitalo. Omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, era omukono omutukuvu, gumuwadde obuwanguzi." 
Psalms98:2 Mukama ayolesezza obulokozi bwe, era abikkulidde amawanga obutuukirivu bwe." 
Psalms98:3 Ajjukidde okwagala kwe okutakoma n’obwesigwa bwe eri ennyumba ya Isirayiri. Enkomerero z’ensi yonna zirabye obulokozi bwa Katonda waffe. 
Psalms98:4 Muyimbire Mukama n’essanyu lingi mwe ensi yonna; muyimbe ennyimba mu maloboozi ag’essanyu. 
Psalms98:5 Mutendereze Mukama n’ennanga ez’enkoba; n’ennanga ez’enkoba n’amaloboozi ag’okuyimba," 
Psalms98:6 n’amakondeere n’eddoboozi ly’eŋŋombe. Muyimbe n’essanyu mu maaso ga Mukama era Kabaka. 
Psalms98:7 Ennyanja eyire ne byonna ebigirimu, n’ensi ne byonna ebigirimu bijaguze." 
Psalms98:8 Emigga gikube mu ngalo n’ensozi zonna ziyimbire wamu olw’essanyu; 
Psalms98:9 byonna biyimbe mu maaso ga Mukama, kubanga ajja okulamula ensi. Aliramula ensi mu butuukirivu; aliramula amawanga mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms99:1 Mukama afuga, amawanga gakankane; atuula wakati wa bakerubi, ensi ekankane." 
Psalms99:2 Mukama mukulu mu Sayuuni; agulumizibwa mu mawanga gonna. 
Psalms99:3 Amawanga gonna gatendereze erinnya lyo ekkulu era ery’entiisa. Mukama mutukuvu. 
Psalms99:4 Ye Kabaka ow’amaanyi, ayagala obwenkanya. Onywezezza obwenkanya; era by’okoledde Yakobo bya bwenkanya era bituufu." 
Psalms99:5 Mumugulumize Mukama Katonda waffe; mumusinzize wansi w’entebe y’ebigere bye. Mukama mutukuvu. 
Psalms99:6 Musa ne Alooni baali bamu ku bakabona be; ne Samwiri yali mu abo abaakoowoolanga erinnya lye; baasabanga Mukama n’abaanukula. 
Psalms99:7 Yayogera nabo mu mpagi ey’ekire; baagondera amateeka ge n’ebiragiro bye, bye yabawa." 
Psalms99:8 Ayi Mukama Katonda waffe, wabaanukulanga; n’obeeranga Katonda asonyiwa eri Isirayiri, newaakubadde wababonerezanga olw’ebikolwa byabwe ebibi." 
Psalms99:9 Mugulumizenga Mukama Katonda waffe, mumusinzizenga ku lusozi lwe olutukuvu, kubanga Mukama Katonda waffe mutukuvu." 
Psalms100:1 Muleetere Mukama eddoboozi ery’essanyu mmwe ensi zonna. 
Psalms100:2 Muweereze Mukama n’essanyu; mujje mu maaso ge n’ennyimba ez’essanyu. 
Psalms100:3 Mumanye nga Mukama ye Katonda; ye yatutonda, tuli babe, tuli bantu be era endiga ez’omu ddundiro lye." 
Psalms100:4 Muyingire mu miryango gye nga mwebaza, ne mu mpya ze n’okutendereza; mumwebaze mutendereze erinnya lye." 
Psalms100:5 Kubanga Mukama mulungi, n’okwagala kwe kwa lubeerera; n’obwesigwa bwe bwa mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms101:1 Nnaayimbanga ku kwagala kwo n’obutuukirivu bwo; nnaayimbiranga ggwe, Ayi Mukama." 
Psalms101:2 Nneegenderezanga, mu bulamu bwange ne nkola eby’obutuukirivu, naye olijja ddi gye ndi? Nnaabeeranga mu nnyumba yange nga siriiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
Psalms101:3 Sijjanga kwereetereza kintu kyonna ekibi. Nkyayira ddala ebikolwa by’abo abava mu kkubo lyo; sijjanga kubyeteekako. 
Psalms101:4 Sijjanga kuba mukuusa; ekibi nnaakyewaliranga ddala. 
Psalms101:5 Oyo alyolyoma muliraanwa we mu kyama, nnaamuzikiririzanga ddala; amaaso ag’amalala n’omutima ogw’amalala sijja kubigumiikirizanga." 
Psalms101:6 Abeesigwa abali mu nsi yaffe nnaabasanyukiranga, balyoke babeerenga nange; akola eby’obutuukirivu y’anamperezanga." 
Psalms101:7 Atayogera mazima taabeerenga mu nnyumba yange. Omuntu alimba sirimuganya kwongera kubeera nange. 
Psalms101:8 Buli nkya nnaazikirizanga abakola ebibi bonna mu nsi, bwe ntyo abakozi b’ebibi ne mbamalirawo ddala mu kibuga kya Mukama." 
Psalms102:1 Wulira okusaba kwange, Ayi Mukama, okkirize okukoowoola kwange kutuuke gy’oli." 
Psalms102:2 Tonneekweka mu biseera eby’obuyinike bwange. Ntegera okutu kwo onnyanukule mangu bwe nkukoowoola! 
Psalms102:3 Kubanga ennaku zange zifuumuuka ng’omukka, n’amagumba gange gaaka ng’amanda." 
Psalms102:4 Omutima gwange gulinnyirirwa ng’omuddo, era guwotose; neerabira n’okulya emmere yange." 
Psalms102:5 Olw’okwaziirana kwange okunene, nzenna nfuuse ŋŋumbagumba."
