Psalms102:6 Ndi ng’ekiwuugulu eky’omu ddungu, era ng’ekiwuugulu eky’omu nsiko." 
Psalms102:7 Nsula ntunula, nga ndi ng’ekinyonyi ekitudde kyokka ku kasolya k’ennyumba." 
Psalms102:8 Abalabe bange banvuma olunaku lwonna; abo abanduulira bakozesa linnya lyange nga bakolima. 
Psalms102:9 Kubanga ndya evvu ng’alya emmere, n’amaziga gange ne geegattika mu kyokunywa kyange." 
Psalms102:10 Olw’obusungu n’okunyiiga kwo; onneegobyeko n’onsuula eyo. 
Psalms102:11 Ennaku zange ziri ng’ekisiikirize ky’olweggulo nga buziba; mpotoka ng’omuddo. 
Psalms102:12 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama, obeera mu ntebe yo ey’obwakabaka emirembe n’emirembe; erinnya lyo linajjukirwanga ab’omu mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms102:13 Olisituka n’osaasira Sayuuni, kino kye kiseera okulaga Sayuuni omukwano; ekiseera kye wateekateeka kituuse." 
Psalms102:14 Kubanga amayinja gaakyo abaweereza bo bagaagala nnyo, n’enfuufu y’omu kibuga ekyo ebakwasa ekisa." 
Psalms102:15 Amawanga gonna ganaatyanga erinnya lya Mukama; ne bakabaka bonna ab’ensi banaakankananga olw’ekitiibwa kyo. 
Psalms102:16 Kubanga Mukama alizimba Sayuuni buto, era n’alabika mu kitiibwa kye." 
Psalms102:17 Alyanukula okusaba kw’abanaku; talinyooma kwegayirira kwabwe. 
Psalms102:18 Bino leka biwandiikirwe ab’omu mirembe egirijja, abantu abatannatondebwa bwe balibisoma balyoke batendereze Mukama." 
Psalms102:19 Bategeere nti Mukama yatunula wansi ng’asinziira waggulu mu kifo kye ekitukuvu; Mukama yasinzira mu ggulu n’atunuulira ensi," 
Psalms102:20 okuwulira okusinda kw’abasibe, n’okusumulula abo abasaliddwa ogw’okufa." 
Psalms102:21 Erinnya lya Mukama, liryoke litenderezebwe mu Sayuuni, bamutenderezenga mu Yerusaalemi;" 
Psalms102:22 abantu nga bakuŋŋaanye, awamu n’obwakabaka, okusinza Mukama." 
Psalms102:23 Mukama ammazeemu amaanyi nga nkyali muvubuka; akendeezezza ku nnaku z’obulamu bwange. 
Psalms102:24 Ne ndyoka mmukaabira nti, “Ayi Katonda wange, tontwala nga nkyali mu makkati g’emyaka gy’obulamu bwange, ggw’abeera omulamu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms102:25 Ku ntandikwa wassaawo omusingi gw’ensi; n’eggulu gy’emirimu gy’emikono gyo. 
Psalms102:26 Byonna biriggwaawo, naye ggwe oli wa lubeerera. Byonna birikaddiwa ng’ebyambalo. Olibikyusa ng’ebyambalo, ne bisuulibwa." 
Psalms102:27 Naye ggwe tokyuka oli wa lubeerera n’emyaka gyo tegirikoma. 
Psalms102:28 Abaana b’abaweereza bo baliba mu ddembe; ne bazzukulu baabwe banaabeeranga w’oli nga tebalina kye batya.” 
Psalms103:1 Weebaze Mukama, ggwe emmeeme yange; ne byonna ebiri mu nze byebaze erinnya lye ettukuvu." 
Psalms103:2 Weebaze Mukama, ggwe emmeeme yange, era teweerabiranga birungi bye byonna." 
Psalms103:3 Asonyiwa ebibi byo byonna, n’awonya n’endwadde zo zonna." 
Psalms103:4 Anunula obulamu bwo emagombe, n’akusaasira era n’akwagala n’okwagala okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms103:5 Awa emmeeme yo ebintu ebirungi byeyagala; obuvubuka bwo ne budda buggya ng’empungu. 
Psalms103:6 Mukama asala mu butuukirivu ne mu bwenkanya, ensonga z’abo bonna abajoogebwa." 
Psalms103:7 Yamanyisa Musa ebyo by’ayagala, n’alaga abaana ba Isirayiri ebikolwa bye." 
Psalms103:8 Mukama wa kisa era ajjudde okusaasira, tasunguwala mangu, era alina okwagala okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms103:9 Taasibenga busungu ku mwoyo, era tasunguwala kumala bbanga lyonna." 
Psalms103:10 Tatukola ng’okwonoona kwaffe bwe kuli, wadde okutusasula ng’ebikolwa byaffe ebitali bya butuukirivu bwe biri." 
Psalms103:11 Ng’eggulu bwe litumbidde ennyo waggulu w’ensi, n’okwagala kwe bwe kuli okunene bwe kutyo eri abo abamutya." 
Psalms103:12 Ebibi byaffe abituggyako n’abitwala wala ng’ebuvanjuba bw’eri ewala okuva ebugwanjuba. 
Psalms103:13 Kitaawe w’abaana nga bw’asaasira abaana be, ne Mukama bw’atyo bw’asaasira abo abamutya." 
Psalms103:14 Kubanga amanyi nga bwe twakolebwa era ng’ajjukira nti tuli nfuufu. 
Psalms103:15 Wabula omuntu, ennaku z’obulamu bwe ziri ng’omuddo; akula n’agimuka ng’ekimuli eky’omu nnimiro;" 
Psalms103:16 empewo ekifuuwa, ne kifa; nga ne we kyali tewakyajjukirwa." 
Psalms103:17 Naye okwagala kwa Katonda eri abo abamutya tekuggwaawo emirembe gyonna, n’obulokozi bwe eri abaana b’abaana baabwe." 
Psalms103:18 Be bo abakuuma endagaano ye ne bajjukira okugondera amateeka ge. 
Psalms103:19 Mukama anywezezza entebe ye ey’obwakabaka mu ggulu, n’obwakabaka bwe bufuga ensi yonna." 
Psalms103:20 Mwebaze Mukama mmwe bamalayika be, mmwe ab’amaanyi abakola ky’agamba, era abagondera ekigambo kye." 
Psalms103:21 Mwebaze Mukama mmwe amaggye ge ag’omu ggulu, mmwe abaweereza be abakola by’ayagala." 
Psalms103:22 Mwebaze Mukama, mmwe ebitonde bye byonna ebiri mu matwale ge gonna. Weebaze Mukama, ggwe emmeeme yange." 
Psalms104:1 Weebaze Mukama, ggwe emmeeme yange. Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, oli mukulu nnyo; ojjudde obukulu n’ekitiibwa." 
Psalms104:2 Yeebika ekitangaala ng’ayeebikka ekyambalo n’abamba eggulu ng’eweema," 
Psalms104:3 n’ateeka akasolya k’ebisulo bye eby’oku ntikko kungulu ku mazzi; ebire abifuula amagaali ge, ne yeebagala ebiwaawaatiro by’empewo." 
Psalms104:4 Afuula empewo ababaka be, n’ennimi z’omuliro ogwaka abaweereza be." 
Psalms104:5 Yassaawo ensi ku misingi gyayo; teyinza kunyeenyezebwa. 
Psalms104:6 Wagibikkako obuziba ng’ekyambalo; amazzi ne gatumbiira okuyisa ensozi ennene. 
Psalms104:7 Bwe wagaboggolera ne gadduka; bwe gaawulira okubwatuka kwo ne gaddukira ddala; 
Psalms104:8 gaakulukutira ku nsozi ennene, ne gakkirira wansi mu biwonvu mu bifo bye wagategekera." 
Psalms104:9 Wagassizaawo ensalo ze gatasaana kusukka, na kuddayo kubuutikira nsi." 
Psalms104:10 Alagira ensulo ne zisindika amazzi mu biwonvu; ne gakulukutira wakati w’ensozi. 
Psalms104:11 Ne ganywesa ebisolo byonna eby’omu nsiko; n’endogoyi ne gazimalako ennyonta. 
Psalms104:12 Ebinyonyi eby’omu bbanga bizimba ebisu byabyo ku mabbali g’amazzi, ne biyimbira mu matabi." 
Psalms104:13 Afukirira ensozi ennene ng’osinziira waggulu gy’obeera; ensi n’ekkuta ebibala by’emirimu gyo. 
Psalms104:14 Olagira omuddo ne gukula okuliisa ente, n’ebirime abantu bye balima, balyoke bafune ebyokulya okuva mu ttaka." 
Psalms104:15 Ne wayini okusanyusa omutima gwe, n’ebizigo okwesiiga awoomye endabika ye, n’emmere okumuwa obulamu." 
Psalms104:16 Emiti gya Mukama gifuna amazzi mangi; gy’emivule gy’e Lebanooni gye yasimba. 
Psalms104:17 Omwo ebinyonyi mwe bizimba ebisu byabyo; ne ssekanyolya asula mu miti omwo. 
Psalms104:18 Ku nsozi empanvu eyo embulabuzi ez’omu nsiko gye zibeera; n’enjazi kye kiddukiro ky’obumyu. 
Psalms104:19 Wakola omwezi okutegeeza ebiro; n’enjuba bw’egwa n’eraga olunaku. 
Psalms104:20 Oleeta ekizikiza, ne buba ekiro; olwo ebisolo byonna eby’omu bibira ne biryoka bivaayo." 
Psalms104:21 Empologoma ento zikaabira emmere gye zinaalya; nga zinoonya ebyokulya okuva eri Katonda. 
Psalms104:22 Enjuba bw’evaayo ne zigenda, n’oluvannyuma ne zikomawo ne zigalamira mu mpuku zaazo." 
Psalms104:23 Abantu ne bagenda ku mirimu gyabwe, ne bakola okutuusa akawungeezi." 
Psalms104:24 Ayi Mukama, ebintu bye wakola nga bingi nnyo! Byonna wabikola n’amagezi ag’ekitalo; ensi ejjudde ebitonde byo." 
Psalms104:25 Waliwo ennyanja, nnene era ngazi, ejjudde ebitonde ebitabalika, ebintu ebirina obulamu ebinene era n’ebitono." 
Psalms104:26 Okwo amaato kwe gaseeyeeyera nga galaga eno n’eri; ne galukwata ge wakola mwe gabeera okuzannyiranga omwo. 
Psalms104:27 Ebyo byonna bitunuulira ggwe okubiwa emmere yaabyo ng’ekiseera kituuse. 
Psalms104:28 Bw’ogibiwa, nga bigikuŋŋaanya; bw’oyanjuluza engalo zo n’obigabira ebintu ebirungi ne bikkusibwa." 
Psalms104:29 Bw’okweka amaaso go ne byeraliikirira nnyo; bw’obiggyamu omukka nga bifa, nga biddayo mu nfuufu." 
Psalms104:30 Bw’oweereza Omwoyo wo, ne bifuna obulamu obuggya; olwo ensi n’ogizza buggya." 
Psalms104:31 Ekitiibwa kya Katonda kibeerengawo emirembe gyonna; era Mukama asanyukirenga ebyo bye yakola. 
Psalms104:32 Atunuulira ensi, n’ekankana; bw’akwata ku nsozi ennene, ne zinyooka omukka." 
Psalms104:33 Nnaayimbiranga Mukama obulamu bwange bwonna; nnaayimbanga nga ntendereza Katonda wange ennaku zonna ze ndimala nga nkyali mulamu. 
Psalms104:34 Ebirowoozo byange, nga nfumiitiriza, bimusanyusenga; kubanga mu Mukama mwe neeyagalira." 
Psalms104:35 Naye abakola ebibi baggweewo ku nsi; aboonoonyi baleme kulabikirako ddala. Weebaze Mukama, gwe emmeeme yange. Mumutenderezenga Mukama." 
Psalms105:1 Mwebaze Mukama, mukoowoole erinnya lye; amawanga gonna mugategeeze by’akoze." 
Psalms105:2 Mumuyimbire, mumutendereze; muyimbe ku byamagero bye." 
Psalms105:3 Mumusuute, ng’erinnya lye ettukuvu muligulumiza; emitima gy’abo abanoonya Mukama gijjule essanyu." 
Psalms105:4 Munoonye Mukama n’amaanyi ge; mumunoonyenga ennaku zonna. 
Psalms105:5 Mujjukirenga eby’ekitalo bye yakola, ebyamagero bye, n’emisango gye yasala;" 
Psalms105:6 mmwe abazzukulu ba Ibulayimu, abaweereza be mmwe abaana ba Yakobo, abalonde be." 
Psalms105:7 Ye Mukama Katonda waffe; ye alamula mu nsi yonna. 
Psalms105:8 Ajjukira endagaano ye emirembe gyonna, kye kigambo kye yalagira, ekyakamala emirembe olukumi," 
Psalms105:9 ye ndagaano gye yakola ne Ibulayimu, era kye kisuubizo kye yalayirira Isaaka." 
Psalms105:10 Yakikakasa Yakobo ng’etteeka, n’akiwa Isirayiri ng’endagaano eteriggwaawo nti," 
Psalms105:11 “Ndikuwa ggwe ensi ya Kanani okuba omugabo gwo.” 
Psalms105:12 Bwe baali bakyali batono, nga si bangi n’akamu, era nga bagwira mu nsi omwo," 
Psalms105:13 baatambulatambulanga okuva mu ggwanga erimu okulaga mu ddala, ne bavanga mu bwakabaka obumu ne balaga mu bulala." 
Psalms105:14 Teyaganya muntu yenna kubayisa bubi; n’alabulanga bakabaka ku lwabwe nti," 
Psalms105:15 “Abalonde bange, ne bannabbi bange temubakolangako kabi.”" 
Psalms105:16 Yaleeta enjala mu nsi, emmere yaabwe yonna n’agizikiriza." 
Psalms105:17 N’atuma omuntu okubeesooka mu maaso, ye Yusufu eyatundibwa ng’omuddu," 
Psalms105:18 ebigere bye ne binuubulwa enjegere ze baamusibya, obulago bwe ne buteekebwa mu byuma," 
Psalms105:19 okutuusa bye yategeeza lwe byatuukirira, okutuusa ekigambo kya Mukama lwe kyamukakasa nti bye yayogera bya mazima." 
Psalms105:20 Kabaka n’atuma ne bamusumulula; omufuzi w’ensi eyo yamuggya mu kkomera. 
Psalms105:21 Yamufuula omukulu w’eby’omu maka ge, n’akulira byonna omufuzi oyo bye yalina;" 
Psalms105:22 okukangavvulanga abalangira be nga bwe yalabanga, n’okuyigiriza abakulu eby’amagezi." 
Psalms105:23 Oluvannyuma Isirayiri n’ajja mu Misiri; Yakobo bw’atyo n’atuula mu nsi ya Kaamu nga munnaggwanga. 
Psalms105:24 Mukama n’ayaza nnyo abantu be; ne baba bangi nnyo, n’abalabe baabwe ne beeraliikirira," 
Psalms105:25 n’akyusa emitima gyabwe ne bakyawa abantu be, ne basalira abaweereza be enkwe." 
Psalms105:26 Yatuma abaweereza be Musa ne Alooni, be yalonda." 
Psalms105:27 Ne bakola obubonero bwe obw’ekitalo mu bantu abo; ne bakolera ebyamagero bye mu nsi ya Kaamu. 
Psalms105:28 Yaleeta ekizikiza ensi yonna n’ekwata, kubanga baali bajeemedde ekigambo kye." 
Psalms105:29 Amazzi gaabwe yagafuula omusaayi, ne kireetera ebyennyanja byabwe okufa." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaabwe yajjula ebikere, ebyatuukira ddala ne mu bisenge by’abafuzi baabwe." 
Psalms105:31 Yalagira, ebiwuka ebya buli ngeri ne bijja, n’ensekere ne zeeyiwa mu bitundu byonna eby’ensi yaabwe." 
Psalms105:32 Yafuula enkuba okuba amayinja g’omuzira; eggulu ne libwatuka mu nsi yaabwe yonna. 
Psalms105:33 Yakuba emizeeyituuni n’emizabbibu, n’azikiriza emiti gy’omu nsi yaabwe." 
Psalms105:34 Yalagira, enzige ne zijja ne bulusejjera obutabalika muwendo." 
Psalms105:35 Ne birya buli kimera kyonna mu nsi yaabwe, na buli kisimbe kyonna mu ttaka lyabwe ne kiriibwa." 
Psalms105:36 N’azikiriza abaana ababereberye bonna mu nsi yaabwe, nga bye bibala ebisooka eby’obuvubuka bwabwe." 
Psalms105:37 Yaggya Abayisirayiri mu nsi eyo nga balina ffeeza nnyingi ne zaabu; era bonna baali ba maanyi. 
Psalms105:38 Abamisiri baasanyuka bwe baalaba Abayisirayiri nga bagenze, kubanga baali batandise okubatiira ddala." 
Psalms105:39 Yayanjuluzanga ekire ne kibabikka, n’omuliro ne gubamulisiza ekiro." 
Psalms105:40 Baamusaba, n’abaweereza enkwale era n’abaliisanga emmere eva mu ggulu ne bakkuta." 
Psalms105:41 Yayasa olwazi, amazzi ne gatiiriika, ne gakulukuta mu ddungu ng’omugga." 
Psalms105:42 Kubanga yajjukira ekisuubizo kye ekitukuvu kye yawa omuweereza we Ibulayimu. 
Psalms105:43 Abantu be yabaggyayo nga bajaguza, abalonde be nga bayimba olw’essanyu." 
Psalms105:44 Yabawa ensi eyali ey’amawanga amalala, ne basikira ebyo abalala bye baakolerera;" 
Psalms105:45 balyoke bakwatenga amateeka ge, era bagonderenga ebiragiro bye. Mumutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms106:1 Mumutendereze Mukama! Mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, kubanga okwagala kwe tekuggwaawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms106:2 Ani ayinza okwogera ku bikulu Mukama by’akola n’abimalayo, oba okumutendereza obulungi nga bw’asaanira?" 
Psalms106:3 Balina omukisa abalina obwenkanya, era abakola ebituufu bulijjo." 
Psalms106:4 Onzijukiranga, Ayi Mukama, bw’obanga okolera abantu bo ebirungi; nange onnyambe bw’olibalokola," 
Psalms106:5 ndyoke neeyagalire wamu n’abalonde bo nga bafunye ebirungi, nsanyukire wamu n’eggwanga lyo, era ntendererezenga mu bantu bo." 
Psalms106:6 Twonoonye, nga bajjajjaffe bwe baakola; tukoze ebibi ne tusobya nnyo." 
Psalms106:7 Bakadde baffe tebaafaayo kujjukira ebyamagero bye wakola nga bali mu Misiri; n’ebyekisa ebingi bye wabakolera tebaabijjukira, bwe baatuuka ku Nnyanja Emyufu ne bakujeemera." 
Psalms106:8 Naye Mukama n’abalokola, olw’erinnya lye, alyoke amanyise amaanyi g’obuyinza bwe obungi." 
Psalms106:9 Yaboggolera Ennyanja Emyufu, n’ekalira; n’abakulembera okubayisa mu buziba ng’abayita ku lukalu mu ddungu." 
Psalms106:10 Yabawonya abalabe baabwe; n’abanunula mu mikono gy’abo ababakyawa. 
Psalms106:11 Amazzi ne gabuutikira abalabe baabwe; ne wataba n’omu awona. 
Psalms106:12 Olwo ne bakkiriza ebigambo bye, bye yabasuubiza; ne bayimba nga bamutendereza." 
Psalms106:13 Waayita akabanga katono ne beerabira ebyo byonna bye yakola; ne batawulirizanga kubuulirira kwe. 
Psalms106:14 Bwe baatuuka mu ddungu, okwegomba ne kubasukkirira; ne bagezesa Katonda nga bali mu lukoola olwo." 
Psalms106:15 Bw’atyo n’abawa kye baasaba, kyokka n’abaleetera n’olumbe olw’amaanyi." 
Psalms106:16 Nga bali mu lusiisira baakwatirwa obuggya eri Musa ne Alooni abalonde ba Mukama. 
Psalms106:17 Ettaka ne lyasama ne limira Dasani; Abiraamu ne banne ne libasaanyaawo. 
Psalms106:18 Omuliro ne gukoleera ne gukwata abagoberezi baabwe; ennimi z’omuliro ne zookya aboonoonyi. 
Psalms106:19 Bwe baali e Kolebu ne beekolera ennyana; ne basinza ekifaananyi ekyo kye baakola mu byuma bye baasaanuusa. 
Psalms106:20 Ekitiibwa kya Katonda ne bakiwaanyisaamu ekibumbe ekifaanana ente erya omuddo. 
Psalms106:21 Ne beerabira Katonda eyabanunula, eyabakolera ebintu ebikulu bwe bityo mu Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 ebyamagero bye yabakolera mu nsi ya Kaamu, n’ebikolwa eby’entiisa ku Nnyanja Emyufu." 
Psalms106:23 N’agamba nti, Ajja kubazikiriza. Naye Musa, omulonde we, n’ayimirira mu maaso ge n’amwegayirira, obusungu bwe ne bumuggwaako n’atabazikiriza." 
Psalms106:24 Baanyooma eby’ensi ennungi, kubanga ekisuubizo kye tebaakirinaamu bwesige." 
Psalms106:25 Beemulugunyiriza mu weema zaabwe, ne batagondera ddoboozi lya Mukama." 
Psalms106:26 Kyeyava yeerayirira nti alibazikiririza mu ddungu," 
Psalms106:27 era nga n’abaana baabwe balisaasaanira mu mawanga ne bafiira eyo. 
Psalms106:28 Baatandika okusinza Baali e Peoli; ne balya ebyaweebwangayo eri bakatonda abataliimu bulamu. 
Psalms106:29 Ne banyiiza Katonda olw’ebikolwa byabwe ebibi; kawumpuli kyeyava abagwamu. 
Psalms106:30 Naye Finekaasi n’ayimirira wakati waabwe ne Katonda, kawumpuli n’agenda." 
Psalms106:31 Ekyo ne kimubalirwa nga kya butuukirivu emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms106:32 Bwe baatuuka okumpi n’amazzi ag’e Meriba ne banyiiza Mukama, ne baleetera Musa emitawaana;" 
Psalms106:33 kubanga baajeemera ebiragiro bye, ne kimwogeza n’ebigambo ebitaali bya magezi." 
Psalms106:34 Abantu be baalwanyisa tebaabazikiriza nga Mukama bwe yali abalagidde," 
Psalms106:35 naye beetabika n’abannaggwanga ago ne bayiga empisa zaabwe. 
Psalms106:36 Baasinza ebifaananyi ebikole n’emikono eby’amawanga ago ne bibafuukira omutego. 
Psalms106:37 Baawaayo batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe eri bakatonda abo. 
Psalms106:38 Ne bayiwa omusaayi gwa batabani baabwe ne bawala baabwe abataliiko musango, be baawangayo eri ebifaananyi ebikole n’emikono Abakanani bye baakola, ensi n’eyonoonebwa n’omusaayi gwabwe." 
Psalms106:39 Beeyonoona olw’ebyo bye baakola, ebikolwa byabwe ne bibafuula abataliimu nsa nga bavudde ku Katonda waabwe." 
Psalms106:40 Mukama kyeyava asunguwalira abantu be, n’akyawa ezzadde lye." 
Psalms106:41 N’abawaayo eri amawanga amalala, abalabe ne babafuga." 
Psalms106:42 Abalabe baabwe ne babanyigiriza, ne babatuntuza nnyo ddala." 
Psalms106:43 Yabawonyanga abalabe baabwe emirundi mingi, naye obujeemu ne bubalemeramu, ebibi byabwe ne bigenda nga bibasaanyaawo." 
Psalms106:44 Naye bwe yawulira okukaaba kwabwe, n’abakwatirwa ekisa;" 
Psalms106:45 ku lwabwe, n’ajjukira endagaano ye; okwagala kwe okungi ne kumuleetera okukyusa ekirowoozo kye." 
Psalms106:46 N’abaleetera okusaasirwa abo abaabawambanga. 
Psalms106:47 Ayi Mukama Katonda, otulokole, otukuŋŋaanye, otuggye mu mawanga, tulyoke twebazenga erinnya lyo ettukuvu, era tusanyukenga nga tukutendereza." 
Psalms106:48 Mukama atenderezebwenga, Katonda wa Isirayiri, emirembe n’emirembe. Abantu bonna ka boogere nti, “Amiina!” Mumutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms107:1 Mwebaze Mukama, kubanga mulungi; okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms107:2 Kale abanunule ba Mukama boogere bwe batyo; abo be yanunula mu mikono gy’abalabe; 
Psalms107:3 abo be yakuŋŋaanya mu mawanga; okuva Ebugwanjuba n’Ebuvanjuba, n’okuva obukiikakkono ne mu bukiikaddyo." 
Psalms107:4 Abamu baataataaganira mu malungu nga babuliddwa ekkubo eribatwala ku kibuga gye banaabeeranga. 
Psalms107:5 Baalumwa ennyonta n’enjala, obulamu bwabwe ne butandika okusereba." 
Psalms107:6 Bwe batyo ne bakaabira Mukama nga bali mu kabi; n’abawonya mu kweraliikirira kwabwe. 
Psalms107:7 Yabakulembera butereevu n’abatuusa mu kibuga mwe baabeera. 
Psalms107:8 Kale singa beebazanga Mukama olw’okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo, n’olw’eby’ekitalo by’akolera abaana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:9 Kubanga abalina ennyonta abanywesa, n’abayala abakkusa ebirungi." 
Psalms107:10 Abamu baatuulanga mu kizikiza ne mu kisiikirize eky’okufa; abasibiddwa mu byuma era abali mu nnaku ennyingi; 
Psalms107:11 kubanga baajeemera ekigambo kya Katonda, ne banyoomoola amagezi g’oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo." 
Psalms107:12 Baakozesebwa emirimu egy’amaanyi, emitima gyabwe ne gijjula obuyinike; baagwanga wansi, naye nga tebalina abasitulawo." 
Psalms107:13 Bwe batyo ne bakaabirira Mukama nga bali mu bizibu byabwe, era n’abawonya;" 
Psalms107:14 n’abaggya mu kizikiza ne mu kisiikirize eky’okufa; n’enjegere ezaali zibasibye n’azikutula. 
Psalms107:15 Kale singa beebazanga Mukama olw’okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo, n’olwebikolwa bye eby’ekitalo by’akolera abaana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:16 Kubanga enzigi ez’ebikomo azaasaayasa, n’emitayimbwa egy’ekyuma agimenyamu." 
Psalms107:17 Abamu baafuuka basirusiru olw’obujeemu bwabwe; ne babonaabona olw’ebikolwa byabwe ebibi. 
Psalms107:18 Ne batamwa emmere yonna, ne babulako katono ddala okufa." 
Psalms107:19 Bwe batyo ne bakaabirira Mukama nga bali mu buzibu obwo, n’abawonya." 
Psalms107:20 Yabatumira ekigambo kye, n’awonya endwadde zaabwe; n’abalokola mu kuzikirira." 
Psalms107:21 Kale singa beebazanga Mukama olw’okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo, n’olw’ebikolwa bye eby’ekyewuunyo by’akolera abaana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Bamuleeterenga ebiweebwayo eby’okwebaza, era batendenga ebikolwa bye n’ennyimba ez’essanyu." 
Psalms107:23 Abalala baasaabalira mu maato ku nnyanja; baali basuubuzi b’oku gayanja aganene. 
Psalms107:24 Baalaba Mukama bye yakola, ebikolwa bye eby’ekitalo mu buziba bw’ennyanja." 
Psalms107:25 Kubanga yalagira omuyaga ne gusitula amayengo waggulu. 
Psalms107:26 Ne gagulumira okutuuka ku ggulu, ate ne gakka wansi mu ddubi; akabenje ne kabayitirira, ne baggwaamu amaanyi." 
Psalms107:27 Ne beesunda, eruuyi n’eruuyi ne baba ng’omutamiivu atagala; n’amagezi ne gabaggwaako." 
Psalms107:28 Bwe batyo ne bakaabira Mukama nga bali mu buzibu; n’abawonya mu kweraliikirira kwabwe. 
Psalms107:29 Omuyaga yagusirisa, ennyanja n’etteeka." 
Psalms107:30 Ne bajjula essanyu kubanga ennyanja yateeka; n’abakulembera n’abatuusa bulungi ku mwalo gwabwe. 
Psalms107:31 Kale singa abantu beebazanga Mukama olw’okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo, n’olw’ebikolwa bye eby’ekyewuunyo by’akolera abaana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Bamugulumizenga ng’abantu bakuŋŋaanye, era bamutenderezenga mu lukiiko lw’abakulu." 
Psalms107:33 Afuula emigga amalungu, n’emikutu gy’amazzi ne giba ng’ettaka ekkalu," 
Psalms107:34 ensi engimu n’agifuula olukoola olw’olunnyo olw’obwonoonyi bw’abantu baamu. 
Psalms107:35 Eddungu yalijjuza ebidiba by’amazzi, n’ensi enkalu n’agikulukusizaamu amazzi," 
Psalms107:36 abalina enjala n’abateeka omwo, ne beezimbira ekibuga eky’okubeeramu," 
Psalms107:37 ennimiro zaabwe ne bazisigamu emmere, ne basimba emizabbibu, ne bakungula ebibala bingi." 
Psalms107:38 Yabawa omukisa gwe, ne beeyongera obungi; n’ebisibo byabwe n’atabiganya kukendeera." 
Psalms107:39 Ate ne bakendeera obungi, ne bakkakkanyizibwa olw’okujeezebwa, n’okujoogebwa n’okulaba ennaku;" 
Psalms107:40 oyo anyooma n’abakungu, n’ababungeetanyiza mu lukoola omutali kantu." 
Psalms107:41 Naye abaali mu kwetaaga yabamalako ennaku n’okubonaabona, n’ayaza ezzadde lyabwe ng’ebisibo." 
Psalms107:42 Abagolokofu, bino babiraba ne basanyuka; naye abakola ebibi bo basirika busirisi." 
Psalms107:43 Abalina amagezi bonna, bagondere ebigambo bino era bategeere okwagala kwa Mukama okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms108:1 Omutima gwange munywevu, Ayi Katonda; nnaayimbanga ne nkutendereza n’omwoyo gwange gwonna." 
Psalms108:2 Muzuukuke, mmwe entongooli n’ennanga ey’enkoba, nzija kuyimba okukeesa obudde." 
Psalms108:3 Nnaakutenderezanga, Ayi Mukama, mu bantu bonna, nnaakuyimbiranga mu mawanga gonna." 
Psalms108:4 Okwagala kwo kunene, kutumbiira okutuuka ku ggulu; n’obwesigwa bwo butuuka ku bire." 
Psalms108:5 Ogulumizibwenga, Ayi Katonda, okuyisa eggulu; n’ekitiibwa kyo kibune ensi yonna." 
Psalms108:6 Tulokole otuyambe n’omukono gwo ogwa ddyo, abo booyagala banunulibwe." 
Psalms108:7 Katonda ayogedde ng’asinziira mu kifo kye ekitukuvu n’agamba nti, “Nga nzijudde essanyu, ndisala mu Sekemu, era n’Ekiwonvu kya Sukkosi ndikigabanyagabanyaamu." 
Psalms108:8 Ensi ya Gireyaadi yange, n’eya Manase nayo yange. Efulayimu mwe muli abalwanyi bange abazira; ate mu Yuda mwe munaavanga bakabaka." 
Psalms108:9 Mowaabu be baweereza bange abawulize; ate Edomu be baddu bange; Abafirisuuti ndibaleekaanira mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka ery’obuwanguzi.” 
Psalms108:10 Ani anantuusa ku kibuga ekigumu ekinywevu? Ani anankulembera okunnyingiza mu Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Si ggwe, ayi Katonda, atusudde, atakyatabaala n’amaggye gaffe?" 
Psalms108:12 Tudduukirire nga tulwanyisa abalabe baffe, kubanga obuyambi bw’abantu temuli nsa." 
Psalms108:13 Bwe tunaabeeranga ne Katonda tunaabanga bawanguzi; kubanga y’anaalinnyiriranga abalabe baffe wansi w’ebigere bye. 
Psalms109:1 Ayi Katonda wange gwe ntendereza, tonsiriikirira." 
Psalms109:2 Kubanga abantu abakola ebibi era abalimba, banjogeddeko eby’obulimba." 
Psalms109:3 Banfukumulidde ebigambo eby’obukyayi, ne bannumbagana awatali nsonga." 
Psalms109:4 Bwe mbalaga omukwano, bo bandaga bukyayi; kyokka nze mbasabira." 
Psalms109:5 Bwe mbakolera ebirungi bo bansasulamu bibi; bwe mbalaga okwagala bo bankyawa bukyayi. 
Psalms109:6 Mumulabire omuntu omukozi w’ebibi amwolekere; wabeewo amuwawaabira. 
Psalms109:7 Bwe banaawoza, omusango gumusinge; n’okusaba kwe kufuuke kwonoona." 
Psalms109:8 Aleme kuwangaala; omuntu omulala amusikire. 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be basigalire awo nga tebaliiko kitaabwe, ne mukyala we afuuke nnamwandu." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be bataataaganenga nga bagenda basabiriza; bagobebwe ne mu bifulukwa mwe basula. 
Psalms109:11 Amubanja ajje awambe ebibye byonna; n’abagwira bamunyageko ebintu bye byonna bye yakolerera. 
Psalms109:12 Waleme kubaawo amusaasira, wadde akolera abaana be ebyekisa." 
Psalms109:13 Ezzadde lye lizikirizibwe, n’amannya g’abazzukulu be gasangulwe mu ago ag’omu mulembe oguliddirira." 
Psalms109:14 Mukama ajjukirenga ebyonoono bya bakadde be; n’ekibi kya nnyina kireme kwerabirwanga. 
Psalms109:15 Mukama ajjukirenga ebyonoono byabwe bulijjo, n’ensi ebeerabirire ddala." 
Psalms109:16 Kubanga talowoozangako kukolera muntu yenna kya kisa; naye yayigganyanga abaavu, n’abeetaaga, n’abanakuwavu n’abatuusa ne ku kufa." 
Psalms109:17 Yayagalanga nnyo okukolima; kale ebikolimo bimwefuulire. Teyayagalanga mikisa; kale gimwesambire ddala! 
Psalms109:18 Yeeteekako okukolima ng’ekyambalo, ne kumutobya ng’amazzi, ne kuyingira mu magumba ge ng’amafuta." 
Psalms109:19 Kubeerenga ng’ekyambalo ky’ayambadde, era ng’olukoba lwe yeesibye emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms109:20 Ebyo byonna y’eba ebeera empeera, Mukama gy’awa abo abandoopaloopa, era abanjogerako eby’akabi ebyereere." 
Psalms109:21 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama Katonda wange, nnwanirira olw’erinnya lyo; era omponye olw’okwagala kwo okulungi okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms109:22 Kubanga ndi mwavu era ali mu kwetaaga, n’omutima gwange gunyolwa nnyo." 
Psalms109:23 Sikyaliwo, ndi ng’ekisiikirize eky’akawungeezi; mmansuddwa eri ng’enzige." 
Psalms109:24 Amaviivi gange ganafuye olw’okusiiba; omubiri gwange gukozze ne guggwaamu ensa. 
Psalms109:25 Abandoopaloopa bansekerera; bwe bandaba nga banyeenyeza omutwe. 
Psalms109:26 Mbeera, Ayi Mukama Katonda wange! Ondokole ng’okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo bwe kuli." 
Psalms109:27 Baleke bategeere nti ggwe okikoze, n’omukono gwo Ayi Mukama." 
Psalms109:28 Balikoma, naye ggwe olimpa omukisa! Leka abannumbagana baswale, naye nze omuddu wo nga nsanyuka!" 
Psalms109:29 Abandoopa baswazibwe, n’ensonyi zaabwe zibabuzeeko obwekyusizo." 
Psalms109:30 Nneebazanga Mukama n’akamwa kange; nnaamutenderezanga wakati mu kibiina ekinene. 
Psalms109:31 Kubanga alwanirira omunaku ali mu kwetaaga, n’amuwonya abo abaagala afe." 
Psalms110:1 Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti: “Tuula wano ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe ndimala okufufuggaza abalabe bo ne mbassa wansi w’ebigere byo. ”" 
Psalms110:2 Mukama aligaziya obufuzi bwo okuva mu Sayuuni; olifuga abalabe bo. 
Psalms110:3 Abantu bo balyewaayo bokka mu ggye lyo ng’ekiseera ky’olutalo kituuse. Abavubuka bo, nga bali mu by’ekitiibwa ekitukuvu, balikukuŋŋaanirako ng’omusulo bwe gulabika ng’obudde bwakakya." 
Psalms110:4 Mukama yalayira, era tagenda kukijjulula, yagamba nti, “Olibeera kabona emirembe gyonna ng’engeri ya Merukizeddeeki bw’eri.”" 
Psalms110:5 Mukama anaakulwaniriranga; bakabaka abakulwanyisa anaababetentanga mu busungu bwe obungi. 
Psalms110:6 Aliramula amawanga, abafuzi b’ensi yonna n’abazikiriza, n’entuumo z’emirambo ziriba nnyingi ku nsi yonna." 
Psalms110:7 Alinywa amazzi mu kagga ku kkubo, n’addamu amaanyi ag’obuwanguzi." 
Psalms111:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Nneebazanga Mukama n’omutima gwange gwonna, mu lukiiko lw’abalongoofu, era ne mu lukuŋŋaana." 
Psalms111:2 Mukama by’akola bikulu; bifumiitirizibwako abo bonna ababisanyukira. 
Psalms111:3 Emirimu gye mikulu nnyo era gya kitiibwa, n’obutuukirivu bwe tebuggwaawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms111:4 Ayamba abantu okujjukira ebyamagero bye, Mukama wa kisa era ajjudde okusaasira." 
Psalms111:5 Agabira abamutya emmere; era ajjukira endagaano ye buli kiseera. 
Psalms111:6 Abantu be abalaze ng’ebikolwa bye bwe biri eby’amaanyi; n’abagabira ensi eyali ey’abannaggwanga. 
Psalms111:7 By’akola byonna bya bwesigwa era bya bwenkanya; n’amateeka ge gonna ga bwesigwa," 
Psalms111:8 manywevu emirembe gyonna; era yagassaawo nga ga bwesigwa era nga ga mazima. 
Psalms111:9 Yanunula abantu be; n’alagira endagaano ye ebeerewo emirembe gyonna. Erinnya lye ttukuvu era lya ntiisa! 
Psalms111:10 Mu kutya Mukama amagezi mwe gasookera era abo abagondera ebigambo ebyo bajjudde obutegeevu. Mukama atenderezebwenga emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms112:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Alina omukisa omuntu atya Katonda, era asanyukira ennyo mu mateeka ge." 
Psalms112:2 Abaana be baliba ba kitiibwa mu nsi; omulembe gw’abalongoofu guliweebwa omukisa. 
Psalms112:3 Ennyumba ye enejjulanga ebintu n’obugagga obungi; era anaabanga mutuukirivu ennaku zonna. 
Psalms112:4 Ne mu kizikiza, ekitangaala kyakira omulongoofu, alina ekisa, n’oyo alina okusaasira, era omutuukirivu." 
Psalms112:5 Omuntu oyo agabira abeetaaga, era tawolera magoba, era akola emirimu gye gyonna n’obwenkanya, alifuna ebirungi." 
Psalms112:6 Omutuukirivu talinyeenyezebwa, era anajjukirwanga ennaku zonna." 
Psalms112:7 Amawulire amabi tegaamutiisenga, kubanga omutima gwe munywevu gwesiga Mukama." 
Psalms112:8 Omutima gwe guteredde, tewali ky’anaatyanga, era oluvannyuma alitunuulira abalabe be n’amaaso ag’obuwanguzi." 
Psalms112:9 Agabidde abaavu bye beetaaga; mutuukirivu ebbanga lyonna; era bonna banaamussangamu ekitiibwa. 
Psalms112:10 Omubi anaabirabanga ebyo, n’asunguwala, n’aluma abugigi, naye nga talina kya kukola. Okwegomba kw’ababi tekuubengako kye kubagasa." 
Psalms113:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Mumutendereze, mmwe abaweereza be, mutendereze erinnya lya Mukama." 
Psalms113:2 Erinnya lya Mukama litenderezebwe okuva leero n’okutuusa emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms113:3 Enjuba weeviirayo okutuusa bw’egwa, erinnya lya Mukama litenderezebwenga." 
Psalms113:4 Mukama agulumizibwa okusinga amawanga gonna, era n’ekitiibwa kye kisinga eggulu." 
Psalms113:5 Ani afaanana nga Mukama Katonda waffe, atuula ku ntebe ye ey’obwakabaka eri waggulu ennyo," 
Psalms113:6 ne yeetoowaza okutunuulira eggulu n’ensi? 
Psalms113:7 Abaavu abayimusa n’abaggya mu nfuufu; n’abali mu kwetaaga n’abasitula ng’abaggya mu vvu," 
Psalms113:8 n’abatuuza wamu n’abalangira, awamu n’abalangira abo abafuga abantu be." 
Psalms113:9 Omukazi omugumba amuwa abaana, n’abeera mu maka ge n’ezzadde lye ng’ajjudde essanyu. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms114:1 Isirayiri bwe yava mu Misiri, abaana ba Yakobo abo, ne bava mu bantu abaayogeranga olulimi olutali lwabwe;" 
Psalms114:2 Yuda n’afuuka omutukuvu wa Katonda, Isirayiri n’afuuka amatwale ge." 
Psalms114:3 Ennyanja bwe yabalaba n’edduka; Omugga Yoludaani ne gudda emabega. 
Psalms114:4 Ensozi ne zibuukabuuka ng’endiga zisseddume, n’obusozi obutono ng’obuliga obuto." 
Psalms114:5 Ggwe ennyanja, lwaki wadduka? Ggwe Yoludaani, lwaki wadda emabega?" 
Psalms114:6 Mmwe ensozi, lwaki mwabuukabuuka ng’endiga zisseddume, nammwe obusozi obutono ng’obuliga obuto?" 
Psalms114:7 Kankana, ggwe ensi, mu maaso ga Mukama, mu maaso ga Katonda wa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 eyafuula olwazi ekidiba eky’amazzi, n’olwazi olugumu n’aluggyamu ensulo ez’amazzi." 
Psalms115:1 Si ffe, Ayi Mukama, si ffe. Wabula erinnya lyo lye ligwana okuweebwanga ekitiibwa, olw’okwagala kwo n’olw’obwesigwa bwo." 
Psalms115:2 Lwaki amawanga gabuuza nti, “Katonda waabwe ali ludda wa?”" 
Psalms115:3 Katonda waffe ali mu ggulu; akola buli ky’ayagala. 
Psalms115:4 Bakatonda baabwe bakole mu ffeeza ne zaabu, ebikolebwa n’emikono gy’abantu." 
Psalms115:5 Birina emimwa, naye tebyogera; birina amaaso, naye tebiraba." 
Psalms115:6 Birina amatu, naye tebiwulira; birina ennyindo, naye tebiwunyiriza." 
Psalms115:7 Birina engalo, naye tebikwata; birina ebigere, naye tebitambula; ne mu bulago bwabyo temuvaamu ddoboozi n’akamu," 
Psalms115:8 abakozi ababikola, n’abo bonna ababyesiga balibifaanana." 
Psalms115:9 Mmwe ennyumba ya Isirayiri mwesigenga Mukama, ye mubeezi wammwe era ye ngabo yammwe." 
Psalms115:10 Mmwe ennyumba ya Alooni mwesigenga Mukama, ye mubeezi wammwe era ye ngabo yammwe." 
Psalms115:11 Mmwe abamutya, mwesigenga Mukama, ye mubeezi wammwe, era ye ngabo yammwe." 
Psalms115:12 Mukama anaatujjukiranga, era anaatuwanga omukisa. Ab’ennyumba ya Isirayiri anaabawanga omukisa; ab’omu nnyumba ya Alooni anaabawanga omukisa;" 
Psalms115:13 n’abo abamutya, ab’ekitiibwa n’abatali ba kitiibwa, Mukama anaabawanga omukisa." 
Psalms115:14 Mukama abaaze mweyongere nnyo obungi, mmwe n’abaana bammwe." 
Psalms115:15 Mukama, eyakola eggulu n’ensi, abawe omukisa." 
Psalms115:16 Eggulu ery’oku ntikko lya Mukama, naye ensi yagiwa abantu bonna." 
Psalms115:17 Abafu tebatendereza Mukama, wadde abo abaserengeta emagombe." 
Psalms115:18 Naye ffe tunaatenderezanga Mukama, okuva leero n’okutuusa emirembe gyonna. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms116:1 Mukama mmwagala, kubanga awulidde eddoboozi lyange n’okwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms116:2 Kubanga ateze okutu kwe gye ndi, kyennaavanga mmukoowoola ebbanga lyonna lye ndimala nga nkyali mulamu." 
Psalms116:3 Emiguwa gy’okufa gyansiba, n’okulumwa okw’emagombe kwankwata; ne nzijula ennaku nnyingi n’okutya." 
Psalms116:4 Ne ndyoka nkoowoola erinnya lya Mukama nti, “Ayi Mukama, ndokola.”" 
Psalms116:5 Mukama wa kisa, era mutuukirivu; Katonda waffe ajjudde okusaasira." 
Psalms116:6 Mukama alabirira abantu abaabulijjo; bwe nnali mu buzibu obunene, n’andokola." 
Psalms116:7 Wummula ggwe emmeeme yange, kubanga Mukama abadde mulungi gy’oli." 
Psalms116:8 Kubanga ggwe, Ayi Mukama, owonyezza omwoyo gwange okufa, n’amaaso gange ogawonyezza okukaaba; n’ebigere byange n’obiwonya okwesittala," 
Psalms116:9 ndyoke ntambulirenga mu maaso ga Mukama mu nsi ey’abalamu. 
Psalms116:10 Nakkiriza kyennava njogera nti, “Numizibbwa nnyo.”" 
Psalms116:11 Ne njogera nga nterebuse nti, “Abantu bonna baliraba.”" 
Psalms116:12 Mukama ndimusasula ntya olw’ebirungi bye ebingi bwe bityo by’ankoledde? 
Psalms116:13 Nditoola ekikompe eky’obulokozi, ne nkoowoola erinnya lya Mukama." 
Psalms116:14 Ndituukiriza obweyamo bwange eri Mukama, mu maaso g’abantu be bonna." 
Psalms116:15 Okufa kw’abatukuvu ba Mukama kwa muwendo nnyo eri Mukama. 
Psalms116:16 Ayi Mukama, onsumuluddeko ebyansiba n’onfuula wa ddembe, nange nnaakuweerezanga ennaku zonna." 
Psalms116:17 Ndiwaayo ekiweebwayo eky’okwebaza, ne nkoowoola erinnya lya Mukama." 
Psalms116:18 Ndituukiriza obweyamo bwange eri Mukama, mu maaso g’abantu be bonna," 
Psalms116:19 mu mpya z’ennyumba ya Mukama; wakati wo, ggwe Yerusaalemi. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms117:1 Mutendereze Mukama, mmwe ensi zonna; mumugulumize, mmwe amawanga gonna." 
Psalms117:2 Kubanga okwagala kwe okutaggwaawo kungi gye tuli; n’obwesigwa bwa Mukama bwa lubeerera. Mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms118:1 Mwebaze Mukama, kubanga mulungi; okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms118:2 Kale Isirayiri ayogere nti, “Okwagala kwa Mukama kubeerera emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms118:3 N’ab’ennyumba ya Alooni boogere nti, “Okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms118:4 Abo abatya Mukama boogere nti, “Okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms118:5 Bwe nnali mu nnaku empitirivu, nakoowoola Mukama, n’annyanukula, n’agimponya." 
Psalms118:6 Mukama ali ku ludda lwange, siriiko kye ntya. Abantu bayinza kunkolako ki?" 
Psalms118:7 Mukama ali nange, ye anyamba. Abalabe bange nnaabatunuuliranga n’amaaso ag’obuwanguzi." 
Psalms118:8 Kirungi okwesiga Mukama okusinga okwesiga omuntu. 
Psalms118:9 Kirungi okuddukira eri Mukama okusinga okwesiga abalangira. 
Psalms118:10 Ensi zonna zanzinda ne zinneebungulula, naye mu linnya lya Mukama naziwangula." 
Psalms118:11 Banneebungulula enjuuyi zonna; naye mu linnya lya Mukama nabawangula. 
Psalms118:12 Bankuŋŋaanirako ne banneebungulula ng’enjuki; naye ne basirikka ng’amaggwa agakutte omuliro; mu linnya lya Mukama nabawangula. 
Psalms118:13 Bannumba n’amaanyi mangi, ne mbulako katono okugwa; naye Mukama n’annyamba." 
Psalms118:14 Mukama ge maanyi gange, era lwe luyimba lwange, afuuse obulokozi bwange." 
Psalms118:15 Muwulire ennyimba ez’essanyu ez’obuwanguzi, nga ziyimbirwa mu weema z’abatuukirivu nti, “Omukono gwa Mukama ogwa ddyo gutukoledde ebikulu!" 
Psalms118:16 Omukono gwa Mukama ogwa ddyo gugulumizibbwa; omukono gwa Mukama ogwa ddyo gutukoledde ebikulu!” 
Psalms118:17 Sijja kufa, wabula nzija kuba mulamu, ndyoke ntegeeze ebyo byonna Mukama by’akoze." 
Psalms118:18 Mukama ambonerezza nnyo, naye tandese kufa." 
Psalms118:19 Munzigulirewo emiryango egy’obutuukirivu, nnyingire, neebaze Mukama." 
Psalms118:20 Guno gwe mulyango omunene ogwa Mukama, abatuukirivu mmwe banaayingiriranga." 
Psalms118:21 Nkwebaza kubanga onnyanukudde n’ofuuka obulokozi bwange. 
Psalms118:22 Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana lye lifuuse ejjinja ekkulu ery’oku nsonda. 
Psalms118:23 Kino Mukama ye yakikola; era ffe tukiraba nga kya kitalo mu maaso gaffe. 
Psalms118:24 Luno lwe lunaku Mukama lw’akoze; tusanyuke tulujagulizeeko. 
Psalms118:25 Ayi Mukama tukwegayiridde, tulokole, Ayi Mukama tukwegayiridde otuwe obuwanguzi." 
Psalms118:26 Alina omukisa oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama. Tubasabidde omukisa nga tuli mu nnyumba ya Mukama. 
Psalms118:27 Mukama ye Katonda, y’atwakiza omusana. Mukumbire wamu nga mukutte amatabi mu ngalo zammwe n’ekiweebwayo kyammwe kituukire ddala ku mayembe g’ekyoto." 
Psalms118:28 Ggwe Katonda wange, nnaakwebazanga; ggwe Katonda wange, nange nnaakugulumizanga." 
Psalms118:29 Mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, n’okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:1 Balina omukisa abo abatambulira mu butuukirivu; abatambulira mu mateeka ga Mukama. 
Psalms119:2 Balina omukisa abo abagondera ebiragiro bye, era abanoonya Mukama n’omutima gwabwe gwonna." 
Psalms119:3 Abo abatasobya, era abatambulira mu makubo ge." 
Psalms119:4 Ggwe wateekawo ebiragiro byo; n’olagira bigonderwenga n’obwegendereza bungi. 
Psalms119:5 Ayi Mukama, nsaba mbeerenga munywevu bulijjo; nga nkuuma bye walagira." 
Psalms119:6 Bwe ntyo siriswazibwa, amaaso gange nga ngasimbye ku ebyo bye walagira byonna." 
Psalms119:7 Nga njiga ebiragiro byo ebitukuvu, nnaakutenderezanga n’omutima omulungi." 
Psalms119:8 Nnaakwatanga amateeka go; Ayi Mukama, tonsuulira ddala." 
Psalms119:9 Omuvubuka anaakuumanga atya ekkubo lye nga ttereevu? Anaalikuumanga ng’agoberera ekigambo kyo nga bwe kiri. 
Psalms119:10 Nkunoonya n’omutima gwange gwonna; tonzikiriza kuva ku mateeka go. 
Psalms119:11 Ntadde ekigambo kyo mu mutima gwange; ndyoke nneme okwonoona. 
Psalms119:12 Ogulumizibwe, Ayi Mukama; onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:13 Njatula n’akamwa kange amateeka go gonna ge walagira. 
Psalms119:14 Nsanyukira okugondera ebiragiro byo, ng’asanyukira eby’obugagga." 
Psalms119:15 Nnaafumiitirizanga ku biragiro byo, ne nzisaayo omwoyo ku makubo go." 
Psalms119:16 Nnaasanyukiranga amateeka go, era siigeerabirenga." 
Psalms119:17 Omuddu wo omukolere ebirungi, mbe omulamu, ngobererenga ekigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:18 Ozibule amaaso gange, nsobole okulaba eby’ekitalo ebiri mu mateeka go." 
Psalms119:19 Nze ndi muyise ku nsi; tonkisa bye walagira. 
Psalms119:20 Bulijjo emmeeme yange eyaayaanira amateeka go. 
Psalms119:21 Onenya ab’amalala, abaakolimirwa, abaleka amateeka go." 
Psalms119:22 Mponya okuduula kwabwe n’okunyooma kwabwe; kubanga bye walagira mbigondera. 
Psalms119:23 Newaakubadde ng’abalangira bansalira enkwe; naye nze, omuweereza wo, nnaafumiitirizanga ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:24 Amateeka go lye ssanyu lyange, era ge gannuŋŋamya." 
Psalms119:25 Nzigweddemu amaanyi, ndi wansi mu nfuufu; nkusaba onzizeemu endasi ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri." 
Psalms119:26 Nakutegeeza bye nteesezza okukola, n’onnyanukula; onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:27 Njigiriza amateeka go bye gagamba, nange nnaafumiitirizanga ku byamagero byo." 
Psalms119:28 Emmeeme empweddemu ensa olw’okunakuwala; onzizeemu amaanyi ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri. 
Psalms119:29 Nzigiraako ddala ebyo ebitali bya butuukirivu; olw’ekisa kyo njigiriza amateeka go. 
Psalms119:30 Nonzeewo okubeera omwesigwa; ntambulire mu ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:31 Nnyweredde ku biragiro byo, Ayi Mukama, tondeka kuswazibwa." 
Psalms119:32 Bw’onoosumulula omutima gwange, nnaatambuliranga mu makubo go ng’ebiragiro byo bwe biri." 
Psalms119:33 Njigiriza, Ayi Mukama, okugonderanga ebiragiro byo; ndyoke mbinywezenga ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwange." 
Psalms119:34 Mpa okutegeera ndyoke nkuume amateeka go era ngakwate n’omutima gwange gwonna. 
Psalms119:35 Ntambuliza mu mateeka go, kubanga mwe nsanyukira." 
Psalms119:36 Okyuse omutima gwange ogulaze eri ebyo bye walagira; so si eri eby’okufuna ebitaliimu. 
Psalms119:37 Kyusa amaaso gange galeme okunneegombesa ebitaliimu; obulamu bwange obufuule obuggya ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri. 
Psalms119:38 Tuukiriza kye wasuubiza omuddu wo, kubanga ekyo kye wasuubiza abo abakutya." 
Psalms119:39 Nziggyako okunyoomebwa kuno kwe ntya, kubanga ebiragiro byo birungi." 
Psalms119:40 Laba, njayaanira ebiragiro byo; onkomyewo mu butuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms119:41 Okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo kujje gye ndi, Ayi Mukama; ompe obulokozi bwo nga bwe wasuubiza;" 
Psalms119:42 ndyoke mbeere n’eky’okwanukula abo abambonyaabonya; kubanga neesiga kigambo kyo. 
Psalms119:43 Toganya kigambo ekitali kya mazima okuva mu kamwa kange; kubanga essuubi lyange liri mu ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:44 Nnaagonderanga amateeka go ennaku zonna, emirembe n’emirembe." 
Psalms119:45 Era nnaatambulanga n’emirembe, kubanga ngoberedde ebyo bye walagira." 
Psalms119:46 Era nnaayogeranga ku biragiro by’omu maaso ga bakabaka, nga sikwatibwa nsonyi." 
Psalms119:47 Kubanga nsanyukira amateeka go, era ngaagala." 
Psalms119:48 Nzisaamu nnyo ekitiibwa ebiragiro byo era mbyagala. Nnaafumiitirizanga ku mateeka go. 
Psalms119:49 Jjukira ekigambo kye wansuubiza, nze omuddu wo, kubanga gwe wampa essuubi." 
Psalms119:50 Ekiwummuza omutima gwange nga ndi mu bulumi kye kisuubizo kyo ekimpa obulamu. 
Psalms119:51 Ab’amalala banduulira obutamala, naye nze siva ku mateeka go." 
Psalms119:52 Bwe ndowooza ku biragiro byo eby’edda, Ayi Mukama, biwummuza omutima gwange." 
Psalms119:53 Nkyawa nnyo abakola ebibi, abaleka amateeka go." 
Psalms119:54 Ebiragiro byo binfuukidde ennyimba buli we nsula nga ndi mu lugendo lwange. 
Psalms119:55 Mu kiro nzijukira erinnya lyo, Ayi Mukama, ne neekuuma amateeka go." 
Psalms119:56 Olw’okukugonderanga nfunye emikisa gyo mingi. 
Psalms119:57 Ggwe mugabo gwange, Ayi Mukama; nasuubiza okukugonderanga." 
Psalms119:58 Nkwegayirira n’omutima gwange gwonna, ondage ekisa kyo nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:59 Bwe ndabye amakubo amakyamu ge nkutte, ne nkyuka okugoberera ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:60 Nyanguwa nnyo okugondera amateeka go, so seekunya." 
Psalms119:61 Newaakubadde ng’emiguwa gy’ababi ginsibye, naye seerabirenga mateeka go." 
Psalms119:62 Nzuukuka mu ttumbi okukwebaza, olw’ebiragiro byo ebituukirivu." 
Psalms119:63 Ntambula n’abo abakutya, abo bonna abakwata amateeka go." 
Psalms119:64 Ensi, Ayi Mukama, ejjudde okwagala kwo; onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:65 Okoze bulungi omuddu wo, Ayi Mukama, ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri." 
Psalms119:66 Njigiriza okumanya n’okwawula ekirungi n’ekibi, era ompe okumanya; kubanga nzikiririza mu mateeka go." 
Psalms119:67 Bwe wali tonnambonereza nakyama nnyo, naye kaakano ŋŋondera ekigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:68 Ayi Mukama, oli mulungi era okola ebirungi; onjigirize amateeka go." 
Psalms119:69 Ab’amalala banjogeddeko nnyo eby’obulimba, naye nze nkwata ebyo bye walagira, n’omutima gwange gwonna." 
Psalms119:70 Omutima gwabwe gugezze ne gusavuwala; naye nze nsanyukira amateeka go. 
Psalms119:71 Okubonerezebwa kwangasa, ndyoke njige amateeka go." 
Psalms119:72 Amateeka go ge walagira ga mugaso nnyo gye ndi okusinga enkumi n’enkumi eza ffeeza ne zaabu. 
Psalms119:73 Emikono gyo gye gyankola ne gimmumba, mpa okutegeera ndyoke njige amateeka go." 
Psalms119:74 Abo abakutya banandabanga ne basanyuka, kubanga essuubi lyange liri mu kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:75 Mmanyi, Ayi Mukama, ng’amateeka go matukuvu, era wali mutuufu okumbonereza." 
Psalms119:76 Kale okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo kumbeere kumpi kunsanyuse, nga bwe wansuubiza, nze omuddu wo." 
Psalms119:77 Kkiriza okusaasira kwo kuntuukeko ndyoke mbeere mulamu; kubanga mu mateeka go mwe nsanyukira. 
Psalms119:78 Ab’amalala baswazibwe, kubanga bampisizza bubi nga siriiko kye nkoze. Naye nze nnaafumiitirizanga ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:79 Abo abakutya bajje gye ndi, abategeera amateeka go." 
Psalms119:80 Mbeera, omutima gwange guleme kubaako kya kunenyezebwa mu mateeka go, nneme kuswazibwa!" 
Psalms119:81 Emmeeme yange erumwa nnyo ennyonta ng’eyaayaanira obulokozi bwo, essuubi lyange liri mu kigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:82 Ntunuulidde ebbanga ddene n’amaaso gange ne ganfuuyirira nga nninda okutuukirira kw’ekisuubizo kyo; ne neebuuza nti, “Olinsanyusa ddi?”" 
Psalms119:83 Newaakubadde nga nfuuse ng’ensawo ey’eddiba, eya wayini eri mu mukka, naye seerabira bye walagira." 
Psalms119:84 Ayi Mukama, nze omuddu wo nnaalindirira kutuusa ddi nga tonnabonereza abo abanjigganya?" 
Psalms119:85 Abantu ab’amalala abatatya Katonda bansimidde ebinnya mu kkubo; be bo abatagondera mateeka go. 
Psalms119:86 Amateeka go gonna geesigibwa; abo abatakwagala banjigganyiza bwereere; nkusaba onnyambe! 
Psalms119:87 Baali kumpi okunzikiririza ddala ku nsi kuno; naye nze sivudde ku ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:88 Olw’okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo ndekera obulamu bwange, ndyoke nkuume ebyo bye walagira ebiva mu kamwa ko." 
Psalms119:89 Ayi Mukama, Ekigambo kyo kinywevu mu ggulu, kya mirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:90 Obwesigwa bwo tebuggwaawo emirembe gyonna; watonda ensi era enyweredde ddala. 
Psalms119:91 Amateeka go na buli kati manywevu; kubanga ebintu byonna bikuweereza. 
Psalms119:92 Singa nnali sisanyukira mu mateeka go, nandizikiridde olw’obulumi bwe nalimu." 
Psalms119:93 Siyinza kwerabira biragiro byo; kubanga mu ebyo obulamu bwange mw’obufuulidde obuggya. 
Psalms119:94 Ndi wuwo, ndokola, kubanga neekuumye bye walagira." 
Psalms119:95 Newaakubadde ng’abakola ebibi beekukumye nga banteeze okunzikiriza; naye nze nyweredde ku ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:96 Ebintu byonna biriko we bikoma naye amateeka go tegakugirwa. 
Psalms119:97 Amateeka go nga ngagala nnyo! Ngafumiitirizaako olunaku lwonna. 
Psalms119:98 Amateeka go ganfuula mugezi okusinga abalabe bange, kubanga ge gannuŋŋamya bulijjo." 
Psalms119:99 Ntegeera okusinga abasomesa bange bonna, kubanga nfumiitiriza nnyo ebyo bye walagira." 
Psalms119:100 Ntegeera okusinga abakadde; kubanga ŋŋondera ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:101 Neekuumye obutatambulira mu kkubo lyonna ekyamu, nsobole okugondera ekigambo kyo." 
Psalms119:102 Sivudde ku mateeka go, kubanga ggwe waganjigiriza." 
Psalms119:103 Ebisuubizo byo nga bimpoomera nnyo! Biwoomera akamwa kange okusinga omubisi gw’enjuki. 
Psalms119:104 Mu biragiro byo mwe nfunira okutegeera; kyenva nkyawa ekkubo lyonna ekyamu. 
Psalms119:105 Ekigambo kyo ye ttaala eri ebigere byange, era kye kimulisa ekkubo lyange." 
Psalms119:106 Ndayidde ekirayiro era nkikakasizza nga nnaakwatanga amateeka ag’obutuukirivu bwo. 
Psalms119:107 Nnumizibwa nnyo; nzizaamu obulamu, Ayi Mukama, ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri." 
Psalms119:108 Okkirize Ayi Mukama ettendo akamwa kange lye kakuwa; era onjigirize amateeka go. 
Psalms119:109 Newaakubadde ng’obulamu bwange ntera okubutambuza nga bwe njagala, naye seerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:110 Abakola ebibi banteze omutego, naye sikyamye kuva ku ebyo bye walagira." 
Psalms119:111 Ebiragiro byo gwe mugabo gwange emirembe gyonna; weewaawo, ebyo bye bisanyusa omutima gwange." 
Psalms119:112 Omutima gwange gweteeseteese okukwatanga ebiragiro byo ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwange. 
Psalms119:113 Nkyawa abalina emitima egisagaasagana, naye nze njagala amateeka go." 
Psalms119:114 Ggwe kiddukiro kyange era ggwe ngabo yange; essuubi lyange liri mu kigambo kyo. 
Psalms119:115 Muve we ndi mmwe abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu, mundeke nkwate ebiragiro bya Katonda wange." 
Psalms119:116 Onnyweze nga bwe wasuubiza, ndyoke mbeere omulamu; nneme kuswazibwa ne nzigwamu essuubi." 
Psalms119:117 Onnyweze ndyoke nfuuke ow’eddembe, era nkwatenga ebiragiro byo bulijjo." 
Psalms119:118 Onyooma abo bonna abaleka ebiragiro byo; weewaawo obugezigezi bwabwe tebuliimu kantu. 
Psalms119:119 Abakola ebibi bonna mu nsi obalaba ng’ebisasiro; nze kyenva njagala ebyo bye walagira. 
Psalms119:120 Nkankana nzenna nga nkutya, era ntya amateeka go." 
Psalms119:121 Nkoze eby’obwenkanya era eby’obutuukirivu; tondeka mu mikono gy’abo abanjooga. 
Psalms119:122 Okakase okundaganga ekisa kyo bulijjo, oleme kukkiriza ababi okunjooganga." 
Psalms119:123 Amaaso gange ganfuuyiririra, nga nnindirira obulokozi bwo n’ebyo bye wasuubiza mu butuukirivu bwo." 
Psalms119:124 Nze omuddu wo nkolaako ng’okwagala kwo bwe kuli; era onjigirize amateeka go. 
Psalms119:125 Ndi muddu wo, mpa okwawula ekirungi n’ekibi; ndyoke ntegeere ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:126 Ekiseera kituuse, Ayi Mukama, okubaako ky’okola, kubanga amateeka go gamenyeddwa." 
Psalms119:127 Naye nze njagala amateeka go okusinga zaabu, wadde zaabu omulongoose." 
Psalms119:128 Kubanga mmanyi ng’ebiragiro byo byonna bituufu; nkyawa buli kkubo lyonna ekyamu. 
Psalms119:129 Ebiragiro byo bya kitalo; kyenva mbigondera. 
Psalms119:130 Ebigambo byo bwe binnyonnyolwa bireeta omusana; n’atategeera bulungi bimugeziwaza. 
Psalms119:131 Njasamya akamwa kange ne mpejjawejja nga njaayaanira amateeka go. 
Psalms119:132 Nkyukira, onkwatirwe ekisa, nga bw’okolera bulijjo abo abaagala erinnya lyo." 
Psalms119:133 Oluŋŋamye ebigere byange ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri, era tokkiriza kibi kyonna kunfuga." 
Psalms119:134 Mponya okujooga kw’abantu, bwe ntyo nkwatenga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:135 Ontunuulire, nze omuddu wo, n’amaaso ag’ekisa, era onjigirizenga amateeka go." 
Psalms119:136 Amaziga gakulukuta mu maaso gange ng’omugga, olw’abo abatakwata mateeka go." 
Psalms119:137 Oli mutuukirivu, Ayi Katonda, era amateeka go matuufu." 
Psalms119:138 Ebiragiro byo bye wateekawo bituukirivu, era byesigibwa." 
Psalms119:139 Nnyiikadde nnyo munda yange, olw’abalabe bange abatassaayo mwoyo eri ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:140 Ebisuubizo byo byetegerezebwa nnyo, kyenva mbyagala." 
Psalms119:141 Newaakubadde ndi muntu wa bulijjo era anyoomebwa, naye seerabira biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:142 Obutuukirivu bwo bwa lubeerera, n’amateeka go ga mazima." 
Psalms119:143 Newaakubadde nga ndi mu kulumwa n’okutegana okungi, amateeka go ge gansanyusa." 
Psalms119:144 Ebiragiro byo bituufu emirembe gyonna; onjigirize okubitegeera ndyoke mbeere omulamu. 
Psalms119:145 Nkoowoola n’omutima gwange gwonna, Ayi Mukama, onnyanukule! Nnaagonderanga amateeka go." 
Psalms119:146 Nkukaabirira, ondokole, nkwate ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:147 Ngolokoka bunatera okukya ne nkukaabirira onnyambe; essuubi lyange liri mu kigambo kyo. 
Psalms119:148 Seebaka ekiro kyonna nga nfumiitiriza ku ebyo bye wasuubiza. 
Psalms119:149 Olw’okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo wulira eddoboozi lyange, Ayi Mukama, ompe obulamu obuggya ng’amateeka go bwe gali." 
Psalms119:150 Abo ab’enkwe era abatakwata mateeka go bansemberedde, kyokka bali wala n’amateeka go." 
Psalms119:151 Naye ggwe, Ayi Mukama, oli kumpi nange, era n’amateeka go gonna ga mazima." 
Psalms119:152 Okuva edda n’edda nayiga mu biragiro byo, nga wabissaawo bibeerewo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms119:153 Tunuulira okubonaabona kwange omponye, kubanga seerabira mateeka go." 
Psalms119:154 Ompolereze, onnunule, onzizeemu obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:155 Abakola ebibi obulokozi bubabeera wala, kubanga tebanoonya mateeka go." 
Psalms119:156 Ekisa kyo kinene, Ayi Mukama, onzizeemu obulamu nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:157 Abalabe abanjigganya bangi, naye nze siivenga ku biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:158 Nnakuwalira abo abatakwesiga, kubanga tebakwata biragiro byo." 
Psalms119:159 Laba, Ayi Mukama, bwe njagala ebiragiro byo! Onkuumenga ng’okwagala kwo bwe kuli." 
Psalms119:160 Ebigambo byo byonna bya mazima meereere; n’amateeka go ga lubeerera. 
Psalms119:161 Abafuzi banjigganyiza bwereere, naye ekigambo kyo nkissaamu ekitiibwa." 
Psalms119:162 Nsanyukira ekisuubizo kyo okufaanana ng’oyo afunye obugagga obungi. 
Psalms119:163 Nkyawa era ntamwa obulimba, naye amateeka go ngagala." 
Psalms119:164 Mu lunaku nkutendereza emirundi musanvu olw’amateeka go amatuukirivu. 
Psalms119:165 Abo abaagala amateeka go bali mu ddembe lingi; tewali kisobola kubeesittaza. 
Psalms119:166 Nnindirira obulokozi bwo, Ayi Mukama, era mu biragiro byo mwe ntambulira." 
Psalms119:167 Ŋŋondera ebiragiro byo, mbyagala nnyo nnyini." 
Psalms119:168 Buli kye nkola okimanyi, era olaba nga bwe nkwata ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:169 Okukaaba kwange kutuuke gy’oli, Ayi Mukama, ompe okutegeera ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kiri." 
Psalms119:170 Okwegayirira kwange kutuuke gy’oli, onnunule nga bwe wasuubiza." 
Psalms119:171 Akamwa kange kanaakutenderezanga, kubanga gw’onjigiriza amateeka go." 
Psalms119:172 Olulimi lwange lunaayimbanga ekigambo kyo, kubanga bye walagira byonna bya butuukirivu." 
Psalms119:173 Omukono gwo gumbeerenga, kubanga nnonzeewo okukwatanga ebiragiro byo." 
Psalms119:174 Neegomba nnyo obulokozi bwo, Ayi Mukama, era amateeka go lye ssanyu lyange." 
Psalms119:175 Ompe obulamu nkutenderezenga, era amateeka go gampanirirenga." 
Psalms119:176 Ndi ng’endiga ebuze. Onoonye omuddu wo, kubanga seerabidde mateeka go." 
Psalms120:1 Nkoowoola Mukama nga ndi mu nnaku, era n’annyanukula." 
Psalms120:2 Omponye, Ayi Mukama, emimwa egy’obulimba, n’olulimi olw’obukuusa." 
Psalms120:3 Onooweebwa ki, era onookolebwa otya, ggwe olulimi olukuusa?" 
Psalms120:4 Onoofumitibwa n’obusaale obwogi obw’omulwanyi omuzira, n’oyokerwa ku manda ag’omuti entaseesa." 
Psalms120:5 Ndabye ennaku, kubanga mbeera mu Meseki; nsula mu weema za Kedali!" 
Psalms120:6 Ndudde nnyo mu bantu abakyawa eddembe. 
Psalms120:7 Nze njagala mirembe, naye bwe njogera bo baagala ntalo." 
Psalms121:1 Nnyimusa amaaso gange eri ensozi, okubeerwa kwange kuva wa?" 
Psalms121:2 Okubeerwa kwange kuva eri Mukama, eyakola eggulu n’ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Taliganya kigere kyo kusagaasagana; oyo akukuuma taabongootenga. 
Psalms121:4 Laba, oyo akuuma Isirayiri taabongootenga so teyeebakenga." 
Psalms121:5 Mukama ye mukuumi wo; Mukama y’akusiikiriza ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo; 
Psalms121:6 emisana enjuba teekwokyenga, wadde omwezi ekiro." 
Psalms121:7 Mukama anaakukuumanga mu buli kabi; anaalabiriranga obulamu bwo. 
Psalms121:8 Mukama anaakukumanga amagenda go n’amadda, okuva leero n’okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms122:1 Nasanyuka bwe baŋŋamba nti, “Tugende mu nnyumba ya Mukama!”" 
Psalms122:2 Ebigere byaffe biyimiridde mu miryango gyo, Ayi Yerusaalemi." 
Psalms122:3 Yerusaalemi yazimbibwa okuba ekibuga ekinywevu ekiyimiridde awamu. 
Psalms122:4 Eyo ebika byonna gye biraga, ebika bya Mukama, okutendereza erinnya lya Mukama ng’ebiragiro ebyaweebwa Isirayiri bwe biri." 
Psalms122:5 Eyo entebe ez’okusalirako emisango gye zaateekebwa; z’entebe ez’obwakabaka ez’ennyumba ya Dawudi. 
Psalms122:6 Musabirenga Yerusaalemi emirembe: “Abo abakwagala bafune ebirungi. 
Psalms122:7 Emirembe gibeerenga munda w’ebisenge byo; n’amayumba go amanene gabeerenga n’omukisa era nga manywevu.” 
Psalms122:8 Olwa baganda bange ne mikwano gyange nnaayogeranga nti, “Emirembe gibeerenga mu ggwe.”" 
Psalms122:9 Olw’obulungi bw’ennyumba ya Mukama Katonda waffe, nnaanoonyanga okukulaakulana kwa Yerusaalemi." 
Psalms123:1 Nnyimusa amaaso gange gy’oli, Ayi ggwe atuula ku ntebe ey’obwakabaka mu ggulu." 
Psalms123:2 Amaaso g’abaddu nga bwe gatunuulira omukono gwa mukama waabwe; n’amaaso g’omuweereza omukazi nga bwe gatunuulira omukono gwa mugole we, n’amaaso gaffe bwe gatyo bwe gatunuulira Mukama Katonda waffe, okutuusa lw’alitusaasira." 
Psalms123:3 Tusaasire, Ayi Mukama, tusaasire, kubanga tunyoomeddwa nnyo ddala." 
Psalms123:4 Emitima gyaffe gijjudde ennaku olw’okuduulirwa abo abeeyagala, n’okunyoomebwa ab’amalala." 
Psalms124:1 Isirayiri agamba nti, singa Katonda teyali ku ludda lwaffe," 
Psalms124:2 singa Katonda teyali ku ludda lwaffe abalabe baffe bwe baatulumba," 
Psalms124:3 banditusaanyizzaawo mu kaseera buseera, obusungu bwabwe bwe bwatubuubuukirako." 
Psalms124:4 Amataba g’obusungu bwabwe ganditusaanyizzaawo, ne mukoka n’atukulukutirako;" 
Psalms124:5 amazzi ag’obusungu bwabwe agayira ganditukuluggusizza. 
Psalms124:6 Mukama atenderezebwe atatugabuddeeyo ne tutaagulwataagulwa amannyo gaabwe. 
Psalms124:7 Tuwonye ng’ekinyonyi bwe kiva ku mutego gw’abatezi; omutego gukutuse, naffe tuwonye!" 
Psalms124:8 Okubeerwa kwaffe kuli mu linnya lya Mukama, eyakola eggulu n’ensi." 
Psalms125:1 Abeesiga Mukama bali ng’olusozi Sayuuni olutayinza kusiguukululwa, naye olubeerawo emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms125:2 Ensozi nga bwe zeetooloola Yerusaalemi, ne Mukama bw’atyo bwe yeetooloola abantu be, okuva kaakano n’okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms125:3 Kubanga abafuzi abakola ebibi tebalifugira mu nsi y’abatuukirivu, baleme okuwaliriza abatuukirivu okukola ebibi." 
Psalms125:4 Ayi Mukama, abalungi n’abo abalina omutima omulongoofu bakolere ebirungi." 
Psalms125:5 Naye abo abalaga mu makubo gaabwe amakyamu, Mukama alibawaŋŋangusa wamu n’abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu. Emirembe gibe ku Isirayiri." 
Psalms126:1 Mukama bwe yakomyawo abawaŋŋanguse ba Sayuuni, twafaanana ng’abaloota." 
Psalms126:2 Olwo akamwa kaffe ne kajjula enseko, ne nnimi zaffe ne ziyimba ennyimba ez’essanyu. Amawanga ne gagamba nti, “ Mukama abakoledde ebikulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Mukama atukoledde ebikulu, kyetuvudde tusanyuka." 
Psalms126:4 Otuzze obuggya, Ayi Mukama, tufaanane ng’emigga egikulukutira mu lusenyi." 
Psalms126:5 Abo abasiga nga bakaaba amaziga, baliyimba ennyimba ez’essanyu nga bakungula." 
Psalms126:6 Oyo agenda ng’akaaba ng’atwala ensigo okusiga; alikomawo ng’ayimba ennyimba ez’essanyu ng’aleeta ebinywa bye. 
Psalms127:1 Mukama bw’atazimba nnyumba, abo abagizimba bazimbira bwereere. Mukama bw’atakuuma kibuga, abakuumi bateganira bwereere." 
Psalms127:2 Oteganira bwereere bw’okeera mu makya n’okola, ate n’olwawo n’okwebaka ng’okolerera ekyokulya; kubanga Mukama abaagalwa be abawa otulo." 
Psalms127:3 Abaana aboobulenzi kya bugagga okuva eri Mukama; era abaana mpeera gy’agaba okuva gy’ali. 
Psalms127:4 Ng’obusaale bwe bubeera mu mukono gw’omulwanyi, n’abaana abazaalibwa mu buvubuka bw’omuntu bwe bali bwe batyo." 
Psalms127:5 Alina omukisa omuntu oyo ajjuzza ensawo ye n’obusaale, kubanga tebaliswazibwa; balyolekera abalabe baabwe mu mulyango omunene." 
Psalms128:1 Balina omukisa abatya Katonda; era abatambulira mu makubo ge. 
Psalms128:2 Olirya ebibala ebiriva mu kutegana kwo; oliweebwa emikisa era olifuna ebirungi. 
Psalms128:3 Mu nnyumba yo, mukyala wo aliba ng’omuzabbibu ogubala ennyo; abaana bo aboobulenzi baliba ng’amatabi g’emizeeyituuni nga beetoolodde emmeeza yo." 
Psalms128:4 Bw’atyo bw’aweebwa emikisa omuntu atya Mukama. 
Psalms128:5 Mukama akuwenga omukisa ng’asinziira mu Sayuuni, era olabe Yerusaalemi nga kijjudde ebirungi ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwo." 
Psalms128:6 Owangaale olabe abaana b’abaana bo! Emirembe gibeere mu Isirayiri. 
Psalms129:1 Isirayiri ayogere nti, “Bambonyaabonyezza nnyo okuva mu buvubuka bwange.”" 
Psalms129:2 Ddala bambonyaabonyezza nnyo okuva mu buvubuka bwange; naye tebampangudde. 
Psalms129:3 Newaakubadde ng’omugongo gwange gujjudde enkovu olw’embooko ze bankubye era ne gulabika nga kwe bayisizza ekyuma ekirima," 
Psalms129:4 kyokka Mukama mutuukirivu; amenyeemenye enjegere z’abakola ebibi. 
Psalms129:5 Abo bonna abakyawa Sayuuni bagobebwe era bazzibweyo emabega nga baswadde. 
Psalms129:6 Babeere ng’omuddo ogumera waggulu ku nnyumba, oguwotoka nga tegunnakula." 
Psalms129:7 Omukunguzi tagufaako, n’oyo asiba ebinywa agunyooma." 
Psalms129:8 Wadde abayitawo baleme kwogera nti, “Omukisa gwa Mukama gube ku mmwe. Tubasabidde omukisa mu linnya lya Mukama.”" 
Psalms130:1 Ayi Mukama, nkukaabira nga nsobeddwa nnyo." 
Psalms130:2 Ayi Mukama, wulira eddoboozi lyange; otege amatu go eri eddoboozi ly’okwegayirira kwange." 
Psalms130:3 Ayi Mukama, singa otubalira obutali butuukirivu bwaffe, ani eyandiyimiridde mu maaso go?" 
Psalms130:4 Naye osonyiwa; noolwekyo ossibwamu ekitiibwa. 
Psalms130:5 Nnindirira Mukama, emmeeme yange erindirira era essuubi lyange liri mu kigambo kye." 
Psalms130:6 Emmeeme yange erindirira Mukama; mmulindirira okusinga ng’abakuumi bwe balindirira obudde okukya; okusingira ddala ng’abakuumi bwe balindirira obudde okukya. 
Psalms130:7 Ayi Isirayiri, weesigenga Mukama, kubanga Mukama y’alina okwagala okutaggwaawo; era y’alina okununula okutuukiridde." 
Psalms130:8 Mukama y’alinunula Isirayiri n’amuggya mu byonoono bye byonna. 
Psalms131:1 Ayi Mukama siri wa malala, so n’amaaso gange tegeegulumiza. Siruubirira bintu binsukiridde newaakubadde ebintu eby’ekitalo ebinsinga." 
Psalms131:2 Naye ŋŋonzezza emmeeme yange era ngisiriikirizza ng’omwana bw’asiriikirira nga nnyina amuggye ku mabeere. Omwana avudde ku mabeere nga bw’asiriikirira, n’emmeeme yange bw’eri bw’etyo." 
Psalms131:3 Ayi Isirayiri, weesigenga Mukama okuva leero n’okutuusa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms132:1 Ayi Mukama jjukira Dawudi n’okubonaabona kwe yagumiikiriza kwonna. 
Psalms132:2 Nga bwe yalayirira Mukama, ne yeeyama eri Katonda Ayinzabyonna, Katonda wa Yakobo," 
Psalms132:3 ng’agamba nti, “Siriyingira mu nnyumba yange, wadde okulinnya ku kitanda kyange." 
Psalms132:4 Sirikkiriza tulo kunkwata newaakubadde okuzibiriza amaaso gange," 
Psalms132:5 okutuusa lwe ndimala okufunira Mukama ekifo; ekifo eky’okubeeramu ekya Katonda Ayinzabyonna, Katonda wa Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Laba, twakiwulirako mu Efulasa, ne tukizuula mu nnimiro ya Jaali." 
Psalms132:7 Kale tugende mu kifo kye mw’abeera, tumusinzirize awali entebe y’ebigere bye." 
Psalms132:8 Golokoka, Ayi Mukama, ogende mu kifo kyo mw’owummulira; ggwe n’Essanduuko yo ey’Endagaano, eraga obuyinza bwo." 
Psalms132:9 Bakabona bo bambazibwe obutuukirivu, n’abatukuvu bo bayimbe n’essanyu." 
Psalms132:10 Ku lulwe Dawudi omuddu wo, tomugaana oyo gwe wafukako amafuta." 
Psalms132:11 Mukama Katonda yalayirira Dawudi ekirayiro ekitaliggwaawo, era talikivaako. Kubanga yamugamba nti, “Omu ku batabani bo gwe ndituuza ku ntebe yo ey’obwakabaka." 
Psalms132:12 Batabani bo bwe banaakuumanga Endagaano yange n’ebiragiro byange bye nnaabayigirizanga, ne batabani baabwe nabo banaatuulanga ku ntebe yo ey’obwakabaka emirembe gyonna.”" 
Psalms132:13 Kubanga Mukama yalonda Sayuuni, nga kye yasiima okutuulangamu, n’agamba nti:" 
Psalms132:14 “Kino kye kifo mwe nnaawummuliranga emirembe gyonna; omwo mwe nnaatuulanga nga ndi ku ntebe ey’obwakabaka kubanga nkisiimye. 
Psalms132:15 Nnaakiwanga omukisa ne nkiwa n’ebirungi, era n’abaavu baamu nnaabakkusanga ebyokulya." 
Psalms132:16 Bakabona baakyo, obulokozi bunaabanga kyambalo kyabwe; n’abatukuvu baakyo banaayimbanga ennyimba ez’essanyu n’essanyu." 
Psalms132:17 “Eyo gye ndyaliza batabani ba Dawudi obuyinza; ne muteekerawo ettabaaza olw’oyo gwe nayiwako amafuta. 
Psalms132:18 Abalabe be ndibajjuza ensonyi, naye ye ndimwambaza engule ey’ekitiibwa ekingi.”" 
Psalms133:1 Laba bwe kiri ekirungi era nga kisanyusa, abooluganda okubeera awamu nga batabaganye." 
Psalms133:2 Kiri ng’amafuta ag’omuwendo omungi agafukibwa ku mutwe gwa Alooni ne gakulukutira mu kirevu; gakulukutira mu kirevu kya Alooni, ne gakka ku kitogi ky’ebyambalo bye." 
Psalms133:3 Kiri ng’omusulo gw’oku lusozi Kerumooni, ogugwa ne ku nsozi za Sayuuni; kubanga eyo Mukama gy’agabira omukisa n’obulamu emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms134:1 Mulabe, mutendereze Mukama, mmwe mwenna abaddu ba Mukama, abaweereza ekiro mu nnyumba ya Mukama." 
Psalms134:2 Mugolole emikono gyammwe mu kifo ekitukuvu, mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms134:3 Mukama eyakola eggulu n’ensi akuwe omukisa ng’asinziira mu Sayuuni. 
Psalms135:1 Mutendereze Mukama. Mutendereze erinnya lya Mukama. Mumutendereze mmwe abaddu ba Mukama; 
Psalms135:2 mmwe abaweereza mu nnyumba ya Mukama, mu mpya z’ennyumba ya Katonda waffe." 
Psalms135:3 Mutendereze Mukama, kubanga Mukama mulungi; mutendereze erinnya lye kubanga ekyo kisanyusa." 
Psalms135:4 Kubanga Mukama yeerondera Yakobo okuba owuwe; ye Isirayiri gwe yeeroboza okuba eky’omuwendo. 
Psalms135:5 Mmanyi nga Mukama mukulu wa kitiibwa, era nga Mukama oyo y’asinga bakatonda bonna." 
Psalms135:6 Mukama kyonna ky’asiima ky’akola, mu ggulu ne ku nsi; mu nnyanja ne mu buziba bwayo." 
Psalms135:7 Alagira ebire ne byekuluumulula okuva ku nkomerero y’ensi; atonnyesa enkuba erimu okumyansa, n’asumulula empewo okuva mu mawanika ge." 
Psalms135:8 Ye yakuba ababereberye ab’e Misiri; ababereberye b’abantu n’ebibereberye by’ebisolo. 
Psalms135:9 Ye yaweereza obubonero n’ebyewuunyo wakati wo, ggwe Misiri, eri Falaawo n’abaweereza be bonna." 
Psalms135:10 Ye yakuba amawanga amangi, n’atta bakabaka ab’amaanyi era be bano," 
Psalms135:11 Sikoni kabaka w’Abamoli, ne Ogi kabaka w’e Basani ne bakabaka bonna ab’e Kanani." 
Psalms135:12 Ensi yaabwe n’agiwaayo ng’obusika, okuba obusika bw’abantu be Isirayiri." 
Psalms135:13 Ayi Mukama, erinnya lyo lya lubeerera, era n’obukulu bwo bumanyibwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms135:14 Kubanga Katonda aliggyako abantu be omusango, era alisaasira abaweereza be." 
Psalms135:15 Abamawanga ebifaananyi byonna ebyole bye basinza, ebyakolebwa n’emikono gy’abantu mu ffeeza ne zaabu," 
Psalms135:16 birina emimwa, naye tebyogera; birina amaaso, naye tebiraba;" 
Psalms135:17 birina amatu naye tebiwulira; so ne mu kamwa kaabyo temuyitamu mukka. 
Psalms135:18 Ababikola balibifaanana; na buli abyesiga alibifaanana. 
Psalms135:19 Ayi ennyumba ya Isirayiri mutendereze Mukama; mmwe ennyumba ya Alooni mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms135:20 Mmwe ennyumba ya Leevi mutendereze Mukama; mmwe abatya Mukama mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms135:21 Mukama ali mu Sayuuni yeebazibwe; yeebazibwe oyo abeera mu Yerusaalemi. Mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms136:1 Mwebaze Mukama kubanga mulungi, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:2 Mwebaze Katonda wa bakatonda bonna, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:3 Mwebaze Mukama w’abafuzi, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:4 Oyo yekka akola ebyamagero ebikulu, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:5 Oyo eyakola eggulu mu kutegeera kwe, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:6 Oyo eyabamba ensi ku mazzi, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:7 Oyo eyakola ebyaka ebinene, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:8 Enjuba yagikola okufuganga emisana, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:9 Omwezi n’emmunyeenye yabikola okufuganga ekiro, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:10 Oyo eyatta ababereberye b’Abamisiri, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:11 N’aggya Isirayiri mu Misiri, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:12 Yabaggyamu n’omukono gwe ogw’amaanyi gwe yagolola; kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms136:13 Oyo eyayawulamu amazzi g’Ennyanja Emyufu, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:14 N’ayisa abaana ba Isirayiri wakati waayo, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:15 Naye n’asaanyaawo Falaawo n’eggye lye mu Nnyanja Emyufu; kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna. 
Psalms136:16 Oyo eyakulembera abantu be mu ddungu, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:17 Ye yafufuggaza bakabaka abaatiikirivu, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:18 N’atta bakabaka ab’amaanyi, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:19 Ye yatta ne Sikoni, kabaka w’Abamoli, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:20 Era ye yatta ne Ogi kabaka wa Basani, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:21 N’awaayo ensi yaabwe okuba obutaka, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:22 Okuba obutaka bwa Isirayiri omuddu we, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:23 Oyo eyatujjukira nga tuweddemu ensa, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:24 N’atuwonya abalabe baffe, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:25 Oyo awa abantu n’ebiramu byonna ekyokulya, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms136:26 Kale mwebaze Katonda w’eggulu, kubanga okwagala kwe kubeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms137:1 Twatuula ku mabbali g’emigga gy’e Babulooni, ne tukaaba amaziga bwe twajjukira Sayuuni." 
Psalms137:2 Ne tuwanika ennanga zaffe ku miti egyali awo. 
Psalms137:3 Abaatunyaga ne batulagira okuyimba, abaatubonyaabonya ne batulagira okusanyuka; nga bagamba nti, “Mutuyimbireyo lumu ku nnyimba za Sayuuni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Tunaayimba tutya oluyimba lwa Mukama mu nsi eteri yaffe? 
Psalms137:5 Bwe nnaakwerabiranga, ggwe Yerusaalemi, omukono gwange ogwa ddyo gukale!" 
Psalms137:6 Olulimi lwange lwesibire waggulu w’ekibuno kyange singa nkwerabira, ggwe Yerusaalemi, ne sikulowoozaako okusinga ebintu ebirala byonna." 
Psalms137:7 Jjukira, Ayi Mukama, batabani ba Edomu kye baakola, ku lunaku Yerusaalemi lwe kyawambibwa; ne baleekaana nti, “Kisuule, kimalirewo ddala n’emisingi gyakyo.”" 
Psalms137:8 Ggwe omuwala wa Babulooni, agenda okuzikirizibwa, yeesiimye oyo alikusasula ebyo nga naawe bye watukola." 
Psalms137:9 Yeesiimye oyo aliddira abaana bo n’ababetentera ku lwazi. 
Psalms138:1 Nnaakutenderezanga Ayi Mukama, n’omutima gwange gwonna; ne mu maaso ga bakatonda abalala nnaayimbanga okukutendereza." 
Psalms138:2 Nvuunama nga njolekedde Yeekaalu yo Entukuvu, ne ntendereza erinnya lyo olw’okwagala kwo n’olw’obwesigwa bwo; kubanga wagulumiza ekigambo kyo n’erinnya lyo okusinga ebintu byonna." 
Psalms138:3 Olunaku lwe nakukoowoolerako wannyanukula; n’onnyongeramu amaanyi mu mwoyo gwange. 
Psalms138:4 Bakabaka bonna ab’omu nsi banaakutenderezanga, Ayi Mukama, nga bawulidde ebigambo ebiva mu kamwa ko." 
Psalms138:5 Banaatenderezanga ebikolwa byo Ayi Mukama; kubanga ekitiibwa kya Mukama kinene. 
Psalms138:6 Newaakubadde nga Mukama asukkulumye, naye afaayo eri abo abeetoowaza; naye abeegulumiza ababeera wala." 
Psalms138:7 Newaakubadde nga neetooloddwa ebizibu, naye ggwe okuuma obulamu bwange; ogolola omukono gwo eri abalabe bange abakambwe, era omukono gwo ogwa ddyo ne gumponya." 
Psalms138:8 Mukama alituukiriza ebyo by’anteekeddeteekedde; kubanga okwagala kwo, Ayi Mukama, kubeerera emirembe gyonna. Tolekulira ebyo bye watonda." 
Psalms139:1 Ayi Mukama, okebedde omutima gwange, n’otegeera byonna ebiri munda yange." 
Psalms139:2 Bwe ntuula omanya, ne bwe ngolokoka omanya; era otegeera byonna bye ndowooza, ne bwe mbeera ewala ennyo." 
Psalms139:3 Otegeera okutambula kwange kwonna n’okuwummula kwange. Omanyi amakubo gange gonna. 
Psalms139:4 Ekigambo kye nnaayogera, Ayi Mukama, okimanya nga sinnaba na kukyogera." 
Psalms139:5 Ondi mu maaso n’emabega, era ontaddeko omukono gwo." 
Psalms139:6 Okumanya okw’engeri eyo kunsukkiridde, era nkwewuunya nnyo, kunnema okutegeera." 
Psalms139:7 Nnaagenda wa Omwoyo wo gy’atali? Oba nnaagenda wa ggwe gy’otoli? 
Psalms139:8 Bwe nnaalinya mu ggulu, nga gy’oli; bwe nnakka emagombe, nayo nga gy’oli." 
Psalms139:9 Bwe nneebagala empewo ez’oku makya ne zintwala ne mbeera mu bitundu by’ennyanja ebisinga okuba ewala; 
Psalms139:10 era n’eyo omukono gwo gunannuŋŋamya, omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gunannywezanga." 
Psalms139:11 Bwe nnaagamba nti, “Ekizikiza kimbuutikire, n’obudde obw’emisana bwe ndimu bufuuke ekiro.”" 
Psalms139:12 Naye era ekizikiza gy’oli tekiba kizikiza, ekiro kyakaayakana ng’emisana; kubanga gy’oli ekizikiza n’omusana bifaanana." 
Psalms139:13 Ggwe watonda byonna ebiri munda mu nze; ggwe wammumbira mu lubuto lwa mmange. 
Psalms139:14 Nkutendereza, kubanga wankola mu ngeri ey’entiisa era ey’ekitalo; emirimu gyo gya kyewuunyo; era ekyo nkimanyidde ddala bulungi." 
Psalms139:15 Wammanya nga ntondebwa, bwe nakolerwa mu kyama; bwe natondebwa mu buziba bw’ensi n’amagezi go amangi." 
Psalms139:16 Wandaba nga si natondebwa. Ennaku zange zonna ze wanteekerateekera zawandiikibwa mu kitabo kyo. 
Psalms139:17 By’ondowooleza nga bya muwendo munene, Ayi Katonda! Omuwendo gwabyo munene!" 
Psalms139:18 Singa ngezaako okubibala bisinga omusenyu obungi. Ne bwe ngolokoka mu makya oba okyandowoozaako. 
Psalms139:19 Abakola ebibi batte, Ayi Katonda; abasajja abassi b’abantu banveeko." 
Psalms139:20 Abantu abo bakwogerako bibi; bakwegulumiririzaako mu butategeera bwabwe. 
Psalms139:21 Abakukyawa, Ayi Mukama, nange mbakyawa; abo abakwegulumiririzaako bansunguwaza." 
Psalms139:22 Mbakyayira ddala nnyo, era mbayita balabe bange." 
Psalms139:23 Nkebera, Ayi Katonda, otegeere omutima gwange. Ngezesa omanye ebirowoozo byange." 
Psalms139:24 Olabe obanga mu nze mulimu engeri yonna enkyamu; era onkulembere mu kkubo erintuusa mu bulamu obutaggwaawo. 
Psalms140:1 Omponye abakola ebibi, Ayi Mukama, omponye abantu abakambwe;" 
Psalms140:2 abateesa mu mitima gyabwe okukola ebibi; abanoonya entalo buli kiseera. 
Psalms140:3 Ebigambo byabwe byogi ng’ennimi z’emisota; ebiva mu kamwa kaabwe busagwa ng’obw’essalambwa. 
Psalms140:4 Onkuume abakola ebibi baleme okunkwatako, Ayi Mukama; omponye abantu abakambwe abateesa okunkyamya." 
Psalms140:5 Abantu ab’amalala banteze omutego; banjuluzza ekitimba kyabwe; ne batega emitego mu kkubo lyange. 
Psalms140:6 Nagamba Mukama nti, “Ggwe oli Katonda wange.” Wulira okwegayirira kwange, onsaasire, Ayi Mukama!" 
Psalms140:7 Ayi Mukama, Mukama wange, ggw’omponya n’amaanyi go, ggwe engabo yange mu lutalo." 
Psalms140:8 Ayi Mukama, abakola ebibi tobawa bye beetaaga, era tokkiriza ntekateeka zaabwe kutuukirira; baleme kuba na malala wadde okwenyumiriza." 
Psalms140:9 Abanneetoolodde baleke enkwe zaabwe zibeekyusizeeko baboneebone. 
Psalms140:10 Amanda agaaka omuliro gabagwire; basuulibwe mu muliro, bakasukibwe mu bunnya obutakoma mwe bataliva emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms140:11 Tokkiriza balimba kweyongera bungi; abakambwe bayigganyizibwe bazikirire. 
Psalms140:12 Mmanyi nga Mukama ayamba abo ababonaabona, y’ayamba abanaku okuyisibwa mu bwenkanya." 
Psalms140:13 Abatuukirivu banaakutenderezanga, era w’oli we banaabeeranga." 
Psalms141:1 Ayi Mukama nkukaabira; oyanguwe okujja gye ndi! Owulire eddoboozi lyange, nga nkukoowoola." 
Psalms141:2 Okusaba kwange kubeere ng’ebyakaloosa mu maaso go, n’okugolola emikono gyange gy’oli kubeere nga ssaddaaka ey’akawungeezi." 
Psalms141:3 Onkuume, Ayi Mukama, nneme okwasamya akamwa kange, era bwe njogera onkomeko." 
Psalms141:4 Okyuse omutima gwange guleme kugoberera kibi, n’okwemalira mu bikolwa ebibi; nneme okwetaba n’abantu abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu, wadde okulya ku mmere yaabwe." 
Psalms141:5 Leka omuntu omutuukirivu ankube, kubanga anaaba ankwatiddwa ekisa; muleke annenye, ekyo kinaaba ng’amafuta amalungi agafukiddwa ku mutwe gwange; sijja kugagaana. Naye nnaasabanga bulijjo nga sikkiriziganya na babi wadde n’ebikolwa byabwe." 
Psalms141:6 Abakola ebibi bwe baliweebwayo eri ab’okubasalira omusango, olwo ne balyoka bayiga nti ebigambo byange bya mazima." 
Psalms141:7 Balyogera nti, “Ng’omuntu bw’akabala n’akuba amavuunike, n’amagumba gaffe bwe galisaasaanyizibwa bwe gatyo mu kamwa k’emagombe.”" 
Psalms141:8 Naye nze amaaso ngatadde ku ggwe, Ayi Mukama Katonda; mu ggwe mwe neekwese, tondeka nga sirina anambeera!" 
Psalms141:9 Nkuuma omponye omutego gwe banteze, n’ebitimba by’abo abakola ebitali bya butuukirivu." 
Psalms141:10 Ebitimba bye banteze abakola ebibi abo bonna, baleke babigwemu, kyokka nze mpone." 
Psalms142:1 Nkaabirira Mukama n’eddoboozi ery’omwanguka; neegayirira Mukama ansaasire. 
Psalms142:2 Mmutegeeza byonna ebinneemulugunyisa, ne mmwanjulira ebinteganya byonna." 
Psalms142:3 Omwoyo gwange bwe gunnennyika, gw’omanyi eky’okunkolera. Banteze omutego mu kkubo lyange mwe mpita." 
Psalms142:4 Bwe ntunula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, sirabayo anambeera; sirina wa kwekweka, era tewali n’omu anfaako." 
Psalms142:5 Nkaabirira ggwe, Ayi Mukama, nga ŋŋamba nti, “Ggwe kiddukiro kyange, ggwe mugabo gwange mu nsi muno.”" 
Psalms142:6 Owulire okukaaba kwange, kubanga njeezebwa nnyo! Mponya abanjigganya, kubanga bansinza nnyo amaanyi." 
Psalms142:7 Nziggya mu kkomera, ndyoke nkwebaze nga ntendereza erinnya lyo. Abatuukirivu balinneetooloola, ng’onkoledde ebyekisa ekingi ebingi." 
Psalms143:1 Wulira okusaba kwange, Ayi Mukama, wulira okwegayirira kwange! Ggwe omwesigwa era omutuukirivu jjangu ombeere." 
Psalms143:2 Tonsalira musango, kubanga mu maaso go tewali n’omu atuukiridde." 
Psalms143:3 Omulabe wange angoba n’ankwata n’ansuula wansi; anteeka mu kizikiza ne nfaanana ng’abaafa edda. 
Psalms143:4 Noolwekyo omwoyo gwange guweddemu endasi, n’omutima gwange gwennyise." 
Psalms143:5 Nzijukira ennaku ez’edda, ne nfumiitiriza ku ebyo bye wakola byonna, ne ndowooza ku mirimu gy’emikono gyo." 
Psalms143:6 Ngolola emikono gyange gy’oli, ne nkuyaayaanira ng’ettaka ekkalu bwe liyaayaanira enkuba." 
Psalms143:7 Yanguwa okunziramu, Ayi Mukama, kubanga omwoyo gwange guggwaamu amaanyi. Tonkisa maaso go, nneme okufaanana ng’abafu." 
Psalms143:8 Obudde nga bukedde, nsaba ondage okwagala kwo okutaggwaawo; kubanga ggwe gwe neesiga. Njigiriza ekkubo lye nsaana okutambuliramu, kubanga omwoyo gwange gwonna guli gy’oli." 
Psalms143:9 Mponya, Ayi Mukama, abalabe bange, kubanga ggwe kiddukiro kyange." 
Psalms143:10 Njigiriza okukola by’oyagala, kubanga ggwe Katonda wange! Omwoyo wo omulungi ankulembere, antambulize mu kkubo eddungi ery’omuseetwe." 
Psalms143:11 Olw’erinnya lyo, Ayi Mukama, onkuume, mu butuukirivu bwo onzigye mu kabi." 
Psalms143:12 Omalewo abalabe bange olw’okwagala kwo, ozikirize n’abanjigganya bonna, kubanga nze ndi muddu wo." 
Psalms144:1 Atenderezebwe Mukama, olwazi lwange, atendeka emikono gyange okulwana, era ateekerateekera engalo zange olutalo." 
Psalms144:2 Mukama anjagala ye Katonda wange era kye kiddukiro kyange, ge maanyi gange amangi era ye mulokozi wange. Ye ngabo yange mwe neekweka. Awangula amawanga n’agassa wansi w’ebigere byange." 
Psalms144:3 Ayi Mukama, omuntu kye ki ggwe okumufaako, oba omwana w’omuntu, ggwe okumulowoozaako?" 
Psalms144:4 Omuntu ali nga mukka. Ennaku ze ziri ng’ekisiikirize ekiyita obuyisi. 
Psalms144:5 Yawula mu ggulu lyo, Ayi Mukama, okke! Kwata ku nsozi zinyooke omukka!" 
Psalms144:6 Myansa abalabe basaasaane, era lasa obusaale bwo obazikirize." 
Psalms144:7 Ogolole omukono gwo ng’osinziira waggulu ennyo, omponye, onzigye mu mazzi amangi, era onzigye mu mikono gya bannamawanga;" 
Psalms144:8 ab’emimwa egyogera eby’obulimba, abalayira nti kya mazima, so nga bulimba bwereere." 
Psalms144:9 Ayi Mukama, nnaakuyimbiranga oluyimba oluggya; nnaakukubiranga ennanga ey’enkoba ekkumi," 
Psalms144:10 ggwe awa bakabaka obuwanguzi; amponya, nze omuddu wo Dawudi, ekitala ekyogi." 
Psalms144:11 Ndokola, omponye onzigye mu mukono gwa bannamawanga bano ab’emimwa egyogera eby’obulimba, era omukono gwabwe ogwa ddyo gwa bulimba." 
Psalms144:12 Batabani baffe mu buvubuka bwabwe, Ayi Mukama, babeere ng’ebisimbe ebikulidde ddala obulungi, ne bawala baffe babe ng’empagi ennungi ez’oku nsonda okuzimbirwa ennyumba ya kabaka mu lubiri." 
Psalms144:13 Amawanika gaffe gajjule ebibala ebya buli ngeri. Endiga zaffe zizaale enkumi n’obukumi zijjule amalundiro gaffe. 
Psalms144:14 Ente zaffe ziwalule ebizito. Ebisenge by’ekibuga bireme kumenyebwa. Waleme kubaawo kukaaba n’okwaziirana kwonna mu nguudo ez’omu bibuga byaffe. 
Psalms144:15 Abantu abaweereddwa emikisa egyo beesiimye! Balina omukisa abantu abo abalina Katonda waabwe nga ye Mukama. 
Psalms145:1 Nnaakugulumizanga ggwe Katonda wange, era Kabaka wange; era nnaatenderezanga erinnya lyo buli lunaku emirembe n’emirembe." 
Psalms145:2 Nnaakutenderezanga buli lunaku; era nnaasuutanga erinnya lyo emirembe n’emirembe. 
Psalms145:3 Mukama mukulu, wa kitiibwa, era asaanira okutenderezebwanga ennyo, n’obukulu bwe tebwogerekeka." 
Psalms145:4 Buli mulembe gunaatenderanga gunnaagwo ebikolwa byo, era gunaatendanga emirimu gyo egy’amaanyi." 
Psalms145:5 Nnaatendanga obukulu n’obulungi bw’ekitiibwa kyo, era nnaafumiitirizanga ku bikolwa byo ebyewuunyisa." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu banaatendanga amaanyi g’ebikolwa byo eby’ekitalo, nange nnaatendanga obukulu bwo obw’ekitiibwa." 
Psalms145:7 Banaayogeranga ku bulungi bwo obw’ekitalo nga bajaguza; era banaayimbanga olw’obutuukirivu bwo. 
Psalms145:8 Mukama wa kisa, ajudde okusaasira, alwawo okusunguwala era ajudde okwagala okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms145:9 Mukama mulungi eri buli muntu, era okusaasira kwe kubuna byonna bye yatonda." 
Psalms145:10 Byonna bye watonda binaakutenderezanga, Ayi Mukama; n’abatukuvu bo banaakugulumizanga."
