Psalms145:11 Banaayogeranga ku kitiibwa ky’obwakabaka bwo, era banaatendanga amaanyi go." 
Psalms145:12 Balyoke bategeeze abantu bonna ebikolwa byo eby’amaanyi, n’ekitiibwa ky’obukulu obw’obwakabaka bwo." 
Psalms145:13 Obwakabaka bwo, bwakabaka bwa lubeerera, n’obufuzi bwo bwa mirembe na mirembe. Mukama by’ayogera byonna bya bwesigwa, n’ebikolwa bye bijjudde okusaasira." 
Psalms145:14 Mukama awanirira abo bonna abazitoowereddwa, era ayimusa bonna abagwa." 
Psalms145:15 Amaaso g’abantu bonna gatunuulira ggwe, Ayi Mukama, era bonna gw’obawa ebyokulya mu biseera byabyo." 
Psalms145:16 Oyanjuluza engalo zo, ebiramu byonna n’obigabira bye byetaaga ne bikkuta." 
Psalms145:17 Mukama mutuukirivu mu bikolwa bye byonna era ayagala byonna bye yatonda. 
Psalms145:18 Mukama abeera kumpi n’abo bonna abamukoowoola; abo bonna abamukoowoola mu mazima. 
Psalms145:19 Abo bonna abamussaamu ekitiibwa abawa bye baagala, era awulira okukaaba kwabwe n’abawonya." 
Psalms145:20 Mukama akuuma bonna abamwagala, naye abakola ebibi alibazikiriza." 
Psalms145:21 Akamwa kange kanaatenderezanga Mukama, era na buli kitonde kinaatenderezanga erinnya lye ettukuvu emirembe n’emirembe." 
Psalms146:1 Tendereza Mukama! Tendereza Mukama ggwe emmeeme yange! 
Psalms146:2 Nnaatenderezanga Mukama ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwange; nnaayimbanga okutendereza Katonda wange nga nkyali mulamu. 
Psalms146:3 Teweesiganga bafuzi, wadde abantu obuntu omutali buyambi." 
Psalms146:4 Kubanga bafa ne bakka emagombe; ne ku lunaku olwo lwennyini, byonna bye baba bateeseteese ne bifa." 
Psalms146:5 Yeesiimye oyo ayambibwa Katonda wa Yakobo; ng’essuubi lye liri mu Mukama Katonda we," 
Psalms146:6 eyakola eggulu n’ensi n’ennyanja ne byonna ebirimu, era omwesigwa emirembe gyonna." 
Psalms146:7 Atereeza ensonga z’abajoogebwa mu bwenkanya, n’abalumwa enjala abawa ebyokulya. Mukama asumulula abasibe." 
Psalms146:8 Mukama azibula amaaso ga bamuzibe, era awanirira abazitoowereddwa. Mukama ayagala abatuukirivu." 
Psalms146:9 Mukama alabirira bannamawanga, era ayamba bamulekwa ne bannamwandu; naye ekkubo ly’abakola ebibi alifaafaaganya." 
Psalms146:10 Mukama anaafuganga emirembe gyonna, Katonda wo, Ayi Sayuuni, anaabanga Katonda wa buli mulembe. Mutendereze Mukama!" 
Psalms147:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Kubanga kirungi okutenderezanga Katonda waffe; kubanga ajjudde ekisa, n’oluyimba olw’okumutenderezanga lumusaanira." 
Psalms147:2 Mukama azimba Yerusaalemi; era akuŋŋaanya Abayisirayiri abaali mu buwaŋŋanguse. 
Psalms147:3 Azzaamu amaanyi abo abalina emitima egimenyese, era ajjanjaba ebiwundu byabwe." 
Psalms147:4 Mukama ategeka omuwendo gw’emmunyeenye; era buli emu n’agituuma erinnya. 
Psalms147:5 Mukama waffe mukulu era wa kitiibwa; amaanyi g’obuyinza bwe tegatendeka, n’okutegeera kwe tekuliiko kkomo." 
Psalms147:6 Mukama awanirira abawombeefu, naye abakola ebibi abasuulira ddala wansi." 
Psalms147:7 Muyimbire Mukama ennyimba ez’okumwebaza; mumukubire entongooli ezivuga obulungi. 
Psalms147:8 Mukama abikka eggulu n’ebire, ensi agitonnyeseza enkuba, n’ameza omuddo ne gukula ku nsozi." 
Psalms147:9 Ente aziwa emmere, ne bannamuŋŋoona abato abakaaba abaliisa." 
Psalms147:10 Essanyu lya Mukama teriri mu maanyi ga mbalaasi, wadde mu magulu g’omuntu," 
Psalms147:11 wabula Mukama asanyukira abo abamussaamu ekitiibwa, era abalina essuubi mu kwagala kwe okutaggwaawo." 
Psalms147:12 Tendereza Mukama ggwe Yerusaalemi, tendereza Katonda wo ggwe Sayuuni," 
Psalms147:13 kubanga ebisiba enzigi zo, ye abinyweza, n’abantu bo abasulamu n’abawa omukisa." 
Psalms147:14 Aleeta emirembe ku nsalo zo; n’akukkusa eŋŋaano esinga obulungi. 
Psalms147:15 Aweereza ekiragiro kye ku nsi; ekigambo kye ne kibuna mangu. 
Psalms147:16 Ayaliira omuzira ku ttaka ne gutukula ng’ebyoya by’endiga enjeru, n’omusulo ogukutte n’agusaasaanya ng’evvu." 
Psalms147:17 Omuzira agukanyuga ng’obuyinjayinja; bw’aleeta obutiti ani ayinza okubusobola? 
Psalms147:18 Mukama aweereza ekigambo kye, omuzira ne gusaanuuka; n’akunsa empewo, amazzi ne gakulukuta." 
Psalms147:19 Yategeeza Yakobo ekigambo kye; Isirayiri n’amanya amateeka ga Mukama n’ebiragiro bye. 
Psalms147:20 Tewali ggwanga na limu lye yali akolaganye nalyo bw’atyo; amawanga amalala tegamanyi mateeka ge. Mutendereze Mukama! 
Psalms148:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Mumutendereze nga musinziira mu ggulu, mumutenderereze mu bifo ebiri waggulu." 
Psalms148:2 Mumutendereze mmwe mwenna bamalayika be, mumutendereze mmwe mwenna eggye lye ery’omu ggulu." 
Psalms148:3 Mmwe enjuba n’omwezi mutendereze Mukama, nammwe mwenna emmunyeenye ezaaka mumutendereze." 
Psalms148:4 Tendereza Mukama ggwe eggulu eriri waggulu ennyo, naawe amazzi agali waggulu w’eggulu." 
Psalms148:5 Leka byonna bitendereze erinnya lya Mukama! Kubanga ye yalagira, ne bitondebwa." 
Psalms148:6 Yabinywereza ddala mu bifo byabyo ennaku zonna, n’ateekawo etteeka eritaliggwaawo." 
Psalms148:7 Mumutendereze nga musinziira ku nsi, mmwe balukwata n’ebifo byonna eby’omu buziba bw’ennyanja," 
Psalms148:8 mmwe okumyansa, n’omuzira ogw’amakerenda, n’omuzira ogukutte era n’olufu, naawe kikuŋŋunta, mugondere ekiragiro kye," 
Psalms148:9 mmwe agasozi n’obusozi, emiti egy’ebibala n’emivule;" 
Psalms148:10 ensolo ez’omu nsiko era n’ente zonna, ebyewalula n’ebinyonyi ebibuuka," 
Psalms148:11 bakabaka b’ensi n’amawanga gonna, abalangira n’abafuzi bonna ab’ensi," 
Psalms148:12 abavubuka abalenzi n’abawala; abantu abakulu n’abaana abato. 
Psalms148:13 Bitendereze erinnya lya Mukama, kubanga erinnya lye lyokka lye ligulumizibwa; ekitiibwa kye kisinga byonna eby’omu nsi n’eby’omu ggulu." 
Psalms148:14 Abantu be abawadde amaanyi, era agulumizizza abatukuvu be, be bantu be Isirayiri abakolagana naye. Mutendereze Mukama." 
Psalms149:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Muyimbire Mukama oluyimba oluggya, mumutenderereze wamu n’ekibiina ky’abatukuvu." 
Psalms149:2 Isirayiri asanyukirenga eyamutonda; n’abantu ba Sayuuni bajagulize Kabaka waabwe! 
Psalms149:3 Batenderezenga erinnya lye nga bwe bazina, bamutenderezenga nga bwe bakuba ennanga n’ebitaasa." 
Psalms149:4 Kubanga Mukama asanyukira abantu be, n’abawombeefu abawa engule ey’obulokozi." 
Psalms149:5 Abatuukirivu bajagulizenga mu kitiibwa kino; bayimbire ku bitanda byabwe olw’essanyu. 
Psalms149:6 Batenderezenga Katonda waabwe, bakwate ekitala eky’obwogi obubiri," 
Psalms149:7 bawoolere eggwanga, babonereze n’amawanga," 
Psalms149:8 bateeke bakabaka baago mu njegere, n’abakungu baago babasibe amagulu n’ebyuma," 
Psalms149:9 babasalire omusango ogwabawandiikirwa. Kino kye kitiibwa ky’abatukuvu be bonna. Mutendereze Mukama. 
Psalms150:1 Mutendereze Mukama! Mutendereze Katonda mu kifo kye ekitukuvu; mumutenderereze ne mu ggulu lye ery’amaanyi. 
Psalms150:2 Mumutendereze olw’ebikolwa bye ebiraga amaanyi ge; mumutendereze olw’obukulu bwe obusukkiridde. 
Psalms150:3 Mumutendereze n’eddoboozi ery’ekkondeere, mumutendereze n’ennanga ey’enkoba n’endere." 
Psalms150:4 Mumutendereze n’ebitaasa n’amazina; mumutendereze n’ebivuga eby’enkoba n’endere! 
Psalms150:5 Mumutendereze nga mukuba ebitaasa; mumutendereze n’ebitaasa ebivuga ennyo! 
Psalms150:6 Buli ekissa omukka kitenderezenga Mukama! Mutendereze Mukama. 
Proverbs1:1 Engero za Sulemaani, mutabani wa Dawudi, kabaka wa Isirayiri." 
Proverbs1:2 Yaziwandiika okuyigiriza abantu okuba n’amagezi n’okuyiga, era n’okutegeera ebigambo eby’obulabufu; eby’obulamu eby’amagezi n’empisa." 
Proverbs1:3 Sulemaani yayagala abantu okuba n’empisa, n’obulamu obw’amagezi, okukolanga ebituufu, n’okubeera abenkanya n’okugobereranga ensonga;" 
Proverbs1:4 okuyigiriza amagezi abatalina bumanyirivu, n’abavubuka okufuna okumanya n’okutegeera." 
Proverbs1:5 N’abantu ab’amagezi nabo bwe bawulira beeyongere okuyiga n’abategeevu beeyongere okubangulwa. 
Proverbs1:6 Era engero zino zaawandiikibwa okutegeera engero, enjogera n’ebikokyo." 
Proverbs1:7 Kale mu kutya Mukama amagezi mwe gasookera, naye abasirusiru banyooma amagezi n’okulagirirwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wange ossangayo omwoyo eri ebiragiro bya kitaawo, era tolekanga kukuutira kwa maama wo;" 
Proverbs1:9 bijja kuba ngule eneeweesanga omutwe gwo ekitiibwa, n’emikuufu mu bulago bwo." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wange abakozi b’ebibi bwe bakusendasendanga, tokkirizanga." 
Proverbs1:11 Bwe bakugambanga nti, “Tugende ffenna twesanyuse, tunyage, tubbe n’okutta; tokkirizanga;" 
Proverbs1:12 ng’entaana bw’emira abantu, naffe tubamire tutyo nga bakyali balamu, era nga balamba, ng’abagenda mu bunnya obuwanvu;" 
Proverbs1:13 nga twefunira eby’obugagga bye tutakoleredde, ne tujjuza amayumba gaffe obugagga obubbe;" 
Proverbs1:14 ng’ababi batuyita tubeegatteko, tugabane kyenkanyi ebibbe n’ebinyage.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wange totambuliranga wamu nabo, era ekigere kyo kiziyize okukwatanga ekkubo lyabwe:" 
Proverbs1:16 Kubanga ebigere byabwe bidduka bunnambiro okukola ebibi, era kibanguyira okuyiwa omusaayi." 
Proverbs1:17 Nga kuba kumala biseera okutega omutego, ng’ekinyonyi ky’oyagala okukwata kikulaba," 
Proverbs1:18 naye abantu ng’abo baba beetega bokka, baba beetega omutego ogunaabakwasa bo bennyini." 
Proverbs1:19 Bwe lityo bwe libeera ekkubo lya buli muntu anoonya okugaggawalira mu bukyamu. Obugagga obw’engeri eyo busaanyaawo obulamu bw’abo ababufuna. 
Proverbs1:20 Amagezi galeekaanira waggulu mu nguudo; gayimusa amaloboozi gaago, mu bifo ebigazi eby’omu bibuga." 
Proverbs1:21 Ne galeekaanira waggulu, mu kifo enguudo ennene we zisisinkanira, era gasinzira mu miryango gy’ekibuga ne googera:" 
Proverbs1:22 Mulituusa ddi mmwe ab’amagezi amatono obutayagala kweyongera kuyiga by’amagezi, nammwe ab’amalala okunyoomanga eby’amagezi n’abasirusiru okukyawanga okumanya?" 
Proverbs1:23 Kale singa muwuliriza okunenya kwange, laba, ndifuka omutima gwange n’ebirowoozo byange mu mmwe." 
Proverbs1:24 Kubanga na bayita ne mugaana okuwuliriza, ne ngolola omukono ne wataba n’omu afaayo," 
Proverbs1:25 era ne mutafaayo ku magezi ge nabawa, era ne mugaana okubuulirira kwange kwonna," 
Proverbs1:26 kale nange ndibasekerera nga muli mu nnaku, era mbakudaalire ng’entiisa ebagwiridde." 
Proverbs1:27 Entiisa bw’eribajjira ng’omuyaga omungi, ennaku n’okubonaabona, okulumwa n’obubalagaze," 
Proverbs1:28 kale balinkoowoola, naye siriyitaba; balinnoonya obutaweera naye ne batandaba." 
Proverbs1:29 Kubanga baakyawa okuyigirizibwa, n’okumanya, era ne bamalirira obutatya Mukama." 
Proverbs1:30 Ne bagaana okuwuliriza amagezi gange; ne banyooma okunenya kwange kwonna. 
Proverbs1:31 Kyebaliva balya ebibala eby’ekkubo lyabwe ebbi, era ne bajjula ebibala eby’enkwe zaabwe." 
Proverbs1:32 Obusirusiru bulitta ab’amagezi amatono n’obutafaayo bulizikiriza abasirusiru," 
Proverbs1:33 naye buli ampuliriza anaabeeranga mirembe, ng’agumye nga talina kutya kwonna." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wange, bw’onookwatanga ebigambo byange, n’otereka ebiragiro byange mu bulamu bwo," 
Proverbs2:2 era n’ossaayo omwoyo eri amagezi, era n’ossa omutima gwo eri okutegeera," 
Proverbs2:3 ddala ddala singa oyaayaanira okumanya era n’oyimusa eddoboozi lyo osabe okutegeera," 
Proverbs2:4 bw’onooganoonyanga nga ffeeza, era n’oganoonyanga ng’ekyobugagga ekyakwekebwa," 
Proverbs2:5 awo w’olitegeerera okutya Mukama, era n’ovumbula okumanya Katonda." 
Proverbs2:6 Kubanga Mukama awa amagezi; era mu kamwa ke muvaamu okumanya n’okutegeera. 
Proverbs2:7 Mukama aterekera abatuukirivu amagezi amalungi, era aba ngabo y’abo abatambulira mu bugolokofu." 
Proverbs2:8 Abatambuliza mu makubo ag’obwenkanya, era bw’atyo Mukama akuuma ekkubo ly’abatukuvu be." 
Proverbs2:9 Olwo lw’olitegeera obutuukirivu, amazima n’obwenkanya; weewaawo buli kkubo eddungi." 
Proverbs2:10 Kubanga amagezi galiyingira mu mutima gwo, n’okumanya kulisanyusa omwoyo gwo." 
Proverbs2:11 Okwesalirawo obulungi kunaakulabiriranga n’okutegeera kunaakukuumanga: 
Proverbs2:12 Amagezi ganaakuwonyanga ekkubo ly’omubi, n’abantu aboogera eby’obugwagwa," 
Proverbs2:13 abaleka amakubo ag’obutuukirivu ne batambulira mu makubo ag’ekizikiza," 
Proverbs2:14 abasanyukira okukola ebikolwa ebibi, abanyumirwa eby’obusirusiru," 
Proverbs2:15 abantu abo be b’amakubo amakyamu, era abakujjukujju mu ngeri zaabwe." 
Proverbs2:16 Amagezi Mukama g’awa ge gokka agajja okukuwonya ekkubo ly’omukazi omwenzi, n’okukuwonya ebigambo bye ebisendasenda," 
Proverbs2:17 eyaleka bba ow’omu buvubuka bwe era eyeerabira endagaano gye yakola mu maaso ga Katonda we. 
Proverbs2:18 Kubanga ennyumba ye ekka mu kufa, n’amakubo ge galaga eri abafu." 
Proverbs2:19 Tewali n’omu agenda ewuwe adda wadde okufunirayo amakubo g’obulamu. 
Proverbs2:20 Kale tambuliranga mu kkubo ly’abo abatya Katonda era onywerere mu makubo g’abatuukirivu. 
Proverbs2:21 Kubanga abatuukirivu balituula mu nsi, era abo abagolokofu baligisigalamu." 
Proverbs2:22 Naye abakozi b’ebibi balifiirwa ebirungi eby’ensi, n’abatali beesigwa balizikirizibwa." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wange, teweerabiranga bintu bye nakuyigiriza, era okuumanga ebiragiro byange mu mutima gwo," 
Proverbs3:2 kubanga bijja kuwangaaza obulamu bwo ku nsi, era bikukulaakulanye." 
Proverbs3:3 Amazima n’ekisa tobyerabiranga; byesibe mu bulago bwo, obiwandiike ku mutima gwo." 
Proverbs3:4 Bw’otyo bw’onoofuna okuganja n’okusiimibwa eri Katonda n’eri abantu. 
Proverbs3:5 Weesige Mukama n’omutima gwo gwonna, so teweesigamanga ku magezi go gokka." 
Proverbs3:6 Mukama mukulembezenga mu by’okola byonna, naye anaakuluŋŋamyanga n’owangula." 
Proverbs3:7 Amagezi go tegakusigulanga, naye otyanga Mukama, era weewale okukola ebibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Onoofunanga obulamu mu mubiri gwo n’amagumba go ne gadda buggya. 
Proverbs3:9 Mukama mugulumizenga n’eby’obugagga byo; n’ebibala ebisooka eby’ebintu byo byonna eby’omu nnimiro yo," 
Proverbs3:10 olwo amaterekero go lwe ganajjulanga ebintu enkumu, era n’amasenero go ne gajjula ne gabooga omwenge omusu." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wange tonyoomanga kukangavvula kwa Mukama, n’okunenya kwe kulemenga okukukooya," 
Proverbs3:12 kubanga Mukama anenya oyo gw’ayagala, nga kitaawe w’omwana bw’anenya mutabani we gwe yeenyumiririzaamu." 
Proverbs3:13 Aweereddwa omukisa oyo afuna amagezi, omuntu oyo afuna okutegeera," 
Proverbs3:14 kubanga amagezi gasinga ffeeza era galimu amagoba okusinga zaabu. 
Proverbs3:15 Amagezi ga muwendo mungi okusinga amayinja ag’omuwendo omungi: era tewali kyegombebwa kiyinza kugeraageranyizibwa nago. 
Proverbs3:16 Mu mukono gwago ogwa ddyo mwe muli obuwanguzi; ne mu mukono gwago ogwa kkono ne mubaamu obugagga n’ekitiibwa. 
Proverbs3:17 Mu magezi mulimu essanyu, era n’amakubo gaago ga mirembe." 
Proverbs3:18 Amagezi muti gwa bulamu eri abo abagakwata ne baganyweza; abo abagakwata ne baganyweza baliweebwa omukisa. 
Proverbs3:19 Amagezi, Mukama ge yakozesa okuteekawo emisingi gy’ensi; n’okutegeera kwe yakozesa okuteekawo eggulu;" 
Proverbs3:20 n’okumanya kwe, kwe yakozesa okwawula obuziba bw’ennyanja, era n’ebire ne bivaamu omusulo." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wange, beeranga n’okuteesa okulungi n’okusalawo ebisaana, ebyo biremenga okukuvaako," 
Proverbs3:22 binaabeeranga obulamu eri emmeeme yo, era ekyokwambala ekirungi ekinaawoomesanga obulago bwo." 
Proverbs3:23 Bw’otyo bw’onootambulanga nga onyweredde mu kkubo lyo, era ekigere kyo tekijjanga kwesittala." 
Proverbs3:24 Bw’onoogalamiranga toobenga na kutya, weewaawo bw’oneebakanga otulo tunaakuwoomeranga." 
Proverbs3:25 Totyanga kabenje kootomanyiridde, wadde okuzikirira okujjira abakozi b’ebibi," 
Proverbs3:26 Kubanga Mukama y’anaabeeranga obwesigwa bwo, era anaalabiriranga ekigere kyo ne kitakwatibwa mu mutego." 
Proverbs3:27 Tommanga birungi abo be bisaanira bwe kibeera mu buyinza bwo okukikola. 
Proverbs3:28 Togambanga muliraanwa wo nti, “Genda, onodda enkya ne nkuwa,” ate nga kye yeetaaga okirina." 
Proverbs3:29 Totegekanga kukola bulabe ku muliraanwa wo, atudde emirembe ng’akwesiga." 
Proverbs3:30 Tovunaananga muntu n’omu awatali nsonga nga talina kabi k’akukoze. 
Proverbs3:31 Tokwatirwanga obuggya omuntu ayigganya abalala, era tokolanga nga ye bw’akola," 
Proverbs3:32 kubanga omuntu omugwagwa wa muzizo eri Mukama, naye abo abagolokofu abalinamu obwesige." 
Proverbs3:33 Ekikolimo kya Mukama kiri ku nnyumba y’ababi, naye awa omukisa ennyumba y’abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs3:34 Ddala ddala, Mukama anyooma abanyoomi, naye abeetoowaza abawa ekisa." 
Proverbs3:35 Ab’amagezi balisikira ekitiibwa, naye abasirusiru baliswazibwa." 
Proverbs4:1 Muwulirize baana bange okuyigiriza kwange ng’okwa kitammwe, era musseeyo omwoyo mufune okutegeera." 
Proverbs4:2 Kubanga mbawa okuyigiriza okulungi; temulekanga biragiro byange. 
Proverbs4:3 Bwe nnali omuvubuka nga ndi ne kitange, omwana omu yekka omwagalwa, owa mmange," 
Proverbs4:4 yanjigiriza n’aŋŋamba nti, “Ebigambo byange bikuumenga ku mutima gwo, kuuma ebiragiro byange obeere mulamu." 
Proverbs4:5 Funa amagezi; funa okutegeera, teweerabiranga era tovanga ku bigambo bya mu kamwa kange." 
Proverbs4:6 Togalekanga, nago ganaakukuumanga, gaagale nago ganaakulabiriranga." 
Proverbs4:7 Ddala amagezi kye kintu ekisingira ddala obukulu; noolwekyo fuba ofune amagezi, era fubira ddala nnyo ofune okutegeera." 
Proverbs4:8 Amagezi gagulumize, nago gajja kukuyimusa, gaanirize, nago gajja kukuweesa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs4:9 Amagezi gajja kukutikkira engule ey’ekisa, era gakuwe n’engule ey’ekitiibwa.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Wuliriza ggwe, mutabani, era okkirize ebigambo byange olyoke owangaalire ku nsi n’essanyu eringi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nkuluŋŋamya mu kkubo ery’amagezi, ne nkukulembera mu makubo ag’obutuukirivu." 
Proverbs4:12 Bw’onootambulanga, ekigere kyo kireme okuziyizibwa; era bw’onoddukanga, tojjanga kwesittala." 
Proverbs4:13 Nywerezanga ddala okuyigirizibwa, tokutanga: kukuumenga kubanga bwe bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs4:14 Toyingiranga mu kkubo ly’abakozi b’ebibi, wadde okutambulira mu kkubo ly’abantu aboonoonyi." 
Proverbs4:15 Lyewalenga, tolitambulirangamu, liveeko okwate ekkubo lyo." 
Proverbs4:16 Kubanga abakozi b’ebibi tebayinza kwebaka okuggyako nga bakoze ebibi, era otulo tubabulira ddala bwe baba tebalina gwe bakozeeko bulabe." 
Proverbs4:17 Okukola ebibi y’emmere yaabwe, n’okukozesa eryanyi kye kyokunywa kyabwe." 
Proverbs4:18 Ekkubo ly’abatuukirivu liri ng’enjuba eyakavaayo, eyeeyongera okwaka okutuusa obudde lwe butangaalira ddala." 
Proverbs4:19 Naye ekkubo ly’ababi liri ng’ekizikiza ekikutte, tebamanyi kibaleetera kwesittala." 
Proverbs4:20 Mutabani wange wuliriza n’obwegendereza ebigambo byange; osseeyo omwoyo eri bye nkutegeeza; 
Proverbs4:21 ebigambo bino tebikuvangako, bikuumire ddala mu mutima gwo," 
Proverbs4:22 kubanga bya bulamu eri abo ababifuna, era biwonya omubiri gwabwe gwonna." 
Proverbs4:23 Ekisinga byonna kuuma omutima gwo, kubanga y’ensulo y’obulamu bwo." 
Proverbs4:24 Weewalire ddala eby’obubambavu era n’okwogera ebya swakaba. 
Proverbs4:25 Amaaso go gatunulenga butereevu, era otunulenga n’obumalirivu eyo gy’olaga." 
Proverbs4:26 Ttereeza bulungi amakubo go; okwate amakubo ageesigika gokka. 
Proverbs4:27 Tokyamanga ku mukono ogwa ddyo oba ogwa kkono; ebigere byo byewalenga ekkubo ekyamu. 
Proverbs5:1 Mutabani, ossangayo omwoyo eri ebiragiro byange, era owulirizanga bulungi ebigambo byange eby’amagezi," 
Proverbs5:2 olyoke oyige okusalawo okw’amagezi, era akamwa ko kavengamu eby’obutegevu." 
Proverbs5:3 Kubanga emimwa gy’omukazi omwenzi gitonnya omubisi gw’enjuki, n’ebigambo bye biweweevu okusinga omuzigo;" 
Proverbs5:4 naye enkomerero ya byonna, akaawa ng’omususa era asala ng’ekitala eky’obwogi obubiri." 
Proverbs5:5 Ebigere bye bituuka mu kufa, ebisinde bye biraga emagombe." 
Proverbs5:6 Tafaayo ku kkubo lya bulamu, amakubo ge gaakyamakyama dda, naye nga takimanyi." 
Proverbs5:7 Kaakano, batabani bange mumpulirize, temuvanga ku bigambo bya kamwa kange." 
Proverbs5:8 Mwewalenga omukazi oyo era temusembereranga luggi lwa nnyumba ye; 
Proverbs5:9 si kulwa nga mufiirwa ekitiibwa kyammwe, n’okumalira ebiseera byammwe ku oyo alina ettima," 
Proverbs5:10 ate si kulwa nga b’otolina ky’obamanyiiko bakwavuwaza, n’amaanyi go n’ogamalira ku maka g’omulala." 
Proverbs5:11 Ku nkomerero y’obulamu bwo olisinda, ennyama yo n’omubiri gwo nga biweddewo." 
Proverbs5:12 Oligamba nti, “Nga nakyawa okulabulwa, n’omutima gwange ne gukyawa okunenyezebwa," 
Proverbs5:13 era ne sigondera ddoboozi ly’abasomesa bange, wadde okussaayo omwoyo eri abo abampanga amagezi." 
Proverbs5:14 Ntuuse ku njegoyego z’okuzikirira nga ndi wakati mu kuŋŋaaniro ly’ekibiina.” 
Proverbs5:15 Onoonywanga amazzi ag’omu kidiba kyo, n’amazzi agava mu luzzi lwo goonoonywanga." 
Proverbs5:16 Ensulo zo zisaanye okukulukutira mu nguudo, n’enzizi zo mu bifo ebigazi eby’omu kibuga?" 
Proverbs5:17 Leka bibeere bibyo wekka, bireme kugabanibwako b’otomanyiiko n’akamu." 
Proverbs5:18 Kale leka ensulo yo ebeere n’omukisa, era osanyuke ne mukazi wo ow’omu buvubuka bwo." 
Proverbs5:19 Ng’ennangaazi eyeeyagaza n’empeewo esanyusa, leka okusuuta kwe kukumalenga ennaku zonna era naye akwetoloozenga okwagala kwe." 
Proverbs5:20 Lwaki mwana wange osendebwasendebwa omukazi omwenzi, n’ogwa mu kifuba ky’omukazi w’omusajja omulala?" 
Proverbs5:21 Kubanga Mukama alaba amakubo g’omuntu gonna, era n’akebera n’amakubo ge gonna." 
Proverbs5:22 Ebikolwa by’omukozi w’ebibi bimufuukira omutego, era emiguwa gy’ebikolwa bye ebibi girimusibira ddala." 
Proverbs5:23 Alifa, kubanga yagaana okwekuuma, era alizikirira olw’obusirusiru bwe obungi." 
Proverbs6:1 Mutabani obanga weeyimirira muliraanwa wo, ne weeyama okuyamba omuntu gw’otomanyi, oli mu katyabaga." 
Proverbs6:2 Obanga weesibye n’ebigambo ggwe kennyini bye wayogera, ng’ebigambo by’omu kamwa ko bikusibye," 
Proverbs6:3 kino mwana wange ky’oba okola okusobola okwewonya, kubanga kaakano oli mu buyinza bwa muliraanwa wo: Yanguwa, ogende weetoowaze, weegayirire muliraanwa wo." 
Proverbs6:4 Amaaso go togaganya kwebaka, wadde ebikowe byo okubongoota." 
Proverbs6:5 Onunule obulamu bwo ng’empeewo bw’edduka okuva mu ngalo z’omuyizzi, era ng’ekinyonyi, bwe kiva mu mutego gw’omutezi." 
Proverbs6:6 Yigira ku biwuka, mugayaavu ggwe; fumiitiriza engeri gye bikolamu obiyigireko." 
Proverbs6:7 Tebirina mukulembeze, mukungu oba mufuzi yenna abikulembera," 
Proverbs6:8 kyokka byekuŋŋaanyiza emmere mu biseera eby’amakungula, ne bitereka emmere mu biseera ebituufu mu mwaka." 
Proverbs6:9 Olituusa ddi okwebaka mugayaavu ggwe? Oligolokoka ddi n’ova mu tulo two? 
Proverbs6:10 Otulo otutonotono, n’okusumagira akatono, n’okufunya emikono okuwummulako," 
Proverbs6:11 obwavu bulikutuukako ng’omutemu, era n’obwetaavu ng’omutemu." 
Proverbs6:12 Omuntu ataliiko ky’agasa, omusajja omubi agenda ayogera ebigambo ebitabulatabula," 
Proverbs6:13 agenda atemyatemya ku liiso, nga bw’akuba ebigere ate nga bw’asongasonga olunwe," 
Proverbs6:14 olw’omutima omukyamu, ateekateeka okukola ebibi, bulijjo aleeta obutakkaanya mu bantu!" 
Proverbs6:15 Noolwekyo okuzikirira kulimujjira mbagirawo, mu kaseera buseera alibetentebwa awatali kuwona." 
Proverbs6:16 Waliwo ebintu mukaaga Mukama by’akyawa, weewaawo musanvu eby’omuzizo gy’ali." 
Proverbs6:17 Amaaso ag’amalala, emimwa egirimba, okuttira abantu obwereere;" 
Proverbs6:18 omutima ogutegeka okukola ebibi, ebigere ebyanguwa okukola ebibi," 
Proverbs6:19 obujulizi obw’obulimba, n’omuntu aleeta obutakkaanya mu booluganda." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wange nyweza ebiragiro bya kitaawo, era togayaalirira kuyigiriza kwa maama wo." 
Proverbs6:21 Bisibenga ku mutima gwo ennaku zonna era obisibe binywerere mu bulago bwo. 
Proverbs6:22 Bijja kukuluŋŋamyanga buli gy’onoolaganga, ne bw’onoobanga weebase binaakukuumanga, ate ng’ozuukuse binaabanga naawe." 
Proverbs6:23 Kubanga amateeka ttabaaza, era n’okuyigiriza kitangaala, okukulabula olw’okukuluŋŋamya, ly’ekkubo ery’obulamu," 
Proverbs6:24 okukuwonya omukazi ow’ebibi, okukuggya mu kunyumiikiriza kw’omukazi omwenzi." 
Proverbs6:25 Teweegombanga bulungi bwe mu mutima gwo, wadde okumukkiriza okukuwamba n’amaaso ge," 
Proverbs6:26 kubanga malaaya akussa ku muwendo ogugula omugaati, era omukazi omwenzi anoonya kuzikiririza ddala bulamu bwo." 
Proverbs6:27 Omuntu ayinza okuwambaatira omuliro mu kifuba kye, ebyambalo bye ne bitaggya?" 
Proverbs6:28 Oba omuntu ayinza okutambulira ku manda agookya, ebigere bye ne bitasiriira?" 
Proverbs6:29 Bwe kityo bwe kiri eri omusajja agenda ne muka muliraanwa we, buli akwata ku mukazi ng’oyo talirema kubonerezebwa olw’ekibi kye." 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tebasekerera muntu bw’abba, olw’okwewonya enjala." 
Proverbs6:31 Naye bwe bamukwata aba alina okuwa engassi ya mirundi musanvu; ne bwe kiba nga kimumalako ebintu bye byonna eby’omu nju ye. 
Proverbs6:32 Naye buli ayenda ku mukazi talina magezi; kubanga azikiririza ddala emmeeme ye ye. 
Proverbs6:33 Alifuna ebiwundu n’okunyoomebwa; n’obuswavu tebulimusangulibwako. 
Proverbs6:34 Kubanga obuggya buleetera omusajja okuswakira, era taliba na kisa n’akatono nga yeesasuza." 
Proverbs6:35 Talikkiriza mutango gwonna, wadde okuwooyawooyezebwa enguzi ennene." 
Proverbs7:1 Mutabani nyweeza ebigambo byange, era okuumenga ebiragiro byange." 
Proverbs7:2 Kwata ebiragiro byange obeere mulamu, n’amateeka gange ogakuume ng’emmunye y’eriiso lyo;" 
Proverbs7:3 togalekanga kuva mu ngalo zo, gawandiike ku mutima gwo." 
Proverbs7:4 Amagezi gatwalire ddala nga mwannyoko, n’okutegeera, ng’owooluganda ow’omu kika kyo." 
Proverbs7:5 Binaakuwonyanga omukazi omwenzi, omukazi omutambuze awaanawaana n’ebigambo ebisendasenda." 
Proverbs7:6 Lumu nnali nnyimiridde ku ddirisa ly’ennyumba yange. 
Proverbs7:7 Ne ndaba mu bavubuka abatoototo, omulenzi atalina magezi," 
Proverbs7:8 ng’ayita mu luguudo okumpi n’akafo k’omukazi omwenzi, n’akwata ekkubo eridda ku nnyumba y’omukazi oyo," 
Proverbs7:9 olw’eggulo ng’obudde buzibye, ekizikiza nga kikutte." 
Proverbs7:10 Awo omukazi n’ajja okumusisinkana ng’ayambadde nga malaaya, ng’ajjudde ebirowoozo eby’obukaba mu mutima gwe." 
Proverbs7:11 Omukazi omukalukalu, atambulatambula ennyo atabeerako waka," 
Proverbs7:12 wuuyo mu luguudo, wuuyo mu bifo ebikuŋŋaanirwamu, mu buli kafo konna ng’ateega!" 
Proverbs7:13 N’amuvumbagira, n’amunywegera era ng’amutunuulidde nkaliriza n’amaaso agatatya n’amugamba nti:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Nnina ssaddaaka ez’ebiweebwayo olw’emirembe, leero ntukiriza obweyamo bwange." 
Proverbs7:15 Noolwekyo nzize okukusisinkana, mbadde njagala nnyo okukulaba, era kaakano nkusanze." 
Proverbs7:16 Obuliri bwange mbwaze bulungi n’engoye eza linena ava mu Misiri. 
Proverbs7:17 Mbukubye n’akaloosa, n’omugavu, n’obubaane, ne kinamoni, ne kalifuuwa." 
Proverbs7:18 Jjangu tuwoomerwe omukwano okutuusa obudde okukya; leka twesanyuse ffembi mu mukwano. 
Proverbs7:19 Kubanga baze taliiyo eka; yatambula olugendo luwanvu: 
Proverbs7:20 Yagenda n’ensawo y’ensimbi; era alikomawo nga wayiseewo wiiki bbiri.” 
Proverbs7:21 Yamusendasenda n’ebigambo ebisikiriza; n’amuwabya n’ebigambo ebiwoomerera. 
Proverbs7:22 Amangwago omuvubuka n’amugoberera ng’ente etwalibwa okuttibwa obanga empeewo egwa mu mutego," 
Proverbs7:23 okutuusa akasaale lwe kafumita ekibumba kyayo, ng’akanyonyi bwe kanguwa okugwa mu mutego, so tamanyi ng’alifiirwa obulamu bwe." 
Proverbs7:24 Kaakano nno batabani bange mumpulirize, era musseeyo nnyo omwoyo eri ebigambo byange." 
Proverbs7:25 Temukkiriza mitima gyammwe kugoberera bigambo bye; temukkiriza bigere byammwe kukyamira mu makubo ge. 
Proverbs7:26 Kubanga bangi bazikiridde, ddala ab’amaanyi bangi bagudde." 
Proverbs7:27 Ennyumba ye, lye kkubo eridda emagombe, nga likka mu bisenge eby’okufa." 
Proverbs8:1 Amagezi tegakoowoolera waggulu, n’okutegeera ne kuyimusa eddoboozi lyakwo?" 
Proverbs8:2 Ku ntikko y’ebifo ebigulumivu okumpi n’ekkubo, mu masaŋŋanzira, amagezi we gayimirira butengerera," 
Proverbs8:3 ku mabbali g’enzigi eziyingira mu kibuga, ku miryango, gakoowoolera waggulu nga gagamba nti," 
Proverbs8:4 Mmwe abantu, mmwe b’empita; nnyimusa eddoboozi lyange eri buli omu ali ku nsi." 
Proverbs8:5 Mmwe abatategeera mufune okutegeera; nammwe abasirusiru mufune amagezi. 
Proverbs8:6 Muwulirize kubanga nnina ebintu ebikulu eby’okubagamba, era mu kamwa kange muvaamu ebituufu." 
Proverbs8:7 Akamwa kange koogera bituufu byereere; kubanga emimwa gyange gikyawa ebitali bya butuukirivu. 
Proverbs8:8 Ebigambo by’emimwa gyange byonna bya bwenkanya tewali na kimu kikyamu oba kya bukuusa. 
Proverbs8:9 Ebigambo byange byonna bitegeerekeka eri oyo ategeera, era tebirina kabi eri oyo alina amagezi." 
Proverbs8:10 Mu kifo kya ffeeza, londawo okuyigiriza kwange, era n’okumanya mu kifo kya zaabu ennongoose obulungi," 
Proverbs8:11 kubanga amagezi gasinga amayinja ag’omuwendo omungi, era n’ebyo byonna bye weegomba tebiyinza kugeraageranyizibwa nago." 
Proverbs8:12 Nze Magezi, mbeera wamu n’okuteesa okulungi, era mu nze mulimu okumanya n’okwawula ekirungi n’ekibi." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutya Mukama kwe kukyawa ekibi; nkyawa amalala n’okwemanya, n’obuteeyisa bulungi n’enjogera ey’obubambaavu." 
Proverbs8:14 Okuteesa okulungi n’okusalawo okw’amagezi bye byange; ntegeera era ndi wa buyinza. 
Proverbs8:15 Ku bwange, Magezi, bakabaka bafuga, abafuzi ne bakola amateeka ag’obwenkanya." 
Proverbs8:16 Abalangira bafuga ku bwange, n’abakungu bonna abafuga ku nsi." 
Proverbs8:17 Njagala abo abanjagala, n’abo abanyiikira okunnoonya bandaba." 
Proverbs8:18 Obugagga n’ekitiibwa biri mu nze, obugagga obutakoma n’okukulaakulana." 
Proverbs8:19 Ekibala kyange kisinga zaabu ennongoose, n’ebinvaamu bisinga ffeeza ey’omuwendo omungi." 
Proverbs8:20 Ntambulira mu kkubo ery’obutuukirivu, mu kkubo ery’obwenkanya," 
Proverbs8:21 n’abo abanjagala mbagaggawaza era nzijuza amawanika gaabwe. 
Proverbs8:22 Mukama nze gwe yasooka okwoleka nga tannabaako kirala ky’akola. 
Proverbs8:23 Nateekebwawo dda nnyo, ku lubereberye ng’ensi tennabaawo." 
Proverbs8:24 Nateekebwawo ng’obuziba bw’ennyanja tebunnateekebwawo, nga n’emigga egireeta amazzi teginnabaawo," 
Proverbs8:25 ng’ensozi tezinnateekebwa mu bifo byazo, nga n’obusozi tebunnabaawo;" 
Proverbs8:26 nga tannakola nsi newaakubadde amalundiro gaakwo, wadde enfuufu eyasooka ey’oku nsi." 
Proverbs8:27 Naliwo ng’ateekawo eggulu mu kifo kyalyo, ne bwe yakola enkulungo kungulu ku buziba," 
Proverbs8:28 ate ne bwe yawanika ebire n’abinywereza waggulu mu bbanga, n’anywereza ddala ensulo z’amazzi," 
Proverbs8:29 bwe yawa ennyanja ensalo zaazo we zikoma, amazzi galeme kusukka we yagalagira, ne bwe yali ng’alamba emisingi gy’ensi." 
Proverbs8:30 Nnali naye ng’omukozi omukugu, nga nzijudde essanyu lye erya buli lunaku, nga nsanyukira mu maaso ge bulijjo," 
Proverbs8:31 nga nsanyukira mu nsi ye yonna, era nga ne nesiima olw’abaana b’abantu." 
Proverbs8:32 Kale nno, batabani bange mumpulirize; balina omukisa abo abakwata amakubo gange!" 
Proverbs8:33 Muwulirizenga okuyigirizibwa, mubenga n’amagezi, so temugalekanga." 
Proverbs8:34 Alina omukisa omuntu ampuliriza, alindirira nga bw’akuuma ku nzigi zange buli lunaku." 
Proverbs8:35 Kubanga buli andaba afuna obulamu, era afuna okuganja eri Mukama." 
Proverbs8:36 Oyo atannoonya yeerumya yekka, era n’abo bonna abankyawa banoonya kufa." 
Proverbs9:1 Amagezi gazimbye ennyumba yaago, gagizimbidde ku mpagi musanvu." 
Proverbs9:2 Gategese ennyama yaago ne wayini waago; gategese ekijjulo. 
Proverbs9:3 Gatumye abawala abaweereza bakoowoolere mu bifo ebigulumivu nti," 
Proverbs9:4 “Buli atalina kutegeera akyameko wano!” Eri abo abatalina magezi gabagamba nti," 
Proverbs9:5 “Mujje mulye ku mmere yange era munywe ne ku nvinnyo gwe ntabudde. 
Proverbs9:6 Mulekeraawo obutaba na kutegeera mubeere balamu, era mutambulire mu kkubo ly’okumanya.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Oyo anenya omunyoomi ayolekera kuvumwa, n’oyo abuulirira omukozi w’ebibi yeeretera kuvumibwa." 
Proverbs9:8 Tonenyanga munyoomi, aleme okukukyawa, naye nenya ow’amagezi naye anaakwagalanga." 
Proverbs9:9 Yigirizanga ow’amagezi naye aneeyongeranga okuba n’amagezi, yigirizanga omutuukirivu, aneeyongerangako okuyiga." 
Proverbs9:10 “Mu kutya Mukama amagezi mwe gasookera, era n’okumanya oyo Omutukuvu Katonda, kwe kutegeera." 
Proverbs9:11 Ku lwange oliwangaala emyaka mingi nnyo, era olyongerwako emyaka." 
Proverbs9:12 Bw’obeera omugezi, amagezi go gakuyamba, naye bw’onyooma amagezi weerumya wekka.”" 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi omusirusiru aleekaana, taba na mpisa era taba na magezi!" 
Proverbs9:14 Era atuula mu mulyango gw’ennyumba ye, ne ku ntebe mu bifo eby’ekibuga ebisinga obugulumivu," 
Proverbs9:15 ng’akoowoola abo abayitawo, ababa batambula amakubo gaabwe abali ku byabwe." 
Proverbs9:16 Abagamba nti, “Buli alina okumanya okutono ajje muno.” Era eri oyo atalina kutegeera agamba nti," 
Proverbs9:17 “Amazzi amabbe nga gawooma! emmere eriibwa mu kyama ng’ewooma!” 
Proverbs9:18 Naye oyo agwa mu kitimba kye tamanya nti nnyumba yakuzikirira, era nti abagenyi be bali mu buziba obw’emagombe." 
Proverbs10:1 Engero za Sulemaani: Omwana ow’amagezi asanyusa kitaawe; naye omwana omusirusiru anakuwaza nnyina. 
Proverbs10:2 Eby’obugagga ebifuniddwa mu makubo amakyamu tebirina kye bigasa, naye abatuukirivu banunulwa okuva mu kufa." 
Proverbs10:3 Mukama taalekenga mutuukirivu we kufa njala, naye aziyiza abakozi b’ebibi okufuna bye beetaaga." 
Proverbs10:4 Emikono emigayaavu gyavuwaza, naye emikono eminyiikivu gireeta obugagga." 
Proverbs10:5 Omuvubuka ow’amagezi akungulira mu biseera ebituufu, naye oyo eyeebakira mu biro eby’okukunguliramu mwana aswaza ennyo." 
Proverbs10:6 Omukisa gubeera ku mutwe gw’omutuukirivu, naye akamwa k’omukozi w’ebibi kajjula obukambwe." 
Proverbs10:7 Omutuukirivu anajjukirwanga n’essanyu, naye erinnya ly’omubi linaavundanga." 
Proverbs10:8 Alina omutima ogw’amagezi agondera ebiragiro, naye omusirusiru ayogerayogera, azikirizibwa." 
Proverbs10:9 Atambulira mu bwesimbu y’atambula emirembe, naye akwata amakubo amakyamu alitegeerebwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Oyo atta ku liiso ng’akweka amazima aleeta ennaku, n’omusirusiru ayogerayogera alizikirizibwa." 
Proverbs10:11 Akamwa ak’omutuukirivu nsulo ya bulamu, naye akamwa k’omukozi w’ebibi kajjula bulabe." 
Proverbs10:12 Obukyayi buleeta enjawukana, naye okwagala kubikka ku bibi bingi." 
Proverbs10:13 Amagezi gasangibwa ku mimwa gy’oyo alina okutegeera, naye omuggo gukangavvula oyo atamanyi kusalawo bulungi." 
Proverbs10:14 Abantu ab’amagezi batereka okumanya, naye akamwa k’omusirusiru kaaniriza kuzikirira." 
Proverbs10:15 Obugagga bw’omugagga kye kibuga kye ekiriko ebigo, naye obwavu kwe kuzikirira kw’omwavu." 
Proverbs10:16 Empeera y’omutuukirivu bulamu, naye empeera y’omukozi w’ebibi emuleetera kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs10:17 Oyo assaayo omwoyo eri okubuulirirwa aba mu kkubo ery’obulamu, naye oyo atassaayo mwoyo ku kunenyezebwa aleetera abalala okuwaba." 
Proverbs10:18 Oyo akisa obukyayi alina emimwa egirimba, era omuntu akonjera, musirusiru." 
Proverbs10:19 Mu bigambo ebingi temubula kwonoona, naye akuuma olulimi lwe aba wa magezi." 
Proverbs10:20 Olulimi lw’omutuukirivu ffeeza ya muwendo, naye omutima gw’omukozi w’ebibi gugasa katono." 
Proverbs10:21 Ebigambo by’omutuukirivu biriisa abantu bangi, naye abasirusiru bazikirira olw’okubulwa amagezi." 
Proverbs10:22 Omukisa gwa Mukama guleeta obugagga era tagwongerako buyinike. 
Proverbs10:23 Omusirusiru asanyukira okukola ebibi, naye omuntu alina okutegeera asanyukira eby’amagezi." 
Proverbs10:24 Omukozi w’ebibi ky’atayagala kirimutuukako, naye abatuukirivu bye baagala biribaweebwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Embuyaga bw’ejja, abakozi b’ebibi batwalibwa, naye abatuukirivu banywera emirembe gyonna." 
Proverbs10:26 Ng’omususa bwe gunyeenyeza amannyo, n’omukka nga bwe gubalagala mu maaso, n’omugayaavu bw’abeera bw’atyo eri abamutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutya Mukama kuwangaaza omuntu, naye emyaka gy’ababi girisalibwako." 
Proverbs10:28 Essuubi ly’abatuukirivu livaamu ssanyu, naye okusuubira kw’abakozi b’ebibi tekulivaamu kantu." 
Proverbs10:29 Ekkubo lya Mukama kye kiddukiro ky’abatuukirivu, naye abakozi b’ebibi libasaanyaawo." 
Proverbs10:30 Abatuukirivu tebajjululwenga ennaku zonna, naye abakozi b’ebibi tebalisigala mu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Akamwa k’omutuukirivu koogera eby’amagezi, naye olulimi olwogera eby’obubambavu lulisalibwamu." 
Proverbs10:32 Emimwa gy’omutuukirivu gyogera ebisaanidde; naye emimwa gy’omukozi w’ebibi gyogera eby’obubambavu. 
Proverbs11:1 Minzaani eteri ya mazima ya muzizo eri Mukama, naye ebipimo ebituufu bye bimusanyusa." 
Proverbs11:2 Amalala bwe gajja, ng’obuswavu butuuse, naye obwetoowaze buleeta amagezi." 
Proverbs11:3 Obwesimbu bw’abatuukirivu bubaluŋŋamya, naye enkwe z’abatali beesigwa zibazikirizisa." 
Proverbs11:4 Obugagga tebugasa ku lunaku olw’okusalirwako omusango, naye obutuukirivu buwonya okufa." 
Proverbs11:5 Obutuukirivu bw’abalongoofu bubatambuliza mu kkubo eggolokofu naye abakozi b’ebibi bagwa olw’ebikolwa byabwe ebibi. 
Proverbs11:6 Obutuukirivu bw’abagolokofu bubawonya, naye abatali beesigwa bagwa mu mutego olw’okwegomba ebibi." 
Proverbs11:7 Omukozi w’ebibi bw’afa, essuubi lye libula, ne byonna bye yasuubira mu maanyi bikoma." 
Proverbs11:8 Omutuukirivu aggyibwa mu mitawaana, naye jjijjira omukozi w’ebibi." 
Proverbs11:9 Akamwa k’oyo atatya Katonda, kazikiriza muliraanwa, naye olw’okumanya, abatuukirivu bawona." 
Proverbs11:10 Abatuukirivu bwe bakulaakulana ekibuga kijaguza; abakozi b’ebibi bwe bazikirira wawulirwawo amaloboozi ag’essanyu. 
Proverbs11:11 Omukisa gw’abatuukirivu gukulaakulanya ekibuga: naye olw’akamwa k’abakozi b’ebibi, ekibuga kizikirizibwa." 
Proverbs11:12 Omuntu atalina magezi anyooma muliraanwa we, naye omuntu ategeera akuuma olulimi lwe." 
Proverbs11:13 Aseetula olugambo atta obwesigwa, naye omuntu omwesigwa akuuma ekyama." 
Proverbs11:14 Awatali kuluŋŋamizibwa eggwanga lidobonkana, naye abawi b’amagezi abangi baleeta obuwanguzi." 
Proverbs11:15 Eyeeyimirira omuntu gw’atamanyiko alibonaabona, naye oyo akyawa okweyimirira aliba bulungi." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi ow’ekisa aweebwa ekitiibwa, naye abasajja ab’amawaggali bakoma ku bugagga bwokka." 
Proverbs11:17 Omusajja alina ekisa aganyulwa, naye alina ettima yeereetako akabi." 
Proverbs11:18 Omukozi w’ebibi afuna empeera ey’obukuusa, naye oyo asiga eby’obutuukirivu akungula empeera eya nnama ddala." 
Proverbs11:19 Omuntu omutuukirivu ddala alifuna obulamu, naye oyo akola ebitali bya butuukirivu alifa." 
Proverbs11:20 Mukama akyawa abantu abalina emitima emikyamu, naye ab’amakubo amagolokofu be bamusanyusa." 
Proverbs11:21 Mutegeerere ddala ng’abakozi b’ebibi tebalirema kubonerezebwa, naye bazzukulu b’abatuukirivu tebalibaako musango." 
Proverbs11:22 Ng’empeta ya zaabu mu nnyindo y’embizzi, bw’atyo bw’abeera omukazi omulungi atalaba njawulo wakati w’ekirungi n’ekibi." 
Proverbs11:23 Abatuukirivu bye beegomba bivaamu birungi byereere, naye abakozi b’ebibi bye bakola bisunguwaza." 
Proverbs11:24 Omuntu agaba obuteerekereza, yeeyongera bweyongezi kugaggawala; naye akwatirira kye yandigabye, yeeyongera kwavuwala." 
Proverbs11:25 Omuntu agaba anagaggawalanga, n’oyo ayamba talibulako amuyamba." 
Proverbs11:26 Abantu bakolimira oyo akweka eŋŋaano mu kiseera eky’obwetaavu, naye oyo agitunda mu kiseera ekyo afuna emikisa." 
Proverbs11:27 Oyo anyiikira okukola obulungi afuna okuganja, naye oyo anoonya ekibi, kimujjira." 
Proverbs11:28 Oyo eyeesiga obugagga bwe aligwa, naye abatuukirivu banaakulaakulananga ne baba ng’amalagala amalamu." 
Proverbs11:29 Omuntu aleeta emitawaana mu maka g’ewaabwe, alisikira mpewo; era n’omusirusiru aliba muddu w’oyo alina omutima ogw’amagezi." 
Proverbs11:30 Ekibala ky’omutuukirivu muti gwa bulamu, era n’oyo asikiriza emyoyo gy’abantu ne balokoka wa magezi." 
Proverbs11:31 Obanga omutuukirivu alifuna ekimusaanidde ku nsi kuno, oyo atatya Katonda n’omwonoonyi balirema obutafuna ekibasaanidde?" 
Proverbs12:1 Buli asanyukira okukangavvulwa ayagala amagezi; naye oyo akyawa okunenyezebwa musirusiru. 
Proverbs12:2 Omuntu omulungi aganja mu maaso ga Mukama, naye Mukama asalira omusango omuntu ow’enkwe." 
Proverbs12:3 Omuntu tanywezebwa lwa kukola bitali bya butuukirivu, naye omulandira gw’omutuukirivu tegulisigulwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Omukyala ow’empisa ennungi ssanyu era ngule ya mwami we, naye omukazi eyeeyisa obubi ali nga kookolo mu magumba ga bba." 
Proverbs12:5 Enteekateeka z’omutuukirivu ziba za mazima, naye amagezi g’abakozi b’ebibi ge bawa gaba ga bulimba." 
Proverbs12:6 Ebiteeso by’abakozi b’ebibi kuyiwa musaayi, naye ebigambo by’abatuukirivu bye bibawonya." 
Proverbs12:7 Abakozi b’ebibi bagwa ne basaanirawo ddala, naye ennyumba y’omutuukirivu teesagaasaganenga emirembe gyonna." 
Proverbs12:8 Ebigambo by’omugezi bimuleetera okusiimibwa, naye eby’omusirusiru bimunyoomesa." 
Proverbs12:9 Omuntu eyeetoowaza ne yeekolera, asinga oyo eyeegulumiza n’abulwa ky’alya." 
Proverbs12:10 Omutuukirivu afaayo ku bisolo bye, naye omukozi w’ebibi abiraga bukambwe bwereere." 
Proverbs12:11 Oyo eyeerimira aliba n’emmere nnyingi, naye oyo anoonya ebitaliimu talina magezi." 
Proverbs12:12 Abakozi b’ebibi baagala okubba omunyago gwa babbi bannaabwe, naye omulandira gw’abatuukirivu gunywera." 
Proverbs12:13 Ebigambo by’omukozi w’ebibi bimusuula mu mitawaana, naye omutuukirivu awona akabi." 
Proverbs12:14 Omuntu ajjuzibwa ebirungi okuva mu bibala bye bigambo by’akamwa ke, n’emirimu gy’emikono gye gimusasula bulungi." 
Proverbs12:15 Ekkubo ly’omusirusiru ddungi mu kulaba kwe ye, naye omugezi assaayo omwoyo ku magezi agamuweebwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Omusirusiru alaga mangu obusungu bwe, naye omutegeevu tassa mwoyo ku kivume." 
Proverbs12:17 Omujulizi ow’amazima awa obujulizi obutuufu, naye omujulizi ow’obulimba ayogera bya bulimba." 
Proverbs12:18 Ebigambo ebyanguyirize bisala ng’ekitala ekyogi, naye olulimi lw’omuntu omugezi luwonya." 
Proverbs12:19 Emimwa egyogera amazima gibeerera emirembe gyonna, naye olulimi olulimba lwa kiseera buseera." 
Proverbs12:20 Obulimba buli mu mitima gyabo abategeka okukola ebibi, naye essanyu liri n’abo abakolerera emirembe." 
Proverbs12:21 Tewali kabi konna kagwa ku batuukirivu, naye abakozi b’ebibi tebaggwaako mitawaana." 
Proverbs12:22 Mukama akyawa emimwa egirimba, naye asanyukira ab’amazima." 
Proverbs12:23 Omuntu omutegeevu talaga nnyo by’amanyi, naye abasirusiru balaga obutamanya bwabwe." 
Proverbs12:24 Omukono gw’omunyiikivu gulimufuula omufuzi, naye obugayaavu bufuula omuntu omuddu." 
Proverbs12:25 Omutima ogweraliikirira guleetera omuntu okwennyika, naye ekigambo eky’ekisa kimusanyusa." 
Proverbs12:26 Omutuukirivu yeegendereza mu mikwano gye, naye ekkubo ly’ababi libabuza." 
Proverbs12:27 Omuntu omugayaavu tayokya muyiggo gwe, naye omunyiikivu kyayizze, kiba kya muwendo gyali." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu kkubo ery’obutuukirivu mulimu obulamu, era mu kkubo eryo temuli kufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana omugezi assaayo omwoyo eri ebiragiro bya kitaawe, naye omunyoomi tafaayo ku kunenyezebwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Omuntu asanyuka olw’ebirungi ebiva mu bibala bya kamwa ke, naye atali mwesigwa yeegomba kuleeta ntalo." 
Proverbs13:3 Oyo eyeegendereza by’ayogera akuuma obulamu bwe, naye oyo amala googera, alizikirira." 
Proverbs13:4 Omuntu omugayaavu yeegomba kyokka n’atabaako ky’afuna, naye omunyiikivu byayagala byonna abifuna." 
Proverbs13:5 Omuntu omutuukirivu akyawa obulimba, naye omukozi w’ebibi yeereetera kunyoomebwa." 
Proverbs13:6 Obutuukirivu bukuuma omuntu omwesimbu, naye okukola ebibi kuzikiriza omwonoonyi." 
Proverbs13:7 Omuntu omu ayinza okwefuula omugagga ate nga taliiko ky’alina, ate omulala ne yeefuula okuba omwavu so nga mugagga nnyo." 
Proverbs13:8 Obugagga bw’omuntu buyinza okumununula, naye omwavu talina ky’atya." 
Proverbs13:9 Ekitangaala ky’abatuukirivu kyaka nnyo, naye ettaala y’abakozi b’ebibi ezikira." 
Proverbs13:10 Amalala gazaala buzaazi nnyombo, naye amagezi gasangibwa mu abo abakkiriza okulabulwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Ensimbi enkumpanye ziggwaawo, naye ezijja empolampola zeeyongera obungi." 
Proverbs13:12 Essuubi erirwawo okutuukirira lirwaza omutima, naye ekyegombebwa bwe kituukirira kiba muti gwa bulamu." 
Proverbs13:13 Omuntu anyooma ebiragiro aligwa mu mitawaana, naye oyo awuliriza ebimulagirwa aliweebwa empeera." 
Proverbs13:14 Okuyigiriza kw’omuntu alina amagezi nsulo ya bulamu, era kuggya omuntu mu mitego gy’okufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Okutegeera okulungi kuleeta okuganja, naye ekkubo ly’abateesigibwa liba zzibu." 
Proverbs13:16 Omuntu omwegendereza akola amaze kulowooza, naye omusirusiru alaga obutamanya bwe." 
Proverbs13:17 Omubaka omubi yeesuula mu mitawaana, naye omubaka omwesigwa aleeta kuwonyezebwa." 
Proverbs13:18 Anyooma okukangavvulwa yeereetako obwavu n’obuswavu, naye oyo assaayo omwoyo ku kunenyezebwa aweebwa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Ekyegombebwa bwe kituukirira kisanyusa omutima, naye okulekayo okukola ebibi kya muzizo eri abasirusiru." 
Proverbs13:20 Oyo atambula n’abantu abagezi ageziwala, naye oyo atambula n’abasirusiru alaba ennaku." 
Proverbs13:21 Emitawaana gigoberera aboonoonyi, naye okukulaakulana y’empeera y’abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu omulungi alekera bazzukulu be ebyobusika, naye obugagga bw’omwonoonyi buterekerwa omutuukirivu." 
Proverbs13:23 Ennimiro z’abaavu ziyinza okuvaamu emmere nnyingi, naye obutali bwenkanya ne bugyera yonna." 
Proverbs13:24 Atakozesa kaggo akyawa omwana we, naye oyo amwagala afaayo okumukangavvula." 
Proverbs13:25 Omutuukirivu alya emmere ye n’akkuta, naye abakozi b’ebibi basigala nga bayala." 
Proverbs14:1 Omukazi ow’amagezi yeezimbira ennyumba ye, naye omusirusiru eyiye agyemenyera n’emikono gye." 
Proverbs14:2 Omuntu atambulira mu bugolokofu atya Mukama, naye ow’amakubo amakyamu anyooma Mukama." 
Proverbs14:3 Ebigambo by’omusirusiru bye bimuviirako okukubwa, naye eby’abatuukirivu binaabakuumanga." 
Proverbs14:4 Awataba nte nnume ezirima ebyagi biba bikalu, naye emmere ennyingi eva mu maanyi gaazo." 
Proverbs14:5 Omujulizi ow’amazima talimba, naye ow’obulimba ayogera bya bulimba." 
Proverbs14:6 Omukudaazi anoonya amagezi n’atagalaba, naye okumanya kwanguyira omuntu ategeera." 
Proverbs14:7 Teweeretereza muntu musirusiru, kubanga tewali by’amagezi biva mu kamwa ke." 
Proverbs14:8 Omutegeevu mugezi kubanga afaayo okutegeera by’akola, naye atalina magezi musirusiru kubanga yeerimba nti amanyi." 
Proverbs14:9 Abasirusiru banyooma okugololwa nga bakoze ensobi, naye abalongoofu baagala emirembe." 
Proverbs14:10 Buli mutima gumanya okulumwa kwagwo, tewali ayinza kugusanyukirako." 
Proverbs14:11 Ennyumba y’abakozi b’ebibi erizikirizibwa, naye eweema y’abatuukirivu erikulaakulana." 
Proverbs14:12 Waliwo ekkubo erirabika nga ttuufu eri omuntu, naye ng’enkomerero yaalyo kufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Enseko zandibaawo naye ng’omutima gujjudde ennaku, era n’enkomerero y’essanyu eyinza okufuuka obuyinike." 
Proverbs14:14 Omuntu atalina kukkiriza alisasulwa empeera emusaanira olw’ebikolwa bye, n’omuntu omulungi naye alisasulwa eyiye." 
Proverbs14:15 Ow’amagezi amatono amala gakkiriza buli kigambo ky’awulira, naye omuntu omutegeevu yeegendereza amakubo ge." 
Proverbs14:16 Omuntu ow’amagezi atya Mukama n’aleka okukola ebibi, naye omusirusiru yeepankapanka era teyeegendereza." 
Proverbs14:17 Omuntu asunguwala amangu akola eby’obusirusiru, n’omukalabakalaba akyayibwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Abatalina magezi basikira butaliimu, naye abategeevu batikkirwa engule ey’okumanya." 
Proverbs14:19 Abakozi b’ebibi balivuunamira abatuukirivu, n’aboonoonyi ne bavuunama mu miryango gy’abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs14:20 Omwavu alagajjalirwa abantu nga ne muliraanwa we omutwaliddemu, naye abagagga baba n’emikwano mingi." 
Proverbs14:21 Anyooma muliraanwa we akola kibi, naye alina omukisa oyo asaasira abaavu." 
Proverbs14:22 Abateekateeka okukola ebibi, tebawaba? Naye okwagala n’amazima binaabeeranga n’abo abateesa okukola obulungi." 
Proverbs14:23 Buli mulimu ogukolebwa n’amaanyi gubaako amagoba, naye okwogera obwogezi kireeta bwavu bwokka." 
Proverbs14:24 Abagezi bafuna engule ey’obugagga, naye obusirusiru bw’abatalina magezi buzaala busirusiru." 
Proverbs14:25 Omujulizi ow’amazima awonya obulamu bw’abantu, naye omujulizi ow’obulimba aba mulimba." 
Proverbs14:26 Atya Mukama alina ekiddukiro eky’amaanyi, era n’abaana be balibeera n’obuddukiro." 
Proverbs14:27 Okutya Mukama ye nsulo y’obulamu, kuleetera omuntu okwewala emitego gy’okufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Ekitiibwa kya kabaka kiri mu kuba n’abantu bangi, naye omukulembeze ataba n’abantu abeera mu kabi." 
Proverbs14:29 Omuntu omugumiikiriza aba n’okutegeera kungi, naye oyo asunguwala amangu ayolesa obusirusiru." 
Proverbs14:30 Omutima ogulina emirembe guwangaaza omuntu, naye obuggya buvunza amagumba ge." 
Proverbs14:31 Omuntu atulugunya abaavu anyooma oyo eyabatonda, naye buli abakwatirwa ekisa, agulumiza Katonda." 
Proverbs14:32 Akacwano bwe kajja, omukozi w’ebibi agwa, naye omutuukirivu ne mu kufa aba n’obuddukiro." 
Proverbs14:33 Amagezi gabeera mu mutima gw’omuntu alina okutegeera, era yeeyoleka ne mu basirusiru." 
Proverbs14:34 Obutuukirivu buzimba eggwanga, naye ekibi kiswaza abantu ab’engeri zonna." 
Proverbs14:35 Kabaka asanyukira omuddu akola eby’amagezi, naye obusungu bwa kabaka bunaabuubuukiranga ku oyo akola ebiswaza." 
Proverbs15:1 Okuddamu n’eggonjebwa kumalawo ekiruyi, naye ekigambo eky’obukambwe kisaanuula obusungu." 
Proverbs15:2 Olulimi lw’omugezi lwogera by’amagezi, naye akamwa k’abasirusiru kafukumula busirusiru bwereere." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaaso ga Mukama galaba buli wantu, alaba abatuukirivu n’abakozi b’ebibi." 
Proverbs15:4 Olulimi oluzimba muti gwa bulamu, naye olulimi olulimba lubetenta omutima." 
Proverbs15:5 Omusirusiru anyooma okubuulirirwa kwa kitaawe, naye omutegeevu assaayo omwoyo eri okunenyezebwa." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu nnyumba y’omutuukirivu mubaamu obugagga bungi, naye omukozi w’ebibi by’afuna, bimuleetera emitawaana." 
Proverbs15:7 Akamwa k’amagezi kabunyisa okumanya, naye omutima gw’abasirusiru si bwe gukola." 
Proverbs15:8 Ssaddaaka y’aboonoonyi ya muzizo eri Mukama, naye okusaba kw’abalongoofu lye ssanyu lye." 
Proverbs15:9 Ekkubo ly’omwonoonyi lya muzizo eri Mukama, naye Mukama ayagala oyo anoonya obutuukirivu." 
Proverbs15:10 Oyo aleka ekkubo ettuufu alikangavvulwa n’amaanyi, n’oyo akyawa okunenyezebwa alifa." 
Proverbs15:11 Okufa n’okuzikirira biri mu maaso ga Mukama, n’okulaba alaba nnyo emitima gy’abaana b’abantu!" 
Proverbs15:12 Omunyoomi tayagala kunenyezebwa, era teeyeebuuza ku b’amagezi." 
Proverbs15:13 Omutima omusanyufu guleeta essanyu ku maaso, naye omutima omunyiikaavu gunafuya emmeeme." 
Proverbs15:14 Omutima omutegeevu gunoonya okumanya, naye akamwa k’abasirusiru kalya busirusiru." 
Proverbs15:15 Omuntu bw’aba omunyiikaavu, buli kimu kimwononekera, naye omutima omusanyufu gujaguza buli kaseera." 
Proverbs15:16 Okuba n’akatono ng’otya Mukama, kusinga okuba n’ebingi naye ng’oli mu mitawaana." 
Proverbs15:17 Okulya emmere ng’eriko enva endiirwa awali okwagalana, kisinga okuliirako ebyassava awali obukyayi." 
Proverbs15:18 Omuntu asunguwala amangu asaanuula oluyombo, naye omugumiikiriza akakkanya embeera." 
Proverbs15:19 Ekkubo ly’omugayaavu lijjula amaggwa, naye ekkubo ly’omutuukirivu golokofu." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana omugezi asanyusa kitaawe, naye omuntu omusirusiru anyooma nnyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Obusirusiru ssanyu eri oyo atalina magezi, naye omuntu ategeera atambulira mu kkubo eggolokofu." 
Proverbs15:22 Awatali kuluŋŋamizibwa entegeka zifa, naye awali abawi b’amagezi abangi ziyitamu." 
Proverbs15:23 Okuddamu obulungi kisanyusa, era kirungi ekigambo ekirungi okujjira mu kiseera ekituufu." 
Proverbs15:24 Ekkubo ery’obulamu liyimusa omugezi, ne limuziyiza okukka emagombe." 
Proverbs15:25 Mukama azikiriza ennyumba y’ab’amalala, kyokka akuuma ensalo za nnamwandu." 
Proverbs15:26 Enkwe za muzizo eri Mukama, naye ebigambo ebisaanidde, bimusanyusa." 
Proverbs15:27 Oyo anoonya okugaggawalira mu bukyamu aleetera ennyumba ye emitawaana, naye oyo akyawa enguzi aliba mulamu." 
Proverbs15:28 Omutima gw’omutuukirivu gufumiitiriza bye gunaayanukula, naye akamwa k’omwonoonyi kafubutula ebitasaana." 
Proverbs15:29 Mukama ali wala n’aboonoonyi, naye awulira okusaba kw’abatuukirivu." 
Proverbs15:30 Amaaso agajjudde essanyu gasanyusa omutima, n’amawulire amalungi galeetera amagumba obulamu." 
Proverbs15:31 Oyo assaayo omwoyo eri okunenyezebwa okuleeta obulamu, alituula wamu n’abagezi." 
Proverbs15:32 Agayaalirira okubuulirirwa yeerumya yekka, naye oyo assaayo omwoyo eri okunenyezebwa afuna okutegeera." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutya Mukama kuyigiriza omuntu amagezi, n’obwetoowaze kye kitiibwa ky’omuntu oyo." 
Proverbs16:1 Omuntu ateekateeka by’ayagala okukola mu mutima gwe, Naye okuddamu kuva eri Mukama." 
Proverbs16:2 Amakubo g’omuntu gonna gaba matuufu mu maaso ge ye, naye Mukama y’apima ebigendererwa." 
Proverbs16:3 Emirimu gyo gyonna gikwasenga Mukama, naye anaatuukirizanga entegeka zo." 
Proverbs16:4 Mukama buli kimu akikola ng’alina ekigendererwa, n’abakozi b’ebibi y’abakolera olunaku lwe batuukibwako ebizibu." 
Proverbs16:5 Buli muntu alina omutima ogw’amalala wa muzizo eri Mukama; weewaawo talirema kubonerezebwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Olw’okwagala n’olw’obwesigwa, ekibi kisasulibwa, n’okutya Mukama kuleetera omuntu okwewala okukola ebibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Amakubo g’omuntu bwe gaba gasanyusa Mukama, aleetera abalabe b’omuntu oyo okubeera naye mu mirembe." 
Proverbs16:8 Akatono akafune mu butuukirivu, kasinga obugagga obungi obufune mu bukyamu." 
Proverbs16:9 Omutima gw’omuntu guteekateeka ekkubo lye, naye Mukama y’aluŋŋamya bw’anaatambula." 
Proverbs16:10 Kabaka ky’ayogera kiba ng’ekiva eri Katonda, n’akamwa ke tekasaanye kwogera bitali bya bwenkanya." 
Proverbs16:11 Ebipimo ne minzaani ebituufu bya Mukama, ebipimo byonna ebikozesebwa y’abikola." 
Proverbs16:12 Kya muzizo bakabaka okukola ebibi, kubanga entebe ye ey’obwakabaka enywezebwa butuukirivu." 
Proverbs16:13 Akamwa akogera eby’amazima bakabaka ke basanyukira, era baagala oyo ayogera amazima." 
Proverbs16:14 Obusungu bwa kabaka buli ng’ababaka abaleese okufa, omusajja ow’amagezi alibukkakkanya." 
Proverbs16:15 Kabaka bw’asanyuka kireeta obulamu; n’okuganza kwe, kuli nga ekire eky’enkuba mu biseera ebya ttoggo." 
Proverbs16:16 Okufuna amagezi nga kusinga nnyo okufuna zaabu, era n’okufuna okutegeera kikira ffeeza!" 
Proverbs16:17 Ekkubo ly’abagolokofu kwe kwewala ebibi, n’oyo eyeekuuma mu kutambula kwe, awonya emmeeme ye." 
Proverbs16:18 Amalala gakulembera okuzikirira, n’omwoyo ogwegulumiza gukulembera ekigwo." 
Proverbs16:19 Okubeera n’omwoyo ogwetoowaza era n’okubeera n’abaavu, kisinga okugabana omunyago n’ab’amalala." 
Proverbs16:20 Oyo assaayo omwoyo ku kuyigirizibwa alikulaakulana, era alina omukisa oyo eyeesiga Mukama." 
Proverbs16:21 Abalina emitima egy’amagezi baliyitibwa bategeevu, n’enjogera ennungi eyongera okuyamba okutegeera." 
Proverbs16:22 Amagezi nsulo ya bulamu eri oyo agalina, naye obusirusiru buleetera abasirusiru okubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs16:23 Omutima gw’omuntu ow’amagezi gumuwa enjogera ennungi, era akamwa ke kayigiriza abalala." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebigambo ebirungi biri ng’ebisenge by’omubisi gw’enjuki, biwoomera emmeeme, ne biwonya n’amagumba." 
Proverbs16:25 Wabaawo ekkubo erirabika ng’ettuufu eri omuntu, naye ku nkomerero limutuusa mu kufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Okwagala okulya kuleetera omuntu okukola n’amaanyi, kubanga enjala emukubiriza okweyongera okukola." 
Proverbs16:27 Omuntu omusirusiru ategeka okukola ebitali bya butuukirivu, era n’ebigambo bye, biri ng’omuliro ogwokya ennyo." 
Proverbs16:28 Omuntu omubambaavu asiikuula entalo, n’ow’olugambo ayawukanya ab’omukwano enfirabulago." 
Proverbs16:29 Omuntu omukyamu asendasenda muliraanwa we n’amutwala mu kkubo eritali ttuufu. 
Proverbs16:30 Omuntu atemya ku liiso ateekateeka kwonoona, n’oyo asongoza emimwa ategeka kukola bitali birungi." 
Proverbs16:31 Omutwe ogw’envi ngule ya kitiibwa, gufunibwa abo abatambulira mu bulamu obutuukirivu." 
Proverbs16:32 Omuntu omugumiikiriza asinga omutabaazi, n’oyo afuga obusungu bwe akira awamba ekibuga." 
Proverbs16:33 Akalulu kayinza okukubibwa, naye okusalawo kwa byonna kuva eri Mukama." 
Proverbs17:1 Okulya akamere akaluma awali emirembe, kisinga okuba mu nnyumba ejjudde ebyassava nga mulimu entalo." 
Proverbs17:2 Omuddu omugezi alifuga omwana wa bowo akwasa ensonyi, era alifuna ebyobusika ng’omu ku baana b’awaka." 
Proverbs17:3 Entamu erongoosa yakolebwa lwa ffeeza, n’ekikoomi ky’okulongoosa lwa zaabu, naye Mukama agezesa emitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Omubi assaayo omwoyo eri eby’obulimba, era n’omulimba awuliriza olulimi olukuusa." 
Proverbs17:5 Oyo akudaalira omwavu avvoola eyamutonda, n’oyo asanyukira obuyinike bw’abalala talirema kubonerezebwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Abazzukulu ngule ya bajjajjaabwe, era n’abaana beenyumiririza mu bakadde baabwe." 
Proverbs17:7 Enjogerannungi teba ya musirusiru, ng’oweekitiibwa bw’atasaana kwogera bya bulimba." 
Proverbs17:8 Enguzi eri ng’ejjinja ery’omufuusa mu maaso g’oyo agigaba, alowooza nti buli gy’akyukira eneemuyamba." 
Proverbs17:9 Okwagala tekulondoola nsobi, naye oyo atasonyiwa nsobi akyawaganya ab’omukwano enfirabulago." 
Proverbs17:10 Okunenya kuyamba nnyo omuntu ategeera, okusinga okukuba omusirusiru embooko ekikumi." 
Proverbs17:11 Omukozi w’ebibi anoonya bujeemu bwereere, era kyaliva asindikirwa omubaka omukambwe." 
Proverbs17:12 Okusisinkana eddubu enyagiddwako abaana baayo, kisinga okusisinkana omusirusiru mu busirusiru bwe." 
Proverbs17:13 Omuntu bw’asasula ekibi olw’obulungi, ekibi tekiriva mu nnyumba ye." 
Proverbs17:14 Okutandika oluyombo kuli ng’omuntu bw’asumulula omudumu gw’amazzi, noolwekyo vvaawo ng’oluyombo terunnatandika." 
Proverbs17:15 Eyejjeereza omukozi w’ebibi n’oyo avumirira omutuukirivu, bombi ba muzizo eri Mukama." 
Proverbs17:16 Omusirusiru agasibwa ki okuba ne ssente ezisasulibwa amagezi, ng’ate ye talina mutima gwegomba magezi?" 
Proverbs17:17 Omukwano ogw’amagezi guba gwa lubeerera, era owooluganda yeesigibwa mu biro eby’ennaku." 
Proverbs17:18 Omuntu atalina magezi awa obweyamo ne yeetema okusasula amabanja ga muliraanwa we. 
Proverbs17:19 Oyo ayagala ekibi anyumirwa ennyombo, n’oyo akola omulyango omunene ogw’omu maaso gwa bbugwe ye nga guyitiridde obunene gulimuteganya nnyo." 
Proverbs17:20 Omuntu ow’omutima omubambaavu takulaakulana, n’oyo ow’olulimi olulimba agwa mu katyabaga." 
Proverbs17:21 Omwana omusirusiru aleetera kitaawe obuyinike, kitaawe w’omusirusiru taba na ssanyu." 
Proverbs17:22 Omutima ogw’essanyu ddagala ddungi, naye omwoyo omunyiikaavu gukozza omubiri." 
Proverbs17:23 Omuntu omubi alya enguzi mu kyama, alyoke aziyize amazima okweyoleka." 
Proverbs17:24 Omuntu omutegeevu, ebirowoozo abissa eri amagezi, naye amaaso g’omusirusiru gasamaalirira ensi gy’ekoma." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana omusirusiru buyinike eri kitaawe, era aleeta ennaku eri nnyina eyamuzaala." 
Proverbs17:26 Si kirungi okuweesa omutuukirivu engassi ey’obwereere wadde okukuba ab’ekitiibwa embooko olw’obwesimbu bwabwe. 
Proverbs17:27 Omuntu omwegendereza mu bigambo bye abeera n’okutegeera, n’oyo alina omwoyo omuteefu aba muntu wa magezi." 
Proverbs17:28 Omusirusiru bw’asirika alowoozebwa okuba n’amugezi, era aba mutegeevu bw’afuga akamwa ke." 
Proverbs18:1 Eyeggya ku banne aba yeerowoozako yekka, era tawuliriza magezi gamuweebwa." 
Proverbs18:2 Omusirusiru tasanyukira kutegeera, ky’asanyukira kyokka kwe kwogera by’alowooza." 
Proverbs18:3 Okukola ekibi bwe kujja n’okunyooma kujjirako, era awali okuyisaamu omuntu amaaso wabaawo okunyoomoola." 
Proverbs18:4 Ebigambo by’omu kamwa k’omuntu mazzi ga buziba, naye ensulo ey’amagezi mugga ogukulukuta." 
Proverbs18:5 Si kirungi kuttira mubi ku liiso, oba okusaliriza omutuukirivu." 
Proverbs18:6 Akamwa k’omusirusiru kamuleetera entalo era akamwa ke kamuleetera okukubwa emiggo. 
Proverbs18:7 Akamwa k’omusirusiru ke kamuleetera okuzikirira, era n’emimwa gye mutego eri emmeeme ye." 
Proverbs18:8 Ebigambo by’omuntu ageya biri ng’emmere ewoomerera, bigenda mu bitundu by’omubiri eby’ewala." 
Proverbs18:9 Omuntu omugayaavu mu mirimu gy’akola, waluganda n’oyo azikiriza." 
Proverbs18:10 Erinnya lya Mukama kigo ky’amaanyi, omutuukirivu addukira omwo n’afuna emirembe." 
Proverbs18:11 Obugagga bw’omugagga, kye kibuga kye ekiriko bbugwe ow’amaanyi, era mu kulaba kwe, kigo kye ekigumu ekitarinnyika." 
Proverbs18:12 Omuntu nga tannagwa, omutima gwe gwegulumiza, naye okwetoowaza kumuweesa ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Oyo addamu amangu mu nsonga gy’ateetegerezza, buba busirusiru bwe era buswavu." 
Proverbs18:14 Omwoyo gw’omuntu gumuwanirira mu bulwadde, naye emmeeme eyennyise ani ayinza okugigumiikiriza?" 
Proverbs18:15 Omutima gw’omwegendereza guyiga okumanya, amatu g’omuntu omugezi gawuliriza." 
Proverbs18:16 Ekirabo ky’omuntu kimuseguliza, era kimutuusa ne mu maaso g’abeekitiibwa." 
Proverbs18:17 Asooka okweyogerako y’afaanana ng’omutuufu, okutuusa omulala lw’amubuuza ebibuuzo." 
Proverbs18:18 Okukuba akalulu kimalawo empaka, era kisalawo eggoye wakati w’abawakana ab’amaanyi." 
Proverbs18:19 Kyangu okuwamba ekibuga ekiriko bbugwe ow’amaanyi, okusinga okukomyawo owooluganda anyiize, era ennyombo ziba ng’empagi z’ekigo." 
Proverbs18:20 Omuntu anakkutanga ebigambo ebiva mu kamwa ke; ebibala ebijjula akamwa ke bye binamukkusanga. 
Proverbs18:21 Olulimi lulina obuyinza okuwa obulamu oba okutta, era n’abo abalwagala balirya ebibala byalwo." 
Proverbs18:22 Azuula omukazi omulungi ow’okuwasa aba azudde ekirungi, era aganja eri Mukama." 
Proverbs18:23 Omwavu yeegayirira, naye omugagga addamu na bbogo." 
Proverbs18:24 Akwana emikwano emingi yeereetera okuzikirira, naye wabaawo ow’omukwano akwagala ennyo okusinga owooluganda." 
Proverbs19:1 Omuntu omwavu atambulira mu butuukirivu, asinga akamwa ak’omusirusiru akaweebuula." 
Proverbs19:2 Si kirungi okuba omujjumbize naye nga tolina kumanya, n’okwanguyiriza okukola ekintu kuleetera omuntu okukwata ekkubo ekyamu." 
Proverbs19:3 Obusirusiru bw’omuntu bwe bwonoona obulamu bwe, kyokka omutima gwe ne gunenya Mukama." 
Proverbs19:4 Obugagga buleeta emikwano mingi, naye emikwano gy’omwavu gimuddukako." 
Proverbs19:5 Omujulizi ow’obulimba talirema kubonerezebwa, era oyo ayogera eby’obulimba taliba na buddukiro." 
Proverbs19:6 Bangi banoonya okuganja mu maaso g’omufuzi, era buli muntu aba mukwano gw’oyo agaba ebirabo." 
Proverbs19:7 Baganda b’omwavu bonna bamwewala, mikwano gye tebaasingewo nnyo okumwewala? Wadde abagoberera ng’abeegayirira, naye tabalaba." 
Proverbs19:8 Oyo afuna amagezi ayagala emmeeme ye, n’oyo asanyukira okutegeera, akulaakulana." 
Proverbs19:9 Omujulizi ow’obulimba talirema kubonerezebwa, n’oyo ayogera eby’obulimba alizikirira." 
Proverbs19:10 Omusirusiru tasaana kubeera mu bulamu bwa kwejalabya, kale kiwulikika kitya ng’omuddu afuga abalangira?" 
Proverbs19:11 Omuntu omutegeevu alwawo okusunguwala, era kiba kya kitiibwa obutafa ku bye bamusobezza." 
Proverbs19:12 Obusungu bwa kabaka buli ng’okuwuluguma kw’empologoma, naye ekisa kye kiri ng’omusulo ku ssubi." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana omusirusiru aleetera kitaawe okuzikirira, n’omukazi omuyombi ali ng’enkuba etonnya olutata." 
Proverbs19:14 Ennyumba n’obugagga bisikirwa okuva ku bazadde, naye omukazi omutegeevu ava eri Mukama." 
Proverbs19:15 Obugayaavu buleeta otulo tungi, n’omuntu atakola mirimu alirumwa enjala." 
Proverbs19:16 Oyo akwata ebiragiro akuuma obulamu bwe, naye oyo eyeeyisa mu ngeri embi alifa." 
Proverbs19:17 Oyo akwatirwa omwavu ekisa awola Mukama, era Mukama alimusasula olw’ekikolwa kye ekyo." 
Proverbs19:18 Kangavvulanga omwana wo kubanga mu ekyo mulimu essuubi, oleme kumuwaayo mu kuzikirira." 
Proverbs19:19 Omuntu omukambwe ennyo alisasula ebiriva mu bukambwe bwe, kubanga ne bw’omununula ogusooka era oteekwa okukiddiŋŋaana." 
Proverbs19:20 Ssangayo omwoyo ku magezi agakuweebwa ne ku kuyigirizibwa, oluvannyuma lwa byonna oliba n’amagezi." 
Proverbs19:21 Enteekateeka z’omuntu ziba nnyingi mu mutima gwe; byo ebigendererwa bya Mukama bituukirira. 
Proverbs19:22 Ekintu omuntu kye yeegomba kwe kwagala okutaggwaawo, okuba omwavu kisinga okuba omulimba." 
Proverbs19:23 Okutya Mukama kutuusa mu bulamu; olwo omuntu n’awummula nga mumativu nga tatuukiddwako kabi. 
Proverbs19:24 Omugayaavu annyika omukono gwe mu kibya, n’atagukomyawo nate ku mumwa gwe." 
Proverbs19:25 Kangavvula omunyoomi, abatamanyi bayigire ku ye, buulirira ategeera, ajja kweyongera okutegeera." 
Proverbs19:26 Omwana abba ebya kitaawe n’agobaganya ne nnyina, aleeta obuswavu n’obuyinike." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wange konoolekayo okuyigirizibwa, onoowaba okuva ku bigambo by’okumanya." 
Proverbs19:28 Omujulizi omulimba atyoboola ensala ey’amazima, n’akamwa k’ababi, kavaabira ebitali bya butuukirivu." 
Proverbs19:29 Ebibonerezo bitekebwawo kukangavvula banyoomi, n’embooko zaakolebwa lwa migongo gy’abasirusiru." 
Proverbs20:1 Omwenge mukudaazi, ekitamiiza muleekaanyi, era buli alaga mu kkubo ekyamu olw’ebyo talina magezi." 
Proverbs20:2 Obusungu bwa kabaka buli ng’okuwuluguma kw’empologoma, n’oyo amusunguwaza yeefiiriza bulamu bwe." 
Proverbs20:3 Kya kitiibwa omuntu okwewala entalo, naye buli musirusiru ayagala okuyomba." 
Proverbs20:4 Omugayaavu talima mu budde butuufu, kyanaavanga anoonya eby’amakungula nga talina kantu." 
Proverbs20:5 Ebigendererwa ebiba mu mutima gw’omuntu biba ng’amazzi ag’ebuziba, naye omuntu alina okutegeera alibiggyayo." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu bangi bagamba nti balina okwagala okutaggwaawo, naye ani ayinza okuzuula omuntu omwesigwa?" 
Proverbs20:7 Omuntu omutuukirivu, atambulira mu bulamu obutaliiko kyakunenyezebwa; ba mukisa abaana be abalimuddira mu bigere." 
Proverbs20:8 Kabaka bw’atuula ku ntebe ye ey’obwakabaka ng’asala emisango, amaaso ge gasunsulamu ne gaggyamu ebibi byonna." 
Proverbs20:9 Ani ayinza okugamba nti, “Ntukuzza omutima gwange, ndi mulongoofu era sirina kibi?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Ebipima obuzito ebitatuuka n’ebigera ebikyamu, byombi bya muzizo eri Mukama." 
Proverbs20:11 Omuvubuka naye amanyibwa olw’ebikolwa bye, obanga birongoofu era nga birungi." 
Proverbs20:12 Okutu okuwulira n’eriiso eriraba byombi Mukama ye y’abikola. 
Proverbs20:13 Toyagalanga kwebaka oleme kwavuwala, tunula, obeerenga n’ebyokulya bingi." 
Proverbs20:14 “Si kirungi, si kirungi,” bw’ayogera agula; naye bw’agenda n’alyoka yeenyumiririza mu ky’aguze." 
Proverbs20:15 Zaabu n’amayinja ag’omuwendo weebiri, naye emimwa egyogera eby’amagezi kye ky’omuwendo ekisingako." 
Proverbs20:16 Omuntu bw’aleeta ekyambalo kye ne yeeyimiririra gw’atamanyi, kitwalire ddala, na ddala bw’abanga yeeyimiririra omukazi omubambaavu." 
Proverbs20:17 Emmere enfune mu bukyamu ewooma mu kulya, naye emufuukira amayinja mu kamwa." 
Proverbs20:18 Kola entegeka nga weebuuza ku magezi, bw’oba onoolangirira olutalo sooka weebuuze." 
Proverbs20:19 Oyo agenda ng’asaasaanya olugambo abotola ebyama, noolwekyo weewale omuntu ayogerayogera ennyo ebitaliimu." 
Proverbs20:20 Omuntu akolimira kitaawe oba nnyina, ettabaaza ye erizikizibwa n’asigala mu kizikiza ekikutte ennyo." 
Proverbs20:21 Eby’obusika ebifune ng’ekiseera kyabyo tekinnatuuka, ku nkomerero tebiba na mukisa." 
Proverbs20:22 Toyogera nti, “Nzija kukusasula olw’ekibi kino!” Lindirira Mukama alikuyamba." 
Proverbs20:23 Ebipima ebikyamu bya muzizo eri Mukama, ne minzaani ez’obulimba tezisanyusa." 
Proverbs20:24 Amakubo g’omuntu gategekebwa Mukama, omuntu ayinza atya okutegeera ekkubo lya Mukama?" 
Proverbs20:25 Kyambika eri omuntu okwanguyiriza okweyama eri Mukama, naye oluvannyuma n’afumiitiriza ku bye yeeyamye." 
Proverbs20:26 Kabaka omugezi asengejja n’aggyamu abakozi b’ebibi, n’ababonereza awatali kusaasira." 
Proverbs20:27 Ettabaaza ya Mukama ekebera omwoyo gw’omuntu, n’enoonya mu bitundu eby’omunda ennyo." 
Proverbs20:28 Okwagala n’obwesigwa bikuuma kabaka mu butebenkevu, era obufuzi bwe bunywezebwa na kwagala." 
Proverbs20:29 Amaanyi kye kitiibwa ky’abavubuka, envi kye kitiibwa ky’abakadde." 
Proverbs20:30 Emiggo n’ebiwundu biggyawo ebibi, n’embooko zitereeza ebifo eby’omunda ennyo." 
Proverbs21:1 Omutima gwa kabaka guli ng’amazzi agakulukutira mu mukono gwa Mukama, era agukyusiza gy’ayagala yonna." 
Proverbs21:2 Buli kkubo lya muntu liba ng’ettuufu mu maaso ge, naye Mukama apima omutima." 
Proverbs21:3 Okukola ebituufu n’eby’amazima kisanyusa Mukama okusinga ssaddaaka. 
Proverbs21:4 Amaaso ageegulumiza, n’omutima ogw’amalala, ye ttabaaza y’ababi, era ebyo kwonoona." 
Proverbs21:5 Enteekateeka z’omunyiikivu zivaamu magoba meereere, naye okwanguyiriza okutalina nteekateeka kuvaamu bwavu." 
Proverbs21:6 Okufuna obugagga n’olulimi olulimba, mpewo buwewo etwalibwa eruuyi n’eruuyi era mutego gwa kufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Obukambwe bw’ababi bulibamalawo, kubanga bagaana okukola eby’ensonga." 
Proverbs21:8 Ekkubo ly’abazza emisango liba kyamu, naye ery’abataliiko musango liba golokofu." 
Proverbs21:9 Okusula ku kasolya k’ennyumba, kisinga okubeera mu nnyumba n’omukazi omuyombi." 
Proverbs21:10 Emmeeme y’omubi yeegomba okukola ebibi; talaga muliraanwa we kisa n’akatono. 
Proverbs21:11 Omukudaazi bw’abonerezebwa, atalina magezi agafuna; n’ow’amagezi bw’ayigirizibwa afuna okutegeera." 
Proverbs21:12 Katonda alaba ebifa mu nnyumba y’omubi, era abakozi b’ebibi abazikkiririza ddala." 
Proverbs21:13 Oyo aziba amatu ge eri okulaajana kw’omwavu, naye alikoowoola nga talina amwanukula." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekirabo ekigabire mu kyama kikakkanya obusungu obungi, n’enguzi ebikiddwa mu munagiro eggyawo ekiruyi ekingi." 
Proverbs21:15 Ensonga bwe zisalibwa mu bwenkanya, lye ssanyu eri abatuukirivu, naye kiba kyekango eri abakozi b’ebibi." 
Proverbs21:16 Omuntu awaba okuva mu kkubo ly’okutegeera, agukira mu bafu." 
Proverbs21:17 Aganza eby’amasanyu anaabanga mwavu, n’oyo ayagala omwenge n’amafuta taligaggawala." 
Proverbs21:18 Abakozi b’ebibi batuukibwako emitawaana egyandigudde ku balungi, n’ekyandituuse ku b’amazima kituuka ku batali beesigwa." 
Proverbs21:19 Okubeera mu ddungu, kisinga okubeera n’omukazi omuyombi anyiiganyiiga." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu nnyumba y’omutuukirivu mubaamu eby’obugagga eby’omuwendo, naye omusirusiru ebibye byonna abyonoona." 
Proverbs21:21 Agoberera obutuukirivu n’ekisa, alibeera n’obulamu obukulaakulana n’ekitiibwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Omuntu ow’amagezi alumba ekibuga eky’abazira nnamige, era n’asesebbula enfo yaabwe gye beesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Afuga akamwa ke n’olulimi lwe, yeewoonya emitawaana." 
Proverbs21:24 “Mukudaazi,” lye linnya ly’ab’amalala abeeraga, abeetwalira mu kwemanya okw’ekitalo mwe batambulira." 
Proverbs21:25 Okwetaaga kw’omugayaavu lwe luliba olumbe lwe, kubanga emikono gye tegyagala kukola." 
Proverbs21:26 Olunaku lwonna aba yeegomba kweyongezaako, naye omutuukirivu agaba awatali kwebalira." 
Proverbs21:27 Ssaddaaka y’omubi ya muzizo, na ddala bw’agireeta ng’alina ekigendererwa ekitali kirungi." 
Proverbs21:28 Omujulizi ow’obulimba alizikirira, naye ekigambo ky’oyo ayogera eby’amazima kiribeerera emirembe gyonna." 
Proverbs21:29 Omuntu omubi yeekazaakaza, naye omuntu ow’amazima yeegendereza amakubo ge." 
Proverbs21:30 Tewali magezi, newaakubadde okutegeera, wadde ebiteeso ebiyinza okulemesa Mukama." 
Proverbs21:31 Embalaasi etegekerwa olunaku olw’olutalo, naye obuwanguzi buva eri Mukama." 
Proverbs22:1 Erinnya eddungi lyagalibwa okusinga eby’obugagga ebingi, n’okuganja kusinga ffeeza oba zaabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Abagagga n’abaavu balina kimu ekibagatta, Mukama ye Mutonzi waabwe bonna." 
Proverbs22:3 Omuntu omutegeevu bw’alaba akabi yeekweka, naye abatalina magezi bagenda bugenzi mu maaso ne balumizibwa." 
Proverbs22:4 Obugagga n’ekitiibwa n’obulamu y’empeera ey’okwetoowazanga n’okutyanga Mukama. 
Proverbs22:5 Amaggwa n’emitego biri mu kkubo ly’omubambaavu; naye oyo akuuma emmeeme ye anaabyewalanga. 
Proverbs22:6 Manyiiriza omwana mu kkubo erimugwanira okutambulirangamu, ne bw’alikula talirivaamu." 
Proverbs22:7 Omugagga afuga abaavu, naye eyeewola aba muddu w’oyo amuwola." 
Proverbs22:8 Asiga obutali butuukirivu akungula mitawaana, n’oluga olw’obusungu bwe lulizikirizibwa." 
Proverbs22:9 Omuntu omugabi anaabanga n’omukisa, kubanga emmere ye agirya n’abaavu." 
Proverbs22:10 Goba omunyoomi, entalo zinaagenda, ennyombo n’okuvumagana binaakoma." 
Proverbs22:11 Omuntu eyeegomba omutima omulongoofu era ayogera n’eggonjebwa, talirema kuganja ewa kabaka." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaaso ga Mukama galabirira amazima, era adibya entegeka z’abatali beesigwa." 
Proverbs22:13 Omugayaavu ayogera nti, “Ebweru eriyo empologoma,” oba nti, “Nnyinza okutemulirwa mu kkubo.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Malaaya mutego gwa kabi, akolimiddwa Mukama mw’afiira." 
Proverbs22:15 Obusirusiru busibiddwa ku mutima gw’omwana omuto, naye omuggo ogukangavvula gulimuwonyeza ddala." 
Proverbs22:16 Omuntu atulugunya abaavu ne yeeyongera okugaggawala, n’oyo agabira omugagga awa abagagga enguzi, enkomerero ya bombi bwavu." 
Proverbs22:17 Ossangayo omwoyo okuwuliriza ebigambo by’omugezi, n’omutima gwo eri ebyo bye njigiriza." 
Proverbs22:18 Kibeera kya ssanyu bw’obikwata ku mutima gwo, n’oba mwetegefu okubiddamu byonna." 
Proverbs22:19 Mbikumanyisa leero ggwe, obwesige bwo bubeerenga mu Mukama." 
Proverbs22:20 Kale sikuwandiikidde ebintu amakumi asatu ebikuwabula era ebikuwa okumanya? 
Proverbs22:21 Sikulaze ekirungi n’ekituufu, olyoke obe n’eky’okuddamu eri oyo eyakutuma?" 
Proverbs22:22 Tonyaganga mwavu, kubanga mwavu, oba okutulugunyanga aleeteddwa mu mbuga." 
Proverbs22:23 Kubanga Mukama alibawolereza, n’abo ababanyaga alibanyaga." 
Proverbs22:24 Tokwananga muntu wa busungu, oba okuyitanga n’omuntu anyiiganyiiga amangu," 
Proverbs22:25 oleme okuyiga amakubo ge ne weesuula mu mitawaana. 
Proverbs22:26 Teweegattanga ku abo abeeyama, newaakubadde ku abo abeeyimirira ab’amabanja." 
Proverbs22:27 Bw’oliba nga tolina kya kusasula ekitanda kyo kyennyini kye kirikuggyibwako. 
Proverbs22:28 Tojjululanga nsalo bajjajjaabo gye bassaawo edda. 
Proverbs22:29 Omanyi omuntu omunyiikivu era omukugu mu mulimu gwe? Aliweereza bakabaka; taliweereza bantu batamanyiddwa. 
Proverbs23:1 Bw’otuulanga okulya n’omufuzi, weetegerezanga ebiri mu maaso go;" 
Proverbs23:2 era weegendereze bw’obanga omanyi ng’olulunkanira ebyokulya. 
Proverbs23:3 Tolulunkanira mmere ye ennungi, kubanga erimbalimba." 
Proverbs23:4 Teweemalangako mirembe ng’oyaayaanira obugagga; weefuge obeere mukkakkamu. 
Proverbs23:5 Eby’obugagga obikubako eriiso limu nga by’agenze dda, kubanga ddala bimera ebiwaawaatiro ne bibuuka mu bbanga ng’empungu." 
Proverbs23:6 Tolyanga mmere ya muntu mukodo, wadde okwegomba ebirungi by’alya." 
Proverbs23:7 Kubanga ye muntu abalirira ensimbi z’asaasaanyizza, n’akugamba nti, “Weeriire, weenywere,” naye ng’omutima gwe tegukusanyukira." 
Proverbs23:8 Akatono k’onooba olidde onookasesema, ebigambo byo ebirungi eby’okwebaza bibe bya bwereere." 
Proverbs23:9 Totegana kubuulirira musirusiru, kubanga ajja kunyooma ebigambo byo eby’amagezi." 
Proverbs23:10 Tojjululanga nsalo ey’edda, so toyingiriranga nnimiro za bamulekwa," 
Proverbs23:11 kubanga abalwanirira w’amaanyi, alikuggulako omusango." 
Proverbs23:12 Ossangayo omwoyo eri okuyigirizibwa, n’amatu go eri ebigambo by’okutegeera." 
Proverbs23:13 Tolekangayo kukangavvula mwana, bw’omubonereza n’akaggo tekimutta." 
Proverbs23:14 Mubonerezenga n’akaggo, kiwonye emmeeme ye okufa." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wange, bw’oba n’omutima ogw’amagezi, kinsanyusa." 
Proverbs23:16 Nnaajjaguzanga okuva ku ntobo y’omutima gwange, bw’onooyogeranga ebituufu." 
Proverbs23:17 Omutima gwo gulemenga okukwatirwa aboonoonyi obuggya, kyokka nyiikira okutya Mukama ebbanga lyonna." 
Proverbs23:18 Mazima ddala onoobanga n’essuubi mu biseera eby’omu maaso, n’essuubi lyo eryo teririggwaawo." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wange wulirizanga, obeerenga n’amagezi, okumenga omutima gwo mu kkubo ettuufu." 
Proverbs23:20 Teweegattanga ku abo abeekamirira omwenge, n’abalulunkanira ennyama:" 
Proverbs23:21 Kubanga omutamiivu n’omuluvu baavuwala, n’okubongoota olutata kubambaza enziina." 
Proverbs23:22 Wulirizanga kitaawo eyakuzaala, so togayanga nnyoko ng’akaddiye." 
Proverbs23:23 Gula amazima so togatunda, ffuna amagezi, n’okuyigirizibwa n’okutegeera." 
Proverbs23:24 Kitaawe w’omutuukirivu alina essanyu lingi, n’oyo azaala omwana ow’amagezi amwenyumiririzaamu." 
Proverbs23:25 Leka kitaawo ne nnyoko basanyuke, omukazi eyakuzaala ajaguzenga." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wange mpa omutima gwo, n’amaaso go geekalirize amakubo gange," 
Proverbs23:27 kubanga omukazi omwenzi lukonko luwanvu, n’omukazi omubambaavu luzzi lufunda." 
Proverbs23:28 Ateega ng’omutemu, n’ayongera ku muwendo gw’abasajja abatali beesigwa eri bakazi baabwe." 
Proverbs23:29 Ani alina obuyinike? Ani alina ennaku? Ani alina ennyombo? Ani alina okwemulugunya? Ani alina ebiwundu eby’obwereere? Ani amyuse amaaso? 
Proverbs23:30 Abo abatava ku mwenge, nga bagenda baloza ku mwenge omutabule." 
Proverbs23:31 Totunuulira wayini ng’amyuse, bw’atemaganira mu ggiraasi ng’akka empolampola;" 
Proverbs23:32 ku nkomerero aluma ng’omusota, wa busagwa ng’essalambwa." 
Proverbs23:33 Amaaso go galiraba ebyewuunyo, n’omutwe gwo ne gulowooza ebitategeerekeka." 
Proverbs23:34 Oliba ng’omuntu eyeebase wakati mu nnyanja, obanga oyo alengejjera waggulu ku mulongooti." 
Proverbs23:35 Olyogera nti, “Bankubye, naye sirumiddwa. Bankubye naye sirina kye mpuliddemu. Nnaazuukuka ddi, neeyongere okunywa?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Teweegombanga bakozi ba bibi era tobeesemberezanga. 
Proverbs24:2 Kubanga emitima gyabwe giteesa kukola bya butemu, era akamwa kaabwe koogera ku kukola bya ffujjo." 
Proverbs24:3 Amagezi ge gazimba ennyumba, n’okutegeera kwe kugiggumiza." 
Proverbs24:4 Olw’amagezi ebisenge by’ayo bijjula ebintu ebirungi, eby’obugagga ebitalabikalabika eby’omuwendo omungi." 
Proverbs24:5 Omuntu ow’amagezi aba n’obuyinza, n’omuntu alina okumanya yeeyongera amaanyi." 
Proverbs24:6 Kubanga okulwana olutalo weetaaga okuluŋŋamizibwa, n’okuluwangula, weetaaga abawi b’amagezi bangi." 
Proverbs24:7 Amagezi gasukkirira nnyo omusirusiru, talina ky’asobola kwogera mu lukuŋŋaana olw’oku wankaaki." 
Proverbs24:8 Oyo asala enkwe ez’okukola ebibi, aliyitibwa mukujjukujju." 
Proverbs24:9 Entegeka ez’obusirusiru muvaamu kwonoona, abantu beetamwa omukudaazi." 
Proverbs24:10 Bw’oyongobera mu kiseera eky’ebizibu, olwo ng’olina amaanyi matono!" 
Proverbs24:11 Odduukiriranga n’owonya abo abatwalibwa okuttibwa, n’abo abali ku njegoyego z’okuttibwa, obawonye okuttirwa obwemage." 
Proverbs24:12 Bw’ogambanga nti, “Laba kino twali tetukimanyi,” oyo akebera emitima aba talaba? Oyo akuuma obulamu bwo takimanyi? Talisasula buli muntu ng’omulimu gwe bwe guli?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wange olyanga omubisi gw’enjuki kubanga mulungi, omubisi oguva mu bisenge byagwo guwoomerera." 
Proverbs24:14 Era manya nti amagezi gawoomera emmeeme yo, bw’onoogafuna onoobeera n’essuubi mu bulamu obw’omu maaso, n’essuubi lyo teririkoma." 
Proverbs24:15 Toteeganga, ng’omunyazi bw’akola ku nnyumba y’omutuukirivu, tonyaganga maka ge." 
Proverbs24:16 Omuntu omutuukirivu ne bw’agwa emirundi omusanvu, addamu n’ayimuka, naye abakozi b’ebibi basuulibwa mu mitawaana." 
Proverbs24:17 Tosanyukanga ng’omulabe wo agudde, bwe yeesittalanga omutima gwo gulemenga okujaguza." 
Proverbs24:18 Si kulwa nga Mukama akiraba ne kitamusanyusa, n’amusunguwalira." 
Proverbs24:19 Teweeraliikiriranga olw’abo abakola ebibi, so abakozi b’ebibi tobakwatirwanga buggya." 
Proverbs24:20 Kubanga omuntu omubi talina ssuubi mu maaso, ettabaaza y’abakozi b’ebibi erizikizibwa." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wange otyanga Mukama, ne kabaka, era teweetabanga na bajeemu." 
Proverbs24:22 Kubanga obusungu bwabwe bulibuubuukira ku bajeemu era ani amaanyi akabi akalibatuukako? 
Proverbs24:23 Bino nabyo era bigambo by’abalina amagezi. Okwekubiira ng’osala emisango si kirungi. 
Proverbs24:24 Kale oyo agamba azizza omusango nti, “Toliiko ky’ovunaanibwa,” abantu banaamukolimiranga, n’amawanga ganaamwetamwanga." 
Proverbs24:25 Naye abo abasalira omusobya omusango ne gumusinga banaabanga n’essanyu, n’omukisa omulungi gulibatuukako." 
Proverbs24:26 Eky’okuddamu eky’amazima, kiri ng’okunywegerwa." 
Proverbs24:27 Malirizanga omulimu gwo ogw’ebweru, oteeketeeke ennimiro zo, n’oluvannyuma olyoke weezimbire ennyumba yo." 
Proverbs24:28 Towanga bujulizi bwa bulimba ku muliraanwa wo, so akamwa ko tekalimbanga." 
Proverbs24:29 Toyogeranga nti, “Omuntu oyo ndimukola nga bw’ankoze, era ndimusasuza nga bw’ampisizza.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Nayita ku nnimiro ey’omugayaavu, ne mpita ne ku nnimiro y’emizabbibu ey’oyo atalina kutegeera." 
Proverbs24:31 Kale laba, ng’ennimiro eyo ebunye amaggwa, wansi wonna nga wabikkiddwa omuddo, n’olukomera lwayo olw’amayinja nga lugudde." 
Proverbs24:32 Ne neekaliriza ne ntegeera ne nfuna ekyokuyiga mu bye nalaba.
